cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(PdfMaster LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ON)
set(CMAKE_AUTORCC ON)
set(CMAKE_AUTOUIC ON)

find_package(Qt6 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Widgets Pdf PdfWidgets)

set(APP_CONFIG_PATH "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/app_config.json")
file(READ "${APP_CONFIG_PATH}" APP_CONFIG_JSON)
string(JSON APP_NAME GET "${APP_CONFIG_JSON}" app_name)
string(JSON APP_EXECUTABLE GET "${APP_CONFIG_JSON}" app_executable)
string(JSON APP_BUNDLE_ID GET "${APP_CONFIG_JSON}" bundle_identifier)
set(APP_ICON_FILE "app")
set(APP_ICON_ICNS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/resources/icons/app.icns")
set(APP_ICON_ICO_SOURCE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/resources/icons/app.ico")

configure_file(
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Info.plist.in"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/Info.plist"
    @ONLY
)

set(APP_SOURCES
    src/main.cpp
    src/app/MainWindow.h
    src/app/MainWindow.cpp
    src/core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h
    src/core/platform/runtime/StructuredLogger.h
    src/core/platform/runtime/StructuredLogger.cpp
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/ReaderStateStore.h
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/ReaderStateStore.cpp
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfTextIndexer.h
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfTextIndexer.cpp
    src/core/domain/model/LayoutModel.h
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfLayoutExtractor.h
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfLayoutExtractor.cpp
    src/core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.h
    src/core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.cpp
    src/core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h
    src/core/domain/model/DocumentModel.cpp
    src/core/domain/model/DocumentStructure.h
    src/core/domain/model/DocumentStructure.cpp
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrAdapter.h
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrAdapter.cpp
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrLayoutFusion.h
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrLayoutFusion.cpp
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.h
    src/core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.cpp
    src/core/domain/quality/SemanticFidelityGate.h
    src/core/domain/quality/SemanticFidelityGate.cpp
    src/core/domain/quality/FormatRegressionEvaluator.h
    src/core/domain/quality/FormatRegressionEvaluator.cpp
    src/core/application/DocumentExporter.h
    src/core/application/DocumentExporter.cpp
    src/core/infrastructure/ooxml/NativeOoxmlExportKernel.h
    src/core/infrastructure/ooxml/NativeOoxmlExportKernel.cpp
    src/core/words/DocxExporter.h
    src/core/words/DocxExporter.cpp
    src/core/excel/XlsxExporter.h
    src/core/excel/XlsxExporter.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptxExporter.h
    src/core/ppt/PptxExporter.cpp
    src/core/words/DocxNativeKernel.h
    src/core/words/DocxNativeKernel.cpp
    src/core/excel/XlsxNativeKernel.h
    src/core/excel/XlsxNativeKernel.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptxNativeKernel.h
    src/core/ppt/PptxNativeKernel.cpp
    src/core/application/ConversionPipeline.h
    src/core/application/ConversionPipeline.cpp
    src/core/application/ConversionWorker.h
    src/core/application/ConversionWorker.cpp
    src/core/application/TaskManager.h
    src/core/application/TaskManager.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptTextMapper.h
    src/core/ppt/PptTextMapper.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptGraphicMapper.h
    src/core/ppt/PptGraphicMapper.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptTableMapper.h
    src/core/ppt/PptTableMapper.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptDocumentMapper.h
    src/core/ppt/PptDocumentMapper.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptTypeNormalizer.h
    src/core/ppt/PptTypeNormalizer.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptPageDiffEvaluator.h
    src/core/ppt/PptPageDiffEvaluator.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptRecognitionGate.h
    src/core/ppt/PptRecognitionGate.cpp
    src/core/ppt/PptConversionEngine.h
    src/core/ppt/PptConversionEngine.cpp
)

if(APPLE)
    add_executable(PdfMaster MACOSX_BUNDLE ${APP_SOURCES})
    set_target_properties(PdfMaster PROPERTIES
        MACOSX_BUNDLE_INFO_PLIST ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/Info.plist
        OUTPUT_NAME "${APP_EXECUTABLE}"
    )
    if(EXISTS "${APP_ICON_ICNS}")
        set_source_files_properties("${APP_ICON_ICNS}" PROPERTIES MACOSX_PACKAGE_LOCATION Resources)
        target_sources(PdfMaster PRIVATE "${APP_ICON_ICNS}")
    endif()
else()
    add_executable(PdfMaster WIN32 ${APP_SOURCES})
    set_target_properties(PdfMaster PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "${APP_EXECUTABLE}")
endif()

target_include_directories(PdfMaster PRIVATE src)
target_link_libraries(PdfMaster PRIVATE Qt6::Widgets Qt6::Pdf Qt6::PdfWidgets)
target_compile_definitions(PdfMaster PRIVATE APP_DISPLAY_NAME="${APP_NAME}")

if(WIN32)
    if(EXISTS "${APP_ICON_ICO_SOURCE}")
        set(APP_ICON_RC "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/app.rc")
        set(APP_ICON_ICO "${APP_ICON_ICO_SOURCE}")
        configure_file("${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/resources/app.rc.in" "${APP_ICON_RC}" @ONLY)
        target_sources(PdfMaster PRIVATE "${APP_ICON_RC}")
    endif()
endif()

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/README.md
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# PDF Master

`PDF Master` 是一个面向生产场景的 Qt/C++ 桌面转换器，聚焦三件事：

- 阅读可用：PDF 预览、检索、批量任务追踪与可观测日志。
- 转换可控：PDF 到 `docx/xlsx/pptx` 的结构化导出链路。
- 质量可量化：通过语义门禁、回归评估与 OCR 兜底提升真实样本覆盖率。

## 能力矩阵

- 输入：标准文本 PDF、扫描件 PDF、弱文本 PDF（如营业执照）。
- 输出：`docx`、`xlsx`、`pptx`。
- 模式：GUI 交互模式 + CLI 批处理模式（用于批量任务和 CI 验收）。
- OCR：优先 `Tesseract`，次选 `PaddleOCR`。
- 依赖探测：内置工具优先（App Bundle），系统 PATH 回退。

## 设计目标

- **源一致性优先**：保持“文本语义、段落结构、表格关系、分页逻辑”的一致性，而不是只追求像素级复刻。
- **可回归**：每次改动都能通过统一评分脚本输出结构化报告。
- **可部署**：支持 macOS/Windows 打包，便于独立开源仓库发布。

## 核心架构

- `TaskManager`：任务排队、状态流转、后台调度。
- `ConversionWorker`：工作线程执行单任务并回传结构化日志。
- `ConversionPipeline`：主转换管线，负责阶段编排、重试、回退。
- `ToolExecutor`：外部命令统一执行层，封装探测和运行策略。
- `DocumentModel`：统一 IR（中间表示），解耦 OCR 与导出器。
- `StructureUnderstanding`：结构理解层，产出标题、区域、表格等统一结构。
- `SemanticFidelityGate`：语义保真门禁，评估是否可安全导出。
- `FormatRegressionEvaluator`：导出回归评估，支持硬门禁和告警模式。
- `DocumentExporter`：`docx/xlsx/pptx` 导出器抽象。

## 源一致性方法（高保真策略）

项目当前采用“多层守护”来提高真实文档一致性：

- **对象级抽取优先**：优先消费版面对象与文本对象，保留几何关系。
- **统一结构层**：把页面内容重建为节点、区域、表格、标题层级。
- **语义保真门禁**：在导出前评估可用性，阻断严重语义漂移。
- **回归评估**：基于 `F1 + 结构分 + 大小分` 计算质量分，支持策略横向对比。
- **OCR 兜底**：遇到扫描件/弱文本时触发栅格化 + OCR + 布局融合。
- **背景图补偿**：在必要场景注入页面背景，降低图文错位风险。

## OCR 回退链路

- `pdftoppm` 栅格化 PDF 页面为 PNG。
- OCR 适配器识别（`Tesseract` 或 `PaddleOCR`）。
- 识别结果写入 `DocumentModel`。
- `OcrLayoutFusion` 融合 OCR 文本与版面几何信息。
- 重新构建统一结构并导出目标格式。

## 内置工具优先（方案 B）

从当前版本开始，macOS 打包会尝试把以下工具复制到 App 内：

- `pdftotext`
- `pdftoppm`
- `tesseract`
- `tessdata/*.traineddata`

运行时命令探测顺序：

1. `PdfMaster.app/Contents/Resources/tools`（内置优先）
2. 系统 PATH（回退）

这使发布包更接近“安装即用”，并减少对用户本地环境差异的敏感度。

## CLI 用法

单文件：

```bash
./PdfMaster --cli \
  --input /path/to/sample.pdf \
  --output-dir /path/to/out \
  --formats docx,xlsx,pptx \
  --max-retries 1
```

目录批量：

```bash
./PdfMaster --cli \
  --input-dir /path/to/pdf_dir \
  --output-dir /path/to/out \
  --formats docx,xlsx,pptx
```

## 构建与打包

### 依赖

- Qt 6（`Widgets`、`Pdf`、`PdfWidgets`）
- CMake `>= 3.20`
- LibreOffice（`soffice`）

### macOS

1. 配置 `build_config.macos.json`（Qt/CMake/macdeployqt 路径）。
2. 执行：

```bash
python3 build_mac.py
```

产物：

- `dist/PdfMaster.app`
- `dist/<app_name>.dmg`

### Windows

1. 配置 `build_config.windows.json`。
2. 执行：

```powershell
python build_windows.py
```

产物在 `dist/`。

## 开源发布建议

- 建议将本目录独立为仓库根目录（`pdf-master`）。
- 通过 GitHub Actions 跑基础构建 + CLI 冒烟转换 + benchmark 评估。
- 在 Release 附带：
  - macOS `.dmg`
  - Windows 可执行包/安装包
  - 对应版本的 benchmark 报告（`md + json`）

## 目录结构

```text
pdf-master/
  src/
    app/
    core/
  tools/
  benchmarks/
  resources/
  CMakeLists.txt
  app_config.json
  build_mac.py
  build_windows.py
  README.md
  LICENSE
```

📄  pdf-master/build_mac.py

from pathlib import Path
import json
import os
import re
import shutil
import subprocess
from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Set


def run_command(command: List[str], cwd: Path, env: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None) -> None:
    process = subprocess.Popen(
        command,
        cwd=str(cwd),
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
        text=True,
        bufsize=1,
        universal_newlines=True,
        env=env,
    )
    if process.stdout is not None:
        for line in process.stdout:
            print(line, end="")
    process.wait()
    if process.returncode != 0:
        raise SystemExit(process.returncode)


def load_config(root: Path) -> Dict[str, object]:
    cfg_path = root / "build_config.macos.json"
    if not cfg_path.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(cfg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        return {}


def load_app_config(root: Path) -> Dict[str, object]:
    cfg_path = root / "app_config.json"
    if not cfg_path.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(cfg_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        return {}


def read_value(cfg: Dict[str, object], key: str, default: str) -> str:
    value = cfg.get(key)
    return str(value) if value else default


def first_existing_path(candidates: List[Path]) -> Optional[Path]:
    for path in candidates:
        if path.exists():
            return path
    return None


def parse_arch_list(value: str) -> List[str]:
    parts = [item.strip() for item in re.split(r"[;,\s]+", value) if item.strip()]
    seen: Set[str] = set()
    result: List[str] = []
    for part in parts:
        if part in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(part)
        result.append(part)
    return result


def tools_bundle_arch_root(root: Path, target_arch: str) -> Path:
    return root / target_arch


def missing_tools_for_arch(bundle_root: Path, target_arch: str) -> List[str]:
    required = ["pdftotext", "pdftoppm", "pdftohtml", "pdftocairo", "tesseract"]
    arch_root = tools_bundle_arch_root(bundle_root, target_arch)
    return [name for name in required if not (arch_root / "bin" / name).exists()]


def resolve_tessdata_dir(bundle_arch_root: Path) -> Optional[Path]:
    return first_existing_path(
        [
            bundle_arch_root / "tessdata",
            bundle_arch_root / "share" / "tessdata",
        ]
    )


def copy_tool_with_link(path: Path, tools_bin_dir: Path) -> Path:
    target = tools_bin_dir / path.name
    if target.exists() or target.is_symlink():
        target.unlink()
    shutil.copy2(path, target)
    target.chmod(0o755)
    return target


def list_macho_dependencies(binary: Path) -> List[str]:
    output = subprocess.check_output(["otool", "-L", str(binary)], text=True)
    deps: List[str] = []
    for line in output.splitlines()[1:]:
        stripped = line.strip()
        if not stripped:
            continue
        match = re.match(r"([^\s]+)\s+\(", stripped)
        if match:
            deps.append(match.group(1))
    return deps


def should_bundle_dependency(dep: str) -> bool:
    return not dep.startswith("/usr/lib/") and not dep.startswith("/System/Library/")


def is_path_within(path: Path, roots: List[Path]) -> bool:
    resolved = path.resolve()
    for root in roots:
        try:
            resolved.relative_to(root.resolve())
            return True
        except ValueError:
            continue
    return False


def resolve_dependency(
    dep: str,
    reference_file: Path,
    extra_search_roots: List[Path],
    allowed_roots: List[Path],
) -> Optional[Path]:
    if dep.startswith("/"):
        candidate = Path(dep)
        if candidate.exists() and is_path_within(candidate, allowed_roots):
            return candidate.resolve()
        dep_name = candidate.name
        for root in extra_search_roots:
            by_name = (root / dep_name).resolve()
            if by_name.exists() and is_path_within(by_name, allowed_roots):
                return by_name
        return None
    if dep.startswith("@loader_path/"):
        suffix = dep.replace("@loader_path/", "", 1)
        candidate = (reference_file.parent / suffix).resolve()
        return candidate if candidate.exists() else None
    if dep.startswith("@rpath/"):
        lib_name = dep.replace("@rpath/", "", 1)
        candidates = [
            (reference_file.parent / "../lib" / lib_name).resolve(),
        ]
        candidates.extend([(root / lib_name).resolve() for root in extra_search_roots])
        for candidate in candidates:
            if candidate.exists() and is_path_within(candidate, allowed_roots):
                return candidate.resolve()
    # 兜底：按库名在额外目录查找
    dep_name = Path(dep).name
    for root in extra_search_roots:
        candidate = (root / dep_name).resolve()
        if candidate.exists() and is_path_within(candidate, allowed_roots):
            return candidate
    return None


def rewrite_dependency(target_binary: Path, from_dep: str, to_dep: str) -> None:
    run_command(["install_name_tool", "-change", from_dep, to_dep, str(target_binary)], target_binary.parent)


def ad_hoc_sign(path: Path) -> None:
    run_command(["codesign", "--force", "--sign", "-", "--timestamp=none", str(path)], path.parent)


def bundle_tool_dependencies(tool_bins: List[Path], tools_lib_dir: Path, extra_search_roots: List[Path]) -> None:
    tools_lib_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    queue: List[Path] = list(tool_bins)
    queue.extend(sorted(tools_lib_dir.glob("*.dylib")))
    processed: Set[Path] = set()
    unresolved_deps: Set[str] = set()
    allowed_roots = [root.resolve() for root in extra_search_roots]
    allowed_roots.append(tools_lib_dir.resolve())
    allowed_roots.extend([tool.parent.resolve() for tool in tool_bins])

    while queue:
        current = queue.pop(0)
        if current in processed or not current.exists():
            continue
        processed.add(current)

        try:
            dependencies = list_macho_dependencies(current)
        except subprocess.CalledProcessError:
            continue

        for dep in dependencies:
            if not should_bundle_dependency(dep):
                continue

            resolved = resolve_dependency(dep, current, extra_search_roots, allowed_roots)
            if resolved is None:
                unresolved_deps.add(f"{current.name} -> {dep}")
                continue

            target_lib = tools_lib_dir / resolved.name
            if not target_lib.exists():
                shutil.copy2(resolved, target_lib)
                target_lib.chmod(0o755)
            if target_lib not in processed:
                queue.append(target_lib)

            if current.parent == tools_lib_dir:
                # 对库内部依赖，尽量不做 @rpath -> @loader_path 扩容修改，避免 x86_64 header 空间不足。
                if dep.startswith("@rpath/") or dep.startswith("@loader_path/"):
                    new_dep = dep
                else:
                    new_dep = f"@loader_path/{target_lib.name}"
            else:
                new_dep = f"@loader_path/../lib/{target_lib.name}"
            if dep != new_dep:
                rewrite_dependency(current, dep, new_dep)

            if target_lib in processed:
                continue

    if unresolved_deps:
        preview = ", ".join(sorted(unresolved_deps)[:8])
        raise SystemExit(
            "工具动态库依赖不完整（仅允许 third_party/tools 供给）。"
            f"未解析项示例: {preview}"
        )

    # 先签动态库再签可执行，避免依赖链导致签名再次失效。
    for lib_path in sorted(tools_lib_dir.glob("*.dylib")):
        ad_hoc_sign(lib_path)
    for tool_bin in tool_bins:
        ad_hoc_sign(tool_bin)


def copy_bundled_tools(app_path: Path, target_arch: str, bundle_root: Path) -> None:
    tools_root = app_path / "Contents" / "Resources" / "tools"
    tools_bin_dir = tools_root / "bin"
    tools_lib_dir = tools_root / "lib"
    tessdata_dir = tools_root / "tessdata"
    tools_bin_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    tools_lib_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    tessdata_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    bundle_arch_root = tools_bundle_arch_root(bundle_root, target_arch)
    if not bundle_arch_root.exists():
        raise SystemExit(f"架构 {target_arch} 的工具目录不存在: {bundle_arch_root}")

    required = ["pdftotext", "pdftoppm", "pdftohtml", "pdftocairo", "tesseract"]
    copied: List[str] = []
    missing: List[str] = []
    copied_targets: List[Path] = []

    for name in required:
        tool_bin = bundle_arch_root / "bin" / name
        if not tool_bin.exists():
            missing.append(name)
            continue
        copied_targets.append(copy_tool_with_link(tool_bin, tools_bin_dir))
        copied.append(name)

    # 先复制预置动态库，后续再补齐可解析依赖。
    bundle_lib_dir = bundle_arch_root / "lib"
    if bundle_lib_dir.exists():
        for lib in bundle_lib_dir.glob("*.dylib"):
            shutil.copy2(lib, tools_lib_dir / lib.name)
            (tools_lib_dir / lib.name).chmod(0o755)

    tessdata_src = resolve_tessdata_dir(bundle_arch_root)
    if tessdata_src is not None:
        for traineddata in tessdata_src.glob("*.traineddata"):
            shutil.copy2(traineddata, tessdata_dir / traineddata.name)

    if copied_targets:
        bundle_tool_dependencies(copied_targets, tools_lib_dir, [bundle_lib_dir, tools_lib_dir])

    print(f"内置工具已复制: {', '.join(copied) if copied else '无'}")
    if missing:
        raise SystemExit(
            f"架构 {target_arch} 在复制阶段发现工具缺失: {', '.join(missing)}。"
            "请先执行 scripts/fetch_tools_bundle.py 下载对应架构工具。"
        )


def package_dmg_with_app_link(
    app_path: Path,
    dist_dir: Path,
    app_name: str,
    app_executable: str,
    arch: str,
    env: Dict[str, str],
) -> Path:
    suffix = f"-{arch}"
    stage_dir = dist_dir / f".dmg-staging-{arch}"
    if stage_dir.exists():
        shutil.rmtree(stage_dir)
    stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    staged_app = stage_dir / f"{app_executable}.app"
    shutil.copytree(app_path, staged_app, symlinks=True)
    os.symlink("/Applications", stage_dir / "Applications")

    dmg_path = dist_dir / f"{app_name}{suffix}.dmg"
    if dmg_path.exists():
        dmg_path.unlink()
    volume_name = f"{app_name} {arch}"

    run_command(
        [
            "hdiutil",
            "create",
            "-volname",
            volume_name,
            "-srcfolder",
            str(stage_dir),
            "-ov",
            "-format",
            "UDZO",
            str(dmg_path),
        ],
        dist_dir,
        env,
    )
    shutil.rmtree(stage_dir, ignore_errors=True)
    return dmg_path


def main() -> None:
    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    cfg = load_config(root)
    app_cfg = load_app_config(root)

    cmake = str(cfg.get("CMAKE_EXE") or shutil.which("cmake") or "cmake")
    qt_prefix = cfg.get("QT_PREFIX")
    macdeployqt = str(cfg.get("MACDEPLOYQT_EXE") or "macdeployqt")

    app_name = read_value(app_cfg, "app_name", "PDF Master")
    app_executable = read_value(app_cfg, "app_executable", "PdfMaster")
    dist = root / "dist"
    env = dict(os.environ)
    tools_bundle_root = root / str(cfg.get("TOOLS_BUNDLE_ROOT") or "third_party/tools/macos")
    arch_list_value = str(cfg.get("MAC_PACKAGE_ARCHES") or cfg.get("CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES") or "arm64")
    target_arches = parse_arch_list(arch_list_value)
    if not target_arches:
        raise SystemExit("未配置有效的打包架构")

    planned_arches: List[str] = []
    for arch in target_arches:
        missing = missing_tools_for_arch(tools_bundle_root, arch)
        if missing:
            print(f"跳过架构 {arch}: 目录 {tools_bundle_root / arch} 缺少工具 {', '.join(missing)}")
            continue
        planned_arches.append(arch)

    if not planned_arches:
        raise SystemExit("没有可打包架构：所有目标架构都缺少必需内置工具。")
    dist.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    for arch in planned_arches:
        build = root / f"build-{arch}"
        if build.exists():
            print(f"清理历史 build 目录: {build}")
            shutil.rmtree(build)

        args = [
            cmake,
            "-S",
            str(root),
            "-B",
            str(build),
            "-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release",
            "-DCMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT=" + str(cfg.get("CMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT") or "macosx"),
            "-DCMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=" + str(cfg.get("CMAKE_OSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET") or "11.0"),
            "-DCMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES=" + arch,
        ]
        if qt_prefix:
            args.append("-DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=" + str(qt_prefix))

        print(f"=== 开始构建架构: {arch} ===")
        run_command(args, root, env)
        run_command([cmake, "--build", str(build), "--config", "Release"], root, env)

        app_path = build / f"{app_executable}.app"
        if not app_path.exists():
            app_path = build / "Release" / f"{app_executable}.app"
        if not app_path.exists():
            raise SystemExit(f"未找到构建产物 app: {arch}")

        run_command([macdeployqt, str(app_path)], root, env)
        copy_bundled_tools(app_path, arch, tools_bundle_root)

        app_suffix = f"-{arch}"
        target_app = dist / f"{app_executable}{app_suffix}.app"
        if target_app.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(target_app)
        shutil.copytree(app_path, target_app, symlinks=True)

        dmg_path = package_dmg_with_app_link(
            app_path=target_app,
            dist_dir=dist,
            app_name=app_name,
            app_executable=app_executable,
            arch=arch,
            env=env,
        )
        print(f"已生成: {target_app}")
        print(f"已生成: {dmg_path}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/build_windows.py
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
from pathlib import Path
import json
import os
import shutil
import subprocess


def run_command(command: list[str], cwd: Path, env: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> None:
    process = subprocess.Popen(
        command,
        cwd=str(cwd),
        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
        stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
        text=True,
        bufsize=1,
        universal_newlines=True,
        encoding="utf-8",
        errors="replace",
        env=env,
    )
    if process.stdout is not None:
        for line in process.stdout:
            print(line, end="")
    process.wait()
    if process.returncode != 0:
        raise SystemExit(process.returncode)


def load_json(path: Path) -> dict:
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        return {}


def read_value(cfg: dict, key: str, default: str) -> str:
    value = cfg.get(key)
    return str(value) if value else default


def copy_windows_bundled_tools(dist_dir: Path, bundle_root: Path) -> None:
    bin_src = bundle_root / "bin"
    lib_src = bundle_root / "lib"
    tessdata_src = bundle_root / "tessdata"
    if not bin_src.exists():
        raise SystemExit(f"工具目录缺失: {bin_src}。请先运行 scripts/fetch_tools_bundle.py")

    tools_root = dist_dir / "tools"
    tools_bin = tools_root / "bin"
    tools_lib = tools_root / "lib"
    tools_tessdata = tools_root / "tessdata"
    if tools_root.exists():
        shutil.rmtree(tools_root)
    tools_bin.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    tools_lib.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    required = ["pdftotext.exe", "pdftoppm.exe", "pdftohtml.exe", "pdftocairo.exe", "tesseract.exe"]
    missing = []
    for exe_name in required:
        src = bin_src / exe_name
        if not src.exists():
            missing.append(exe_name)
            continue
        shutil.copy2(src, tools_bin / exe_name)

    if missing:
        raise SystemExit(f"Windows 工具缺失: {', '.join(missing)}")

    if lib_src.exists():
        for dll in lib_src.glob("*.dll"):
            shutil.copy2(dll, tools_lib / dll.name)
        for lib in lib_src.glob("*.lib"):
            shutil.copy2(lib, tools_lib / lib.name)

    if tessdata_src.exists():
        shutil.copytree(tessdata_src, tools_tessdata, symlinks=True)

    # 将工具 dll 放到 exe 同级，保证 QProcess 启动时依赖可解析。
    for dll in tools_lib.glob("*.dll"):
        shutil.copy2(dll, dist_dir / dll.name)


def main() -> None:
    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
    cfg = load_json(root / "build_config.windows.json")
    app_cfg = load_json(root / "app_config.json")

    env = dict(os.environ)

    cmake = str(cfg.get("CMAKE_EXE") or shutil.which("cmake") or "cmake")
    windeployqt = str(cfg.get("WINDEPLOYQT_EXE") or shutil.which("windeployqt") or "windeployqt")
    tools_bundle_root = root / str(cfg.get("TOOLS_BUNDLE_ROOT") or "third_party/tools/windows/x86_64")

    build = root / "build"
    dist = root / "dist"
    app_executable = read_value(app_cfg, "app_executable", "PdfMaster")
    if build.exists():
        print("清理历史 build 目录...")
        shutil.rmtree(build)

    generator = str(cfg.get("CMAKE_GENERATOR") or "Ninja")
    configure_args = [cmake, "-S", str(root), "-B", str(build), "-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release", "-G", generator]

    make_program = cfg.get("CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM")
    if make_program:
        configure_args.append("-DCMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM=" + str(make_program))

    qt_prefix = cfg.get("QT_PREFIX")
    if qt_prefix:
        configure_args.append("-DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=" + str(qt_prefix))

    run_command(configure_args, root, env)
    run_command([cmake, "--build", str(build), "--config", "Release"], root, env)

    exe = build / f"{app_executable}.exe"
    if not exe.exists():
        exe = build / "Release" / f"{app_executable}.exe"
    if not exe.exists():
        raise SystemExit("未找到构建产物 exe")

    dist.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    target_exe = dist / f"{app_executable}.exe"
    shutil.copy2(exe, target_exe)

    run_command([windeployqt, str(target_exe)], root, env)
    copy_windows_bundled_tools(dist, tools_bundle_root)
    print(f"已生成: {target_exe}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/scripts/fetch_tools_bundle.py
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import tarfile
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Dict, Iterable, List, Tuple

CHANNEL = "https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/anaconda/cloud/conda-forge"
LOCK_FILE = "scripts/tools_bundle_lock.json"
TARGETS: Dict[str, Tuple[str, str]] = {
    "mac-arm64": ("osx-arm64", "third_party/tools/macos/arm64"),
    "mac-x86_64": ("osx-64", "third_party/tools/macos/x86_64"),
    "win-x86_64": ("win-64", "third_party/tools/windows/x86_64"),
}
REQUIRED_UNIX = ["pdftotext", "pdftoppm", "pdftohtml", "pdftocairo", "tesseract"]
REQUIRED_WIN = [f"{x}.exe" for x in REQUIRED_UNIX]


def run_cmd(cmd: List[str], cwd: Path) -> None:
    proc = subprocess.Popen(cmd, cwd=str(cwd), stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT, text=True)
    assert proc.stdout is not None
    for line in proc.stdout:
        print(line, end="")
    code = proc.wait()
    if code != 0:
        raise SystemExit(code)


def download_file_with_curl(url: str, target: Path) -> None:
    target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    cmd = [
        "curl",
        "-L",
        "--fail",
        "--connect-timeout",
        "15",
        "--max-time",
        "600",
        "-o",
        str(target),
        url,
    ]
    run_cmd(cmd, target.parent)


def extract_tar_bz2(archive_path: Path, out_dir: Path) -> None:
    with tarfile.open(archive_path, "r:bz2") as tf:
        tf.extractall(out_dir)


def target_is_ready(out_root: Path, is_windows: bool) -> bool:
    required = REQUIRED_WIN if is_windows else REQUIRED_UNIX
    missing_bins = [x for x in required if not (out_root / "bin" / x).exists()]
    if missing_bins:
        return False

    if is_windows:
        if not any((out_root / "lib").glob("*.dll")):
            return False
        tessdata_dir = out_root / "tessdata"
        if not tessdata_dir.exists() or not any(tessdata_dir.iterdir()):
            return False
    else:
        if not any((out_root / "lib").glob("*.dylib")):
            return False
        if not any((out_root / "tessdata").glob("*.traineddata")):
            return False
    return True


def copy_bins(src_root: Path, dst_bin: Path, is_windows: bool) -> None:
    src_bin = (src_root / "Library" / "bin") if is_windows else (src_root / "bin")
    required = REQUIRED_WIN if is_windows else REQUIRED_UNIX
    dst_bin.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    for name in required:
        src = src_bin / name
        if src.exists():
            shutil.copy2(src, dst_bin / name)


def copy_libs(src_root: Path, dst_lib: Path, is_windows: bool) -> None:
    candidates = [src_root / "lib"] if not is_windows else [src_root / "Library" / "bin", src_root / "Library" / "lib"]
    dst_lib.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    for c in candidates:
        if not c.exists():
            continue
        for pattern in ("*.dylib", "*.so*", "*.dll"):
            for p in c.glob(pattern):
                if p.is_file():
                    shutil.copy2(p, dst_lib / p.name)


def copy_tessdata(src_root: Path, dst_tess: Path, is_windows: bool) -> bool:
    candidates = [
        src_root / "tessdata",
        src_root / "share" / "tessdata",
        src_root / "Library" / "share" / "tessdata",
    ]
    if is_windows:
        candidates = [src_root / "Library" / "share" / "tessdata"] + candidates
    for c in candidates:
        if c.exists():
            if dst_tess.exists():
                shutil.rmtree(dst_tess)
            shutil.copytree(c, dst_tess, symlinks=True)
            return True
    return False


def load_lock(root: Path) -> Dict[str, List[str]]:
    lock_path = root / LOCK_FILE
    if not lock_path.exists():
        raise SystemExit(f"锁文件不存在: {lock_path}")
    data = json.loads(lock_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    if not isinstance(data, dict):
        raise SystemExit("锁文件格式错误：应为 JSON object")
    return {k: list(v) for k, v in data.items() if isinstance(v, list)}


def stage_target(
    root: Path,
    target: str,
    subdir: str,
    out_rel: str,
    package_files: List[str],
    use_cache: bool,
) -> None:
    is_windows = subdir.startswith("win-")
    out_root = (root / out_rel).resolve()
    print(f"[{target}] 检查已下载产物: {out_root}")
    if target_is_ready(out_root, is_windows):
        print(f"[{target}] 已存在完整产物，跳过下载: {out_root}")
        return

    if not package_files:
        raise SystemExit(f"[{target}] 锁文件中没有包清单")

    cache_root = root / "third_party" / "_cache" / "conda" / subdir
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix=f"lock_{target}_") as td:
        tmp = Path(td)
        extracted_map: Dict[str, Path] = {}
        for filename in package_files:
            url = f"{CHANNEL}/{subdir}/{filename}"
            archive = (cache_root / filename) if use_cache else (tmp / filename)
            if not archive.exists() or archive.stat().st_size == 0:
                print(f"[{target}] 下载 {filename}")
                download_file_with_curl(url, archive)
            else:
                print(f"[{target}] 复用缓存 {filename}")
            extract_dir = tmp / f"extract_{filename.replace('.', '_')}"
            extract_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            extract_tar_bz2(archive, extract_dir)
            extracted_map[filename] = extract_dir

        if out_root.exists():
            shutil.rmtree(out_root)
        (out_root / "bin").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        (out_root / "lib").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        for _, extracted in sorted(extracted_map.items()):
            copy_bins(extracted, out_root / "bin", is_windows)
        for _, extracted in sorted(extracted_map.items()):
            copy_libs(extracted, out_root / "lib", is_windows)

        copied_tessdata = False
        for _, extracted in sorted(extracted_map.items()):
            copied_tessdata = copy_tessdata(extracted, out_root / "tessdata", is_windows) or copied_tessdata
            if copied_tessdata:
                break

    if not target_is_ready(out_root, is_windows):
        raise SystemExit(f"[{target}] 产物不完整，请检查锁清单与导出逻辑: {out_root}")
    print(f"[{target}] 已就绪: {out_root}")


def parse_args() -> argparse.Namespace:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="按锁定包清单下载并导出 tools（不依赖本机环境）")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--targets",
        default="mac-arm64,mac-x86_64,win-x86_64",
        help="逗号分隔目标: mac-arm64,mac-x86_64,win-x86_64",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--use-cache",
        action="store_true",
        help="启用 third_party/_cache/conda 缓存复用（默认关闭）",
    )
    return parser.parse_args()


def normalize_targets(raw: str) -> Iterable[str]:
    seen = set()
    for item in [x.strip() for x in raw.split(",") if x.strip()]:
        if item not in TARGETS:
            raise SystemExit(f"不支持的 target: {item}，可选: {', '.join(TARGETS.keys())}")
        if item in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(item)
        yield item


def main() -> None:
    args = parse_args()
    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
    lock = load_lock(root)
    targets = list(normalize_targets(args.targets))
    print(f"将处理 targets: {', '.join(targets)}")

    for target in targets:
        subdir, out_rel = TARGETS[target]
        package_files = lock.get(target, [])
        stage_target(
            root=root,
            target=target,
            subdir=subdir,
            out_rel=out_rel,
            package_files=package_files,
            use_cache=args.use_cache,
        )
    print("全部完成。")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

struct IndexBuildResult {
    converter::PdfTextIndexer indexer;
    QString error;
    bool ok = false;

int inferHeadingLevel(const QString &line) {
    const QString text = line.simplified();
    if (text.isEmpty()) {
        return 1;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression chapterRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+章)"));
    static const QRegularExpression sectionRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+节)"));
    static const QRegularExpression articleRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+条)"));
    static const QRegularExpression partRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^(Part|篇|卷)\s*[A-Za-z0-9一二三四五六七八九十]+)"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption);
    static const QRegularExpression chapterEnRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^Chapter\s+[0-9IVXLC]+)"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption);
    static const QRegularExpression decimalRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+){0,5})\s*[\.\-、:：]?\s*.+)"));
    if (partRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (chapterRe.match(text).hasMatch() || chapterEnRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (sectionRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 2;
    }
    if (articleRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 3;
    }
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = decimalRe.match(text);
    if (m.hasMatch()) {
        const QString token = m.captured(1);
        return qBound(1, token.count('.') + 1, 4);
    }
    return 1;
}

bool isLikelyNoiseHeading(const QString &line) {
    const QString text = line.simplified();
    if (text.size() < 2) {
        return true;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression purePageNoRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^[第\s]*[0-9IVXLCivxlc]+[页\s]*$)"));
    static const QRegularExpression punctuationHeavyRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^[\.\-_=·•:：\s]+$)"));
    if (purePageNoRe.match(text).hasMatch() || punctuationHeavyRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return true;
    }
    int letterOrNumberCount = 0;
    for (const QChar ch : text) {
        if (ch.isLetterOrNumber()) {
            letterOrNumberCount += 1;
        }
    }
    return letterOrNumberCount <= 1;
}

QString pickHeadingCandidate(const QStringList &lines, const int page) {
    if (lines.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    static const QRegularExpression headingLikeRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+[章节部分条]|[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*\s*[\.\-、:：]?\s*.+|Chapter\s+[0-9IVXLC]+|Part\s+[A-Z0-9]+).*)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    const int inspectCount = qMin(6, lines.size());
    int bestScore = -100000;
    QString bestLine;
    for (int i = 0; i < inspectCount; ++i) {
        const QString line = lines.at(i).simplified();
        if (line.isEmpty() || isLikelyNoiseHeading(line)) {
            continue;
        }
        int score = 0;
        score += qMax(0, 120 - i * 24); // 越靠前越可能是标题
        if (line.size() <= 32) {
            score += 90;
        } else if (line.size() <= 60) {
            score += 45;
        } else if (line.size() <= 90 && page < 5) {
            score += 18;
        } else if (line.size() > 120) {
            score -= 80;
        }
        if (headingLikeRe.match(line).hasMatch()) {
            score += 140;
        }
        int punctCount = 0;
        for (const QChar ch : line) {
            if (!ch.isLetterOrNumber() && !ch.isSpace()) {
                punctCount += 1;
            }
        }
        if (punctCount >= line.size() / 2) {
            score -= 60;
        }
        if (score > bestScore) {
            bestScore = score;
            bestLine = line;
        }
    }
    if (bestScore < 45) {
        return QString();
    }
    return bestLine;
}

QString normalizeHeadingForDedup(QString heading) {
    heading = heading.simplified();
    if (heading.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    static const QRegularExpression leadingNoRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+[章节部分条]|[0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+){0,5}|[IVXLCivxlc]+)\s*[\.\-、:：）\)]*\s*)")
    );
    heading.remove(leadingNoRe);
    static const QRegularExpression tailPunct(QStringLiteral(R"([\s\.\-_=·•:：，,。;；!！?？、]+$)"));
    heading.remove(tailPunct);
    return heading.toCaseFolded();
}

bool isWordBoundaryChar(const QChar ch) {
    return ch.isLetterOrNumber() || ch == QChar('_');
}

bool isWholeWordHit(const QString &text, const int start, const int length) {
    if (start < 0 || length <= 0 || start + length > text.size()) {
        return false;
    }
    if (start > 0 && isWordBoundaryChar(text[start - 1])) {
        return false;
    }
    const int end = start + length;
    if (end < text.size() && isWordBoundaryChar(text[end])) {
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

QString buildSearchPreview(const QString &text, const int start, const int length) {
    const int context = 36;
    const int safeStart = qMax(0, start);
    const int from = qMax(0, safeStart - context);
    const int to = qMin(text.size(), safeStart + qMax(1, length) + context);
    QString snippet = text.mid(from, to - from).simplified();
    if (from > 0) {
        snippet.prepend(QStringLiteral("... "));
    }
    if (to < text.size()) {
        snippet.append(QStringLiteral(" ..."));
    }
    return snippet;
}

QString buildCrossPageSearchPreview(const QString &leftPage, const QString &rightPage, const QString &needle) {
    const int leftTake = qMin(28, leftPage.size());
    const int rightTake = qMin(28, rightPage.size());
    QString preview = QStringLiteral("...%1 | %2...")
        .arg(leftPage.right(leftTake).simplified(), rightPage.left(rightTake).simplified());
    if (!needle.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        preview += QStringLiteral(" [跨页:%1]").arg(needle.trimmed());
    }
    return preview;
}

QString buildHeadingSimilaritySignature(const QString &heading) {
    QString normalized = normalizeHeadingForDedup(heading);
    if (normalized.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    static const QRegularExpression tailPageMarker(
        QStringLiteral(R"((?:\s*(?:p|page|页)?\s*[0-9]{1,4})$)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    normalized.remove(tailPageMarker);
    normalized = normalized.simplified();
    QString compact;
    compact.reserve(normalized.size());
    for (const QChar ch : normalized) {
        if (ch.isLetterOrNumber()) {
            compact += ch;
        }
    }
    return compact;
}

enum class HeadingKind {
    Unknown = 0,
    Chapter = 1,
    Section = 2,
    Article = 3,
    Decimal = 4
};

HeadingKind classifyHeadingKind(const QString &line) {
    const QString text = line.simplified();
    if (text.isEmpty()) {
        return HeadingKind::Unknown;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression chapterRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+章)"));
    static const QRegularExpression sectionRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+节)"));
    static const QRegularExpression articleRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+条)"));
    static const QRegularExpression chapterEnRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^Chapter\s+[0-9IVXLC]+)"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption);
    static const QRegularExpression decimalRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+){0,5})\s*[\.\-、:：]?\s*.+)"));
    if (chapterRe.match(text).hasMatch() || chapterEnRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return HeadingKind::Chapter;
    }
    if (sectionRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return HeadingKind::Section;
    }
    if (articleRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return HeadingKind::Article;
    }
    if (decimalRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return HeadingKind::Decimal;
    }
    return HeadingKind::Unknown;
}

int extractTrailingPageMarker(const QString &line) {
    const QString text = line.simplified();
    if (text.isEmpty()) {
        return -1;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression markerRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"((?:[\.\-_=·•:：，,。;；、]{1,}|\s{2,})(?:p(?:age)?\.?\s*|页\s*)?([0-9]{1,4})\s*$)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = markerRe.match(text);
    if (!m.hasMatch()) {
        return -1;
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const int marker = m.captured(1).toInt(&ok);
    return ok ? marker : -1;
}

int inferPageFromOutlineIndex(const QAbstractItemModel *model, const QModelIndex &titleIndex, const int pageCount) {
    if (model == nullptr || !titleIndex.isValid() || pageCount <= 0) {
        return -1;
    }
    auto parsePageFromText = [&](const QString &text) -> int {
        const QString t = text.trimmed();
        if (t.isEmpty()) {
            return -1;
        }
        bool ok = false;
        const int direct = t.toInt(&ok);
        if (ok && direct >= 1 && direct <= pageCount) {
            return direct - 1;
        }
        static const QRegularExpression pageMarkerRe(
            QStringLiteral(R"((?:^|[^\d])(?:p(?:age)?\.?\s*|第\s*)?([0-9]{1,5})(?:\s*页)?(?:$|[^\d]))"),
            QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
        );
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = pageMarkerRe.match(t);
        if (!m.hasMatch()) {
            return -1;
        }
        const int candidate = m.captured(1).toInt(&ok);
        if (!ok || candidate < 1 || candidate > pageCount) {
            return -1;
        }
        return candidate - 1;
    };
    auto parsePageFromValue = [&](const QVariant &value) -> int {
        bool ok = false;
        const int zeroBased = value.toInt(&ok);
        if (ok && zeroBased >= 0 && zeroBased < pageCount) {
            return zeroBased;
        }
        const int oneBased = value.toInt(&ok);
        if (ok && oneBased >= 1 && oneBased <= pageCount) {
            return oneBased - 1;
        }
        if (value.canConvert<QString>()) {
            return parsePageFromText(value.toString());
        }
        return -1;
    };
    const int columnCount = qMax(1, model->columnCount(titleIndex.parent()));
    for (int col = 1; col < qMin(columnCount, 5); ++col) {
        const QModelIndex pageColumn = model->index(titleIndex.row(), col, titleIndex.parent());
        if (!pageColumn.isValid()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int displayPage = parsePageFromValue(pageColumn.data(Qt::DisplayRole));
        if (displayPage >= 0) {
            return displayPage;
        }
        const int editPage = parsePageFromValue(pageColumn.data(Qt::EditRole));
        if (editPage >= 0) {
            return editPage;
        }
    }
    const QVector<int> roles = {
        Qt::UserRole,
        Qt::UserRole + 1,
        Qt::UserRole + 2,
        Qt::UserRole + 3,
        Qt::UserRole + 4,
        Qt::UserRole + 5,
        Qt::UserRole + 6,
        Qt::UserRole + 7,
        Qt::UserRole + 8,
        Qt::UserRole + 9,
        Qt::UserRole + 10,
        Qt::UserRole + 11,
        Qt::UserRole + 12
    };
    for (const int role : roles) {
        const int page = parsePageFromValue(titleIndex.data(role));
        if (page >= 0) {
            return page;
        }
    }
    const int titlePage = parsePageFromText(titleIndex.data(Qt::DisplayRole).toString());
    if (titlePage >= 0) {
        return titlePage;
    }
    return -1;
}

bool hasSearchHitPrefix(const QVector<converter::SearchHit> &prefix, const QVector<converter::SearchHit> &full) {
    if (prefix.size() > full.size()) {
        return false;
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < prefix.size(); ++i) {
        if (prefix[i].page != full[i].page || prefix[i].start != full[i].start || prefix[i].length != full[i].length) {
            return false;
        }
        if (prefix[i].matchedText != full[i].matchedText || prefix[i].preview != full[i].preview) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}

void removeTrailingSearchSummaryRow(QListWidget *list) {
    if (list == nullptr || list->count() <= 0) {
        return;
    }
    QListWidgetItem *last = list->item(list->count() - 1);
    if (last == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    if (!last->text().startsWith(QStringLiteral("仅显示前 "))) {
        return;
    }
    delete list->takeItem(list->count() - 1);
}

void setSupplementBlockCollapsed(QListWidget *list, const int blockId, const bool collapsed) {
    if (list == nullptr || blockId <= 0) {
        return;
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < list->count(); ++i) {
        QListWidgetItem *item = list->item(i);
        if (item == nullptr) {
            continue;
        }
        if (item->data(kItemRoleSearchBlockId).toInt() != blockId) {
            continue;
        }
        const int action = item->data(kItemRoleSearchAction).toInt();
        if (action == kSearchActionToggleSupplementGroup) {
            QString text = item->text();
            if (text.endsWith(QStringLiteral(" [展开]")) || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral(" [收起]"))) {
                text.chop(5);
            }
            item->setText(text + (collapsed ? QStringLiteral(" [展开]") : QStringLiteral(" [收起]")));
            item->setData(kItemRoleSearchCollapsed, collapsed ? 1 : 0);
            continue;
        }
        item->setHidden(collapsed);
    }
}
} // namespace

MainWindow::MainWindow(QWidget *parent)
    : QMainWindow(parent),
      taskManager(new TaskManager(this)) {
    searchRenderLimit = kSearchListInitialRenderLimit;
    setupUi();
    connect(taskManager, &TaskManager::taskLog, this, &MainWindow::onTaskLog);
    connect(taskManager, &TaskManager::taskCompleted, this, &MainWindow::onTaskFinished);
    connect(taskManager, &TaskManager::queueStateChanged, this, &MainWindow::onQueueStateChanged);
    refreshSelectionRebuildConfig(true);
    refreshRecentFilesView();
    updateUiState();
    restoreLastSessionOnStartup();
}

void MainWindow::setupUi() {
    setWindowTitle(QApplication::applicationDisplayName());
    resize(1200, 760);
    QMenu *fileMenu = menuBar()->addMenu(QStringLiteral("文件"));

    QAction *batchAction = fileMenu->addAction(QStringLiteral("批量选择 PDF..."));
    fileMenu->addSeparator();

    fileMenu->addSeparator();
    QAction *quitAction = fileMenu->addAction(QStringLiteral("退出"));
    connect(openAction, &QAction::triggered, this, &MainWindow::openPdf);
    connect(batchAction, &QAction::triggered, this, &MainWindow::addBatchPdf);

    connect(openButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::openPdf);

    batchButton = new QPushButton("批量选择", this);

    searchInput = new QLineEdit(this);
    searchInput->setPlaceholderText("全文搜索关键字（页内高亮）");

    searchWholeWordCheck = new QCheckBox("全词匹配", this);
    searchRegexCheck = new QCheckBox("正则", this);

    connect(searchButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::searchInDocument);

    searchCancelButton->setEnabled(false);
    connect(searchCancelButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::cancelSearchInDocument);
    searchPrevButton = new QPushButton("上一个", this);
    searchNextButton = new QPushButton("下一个", this);
    searchStatusLabel = new QLabel("未搜索", this);
    connect(searchPrevButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::jumpToPrevSearchHit);
    connect(searchNextButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::jumpToNextSearchHit);

    searchHitList = new QListWidget(this);

    searchHitList->setContextMenuPolicy(Qt::CustomContextMenu);
    connect(searchHitList, &QListWidget::itemClicked, this, &MainWindow::onSearchHitClicked);
    connect(searchHitList, &QListWidget::customContextMenuRequested, this, &MainWindow::onSearchHitContextMenu);

    pageSpin = new QSpinBox(this);
    pageSpin->setMinimum(1);
    pageSpin->setMaximum(1);
    pageSpin->setValue(1);
    connect(pageSpin, &QSpinBox::valueChanged, this, [this](int oneBased) {
        jumpToPage(oneBased - 1);
    });

    pageCountLabel = new QLabel("/ 0", this);

    zoomSpin = new QDoubleSpinBox(this);
    zoomSpin->setRange(0.1, 5.0);
    zoomSpin->setSingleStep(0.1);
    zoomSpin->setValue(1.0);
    zoomSpin->setSuffix("x");
    connect(zoomSpin, &QDoubleSpinBox::valueChanged, this, &MainWindow::zoomChanged);

    rotateLeftButton = new QPushButton("左转90°", this);
    rotateRightButton = new QPushButton("右转90°", this);
    captureButton = new QPushButton("截图", this);
    copySelectionButton = new QPushButton("复制选中", this);
    annotateButton = new QPushButton("批注", this);
    annotationFilterInput = new QLineEdit(this);
    annotationFilterInput->setPlaceholderText("筛选批注内容");
    connect(annotationFilterInput, &QLineEdit::textChanged, this, &MainWindow::onAnnotationFilterChanged);
    annotationExportButton = new QPushButton("导出批注", this);
    annotationImportButton = new QPushButton("导入批注", this);
    connect(annotationExportButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::exportAnnotations);
    connect(annotationImportButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::importAnnotations);
    connect(rotateLeftButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::rotateLeft);
    connect(rotateRightButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::rotateRight);
    connect(captureButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::captureViewImage);
    connect(copySelectionButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::copySelectionText);
    connect(annotateButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::addManualAnnotation);

    auto *bookmarkAddButton = new QPushButton("添加书签", this);
    connect(bookmarkAddButton, &QPushButton::clicked, this, &MainWindow::addReaderBookmark);

    toolbarLayout->addWidget(openButton, 0, 0);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(batchButton, 0, 1);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchInput, 0, 2);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchButton, 0, 3);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchCancelButton, 0, 4);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchPrevButton, 0, 5);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchNextButton, 0, 6);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchStatusLabel, 0, 7);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchCaseCheck, 0, 8);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchWholeWordCheck, 0, 9);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(searchRegexCheck, 0, 10);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(copySelectionButton, 1, 0);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(captureButton, 1, 1);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(annotateButton, 1, 2);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(bookmarkAddButton, 1, 3);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(annotationFilterInput, 1, 4, 1, 3);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(annotationExportButton, 1, 7);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(annotationImportButton, 1, 8);

    toolbarLayout->addWidget(new QLabel("页码", this), 2, 0);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(pageSpin, 2, 1);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(pageCountLabel, 2, 2);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(new QLabel("缩放", this), 2, 3);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(zoomSpin, 2, 4);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(rotateLeftButton, 2, 5);
    toolbarLayout->addWidget(rotateRightButton, 2, 6);

    pdfView = new QPdfView(this);

    pdfSearchModel->setDocument(pdfDocument);
    pdfView->setSearchModel(pdfSearchModel);
    pdfView->setDocument(pdfDocument);
    pdfView->setPageMode(QPdfView::PageMode::MultiPage);
    connect(pdfSearchModel, &QPdfSearchModel::countChanged, this, [this]() {
        refreshSearchResultsFromModel(false);
    });

        connect(pdfView->pageNavigator(), &QPdfPageNavigator::currentPageChanged, this, [this](const int page) {
            if (page < 0) {
                return;
            }
            QSignalBlocker blocker(pageSpin);
            pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
            preloadPageCacheWindow(page);
            persistReadingProgress();
        });

    bookmarkTree->setContextMenuPolicy(Qt::CustomContextMenu);
    bookmarkTree->installEventFilter(this);
    connect(bookmarkTree, &QTreeWidget::itemClicked, this, &MainWindow::onBookmarkClicked);
    connect(bookmarkTree, &QTreeWidget::customContextMenuRequested, this, &MainWindow::onBookmarkContextMenu);

    recentFilesList = new QListWidget(this);
    recentFilesList->setMinimumHeight(120);
    connect(recentFilesList, &QListWidget::itemClicked, this, &MainWindow::onRecentFileClicked);

    auto *leftPanel = new QWidget(this);
    auto *leftLayout = new QVBoxLayout(leftPanel);
    leftLayout->setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0);
    leftLayout->addWidget(new QLabel("缩略图栏", this));
    leftLayout->addWidget(thumbnailList, 2);
    leftLayout->addWidget(new QLabel("目录书签", this));
    leftLayout->addWidget(bookmarkTree, 2);
    leftLayout->addWidget(new QLabel("最近文件", this));
    leftLayout->addWidget(recentFilesList, 1);

    auto *rightPanel = new QWidget(this);
    auto *rightLayout = new QVBoxLayout(rightPanel);
    rightLayout->setContentsMargins(0, 0, 0, 0);
    rightLayout->addWidget(queueStateLabel);
    rightLayout->addWidget(taskList);
    rightLayout->addWidget(new QLabel("搜索命中预览", this));
    rightLayout->addWidget(searchHitList);
    rightLayout->addWidget(logArea);

    auto *splitter = new QSplitter(this);
    splitter->addWidget(leftPanel);
    splitter->addWidget(pdfView);
    splitter->addWidget(rightPanel);
    splitter->setStretchFactor(0, 1);
    splitter->setStretchFactor(1, 4);
    splitter->setStretchFactor(2, 2);

    rootLayout->addWidget(toolbar);
    rootLayout->addWidget(splitter, 1);

    setCentralWidget(central);

    thumbnailRenderTimer = new QTimer(this);
    thumbnailRenderTimer->setInterval(40);
    connect(thumbnailRenderTimer, &QTimer::timeout, this, &MainWindow::renderThumbnailBatch);

    cacheWarmupTimer = new QTimer(this);
    cacheWarmupTimer->setInterval(240);
    connect(cacheWarmupTimer, &QTimer::timeout, this, &MainWindow::warmupLargeDocumentCache);

    pdfView->viewport()->installEventFilter(this);

void MainWindow::openPdf() {
    const QString file = QFileDialog::getOpenFileName(this, "选择 PDF", QDir::homePath(), "PDF Files (*.pdf)");
    if (file.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    loadPdfFile(file, true);
}

void MainWindow::addBatchPdf() {
    const QStringList files = QFileDialog::getOpenFileNames(this, "批量选择 PDF", QDir::homePath(), "PDF Files (*.pdf)");
    if (files.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }

    selectedPdfFiles = files;
    appendTaskListItem(QString("批量选择: %1 个文件").arg(files.size()));

    // 批量模式仍允许预览第一份文档，帮助用户确认内容。
    loadPdfFile(files.first(), true);
    selectedPdfFiles = files;
    updateUiState();
}

void MainWindow::exportViaFileMenu() {
    if (selectedPdfFiles.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("请先打开 PDF 文件"));
        return;
    }
    QString initialDir = lastOutputDir.trimmed();
    if (initialDir.isEmpty()) {
        initialDir = QFileInfo(selectedPdfFiles.first()).absolutePath();
    }
    const QString defaultBaseName = QFileInfo(selectedPdfFiles.first()).completeBaseName();
    QFileDialog saveDialog(this, QStringLiteral("导出到"), initialDir);
    saveDialog.setAcceptMode(QFileDialog::AcceptSave);
    saveDialog.setFileMode(QFileDialog::AnyFile);
    saveDialog.setOption(QFileDialog::DontConfirmOverwrite, false);
    saveDialog.setNameFilters({
        QStringLiteral("Word 文档 (*.docx)"),
        QStringLiteral("Excel 工作簿 (*.xlsx)"),
        QStringLiteral("PowerPoint 演示文稿 (*.pptx)")
    });
    saveDialog.selectNameFilter(QStringLiteral("PowerPoint 演示文稿 (*.pptx)"));
    saveDialog.selectFile(defaultBaseName + QStringLiteral(".pptx"));
    if (saveDialog.exec() != QDialog::Accepted || saveDialog.selectedFiles().isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString chosenPath = saveDialog.selectedFiles().first();
    const QString selectedFilter = saveDialog.selectedNameFilter();
    OutputFormat format = OutputFormat::Pptx;
    if (selectedFilter.contains(QStringLiteral("*.docx"))) {
        format = OutputFormat::Docx;
    } else if (selectedFilter.contains(QStringLiteral("*.xlsx"))) {
        format = OutputFormat::Xlsx;
    }
    const QString outputDir = QFileInfo(chosenPath).absolutePath();
    lastOutputDir = outputDir;
    const bool singleFileCustomPath = (selectedPdfFiles.size() == 1);
    for (const QString &pdfPath : selectedPdfFiles) {
        ConversionTask task;
        task.taskId = buildTaskId();
        task.inputPdf = pdfPath;
        task.outputDir = outputDir;
        if (singleFileCustomPath) {
            task.preferredOutputPath = chosenPath;
        }
        task.format = format;
        task.maxRetries = 2;
        task.enableOcrFallback = true;
        taskManager->submitTask(task);
        appendTaskListItem(QString("已入队 [%1]: %2 -> %3")
            .arg(task.taskId, QFileInfo(pdfPath).fileName(), converter::outputFormatToSuffix(format)));
    }
}

void MainWindow::jumpToPage(int pageIndex) {
    if (pageIndex < 0 || pageIndex >= pdfDocument->pageCount()) {
        return;
    }
    if (pdfView->pageNavigator()) {
        pdfView->pageNavigator()->jump(pageIndex, QPointF(), pdfView->zoomFactor());
    }
    preloadPageCacheWindow(pageIndex);
    persistReadingProgress();
}

void MainWindow::zoomChanged(double factor) {
    pdfView->setZoomFactor(factor);
    persistReadingProgress();
}

void MainWindow::searchInDocument() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog("请先打开 PDF 文件");
        return;
    }
    const QString keyword = searchInput->text().trimmed();
    if (activeSearchCancelFlag) {
        activeSearchCancelFlag->store(true);
    }
    if (keyword.isEmpty()) {
        cancelSearchInDocument();
        searchRenderLimit = kSearchListInitialRenderLimit;
        pendingIndexerSearchKeyword.clear();
        lastIndexerSearchKeyword.clear();
        searchHitPages.clear();
        searchHits.clear();
        currentSearchCursor = -1;
        searchUseIndexerOnly = false;
        searchGroupBasePage = -1;
        searchHitList->clear();
        if (pdfSearchModel) {
            pdfSearchModel->setSearchString(QString());
        }
        searchStatusLabel->setText("未搜索");
        highlightThumbnailsBySearch(QSet<int>());
        updateUiState();
        return;
    }
    if (!pdfSearchModel) {
        appendLog("搜索模型不可用");
        return;
    }
    if (!textIndexer.hasIndex()) {
        if (!isIndexBuilding && !currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
            startIndexBuildForFile(currentPdfPath);
        }
        pendingIndexerSearchKeyword = keyword;
        searchRenderLimit = kSearchListInitialRenderLimit;
        currentSearchCursor = -1;
        searchUseIndexerOnly = false;
        isSearchInProgress = true;
        activeSearchRequestId += 1;
        const int requestId = activeSearchRequestId;
        activeSearchResultGeneration = requestId;
        activeSearchCancelFlag = std::make_shared<std::atomic_bool>(false);
        searchHitList->clear();
        auto *loading = new QListWidgetItem(
            isIndexBuilding ? QStringLiteral("索引构建中，按高级规则搜索...") : QStringLiteral("按高级规则搜索中...")
        );
        loading->setFlags(Qt::NoItemFlags);
        searchHitList->addItem(loading);
        searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("高级检索中..."));
        updateUiState();
        converter::SearchOptions options;
        options.caseSensitive = searchCaseCheck->isChecked();
        options.wholeWord = searchWholeWordCheck->isChecked();
        options.useRegex = searchRegexCheck->isChecked();
        options.preferredPage = qMax(0, pageSpin->value() - 1);
        const auto cancelFlag = activeSearchCancelFlag;
        auto *watcher = new QFutureWatcher<QVector<converter::SearchHit>>(this);
        connect(watcher, &QFutureWatcher<QVector<converter::SearchHit>>::finished, this, [this, watcher, requestId, keyword, cancelFlag]() {
            const QVector<converter::SearchHit> hits = watcher->result();
            watcher->deleteLater();
            if (requestId != activeSearchRequestId) {
                return;
            }
            if (cancelFlag && cancelFlag->load()) {
                isSearchInProgress = false;
                searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("已取消"));
                updateUiState();
                return;
            }
            applyIndexerSearchResults(keyword, hits, false, requestId);
            isSearchInProgress = false;
            searchStatusLabel->setText(isIndexBuilding ? QStringLiteral("索引构建中，已返回高级检索结果") : searchStatusLabel->text());
            updateUiState();
        });
        watcher->setFuture(QtConcurrent::run([this, keyword, options, cancelFlag]() {
            return findHitsWithoutIndex(keyword, options, kSearchMaxHits, cancelFlag.get());
        }));
        return;
    }
    pendingIndexerSearchKeyword.clear();
    searchRenderLimit = kSearchListInitialRenderLimit;
    currentSearchCursor = -1;
    searchUseIndexerOnly = false;
    isSearchInProgress = true;
    activeSearchRequestId += 1;
    const int requestId = activeSearchRequestId;
    activeSearchResultGeneration = requestId;
    activeSearchCancelFlag = std::make_shared<std::atomic_bool>(false);
    auto *loading = new QListWidgetItem(QStringLiteral("搜索中..."));
    loading->setFlags(Qt::NoItemFlags);
    searchHitList->clear();
    searchHitList->addItem(loading);
    searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("索引搜索中..."));
    updateUiState();

    converter::SearchOptions options;
    options.caseSensitive = searchCaseCheck->isChecked();
    options.wholeWord = searchWholeWordCheck->isChecked();
    options.useRegex = searchRegexCheck->isChecked();
    options.preferredPage = qMax(0, pageSpin->value() - 1);
    const auto cancelFlag = activeSearchCancelFlag;
    auto *watcher = new QFutureWatcher<QVector<converter::SearchHit>>(this);
    connect(watcher, &QFutureWatcher<QVector<converter::SearchHit>>::finished, this, [this, watcher, requestId, keyword, options, cancelFlag]() {
        const QVector<converter::SearchHit> fastHits = watcher->result();
        watcher->deleteLater();
        if (requestId != activeSearchRequestId) {
            return;
        }
        const bool canceled = cancelFlag && cancelFlag->load();
        if (canceled) {
            isSearchInProgress = false;
            searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("已取消"));
            updateUiState();
            return;
        }
        applyIndexerSearchResults(keyword, fastHits, false, requestId);
        if (fastHits.size() < kSearchFastStageHits) {
            isSearchInProgress = false;
            updateUiState();
            return;
        }
        searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("已显示快速结果，补全中..."));
        updateUiState();

        auto *fullWatcher = new QFutureWatcher<QVector<converter::SearchHit>>(this);
        connect(fullWatcher, &QFutureWatcher<QVector<converter::SearchHit>>::finished, this, [this, fullWatcher, requestId, keyword, cancelFlag]() {
            const QVector<converter::SearchHit> fullHits = fullWatcher->result();
            fullWatcher->deleteLater();
            if (requestId != activeSearchRequestId) {
                return;
            }
            const bool fullCanceled = cancelFlag && cancelFlag->load();
            if (fullCanceled) {
                isSearchInProgress = false;
                searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("已取消"));
                updateUiState();
                return;
            }
            applyIndexerSearchResults(keyword, fullHits, true, requestId);
            isSearchInProgress = false;
            const QVector<converter::SearchHit> settledHits = fullHits;
            QTimer::singleShot(kSearchMergeSettleMs, this, [this, requestId, keyword, settledHits]() {
                if (requestId != activeSearchRequestId) {
                    return;
                }
                applyIndexerSearchResults(keyword, settledHits, false, requestId);
            });
        });
        fullWatcher->setFuture(QtConcurrent::run([this, keyword, options, cancelFlag]() {
            return textIndexer.findHits(keyword, options, kSearchMaxHits, cancelFlag.get());
        }));
    });
    watcher->setFuture(QtConcurrent::run([this, keyword, options, cancelFlag]() {
        return textIndexer.findHits(keyword, options, kSearchFastStageHits, cancelFlag.get());
    }));
}

QVector<converter::SearchHit> MainWindow::findHitsWithoutIndex(
    const QString &keyword,
    const converter::SearchOptions &options,
    const int maxHits,
    const std::atomic_bool *cancelFlag
) const {
    QVector<converter::SearchHit> hits;
    if (!pdfDocument || keyword.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return hits;
    }

    QRegularExpression regex;
    if (options.useRegex) {
        QRegularExpression::PatternOptions patternOptions = QRegularExpression::NoPatternOption;
        if (!options.caseSensitive) {
            patternOptions |= QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption;
        }
        QString pattern = keyword;
        if (options.wholeWord) {
            pattern = QStringLiteral("(?<![\\p{L}\\p{N}_])(?:%1)(?![\\p{L}\\p{N}_])").arg(pattern);
        }
        regex = QRegularExpression(pattern, patternOptions);
        if (!regex.isValid()) {
            return hits;
        }
    }

    const QString needle = options.caseSensitive ? keyword : keyword.toCaseFolded();
    const int pageCount = pdfDocument->pageCount();
    for (int page = 0; page < pageCount; ++page) {
        if (cancelFlag && cancelFlag->load()) {
            break;
        }
        const QString pageText = pdfDocument->getAllText(page).text();
        if (pageText.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (options.useRegex) {
            QRegularExpressionMatchIterator it = regex.globalMatch(pageText);
            while (it.hasNext()) {
                if (cancelFlag && cancelFlag->load()) {
                    break;
                }
                const QRegularExpressionMatch m = it.next();
                if (!m.hasMatch()) {
                    continue;
                }
                converter::SearchHit hit;
                hit.page = page;
                hit.start = m.capturedStart();
                hit.length = qMax(1, m.capturedLength());
                hit.matchedText = m.captured(0);
                hit.preview = buildSearchPreview(pageText, hit.start, hit.length);
                hits.push_back(hit);
                if (hits.size() >= maxHits) {
                    break;
                }
            }
        } else {
            const QString haystack = options.caseSensitive ? pageText : pageText.toCaseFolded();
            int from = 0;
            while (from < haystack.size()) {
                if (cancelFlag && cancelFlag->load()) {
                    break;
                }
                const int pos = haystack.indexOf(needle, from);
                if (pos < 0) {
                    break;
                }
                if (!options.wholeWord || isWholeWordHit(pageText, pos, keyword.size())) {
                    converter::SearchHit hit;
                    hit.page = page;
                    hit.start = pos;
                    hit.length = keyword.size();
                    hit.matchedText = pageText.mid(pos, keyword.size());
                    hit.preview = buildSearchPreview(pageText, hit.start, hit.length);
                    hits.push_back(hit);
                    if (hits.size() >= maxHits) {
                        break;
                    }
                }
                from = pos + qMax(1, keyword.size());
            }
        }
        if (hits.size() >= maxHits) {
            break;
        }
    }

    if (!options.useRegex && keyword.size() >= 2 && hits.size() < maxHits) {
        QSet<QString> dedup;
        for (const converter::SearchHit &hit : hits) {
            dedup.insert(QStringLiteral("%1:%2:%3").arg(hit.page).arg(hit.start).arg(hit.length));
        }
        for (int page = 0; page + 1 < pageCount; ++page) {
            if (cancelFlag && cancelFlag->load()) {
                break;
            }
            const QString leftPageText = pdfDocument->getAllText(page).text();
            const QString rightPageText = pdfDocument->getAllText(page + 1).text();
            if (leftPageText.isEmpty() || rightPageText.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const int maxBridge = qMin(qMin(keyword.size() - 1, 24), qMin(leftPageText.size(), rightPageText.size()));
            for (int leftLen = 1; leftLen <= maxBridge; ++leftLen) {
                const int rightLen = keyword.size() - leftLen;
                if (rightLen <= 0 || rightLen > rightPageText.size()) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QString leftPart = leftPageText.right(leftLen);
                const QString rightPart = rightPageText.left(rightLen);
                const QString merged = leftPart + rightPart;
                const bool matched = options.caseSensitive
                    ? (merged == keyword)
                    : (merged.toCaseFolded() == keyword.toCaseFolded());
                if (!matched) {
                    continue;
                }
                const int start = qMax(0, leftPageText.size() - leftLen);
                const QString key = QStringLiteral("%1:%2:%3").arg(page).arg(start).arg(leftLen);
                if (dedup.contains(key)) {
                    continue;
                }
                dedup.insert(key);
                converter::SearchHit hit;
                hit.page = page;
                hit.start = start;
                hit.length = leftLen;
                hit.matchedText = merged;
                hit.preview = buildCrossPageSearchPreview(leftPageText, rightPageText, keyword);
                hits.push_back(hit);
                if (hits.size() >= maxHits) {
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (hits.size() >= maxHits) {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    if (options.preferredPage >= 0 && hits.size() > 1) {
        std::stable_sort(hits.begin(), hits.end(), [&](const converter::SearchHit &a, const converter::SearchHit &b) {
            const int da = qAbs(a.page - options.preferredPage);
            const int db = qAbs(b.page - options.preferredPage);
            if (da != db) {
                return da < db;
            }
            if (a.page != b.page) {
                return a.page < b.page;
            }
            return a.start < b.start;
        });
    }
    return hits;
}

void MainWindow::cancelSearchInDocument() {
    if (activeSearchCancelFlag) {
        activeSearchCancelFlag->store(true);
    }
    activeSearchRequestId += 1;
    activeSearchResultGeneration = activeSearchRequestId;
    isSearchInProgress = false;
    searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("取消中..."));
    updateUiState();
}

void MainWindow::applyIndexerSearchResults(
    const QString &keyword,
    const QVector<converter::SearchHit> &hits,
    const bool incrementalMerge,
    const int requestId
) {
    if (requestId > 0 && requestId != activeSearchRequestId) {
        return;
    }
    if (requestId > 0) {
        activeSearchResultGeneration = requestId;
    }
    const QVector<converter::SearchHit> oldHits = searchHits;
    const bool canIncrementalMerge = incrementalMerge
        && !oldHits.isEmpty()
        && keyword == lastIndexerSearchKeyword
        && hasSearchHitPrefix(oldHits, hits);
    searchHits = hits;
    const int effectiveLimit = qBound(
        kSearchListInitialRenderLimit,
        searchRenderLimit > 0 ? searchRenderLimit : kSearchListInitialRenderLimit,
        kSearchListRenderLimit
    );
    const int renderCount = qMin(searchHits.size(), effectiveLimit);
    const int oldRenderCount = qMin(oldHits.size(), effectiveLimit);
    const int currentPage = qMax(0, pageSpin->value() - 1);
    searchGroupBasePage = currentPage;
    const int generation = activeSearchResultGeneration;
    auto markGeneration = [&](QListWidgetItem *item) {
        if (!item) {
            return;
        }
        item->setData(kItemRoleSearchRequest, generation);
    };
    auto appendLoadMoreRow = [&]() {
        if (searchHits.size() <= renderCount) {
            return;
        }
        const int remain = searchHits.size() - renderCount;
        auto *loadMore = new QListWidgetItem(
            QStringLiteral("加载更多（剩余 %1 条，点击继续）").arg(remain)
        );
        loadMore->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
        loadMore->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionLoadMore);
        loadMore->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, kSearchGroupNone);
        loadMore->setFlags(Qt::ItemIsSelectable | Qt::ItemIsEnabled);
        markGeneration(loadMore);
        searchHitList->addItem(loadMore);
    };
    if (canIncrementalMerge && renderCount >= oldRenderCount && searchUseIndexerOnly) {
        removeTrailingSearchSummaryRow(searchHitList);
        if (renderCount > oldRenderCount) {
            QVector<int> exactIndexes;
            QVector<int> nearIndexes;
            QVector<int> otherIndexes;
            for (int i = oldRenderCount; i < renderCount; ++i) {
                const int hitPage = searchHits[i].page;
                if (hitPage == currentPage) {
                    exactIndexes.push_back(i);
                } else if (qAbs(hitPage - currentPage) <= kSearchNearPageWindow) {
                    nearIndexes.push_back(i);
                } else {
                    otherIndexes.push_back(i);
                }
            }
            auto appendIncrementalGroup = [&](const int groupId, const QString &groupTitle, const QVector<int> &indexes) {
                if (indexes.isEmpty()) {
                    return;
                }
                QMap<int, QVector<int>> buckets;
                QVector<int> pageOrder;
                for (const int idx : indexes) {
                    const int page = searchHits[idx].page;
                    if (!buckets.contains(page)) {
                        pageOrder.push_back(page);
                    }
                    buckets[page].push_back(idx);
                }
                QStringList summaryParts;
                const int summaryPageCount = qMin(2, pageOrder.size());
                for (int i = 0; i < summaryPageCount; ++i) {
                    const int page = pageOrder[i];
                    summaryParts.push_back(QStringLiteral("P%1×%2").arg(page + 1).arg(buckets[page].size()));
                }
                if (pageOrder.size() > summaryPageCount) {
                    summaryParts.push_back(QStringLiteral("..."));
                }
                const QString summaryText = summaryParts.join(QStringLiteral(", "));
                auto *header = new QListWidgetItem(
                    QStringLiteral("%1（补充 +%2条/%3页：%4）")
                        .arg(groupTitle)
                        .arg(indexes.size())
                        .arg(pageOrder.size())
                        .arg(summaryText)
                );
                header->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
                const int blockId = (++searchSupplementBlockSeed) + (activeSearchRequestId * 1000);
                header->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionToggleSupplementGroup);
                header->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
                header->setData(kItemRoleSearchBlockId, blockId);
                header->setData(kItemRolePage, pageOrder.isEmpty() ? -1 : pageOrder.first());
                header->setData(kItemRoleSearchCollapsed, 1);
                header->setFlags(Qt::ItemIsSelectable | Qt::ItemIsEnabled);
                markGeneration(header);
                searchHitList->addItem(header);

                for (const int page : pageOrder) {
                    const QVector<int> &bucket = buckets[page];
                    auto *pageHeader = new QListWidgetItem(
                        QStringLiteral("  P%1 新增 %2").arg(page + 1).arg(bucket.size())
                    );
                    pageHeader->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
                    pageHeader->setData(kItemRolePage, page);
                    pageHeader->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionJumpPageFirstHit);
                    pageHeader->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
                    pageHeader->setData(kItemRoleSearchBlockId, blockId);
                    pageHeader->setFlags(Qt::ItemIsSelectable | Qt::ItemIsEnabled);
                    markGeneration(pageHeader);
                    searchHitList->addItem(pageHeader);

                    const int previewCount = qMin(kSearchPerPagePreviewLimit, bucket.size());
                    for (int j = 0; j < previewCount; ++j) {
                        const int idx = bucket[j];
                        const converter::SearchHit &hit = searchHits[idx];
                        auto *row = new QListWidgetItem(QStringLiteral("    - %1").arg(hit.preview));
                        row->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, idx);
                        row->setData(kItemRolePage, hit.page);
                        row->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionNone);
                        row->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
                        row->setData(kItemRoleSearchBlockId, blockId);
                        row->setToolTip(hit.matchedText);
                        markGeneration(row);
                        searchHitList->addItem(row);
                    }
                    if (bucket.size() > previewCount) {
                        auto *moreRow = new QListWidgetItem(
                            QStringLiteral("    其余 %1 条…").arg(bucket.size() - previewCount)
                        );
                        moreRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
                        moreRow->setData(kItemRolePage, page);
                        moreRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionNone);
                        moreRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
                        moreRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchBlockId, blockId);
                        moreRow->setFlags(Qt::NoItemFlags);
                        markGeneration(moreRow);
                        searchHitList->addItem(moreRow);
                    }
                }
                setSupplementBlockCollapsed(searchHitList, blockId, true);
            };
            appendIncrementalGroup(kSearchGroupCurrent, QStringLiteral("当前页命中"), exactIndexes);
            appendIncrementalGroup(kSearchGroupNear, QStringLiteral("邻近页命中"), nearIndexes);
            appendIncrementalGroup(kSearchGroupOther, QStringLiteral("其他页命中"), otherIndexes);
            if (exactIndexes.isEmpty() && nearIndexes.isEmpty() && otherIndexes.isEmpty()) {
                auto *noop = new QListWidgetItem(QStringLiteral("补全阶段无新增可展示命中"));
                noop->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
