                noop->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionNone);
                noop->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, kSearchGroupNone);
                noop->setFlags(Qt::NoItemFlags);
                markGeneration(noop);
                searchHitList->addItem(noop);
            }
        }
        appendLoadMoreRow();
    } else {
        searchHitList->clear();
    QVector<int> exactIndexes;
    QVector<int> nearIndexes;
    QVector<int> otherIndexes;
    exactIndexes.reserve(renderCount);
    nearIndexes.reserve(renderCount);
    otherIndexes.reserve(renderCount);
    for (int i = 0; i < renderCount; ++i) {
        const int hitPage = searchHits[i].page;
        if (hitPage == currentPage) {
            exactIndexes.push_back(i);
        } else if (qAbs(hitPage - currentPage) <= kSearchNearPageWindow) {
            nearIndexes.push_back(i);
        } else {
            otherIndexes.push_back(i);
        }
    }
    auto appendGroup = [&](const int groupId, const QString &title, const QVector<int> &indexes) {
        if (indexes.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        auto *header = new QListWidgetItem(title);
        header->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
        header->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionNone);
        header->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
        header->setFlags(Qt::NoItemFlags);
        markGeneration(header);
        searchHitList->addItem(header);

        struct PageBucket {
            int page = -1;
            QVector<int> hitIndexes;
        };
        QVector<PageBucket> buckets;
        for (const int idx : indexes) {
            const int page = searchHits[idx].page;
            bool appended = false;
            for (PageBucket &bucket : buckets) {
                if (bucket.page == page) {
                    bucket.hitIndexes.push_back(idx);
                    appended = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (!appended) {
                PageBucket bucket;
                bucket.page = page;
                bucket.hitIndexes.push_back(idx);
                buckets.push_back(bucket);
            }
        }
        for (const PageBucket &bucket : buckets) {
            auto *pageHeader = new QListWidgetItem(
                QStringLiteral("  P%1 × %2").arg(bucket.page + 1).arg(bucket.hitIndexes.size())
            );
            pageHeader->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
            pageHeader->setData(kItemRolePage, bucket.page);
            pageHeader->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionJumpPageFirstHit);
            pageHeader->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
            pageHeader->setFlags(Qt::ItemIsSelectable | Qt::ItemIsEnabled);
            markGeneration(pageHeader);
            searchHitList->addItem(pageHeader);

            const int previewCount = qMin(kSearchPerPagePreviewLimit, bucket.hitIndexes.size());
            for (int i = 0; i < previewCount; ++i) {
                const int idx = bucket.hitIndexes[i];
                const converter::SearchHit &hit = searchHits[idx];
                auto *row = new QListWidgetItem(QString("    - %1").arg(hit.preview));
                row->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, idx);
                row->setData(kItemRolePage, hit.page);
                row->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionNone);
                row->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
                row->setToolTip(hit.matchedText);
                markGeneration(row);
                searchHitList->addItem(row);
            }
            if (bucket.hitIndexes.size() > previewCount) {
                auto *moreRow = new QListWidgetItem(
                    QStringLiteral("    其余 %1 条…").arg(bucket.hitIndexes.size() - previewCount)
                );
                moreRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
                moreRow->setData(kItemRolePage, bucket.page);
                moreRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionNone);
                moreRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, groupId);
                moreRow->setFlags(Qt::NoItemFlags);
                markGeneration(moreRow);
                searchHitList->addItem(moreRow);
            }
        }
    };
    appendGroup(kSearchGroupCurrent, QStringLiteral("当前页命中"), exactIndexes);
    appendGroup(kSearchGroupNear, QStringLiteral("邻近页命中"), nearIndexes);
    appendGroup(kSearchGroupOther, QStringLiteral("其他页命中"), otherIndexes);
    if (renderCount == 0) {
        auto *emptyRow = new QListWidgetItem(QStringLiteral("未找到命中"));
        emptyRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchIndex, -1);
        emptyRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchAction, kSearchActionNone);
        emptyRow->setData(kItemRoleSearchGroup, kSearchGroupNone);
        emptyRow->setFlags(Qt::NoItemFlags);
        markGeneration(emptyRow);
        searchHitList->addItem(emptyRow);
    }
    appendLoadMoreRow();
    }

    if (searchHits.size() > kSearchModelHeavyHitThreshold) {
        searchUseIndexerOnly = true;
        if (pdfSearchModel) {
            pdfSearchModel->setSearchString(QString());
        }
        QSet<int> hitPages;
        for (const converter::SearchHit &hit : searchHits) {
            if (hit.page >= 0) {
                hitPages.insert(hit.page);
            }
        }
        searchHitPages = hitPages.values().toVector();
        std::sort(searchHitPages.begin(), searchHitPages.end());
        highlightThumbnailsBySearch(hitPages);
        if (searchHits.isEmpty()) {
            searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("0/0"));
            appendLog(QString("未找到关键字：%1").arg(keyword));
        } else {
            currentSearchCursor = 0;
            pageSpin->setValue(searchHits.first().page + 1);
            jumpToPage(searchHits.first().page);
            searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2（索引模式）").arg(1).arg(searchHits.size()));
            appendLog(QString("关键字“%1”命中 %2 处（%3 页，索引模式）")
                .arg(keyword)
                .arg(searchHits.size())
                .arg(hitPages.size()));
        }
        updateUiState();
        lastIndexerSearchKeyword = keyword;
        return;
    }
    if (pdfSearchModel) {
        pdfSearchModel->setSearchString(keyword);
    }
    refreshSearchResultsFromModel(true);
    lastIndexerSearchKeyword = keyword;
    updateUiState();
}

void MainWindow::jumpToNextSearchHit() {
    if (searchUseIndexerOnly) {
        if (searchHits.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        currentSearchCursor = (currentSearchCursor + 1 + searchHits.size()) % searchHits.size();
        const int page = qMax(0, searchHits[currentSearchCursor].page);
        pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
        jumpToPage(page);
        searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2（索引模式）").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(searchHits.size()));
        return;
    }
    if (pdfSearchModel == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    const int total = pdfSearchModel->rowCount(QModelIndex());
    if (total <= 0) {
        return;
    }
    currentSearchCursor = (currentSearchCursor + 1 + total) % total;
    pdfView->setCurrentSearchResultIndex(currentSearchCursor);
    searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(total));
}

void MainWindow::jumpToPrevSearchHit() {
    if (searchUseIndexerOnly) {
        if (searchHits.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        currentSearchCursor = (currentSearchCursor - 1 + searchHits.size()) % searchHits.size();
        const int page = qMax(0, searchHits[currentSearchCursor].page);
        pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
        jumpToPage(page);
        searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2（索引模式）").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(searchHits.size()));
        return;
    }
    if (pdfSearchModel == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    const int total = pdfSearchModel->rowCount(QModelIndex());
    if (total <= 0) {
        return;
    }
    currentSearchCursor = (currentSearchCursor - 1 + total) % total;
    pdfView->setCurrentSearchResultIndex(currentSearchCursor);
    searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(total));
}

void MainWindow::onThumbnailClicked(QListWidgetItem *item) {
    if (item == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const int page = item->data(Qt::UserRole).toInt(&ok);
    if (!ok) {
        return;
    }
    pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
    jumpToPage(page);
}

void MainWindow::addReaderBookmark() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog("请先打开 PDF");
        return;
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const QString title = QInputDialog::getText(this, "添加书签", "书签名称", QLineEdit::Normal, "", &ok).trimmed();
    if (!ok || title.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const int page = pageSpin->value() - 1;
    auto *item = new QTreeWidgetItem();
    item->setText(0, title);
    item->setText(1, QString::number(page + 1));
    item->setData(0, kItemRolePage, page);
    item->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindManual);
    bookmarkTree->addTopLevelItem(item);
    stateStore.addBookmark(currentPdfPath, page, title);
    rebuildBookmarkTreeFromIndex();
    appendLog(QString("已添加书签：%1（第 %2 页）").arg(title).arg(page + 1));
}

void MainWindow::onBookmarkClicked(QTreeWidgetItem *item, int) {
    if (item == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    const int kind = item->data(0, kItemRoleKind).toInt();
    if (kind == kBookmarkKindManualRoot || kind == kBookmarkKindAnnotationRoot) {
        return;
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const int page = item->data(0, kItemRolePage).toInt(&ok);
    if (!ok || page < 0) {
        return;
    }
    if (kind == kBookmarkKindAnnotation) {
        const double ratio = item->data(0, kItemRoleAnchorRatio).toDouble();
        if (ratio >= 0.0 && ratio <= 1.0 && pdfView->pageNavigator()) {
            const QSizeF size = pdfDocument->pagePointSize(page);
            if (size.height() > 1.0) {
                pdfView->pageNavigator()->jump(page, QPointF(0.0, ratio * size.height()), zoomSpin->value());
                return;
            }
        }
    }
    pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
    jumpToPage(page);
}

void MainWindow::onBookmarkContextMenu(const QPoint &pos) {
    QTreeWidgetItem *item = bookmarkTree->itemAt(pos);
    if (item == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    const int kind = item->data(0, kItemRoleKind).toInt();
    if (kind == kBookmarkKindAnnotation) {
        QMenu menu(this);
        QAction *bulkDeleteAction = nullptr;
        if (bookmarkTree->selectedItems().size() > 1) {
            bulkDeleteAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("删除所选项"));
        }
        QAction *editAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("编辑批注"));
        QAction *deleteAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("删除批注"));
        QAction *chosen = menu.exec(bookmarkTree->viewport()->mapToGlobal(pos));
        if (chosen == bulkDeleteAction) {
            deleteSelectedBookmarkItems();
        } else if (chosen == editAction) {
            editAnnotation(item);
        } else if (chosen == deleteAction) {
            deleteAnnotation(item);
        }
        return;
    }
    if (kind != kBookmarkKindManual) {
        return;
    }
    QMenu menu(this);
    QAction *editAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("编辑书签"));
    QAction *deleteAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("删除书签"));
    QAction *chosen = menu.exec(bookmarkTree->viewport()->mapToGlobal(pos));
    if (chosen == editAction) {
        editManualBookmark(item);
        return;
    }
    if (chosen == deleteAction) {
        deleteManualBookmark(item);
    }
}

void MainWindow::editManualBookmark(QTreeWidgetItem *item) {
    if (item == nullptr || currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString createdAt = item->data(0, kItemRoleBookmarkId).toString();
    if (createdAt.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const QString currentTitle = item->text(0).trimmed();
    const QString updated = QInputDialog::getText(
        this,
        QStringLiteral("编辑书签"),
        QStringLiteral("书签名称"),
        QLineEdit::Normal,
        currentTitle,
        &ok
    ).trimmed();
    if (!ok || updated.isEmpty() || updated == currentTitle) {
        return;
    }
    if (!stateStore.updateBookmarkTitle(currentPdfPath, createdAt, updated)) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("书签编辑失败，可能已被移除"));
        return;
    }
    rebuildBookmarkTreeFromIndex();
    appendLog(QStringLiteral("已更新书签：%1").arg(updated));
}

void MainWindow::deleteManualBookmark(QTreeWidgetItem *item) {
    if (item == nullptr || currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString createdAt = item->data(0, kItemRoleBookmarkId).toString();
    if (createdAt.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    if (QMessageBox::question(this, QStringLiteral("删除书签"), QStringLiteral("确认删除该书签？"))
        != QMessageBox::Yes) {
        return;
    }
    if (!stateStore.removeBookmark(currentPdfPath, createdAt)) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("书签删除失败，可能已被移除"));
        return;
    }
    rebuildBookmarkTreeFromIndex();
    appendLog(QStringLiteral("书签已删除"));
}

void MainWindow::rotateLeft() {
    currentRotation = (currentRotation + 270) % 360;
    const bool invoked = QMetaObject::invokeMethod(
        pdfView,
        "setPageRotation",
        Q_ARG(int, currentRotation)
    );
    if (!invoked) {
        appendLog("当前 Qt 版本不支持页面旋转接口，已记录旋转状态");
    }
    persistReadingProgress();
}

void MainWindow::rotateRight() {
    currentRotation = (currentRotation + 90) % 360;
    const bool invoked = QMetaObject::invokeMethod(
        pdfView,
        "setPageRotation",
        Q_ARG(int, currentRotation)
    );
    if (!invoked) {
        appendLog("当前 Qt 版本不支持页面旋转接口，已记录旋转状态");
    }
    persistReadingProgress();
}

void MainWindow::captureViewImage() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog("请先打开 PDF");
        return;
    }
    const QString savePath = QFileDialog::getSaveFileName(
        this,
        "保存截图",
        QDir::home().filePath("pdf_capture.png"),
        "PNG Image (*.png)"
    );
    if (savePath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QPixmap shot = pdfView->grab();
    if (!shot.save(savePath, "PNG")) {
        appendLog("截图保存失败");
        return;
    }
    appendLog(QString("截图已保存：%1").arg(savePath));
}

void MainWindow::copySelectionText() {
    // 优先 Qt 选区复制；若失败则使用词级索引提取，再按选区触发 OCR，最后才回退整页文本。
    refreshSelectionRebuildConfig();
    const int page = qMax(0, pageSpin->value() - 1);
    const QString before = QGuiApplication::clipboard()->text();
    const bool invoked = QMetaObject::invokeMethod(pdfView, "copySelectionToClipboard");
    const QString after = QGuiApplication::clipboard()->text();
    if (invoked && !after.trimmed().isEmpty() && after != before) {
        appendLog("已复制选中文本到剪贴板");
        return;
    }

    if (!lastSelectionViewportRect.isNull()) {
        const QSize viewportSize = pdfView->viewport()->size();
        const QSizeF pageSize = textIndexer.pageSizeAt(page);
        if (viewportSize.width() > 1 && viewportSize.height() > 1 && pageSize.width() > 1.0 && pageSize.height() > 1.0) {
            const int normalizedRotation = ((currentRotation % 360) + 360) % 360;
            const bool rotated90 = normalizedRotation == 90 || normalizedRotation == 270;
            const double rotatedPageW = rotated90 ? pageSize.height() : pageSize.width();
            const double rotatedPageH = rotated90 ? pageSize.width() : pageSize.height();
            const double sx = rotatedPageW / static_cast<double>(viewportSize.width());
            const double sy = rotatedPageH / static_cast<double>(viewportSize.height());

            const QRectF selectedRotatedRect(
                lastSelectionViewportRect.left() * sx,
                lastSelectionViewportRect.top() * sy,
                qMax(1, lastSelectionViewportRect.width()) * sx,
                qMax(1, lastSelectionViewportRect.height()) * sy
            );

            auto mapRotatedPointToPage = [&](const QPointF &p) -> QPointF {
                switch (normalizedRotation) {
                case 90:
                    return QPointF(p.y(), pageSize.height() - p.x());
                case 180:
                    return QPointF(pageSize.width() - p.x(), pageSize.height() - p.y());
                case 270:
                    return QPointF(pageSize.width() - p.y(), p.x());
                default:
                    return p;
                }
            };

            const QPointF p1 = mapRotatedPointToPage(selectedRotatedRect.topLeft());
            const QPointF p2 = mapRotatedPointToPage(selectedRotatedRect.topRight());
            const QPointF p3 = mapRotatedPointToPage(selectedRotatedRect.bottomLeft());
            const QPointF p4 = mapRotatedPointToPage(selectedRotatedRect.bottomRight());
            const double minX = qMin(qMin(p1.x(), p2.x()), qMin(p3.x(), p4.x()));
            const double maxX = qMax(qMax(p1.x(), p2.x()), qMax(p3.x(), p4.x()));
            const double minY = qMin(qMin(p1.y(), p2.y()), qMin(p3.y(), p4.y()));
            const double maxY = qMax(qMax(p1.y(), p2.y()), qMax(p3.y(), p4.y()));
            QRectF pageRect(minX, minY, qMax(1.0, maxX - minX), qMax(1.0, maxY - minY));
            pageRect = pageRect.normalized();
            QString rectText = textIndexer.extractTextInRect(page, pageRect).trimmed();
            if (rectText.isEmpty()) {
                const double padX = qMax(3.0, pageRect.width() * 0.12);
                const double padY = qMax(3.0, pageRect.height() * 0.14);
                const QRectF expanded = pageRect.adjusted(-padX, -padY, padX, padY).intersected(
                    QRectF(0.0, 0.0, pageSize.width(), pageSize.height())
                );
                rectText = textIndexer.extractTextInRect(page, expanded).trimmed();
            }
            if (!rectText.isEmpty()) {
                QGuiApplication::clipboard()->setText(rectText);
                appendLog(QString("已按选区框复制第 %1 页文本").arg(page + 1));
                return;
            }
            const QString ocrText = ocrSelectionTextFromViewportRect(page, lastSelectionViewportRect, pageRect);
            if (!ocrText.isEmpty()) {
                QGuiApplication::clipboard()->setText(ocrText);
                appendLog(QString("已按选区 OCR 复制第 %1 页文本").arg(page + 1));
                return;
            }
        }
    }
    const QString indexedPageText = textIndexer.pageTextAt(page).trimmed();
    if (!indexedPageText.isEmpty()) {
        const QString bounded = indexedPageText.left(16000);
        QGuiApplication::clipboard()->setText(bounded);
        appendLog(QString("选区为空，已复制第 %1 页索引文本").arg(page + 1));
        return;
    }
    const QPdfSelection pageSelection = pdfDocument->getAllText(page);
    const QString pageText = pageSelection.text().trimmed();
    if (!pageText.isEmpty()) {
        QGuiApplication::clipboard()->setText(pageText);
        appendLog(QString("选区为空，已复制第 %1 页全文文本").arg(page + 1));
        return;
    }
    const QString fallback = QString("PDF: %1 | 第 %2 页")
        .arg(QFileInfo(currentPdfPath).fileName())
        .arg(pageSpin->value());
    QGuiApplication::clipboard()->setText(fallback);
    appendLog("当前页未提取到文本，已复制页面信息");
}

void MainWindow::refreshSelectionRebuildConfig(const bool forceLog) {
    if (selectionConfigPath.isEmpty()) {
        const QString appDir = QCoreApplication::applicationDirPath();
        const QString cwd = QDir::currentPath();
        const QStringList candidates = {
            QDir(cwd).filePath(QStringLiteral("scripts/selection_rebuild_config.json")),
            QDir(cwd).filePath(QStringLiteral("tools/selection_rebuild_config.json")),
            QDir(appDir).filePath(QStringLiteral("../scripts/selection_rebuild_config.json")),
            QDir(appDir).filePath(QStringLiteral("../tools/selection_rebuild_config.json")),
            QDir(appDir).filePath(QStringLiteral("selection_rebuild_config.json"))
        };
        for (const QString &candidate : candidates) {
            if (QFileInfo::exists(candidate)) {
                selectionConfigPath = QFileInfo(candidate).absoluteFilePath();
                break;
            }
        }
        if (selectionConfigPath.isEmpty()) {
            selectionConfigPath = QFileInfo(candidates.first()).absoluteFilePath();
        }
    }

    QFileInfo info(selectionConfigPath);
    if (!info.exists()) {
        if (forceLog && !selectionConfigLoaded) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("选区重建配置未找到，使用内置默认参数"));
        }
        selectionConfigLoaded = true;
        return;
    }
    if (selectionConfigLoaded && selectionConfigLastModified.isValid() && selectionConfigLastModified == info.lastModified()) {
        return;
    }

    QFile file(selectionConfigPath);
    if (!file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
        if (forceLog) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("选区重建配置读取失败，继续使用当前参数"));
        }
        return;
    }
    QJsonParseError parseError;
    const QJsonDocument json = QJsonDocument::fromJson(file.readAll(), &parseError);
    if (parseError.error != QJsonParseError::NoError || !json.isObject()) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("选区重建配置格式错误，继续使用当前参数"));
        return;
    }
    converter::SelectionRebuildConfig cfg = textIndexer.selectionRebuildConfig();
    const QJsonObject obj = json.object();
    auto loadDouble = [&](const char *key, double &target) {
        const QJsonValue value = obj.value(QLatin1String(key));
        if (value.isDouble()) {
            target = value.toDouble(target);
        }
    };
    auto loadInt = [&](const char *key, int &target) {
        const QJsonValue value = obj.value(QLatin1String(key));
        if (value.isDouble()) {
            target = qMax(1, value.toInt(target));
        }
    };
    auto loadBool = [&](const char *key, bool &target) {
        const QJsonValue value = obj.value(QLatin1String(key));
        if (value.isBool()) {
            target = value.toBool(target);
        }
    };
    loadDouble("lineAssignToleranceScale", cfg.lineAssignToleranceScale);
    loadInt("twoColumnMinLineCount", cfg.twoColumnMinLineCount);
    loadDouble("twoColumnGapRatio", cfg.twoColumnGapRatio);
    loadDouble("twoColumnGutterRatio", cfg.twoColumnGutterRatio);
    loadDouble("paragraphGapLineHeightScale", cfg.paragraphGapLineHeightScale);
    loadDouble("paragraphGapMedianScale", cfg.paragraphGapMedianScale);
    loadDouble("paragraphGapFallbackScale", cfg.paragraphGapFallbackScale);
    loadDouble("indentBreakMinPx", cfg.indentBreakMinPx);
    loadDouble("indentBreakLineHeightScale", cfg.indentBreakLineHeightScale);
    loadDouble("columnJumpMinPx", cfg.columnJumpMinPx);
    loadDouble("columnJumpWidthRatio", cfg.columnJumpWidthRatio);
    loadDouble("columnJumpMaxGapLineHeightScale", cfg.columnJumpMaxGapLineHeightScale);
    loadDouble("columnJumpMaxGapAbs", cfg.columnJumpMaxGapAbs);
    loadBool("forceBreakOnColumnSwitch", cfg.forceBreakOnColumnSwitch);
    loadBool("semanticSentenceBreakEnabled", cfg.semanticSentenceBreakEnabled);
    textIndexer.setSelectionRebuildConfig(cfg);
    selectionConfigLastModified = info.lastModified();
    const bool wasLoaded = selectionConfigLoaded;
    selectionConfigLoaded = true;
    if (forceLog || !wasLoaded) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("选区重建配置已加载: %1").arg(selectionConfigPath));
    } else {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("检测到选区重建配置变更，已热更新"));
    }
}

QString MainWindow::ocrSelectionTextFromViewportRect(const int pageIndex, const QRect &viewportRect, const QRectF &pageRect) {
    if (!pdfView || viewportRect.isNull()) {
        return QString();
    }
    const QRect safeRect = viewportRect.normalized().intersected(pdfView->viewport()->rect());
    if (safeRect.width() < 4 || safeRect.height() < 4) {
        return QString();
    }
    const QPixmap snap = pdfView->viewport()->grab(safeRect);
    if (snap.isNull()) {
        return QString();
    }
    QTemporaryDir tempDir;
    if (!tempDir.isValid()) {
        return QString();
    }
    const QString imagePath = QDir(tempDir.path()).filePath(QStringLiteral("selection_ocr.png"));
    if (!snap.save(imagePath, "PNG")) {
        return QString();
    }

    converter::ToolExecutor executor;
    converter::OcrAdapterRegistry registry;
    const converter::IOcrAdapter *adapter = registry.pickBestAdapter(executor);
    if (!adapter) {
        return QString();
    }

    converter::DocumentModel ocrDoc;
    QStringList traceLogs;
    converter::OcrSettings settings;
    settings.psm = 6;
    if (!adapter->runOnImages(QStringList{imagePath}, settings, executor, ocrDoc, traceLogs)) {
        return QString();
    }

    QStringList lines;
    QVector<converter::IndexedWord> ocrWords;
    const QSizeF targetPageSize = textIndexer.pageSizeAt(pageIndex);
    const QRectF pageBounds = (targetPageSize.width() > 1.0 && targetPageSize.height() > 1.0)
        ? QRectF(0.0, 0.0, targetPageSize.width(), targetPageSize.height())
        : QRectF();
    const double scaleX = snap.width() > 0 ? pageRect.width() / static_cast<double>(snap.width()) : 1.0;
    const double scaleY = snap.height() > 0 ? pageRect.height() / static_cast<double>(snap.height()) : 1.0;
    for (const converter::PageContent &page : ocrDoc.pages()) {
        for (const converter::TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            QStringList spans;
            for (const converter::TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                const QString token = span.text.trimmed();
                if (!token.isEmpty()) {
                    spans.push_back(token);
                }
                const double rawX = span.w > 0.1f ? span.x : line.x;
                const double rawY = span.h > 0.1f ? span.y : line.y;
                const double rawW = span.w > 0.1f ? span.w : line.w;
                const double rawH = span.h > 0.1f ? span.h : line.h;
                if (token.isEmpty() || rawW <= 0.1 || rawH <= 0.1) {
                    continue;
                }
                converter::IndexedWord word;
                word.text = token;
                word.box = QRectF(
                    pageRect.left() + rawX * scaleX,
                    pageRect.top() + rawY * scaleY,
                    rawW * scaleX,
                    rawH * scaleY
                );
                if (!pageBounds.isNull()) {
                    word.box = word.box.intersected(pageBounds);
                }
                if (word.box.width() > 0.0 && word.box.height() > 0.0) {
                    ocrWords.push_back(word);
                }
            }
            const QString merged = spans.join(QStringLiteral(" ")).trimmed();
            if (!merged.isEmpty()) {
                lines.push_back(merged);
            }
        }
    }
    const QString recognized = lines.join('\n').trimmed();
    if (!ocrWords.isEmpty() || !recognized.isEmpty()) {
        textIndexer.injectOcrWords(pageIndex, ocrWords, targetPageSize, recognized);
    }
    return recognized;
}

void MainWindow::onRecentFileClicked(QListWidgetItem *item) {
    if (item == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    const QString path = item->data(Qt::UserRole).toString();
    if (path.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    loadPdfFile(path, true);
}

void MainWindow::appendLog(const QString &line) {
    logArea->appendPlainText(line);
}

void MainWindow::appendTaskListItem(const QString &line) {
    taskList->addItem(line);
    taskList->scrollToBottom();
}

QString MainWindow::buildTaskId() const {
    // taskId 由时间戳 + 随机片段组成，满足 UI 和日志的短标识需求。
    const QString ts = QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString("yyyyMMddHHmmsszzz");
    const quint32 randPart = QRandomGenerator::global()->generate() % 100000;
    return QString("T%1-%2").arg(ts).arg(randPart, 5, 10, QChar('0'));
}

void MainWindow::onTaskLog(const QString &, const QString &line) {
    appendLog(line);
}

void MainWindow::onTaskFinished(const QString &, const ConversionResult &result) {
    const QString state = result.ok ? "成功" : "失败";
    appendTaskListItem(QString("[%1] %2").arg(state, result.message));
    if (!result.outputPath.isEmpty()) {
        appendTaskListItem(QString("产物: %1").arg(result.outputPath));
    }
}

void MainWindow::onQueueStateChanged(const int pending, const bool running) {
    queueStateLabel->setText(QString("队列: %1 等待 / %2 完成 / %3 失败 / 运行中:%4")
        .arg(pending)
        .arg(taskManager->completedCount())
        .arg(taskManager->failedCount())
        .arg(running ? "是" : "否"));
}

void MainWindow::updateUiState() {
    captureButton->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    rotateLeftButton->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    rotateRightButton->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    copySelectionButton->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    annotateButton->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    annotationExportButton->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    annotationImportButton->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    annotationFilterInput->setEnabled(!currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    const bool hasSearchHits = !searchHitPages.isEmpty() || !searchHits.isEmpty();
    searchNextButton->setEnabled(hasSearchHits && !isSearchInProgress);
    searchPrevButton->setEnabled(hasSearchHits && !isSearchInProgress);
    searchButton->setEnabled(!isSearchInProgress && !currentPdfPath.isEmpty());
    searchCancelButton->setEnabled(isSearchInProgress);
}

bool MainWindow::loadPdfFile(const QString &filePath, const bool restoreHistory) {
    selectedPdfFiles = {filePath};
    currentPdfPath = filePath;
    currentRotation = 0;
    preloadedPages.clear();
    preloadedPageOrder.clear();
    warmupCursorPage = 0;
    warmupPlanPages.clear();
    warmupPlanCursor = 0;
    searchHitPages.clear();
    searchHits.clear();
    currentSearchCursor = -1;
    searchUseIndexerOnly = false;
    pendingIndexerSearchKeyword.clear();
    isSearchInProgress = false;
    activeSearchRequestId += 1;
    if (activeSearchCancelFlag) {
        activeSearchCancelFlag->store(true);
    }
    activeSearchCancelFlag.reset();
    isIndexBuilding = false;
    activeIndexBuildRequestId += 1;
    textIndexer = converter::PdfTextIndexer();
    refreshSelectionRebuildConfig();
    searchHitList->clear();
    if (pdfSearchModel) {
        pdfSearchModel->setSearchString(QString());
    }
    searchStatusLabel->setText("未搜索");

    auto status = pdfDocument->load(filePath);
    if (status != QPdfDocument::Error::None) {
        bool loaded = false;
        for (int i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
            bool ok = false;
            const QString pwd = QInputDialog::getText(
                this,
                "PDF 密码",
                "请输入 PDF 密码：",
                QLineEdit::Password,
                "",
                &ok
            );
            if (!ok || pwd.isEmpty()) {
                break;
            }
            pdfDocument->setPassword(pwd);
            status = pdfDocument->load(filePath);
            if (status == QPdfDocument::Error::None) {
                loaded = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (!loaded && status != QPdfDocument::Error::None) {
            appendLog("打开 PDF 失败（可能是密码错误或文件损坏）");
            QMessageBox::warning(this, "打开失败", "无法打开 PDF，请检查文件完整性或密码。");
            return false;
        }
    }

    const QString appName = QApplication::applicationDisplayName().trimmed().isEmpty()
        ? QStringLiteral("PDF Master")
        : QApplication::applicationDisplayName().trimmed();
    setWindowTitle(QStringLiteral("%1 - %2").arg(appName, QFileInfo(filePath).fileName()));
    stateStore.pushRecentFile(filePath);
    refreshRecentFilesView();
    const QString sidecarXfdfPath = QFileInfo(filePath).absolutePath()
        + QStringLiteral("/")
        + QFileInfo(filePath).completeBaseName()
        + QStringLiteral(".xfdf");
    if (QFileInfo::exists(sidecarXfdfPath)) {
        QString importError;
        const int imported = stateStore.importAnnotationsFromXfdf(filePath, sidecarXfdfPath, importError);
        if (imported > 0) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("已导入外部 XFDF 批注：%1 条").arg(imported));
        } else if (!importError.isEmpty()) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("XFDF 批注导入失败：%1").arg(importError));
        }
    }
    const QString sidecarJsonPath = QFileInfo(filePath).absolutePath()
        + QStringLiteral("/")
        + QFileInfo(filePath).completeBaseName()
        + QStringLiteral(".annotations.json");
    if (QFileInfo::exists(sidecarJsonPath)) {
        QFile jsonFile(sidecarJsonPath);
        if (jsonFile.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
            QJsonParseError parseError;
            const QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(jsonFile.readAll(), &parseError);
            if (parseError.error == QJsonParseError::NoError) {
                QJsonArray entries;
                if (doc.isArray()) {
                    entries = doc.array();
                } else if (doc.isObject()) {
                    entries = doc.object().value(QStringLiteral("annotations")).toArray();
                }
                const int beforeCount = stateStore.loadAnnotations(filePath).size();
                for (const QJsonValue &value : entries) {
                    const QJsonObject item = value.toObject();
                    const QString note = item.value(QStringLiteral("note")).toString().trimmed();
                    if (note.isEmpty()) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    const int page = qMax(0, item.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt(0));
                    const double y = item.contains(QStringLiteral("y_ratio"))
                        ? item.value(QStringLiteral("y_ratio")).toDouble(-1.0)
                        : item.value(QStringLiteral("yRatio")).toDouble(-1.0);
                    stateStore.addAnnotation(filePath, page, note, y);
                }
                const int afterCount = stateStore.loadAnnotations(filePath).size();
                const int imported = qMax(0, afterCount - beforeCount);
                if (imported > 0) {
                    appendLog(QStringLiteral("已导入外部 JSON 批注：%1 条").arg(imported));
                }
            } else {
                appendLog(QStringLiteral("JSON 批注导入失败：解析错误"));
            }
        } else {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("JSON 批注导入失败：无法读取文件"));
        }
    }

    const int pageCount = pdfDocument->pageCount();
    pageSpin->setMaximum(pageCount > 0 ? pageCount : 1);
    pageSpin->setValue(1);
    pageCountLabel->setText(QString("/ %1").arg(pageCount));

    if (lastOutputDir.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        lastOutputDir = QFileInfo(filePath).absolutePath();
    }

    rebuildThumbnailList();
    bookmarkTree->clear();

    rebuildBookmarkTreeFromIndex();
    rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
    preloadPageCacheWindow(0);
    cacheWarmupTimer->stop();

    if (restoreHistory) {
        converter::ReadingHistoryItem history;
        if (stateStore.findHistoryFor(filePath, history)) {
            const int page = qBound(0, history.lastPage, qMax(0, pageCount - 1));
            pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
            jumpToPage(page);
            zoomSpin->setValue(history.zoomFactor > 0 ? history.zoomFactor : 1.0);
            currentRotation = history.rotation;
            QMetaObject::invokeMethod(pdfView, "setPageRotation", Q_ARG(int, currentRotation));
        }
    }

    appendLog(QString("已打开: %1").arg(filePath));
    appendTaskListItem(QString("已载入单文件任务: %1").arg(QFileInfo(filePath).fileName()));
    persistReadingProgress();
    updateUiState();
    return true;
}

void MainWindow::startIndexBuildForFile(const QString &filePath) {
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    isIndexBuilding = true;
    activeIndexBuildRequestId += 1;
    const int requestId = activeIndexBuildRequestId;
    appendLog(QStringLiteral("后台构建全文索引中..."));
    updateUiState();

    auto *watcher = new QFutureWatcher<IndexBuildResult>(this);
    connect(watcher, &QFutureWatcher<IndexBuildResult>::finished, this, [this, watcher, requestId, filePath]() {
        const IndexBuildResult result = watcher->result();
        watcher->deleteLater();
        if (requestId != activeIndexBuildRequestId) {
            return;
        }
        isIndexBuilding = false;
        if (filePath != currentPdfPath) {
            updateUiState();
            return;
        }
        if (!result.ok) {
            if (!result.error.isEmpty()) {
                appendLog(result.error);
            }
            updateUiState();
            return;
        }

        textIndexer = result.indexer;
        refreshSelectionRebuildConfig();
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("全文索引已就绪"));
        rebuildBookmarkTreeFromIndex();
        rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();

        const QString keyword = searchInput->text().trimmed();
        if (!pendingIndexerSearchKeyword.isEmpty() && pendingIndexerSearchKeyword == keyword) {
            pendingIndexerSearchKeyword.clear();
            searchInDocument();
            return;
        }
        updateUiState();
    });
    watcher->setFuture(QtConcurrent::run([filePath]() {
        IndexBuildResult out;
        QString error;
        converter::PdfTextIndexer indexer;
        out.ok = indexer.buildIndex(filePath, error);
        out.error = error;
        out.indexer = indexer;
        return out;
    }));
}

void MainWindow::rebuildThumbnailList() {
    thumbnailList->clear();
    pendingThumbnailPages.clear();
    const int pages = pdfDocument->pageCount();
    for (int i = 0; i < pages; ++i) {
        auto *item = new QListWidgetItem(QString("第 %1 页").arg(i + 1));
        item->setData(Qt::UserRole, i);
        QPixmap placeholder(120, 160);
        placeholder.fill(QColor("#f3f4f6"));
        item->setIcon(QIcon(placeholder));
        item->setSizeHint(QSize(160, 190));
        thumbnailList->addItem(item);
        pendingThumbnailPages.push_back(i);
    }
    if (!pendingThumbnailPages.isEmpty()) {
        thumbnailRenderTimer->start();
    }
}

void MainWindow::renderThumbnailBatch() {
    if (pendingThumbnailPages.isEmpty()) {
        thumbnailRenderTimer->stop();
        return;
    }

    const int batchSize = 1;
    int consumed = 0;
    while (consumed < batchSize && !pendingThumbnailPages.isEmpty()) {
        const int page = pendingThumbnailPages.front();
        pendingThumbnailPages.removeFirst();
        consumed += 1;

        if (page < 0 || page >= pdfDocument->pageCount()) {
            continue;
        }
        QListWidgetItem *target = (page >= 0 && page < thumbnailList->count())
            ? thumbnailList->item(page)
            : nullptr;
        if (!target) {
            continue;
        }

        const QSize thumbSize(120, 160);
        const QImage image = pdfDocument->render(page, thumbSize);
        if (!image.isNull()) {
            target->setIcon(QIcon(QPixmap::fromImage(image)));
        }
    }
}

void MainWindow::highlightThumbnailsBySearch(const QSet<int> &hitPages) {
    for (int i = 0; i < thumbnailList->count(); ++i) {
        QListWidgetItem *item = thumbnailList->item(i);
        if (!item) {
            continue;
        }
        bool ok = false;
        const int page = item->data(Qt::UserRole).toInt(&ok);
        if (!ok) {
            continue;
        }
        if (hitPages.contains(page)) {
            item->setBackground(QBrush(QColor("#fde68a")));
        } else {
            item->setBackground(QBrush(Qt::transparent));
        }
    }
}

void MainWindow::refreshRecentFilesView() {
    recentFilesList->clear();
    const QVector<converter::RecentItem> recents = stateStore.loadRecentFiles();
    for (const converter::RecentItem &item : recents) {
        auto *row = new QListWidgetItem(
            QString("%1\n%2").arg(QFileInfo(item.filePath).fileName(), item.openedAt)
        );
        row->setData(Qt::UserRole, item.filePath);
        recentFilesList->addItem(row);
    }
}

void MainWindow::persistReadingProgress() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    converter::ReaderSessionSnapshot snapshot;
    snapshot.currentFilePath = currentPdfPath;
    snapshot.openFiles = selectedPdfFiles;
    snapshot.page = qMax(0, pageSpin->value() - 1);
    snapshot.zoomFactor = zoomSpin->value();
    snapshot.rotation = currentRotation;
    snapshot.dirtyExit = true;
    stateStore.saveSessionSnapshot(snapshot);
    stateStore.updateReadingHistory(
        currentPdfPath,
        qMax(0, pageSpin->value() - 1),
        zoomSpin->value(),
        currentRotation
    );
}

void MainWindow::addManualAnnotation() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog("请先打开 PDF");
        return;
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const QString note = QInputDialog::getMultiLineText(
        this,
        "批注",
        QString("第 %1 页批注：").arg(pageSpin->value()),
        "",
        &ok
    ).trimmed();
    if (!ok || note.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    double yRatio = -1.0;
    const int page = qMax(0, pageSpin->value() - 1);
    if (pdfView->pageNavigator()) {
        const QSizeF pageSize = pdfDocument->pagePointSize(page);
        if (pageSize.height() > 1.0) {
            const QPointF location = pdfView->pageNavigator()->currentLocation();
            yRatio = qBound(0.0, location.y() / pageSize.height(), 1.0);
        }
    }
    const QVector<converter::ReaderAnnotationItem> existing = stateStore.loadAnnotations(currentPdfPath);
    for (const converter::ReaderAnnotationItem &ann : existing) {
        if (ann.page == page && ann.note.trimmed() == note) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注重复：同页同内容已存在，已跳过"));
            return;
        }
    }
    stateStore.addAnnotation(currentPdfPath, page, note, yRatio);
    appendLog(QString("批注@第%1页: %2").arg(pageSpin->value()).arg(note));
    rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
}

void MainWindow::restoreLastSessionOnStartup() {
    converter::ReaderSessionSnapshot snapshot;
    if (stateStore.loadSessionSnapshot(snapshot) && snapshot.dirtyExit) {
        QStringList recoveryCandidates;
        if (!snapshot.currentFilePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            recoveryCandidates.push_back(snapshot.currentFilePath);
        }
        for (const QString &path : snapshot.openFiles) {
            const QString normalized = path.trimmed();
            if (!normalized.isEmpty() && !recoveryCandidates.contains(normalized)) {
                recoveryCandidates.push_back(normalized);
            }
        }
        for (const QString &path : recoveryCandidates) {
            if (!QFileInfo::exists(path)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (!loadPdfFile(path, true)) {
                continue;
            }
            const int page = qMax(0, qMin(snapshot.page, qMax(0, pdfDocument->pageCount() - 1)));
            pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
            jumpToPage(page);
            if (snapshot.zoomFactor > 0) {
                zoomSpin->setValue(snapshot.zoomFactor);
            }
            currentRotation = snapshot.rotation;
            QMetaObject::invokeMethod(pdfView, "setPageRotation", Q_ARG(int, currentRotation));
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("检测到异常中断，已恢复上次阅读状态"));
            return;
        }
    }
    const QVector<converter::RecentItem> recents = stateStore.loadRecentFiles();
    for (const converter::RecentItem &item : recents) {
        if (item.filePath.isEmpty() || !QFileInfo::exists(item.filePath)) {
            continue;
        }
        if (loadPdfFile(item.filePath, true)) {
            appendLog(QString("已恢复上次会话：%1").arg(item.filePath));
        }
        break;
    }
}

void MainWindow::rebuildBookmarkTreeFromIndex() {
    bookmarkTree->clear();

    const QVector<converter::ReaderBookmarkItem> manualBookmarks = stateStore.loadBookmarks(currentPdfPath);
    if (!manualBookmarks.isEmpty()) {
        auto *manualRoot = new QTreeWidgetItem();
        manualRoot->setText(0, QStringLiteral("我的书签"));
        manualRoot->setText(1, QString::number(manualBookmarks.size()));
        manualRoot->setData(0, kItemRolePage, -1);
        manualRoot->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindManualRoot);
        bookmarkTree->addTopLevelItem(manualRoot);
        for (const converter::ReaderBookmarkItem &mark : manualBookmarks) {
            auto *item = new QTreeWidgetItem(manualRoot);
            item->setText(0, mark.title.left(80));
            item->setText(1, QString::number(mark.page + 1));
            item->setData(0, kItemRolePage, qMax(0, mark.page));
            item->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindManual);
            item->setData(0, kItemRoleBookmarkId, mark.createdAt);
        }
        manualRoot->setExpanded(true);
    }

    int outlineAdded = 0;
    int outlineRepairedDepthCount = 0;
    int outlineRepairedPageCount = 0;
    QSet<int> outlineCoveredPages;
    QVector<QPair<int, QTreeWidgetItem *>> outlineTopAnchors;
    struct OutlineAnchor {
        int page = -1;
        int depth = 1;
        QTreeWidgetItem *item = nullptr;
    };
    QVector<OutlineAnchor> outlineAnchors;
    QObject *outlineObject = nullptr;
    const bool outlineInvoked = QMetaObject::invokeMethod(
        pdfDocument,
        "bookmarkModel",
        Qt::DirectConnection,
        Q_RETURN_ARG(QObject *, outlineObject)
    );
    if (outlineInvoked) {
        auto *outlineModel = qobject_cast<QAbstractItemModel *>(outlineObject);
        if (outlineModel != nullptr) {
            struct OutlineEntry {
                QString title;
                int page = -1;
                int depth = 1;
            };
            QVector<OutlineEntry> flatEntries;
            std::function<void(const QModelIndex &, int)> collectChildren;
            collectChildren = [&](const QModelIndex &parentIdx, const int depth) {
                const int rows = outlineModel->rowCount(parentIdx);
                for (int row = 0; row < rows; ++row) {
                    const QModelIndex titleIndex = outlineModel->index(row, 0, parentIdx);
                    const QString title = titleIndex.data(Qt::DisplayRole).toString().simplified();
                    if (title.isEmpty()) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    const int page = inferPageFromOutlineIndex(outlineModel, titleIndex, pdfDocument->pageCount());
                    flatEntries.push_back({title, page, qMax(1, depth)});
                    collectChildren(titleIndex, depth + 1);
                }
            };
            collectChildren(QModelIndex(), 1);

            if (!flatEntries.isEmpty()) {
                int prevDepth = 1;
                int lastValidPage = -1;
                for (int i = 0; i < flatEntries.size(); ++i) {
                    OutlineEntry &entry = flatEntries[i];
                    const int correctedDepth = qBound(1, entry.depth, prevDepth + 1);
                    if (correctedDepth != entry.depth) {
                        outlineRepairedDepthCount += 1;
                        entry.depth = correctedDepth;
                    }
                    prevDepth = entry.depth;
                    if (entry.page >= 0) {
                        lastValidPage = entry.page;
                    } else if (lastValidPage >= 0) {
                        entry.page = lastValidPage;
                        outlineRepairedPageCount += 1;
                    }
                }

                int nextValidPage = -1;
                for (int i = flatEntries.size() - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
                    OutlineEntry &entry = flatEntries[i];
                    if (entry.page >= 0) {
                        nextValidPage = entry.page;
                    } else if (nextValidPage >= 0) {
                        entry.page = nextValidPage;
                        outlineRepairedPageCount += 1;
                    }
                    if (entry.page >= 0) {
                        entry.page = qBound(0, entry.page, qMax(0, pdfDocument->pageCount() - 1));
                    }
                }
                int monotonicPageRepairs = 0;
                int maxObservedPage = -1;
                for (OutlineEntry &entry : flatEntries) {
                    if (entry.page < 0) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    if (maxObservedPage >= 0 && entry.page + 2 < maxObservedPage) {
                        entry.page = maxObservedPage;
                        monotonicPageRepairs += 1;
                    }
                    maxObservedPage = qMax(maxObservedPage, entry.page);
                }
                outlineRepairedPageCount += monotonicPageRepairs;

                QVector<QTreeWidgetItem *> levelStack(2, nullptr);
                for (const OutlineEntry &entry : flatEntries) {
                    while (levelStack.size() <= entry.depth) {
                        levelStack.push_back(nullptr);
                    }
                    for (int i = entry.depth + 1; i < levelStack.size(); ++i) {
                        levelStack[i] = nullptr;
                    }
                    QTreeWidgetItem *parent = (entry.depth <= 1) ? nullptr : levelStack[entry.depth - 1];
                    QTreeWidgetItem *item = (parent == nullptr)
                        ? new QTreeWidgetItem(bookmarkTree)
                        : new QTreeWidgetItem(parent);
                    item->setText(0, entry.title.left(120));
                    item->setText(1, entry.page >= 0 ? QString::number(entry.page + 1) : QStringLiteral("-"));
                    item->setData(0, kItemRolePage, entry.page);
                    item->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindOutline);
                    if (entry.page >= 0) {
                        outlineCoveredPages.insert(entry.page);
                        if (entry.depth == 1) {
                            outlineTopAnchors.push_back({entry.page, item});
                        }
                        outlineAnchors.push_back({entry.page, entry.depth, item});
                    }
                    levelStack[entry.depth] = item;
                    outlineAdded += 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    if (outlineAdded > 0) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("已优先读取 PDF 内置目录：%1 项").arg(outlineAdded));
        if (outlineRepairedDepthCount > 0 || outlineRepairedPageCount > 0) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("内置目录修正：层级 %1 项，页码 %2 项")
                .arg(outlineRepairedDepthCount)
                .arg(outlineRepairedPageCount));
        }
    }

    if (!textIndexer.hasIndex()) {
        return;
    }

    const int pageCount = qMax(0, pdfDocument->pageCount());
    const bool hasOutline = outlineAdded > 0;
    const int sparseCoverageThreshold = qMax(3, pageCount / 14);
    const bool needOutlineSupplement = hasOutline && outlineCoveredPages.size() <= sparseCoverageThreshold;
    if (hasOutline && !needOutlineSupplement) {
        return;
    }

    static const QRegularExpression headingPattern(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+[章节部分]|[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*\s*[\.\-、:：]?\s*.+|Chapter\s+[0-9]+|Part\s+[A-Z0-9]+).*)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );

    int added = 0;
    int dedupSkipped = 0;
    int similarSkipped = 0;
    int prevLevel = 1;
    int prevAcceptedPage = -100000;
    int smoothedCount = 0;
    int clampedCount = 0;
    int continuitySkipped = 0;
    constexpr int kMarkerRollbackTolerance = 2;
    QVector<QTreeWidgetItem *> levelStack(1, nullptr);
    QMap<QString, int> headingLastPage;
    QString lastAcceptedSignature;
    int lastAcceptedPage = -100000;
    QMap<int, int> lastMarkerByLevel;
    int lastMarkerAny = -1;
    QTreeWidgetItem *autoRoot = new QTreeWidgetItem();
    autoRoot->setText(0, needOutlineSupplement ? QStringLiteral("目录补全（推断）") : QStringLiteral("自动目录（推断）"));
    autoRoot->setText(1, QStringLiteral("-"));
    autoRoot->setData(0, kItemRolePage, -1);
    autoRoot->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindAutoHeading);
    bookmarkTree->addTopLevelItem(autoRoot);

    auto pickOutlineAnchorParent = [&](const int page) -> QTreeWidgetItem * {
        if (!needOutlineSupplement || outlineAnchors.isEmpty()) {
            return nullptr;
        }
        QTreeWidgetItem *best = nullptr;
        int bestScore = -1e9;
        for (const OutlineAnchor &anchor : outlineAnchors) {
            if (anchor.item == nullptr || anchor.page < 0) {
                continue;
            }
            const int dist = qAbs(anchor.page - page);
            // 同页/近页优先；距离一致时，优先更深层节点作为挂载点。
            int score = 0;
            score -= dist * 10;
            score += qMin(8, anchor.depth) * 6;
            if (anchor.page <= page) {
                score += 8;
            }
            if (dist <= 1) {
                score += 12;
            }
            if (score > bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                best = anchor.item;
            }
        }
        if (best == nullptr && !outlineTopAnchors.isEmpty()) {
            // 兜底：若未命中多级锚点，回退到一级锚点。
            int bestDist = 1e9;
            for (const auto &pair : outlineTopAnchors) {
                const int dist = qAbs(pair.first - page);
                if (dist < bestDist) {
                    bestDist = dist;
                    best = pair.second;
                }
            }
        }
        return best;
    };

    auto nearOutlineCovered = [&](const int page) -> bool {
        if (!needOutlineSupplement) {
            return false;
        }
        for (int delta = -2; delta <= 2; ++delta) {
            if (outlineCoveredPages.contains(page + delta)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    };

    const int maxAutoHeadings = needOutlineSupplement ? 64 : 120;
    const QList<int> pages = textIndexer.pageIndexes();
    for (const int page : pages) {
        if (nearOutlineCovered(page)) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString text = textIndexer.pageTextAt(page).trimmed();
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }

        const QStringList lines = text.split('\n', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
        if (lines.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }

        const QString firstLine = pickHeadingCandidate(lines, page);
        if (firstLine.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }

        const bool headingLike = headingPattern.match(firstLine).hasMatch()
            || (!needOutlineSupplement && firstLine.size() <= 24 && page < 5);
        if (!headingLike) {
            continue;
        }

        const QString normalizedHeading = normalizeHeadingForDedup(firstLine);
        if (!normalizedHeading.isEmpty()) {
            const int lastPage = headingLastPage.value(normalizedHeading, -100000);
            if (page - lastPage <= kAutoHeadingRepeatGapPages) {
                dedupSkipped += 1;
                continue;
            }
        }
        const QString similaritySignature = buildHeadingSimilaritySignature(firstLine);
        if (!similaritySignature.isEmpty()
            && !lastAcceptedSignature.isEmpty()
            && page - lastAcceptedPage <= kAutoHeadingRepeatGapPages
            && similaritySignature.size() >= 6
            && lastAcceptedSignature.size() >= 6
            && similaritySignature == lastAcceptedSignature) {
            similarSkipped += 1;
            continue;
        }

        const HeadingKind headingKind = classifyHeadingKind(firstLine);
        int level = inferHeadingLevel(firstLine);
        if (headingKind == HeadingKind::Chapter) {
            level = 1;
        } else if (headingKind == HeadingKind::Section) {
            level = 2;
        } else if (headingKind == HeadingKind::Article) {
            level = qMax(3, level);
        } else if (headingKind == HeadingKind::Unknown
                   && firstLine.size() <= 16
                   && page - prevAcceptedPage <= 1
                   && prevLevel >= 1) {
            level = qMin(3, prevLevel + 1);
            smoothedCount += 1;
        }
        if (headingKind != HeadingKind::Chapter
            && level == 1
            && prevLevel >= 3
            && page - prevAcceptedPage <= 2) {
            level = 2;
            smoothedCount += 1;
        }
        if (level > prevLevel + 1) {
            level = prevLevel + 1;
            clampedCount += 1;
        }
        if (level < 1) {
            level = 1;
        }

        const int markerPage = extractTrailingPageMarker(firstLine);
        if (markerPage >= 0) {
            const int prevLevelMarker = lastMarkerByLevel.value(level, -1);
            const bool rollbackTooMuchInLevel = prevLevelMarker >= 0 && markerPage + kMarkerRollbackTolerance < prevLevelMarker;
            const bool rollbackTooMuchGlobal = lastMarkerAny >= 0 && markerPage + (kMarkerRollbackTolerance + 2) < lastMarkerAny;
            if (rollbackTooMuchInLevel || rollbackTooMuchGlobal) {
                continuitySkipped += 1;
                continue;
            }
        }

        prevLevel = level;
        prevAcceptedPage = page;
        QTreeWidgetItem *parent = nullptr;
        if (needOutlineSupplement) {
            parent = pickOutlineAnchorParent(page);
        }
        if (parent == nullptr) {
            while (levelStack.size() <= level) {
                levelStack.push_back(nullptr);
            }
            for (int i = level + 1; i < levelStack.size(); ++i) {
                levelStack[i] = nullptr;
            }
            parent = (level == 1 || levelStack[level - 1] == nullptr)
                ? autoRoot
                : levelStack[level - 1];
        }

        auto *item = new QTreeWidgetItem(parent);
        item->setText(0, firstLine.left(80));
        item->setText(1, QString::number(page + 1));
        item->setData(0, kItemRolePage, page);
        item->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindAutoHeading);
        if (!needOutlineSupplement) {
            levelStack[level] = item;
        }
        if (!normalizedHeading.isEmpty()) {
            headingLastPage.insert(normalizedHeading, page);
        }
        lastAcceptedSignature = similaritySignature;
        lastAcceptedPage = page;
        if (markerPage >= 0) {
            lastMarkerByLevel.insert(level, markerPage);
            lastMarkerAny = qMax(lastMarkerAny, markerPage);
        }
        added += 1;
        if (added >= maxAutoHeadings) {
            break;
        }
    }
    const bool supplementRootUsed = autoRoot->childCount() > 0;
    if (added <= 0 || (needOutlineSupplement && !supplementRootUsed)) {
        delete autoRoot;
    } else {
        autoRoot->setText(1, QString::number(added));
        autoRoot->setExpanded(true);
        if (dedupSkipped > 0 || similarSkipped > 0) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("自动目录去重：精确 %1 项，相似 %2 项")
                .arg(dedupSkipped)
                .arg(similarSkipped));
        }
        if (smoothedCount > 0 || clampedCount > 0) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("自动目录层级平滑：修正 %1 项，限幅 %2 项")
                .arg(smoothedCount)
                .arg(clampedCount));
        }
        if (continuitySkipped > 0) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("自动目录页码连续性：已过滤 %1 项异常回跳").arg(continuitySkipped));
        }
        if (needOutlineSupplement) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("内置目录补全：新增 %1 项（覆盖稀疏页段）").arg(added));
        }
    }
    if (needOutlineSupplement && added > 0 && !outlineAnchors.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("内置目录补全锚定：已按最近多级目录挂载补全项"));
    }
}

void MainWindow::refreshSearchResultsFromModel(const bool jumpToFirst) {
    if (pdfSearchModel == nullptr) {
        return;
    }
    const int total = pdfSearchModel->rowCount(QModelIndex());
    QSet<int> hitPages;
    for (int i = 0; i < total; ++i) {
        const QModelIndex row = pdfSearchModel->index(i, 0);
        const int page = row.data(static_cast<int>(QPdfSearchModel::Role::Page)).toInt();
        if (page >= 0) {
            hitPages.insert(page);
        }
    }
    searchHitPages = hitPages.values().toVector();
    std::sort(searchHitPages.begin(), searchHitPages.end());
    highlightThumbnailsBySearch(hitPages);

    if (total <= 0) {
        currentSearchCursor = -1;
        searchStatusLabel->setText(QStringLiteral("0/0"));
        appendLog(QString("未找到关键字：%1").arg(searchInput->text().trimmed()));
        updateUiState();
        return;
    }

    if (jumpToFirst || currentSearchCursor < 0 || currentSearchCursor >= total) {
        currentSearchCursor = 0;
    }
    pdfView->setCurrentSearchResultIndex(currentSearchCursor);
    searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(total));
    appendLog(QString("关键字“%1”命中 %2 处（%3 页）")
        .arg(searchInput->text().trimmed())
        .arg(total)
        .arg(hitPages.size()));
    updateUiState();
}

void MainWindow::rebuildAnnotationsFromStore() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    for (int i = bookmarkTree->topLevelItemCount() - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
        QTreeWidgetItem *item = bookmarkTree->topLevelItem(i);
        if (item && item->data(0, kItemRoleKind).toInt() == kBookmarkKindAnnotationRoot) {
            delete bookmarkTree->takeTopLevelItem(i);
        }
    }
    const QVector<converter::ReaderAnnotationItem> annotations = stateStore.loadAnnotations(currentPdfPath);
    if (annotations.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    auto *root = new QTreeWidgetItem();
    root->setText(0, QStringLiteral("我的批注"));
    root->setText(1, QString::number(annotations.size()));
    root->setData(0, kItemRolePage, -1);
    root->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindAnnotationRoot);
    bookmarkTree->addTopLevelItem(root);
    for (const converter::ReaderAnnotationItem &note : annotations) {
        const QString filter = annotationFilterInput ? annotationFilterInput->text().trimmed() : QString();
        if (!filter.isEmpty() && !note.note.contains(filter, Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            continue;
        }
        auto *item = new QTreeWidgetItem(root);
        const QString preview = note.note.simplified().left(50);
        item->setText(0, QStringLiteral("[批注] %1").arg(preview));
        item->setText(1, QString::number(note.page + 1));
        item->setData(0, kItemRolePage, note.page);
        item->setData(0, kItemRoleKind, kBookmarkKindAnnotation);
        item->setData(0, kItemRoleBookmarkId, note.createdAt);
        item->setData(0, kItemRoleAnchorRatio, note.yRatio);
        item->setToolTip(0, note.note);
    }
    root->setExpanded(true);
}

void MainWindow::preloadPageCacheWindow(const int centerPage) {
    const int total = pdfDocument->pageCount();
    if (total <= 0) {
        return;
    }
    const int start = qMax(0, centerPage - 2);
    const int end = qMin(total - 1, centerPage + 4);

    for (int page = start; page <= end; ++page) {
        if (preloadedPages.contains(page)) {
            continue;
        }
        // 预加载骨架：触发页面基础元数据访问，为后续缩略图/文本缓存扩展留钩子。
        (void)pdfDocument->pagePointSize(page);
        (void)textIndexer.pageTextAt(page);
        preloadedPages.insert(page);
        preloadedPageOrder.push_back(page);
        while (preloadedPageOrder.size() > kMaxPreloadedPages) {
            const int stale = preloadedPageOrder.front();
            preloadedPageOrder.pop_front();
            preloadedPages.remove(stale);
        }
    }
}

void MainWindow::onSearchHitClicked(QListWidgetItem *item) {
    if (!item) {
        return;
    }
    const int generation = item->data(kItemRoleSearchRequest).toInt();
    if (generation > 0 && generation != activeSearchResultGeneration) {
        return;
    }
    const int idx = item->data(kItemRoleSearchIndex).toInt();
    if (idx < 0 || idx >= searchHits.size()) {
        const int action = item->data(kItemRoleSearchAction).toInt();
        if (action == kSearchActionLoadMore) {
            searchRenderLimit = qMin(kSearchListRenderLimit, qMax(searchRenderLimit, kSearchListInitialRenderLimit) + kSearchListRenderStep);
            applyIndexerSearchResults(lastIndexerSearchKeyword, searchHits, false, activeSearchResultGeneration);
            return;
        }
        if (action == kSearchActionToggleSupplementGroup) {
            const int blockId = item->data(kItemRoleSearchBlockId).toInt();
            const bool collapsed = item->data(kItemRoleSearchCollapsed).toInt() == 1;
            if (collapsed) {
                const int firstPage = item->data(kItemRolePage).toInt();
                if (firstPage >= 0) {
                    pageSpin->setValue(firstPage + 1);
                    jumpToPage(firstPage);
                    if (searchUseIndexerOnly) {
                        for (int i = 0; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
                            if (searchHits[i].page == firstPage) {
                                currentSearchCursor = i;
                                searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2（索引模式）").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(searchHits.size()));
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            setSupplementBlockCollapsed(searchHitList, blockId, collapsed);
            return;
        }
        if (action != kSearchActionJumpPageFirstHit) {
            return;
        }
        const int page = item->data(kItemRolePage).toInt();
        if (page < 0) {
            return;
        }
        int firstIdx = -1;
        for (int i = 0; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
            if (searchHits[i].page == page) {
                firstIdx = i;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (firstIdx < 0) {
            return;
        }
        pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
        jumpToPage(page);
        if (searchUseIndexerOnly) {
            currentSearchCursor = firstIdx;
            searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2（索引模式）").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(searchHits.size()));
        }
        return;
    }
    const int page = searchHits[idx].page;
    if (page < 0) {
        return;
    }
    pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
    jumpToPage(page);
    if (searchUseIndexerOnly) {
        currentSearchCursor = idx;
        searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2（索引模式）").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(searchHits.size()));
    }
}

void MainWindow::onSearchHitContextMenu(const QPoint &pos) {
    if (!searchHitList || searchHits.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    QListWidgetItem *item = searchHitList->itemAt(pos);
    if (!item) {
        return;
    }
    const int generation = item->data(kItemRoleSearchRequest).toInt();
    if (generation > 0 && generation != activeSearchResultGeneration) {
        return;
    }
    const int idx = item->data(kItemRoleSearchIndex).toInt();
    int page = -1;
    if (idx >= 0 && idx < searchHits.size()) {
        page = searchHits[idx].page;
    } else {
        page = item->data(kItemRolePage).toInt();
    }
    if (page < 0) {
        return;
    }

    QMenu menu(this);
    QAction *jumpNextAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("跳到本页下一命中"));
    QAction *copySummaryAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("复制本页命中摘要"));
    QAction *exportPageCsvAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("导出本页命中为 CSV"));
    const int groupId = item->data(kItemRoleSearchGroup).toInt();
    QAction *copyGroupSummaryAction = nullptr;
    QAction *copyGroupTopAction = nullptr;
    QAction *exportGroupCsvAction = nullptr;
    if (groupId == kSearchGroupCurrent || groupId == kSearchGroupNear || groupId == kSearchGroupOther) {
        copyGroupSummaryAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("复制当前组命中摘要"));
        copyGroupTopAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("复制当前组 Top5 详情"));
        exportGroupCsvAction = menu.addAction(QStringLiteral("导出当前组为 CSV"));
    }
    const int basePage = qMax(0, searchGroupBasePage);
    auto isGroupHit = [&](const int p) -> bool {
        if (groupId == kSearchGroupCurrent) {
            return p == basePage;
        }
        if (groupId == kSearchGroupNear) {
            return p >= 0 && qAbs(p - basePage) <= kSearchNearPageWindow && p != basePage;
        }
        if (groupId == kSearchGroupOther) {
            return p >= 0 && qAbs(p - basePage) > kSearchNearPageWindow;
        }
        return false;
    };
    auto groupName = [&]() -> QString {
        if (groupId == kSearchGroupCurrent) {
            return QStringLiteral("当前页命中");
        }
        if (groupId == kSearchGroupNear) {
            return QStringLiteral("邻近页命中");
        }
        if (groupId == kSearchGroupOther) {
            return QStringLiteral("其他页命中");
        }
        return QStringLiteral("未知分组");
    };
    auto csvEscape = [](const QString &value) -> QString {
        QString escaped = value;
        escaped.replace('"', QStringLiteral("\"\""));
        return QStringLiteral("\"%1\"").arg(escaped);
    };
    QAction *selected = menu.exec(searchHitList->viewport()->mapToGlobal(pos));
    if (!selected) {
        return;
    }

    if (selected == jumpNextAction) {
        int startIndex = -1;
        if (currentSearchCursor >= 0 && currentSearchCursor < searchHits.size() && searchHits[currentSearchCursor].page == page) {
            startIndex = currentSearchCursor;
        } else if (idx >= 0 && idx < searchHits.size() && searchHits[idx].page == page) {
            startIndex = idx;
        }
        int targetIndex = -1;
        for (int i = startIndex + 1; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
            if (searchHits[i].page == page) {
                targetIndex = i;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (targetIndex < 0) {
            for (int i = 0; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
                if (searchHits[i].page == page) {
                    targetIndex = i;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        if (targetIndex < 0) {
            return;
        }
        pageSpin->setValue(page + 1);
        jumpToPage(page);
        if (searchUseIndexerOnly) {
            currentSearchCursor = targetIndex;
            searchStatusLabel->setText(QString("%1/%2（索引模式）").arg(currentSearchCursor + 1).arg(searchHits.size()));
        }
        return;
    }

    if (selected == copySummaryAction) {
        QStringList lines;
        int count = 0;
        const int kMaxSummaryLines = 8;
        for (int i = 0; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
            if (searchHits[i].page != page) {
                continue;
            }
            count += 1;
            if (lines.size() < kMaxSummaryLines) {
                lines.push_back(QStringLiteral("%1. %2").arg(lines.size() + 1).arg(searchHits[i].preview));
            }
        }
        if (count <= 0) {
            return;
        }
        QString summary = QStringLiteral("P%1 命中 %2 条").arg(page + 1).arg(count);
        if (!lines.isEmpty()) {
            summary += QStringLiteral("\n") + lines.join(QStringLiteral("\n"));
        }
        if (count > kMaxSummaryLines) {
            summary += QStringLiteral("\n...");
        }
        QClipboard *clipboard = QGuiApplication::clipboard();
        if (clipboard) {
            clipboard->setText(summary);
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("已复制本页命中摘要：P%1（%2 条）").arg(page + 1).arg(count));
        }
        return;
    }

    if (selected == exportPageCsvAction) {
        QVector<int> pageIndexes;
        pageIndexes.reserve(searchHits.size());
        for (int i = 0; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
            if (searchHits[i].page == page) {
                pageIndexes.push_back(i);
            }
        }
        if (pageIndexes.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        const QString suggested = QStringLiteral("search_page_%1.csv").arg(page + 1);
        const QString savePath = QFileDialog::getSaveFileName(
            this,
            QStringLiteral("导出本页命中 CSV"),
            QFileInfo(currentPdfPath).absolutePath() + QStringLiteral("/") + suggested,
            QStringLiteral("CSV (*.csv)")
        );
        if (savePath.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        QFile out(savePath);
        if (!out.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("导出失败：无法写入 CSV 文件"));
            return;
        }
        QStringList rows;
        rows.push_back(QStringLiteral("page,global_index,start,length,matched_text,preview"));
        for (const int hitIndex : pageIndexes) {
            const converter::SearchHit &hit = searchHits[hitIndex];
            QStringList cols;
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hit.page + 1));
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hitIndex + 1));
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hit.start));
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hit.length));
            cols.push_back(csvEscape(hit.matchedText.simplified()));
            cols.push_back(csvEscape(hit.preview.simplified()));
            rows.push_back(cols.join(','));
        }
        const QByteArray payload = rows.join(QStringLiteral("\n")).toUtf8();
        if (out.write(payload) != payload.size()) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("导出失败：CSV 写入不完整"));
            return;
        }
        out.close();
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("已导出本页命中 CSV：P%1（%2 条）").arg(page + 1).arg(pageIndexes.size()));
        return;
    }

    if (copyGroupSummaryAction && selected == copyGroupSummaryAction) {
        const QString groupedName = groupName();
        QMap<int, int> pageCounts;
        QMap<int, QString> pageFirstPreview;
        int total = 0;
        for (const converter::SearchHit &hit : searchHits) {
            const int p = hit.page;
            if (!isGroupHit(p)) {
                continue;
            }
            total += 1;
            pageCounts[p] += 1;
            if (!pageFirstPreview.contains(p)) {
                QString preview = hit.preview.simplified();
                if (preview.size() > 72) {
                    preview = preview.left(72) + QStringLiteral("...");
                }
                pageFirstPreview.insert(p, preview);
            }
        }
        if (total <= 0) {
            return;
        }
        QStringList lines;
        lines.push_back(QStringLiteral("%1：%2 条（%3 页）").arg(groupedName).arg(total).arg(pageCounts.size()));
        int emitted = 0;
        for (auto it = pageCounts.constBegin(); it != pageCounts.constEnd(); ++it) {
            const QString preview = pageFirstPreview.value(it.key());
            if (preview.isEmpty()) {
                lines.push_back(QStringLiteral("- P%1 × %2").arg(it.key() + 1).arg(it.value()));
            } else {
                lines.push_back(QStringLiteral("- P%1 × %2: %3").arg(it.key() + 1).arg(it.value()).arg(preview));
            }
            emitted += 1;
            if (emitted >= 20) {
                lines.push_back(QStringLiteral("..."));
                break;
            }
        }
        QClipboard *clipboard = QGuiApplication::clipboard();
        if (clipboard) {
            clipboard->setText(lines.join(QStringLiteral("\n")));
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("已复制当前组命中摘要：%1（%2 条）").arg(groupedName).arg(total));
        }
        return;
    }

    if (copyGroupTopAction && selected == copyGroupTopAction) {
        const QString groupedName = groupName();
        QStringList lines;
        lines.push_back(QStringLiteral("%1 Top5 详情").arg(groupedName));
        int rank = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
            const converter::SearchHit &hit = searchHits[i];
            const int p = hit.page;
            if (!isGroupHit(p)) {
                continue;
            }
            rank += 1;
            QString preview = hit.preview.simplified();
            if (preview.size() > 84) {
                preview = preview.left(84) + QStringLiteral("...");
            }
            lines.push_back(QStringLiteral("%1) P%2 #%3: %4").arg(rank).arg(hit.page + 1).arg(i + 1).arg(preview));
            if (rank >= 5) {
                break;
            }
        }
        if (rank <= 0) {
            return;
        }
        QClipboard *clipboard = QGuiApplication::clipboard();
        if (clipboard) {
            clipboard->setText(lines.join(QStringLiteral("\n")));
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("已复制当前组 Top5：%1（%2 条）").arg(groupedName).arg(rank));
        }
        return;
    }

    if (exportGroupCsvAction && selected == exportGroupCsvAction) {
        const QString groupedName = groupName();
        QVector<int> groupedIndexes;
        groupedIndexes.reserve(searchHits.size());
        for (int i = 0; i < searchHits.size(); ++i) {
            if (isGroupHit(searchHits[i].page)) {
                groupedIndexes.push_back(i);
            }
        }
        if (groupedIndexes.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        QString suggested = QStringLiteral("search_group_%1.csv").arg(basePage + 1);
        const QString savePath = QFileDialog::getSaveFileName(
            this,
            QStringLiteral("导出当前组命中 CSV"),
            QFileInfo(currentPdfPath).absolutePath() + QStringLiteral("/") + suggested,
            QStringLiteral("CSV (*.csv)")
        );
        if (savePath.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        QFile out(savePath);
        if (!out.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("导出失败：无法写入 CSV 文件"));
            return;
        }
        QStringList rows;
        rows.push_back(QStringLiteral("group,page,global_index,start,length,matched_text,preview"));
        for (const int hitIndex : groupedIndexes) {
            const converter::SearchHit &hit = searchHits[hitIndex];
            QStringList cols;
            cols.push_back(csvEscape(groupedName));
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hit.page + 1));
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hitIndex + 1));
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hit.start));
            cols.push_back(QString::number(hit.length));
            cols.push_back(csvEscape(hit.matchedText.simplified()));
            cols.push_back(csvEscape(hit.preview.simplified()));
            rows.push_back(cols.join(','));
        }
        const QByteArray payload = rows.join(QStringLiteral("\n")).toUtf8();
        if (out.write(payload) != payload.size()) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("导出失败：CSV 写入不完整"));
            return;
        }
        out.close();
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("已导出当前组 CSV：%1（%2 条）").arg(groupedName).arg(groupedIndexes.size()));
    }
}

void MainWindow::onAnnotationFilterChanged(const QString &) {
    rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
}

void MainWindow::exportAnnotations() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QVector<converter::ReaderAnnotationItem> annotations = stateStore.loadAnnotations(currentPdfPath);
    if (annotations.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("当前文档没有可导出的批注"));
        return;
    }
    const QString exportPath = QFileDialog::getSaveFileName(
        this,
        QStringLiteral("导出批注"),
        QFileInfo(currentPdfPath).absolutePath() + QStringLiteral("/")
            + QFileInfo(currentPdfPath).completeBaseName() + QStringLiteral(".xfdf"),
        QStringLiteral("XFDF (*.xfdf);;JSON (*.json)")
    );
    if (exportPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const bool exportXfdf = exportPath.endsWith(QStringLiteral(".xfdf"), Qt::CaseInsensitive);
    if (exportXfdf) {
        QString error;
        if (!stateStore.exportAnnotationsToXfdf(currentPdfPath, exportPath, error)) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导出失败：%1").arg(error.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("XFDF 写入失败") : error));
            return;
        }
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注已导出（XFDF）：%1").arg(exportPath));
        return;
    }
    QJsonArray arr;
    QSet<QString> dedup;
    for (const converter::ReaderAnnotationItem &item : annotations) {
        const QString key = QStringLiteral("%1|%2|%3|%4")
            .arg(item.page)
            .arg(QString::number(item.yRatio, 'f', 4))
            .arg(item.note.trimmed())
