            .arg(item.createdAt);
        if (dedup.contains(key)) {
            continue;
        }
        dedup.insert(key);
        QJsonObject obj;
        obj.insert(QStringLiteral("file_path"), item.filePath);
        obj.insert(QStringLiteral("page"), item.page);
        obj.insert(QStringLiteral("y_ratio"), item.yRatio);
        obj.insert(QStringLiteral("note"), item.note);
        obj.insert(QStringLiteral("created_at"), item.createdAt);
        arr.append(obj);
    }
    const QByteArray payload = QJsonDocument(arr).toJson(QJsonDocument::Indented);
    QFile existing(exportPath);
    if (existing.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly)) {
        if (existing.readAll() == payload) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导出跳过：内容未变化（避免重复导出）"));
            return;
        }
    }
    QFile out(exportPath);
    if (!out.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导出失败：无法写入文件"));
        return;
    }
    out.write(payload);
    out.close();
    appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注已导出（JSON）：%1").arg(exportPath));
    const QString sidecarXfdfPath = QFileInfo(exportPath).absolutePath()
        + QStringLiteral("/")
        + QFileInfo(currentPdfPath).completeBaseName()
        + QStringLiteral(".xfdf");
    QString xfdfError;
    if (stateStore.exportAnnotationsToXfdf(currentPdfPath, sidecarXfdfPath, xfdfError)) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("已同步导出 XFDF：%1").arg(sidecarXfdfPath));
    } else if (!xfdfError.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("同步导出 XFDF 失败：%1").arg(xfdfError));
    }
}

void MainWindow::importAnnotations() {
    if (currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString importPath = QFileDialog::getOpenFileName(
        this,
        QStringLiteral("导入批注"),
        QFileInfo(currentPdfPath).absolutePath(),
        QStringLiteral("XFDF (*.xfdf);;JSON (*.json)")
    );
    if (importPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    if (importPath.endsWith(QStringLiteral(".xfdf"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
        QString error;
        const int imported = stateStore.importAnnotationsFromXfdf(currentPdfPath, importPath, error);
        if (imported <= 0) {
            appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导入失败：%1").arg(error.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("未检测到可导入批注") : error));
            return;
        }
        rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注已导入（XFDF）：%1 条").arg(imported));
        return;
    }

    QFile in(importPath);
    if (!in.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导入失败：无法读取 JSON 文件"));
        return;
    }
    QJsonParseError parseError;
    const QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(in.readAll(), &parseError);
    if (parseError.error != QJsonParseError::NoError) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导入失败：JSON 解析错误"));
        return;
    }
    QJsonArray arr;
    if (doc.isArray()) {
        arr = doc.array();
    } else if (doc.isObject()) {
        arr = doc.object().value(QStringLiteral("annotations")).toArray();
    }
    if (arr.isEmpty()) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导入失败：JSON 内无有效数据"));
        return;
    }
    const int beforeCount = stateStore.loadAnnotations(currentPdfPath).size();
    for (const QJsonValue &value : arr) {
        const QJsonObject item = value.toObject();
        const QString note = item.value(QStringLiteral("note")).toString().trimmed();
        if (note.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int page = qMax(0, item.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt(0));
        const double y = item.contains(QStringLiteral("y_ratio"))
            ? item.value(QStringLiteral("y_ratio")).toDouble(-1.0)
            : item.value(QStringLiteral("yRatio")).toDouble(-1.0);
        stateStore.addAnnotation(currentPdfPath, page, note, y);
    }
    const int imported = qMax(0, stateStore.loadAnnotations(currentPdfPath).size() - beforeCount);
    if (imported <= 0) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注导入完成：无新增（已自动去重）"));
        return;
    }
    rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
    appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注已导入（JSON）：%1 条").arg(imported));
}

void MainWindow::warmupLargeDocumentCache() {
    const int total = pdfDocument->pageCount();
    if (total <= 0 || warmupCursorPage < 0) {
        cacheWarmupTimer->stop();
        return;
    }
    if (warmupPlanPages.isEmpty()) {
        const int current = qBound(0, pageSpin->value() - 1, qMax(0, total - 1));
        QVector<bool> used(total, false);
        auto appendPage = [&](const int page) {
            if (page < 0 || page >= total || used[page]) {
                return;
            }
            used[page] = true;
            warmupPlanPages.push_back(page);
        };
        appendPage(current);
        for (int radius = 1; radius < total; ++radius) {
            appendPage(current + radius);
            appendPage(current - radius);
            if (warmupPlanPages.size() >= total) {
                break;
            }
        }
        warmupPlanCursor = 0;
    }

    const int step = 3;
    for (int i = 0; i < step && warmupPlanCursor < warmupPlanPages.size(); ++i, ++warmupPlanCursor) {
        preloadPageCacheWindow(warmupPlanPages[warmupPlanCursor]);
        warmupCursorPage += 1;
    }
    if (warmupPlanCursor >= warmupPlanPages.size() || warmupCursorPage >= total) {
        cacheWarmupTimer->stop();
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("大文档后台预热完成，共 %1 页").arg(total));
    }
}

void MainWindow::editAnnotation(QTreeWidgetItem *item) {
    if (item == nullptr || currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString createdAt = item->data(0, kItemRoleBookmarkId).toString();
    if (createdAt.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const QString oldText = item->toolTip(0).trimmed();
    const QString updated = QInputDialog::getMultiLineText(
        this,
        QStringLiteral("编辑批注"),
        QStringLiteral("批注内容"),
        oldText,
        &ok
    ).trimmed();
    if (!ok || updated.isEmpty() || updated == oldText) {
        return;
    }
    if (!stateStore.updateAnnotation(currentPdfPath, createdAt, updated)) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注更新失败"));
        return;
    }
    rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
    appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注已更新"));
}

void MainWindow::deleteAnnotation(QTreeWidgetItem *item) {
    if (item == nullptr || currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString createdAt = item->data(0, kItemRoleBookmarkId).toString();
    if (createdAt.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    if (QMessageBox::question(this, QStringLiteral("删除批注"), QStringLiteral("确认删除该批注？")) != QMessageBox::Yes) {
        return;
    }
    if (!stateStore.removeAnnotation(currentPdfPath, createdAt)) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注删除失败"));
        return;
    }
    rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
    appendLog(QStringLiteral("批注已删除"));
}

bool MainWindow::eventFilter(QObject *watched, QEvent *event) {
    if (watched == bookmarkTree && event->type() == QEvent::KeyPress) {
        QKeyEvent *ke = static_cast<QKeyEvent *>(event);
        handleBookmarkTreeShortcut(ke);
        return ke->isAccepted();
    }
    if (watched == pdfView->viewport()) {
        if (event->type() == QEvent::MouseButtonPress) {
            QMouseEvent *me = static_cast<QMouseEvent *>(event);
            if (me->button() == Qt::LeftButton) {
                draggingSelectionRect = true;
                dragStartPos = me->pos();
                lastSelectionViewportRect = QRect();
            }
        } else if (event->type() == QEvent::MouseMove && draggingSelectionRect) {
            QMouseEvent *me = static_cast<QMouseEvent *>(event);
            lastSelectionViewportRect = QRect(dragStartPos, me->pos()).normalized();
            pdfView->viewport()->update();
        } else if (event->type() == QEvent::MouseButtonRelease && draggingSelectionRect) {
            QMouseEvent *me = static_cast<QMouseEvent *>(event);
            if (me->button() == Qt::LeftButton) {
                draggingSelectionRect = false;
                lastSelectionViewportRect = QRect(dragStartPos, me->pos()).normalized();
                pdfView->viewport()->update();
            }
        } else if (event->type() == QEvent::Paint && !lastSelectionViewportRect.isNull()) {
            QPaintEvent *pe = static_cast<QPaintEvent *>(event);
            Q_UNUSED(pe);
            QPainter painter(pdfView->viewport());
            painter.setPen(QPen(QColor("#3b82f6"), 1, Qt::DashLine));
            painter.setBrush(QColor(59, 130, 246, 35));
            painter.drawRect(lastSelectionViewportRect);
        }
    }
    return QMainWindow::eventFilter(watched, event);
}

void MainWindow::handleBookmarkTreeShortcut(QKeyEvent *keyEvent) {
    if (!keyEvent || !bookmarkTree || currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    if (keyEvent->matches(QKeySequence::Delete)
        || keyEvent->key() == Qt::Key_Delete
        || keyEvent->key() == Qt::Key_Backspace) {
        deleteSelectedBookmarkItems();
        keyEvent->accept();
        return;
    }
    const bool ctrlPressed = keyEvent->modifiers().testFlag(Qt::ControlModifier);
    if (ctrlPressed && (keyEvent->key() == Qt::Key_E || keyEvent->key() == Qt::Key_Return)) {
        QTreeWidgetItem *item = bookmarkTree->currentItem();
        if (!item) {
            return;
        }
        const int kind = item->data(0, kItemRoleKind).toInt();
        if (kind == kBookmarkKindAnnotation) {
            editAnnotation(item);
            keyEvent->accept();
        } else if (kind == kBookmarkKindManual) {
            editManualBookmark(item);
            keyEvent->accept();
        }
    }
}

void MainWindow::deleteSelectedBookmarkItems() {
    if (!bookmarkTree || currentPdfPath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QList<QTreeWidgetItem *> selected = bookmarkTree->selectedItems();
    if (selected.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    QStringList annotationIds;
    QStringList bookmarkIds;
    for (QTreeWidgetItem *item : selected) {
        if (!item) {
            continue;
        }
        const int kind = item->data(0, kItemRoleKind).toInt();
        const QString createdAt = item->data(0, kItemRoleBookmarkId).toString().trimmed();
        if (createdAt.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (kind == kBookmarkKindAnnotation) {
            annotationIds.push_back(createdAt);
        } else if (kind == kBookmarkKindManual) {
            bookmarkIds.push_back(createdAt);
        }
    }
    const int total = annotationIds.size() + bookmarkIds.size();
    if (total <= 0) {
        return;
    }
    const QString prompt = total > 1
        ? QStringLiteral("确认删除已选择的 %1 项（批注 %2，书签 %3）？")
              .arg(total)
              .arg(annotationIds.size())
              .arg(bookmarkIds.size())
        : QStringLiteral("确认删除当前选中项？");
    if (QMessageBox::question(this, QStringLiteral("删除所选"), prompt) != QMessageBox::Yes) {
        return;
    }
    int removedAnnotations = 0;
    int removedBookmarks = 0;
    for (const QString &id : annotationIds) {
        if (stateStore.removeAnnotation(currentPdfPath, id)) {
            removedAnnotations += 1;
        }
    }
    for (const QString &id : bookmarkIds) {
        if (stateStore.removeBookmark(currentPdfPath, id)) {
            removedBookmarks += 1;
        }
    }
    if (removedAnnotations > 0) {
        rebuildAnnotationsFromStore();
    }
    if (removedBookmarks > 0) {
        rebuildBookmarkTreeFromIndex();
    }
    if (removedAnnotations + removedBookmarks <= 0) {
        appendLog(QStringLiteral("删除失败：所选项可能已失效"));
        return;
    }
    appendLog(
        QStringLiteral("已删除：批注 %1，书签 %2")
            .arg(removedAnnotations)
            .arg(removedBookmarks)
    );
}

void MainWindow::closeEvent(QCloseEvent *event) {
    persistReadingProgress();
    stateStore.clearSessionSnapshot();
    QMainWindow::closeEvent(event);
}

#include "core/application/ConversionPipeline.h"

#include <algorithm>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QFontDatabase>
#include <QImageReader>
#include <QMap>
#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

namespace {

QString mergeLineTextForQuality(const TextLine &line) {
    QStringList tokens;
    tokens.reserve(line.spans.size());
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString text = span.text.simplified();
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            tokens.push_back(text);
        }
    }
    return tokens.join(' ').simplified();
}

QString mergeSpansText(const QVector<TextSpan> &spans) {
    QStringList tokens;
    tokens.reserve(spans.size());
    for (const TextSpan &span : spans) {
        const QString text = span.text.simplified();
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            tokens.push_back(text);
        }
    }
    return tokens.join(' ').simplified();
}

QString preferredUiCjkFont() {
    static const QString cached = []() {
        const QStringList available = QFontDatabase::families();
        const QStringList preferred{
            QStringLiteral("PingFang SC"),
            QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei"),
            QStringLiteral("Heiti SC"),
            QStringLiteral("SimHei"),
            QStringLiteral("SimSun")
        };
        for (const QString &candidate : preferred) {
            for (const QString &family : available) {
                if (family.compare(candidate, Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                    return family;
                }
            }
        }
        return QStringLiteral("Arial");
    }();
    return cached;
}

int countMeaningfulTextLines(const PageContent &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        if (!mergeLineTextForQuality(line).isEmpty()) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

bool hasNearFullPageRaster(const PageContent &page) {
    const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
    const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            continue;
        }
        const double gx = static_cast<double>(g.x);
        const double gy = static_cast<double>(g.y);
        const double gw = static_cast<double>(g.w);
        const double gh = static_cast<double>(g.h);
        const bool nearFull = gw >= pageW * 0.92
            && gh >= pageH * 0.92
            && gx <= pageW * 0.04
            && gy <= pageH * 0.04;
        if (nearFull) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

void injectSelectiveOcrForTextlessPages(
    const ConversionTask &task,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    DocumentModel &document,
    QStringList &traces
) {
    if (document.pages().isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString pdftoppm = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("pdftoppm"));
    const QString tesseract = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("tesseract"));
    if (pdftoppm.isEmpty() || tesseract.isEmpty()) {
        traces.append(QStringLiteral("区域 OCR 兜底跳过: 未找到 pdftoppm 或 tesseract"));
        return;
    }
    const QString taskKey = task.taskId.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("default") : task.taskId;
    const QString ocrDir = QDir(QDir(task.outputDir).filePath(QStringLiteral(".ocr_assets")))
        .filePath(taskKey + QStringLiteral("/region_ocr"));
    QDir().mkpath(ocrDir);

    QVector<PageContent> pages = document.pages();
    int ocrPageCount = 0;
    int ocrLineCount = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < pages.size(); ++i) {
        PageContent &page = pages[i];
        const int existingLineCount = countMeaningfulTextLines(page);
        const bool sparseScanLikePage = hasNearFullPageRaster(page) && existingLineCount <= 2;
        if (existingLineCount > 0 && !sparseScanLikePage) {
            continue;
        }
        const int pageNo = page.pageIndex >= 0 ? (page.pageIndex + 1) : (i + 1);
        const QString base = QDir(ocrDir).filePath(QStringLiteral("page_%1").arg(pageNo));
        const QString pngPath = base + QStringLiteral(".png");
        const CommandResult rasterResult = executor.run(
            pdftoppm,
            {
                QStringLiteral("-f"), QString::number(pageNo),
                QStringLiteral("-l"), QString::number(pageNo),
                QStringLiteral("-singlefile"),
                QStringLiteral("-r"), QStringLiteral("280"),
                QStringLiteral("-png"),
                task.inputPdf,
                base
            },
            3000,
            30000
        );
        if (!rasterResult.started || rasterResult.exitCode != 0 || !QFileInfo::exists(pngPath)) {
            traces.append(QStringLiteral("区域 OCR 兜底: 页%1 光栅化失败").arg(pageNo));
            continue;
        }

        CommandResult ocrResult = executor.run(
            tesseract,
            {pngPath, QStringLiteral("stdout"), QStringLiteral("-l"), QStringLiteral("chi_sim+eng"), QStringLiteral("tsv")},
            3000,
            60000
        );
        if (!ocrResult.started || ocrResult.exitCode != 0 || ocrResult.combinedOutput.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            ocrResult = executor.run(
                tesseract,
                {pngPath, QStringLiteral("stdout"), QStringLiteral("-l"), QStringLiteral("eng"), QStringLiteral("tsv")},
                3000,
                60000
            );
        }
        if (!ocrResult.started || ocrResult.exitCode != 0 || ocrResult.combinedOutput.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            traces.append(QStringLiteral("区域 OCR 兜底: 页%1 识别失败").arg(pageNo));
            continue;
        }

        QImageReader reader(pngPath);
        const QSize imageSize = reader.size();
        if (!imageSize.isValid() || imageSize.width() <= 0 || imageSize.height() <= 0) {
            traces.append(QStringLiteral("区域 OCR 兜底: 页%1 图片尺寸异常").arg(pageNo));
            continue;
        }
        const double pxToPageX = qMax(1.0f, page.width) / static_cast<double>(imageSize.width());
        const double pxToPageY = qMax(1.0f, page.height) / static_cast<double>(imageSize.height());
        const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
        const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));

        struct OcrLineBuilder {
            QVector<TextSpan> spans;
            double xMin = 1e18;
            double yMin = 1e18;
            double xMax = 0.0;
            double yMax = 0.0;
        };
        QMap<QString, OcrLineBuilder> lineBuilders;
        const QStringList rows = ocrResult.combinedOutput.split('\n', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
        for (int rowIndex = 1; rowIndex < rows.size(); ++rowIndex) {
            const QString &row = rows.at(rowIndex);
            const QStringList cols = row.split('\t');
            if (cols.size() < 12) {
                continue;
            }
            if (cols.at(0).toInt() != 5) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString text = cols.at(11).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const double conf = cols.at(10).toDouble();
            const double minConf = text.size() <= 2 ? 42.0 : 28.0;
            if (conf >= 0.0 && conf < minConf) {
                continue;
            }
            const int left = cols.at(6).toInt();
            const int top = cols.at(7).toInt();
            const int width = cols.at(8).toInt();
            const int height = cols.at(9).toInt();
            if (width <= 0 || height <= 0) {
                continue;
            }
            double x = left * pxToPageX;
            double y = top * pxToPageY;
            double w = width * pxToPageX;
            double h = height * pxToPageY;
            x = qBound(0.0, x, pageW - 1.0);
            y = qBound(0.0, y, pageH - 1.0);
            w = qBound(1.0, w, pageW - x);
            h = qBound(1.0, h, pageH - y);
            if (w < 1.5 || h < 1.5) {
                continue;
            }
            TextSpan span;
            span.text = text;
            span.confidence = static_cast<float>(conf > 0.0 ? conf / 100.0 : 0.6);
            span.x = static_cast<float>(x);
            span.y = static_cast<float>(y);
            span.w = static_cast<float>(w);
            span.h = static_cast<float>(h);
            span.fontSize = static_cast<float>(qBound(8.0, h * 0.75, 48.0));
            span.fontFamily = preferredUiCjkFont();
            span.color = QStringLiteral("111111");
            span.lineHeight = static_cast<float>(qBound(10.0, h * 1.25, 64.0));

            const QString key = cols.at(2) + QStringLiteral("_") + cols.at(3) + QStringLiteral("_") + cols.at(4);
            OcrLineBuilder &builder = lineBuilders[key];
            builder.spans.push_back(span);
            builder.xMin = qMin(builder.xMin, x);
            builder.yMin = qMin(builder.yMin, y);
            builder.xMax = qMax(builder.xMax, x + w);
            builder.yMax = qMax(builder.yMax, y + h);
        }
        if (lineBuilders.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        QVector<TextLine> injectedLines;
        injectedLines.reserve(lineBuilders.size());
        for (auto it = lineBuilders.constBegin(); it != lineBuilders.constEnd(); ++it) {
            TextLine line;
            line.spans = it->spans;
            std::sort(line.spans.begin(), line.spans.end(), [](const TextSpan &a, const TextSpan &b) {
                if (qAbs(a.x - b.x) > 2.0f) {
                    return a.x < b.x;
                }
                return a.y < b.y;
            });
            line.x = static_cast<float>(it->xMin);
            line.y = static_cast<float>(it->yMin);
            line.w = static_cast<float>(qMax(1.0, it->xMax - it->xMin));
            line.h = static_cast<float>(qMax(1.0, it->yMax - it->yMin));
            const QString merged = mergeSpansText(line.spans);
            if (merged.size() >= 2) {
                injectedLines.push_back(line);
            }
        }
        std::sort(injectedLines.begin(), injectedLines.end(), [](const TextLine &a, const TextLine &b) {
            if (qAbs(a.y - b.y) > 2.0f) {
                return a.y < b.y;
            }
            return a.x < b.x;
        });
        if (injectedLines.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (existingLineCount == 0 || injectedLines.size() >= existingLineCount * 2) {
            page.lines = injectedLines;
            ocrPageCount += 1;
            ocrLineCount += injectedLines.size();
        }
    }
    if (ocrPageCount > 0) {
        document.clear();
        for (PageContent &page : pages) {
            document.addPage(page);
        }
    }
    traces.append(QStringLiteral("区域 OCR 兜底: 页面=%1, 行=%2").arg(ocrPageCount).arg(ocrLineCount));
}

DocumentModel buildDocumentFromLayout(const LayoutDocument &layout) {
    DocumentModel document;
    for (const LayoutPage &srcPage : layout.pages) {
        PageContent page;
        page.pageIndex = srcPage.pageIndex;
        page.width = static_cast<float>(srcPage.width);
        page.height = static_cast<float>(srcPage.height);

        for (const LayoutBlock &block : srcPage.blocks) {
            for (const LayoutLine &srcLine : block.lines) {
                TextLine line;
                line.x = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.x);
                line.y = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.y);
                line.w = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.w);
                line.h = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.h);

                for (const LayoutTextRun &srcRun : srcLine.runs) {
                    if (srcRun.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    TextSpan span;
                    span.text = srcRun.text;
                    span.confidence = 1.0f;
                    span.x = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.x);
                    span.y = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.y);
                    span.w = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.w);
                    span.h = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.h);
                    span.fontSize = static_cast<float>(srcRun.fontSize);
                    span.fontFamily = srcRun.fontFamily;
                    span.bold = srcRun.bold;
                    span.italic = srcRun.italic;
                    span.color = srcRun.color;
                    span.lineHeight = static_cast<float>(srcRun.lineHeight);
                    line.spans.push_back(span);
                }
                if (!line.spans.isEmpty()) {
                    page.lines.push_back(line);
                }
            }
        }
        for (const LayoutImage &srcImage : srcPage.images) {
            if (srcImage.path.trimmed().isEmpty() || srcImage.box.w <= 0.0 || srcImage.box.h <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const QFileInfo imageFile(srcImage.path);
            if (!imageFile.exists() || !imageFile.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            GraphicObject image;
            image.kind = GraphicKind::RasterImage;
            image.x = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.x);
            image.y = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.y);
            image.w = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.w);
            image.h = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.h);
            image.opacity = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcImage.opacity, 1.0));
            image.isBackground = srcImage.isBackground;
            image.imagePath = imageFile.absoluteFilePath();
            page.graphics.push_back(image);
        }
        for (const LayoutFillShape &srcFill : srcPage.fills) {
            if (srcFill.box.w <= 0.0 || srcFill.box.h <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString color = srcFill.fillColor.trimmed();
            if (color.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            GraphicObject rect;
            rect.kind = GraphicKind::Rectangle;
            rect.x = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.x);
            rect.y = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.y);
            rect.w = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.w);
            rect.h = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.h);
            rect.opacity = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcFill.opacity, 1.0));
            rect.isBackground = srcFill.isBackground;
            rect.fillColor = color;
            rect.strokeColor = color;
            rect.hasGradientFill = srcFill.hasGradient
                && !srcFill.fillColor2.trimmed().isEmpty();
            rect.fillColor2 = srcFill.fillColor2.trimmed();
            rect.fillGradientAngle = static_cast<float>(srcFill.gradientAngle);
            page.graphics.push_back(rect);
        }
        for (const LayoutTable &srcTable : srcPage.tables) {
            if (srcTable.rowCount <= 0 || srcTable.colCount <= 0 || srcTable.cells.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            TableObject table;
            table.rowCount = srcTable.rowCount;
            table.colCount = srcTable.colCount;
            table.x = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.x);
            table.y = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.y);
            table.w = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.w);
            table.h = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.h);
            table.cells.reserve(srcTable.cells.size());
            for (const LayoutTableCell &srcCell : srcTable.cells) {
                TableCellObject cell;
                cell.row = srcCell.row;
                cell.col = srcCell.col;
                cell.rowSpan = qMax(1, srcCell.rowSpan);
                cell.colSpan = qMax(1, srcCell.colSpan);
                cell.text = srcCell.text;
                cell.x = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.x);
                cell.y = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.y);
                cell.w = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.w);
                cell.h = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.h);
                table.cells.push_back(cell);
            }
            page.tables.push_back(table);

            // 将表格网格线同步为路径对象，确保对象级导出可保留线框层。
            QVector<double> rowEdges;
            QVector<double> colEdges;
            rowEdges.reserve(table.rowCount + 1);
            colEdges.reserve(table.colCount + 1);
            rowEdges.push_back(srcTable.box.y);
            rowEdges.push_back(srcTable.box.y + srcTable.box.h);
            colEdges.push_back(srcTable.box.x);
            colEdges.push_back(srcTable.box.x + srcTable.box.w);
            for (const LayoutTableCell &srcCell : srcTable.cells) {
                rowEdges.push_back(srcCell.box.y);
                rowEdges.push_back(srcCell.box.y + srcCell.box.h);
                colEdges.push_back(srcCell.box.x);
                colEdges.push_back(srcCell.box.x + srcCell.box.w);
            }
            auto dedupeSortedEdges = [](QVector<double> &edges) {
                std::sort(edges.begin(), edges.end());
                QVector<double> unique;
                unique.reserve(edges.size());
                const double tol = 1.2;
                for (double edge : edges) {
                    if (unique.isEmpty() || qAbs(unique.last() - edge) > tol) {
                        unique.push_back(edge);
                    } else {
                        unique.last() = (unique.last() + edge) * 0.5;
                    }
                }
                edges = unique;
            };
            dedupeSortedEdges(rowEdges);
            dedupeSortedEdges(colEdges);
            for (double y : rowEdges) {
                GraphicObject line;
                line.kind = GraphicKind::Line;
                line.x = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.x);
                line.y = static_cast<float>(y);
                line.x2 = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.x + srcTable.box.w);
                line.y2 = static_cast<float>(y);
                line.strokeWidth = 0.6f;
                line.opacity = 1.0f;
                line.isBackground = false;
                line.strokeColor = QStringLiteral("D1D5DB");
                page.graphics.push_back(line);
            }
            for (double x : colEdges) {
                GraphicObject line;
                line.kind = GraphicKind::Line;
                line.x = static_cast<float>(x);
                line.y = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.y);
                line.x2 = static_cast<float>(x);
                line.y2 = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.y + srcTable.box.h);
                line.strokeWidth = 0.6f;
                line.opacity = 1.0f;
                line.isBackground = false;
                line.strokeColor = QStringLiteral("D1D5DB");
                page.graphics.push_back(line);
            }
        }
        document.addPage(page);
    }
    return document;
}

void cleanupTaskArtifacts(const ConversionTask &task, QStringList &traces) {
    const QString nativeAssetsTaskDir = QDir(QDir(task.outputDir).filePath(QStringLiteral(".native_assets")))
        .filePath(task.taskId.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("default") : task.taskId);
    const QString ocrAssetsTaskDir = QDir(QDir(task.outputDir).filePath(QStringLiteral(".ocr_assets")))
        .filePath(task.taskId.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("default") : task.taskId);
    const QString regressionDir = QDir(task.outputDir).filePath(QStringLiteral(".regression"));

    auto removePath = [&](const QString &path, const QString &label) {
        QDir dir(path);
        if (!dir.exists()) {
            return;
        }
        if (dir.removeRecursively()) {
            traces.append(QStringLiteral("自动清理成功: %1").arg(label));
        } else {
            traces.append(QStringLiteral("自动清理失败: %1").arg(label));
        }
    };

    removePath(nativeAssetsTaskDir, QStringLiteral(".native_assets/<task>"));
    removePath(ocrAssetsTaskDir, QStringLiteral(".ocr_assets/<task>"));
    removePath(regressionDir, QStringLiteral(".regression"));

    const QString nativeAssetsRoot = QDir(task.outputDir).filePath(QStringLiteral(".native_assets"));
    const QString ocrAssetsRoot = QDir(task.outputDir).filePath(QStringLiteral(".ocr_assets"));
    QDir nativeRootDir(nativeAssetsRoot);
    if (nativeRootDir.exists() && nativeRootDir.entryList(QDir::NoDotAndDotDot | QDir::AllEntries).isEmpty()) {
        nativeRootDir.rmdir(nativeAssetsRoot);
    }
    QDir ocrRootDir(ocrAssetsRoot);
    if (ocrRootDir.exists() && ocrRootDir.entryList(QDir::NoDotAndDotDot | QDir::AllEntries).isEmpty()) {
        ocrRootDir.rmdir(ocrAssetsRoot);
    }
}

} // namespace

QString PreflightStage::name() const {
    return QStringLiteral("preflight");
}

StageResult PreflightStage::run(StageContext &context, ToolExecutor &executor) const {
    QFileInfo inputInfo(context.task.inputPdf);
    if (!inputInfo.exists() || !inputInfo.isFile()) {
        return {StageStatus::FatalFailure, name(), QStringLiteral("输入 PDF 不存在")};
    }

    QDir outputDir(context.task.outputDir);
    if (!outputDir.exists() && !outputDir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."))) {
        return {StageStatus::FatalFailure, name(), QStringLiteral("输出目录不可创建")};
    }

    Q_UNUSED(executor);
    return {StageStatus::Success, name(), QStringLiteral("预检通过（严格语义复刻模式）")};
}

QString NativeLayoutExportStage::name() const {
    return QStringLiteral("native_layout_export");
}

StageResult NativeLayoutExportStage::run(StageContext &context, ToolExecutor &executor) const {
    if (context.task.format == OutputFormat::Pptx) {
        return pptEngine.run(context, executor);
    }

    LayoutDocument layout;
    QString extractError;
    const bool allowPlainTextFallback = true;
    QStringList extractDiags;
    if (!extractor.extract(context.task.inputPdf, executor, layout, extractError, allowPlainTextFallback, &extractDiags)) {
        for (const QString &line : extractDiags) {
            context.traces.append(line);
        }
        const QString reason = extractError.isEmpty()
            ? QStringLiteral("对象级抽取失败，无法获取页面尺寸")
            : extractError;
        return {StageStatus::FatalFailure, name(), reason};
    }
    for (const QString &line : extractDiags) {
        context.traces.append(line);
    }

    // 1:1 主链路：按版面对象导出，图片保持图片，文字保持文字。
    context.document = buildDocumentFromLayout(layout);
    injectSelectiveOcrForTextlessPages(context.task, executor, context.document, context.traces);
    context.unifiedStructure = UnifiedStructureDocument{};
    if (context.document.pages().isEmpty()) {
        return {StageStatus::FatalFailure, name(), QStringLiteral("未提取到任何页面，无法进行 1:1 复刻导出")};
    }

    const IDocumentExporter *exporter = exporterRegistry.find(context.task.format);
    if (exporter == nullptr) {
        return {StageStatus::FatalFailure, name(), QStringLiteral("找不到目标格式导出器")};
    }

    QString outputPath;
    if (!context.task.preferredOutputPath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        outputPath = QFileInfo(context.task.preferredOutputPath).absoluteFilePath();
    } else {
        outputPath = QDir(context.task.outputDir).filePath(
            QFileInfo(context.task.inputPdf).completeBaseName() + QStringLiteral(".") + outputFormatToSuffix(context.task.format)
        );
    }

    QStringList exportLogs;
    const bool exportOk = exporter->exportDocument(context.document, outputPath, executor, exportLogs);
    for (const QString &line : exportLogs) {
        context.traces.append(line);
    }
    if (!exportOk) {
        return {StageStatus::FatalFailure, name(), QStringLiteral("原生语义导出失败，且已禁用所有回退流程")};
    }

    context.generatedOutputPath = outputPath;
    return {StageStatus::Success, name(), QStringLiteral("原生布局导出成功")};
}

ConversionPipeline::ConversionPipeline() {
    primaryStages.push_back(std::make_unique<PreflightStage>());
    primaryStages.push_back(std::make_unique<NativeLayoutExportStage>());
}

ConversionResult ConversionPipeline::execute(const ConversionTask &task) const {
    StageContext context;
    context.task = task;
    return executePrimaryFlow(task, context);
}

ConversionResult ConversionPipeline::executePrimaryFlow(const ConversionTask &task, StageContext &context) const {
    const int totalAttempts = qMax(1, task.maxRetries + 1);
    for (int attempt = 1; attempt <= totalAttempts; ++attempt) {
        context.attempt = attempt;
        context.traces.append(logger.makeTaskLog(task.taskId, QStringLiteral("INFO"), QStringLiteral("开始第 %1 次主流程尝试").arg(attempt)));

        bool needRetry = false;
        for (const auto &stage : primaryStages) {
            const StageResult stageResult = stage->run(context, executor);
            context.traces.append(logger.makeStageLog(task.taskId, stageResult.stageName, stageResult.message));

            if (stageResult.status == StageStatus::Success || stageResult.status == StageStatus::Skipped) {
                if (stageResult.status == StageStatus::Success && !context.generatedOutputPath.isEmpty()) {
                    return successWithTrace(task, QStringLiteral("主流程转换成功"), context);
                }
                continue;
            }
            if (stageResult.status == StageStatus::RetryableFailure) {
                needRetry = true;
                break;
            }
            return failWithTrace(task, stageResult.message, context);
        }

        if (!needRetry) {
            if (context.generatedOutputPath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                return failWithTrace(task, QStringLiteral("主流程未生成任何输出文件"), context);
            }
            return successWithTrace(task, QStringLiteral("主流程转换成功"), context);
        }

        if (attempt < totalAttempts) {
            context.traces.append(logger.makeTaskLog(task.taskId, QStringLiteral("WARN"), QStringLiteral("主流程失败，准备重试")));
        }
    }

    return failWithTrace(task, QStringLiteral("主流程重试耗尽"), context);
}
ConversionResult ConversionPipeline::failWithTrace(
    const ConversionTask &task,
    const QString &message,
    const StageContext &context
) const {
    ConversionResult result;
    result.ok = false;
    result.taskId = task.taskId;
    result.message = message;
    result.outputPath = context.generatedOutputPath;
    result.traces = context.traces;
    return result;
}

ConversionResult ConversionPipeline::successWithTrace(
    const ConversionTask &task,
    const QString &message,
    const StageContext &context
) const {
    ConversionResult result;
    result.ok = true;
    result.taskId = task.taskId;
    result.message = message;
    result.outputPath = context.generatedOutputPath;
    result.traces = context.traces;
    cleanupTaskArtifacts(task, result.traces);
    return result;
}

} // namespace converter

#pragma once

#include <memory>
#include <vector>

#include "core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h"
#include "core/application/DocumentExporter.h"
#include "core/domain/quality/FormatRegressionEvaluator.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfLayoutExtractor.h"

#include "core/platform/runtime/StructuredLogger.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.h"
#include "core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.h"
#include "core/ppt/PptConversionEngine.h"

namespace converter {

// 抽象阶段接口：每个阶段只负责一件事，便于测试和替换实现。
class IConversionStage {
public:
    virtual ~IConversionStage() = default;
    virtual QString name() const = 0;
    virtual StageResult run(StageContext &context, ToolExecutor &executor) const = 0;
};

class PreflightStage final : public IConversionStage {
public:
    QString name() const override;
    StageResult run(StageContext &context, ToolExecutor &executor) const override;
};

class NativeLayoutExportStage final : public IConversionStage {
public:
    QString name() const override;
    StageResult run(StageContext &context, ToolExecutor &executor) const override;

private:
    PdfLayoutExtractor extractor;
    StructureUnderstanding structureUnderstanding;
    SemanticFidelityGate fidelityGate;
    ExporterRegistry exporterRegistry;
    PptConversionEngine pptEngine;
};

// 管线执行器：负责阶段顺序、重试策略、回退策略和最终聚合结果。
class ConversionPipeline final {
public:
    ConversionPipeline();
    ConversionResult execute(const ConversionTask &task) const;

private:
    ConversionResult executePrimaryFlow(const ConversionTask &task, StageContext &context) const;
    ConversionResult failWithTrace(const ConversionTask &task, const QString &message, const StageContext &context) const;
    ConversionResult successWithTrace(const ConversionTask &task, const QString &message, const StageContext &context) const;

    mutable ToolExecutor executor;
    FormatRegressionEvaluator regressionEvaluator;
    StructuredLogger logger;
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<IConversionStage>> primaryStages;
};

} // namespace converter

📄  pdf-master/src/core/application/ConversionWorker.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/application/ConversionWorker.h"

namespace converter {

ConversionWorker::ConversionWorker(QObject *parent) : QObject(parent) {}

void ConversionWorker::processTask(converter::ConversionTask task) {
    emit taskLog(task.taskId, QStringLiteral("任务进入执行线程"));
    const ConversionResult result = pipeline.execute(task);
    for (const QString &line : result.traces) {
        emit taskLog(task.taskId, line);
    }
    emit taskFinished(task.taskId, result);
}

} // namespace converter

namespace converter {

// 工作对象驻留在独立线程中，避免阻塞 UI 主线程。
class ConversionWorker final : public QObject {
    Q_OBJECT

public:
    explicit ConversionWorker(QObject *parent = nullptr);

public slots:
    void processTask(converter::ConversionTask task);

signals:
    void taskLog(const QString &taskId, const QString &line);
    void taskFinished(const QString &taskId, converter::ConversionResult result);

private:
    ConversionPipeline pipeline;
};

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/application/ConvertService.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/application/ConvertService.h"

#include <QDir>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QProcess>
#include <QStringList>

QString ConvertService::detectOfficeBinary() const {
    const QStringList candidates = {
#ifdef Q_OS_MAC
        "/Applications/LibreOffice.app/Contents/MacOS/soffice",
#endif
        "soffice",
        "libreoffice"
    };

    for (const QString &candidate : candidates) {
        if (candidate.contains('/')) {
            if (QFileInfo::exists(candidate)) {
                return candidate;
            }
            continue;
        }

        QProcess probe;
        probe.start(candidate, {"--version"});
        if (probe.waitForStarted(2000)) {
            probe.kill();
            probe.waitForFinished(1000);
            return candidate;
        }
    }
    return QString();
}

QString ConvertService::toLibreOfficeFilter(const QString &format) const {
    if (format == "docx") {
        return "docx:MS Word 2007 XML";
    }
    if (format == "xlsx") {
        return "xlsx:Calc MS Excel 2007 XML";
    }
    if (format == "pptx") {
        return "pptx:Impress MS PowerPoint 2007 XML";
    }
    return QString();
}

ConvertResult ConvertService::convertPdf(const QString &pdfPath, const QString &outputDir, const QString &format) const {
    QFileInfo pdfInfo(pdfPath);
    if (!pdfInfo.exists() || !pdfInfo.isFile()) {
        return {false, "PDF 文件不存在"};
    }

    const QString normalizedFormat = format.trimmed().toLower();
    const QString filter = toLibreOfficeFilter(normalizedFormat);
    if (filter.isEmpty()) {
        return {false, "不支持的导出格式"};
    }

    QDir outDir(outputDir);
    if (!outDir.exists() && !outDir.mkpath(".")) {
        return {false, "输出目录不可用"};
    }

    const QString office = detectOfficeBinary();
    if (office.isEmpty()) {
        return {false, "未找到 LibreOffice，请安装后重试"};
    }

    QProcess process;
    process.setProgram(office);
    process.setArguments({
        "--headless",
        "--convert-to",
        filter,
        "--outdir",
        outDir.absolutePath(),
        pdfInfo.absoluteFilePath()
    });
    process.start();
    if (!process.waitForStarted(3000)) {
        return {false, "无法启动 LibreOffice"};
    }
    if (!process.waitForFinished(-1)) {
        process.kill();
        process.waitForFinished(1000);
        return {false, "转换进程超时"};
    }

    const QByteArray stdOut = process.readAllStandardOutput();
    const QByteArray stdErr = process.readAllStandardError();
    const QString outputLog = QString::fromUtf8(stdOut + stdErr).trimmed();

    const QString outputPath = QDir(outDir.absolutePath()).filePath(pdfInfo.completeBaseName() + "." + normalizedFormat);
    if (process.exitCode() == 0 && QFileInfo::exists(outputPath)) {
        return {true, QString("转换成功: %1").arg(outputPath)};
    }

    const QString tip = outputLog.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("LibreOffice 未生成目标文件") : outputLog;
    return {false, QString("转换失败: %1").arg(tip)};
}

#include "core/application/DocumentExporter.h"

#include "core/excel/XlsxExporter.h"
#include "core/ppt/PptxExporter.h"
#include "core/words/DocxExporter.h"

namespace converter {

ExporterRegistry::ExporterRegistry() {
    exporters.push_back(std::make_unique<DocxExporter>());
    exporters.push_back(std::make_unique<XlsxExporter>());
    exporters.push_back(std::make_unique<PptxExporter>());
}

const IDocumentExporter *ExporterRegistry::find(const OutputFormat format) const {
    for (const auto &exporter : exporters) {
        if (exporter->format() == format) {
            return exporter.get();
        }
    }
    return nullptr;
}

} // namespace converter

#pragma once

#include "core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h"

    virtual ~IDocumentExporter() = default;
    virtual OutputFormat format() const = 0;
    virtual bool exportDocument(
        const DocumentModel &document,
        const QString &targetPath,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        QStringList &traceLogs
    ) const = 0;
};

    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<IDocumentExporter>> exporters;

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/application/TaskManager.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/application/TaskManager.h"

#include <QMetaObject>

#include "core/application/ConversionWorker.h"

namespace converter {

TaskManager::TaskManager(QObject *parent) : QObject(parent) {
    worker = new ConversionWorker();
    worker->moveToThread(&workerThread);
    connect(&workerThread, &QThread::finished, worker, &QObject::deleteLater);

    connect(
        this,
        &TaskManager::dispatchTask,
        worker,
        &ConversionWorker::processTask,
        Qt::QueuedConnection
    );
    connect(
        worker,
        &ConversionWorker::taskLog,
        this,
        &TaskManager::taskLog,
        Qt::QueuedConnection
    );
    connect(
        worker,
        &ConversionWorker::taskFinished,
        this,
        &TaskManager::onWorkerTaskFinished,
        Qt::QueuedConnection
    );

    workerThread.start();
}

TaskManager::~TaskManager() {
    workerThread.quit();
    workerThread.wait();
    worker = nullptr;
}

void TaskManager::submitTask(const ConversionTask &task) {
    pendingQueue.enqueue(task);
    emit queueStateChanged(pendingQueue.size(), hasRunningTask());
    scheduleNext();
}

bool TaskManager::hasRunningTask() const {
    return !inFlight.isEmpty();
}

int TaskManager::pendingCount() const {
    return pendingQueue.size();
}

int TaskManager::completedCount() const {
    return completed;
}

int TaskManager::failedCount() const {
    return failed;
}

void TaskManager::onWorkerTaskFinished(const QString &taskId, converter::ConversionResult result) {
    inFlight.remove(taskId);
    if (result.ok) {
        completed += 1;
    } else {
        failed += 1;
    }
    emit taskCompleted(taskId, result);
    emit queueStateChanged(pendingQueue.size(), hasRunningTask());
    scheduleNext();
}

void TaskManager::scheduleNext() {
    // 当前实现采用串行执行，保证任务稳定性和输出目录冲突可控。
    // 后续如需并发可扩展为线程池 + 按目录分片调度。
    if (hasRunningTask()) {
        return;
    }
    if (pendingQueue.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }

    const ConversionTask next = pendingQueue.dequeue();
    inFlight.insert(next.taskId, next);
    emit queueStateChanged(pendingQueue.size(), hasRunningTask());
    emit dispatchTask(next);
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/application/TaskManager.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QHash>
#include <QObject>
#include <QQueue>
#include <QThread>

#include "core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h"

namespace converter {

class ConversionWorker;

// 任务调度器负责：
// 1) 接收 UI 提交的任务；
// 2) 维护排队和执行状态；
// 3) 将工作转发到后台线程；
// 4) 把结果回传给 UI。
class TaskManager final : public QObject {
    Q_OBJECT

public:
    explicit TaskManager(QObject *parent = nullptr);
    ~TaskManager() override;

    void submitTask(const ConversionTask &task);
    bool hasRunningTask() const;
    int pendingCount() const;
    int completedCount() const;
    int failedCount() const;

signals:
    void dispatchTask(converter::ConversionTask task);
    void taskLog(const QString &taskId, const QString &line);
    void taskCompleted(const QString &taskId, converter::ConversionResult result);
    void queueStateChanged(int pending, bool running);

private slots:
    void onWorkerTaskFinished(const QString &taskId, converter::ConversionResult result);

private:
    void scheduleNext();

    QThread workerThread;
    ConversionWorker *worker = nullptr;
    QQueue<ConversionTask> pendingQueue;
    QHash<QString, ConversionTask> inFlight;
    int completed = 0;
    int failed = 0;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/model/DocumentModel.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"

namespace converter {

void DocumentModel::clear() {
    pageList.clear();
}

bool DocumentModel::isEmpty() const {
    for (const PageContent &page : pageList) {
        if (!page.lines.isEmpty() || !page.graphics.isEmpty() || !page.tables.isEmpty()) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}

void DocumentModel::addPage(PageContent page) {
    pageList.push_back(page);
}

const QVector<PageContent> &DocumentModel::pages() const {
    return pageList;
}

QString DocumentModel::plainText() const {
    QStringList pageTexts;
    for (const PageContent &page : pageList) {
        QStringList lines;
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            QStringList spanTexts;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (!span.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    spanTexts.append(span.text.trimmed());
                }
            }
            if (!spanTexts.isEmpty()) {
                lines.append(spanTexts.join(QStringLiteral(" ")));
            }
        }

        if (!lines.isEmpty()) {
            pageTexts.append(QStringLiteral("===== Page %1 =====").arg(page.pageIndex + 1));
            pageTexts.append(lines.join(QStringLiteral("\n")));
        }
    }
    return pageTexts.join(QStringLiteral("\n\n"));
}

QStringList DocumentModel::toCsvRows() const {
    QStringList rows;
    rows.append(QStringLiteral("page,line,text"));
    for (const PageContent &page : pageList) {
        int lineIndex = 0;
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            QStringList spans;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                spans.append(span.text.simplified());
            }
            const QString text = spans.join(QStringLiteral(" ")).replace('"', QStringLiteral("\"\""));
            rows.append(QStringLiteral("%1,%2,\"%3\"").arg(page.pageIndex + 1).arg(lineIndex + 1).arg(text));
            lineIndex += 1;
        }
    }
    return rows;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QVector>

namespace converter {

// 文档中间模型（IR）：
// - 与最终导出格式解耦（docx/xlsx/pptx 都读取同一份 IR）；
// - 先把 OCR/解析结果统一归档，再由导出器做格式映射；
// - 便于后续新增语义层（段落、表格、标题层级、阅读顺序）。

struct TextSpan {
    QString text;
    float confidence = 0.0f;
    float x = 0.0f;
    float y = 0.0f;
    float w = 0.0f;
    float h = 0.0f;
    float fontSize = 0.0f;
    QString fontFamily;
    bool bold = false;
    bool italic = false;
    QString color;
    float lineHeight = 0.0f;
};

struct TextLine {
    QVector<TextSpan> spans;
    float x = 0.0f;
    float y = 0.0f;
    float w = 0.0f;
    float h = 0.0f;
    QString paragraphAlign; // l/ctr/r/just
    float indentPt = 0.0f;
    int listLevel = 0;
    bool listOrdered = false;
    QString listMarker;
    QString semanticRole;   // title/subtitle/paragraph/list/annotation/caption
    int semanticLevel = 0;  // heading/list level, 0 for normal paragraph
    QString semanticEvidence;
    int paragraphId = 0;
    int paragraphLineIndex = 0;
    int paragraphLineCount = 1;
    QString listStyle;      // bullet/disc/arabic-period/arabic-paren/alpha-lower/roman-lower
    int listOrdinal = 0;    // ordered list ordinal, 1-based
    int footnoteRefId = 0;  // body line reference id
    int footnoteDefId = 0;  // annotation definition id
    float paragraphSpaceBeforePt = 0.0f;
    float paragraphSpaceAfterPt = 0.0f;
    float paragraphFirstLineIndentPt = 0.0f;
    int paragraphColumn = 0;
    bool paragraphColumnBreakBefore = false;
};

enum class GraphicKind {
    RasterImage,
    Rectangle,
    RoundedRectangle,
    Path,
    Line
};

struct GraphicObject {
    GraphicKind kind = GraphicKind::Rectangle;
    float x = 0.0f;
    float y = 0.0f;
    float w = 0.0f;
    float h = 0.0f;
    float x2 = 0.0f;
    float y2 = 0.0f;
    float strokeWidth = 1.0f;
    float opacity = 1.0f;
    bool isBackground = false;
    QString strokeColor;
    QString fillColor;
    QString fillColor2;
    float fillGradientAngle = 0.0f;
    bool hasGradientFill = false;
    float cornerRadius = 0.0f;
    float rotationDeg = 0.0f;
    bool flipH = false;
    bool flipV = false;
    float cropLeft = 0.0f;   // [0,1]
    float cropTop = 0.0f;    // [0,1]
    float cropRight = 0.0f;  // [0,1]
    float cropBottom = 0.0f; // [0,1]
    QString imagePath;
    QString semanticRole;     // background/image/chart/decoration
    QString semanticEvidence; // evidence chain for diagnostics
};

struct TableCellObject {
    int row = 0;
    int col = 0;
    int rowSpan = 1;
    int colSpan = 1;
    QString text;
    float x = 0.0f;
    float y = 0.0f;
    float w = 0.0f;
    float h = 0.0f;
    QString textAlign;
    QString verticalAlign;
    QString fillColor;
    QString textColor;
    QString borderColor;
    float borderWidth = 0.6f;
    bool bold = false;
    bool italic = false;
    float fontSize = 11.0f;
    QString fontFamily;
};

struct TableObject {
    int rowCount = 0;
    int colCount = 0;
    float x = 0.0f;
    float y = 0.0f;
    float w = 0.0f;
    float h = 0.0f;
    QVector<TableCellObject> cells;
    QString semanticRole;     // table
    QString semanticEvidence; // evidence chain for diagnostics
};

struct PageContent {
    int pageIndex = 0;
    float width = 0.0f;
    float height = 0.0f;
    QVector<TextLine> lines;
    QVector<GraphicObject> graphics;
    QVector<TableObject> tables;
};

class DocumentModel final {
public:
    void clear();
    bool isEmpty() const;

    void addPage(PageContent page);
    const QVector<PageContent> &pages() const;

    QString plainText() const;
    QStringList toCsvRows() const;

private:
    QVector<PageContent> pageList;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/model/DocumentStructure.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/domain/model/DocumentStructure.h"

#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

namespace {

QString normalizeCellToken(const QString &raw) {
    return raw.simplified().toLower();
}

bool isNumericLike(const QString &token) {
    static const QRegularExpression numRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^[+\-]?\d+([,，]\d{3})*(\.\d+)?%?$)"));
    return numRe.match(token).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeHeaderRow(const QStringList &row) {
    if (row.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    int nonEmpty = 0;
    int numericLike = 0;
    for (const QString &cell : row) {
        const QString token = normalizeCellToken(cell);
        if (token.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        nonEmpty += 1;
        if (isNumericLike(token)) {
            numericLike += 1;
        }
    }
    if (nonEmpty == 0) {
        return false;
    }
    const double numericRatio = static_cast<double>(numericLike) / static_cast<double>(nonEmpty);
    return numericRatio < 0.45;
}

double rowSimilarity(const QStringList &a, const QStringList &b) {
    if (a.isEmpty() || b.isEmpty()) {
        return 0.0;
    }
    QSet<QString> left;
    QSet<QString> right;
    for (const QString &cell : a) {
        const QString token = normalizeCellToken(cell);
        if (!token.isEmpty()) {
            left.insert(token);
        }
    }
    for (const QString &cell : b) {
        const QString token = normalizeCellToken(cell);
        if (!token.isEmpty()) {
            right.insert(token);
        }
    }
    if (left.isEmpty() || right.isEmpty()) {
        return 0.0;
    }
    int overlap = 0;
    for (const QString &token : left) {
        if (right.contains(token)) {
            overlap += 1;
        }
    }
    return static_cast<double>(overlap) / static_cast<double>(qMax(left.size(), right.size()));
}

QVector<QStringList> detectHeaderRows(const StructuredTable &table) {
    QVector<QStringList> headers;
    if (table.rows.isEmpty()) {
        return headers;
    }
    const int probeRows = qMin(2, table.rows.size());
    for (int i = 0; i < probeRows; ++i) {
        if (looksLikeHeaderRow(table.rows[i])) {
            headers.push_back(table.rows[i]);
        } else {
            break;
        }
    }
    return headers;
}

} // namespace

StructuredDocument DocumentStructureAnalyzer::analyze(const DocumentModel &document) const {
    StructuredDocument out;
    QVector<int> headingStackNodeIds;
    QVector<QStringList> lastTableHeaderRows;
    int lastTablePageIndex = -1000;
    int lastTableColCount = 0;
    QStringList lastTableHeadingPath;
    int lastTableChainId = 0;
    int lastTableChainPart = 0;
    int lastTableBlockIndex = -1;
    int nextTableChainId = 1;

    auto currentHeadingPath = [&](const StructuredDocument &doc, const QVector<int> &nodeIds) {
        QStringList path;
        for (const int id : nodeIds) {
            if (id >= 0 && id < doc.headingNodes.size()) {
                path.append(doc.headingNodes[id].text);
            }
        }
        return path;
    };

    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        QString paragraphBuffer;
        StructuredTable tableBuffer;
        bool inTable = false;

        auto flushParagraph = [&]() {
            const QString text = paragraphBuffer.trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                paragraphBuffer.clear();
                return;
            }
            StructuredBlock block;
            block.kind = BlockKind::Paragraph;
            block.pageIndex = page.pageIndex;
            block.text = text;
            block.headingPath = currentHeadingPath(out, headingStackNodeIds);
            out.blocks.push_back(block);
            paragraphBuffer.clear();
        };

        auto flushTable = [&]() {
            if (tableBuffer.rows.isEmpty()) {
                return;
            }
            int crossPageHeaderRows = 0;
            const int currentColCount = tableBuffer.colCount;
            const bool tableContinuesAcrossPage = page.pageIndex == lastTablePageIndex + 1
                && currentColCount > 0
                && lastTableColCount > 0
                && qAbs(currentColCount - lastTableColCount) <= 1
                && !lastTableHeaderRows.isEmpty()
                && lastTableHeadingPath == currentHeadingPath(out, headingStackNodeIds);
            if (tableContinuesAcrossPage) {
                const QStringList firstRow = tableBuffer.rows.first();
                const bool firstLooksHeader = looksLikeHeaderRow(firstRow);
                const double firstVsPrevHeader = rowSimilarity(firstRow, lastTableHeaderRows.first());
                const bool hasRepeatedHeader = firstVsPrevHeader >= 0.70;
                if (!firstLooksHeader && !hasRepeatedHeader) {
                    QVector<QStringList> mergedRows;
                    mergedRows.reserve(lastTableHeaderRows.size() + tableBuffer.rows.size());
                    for (const QStringList &headerRow : lastTableHeaderRows) {
                        mergedRows.push_back(headerRow);
                    }
                    for (const QStringList &row : tableBuffer.rows) {
                        mergedRows.push_back(row);
                    }
                    tableBuffer.rows = mergedRows;
                    tableBuffer.rowCount = tableBuffer.rows.size();
                    tableBuffer.colCount = qMax(tableBuffer.colCount, lastTableColCount);
                    crossPageHeaderRows = lastTableHeaderRows.size();
                }
            }

            if (tableContinuesAcrossPage && lastTableChainId > 0) {
                tableBuffer.chainId = lastTableChainId;
                tableBuffer.chainPart = lastTableChainPart + 1;
                tableBuffer.continuedFromPrevPage = true;
                if (lastTableBlockIndex >= 0 && lastTableBlockIndex < out.blocks.size()) {
                    StructuredBlock &prevTableBlock = out.blocks[lastTableBlockIndex];
                    if (prevTableBlock.kind == BlockKind::Table) {
                        prevTableBlock.table.continuedToNextPage = true;
                    }
                }
            } else {
                tableBuffer.chainId = nextTableChainId++;
                tableBuffer.chainPart = 1;
                tableBuffer.continuedFromPrevPage = false;
            }
            tableBuffer.continuedToNextPage = false;
            tableBuffer.inheritedHeaderRows = qMax(0, crossPageHeaderRows);
            inferMergedCells(tableBuffer, crossPageHeaderRows);
            StructuredBlock block;
            block.kind = BlockKind::Table;
            block.pageIndex = page.pageIndex;
            block.table = tableBuffer;
            block.headingPath = currentHeadingPath(out, headingStackNodeIds);
            out.blocks.push_back(block);
            lastTableBlockIndex = out.blocks.size() - 1;

            lastTableHeaderRows = detectHeaderRows(block.table);
            lastTablePageIndex = page.pageIndex;
            lastTableColCount = block.table.colCount;
            lastTableHeadingPath = block.headingPath;
            lastTableChainId = block.table.chainId;
            lastTableChainPart = block.table.chainPart;

            tableBuffer.rows.clear();
            tableBuffer.cells.clear();
            tableBuffer.rowCount = 0;
            tableBuffer.colCount = 0;
        };

        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            QStringList spans;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                const QString token = span.text.trimmed();
                if (!token.isEmpty()) {
                    spans.append(token);
                }
            }
            const QString merged = spans.join(QStringLiteral(" ")).trimmed();
            if (merged.isEmpty()) {
                if (inTable) {
                    flushTable();
                    inTable = false;
                } else {
                    flushParagraph();
                }
                continue;
            }

            if (isLikelyHeading(merged)) {
                if (inTable) {
                    flushTable();
                    inTable = false;
                }
                flushParagraph();

                const int level = inferHeadingLevel(merged);
                while (!headingStackNodeIds.isEmpty()) {
                    const int topId = headingStackNodeIds.back();
                    if (topId < 0 || topId >= out.headingNodes.size()) {
                        headingStackNodeIds.pop_back();
                        continue;
                    }
                    if (out.headingNodes[topId].level < level) {
                        break;
                    }
                    headingStackNodeIds.pop_back();
                }

                HeadingNode node;
                node.id = out.headingNodes.size();
                node.parentId = headingStackNodeIds.isEmpty() ? -1 : headingStackNodeIds.back();
                node.level = level;
                node.pageIndex = page.pageIndex;
                node.text = merged;
                out.headingNodes.push_back(node);
                if (node.parentId >= 0 && node.parentId < out.headingNodes.size()) {
                    out.headingNodes[node.parentId].childrenIds.push_back(node.id);
                }
                headingStackNodeIds.push_back(node.id);

                StructuredBlock heading;
                heading.kind = BlockKind::Heading;
                heading.pageIndex = page.pageIndex;
                heading.text = merged;
                heading.headingLevel = level;
                heading.headingNodeId = node.id;
                heading.headingPath = currentHeadingPath(out, headingStackNodeIds);
                out.blocks.push_back(heading);
                continue;
            }

            if (isLikelyTableLine(merged)) {
                if (!inTable) {
                    flushParagraph();
                    inTable = true;
                }
                const QStringList cells = splitTableCells(merged);
                tableBuffer.rows.push_back(cells);
                tableBuffer.rowCount = tableBuffer.rows.size();
                tableBuffer.colCount = qMax(tableBuffer.colCount, cells.size());
                continue;
            }

            if (inTable) {
                flushTable();
                inTable = false;
            }

            if (!paragraphBuffer.isEmpty()) {
                paragraphBuffer.append(QStringLiteral(" "));
            }
            paragraphBuffer.append(merged);
        }

        if (inTable) {
            flushTable();
        }
        flushParagraph();
    }

    return out;
}

bool DocumentStructureAnalyzer::isLikelyHeading(const QString &line) const {
    // 规则说明：
    // 1) 标题通常较短；
    // 2) 常见前缀（第X章/1.2/Part 等）；
    // 3) 全大写或标题化文本更可能是 heading。
    const QString simplified = line.simplified();
    if (simplified.size() < 2 || simplified.size() > 80) {
        return false;
    }

    static const QRegularExpression headingPattern(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+[章节部分]|[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)*|Chapter\s+[0-9]+|Part\s+[A-Z0-9]+).*)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    if (headingPattern.match(simplified).hasMatch()) {
        return true;
    }

    int letterCount = 0;
    int upperCount = 0;
    for (const QChar ch : simplified) {
        if (ch.isLetter()) {
            letterCount += 1;
            if (ch.isUpper()) {
                upperCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    if (letterCount >= 4 && upperCount >= letterCount * 0.8) {
        return true;
    }
    return false;
}

int DocumentStructureAnalyzer::inferHeadingLevel(const QString &line) const {
    const QString simplified = line.simplified();

    static const QRegularExpression arabicLevelPattern(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+){0,5})[\.\s、:：\-]*.*$)")
    );
    QRegularExpressionMatch arabicMatch = arabicLevelPattern.match(simplified);
    if (arabicMatch.hasMatch()) {
        const QString prefix = arabicMatch.captured(1);
        return qBound(1, prefix.count('.') + 1, 6);
    }

    static const QRegularExpression chinesePattern(QStringLiteral(R"(第[一二三四五六七八九十百千0-9]+([章节部分条]))"));
    QRegularExpressionMatch chMatch = chinesePattern.match(simplified);
    if (chMatch.hasMatch()) {
        const QString marker = chMatch.captured(1);
        if (marker == QStringLiteral("部") || marker == QStringLiteral("章")) {
            return 1;
        }
        if (marker == QStringLiteral("节")) {
            return 2;
        }
        if (marker == QStringLiteral("条")) {
            return 3;
        }
    }

    if (simplified.size() <= 20) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (simplified.size() <= 40) {
        return 2;
    }
    return 3;
}

bool DocumentStructureAnalyzer::isLikelyTableLine(const QString &line) const {
    const QString simplified = line.simplified();
    if (simplified.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    // 表格常见分隔符：|、Tab、多空格（>=2）。
    if (simplified.count('|') >= 2) {
        return true;
    }
    if (line.contains('\t')) {
        return true;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression multiSpace(QStringLiteral(R"(\S+\s{2,}\S+)"));
    if (multiSpace.match(line).hasMatch()) {
        return true;
    }
    return false;
}

QStringList DocumentStructureAnalyzer::splitTableCells(const QString &line) const {
    QString raw = line;
    if (raw.contains('|')) {
        QStringList parts = raw.split('|');
        QStringList out;
        for (const QString &part : parts) {
            const QString cell = part.trimmed();
            if (!cell.isEmpty()) {
                out.append(cell);
            }
        }
        if (!out.isEmpty()) {
            return out;
        }
    }

    if (raw.contains('\t')) {
        QStringList parts = raw.split('\t');
        QStringList out;
        for (const QString &part : parts) {
            out.append(part.trimmed());
        }
        return out;
    }

    static const QRegularExpression splitBySpaces(QStringLiteral(R"(\s{2,})"));
    QStringList out = raw.split(splitBySpaces, Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
    for (QString &cell : out) {
        cell = cell.trimmed();
    }
    return out;
}

void DocumentStructureAnalyzer::inferMergedCells(StructuredTable &table, const int crossPageHeaderRows) const {
    if (table.rows.isEmpty()) {
        table.cells.clear();
        table.rowCount = 0;
        table.colCount = 0;
        return;
    }

    const int rows = table.rows.size();
    int cols = 0;
    for (const QStringList &row : table.rows) {
        cols = qMax(cols, row.size());
    }
    table.rowCount = rows;
    table.colCount = cols;

    QVector<QVector<QString>> grid(rows, QVector<QString>(cols));
    for (int r = 0; r < rows; ++r) {
        const QStringList &row = table.rows[r];
        for (int c = 0; c < row.size(); ++c) {
            grid[r][c] = row[c].trimmed();
        }
    }

    QVector<QVector<bool>> used(rows, QVector<bool>(cols, false));
    table.cells.clear();

    for (int r = 0; r < rows; ++r) {
        for (int c = 0; c < cols; ++c) {
            if (used[r][c]) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString text = grid[r][c].trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                used[r][c] = true;
                continue;
            }

            int colSpan = 1;
            while (c + colSpan < cols) {
                const QString nextText = grid[r][c + colSpan].trimmed();
                if (!nextText.isEmpty()) {
                    break;
                }
                colSpan += 1;
            }

            int rowSpan = 1;
            bool expandable = true;
            while (r + rowSpan < rows && expandable) {
                for (int cc = c; cc < c + colSpan; ++cc) {
                    if (!grid[r + rowSpan][cc].trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                        expandable = false;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (expandable) {
                    rowSpan += 1;
                }
            }

            for (int rr = r; rr < r + rowSpan; ++rr) {
                for (int cc = c; cc < c + colSpan; ++cc) {
                    used[rr][cc] = true;
                }
            }

            TableCell cell;
            cell.row = r;
            cell.col = c;
            cell.rowSpan = rowSpan;
            cell.colSpan = colSpan;
            cell.text = text;
            cell.inferredMerged = rowSpan > 1 || colSpan > 1;
            cell.fromCrossPageHeader = crossPageHeaderRows > 0 && r < crossPageHeaderRows;
            table.cells.push_back(cell);
        }
    }
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/model/DocumentStructure.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QVector>

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"

namespace converter {

// 结构化块类型，用于导出器选择不同渲染策略。
enum class BlockKind {
    Heading,
    Paragraph,
    Table
};

struct TableCell {
    int row = 0;
    int col = 0;
    int rowSpan = 1;
    int colSpan = 1;
    QString text;
    bool inferredMerged = false;
    bool fromCrossPageHeader = false;
};

struct StructuredTable {
    QVector<QStringList> rows;
    QVector<TableCell> cells;
    int rowCount = 0;
    int colCount = 0;
    int chainId = 0;
    int chainPart = 0;
    bool continuedFromPrevPage = false;
    bool continuedToNextPage = false;
    int inheritedHeaderRows = 0;
};

struct HeadingNode {
    int id = -1;
    int parentId = -1;
    int level = 1;
    int pageIndex = 0;
    QString text;
    QVector<int> childrenIds;
};

struct StructuredBlock {
    BlockKind kind = BlockKind::Paragraph;
    int pageIndex = 0;
    QString text;
    StructuredTable table;
    int headingLevel = 0;
    int headingNodeId = -1;
    QStringList headingPath;
};

struct StructuredDocument {
    QVector<StructuredBlock> blocks;
    QVector<HeadingNode> headingNodes;
};

// 将 OCR 文本行转换为结构化块（标题/段落/表格）。
// 该分析器以规则为主，后续可替换为模型推理（LayoutLM 等）而不改导出器接口。
class DocumentStructureAnalyzer final {
public:
    StructuredDocument analyze(const DocumentModel &document) const;

private:
    bool isLikelyHeading(const QString &line) const;
    int inferHeadingLevel(const QString &line) const;
    bool isLikelyTableLine(const QString &line) const;
    QStringList splitTableCells(const QString &line) const;
    void inferMergedCells(StructuredTable &table, int crossPageHeaderRows = 0) const;
};

} // namespace converter

#pragma once

#include <QString>
#include <QVector>

namespace converter {

// 坐标系统一采用 PDF 用户坐标（point）。
struct LayoutBBox {
    double x = 0.0;
    double y = 0.0;
    double w = 0.0;
    double h = 0.0;
};

struct LayoutTextRun {
    QString text;
    QString fontFamily;
    double fontSize = 0.0;
    bool bold = false;
    bool italic = false;
    QString color;
    double lineHeight = 0.0;
    QString marker; // bullet/number token
    LayoutBBox box;
};

struct LayoutLine {
    QVector<LayoutTextRun> runs;
    LayoutBBox box;
    QString paragraphAlign; // l/ctr/r/just
    double indentPt = 0.0;
    int listLevel = 0;
    bool listOrdered = false;
    QString listMarker;
};

struct LayoutTableCell {
    int row = 0;
    int col = 0;
    int rowSpan = 1;
    int colSpan = 1;
    QString text;
    LayoutBBox box;
    QString textAlign;
    QString verticalAlign;
    QString fillColor;
    QString textColor;
    QString borderColor;
    double borderWidth = 0.6;
    bool bold = false;
    bool italic = false;
    double fontSize = 11.0;
    QString fontFamily;
};

struct LayoutTable {
    int rowCount = 0;
    int colCount = 0;
    QVector<LayoutTableCell> cells;
    LayoutBBox box;
};

struct LayoutImage {
    LayoutBBox box;
    QString path;
    double opacity = 1.0;
    bool isBackground = false;
    double rotationDeg = 0.0;
    bool flipH = false;
    bool flipV = false;
    double cropLeft = 0.0;
    double cropTop = 0.0;
    double cropRight = 0.0;
    double cropBottom = 0.0;
};

struct LayoutFillShape {
    LayoutBBox box;
    QString fillColor;
    QString fillColor2;
    double gradientAngle = 0.0;
    bool hasGradient = false;
    double cornerRadius = 0.0;
    QString shapeType; // rect/roundRect/path
    double opacity = 1.0;
    bool isBackground = true;
};

struct LayoutBlock {
    QString type; // heading/paragraph/table/header/footer/figure
    QVector<LayoutLine> lines;
    LayoutBBox box;
};

struct LayoutPage {
    int pageIndex = 0;
    double width = 0.0;
    double height = 0.0;
    QVector<LayoutBlock> blocks;
    QVector<LayoutTable> tables;
    QVector<LayoutImage> images;
    QVector<LayoutFillShape> fills;
};

struct LayoutDocument {
    QVector<LayoutPage> pages;
};

} // namespace converter
