📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/quality/FormatRegressionEvaluator.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/domain/quality/FormatRegressionEvaluator.h"

#include <QCryptographicHash>
#include <QDateTime>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QJsonArray>
#include <QJsonDocument>
#include <QJsonObject>
#include <QTextStream>
#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

namespace {

double safeRatioDrift(const int currentValue, const int baselineValue) {
    if (baselineValue <= 0) {
        return currentValue > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.0;
    }
    return qAbs(static_cast<double>(currentValue - baselineValue)) / static_cast<double>(baselineValue);
}

QString layoutFingerprint(const QJsonArray &pageDensity) {
    QByteArray payload;
    payload.reserve(pageDensity.size() * 24);
    for (const QJsonValue &value : pageDensity) {
        const QJsonObject row = value.toObject();
        payload += QByteArray::number(row.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt());
        payload += '|';
        payload += QByteArray::number(row.value(QStringLiteral("lines")).toInt());
        payload += '|';
        payload += QByteArray::number(row.value(QStringLiteral("spans")).toInt());
        payload += '|';
        payload += QByteArray::number(row.value(QStringLiteral("graphics")).toInt());
        payload += ';';
    }
    return QString::fromLatin1(QCryptographicHash::hash(payload, QCryptographicHash::Sha1).toHex());
}

QString baselineNameFor(const StageContext &context) {
    const QString sample = QFileInfo(context.task.inputPdf).completeBaseName();
    return QStringLiteral("%1.%2.baseline.json")
        .arg(sample, outputFormatToSuffix(context.task.format));
}

} // namespace

bool FormatRegressionEvaluator::evaluateAndWrite(
    const StageContext &context,
    QString &metricsPath,
    QString &errorMessage
) const {
    errorMessage.clear();
    metricsPath.clear();
    if (context.task.outputDir.isEmpty() || context.task.taskId.isEmpty()) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("回归评测输出目录或任务 ID 为空");
        return false;
    }
    const QString evalDirPath = QDir(context.task.outputDir).filePath(QStringLiteral(".regression"));
    QDir evalDir(evalDirPath);
    if (!evalDir.exists() && !evalDir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."))) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("无法创建回归评测目录");
        return false;
    }

    int pageCount = 0;
    int lineCount = 0;
    int spanCount = 0;
    int graphicCount = 0;
    QJsonArray pageDensity;
    for (const PageContent &page : context.document.pages()) {
        pageCount += 1;
        int pageLines = 0;
        int pageSpans = 0;
        double confSum = 0.0;
        int confCount = 0;
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            pageLines += 1;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                pageSpans += 1;
                if (span.confidence > 0.0f) {
                    confSum += span.confidence;
                    confCount += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        lineCount += pageLines;
        spanCount += pageSpans;
        graphicCount += page.graphics.size();
        QJsonObject row;
        row.insert(QStringLiteral("page"), page.pageIndex + 1);
        row.insert(QStringLiteral("lines"), pageLines);
        row.insert(QStringLiteral("spans"), pageSpans);
        row.insert(QStringLiteral("graphics"), page.graphics.size());
        row.insert(QStringLiteral("avgConfidence"), confCount > 0 ? confSum / static_cast<double>(confCount) : 0.0);
        pageDensity.append(row);
    }

    const int readingNodes = context.unifiedStructure.readingNodes.size();
    const int unifiedTables = context.unifiedStructure.tables.size();
    const int regionCount = context.unifiedStructure.regions.size();
    const int headingCount = context.unifiedStructure.headings.size();
    const double structureScore = qBound(
        0.0,
        (readingNodes > 0 ? 45.0 : 0.0)
            + (unifiedTables > 0 ? 20.0 : 0.0)
            + (headingCount > 0 ? 10.0 : 0.0)
            + (regionCount > 0 ? 10.0 : 0.0)
            + (lineCount > 0 ? 10.0 : 0.0)
            + (graphicCount > 0 ? 10.0 : 0.0)
            + (context.ocrEngineName.isEmpty() ? 0.0 : 5.0),
        100.0
    );
    const QString fingerprint = layoutFingerprint(pageDensity);

    QJsonObject root;
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("taskId"), context.task.taskId);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("timestamp"), QDateTime::currentDateTimeUtc().toString(Qt::ISODate));
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("inputPdf"), context.task.inputPdf);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("outputPath"), context.generatedOutputPath);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("outputFormat"), outputFormatToSuffix(context.task.format));
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("ocrEngine"), context.ocrEngineName);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("pageCount"), pageCount);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("lineCount"), lineCount);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("spanCount"), spanCount);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("graphicCount"), graphicCount);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("readingNodes"), readingNodes);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("unifiedTables"), unifiedTables);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("regionCount"), regionCount);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("headingCount"), headingCount);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("roleStats"), QJsonObject{
        {QStringLiteral("title"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.title},
        {QStringLiteral("subtitle"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.subtitle},
        {QStringLiteral("heading"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.heading},
        {QStringLiteral("paragraph"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.paragraph},
        {QStringLiteral("listItem"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.listItem},
        {QStringLiteral("tableHeader"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.tableHeader},
        {QStringLiteral("tableBody"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.tableBody},
        {QStringLiteral("header"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.header},
        {QStringLiteral("footer"), context.unifiedStructure.stats.footer}
    });
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("structureScore"), structureScore);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("layoutFingerprint"), fingerprint);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("pageDensity"), pageDensity);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("traceCount"), context.traces.size());

    QDir baselineDir(QDir(evalDirPath).filePath(QStringLiteral("baselines")));
    if (!baselineDir.exists()) {
        baselineDir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."));
    }
    const QString baselinePath = baselineDir.filePath(baselineNameFor(context));
    const bool forceUpdateBaseline = qEnvironmentVariableIntValue("PDFCONV_UPDATE_BASELINE") == 1;
    bool baselinePass = true;
    bool baselineCompared = false;
    QJsonObject baselineSummary;
    baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("path"), baselinePath);
    if (!QFileInfo::exists(baselinePath) || forceUpdateBaseline) {
        QJsonObject baselineRoot;
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("createdAt"), QDateTime::currentDateTimeUtc().toString(Qt::ISODate));
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("sample"), QFileInfo(context.task.inputPdf).completeBaseName());
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("format"), outputFormatToSuffix(context.task.format));
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("pageCount"), pageCount);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("lineCount"), lineCount);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("spanCount"), spanCount);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("graphicCount"), graphicCount);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("readingNodes"), readingNodes);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("unifiedTables"), unifiedTables);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("regionCount"), regionCount);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("headingCount"), headingCount);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("structureScore"), structureScore);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("layoutFingerprint"), fingerprint);
        baselineRoot.insert(QStringLiteral("pageDensity"), pageDensity);
        QFile baselineFile(baselinePath);
        if (!baselineFile.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Text | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
            errorMessage = QStringLiteral("无法写入回归基线文件");
            return false;
        }
        baselineFile.write(QJsonDocument(baselineRoot).toJson(QJsonDocument::Indented));
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("updated"), true);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("compared"), false);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("pass"), true);
    } else {
        QFile baselineFile(baselinePath);
        if (!baselineFile.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
            errorMessage = QStringLiteral("无法读取回归基线文件");
            return false;
        }
        const QJsonDocument baselineDoc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(baselineFile.readAll());
        if (!baselineDoc.isObject()) {
            errorMessage = QStringLiteral("回归基线文件格式错误");
            return false;
        }
        baselineCompared = true;
        const QJsonObject baseline = baselineDoc.object();
        const int baseLineCount = baseline.value(QStringLiteral("lineCount")).toInt(0);
        const int baseSpanCount = baseline.value(QStringLiteral("spanCount")).toInt(0);
        const int baseGraphicCount = baseline.value(QStringLiteral("graphicCount")).toInt(0);
        const int baseReadingNodes = baseline.value(QStringLiteral("readingNodes")).toInt(0);
        const int baseTables = baseline.value(QStringLiteral("unifiedTables")).toInt(0);
        const double baseStructureScore = baseline.value(QStringLiteral("structureScore")).toDouble(0.0);
        const QString baseFingerprint = baseline.value(QStringLiteral("layoutFingerprint")).toString();

        const double lineDrift = safeRatioDrift(lineCount, baseLineCount);
        const double spanDrift = safeRatioDrift(spanCount, baseSpanCount);
        const double graphicDrift = safeRatioDrift(graphicCount, baseGraphicCount);
        const double nodeDrift = safeRatioDrift(readingNodes, baseReadingNodes);
        const double tableDrift = safeRatioDrift(unifiedTables, baseTables);
        const double structureScoreDrift = qAbs(structureScore - baseStructureScore);
        const bool fingerprintMatch = !baseFingerprint.isEmpty() && baseFingerprint == fingerprint;
        baselinePass = lineDrift <= 0.35
            && spanDrift <= 0.40
            && graphicDrift <= 0.45
            && nodeDrift <= 0.40
            && tableDrift <= 0.50
            && structureScoreDrift <= 25.0
            && (fingerprintMatch || pageCount <= 2);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("updated"), false);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("compared"), true);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("pass"), baselinePass);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("lineDrift"), lineDrift);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("spanDrift"), spanDrift);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("graphicDrift"), graphicDrift);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("nodeDrift"), nodeDrift);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("tableDrift"), tableDrift);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("structureScoreDrift"), structureScoreDrift);
        baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("fingerprintMatch"), fingerprintMatch);
    }
    baselineSummary.insert(QStringLiteral("compared"), baselineCompared);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("baseline"), baselineSummary);

    metricsPath = evalDir.filePath(context.task.taskId + QStringLiteral(".metrics.json"));
    QFile metricsFile(metricsPath);
    if (!metricsFile.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("无法写入回归评测 JSON");
        return false;
    }
    metricsFile.write(QJsonDocument(root).toJson(QJsonDocument::Indented));
    metricsFile.close();

    const QString heatmapPath = evalDir.filePath(context.task.taskId + QStringLiteral(".heatmap.csv"));
    QFile heatmapFile(heatmapPath);
    if (heatmapFile.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
        QTextStream stream(&heatmapFile);
        stream << "page,lines,spans,graphics,avg_confidence\n";
        for (const QJsonValue &value : pageDensity) {
            const QJsonObject row = value.toObject();
            stream
                << row.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt() << ","
                << row.value(QStringLiteral("lines")).toInt() << ","
                << row.value(QStringLiteral("spans")).toInt() << ","
                << row.value(QStringLiteral("graphics")).toInt() << ","
                << QString::number(row.value(QStringLiteral("avgConfidence")).toDouble(), 'f', 4)
                << "\n";
        }
    }
    if (baselineCompared && !baselinePass) {
        const bool enforceBaselineGate = qEnvironmentVariableIntValue("PDFCONV_ENFORCE_BASELINE") == 1;
        if (enforceBaselineGate) {
            errorMessage = QStringLiteral("回归基线硬门禁未通过（结构/视觉代理漂移超阈值）");
            return false;
        }
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("回归基线未通过，已按告警继续产出（设置 PDFCONV_ENFORCE_BASELINE=1 可启用阻断）");
    }
    return true;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/quality/FormatRegressionEvaluator.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QString>

#include "core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h"

namespace converter {

class FormatRegressionEvaluator final {
public:
    bool evaluateAndWrite(const StageContext &context, QString &metricsPath, QString &errorMessage) const;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/quality/SemanticFidelityGate.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/domain/quality/SemanticFidelityGate.h"

#include <QRectF>
#include <QLineF>
#include <QtMath>
#include <QtGlobal>
#include <QRegularExpression>

namespace converter {

namespace {

void applyCommonChecks(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const UnifiedStructureDocument &structure,
    SemanticFidelityReport &report
) {
    if (document.isEmpty()) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("文档为空，无法进行语义复刻导出"));
        return;
    }
    if (structure.readingNodes.isEmpty()) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("缺少阅读顺序节点，语义链不完整"));
    }
    if (structure.regions.isEmpty()) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("缺少版面区域结构，无法稳定定位对象"));
    }
    if (structure.readingNodes.size() < document.pages().size()) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("阅读节点偏少，可能存在对象漏检"));
    }
}

int countUnknownRoles(const UnifiedStructureDocument &structure) {
    int unknown = 0;
    for (const ReadingNode &node : structure.readingNodes) {
        if (node.role == SemanticRole::Unknown) {
            unknown += 1;
        }
    }
    return unknown;
}

QString mergeLineText(const TextLine &line);
bool looksNumericAxisLabel(const QString &text);
QString normalizedColorKey(QString color);
QString normalizedFontFamilyKey(QString family);

void applyTypographyConsistencyChecks(const DocumentModel &document, SemanticFidelityReport &report) {
    QHash<QString, int> fontUsage;
    double ratioSum = 0.0;
    double ratioSqSum = 0.0;
    int ratioCount = 0;
    int spanCount = 0;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                const QString text = span.text.trimmed();
                if (text.isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                const int weight = qMax(1, text.size());
                const QString fontKey = normalizedFontFamilyKey(span.fontFamily);
                if (!fontKey.isEmpty()) {
                    fontUsage[fontKey] += weight;
                }
                if (span.fontSize > 0.01f && span.lineHeight > 0.01f) {
                    const double ratio = qBound(0.6, static_cast<double>(span.lineHeight / span.fontSize), 3.0);
                    ratioSum += ratio;
                    ratioSqSum += ratio * ratio;
                    ratioCount += 1;
                }
                spanCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    if (spanCount <= 0) {
        return;
    }
    int totalFontWeight = 0;
    int maxFontWeight = 0;
    for (auto it = fontUsage.constBegin(); it != fontUsage.constEnd(); ++it) {
        totalFontWeight += qMax(0, it.value());
        maxFontWeight = qMax(maxFontWeight, qMax(0, it.value()));
    }
    const int dominantFontShare = totalFontWeight > 0 ? (maxFontWeight * 100) / totalFontWeight : 0;
    double lineHeightStdDev = 0.0;
    if (ratioCount > 0) {
        const double mean = ratioSum / ratioCount;
        const double variance = qMax(0.0, ratioSqSum / ratioCount - mean * mean);
        lineHeightStdDev = qSqrt(variance);
        report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("common.typography.lineHeightRatioMean=%1").arg(QString::number(mean, 'f', 3)));
    }
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("common.typography.dominantFontShare=%1").arg(dominantFontShare));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("common.typography.lineHeightRatioStdDev=%1").arg(QString::number(lineHeightStdDev, 'f', 3)));
    if (document.pages().size() >= 3 && dominantFontShare < 35) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("字体替代一致性硬门禁未通过（主字体占比<35%）"));
    } else if (dominantFontShare < 45) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("主字体占比偏低，跨平台字体回退风险较高"));
    }
    if (ratioCount >= 20 && lineHeightStdDev > 0.28) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("行高一致性硬门禁未通过（行高波动过大）"));
    } else if (ratioCount >= 10 && lineHeightStdDev > 0.20) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("行高波动偏大，排版稳定性存在风险"));
    }
}

struct WordFieldAstGateStats {
    int signalTokenCount = 0;
    int rootNodeCount = 0;
    int nodeCount = 0;
    int nestedSignalCount = 0;
    int nestedNodeCount = 0;
    int maxDepth = 0;
    int ifCount = 0;
    int setCount = 0;
    int refCount = 0;
    int seqCount = 0;
};

QVector<QPair<int, int>> collectWordFieldTopLevelRanges(const QString &text) {
    QVector<QPair<int, int>> out;
    int depth = 0;
    int start = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < text.size(); ++i) {
        const QChar ch = text.at(i);
        if (ch == QChar('{')) {
            if (depth == 0) {
                start = i;
            }
            depth += 1;
        } else if (ch == QChar('}')) {
            if (depth <= 0) {
                continue;
            }
            depth -= 1;
            if (depth == 0 && start >= 0) {
                out.push_back(qMakePair(start, i));
                start = -1;
            }
        }
    }
    return out;
}

QString wordFieldKeywordFromToken(const QString &token) {
    QString inner = token.trimmed();
    if (inner.startsWith('{') && inner.endsWith('}') && inner.size() >= 2) {
        inner = inner.mid(1, inner.size() - 2).trimmed();
    }
    if (inner.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    const int end = inner.indexOf(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(\s)")));
    const QString keyword = (end < 0 ? inner : inner.left(end)).trimmed().toUpper();
    return keyword;
}

void accumulateWordFieldAstFromToken(const QString &token, const int depth, WordFieldAstGateStats &stats) {
    const QString keyword = wordFieldKeywordFromToken(token);
    if (keyword.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    stats.nodeCount += 1;
    stats.maxDepth = qMax(stats.maxDepth, depth);
    if (keyword == QStringLiteral("IF")) {
        stats.ifCount += 1;
    } else if (keyword == QStringLiteral("SET")) {
        stats.setCount += 1;
    } else if (keyword == QStringLiteral("SEQ")) {
        stats.seqCount += 1;
    } else if (keyword == QStringLiteral("REF") || keyword == QStringLiteral("PAGEREF")) {
        stats.refCount += 1;
    }
    QString inner = token.trimmed();
    if (inner.startsWith('{') && inner.endsWith('}') && inner.size() >= 2) {
        inner = inner.mid(1, inner.size() - 2).trimmed();
    }
    const QVector<QPair<int, int>> nestedRanges = collectWordFieldTopLevelRanges(inner);
    if (!nestedRanges.isEmpty()) {
        stats.nestedNodeCount += 1;
    }
    for (const QPair<int, int> &range : nestedRanges) {
        if (range.first < 0 || range.second < range.first || range.second >= inner.size()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString child = inner.mid(range.first, range.second - range.first + 1);
        accumulateWordFieldAstFromToken(child, depth + 1, stats);
    }
}

WordFieldAstGateStats collectWordFieldAstGateStats(const DocumentModel &document) {
    WordFieldAstGateStats stats;
    static const QRegularExpression fieldSignalRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(\{\s*(IF|SET|REF|SEQ|PAGEREF|TOC|PAGE|NUMPAGES)\b)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QRegularExpressionMatchIterator signalIter = fieldSignalRe.globalMatch(text);
            while (signalIter.hasNext()) {
                signalIter.next();
                stats.signalTokenCount += 1;
            }
            const QVector<QPair<int, int>> ranges = collectWordFieldTopLevelRanges(text);
            for (const QPair<int, int> &range : ranges) {
                if (range.first < 0 || range.second < range.first || range.second >= text.size()) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QString token = text.mid(range.first, range.second - range.first + 1);
                stats.rootNodeCount += 1;
                QString inner = token.trimmed();
                if (inner.startsWith('{') && inner.endsWith('}') && inner.size() >= 2) {
                    inner = inner.mid(1, inner.size() - 2);
                }
                if (fieldSignalRe.match(inner).hasMatch()) {
                    stats.nestedSignalCount += 1;
                }
                accumulateWordFieldAstFromToken(token, 1, stats);
            }
        }
    }
    return stats;
}

void applyWordChecks(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const UnifiedStructureDocument &structure,
    SemanticFidelityReport &report
) {
    const int unknown = countUnknownRoles(structure);
    const int total = qMax(1, structure.readingNodes.size());
    const int pageCount = qMax(1, document.pages().size());
    int headerRoleNodes = 0;
    int footerRoleNodes = 0;
    int fieldLikeNodeCount = 0;
    int pageNumberFieldLikeCount = 0;
    QSet<QString> fieldSignalKinds;
    QSet<int> headerFooterRegionPages;
    static const QRegularExpression fieldLikeRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(\{\s*(IF|SET|REF|SEQ|PAGEREF|TOC|PAGE|NUMPAGES)\b)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression tocSignalRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"((目录|contents))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    for (const ReadingNode &node : structure.readingNodes) {
        if (node.role == SemanticRole::Header) {
            headerRoleNodes += 1;
        } else if (node.role == SemanticRole::Footer) {
            footerRoleNodes += 1;
        }
        QRegularExpressionMatchIterator fieldIter = fieldLikeRe.globalMatch(node.text);
        while (fieldIter.hasNext()) {
            const QRegularExpressionMatch match = fieldIter.next();
            if (!match.hasMatch()) {
                continue;
            }
            fieldLikeNodeCount += 1;
            const QString kind = match.captured(1).toUpper();
            if (kind == QStringLiteral("IF")) {
                fieldSignalKinds.insert(QStringLiteral("IF"));
            } else if (kind == QStringLiteral("SET")) {
                fieldSignalKinds.insert(QStringLiteral("SET"));
            } else if (kind == QStringLiteral("SEQ")) {
                fieldSignalKinds.insert(QStringLiteral("SEQ"));
            } else if (kind == QStringLiteral("REF") || kind == QStringLiteral("PAGEREF")) {
                fieldSignalKinds.insert(QStringLiteral("REF"));
            }
            if (kind == QStringLiteral("PAGE")
                || kind == QStringLiteral("NUMPAGES")
                || kind == QStringLiteral("PAGEREF")) {
                pageNumberFieldLikeCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    for (const LayoutRegion &region : structure.regions) {
        if (region.kind == RegionKind::HeaderBlock || region.kind == RegionKind::FooterBlock) {
            headerFooterRegionPages.insert(region.page);
        }
    }
    int tocLikeLineCount = 0;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            QString text;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                const QString token = span.text.simplified();
                if (token.isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                if (!text.isEmpty()) {
                    text += QChar(' ');
                }
                text += token;
            }
            if (tocSignalRe.match(text.trimmed()).hasMatch()) {
                tocLikeLineCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    const int headerFooterCoverage = (headerFooterRegionPages.size() * 100) / pageCount;
    int headerFooterInteriorGapMax = 0;
    int headerFooterInteriorGapCurrent = 0;
    for (int p = 2; p <= pageCount - 1; ++p) {
        if (headerFooterRegionPages.contains(p)) {
            headerFooterInteriorGapMax = qMax(headerFooterInteriorGapMax, headerFooterInteriorGapCurrent);
            headerFooterInteriorGapCurrent = 0;
        } else {
            headerFooterInteriorGapCurrent += 1;
        }
    }
    headerFooterInteriorGapMax = qMax(headerFooterInteriorGapMax, headerFooterInteriorGapCurrent);
    const bool complexPaginationCandidate = pageCount >= 6
        && (tocLikeLineCount > 0
            || fieldSignalKinds.contains(QStringLiteral("REF"))
            || structure.headings.size() >= 3);
    const WordFieldAstGateStats fieldAstStats = collectWordFieldAstGateStats(document);
    const int fieldSignalTotal = qMax(fieldAstStats.signalTokenCount, fieldLikeNodeCount);
    const int fieldAstCoverage = fieldSignalTotal > 0
        ? (fieldAstStats.rootNodeCount * 100) / fieldSignalTotal
        : 100;
    const int nestedFieldCoverage = fieldAstStats.nestedSignalCount > 0
        ? (fieldAstStats.nestedNodeCount * 100) / fieldAstStats.nestedSignalCount
        : 100;
    int requiredKindHit = 0;
    requiredKindHit += fieldAstStats.ifCount > 0 ? 1 : 0;
    requiredKindHit += fieldAstStats.setCount > 0 ? 1 : 0;
    requiredKindHit += fieldAstStats.refCount > 0 ? 1 : 0;
    requiredKindHit += fieldAstStats.seqCount > 0 ? 1 : 0;
    const int requiredKindCoverage = (requiredKindHit * 100) / 4;
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.unknownRoleRatio=%1%%").arg((unknown * 100) / total));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.headingCount=%1").arg(structure.headings.size()));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.headerRoleNodes=%1").arg(headerRoleNodes));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.footerRoleNodes=%1").arg(footerRoleNodes));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.headerFooterCoverage=%1%%").arg(headerFooterCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldLikeNodeCount=%1").arg(fieldLikeNodeCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.pageNumberFieldLikeCount=%1").arg(pageNumberFieldLikeCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.signalTokenCount=%1").arg(fieldSignalTotal));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.rootNodeCount=%1").arg(fieldAstStats.rootNodeCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.nodeCount=%1").arg(fieldAstStats.nodeCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.maxDepth=%1").arg(fieldAstStats.maxDepth));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.nestedNodeCount=%1").arg(fieldAstStats.nestedNodeCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.coverage=%1%%").arg(fieldAstCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.nestedCoverage=%1%%").arg(nestedFieldCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.fieldAst.kindCoverage(IF/SET/REF/SEQ)=%1%%").arg(requiredKindCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("word.headerFooterInteriorGapMax=%1").arg(headerFooterInteriorGapMax));
    if (unknown * 100 / total > 35) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 语义角色未知比例过高（>35%）"));
    }
    if (pageCount >= 3
        && headerFooterCoverage < 40
        && (headerRoleNodes + footerRoleNodes) < qMax(2, pageCount / 3)) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 页眉页脚证据覆盖不足（<40%）"));
    }
    if (pageCount >= 6 && headerFooterCoverage < 55) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 极端分页硬门禁未通过：页眉页脚跨页覆盖不足（<55%）"));
    }
    if (pageCount >= 6 && headerFooterInteriorGapMax >= 2) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 极端分页硬门禁未通过：中间页存在连续页眉页脚断链（>=2页）"));
    }
    if (complexPaginationCandidate && pageNumberFieldLikeCount == 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 极端分页硬门禁未通过：复杂断页场景缺少 PAGE/NUMPAGES/PAGEREF 证据"));
    }
    if (pageCount >= 8 && structure.headings.isEmpty()) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 长文档未识别标题层级（>=8页）"));
    } else if (structure.headings.isEmpty() && structure.readingNodes.size() > 40) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("长文档未识别标题层级，目录/交叉引用保真风险高"));
    }
    if (tocLikeLineCount > 0 && fieldLikeNodeCount == 0) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("检测到目录信号但未识别字段指令，交叉引用保真风险高"));
    }
    if (fieldSignalTotal >= 2 && fieldAstCoverage < 85) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 真实域 AST 覆盖不足（<85%）"));
    }
    if (fieldAstStats.nestedSignalCount > 0 && nestedFieldCoverage < 80) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word 嵌套域 AST 覆盖不足（<80%）"));
    }
    if (fieldSignalKinds.contains(QStringLiteral("IF")) && fieldAstStats.ifCount == 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word IF 域未完成 AST 解析"));
    }
    if (fieldSignalKinds.contains(QStringLiteral("SET")) && fieldAstStats.setCount == 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word SET 域未完成 AST 解析"));
    }
    if (fieldSignalKinds.contains(QStringLiteral("REF")) && fieldAstStats.refCount == 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word REF/PAGEREF 域未完成 AST 解析"));
    }
    if (fieldSignalKinds.contains(QStringLiteral("SEQ")) && fieldAstStats.seqCount == 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Word SEQ 域未完成 AST 解析"));
    }
}

void applyExcelChecks(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const UnifiedStructureDocument &structure,
    SemanticFidelityReport &report
) {
    if (structure.tables.isEmpty()) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 未识别到结构化表格对象"));
        return;
    }
    Q_UNUSED(document);
    int totalCells = 0;
    int nonEmptyCells = 0;
    int tableHeaderCells = 0;
    int tableBodyCells = 0;
    int denseTableCount = 0;
    int sparseTableCount = 0;
    int chartLikeSheets = 0;
    int complexWorksheetObjectSheets = 0;
    int complexWorksheetCompletenessSum = 0;
    int complexWorksheetHardFailSheets = 0;
    int axisBindingQualitySum = 0;
    int axisBindingHardFailSheets = 0;
    for (const UnifiedTable &table : structure.tables) {
        totalCells += table.cells.size();
        if (table.cells.isEmpty()) {
            report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 表格存在空单元语义块"));
            break;
        }
        int maxRow = 0;
        int maxCol = 0;
        int nonEmptyInTable = 0;
        for (const UnifiedTableCell &cell : table.cells) {
            maxRow = qMax(maxRow, cell.row + qMax(1, cell.rowSpan));
            maxCol = qMax(maxCol, cell.col + qMax(1, cell.colSpan));
            if (!cell.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                nonEmptyCells += 1;
                nonEmptyInTable += 1;
            }
            if (cell.row == 0 && !cell.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                tableHeaderCells += 1;
            } else if (!cell.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                tableBodyCells += 1;
            }
        }
        const int logicalArea = qMax(1, maxRow * maxCol);
        const int fillRatio = (nonEmptyInTable * 100) / logicalArea;
        if (fillRatio >= 55) {
            denseTableCount += 1;
        } else {
            sparseTableCount += 1;
        }
    }
    const int coverage = totalCells > 0 ? (nonEmptyCells * 100) / totalCells : 0;
    const int headerBodyRatio = tableBodyCells > 0 ? (tableHeaderCells * 100) / tableBodyCells : 0;
    static const QRegularExpression legendRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"((系列|Series|同比|环比|目标|实际|预算|预测|Q[1-4]|[A-Za-z]+\s*\d*))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        int rectCount = 0;
        int lineCount = 0;
        QSet<QString> seriesColors;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                rectCount += 1;
                const QString color = !g.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? g.fillColor : g.strokeColor;
                seriesColors.insert(normalizedColorKey(color));
            } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
                lineCount += 1;
            }
        }
        const bool chartLike = rectCount >= 3 && lineCount >= 2;
        if (!chartLike) {
            continue;
        }
        chartLikeSheets += 1;
        int numericAxisLabelCount = 0;
        int leftNumericLabels = 0;
        int rightNumericLabels = 0;
        int legendLineCount = 0;
        bool hasLegendText = false;
        bool hasPercentAxisFmt = false;
        bool hasCurrencyAxisFmt = false;
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line);
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            if (legendRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
                hasLegendText = true;
                legendLineCount += 1;
            }
            if (looksNumericAxisLabel(text)) {
                numericAxisLabelCount += 1;
                hasPercentAxisFmt = hasPercentAxisFmt || text.contains('%');
                hasCurrencyAxisFmt = hasCurrencyAxisFmt
                    || text.contains(QStringLiteral("$"))
                    || text.contains(QStringLiteral("￥"))
                    || text.contains(QStringLiteral("¥"));
                const double centerX = static_cast<double>(line.x) + static_cast<double>(line.w) * 0.5;
                if (centerX < static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.24) {
                    leftNumericLabels += 1;
                } else if (centerX > static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.76) {
                    rightNumericLabels += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        const bool dualAxisCandidate = leftNumericLabels >= 2 && rightNumericLabels >= 2;
        const bool complexWorksheetObject = dualAxisCandidate || (lineCount >= 3 && rectCount >= 4);
        if (!complexWorksheetObject) {
            continue;
        }
        complexWorksheetObjectSheets += 1;
        const int distinctSeriesColorCount = seriesColors.size();
        const bool axisFormatSignal = hasPercentAxisFmt || hasCurrencyAxisFmt || numericAxisLabelCount >= 3;
        const bool seriesSignal = distinctSeriesColorCount >= 2;
        const bool axisBindingSignal = dualAxisCandidate
            ? (seriesSignal && hasLegendText && leftNumericLabels >= 2 && rightNumericLabels >= 2)
            : (seriesSignal && hasLegendText && leftNumericLabels >= 2);
        const bool legendSeriesConsistent = hasLegendText
            && legendLineCount >= 1
            && legendLineCount <= qMax(1, distinctSeriesColorCount + 1);
        int expectedFields = dualAxisCandidate ? 6 : 5;
        int hitFields = 0;
        hitFields += hasLegendText ? 1 : 0;
        hitFields += axisFormatSignal ? 1 : 0;
        hitFields += seriesSignal ? 1 : 0;
        hitFields += axisBindingSignal ? 1 : 0;
        hitFields += legendSeriesConsistent ? 1 : 0;
        if (dualAxisCandidate) {
            hitFields += rightNumericLabels >= 2 ? 1 : 0;
        }
        const int completeness = (hitFields * 100) / qMax(1, expectedFields);
        complexWorksheetCompletenessSum += completeness;
        if (completeness < 60) {
            complexWorksheetHardFailSheets += 1;
        }
        int axisBindingQuality = 0;
        const int axisBindingCandidates = qMax(legendLineCount, distinctSeriesColorCount);
        if (axisBindingCandidates > 0) {
            axisBindingQuality = (qMin(legendLineCount, distinctSeriesColorCount) * 100) / axisBindingCandidates;
        }
        axisBindingQualitySum += axisBindingQuality;
        if (axisBindingQuality < 60) {
            axisBindingHardFailSheets += 1;
        }
    }
    const int complexWorksheetFieldCompleteness = complexWorksheetObjectSheets > 0
        ? (complexWorksheetCompletenessSum / complexWorksheetObjectSheets)
        : 100;
    const int axisBindingMatchQuality = complexWorksheetObjectSheets > 0
        ? (axisBindingQualitySum / complexWorksheetObjectSheets)
        : 100;
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.tableCount=%1").arg(structure.tables.size()));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.cellCoverage=%1%%").arg(coverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.headerCells=%1").arg(tableHeaderCells));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.bodyCells=%1").arg(tableBodyCells));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.headerBodyRatio=%1%%").arg(headerBodyRatio));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.denseTableCount=%1").arg(denseTableCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.sparseTableCount=%1").arg(sparseTableCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.chartLikeSheets=%1").arg(chartLikeSheets));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.complexWorksheetObjectSheets=%1").arg(complexWorksheetObjectSheets));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.complexWorksheetFieldCompleteness=%1%%").arg(complexWorksheetFieldCompleteness));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.complexWorksheetHardFailSheets=%1").arg(complexWorksheetHardFailSheets));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.axisBindingMatchQuality=%1%%").arg(axisBindingMatchQuality));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("excel.axisBindingHardFailSheets=%1").arg(axisBindingHardFailSheets));
    if (coverage < 60) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 表格单元有效覆盖率过低（<60%）"));
    }
    if (structure.tables.size() >= 2 && denseTableCount == 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 多表页结构稀疏，无法稳定复刻结构化工作表"));
    }
    if (tableBodyCells >= 12 && tableHeaderCells == 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 未识别表头字段，列语义复刻风险高"));
    }
    if (complexWorksheetObjectSheets > 0
        && (complexWorksheetFieldCompleteness < 70 || complexWorksheetHardFailSheets > 0)) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 复杂工作表对象字段完整度硬门禁未通过（完整度<70% 或存在<60%页面）"));
    }
    if (complexWorksheetObjectSheets > 0
        && (axisBindingMatchQuality < 65 || axisBindingHardFailSheets > 0)) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 序列轴绑定匹配质量硬门禁未通过（质量<65% 或存在<60%页面）"));
    }
    if (coverage < 55) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("Excel 表格单元有效覆盖率偏低（<55%）"));
    }
}

QString mergeLineText(const TextLine &line) {
    QString text;
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString token = span.text.simplified();
        if (token.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            text += QChar(' ');
        }
        text += token;
    }
    return text.trimmed();
}

bool looksNumericAxisLabel(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression numericRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^[+-]?\d{1,4}([,\.]\d{1,4})?\s*%?$)")
    );
    return numericRe.match(text.trimmed()).hasMatch();
}

QString normalizedColorKey(QString color) {
    color = color.trimmed().toLower();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.isEmpty()) {
        return QStringLiteral("auto");
    }
    return color.left(8);
}

QString normalizedFontFamilyKey(QString family) {
    family = family.trimmed();
    if ((family.startsWith('"') && family.endsWith('"'))
        || (family.startsWith('\'') && family.endsWith('\''))) {
        family = family.mid(1, family.size() - 2);
    }
    family = family.simplified().toLower();
    family.remove(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"([\s\-_])")));
    return family;
}

QString normalizedHex6Color(QString color) {
    color = color.trimmed();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.size() == 8) {
        color = color.mid(2);
    }
    color = color.toUpper();
    static const QRegularExpression hex6Re(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-F]{6}$)"));
    if (!hex6Re.match(color).hasMatch()) {
        return QString();
    }
    return color;
}

bool parseHex6Rgb(const QString &hex6, int &r, int &g, int &b) {
    if (hex6.size() != 6) {
        return false;
    }
    bool okR = false;
    bool okG = false;
    bool okB = false;
    r = hex6.mid(0, 2).toInt(&okR, 16);
    g = hex6.mid(2, 2).toInt(&okG, 16);
    b = hex6.mid(4, 2).toInt(&okB, 16);
    return okR && okG && okB;
}

bool looksNeutralThemeColor(const QString &hex6) {
    int r = 0;
    int g = 0;
    int b = 0;
    if (!parseHex6Rgb(hex6, r, g, b)) {
        return true;
    }
    const int maxC = qMax(r, qMax(g, b));
    const int minC = qMin(r, qMin(g, b));
    const int chroma = maxC - minC;
    const int luminance = static_cast<int>(0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b);
    return chroma < 14 || luminance < 20 || luminance > 245;
}

struct PptSmartArtEvidence {
    bool candidate = false;
    bool nonLinear = false;
    int nodeCount = 0;
    int connectorCount = 0;
    int branchingNodeCount = 0;
};

PptSmartArtEvidence analyzePptSmartArtEvidence(const PageContent &page) {
    PptSmartArtEvidence out;
    QVector<QRectF> nodeRects;
    QVector<QLineF> connectors;
    const double minW = qMax(8.0, static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.035);
    const double minH = qMax(8.0, static_cast<double>(page.height) * 0.028);
    const double minLineLen = qMax(8.0, static_cast<double>(qMin(page.width, page.height)) * 0.025);
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground) {
            continue;
        }
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            const QRectF rect(
                static_cast<double>(g.x),
                static_cast<double>(g.y),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w)),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h))
            );
            if (rect.width() >= minW && rect.height() >= minH) {
                nodeRects.push_back(rect);
            }
        } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
            const QLineF line(
                QPointF(static_cast<double>(g.x), static_cast<double>(g.y)),
                QPointF(static_cast<double>(g.x2), static_cast<double>(g.y2))
            );
            if (line.length() >= minLineLen) {
                connectors.push_back(line);
            }
        }
    }
    out.nodeCount = nodeRects.size();
    out.connectorCount = connectors.size();
    out.candidate = out.nodeCount >= 3 && out.connectorCount >= 2;
    if (!out.candidate) {
        return out;
    }
    std::sort(nodeRects.begin(), nodeRects.end(), [](const QRectF &a, const QRectF &b) {
        if (qAbs(a.top() - b.top()) > 6.0) {
            return a.top() < b.top();
        }
        return a.left() < b.left();
    });
    QVector<QPointF> centers;
    centers.reserve(nodeRects.size());
    for (const QRectF &rect : nodeRects) {
        centers.push_back(rect.center());
    }
    QVector<int> childCount(nodeRects.size(), 0);
    for (int i = 1; i < centers.size(); ++i) {
        int bestParent = -1;
        double bestScore = 1e18;
        for (int p = 0; p < i; ++p) {
            if (centers[p].y() > centers[i].y() + qMax(6.0, nodeRects[i].height() * 0.2)) {
                continue;
            }
            const double dx = qAbs(centers[p].x() - centers[i].x());
            const double dy = qAbs(centers[p].y() - centers[i].y());
            const double score = dy * 2.0 + dx;
            if (score < bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestParent = p;
            }
        }
        if (bestParent < 0) {
            bestParent = i - 1;
        }
        childCount[bestParent] += 1;
    }
    for (const int count : childCount) {
        if (count > 1) {
            out.branchingNodeCount += 1;
        }
    }
    out.nonLinear = out.branchingNodeCount > 0;
    return out;
}

void applyPptChecks(const DocumentModel &document, const UnifiedStructureDocument &structure, SemanticFidelityReport &report) {
    if (structure.regions.size() < 2) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 版面区域过少，无法可靠恢复对象层级"));
    }
    int figureRegions = 0;
    int tableRegions = 0;
    QHash<int, int> figureRegionByPage;
    QHash<int, int> tableRegionByPage;
    for (const LayoutRegion &region : structure.regions) {
        if (region.kind == RegionKind::FigureBlock) {
            figureRegions += 1;
            figureRegionByPage[region.page] += 1;
        } else if (region.kind == RegionKind::TableBlock) {
            tableRegions += 1;
            tableRegionByPage[region.page] += 1;
        }
    }
    const int unknown = countUnknownRoles(structure);
    const int total = qMax(1, structure.readingNodes.size());
    const int objectRegions = figureRegions + tableRegions;
    const int objectCoverage = (objectRegions * 100) / qMax(1, structure.regions.size());
    int chartLikePages = 0;
    int dualAxisSignalPages = 0;
    int objectCandidatePages = 0;
    int objectFieldCoveredPages = 0;
    int complexChartPages = 0;
    int complexChartCompletenessSum = 0;
    int complexChartHardFailPages = 0;
    int axisBindingQualitySum = 0;
    int axisBindingHardFailPages = 0;
    int themeColorSlotHitCount = 0;
    int themeColorSlotHitRate = 0;
    int fontSchemeHitRate = 0;
    int placeholderExpectedTotal = 0;
    int placeholderMatchedTotal = 0;
    int placeholderLayoutPageCount = 0;
    int placeholderLayoutMatchedPages = 0;
    int placeholderLayoutHardFailPages = 0;
    int smartArtCandidatePages = 0;
    int smartArtNonLinearPages = 0;
    QSet<QString> expectedLayoutFamilies;
    QSet<QString> matchedLayoutFamilies;
    QHash<int, int> nonEmptyTableCellsByPage;
    QHash<int, int> titleLikeNodeCountByPage;
    QHash<int, int> bodyLikeNodeCountByPage;
    QHash<QString, int> themeColorFreq;
    QHash<QString, int> fontFreq;
    QHash<QString, int> titleBandFontFreq;
    QHash<QString, int> bodyBandFontFreq;
    int titleBandSpanCount = 0;
    int bodyBandSpanCount = 0;
    for (const ReadingNode &node : structure.readingNodes) {
        if (node.page < 1) {
            continue;
        }
        if (node.role == SemanticRole::Title
            || node.role == SemanticRole::Subtitle
            || node.role == SemanticRole::Heading1
            || node.role == SemanticRole::Heading2
            || node.role == SemanticRole::Heading3) {
            titleLikeNodeCountByPage[node.page] += 1;
        }
        if (node.role == SemanticRole::Paragraph
            || node.role == SemanticRole::ListItem
            || node.role == SemanticRole::TableBody) {
            bodyLikeNodeCountByPage[node.page] += 1;
        }
    }
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                const QString fontKey = normalizedFontFamilyKey(span.fontFamily);
                if (!fontKey.isEmpty()) {
                    const int weight = qMax(1, span.text.trimmed().size());
                    fontFreq[fontKey] += weight;
                    const double centerY = static_cast<double>(line.y) + static_cast<double>(line.h) * 0.5;
                    if (centerY <= static_cast<double>(page.height) * 0.30) {
                        titleBandFontFreq[fontKey] += weight;
                        titleBandSpanCount += 1;
                    } else {
                        bodyBandFontFreq[fontKey] += weight;
                        bodyBandSpanCount += 1;
                    }
                }
                const QString color = normalizedHex6Color(span.color);
                if (color.isEmpty() || looksNeutralThemeColor(color)) {
                    continue;
                }
                themeColorFreq[color] += 1;
            }
        }
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString fill = normalizedHex6Color(g.fillColor);
            if (!fill.isEmpty() && !looksNeutralThemeColor(fill)) {
                themeColorFreq[fill] += 1;
            }
            const QString stroke = normalizedHex6Color(g.strokeColor);
            if (!stroke.isEmpty() && !looksNeutralThemeColor(stroke)) {
                themeColorFreq[stroke] += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    auto dominantKeyByWeight = [](const QHash<QString, int> &freq, const QString &exclude) {
        QString bestKey;
        int bestWeight = 0;
        for (auto it = freq.constBegin(); it != freq.constEnd(); ++it) {
            if (!exclude.isEmpty() && it.key() == exclude) {
                continue;
            }
            if (it.value() > bestWeight) {
                bestWeight = it.value();
                bestKey = it.key();
            }
        }
        return bestKey;
    };
    auto totalWeight = [](const QHash<QString, int> &freq) {
        int total = 0;
        for (auto it = freq.constBegin(); it != freq.constEnd(); ++it) {
            total += qMax(0, it.value());
        }
        return total;
    };
    const QString majorFontKey = dominantKeyByWeight(titleBandFontFreq, QString());
    QString minorFontKey = dominantKeyByWeight(bodyBandFontFreq, majorFontKey);
    if (minorFontKey.isEmpty()) {
        minorFontKey = dominantKeyByWeight(fontFreq, majorFontKey);
    }
    const int titleBandTotalWeight = qMax(1, totalWeight(titleBandFontFreq));
    const int bodyBandTotalWeight = qMax(1, totalWeight(bodyBandFontFreq));
    const int majorInTitleWeight = titleBandFontFreq.value(majorFontKey, 0);
    const int minorInBodyWeight = bodyBandFontFreq.value(minorFontKey, 0);
    const int majorTitleAlignment = (majorInTitleWeight * 100) / titleBandTotalWeight;
    const int minorBodyAlignment = (minorInBodyWeight * 100) / bodyBandTotalWeight;
    int fontSchemeHits = 0;
    int fontSchemeExpected = 4;
    fontSchemeHits += !majorFontKey.isEmpty() ? 1 : 0;
    fontSchemeHits += !minorFontKey.isEmpty() && minorFontKey != majorFontKey ? 1 : 0;
    fontSchemeHits += titleBandSpanCount > 0 && majorTitleAlignment >= 55 ? 1 : 0;
    fontSchemeHits += bodyBandSpanCount > 0 && minorBodyAlignment >= 40 ? 1 : 0;
    fontSchemeHitRate = (fontSchemeHits * 100) / qMax(1, fontSchemeExpected);
    QVector<QPair<QString, int>> rankedThemeColors;
    rankedThemeColors.reserve(themeColorFreq.size());
    for (auto it = themeColorFreq.constBegin(); it != themeColorFreq.constEnd(); ++it) {
        rankedThemeColors.push_back(qMakePair(it.key(), it.value()));
    }
    std::sort(rankedThemeColors.begin(), rankedThemeColors.end(), [](const QPair<QString, int> &a, const QPair<QString, int> &b) {
        if (a.second != b.second) {
            return a.second > b.second;
        }
        return a.first < b.first;
    });
    themeColorSlotHitCount = qMin(6, rankedThemeColors.size());
    themeColorSlotHitRate = (themeColorSlotHitCount * 100) / 6;
    for (const UnifiedTable &table : structure.tables) {
        int nonEmptyCells = 0;
        for (const UnifiedTableCell &cell : table.cells) {
            if (!cell.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                nonEmptyCells += 1;
            }
        }
        nonEmptyTableCellsByPage[table.page] += nonEmptyCells;
    }
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        int rectCount = 0;
        int lineCount = 0;
        bool hasRasterImage = false;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                rectCount += 1;
            } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
                lineCount += 1;
            } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                hasRasterImage = true;
            }
        }
        const PptSmartArtEvidence smartArtEvidence = analyzePptSmartArtEvidence(page);
        if (smartArtEvidence.candidate) {
            smartArtCandidatePages += 1;
            if (smartArtEvidence.nonLinear) {
                smartArtNonLinearPages += 1;
            }
        }
        const bool chartLike = rectCount >= 3 && lineCount >= 2;
        if (chartLike) {
            chartLikePages += 1;
        }
        const int pageNo = page.pageIndex + 1;
        const bool hasObjectRegion = chartLike
            || figureRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0
            || tableRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0;
        const bool expectedTitlePlaceholder = !page.lines.isEmpty();
        const bool expectedChartPlaceholder = chartLike;
        const bool expectedTablePlaceholder = tableRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0;
        const bool expectedSmartArtPlaceholder = smartArtEvidence.candidate;
        const bool expectedPicturePlaceholder = hasRasterImage;
        const bool expectedBodyPlaceholder = !expectedChartPlaceholder
            && !expectedTablePlaceholder
            && !expectedSmartArtPlaceholder
            && !expectedPicturePlaceholder
            && page.lines.size() >= 2;
        const bool matchedTitlePlaceholder = titleLikeNodeCountByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0;
        const bool matchedBodyPlaceholder = bodyLikeNodeCountByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0;
        if (!hasObjectRegion) {
            placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedTitlePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedBodyPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedChartPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedTablePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedSmartArtPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedPicturePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderMatchedTotal += expectedTitlePlaceholder && matchedTitlePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderMatchedTotal += expectedBodyPlaceholder && matchedBodyPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
            placeholderMatchedTotal += expectedPicturePlaceholder && figureRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0 ? 1 : 0;
            continue;
        }
        objectCandidatePages += 1;
        int signalCount = 0;
        int numericAxisLabelCount = 0;
        int leftNumericLabels = 0;
        int rightNumericLabels = 0;
        bool hasLegendText = false;
        int legendLineCount = 0;
        bool hasPercentAxisFmt = false;
        bool hasCurrencyAxisFmt = false;
        static const QRegularExpression legendRe(
            QStringLiteral(R"((系列|Series|同比|环比|目标|实际|预算|预测|Q[1-4]|[A-Za-z]+\s*\d*))"),
            QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
        );
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line);
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            if (legendRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
                hasLegendText = true;
                legendLineCount += 1;
            }
            if (looksNumericAxisLabel(text)) {
                numericAxisLabelCount += 1;
                hasPercentAxisFmt = hasPercentAxisFmt || text.contains('%');
                hasCurrencyAxisFmt = hasCurrencyAxisFmt
                    || text.contains(QStringLiteral("$"))
                    || text.contains(QStringLiteral("￥"))
                    || text.contains(QStringLiteral("¥"));
                const double centerX = static_cast<double>(line.x) + static_cast<double>(line.w) * 0.5;
                if (centerX < static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.24) {
                    leftNumericLabels += 1;
                } else if (centerX > static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.76) {
                    rightNumericLabels += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        if (chartLike && hasLegendText && numericAxisLabelCount >= 2) {
            signalCount += 1;
        }
        if (chartLike && figureRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0) {
            signalCount += 1;
        }
        if (tableRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0 && nonEmptyTableCellsByPage.value(pageNo, 0) >= 4) {
            signalCount += 1;
        }
        if (leftNumericLabels >= 2 && rightNumericLabels >= 2) {
            dualAxisSignalPages += 1;
            signalCount += 1;
        }
        int distinctSeriesColorCount = 0;
        int axisBindingQuality = 0;
        {
            QSet<QString> colors;
            for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
                if (g.isBackground || g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QString color = !g.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? g.fillColor : g.strokeColor;
                colors.insert(normalizedColorKey(color));
            }
            distinctSeriesColorCount = colors.size();
        }
        {
            QVector<QRectF> plotRects;
            for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
                if (g.isBackground || g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QRectF r(
                    static_cast<double>(g.x),
                    static_cast<double>(g.y),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w)),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h))
                );
                if (r.width() < static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.015
                    || r.height() < static_cast<double>(page.height) * 0.015) {
                    continue;
                }
                plotRects.push_back(r);
            }
            if (!plotRects.isEmpty()) {
                QRectF plotRect = plotRects.first();
                for (int i = 1; i < plotRects.size(); ++i) {
                    plotRect = plotRect.united(plotRects[i]);
                }
                const QRectF legendRect(
                    plotRect.right() + qMax(4.0, plotRect.width() * 0.02),
                    plotRect.top() - qMax(4.0, plotRect.height() * 0.1),
                    qMax(20.0, plotRect.width() * 0.45),
                    plotRect.height() + qMax(8.0, plotRect.height() * 0.2)
                );
                QSet<QString> seriesColors;
                struct MarkerSample {
                    double cy = 0.0;
                    QString color;
                };
                QVector<MarkerSample> markerSamples;
                for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
                    if (g.isBackground || g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    const QRectF r(
                        static_cast<double>(g.x),
                        static_cast<double>(g.y),
                        qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w)),
                        qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h))
                    );
                    const QString color = normalizedColorKey(!g.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? g.fillColor : g.strokeColor);
                    if (plotRect.intersects(r) && r.width() >= 4.0 && r.height() >= 4.0) {
                        seriesColors.insert(color);
                    }
                    if (!legendRect.intersects(r)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    if (r.width() > legendRect.width() * 0.35 || r.height() > legendRect.height() * 0.18) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    markerSamples.push_back({r.center().y(), color});
                }
                QVector<double> legendTextY;
                for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
                    const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
                    if (text.isEmpty() || !legendRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    const QRectF tRect(
                        static_cast<double>(line.x),
                        static_cast<double>(line.y),
                        qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.w)),
                        qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.h))
                    );
                    if (legendRect.intersects(tRect)) {
                        legendTextY.push_back(tRect.center().y());
                    }
                }
                std::sort(markerSamples.begin(), markerSamples.end(), [](const MarkerSample &a, const MarkerSample &b) {
                    return a.cy < b.cy;
                });
                std::sort(legendTextY.begin(), legendTextY.end());
                QSet<int> usedMarker;
                int matchedColorPairs = 0;
                for (const double textY : legendTextY) {
                    int bestMarker = -1;
                    double bestDist = 1e12;
                    for (int i = 0; i < markerSamples.size(); ++i) {
                        if (usedMarker.contains(i)) {
                            continue;
                        }
                        const double dist = qAbs(markerSamples[i].cy - textY);
                        if (dist < bestDist) {
                            bestDist = dist;
                            bestMarker = i;
                        }
                    }
                    if (bestMarker >= 0) {
                        usedMarker.insert(bestMarker);
                        if (seriesColors.contains(markerSamples[bestMarker].color)) {
                            matchedColorPairs += 1;
                        }
                    }
                }
                const int candidatePairs = qMin(seriesColors.size(), qMin(markerSamples.size(), legendTextY.size()));
                if (candidatePairs > 0) {
                    axisBindingQuality = (matchedColorPairs * 100) / candidatePairs;
                }
            }
        }
        const bool dualAxisCandidate = leftNumericLabels >= 2 && rightNumericLabels >= 2;
        const bool complexChartPage = chartLike && (dualAxisCandidate || (lineCount >= 3 && rectCount >= 4));
        if (complexChartPage) {
            complexChartPages += 1;
            const bool axisFormatSignal = hasPercentAxisFmt || hasCurrencyAxisFmt || numericAxisLabelCount >= 3;
            const bool seriesSignal = distinctSeriesColorCount >= 2;
            const bool axisBindingSignal = dualAxisCandidate
                ? (seriesSignal && hasLegendText && leftNumericLabels >= 2 && rightNumericLabels >= 2)
                : (seriesSignal && hasLegendText && leftNumericLabels >= 2);
            const bool legendSeriesConsistent = hasLegendText
                && legendLineCount >= 1
                && legendLineCount <= qMax(1, distinctSeriesColorCount + 1);
            int expectedFields = dualAxisCandidate ? 6 : 5;
            int hitFields = 0;
            hitFields += hasLegendText ? 1 : 0;
            hitFields += axisFormatSignal ? 1 : 0;
            hitFields += seriesSignal ? 1 : 0;
            hitFields += axisBindingSignal ? 1 : 0;
            hitFields += legendSeriesConsistent ? 1 : 0;
            if (dualAxisCandidate) {
                hitFields += rightNumericLabels >= 2 ? 1 : 0;
            }
            const int completeness = (hitFields * 100) / qMax(1, expectedFields);
            complexChartCompletenessSum += completeness;
            if (completeness < 60) {
                complexChartHardFailPages += 1;
            }
            axisBindingQualitySum += axisBindingQuality;
            if (axisBindingQuality < 60) {
                axisBindingHardFailPages += 1;
            }
        }
        if (signalCount >= 2) {
            objectFieldCoveredPages += 1;
        }
        const bool matchedChartPlaceholder = expectedChartPlaceholder
            && chartLike
            && hasLegendText
            && numericAxisLabelCount >= 2
            && figureRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0;
        const bool matchedTablePlaceholder = expectedTablePlaceholder
            && nonEmptyTableCellsByPage.value(pageNo, 0) >= 4;
        const bool matchedSmartArtPlaceholder = expectedSmartArtPlaceholder
            && smartArtEvidence.nodeCount >= 3
            && smartArtEvidence.connectorCount >= 2
            && smartArtEvidence.nonLinear;
        const bool matchedPicturePlaceholder = expectedPicturePlaceholder
            && figureRegionByPage.value(pageNo, 0) > 0;
        auto buildLayoutKey = [](
            const bool title,
            const bool body,
            const bool chart,
            const bool table,
            const bool smartart,
            const bool picture
        ) {
            QStringList keys;
            if (title) keys.push_back(QStringLiteral("title"));
            if (body) keys.push_back(QStringLiteral("body"));
            if (chart) keys.push_back(QStringLiteral("chart"));
            if (table) keys.push_back(QStringLiteral("table"));
            if (smartart) keys.push_back(QStringLiteral("smartart"));
            if (picture) keys.push_back(QStringLiteral("picture"));
            if (keys.isEmpty()) {
                return QStringLiteral("blank");
            }
            return keys.join(QStringLiteral("+"));
        };
        const QString expectedLayoutKey = buildLayoutKey(
            expectedTitlePlaceholder,
            expectedBodyPlaceholder,
            expectedChartPlaceholder,
            expectedTablePlaceholder,
            expectedSmartArtPlaceholder,
            expectedPicturePlaceholder
        );
        const QString matchedLayoutKey = buildLayoutKey(
            matchedTitlePlaceholder,
            matchedBodyPlaceholder,
            matchedChartPlaceholder,
            matchedTablePlaceholder,
            matchedSmartArtPlaceholder,
            matchedPicturePlaceholder
        );
        const int expectedPlaceholderCount = (expectedTitlePlaceholder ? 1 : 0)
            + (expectedBodyPlaceholder ? 1 : 0)
            + (expectedChartPlaceholder ? 1 : 0)
            + (expectedTablePlaceholder ? 1 : 0)
            + (expectedSmartArtPlaceholder ? 1 : 0)
            + (expectedPicturePlaceholder ? 1 : 0);
        const bool objectLayoutPage = expectedChartPlaceholder
            || expectedTablePlaceholder
            || expectedSmartArtPlaceholder
            || expectedPicturePlaceholder;
        if (expectedPlaceholderCount >= 2 || objectLayoutPage) {
            placeholderLayoutPageCount += 1;
            expectedLayoutFamilies.insert(expectedLayoutKey);
            matchedLayoutFamilies.insert(matchedLayoutKey);
            if (expectedLayoutKey == matchedLayoutKey) {
                placeholderLayoutMatchedPages += 1;
            } else if (objectLayoutPage) {
                placeholderLayoutHardFailPages += 1;
            }
        }
        placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedTitlePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedBodyPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedChartPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedTablePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedSmartArtPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderExpectedTotal += expectedPicturePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderMatchedTotal += expectedTitlePlaceholder && matchedTitlePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderMatchedTotal += expectedBodyPlaceholder && matchedBodyPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderMatchedTotal += matchedChartPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderMatchedTotal += matchedTablePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderMatchedTotal += matchedSmartArtPlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
        placeholderMatchedTotal += matchedPicturePlaceholder ? 1 : 0;
    }
    const int objectFieldCoverage = objectCandidatePages > 0
        ? (objectFieldCoveredPages * 100) / objectCandidatePages
        : 0;
    const int complexChartFieldCompleteness = complexChartPages > 0
        ? (complexChartCompletenessSum / complexChartPages)
        : 100;
    const int axisBindingMatchQuality = complexChartPages > 0
        ? (axisBindingQualitySum / complexChartPages)
        : 100;
    const int placeholderCoverage = placeholderExpectedTotal > 0
        ? (placeholderMatchedTotal * 100) / placeholderExpectedTotal
        : 100;
    int layoutFamilyHit = 0;
    for (const QString &key : expectedLayoutFamilies) {
        if (matchedLayoutFamilies.contains(key)) {
            layoutFamilyHit += 1;
        }
    }
    const int placeholderLayoutConsistency = placeholderLayoutPageCount > 0
        ? (placeholderLayoutMatchedPages * 100) / placeholderLayoutPageCount
        : 100;
    const int placeholderLayoutFamilyCoverage = expectedLayoutFamilies.isEmpty()
        ? 100
        : (layoutFamilyHit * 100) / expectedLayoutFamilies.size();
    const int smartArtNonLinearRatio = smartArtCandidatePages > 0
        ? (smartArtNonLinearPages * 100) / smartArtCandidatePages
        : 100;
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.regionCount=%1").arg(structure.regions.size()));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.figureRegions=%1").arg(figureRegions));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.tableRegions=%1").arg(tableRegions));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.objectRegionCoverage=%1%%").arg(objectCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.chartLikePages=%1").arg(chartLikePages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.dualAxisSignalPages=%1").arg(dualAxisSignalPages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.objectFieldCoverage=%1%%").arg(objectFieldCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.complexChartPages=%1").arg(complexChartPages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.complexChartFieldCompleteness=%1%%").arg(complexChartFieldCompleteness));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.complexChartHardFailPages=%1").arg(complexChartHardFailPages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.axisBindingMatchQuality=%1%%").arg(axisBindingMatchQuality));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.axisBindingHardFailPages=%1").arg(axisBindingHardFailPages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.themeColorSlotHitCount=%1/6").arg(themeColorSlotHitCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.themeColorSlotHitRate=%1%%").arg(themeColorSlotHitRate));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.fontSchemeHitRate=%1%%").arg(fontSchemeHitRate));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.fontMajorTitleAlign=%1%%").arg(majorTitleAlignment));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.fontMinorBodyAlign=%1%%").arg(minorBodyAlignment));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.placeholderCoverage=%1%%").arg(placeholderCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.placeholderExpected=%1").arg(placeholderExpectedTotal));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.placeholderMatched=%1").arg(placeholderMatchedTotal));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.placeholderLayoutPageCount=%1").arg(placeholderLayoutPageCount));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.placeholderLayoutConsistency=%1%%").arg(placeholderLayoutConsistency));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.placeholderLayoutHardFailPages=%1").arg(placeholderLayoutHardFailPages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.layoutFamilyExpected=%1").arg(expectedLayoutFamilies.size()));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.layoutFamilyMatched=%1").arg(layoutFamilyHit));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.layoutFamilyCoverage=%1%%").arg(placeholderLayoutFamilyCoverage));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.smartArtCandidatePages=%1").arg(smartArtCandidatePages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.smartArtNonLinearPages=%1").arg(smartArtNonLinearPages));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.smartArtNonLinearRatio=%1%%").arg(smartArtNonLinearRatio));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("ppt.unknownRoleRatio=%1%%").arg((unknown * 100) / total));
    if (unknown * 100 / total > 45) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 语义角色未知比例过高（>45%）"));
    }
    if (objectCoverage < 25 && structure.readingNodes.size() > 12) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 对象区域覆盖率过低（<25%），无法可靠复刻图形对象"));
    }
    if (objectCandidatePages >= 2 && objectFieldCoverage < 40) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 对象字段证据覆盖率过低（<40%），复杂图表/SmartArt 复刻风险高"));
    }
    if (dualAxisSignalPages > 0 && objectFieldCoverage < 55) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("检测到双轴信号页，但对象字段证据覆盖不足（<55%）"));
    }
    if (complexChartPages > 0 && (complexChartFieldCompleteness < 70 || complexChartHardFailPages > 0)) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 复杂图页字段完整度硬门禁未通过（完整度<70% 或存在<60%页面）"));
    }
    if (complexChartPages > 0 && (axisBindingMatchQuality < 65 || axisBindingHardFailPages > 0)) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 序列轴绑定匹配质量硬门禁未通过（质量<65% 或存在<60%页面）"));
    }
    if (document.pages().size() >= 3 && themeColorSlotHitRate < 50) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT theme 色槽命中率硬门禁未通过（<50%，至少命中 3/6）"));
    }
    if (document.pages().size() >= 3 && fontSchemeHitRate < 60) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 字体方案命中率硬门禁未通过（<60%，major/minor 证据不足）"));
    }
    if (placeholderExpectedTotal >= 6 && placeholderCoverage < 65) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT placeholder 覆盖率硬门禁未通过（<65%）"));
    }
    if (placeholderLayoutPageCount >= 3 && placeholderLayoutConsistency < 75) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 布局-占位符继承一致性硬门禁未通过（每页全量一致性<75%）"));
    }
    if (placeholderLayoutHardFailPages > 0) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 布局-占位符继承链硬门禁未通过（存在对象页断链）"));
    }
    if (expectedLayoutFamilies.size() >= 2 && placeholderLayoutFamilyCoverage < 70) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 多 master/layout 族覆盖硬门禁未通过（布局族命中<70%）"));
    }
    if (smartArtCandidatePages > 0 && smartArtNonLinearRatio < 35) {
        report.blockers.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT SmartArt 关系非线性比硬门禁未通过（<35%）"));
    }
    if (tableRegions > 0 && structure.tables.isEmpty()) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("检测到 PPT 表格区域，但未抽取到结构化表格单元"));
    }
    if (figureRegions == 0 && tableRegions == 0 && structure.readingNodes.size() > 20) {
        report.warnings.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT 未识别图形/表格区域，复杂对象保真风险高"));
    }
}

} // namespace

SemanticFidelityReport SemanticFidelityGate::evaluate(
    const OutputFormat format,
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const UnifiedStructureDocument &structure
) const {
    SemanticFidelityReport report;
    report.score = 100;
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("common.pages=%1").arg(document.pages().size()));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("common.nodes=%1").arg(structure.readingNodes.size()));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("common.regions=%1").arg(structure.regions.size()));
    report.metrics.push_back(QStringLiteral("common.tables=%1").arg(structure.tables.size()));
    applyCommonChecks(document, structure, report);
    applyTypographyConsistencyChecks(document, report);
    switch (format) {
    case OutputFormat::Docx:
        applyWordChecks(document, structure, report);
        break;
    case OutputFormat::Xlsx:
        applyExcelChecks(document, structure, report);
        break;
    case OutputFormat::Pptx:
        applyPptChecks(document, structure, report);
        break;
    }

    report.score -= report.blockers.size() * 25;
    report.score -= report.warnings.size() * 8;
    report.score = qBound(0, report.score, 100);
    report.pass = report.blockers.isEmpty() && report.score >= 70;
    return report;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/domain/quality/SemanticFidelityGate.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QStringList>

#include "core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h"
#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.h"

namespace converter {

struct SemanticFidelityReport {
    bool pass = false;
    int score = 0;
    QStringList blockers;
    QStringList warnings;
    QStringList metrics;
};

class SemanticFidelityGate final {
public:
    SemanticFidelityReport evaluate(
        OutputFormat format,
        const DocumentModel &document,
        const UnifiedStructureDocument &structure
    ) const;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/excel/README.md
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Excel Module

`src/core/excel` 用于承载 XLSX 专属识别、映射、导出实现。

当前状态：
- 已新增 `XlsxExporter` 类型声明：`XlsxExporter.h`。
- 导出注册中心接口已迁移到 `core/common/export`。
- 后续将继续把 XLSX OOXML 细分实现从共享实现体中继续拆出到 `excel` 目录。

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/excel/XlsxExporter.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/excel/XlsxExporter.h"

#include <QtGlobal>

#include "core/excel/XlsxNativeKernel.h"

namespace converter {

OutputFormat XlsxExporter::format() const {
    return OutputFormat::Xlsx;
}

bool XlsxExporter::exportDocument(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const QString &targetPath,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    QStringList &traceLogs
) const {
    Q_UNUSED(executor);
    if (exportExcelXlsxNative(document, targetPath, traceLogs)) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("XLSX 已走原生 OOXML 导出引擎"));
        return true;
    }
    traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("XLSX 导出失败：原生 OOXML 导出失败且不允许回退"));
    return false;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

public:
    OutputFormat format() const override;
    bool exportDocument(
        const DocumentModel &document,
        const QString &targetPath,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        QStringList &traceLogs
    ) const override;
};
