📄  pdf-master/src/core/excel/XlsxNativeKernel.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/excel/XlsxNativeKernel.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/ooxml/NativeOoxmlExportKernel.h"

#include <algorithm>

namespace converter {

namespace {


using converter::ooxml::escapeXml;
using converter::ooxml::writePackagePart;
using converter::ooxml::zipDirectoryToFile;
using converter::ooxml::buildEmbeddedWorkbookForChart;
using converter::ooxml::xlsxColumnNameFromIndex;
using converter::ooxml::xlsxCellRef;

bool looksLikePercent(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeCurrency(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeDate(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeNumber(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeScientific(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(const QString &text);
QString colorOrDefault(const QString &value, const QString &fallback);

bool looksLikePercent(const QString &text) {
    return text.contains('%');
}

bool looksLikeCurrency(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression currencyRe(QStringLiteral(R"(([¥￥$€£]|USD|CNY|RMB|EUR|GBP))"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption);
    return currencyRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeDate(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression dateRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*(\d{4}[-/\.]\d{1,2}[-/\.]\d{1,2}|\d{1,2}[-/\.]\d{1,2}([-/\.]\d{2,4})?)\s*$)")
    );
    return dateRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeScientific(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression sciRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[+-]?\d+(\.\d+)?[eE][+-]?\d+\s*$)"));
    return sciRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeNumber(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression numberRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[+-]?(\d+(\.\d+)?|\.\d+)\s*$)"));
    return numberRe.match(text).hasMatch() || looksLikeScientific(text);
}

bool looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(const QString &text) {
    const QString upper = text.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (!upper.startsWith('=')) {
        return false;
    }
    return upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SEQUENCE("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("FILTER("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("UNIQUE("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SORT("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SORTBY("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("RANDARRAY("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("MAKEARRAY("));
}

bool looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(const QString &text) {
    const QString upper = text.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (!upper.startsWith('=')) {
        return false;
    }
    return upper.contains(QLatin1Char('[')) && upper.contains(QLatin1Char(']'));
}

QString colorOrDefault(const QString &value, const QString &fallback) {
    QString color = value.trimmed();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.size() == 8) {
        color = color.mid(2);
    }
    static const QRegularExpression hex6(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$)"));
    if (hex6.match(color).hasMatch()) {
        return QStringLiteral("#") + color.toUpper();
    }
    QString fb = fallback.trimmed();
    if (fb.isEmpty()) {
        fb = QStringLiteral("#111111");
    }
    if (!fb.startsWith('#')) {
        fb.prepend('#');
    }
    return fb.left(7).toUpper();
}

QString escapeCsvCell(const QString &cell) {
    return QStringLiteral("\"%1\"").arg(cell).replace('"', QStringLiteral("\"\""));
}

QString escapeHtml(const QString &input) {
    QString escaped = input;
    escaped.replace('&', QStringLiteral("&amp;"));
    escaped.replace('<', QStringLiteral("&lt;"));
    escaped.replace('>', QStringLiteral("&gt;"));
    escaped.replace('"', QStringLiteral("&quot;"));
    return escaped;
}

QString makeSectionPathLabel(const QStringList &path) {
    if (path.isEmpty()) {
        return QStringLiteral("未分类");
    }
    return path.join(QStringLiteral(" / "));
}

bool hasPositionedContent(const DocumentModel &document) {
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        if (!page.graphics.isEmpty()) {
            return true;
        }
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (span.w > 0.0f || span.h > 0.0f || span.fontSize > 0.0f) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

QString mergeLineText(const TextLine &line) {
    QString text;
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString token = span.text.simplified();
        if (token.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            text.append(' ');
        }
        text.append(token);
    }
    return text;
}

QString inferPptMajorThemeFont(const PageContent &page);

struct WordAnchorImageRef {
    QString relId;
    QString fileName;
    QString sourcePath;
    int pageIndex = -1;
    int graphicIndex = -1;
};

QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> collectWordAnchorImageRefs(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> refs;
    int imageCounter = 1;
    for (int pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < document.pages().size(); ++pageIndex) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(pageIndex);
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || g.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFileInfo srcInfo(g.imagePath);
            if (!srcInfo.exists() || !srcInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            QString ext = srcInfo.suffix().toLower();
            if (ext != QStringLiteral("png")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpeg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("gif")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("webp")) {
                continue;
            }
            refs.push_back({
                QStringLiteral("rIdImg%1").arg(imageCounter),
                QStringLiteral("image%1.%2").arg(imageCounter).arg(ext),
                g.imagePath,
                pageIndex,
                gi
            });
            imageCounter += 1;
        }
    }
    return refs;
}

quint64 makeWordGraphicKey(int pageIndex, int graphicIndex) {
    return (static_cast<quint64>(static_cast<quint32>(pageIndex)) << 32)
        | static_cast<quint32>(graphicIndex);
}

QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> buildWordImageRefLookup(const QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> &refs) {
    QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> byGraphic;
    for (const WordAnchorImageRef &ref : refs) {
        byGraphic.insert(makeWordGraphicKey(ref.pageIndex, ref.graphicIndex), ref);
    }
    return byGraphic;
}

struct PptSlideImageRef {
    QString relId;
    QString fileName;
    QString sourcePath;
    int pageIndex = -1;
    int graphicIndex = -1;
};

QVector<PptSlideImageRef> collectPptSlideImageRefs(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QVector<PptSlideImageRef> refs;
    int imageCounter = 1;
    for (int pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < document.pages().size(); ++pageIndex) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(pageIndex);
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || g.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFileInfo srcInfo(g.imagePath);
            if (!srcInfo.exists() || !srcInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            QString ext = srcInfo.suffix().toLower();
            if (ext != QStringLiteral("png")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpeg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("gif")) {
                continue;
            }
            refs.push_back({
                QStringLiteral("rIdImg%1").arg(imageCounter),
                QStringLiteral("image%1.%2").arg(imageCounter).arg(ext),
                g.imagePath,
                pageIndex,
                gi
            });
            imageCounter += 1;
        }
    }
    return refs;
}

QHash<quint64, PptSlideImageRef> buildPptSlideImageLookup(const QVector<PptSlideImageRef> &refs) {
    QHash<quint64, PptSlideImageRef> byGraphic;
    for (const PptSlideImageRef &ref : refs) {
        byGraphic.insert(makeWordGraphicKey(ref.pageIndex, ref.graphicIndex), ref);
    }
    return byGraphic;
}

QString normalizePptHexColor(QString color, const QString &fallback = QStringLiteral("111111")) {
    color = color.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.size() == 8) {
        color = color.mid(2);
    }
    static const QRegularExpression hex6Re(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-F]{6}$)"));
    return hex6Re.match(color).hasMatch() ? color : fallback;
}

QString preferredPptFallbackFont() {
    static const QString cached = []() {
        const QStringList available = QFontDatabase::families();
        const QStringList preferred{
            QStringLiteral("PingFang SC"),
            QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei"),
            QStringLiteral("Heiti SC"),
            QStringLiteral("SimHei"),
            QStringLiteral("SimSun"),
            QStringLiteral("Arial")
        };
        for (const QString &candidate : preferred) {
            for (const QString &family : available) {
                if (family.compare(candidate, Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                    return family;
                }
            }
        }
        return QStringLiteral("Arial");
    }();
    return cached;
}

QString mapPptFontFamily(QString family, const QString &fallbackThemeFont) {
    family = family.trimmed();
    if (family.isEmpty()) {
        family = fallbackThemeFont.trimmed();
    }
    if (family.isEmpty()) {
        return preferredPptFallbackFont();
    }
    QString key = family.toLower();
    key.remove('"');
    key.remove('\'');
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("simsun")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("song")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("宋体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("SimSun");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("simhei")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("heiti")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("黑体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("SimHei");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("kaiti")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("楷体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("KaiTi");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("fangsong")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("仿宋"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("FangSong");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("yahei")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("微软雅黑"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("pingfang"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("PingFang SC");
    }
    return family.left(64);
}

QString paragraphAlignToPpt(const QString &raw) {
    const QString key = raw.trimmed().toLower();
    if (key == QStringLiteral("center") || key == QStringLiteral("ctr")) {
        return QStringLiteral("ctr");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("right") || key == QStringLiteral("r")) {
        return QStringLiteral("r");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("justify") || key == QStringLiteral("just")) {
        return QStringLiteral("just");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("l");
}

QString buildPptLineRunsXml(const TextLine &line, const QString &themeFont, const QString &roleTag, int &outFontSize) {
    QString runsXml;
    outFontSize = 1200;
    bool hasStyledRun = false;
    bool explicitBold = false;
    const bool isTitleRole = roleTag == QStringLiteral("title");
    const bool isSubtitleRole = roleTag == QStringLiteral("subTitle");
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString spanText = span.text;
        if (spanText.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        double roleAdjustedPt = qMax(8.0f, span.fontSize > 0.0f ? span.fontSize : line.h);
        if (isTitleRole) {
            roleAdjustedPt = qMax(roleAdjustedPt, 18.0);
        } else if (isSubtitleRole) {
            roleAdjustedPt = qMax(roleAdjustedPt, 14.0);
        }
        const int spanSz = qBound(900, static_cast<int>(qRound(roleAdjustedPt * 100.0)), 7200);
        outFontSize = qMax(outFontSize, spanSz);
        const QString spanFont = mapPptFontFamily(span.fontFamily, themeFont);
        const QString spanColor = normalizePptHexColor(span.color, QStringLiteral("111111"));
        const QString preserveAttr = (spanText.startsWith(' ') || spanText.endsWith(' '))
            ? QStringLiteral(" xml:space=\"preserve\"")
            : QString();
        const bool spanBold = span.bold || isTitleRole;
        runsXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<a:r><a:rPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%1\" b=\"%2\" i=\"%3\">"
            "<a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%4\"/></a:solidFill>"
            "<a:latin typeface=\"%5\"/><a:ea typeface=\"%5\"/></a:rPr><a:t%7>%6</a:t></a:r>"
        )
            .arg(spanSz)
            .arg(spanBold ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(span.italic ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(spanColor)
            .arg(escapeXml(spanFont))
            .arg(escapeXml(spanText))
            .arg(preserveAttr);
        hasStyledRun = true;
        explicitBold = explicitBold || span.bold;
    }
    if (!hasStyledRun) {
        const QString merged = mergeLineText(line);
        if (merged.isEmpty()) {
            return QStringLiteral("<a:endParaRPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"1200\"/>");
        }
        const QString fallbackFont = mapPptFontFamily(themeFont, preferredPptFallbackFont());
        const int fallbackSz = isTitleRole ? 2200 : (isSubtitleRole ? 1600 : 1200);
        runsXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<a:r><a:rPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%3\" b=\"%4\"><a:latin typeface=\"%1\"/><a:ea typeface=\"%1\"/></a:rPr><a:t>%2</a:t></a:r>"
        ).arg(escapeXml(fallbackFont), escapeXml(merged), QString::number(fallbackSz), QString::number(isTitleRole ? 1 : 0));
        outFontSize = fallbackSz;
    } else if (isTitleRole && !explicitBold) {
        // 对疑似标题但未显式加粗的内容做轻度强化，避免标题层级丢失。
        runsXml.replace(QStringLiteral(" b=\"0\""), QStringLiteral(" b=\"1\""));
    }
    runsXml += QStringLiteral("<a:endParaRPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%1\"/>").arg(outFontSize);
    return runsXml;
}

bool parseFootnoteDefinition(const QString &text, int &footnoteId, QString &body) {
    static const QVector<QRegularExpression> patterns{
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^\[(\d{1,4})\]\s*(.+)$)")),
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^(?:（|\()(\d{1,4})(?:）|\))\s*(.+)$)")),
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d{1,4})[\.、]\s*(.+)$)"))
    };
    for (const QRegularExpression &re : patterns) {
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = re.match(text);
        if (!m.hasMatch()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int id = m.captured(1).toInt();
        const QString parsedBody = m.captured(2).trimmed();
        if (id > 0 && !parsedBody.isEmpty()) {
            footnoteId = id;
            body = parsedBody;
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

int parseSuperscriptDigits(const QString &token) {
    if (token.isEmpty()) {
        return 0;
    }
    QString digits;
    digits.reserve(token.size());
    for (const QChar &ch : token) {
        if (ch == QChar(0x00B9)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('1');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x00B2)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('2');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x00B3)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('3');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x2070)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('0');
        } else if (ch.unicode() >= 0x2074 && ch.unicode() <= 0x2079) {
            digits += QLatin1Char(static_cast<char>('0' + (ch.unicode() - 0x2070)));
        } else {
            return 0;
        }
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const int value = digits.toInt(&ok);
    return ok ? value : 0;
}

struct NativeWordParagraph {
    QString text;
    bool ordered = false;
    int level = 0;
    int ordinal = 0;
    bool footnoteDefinition = false;
    int footnoteId = 0;
    QString footnoteBody;
};

NativeWordParagraph classifyNativeWordParagraph(const QString &rawText);

int detectNativeWordHeadingLevel(const QString &rawText) {
    const QString text = rawText.trimmed();
    if (text.isEmpty()) {
        return 0;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression chapterRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第\s*[一二三四五六七八九十百千万零〇0-9]+\s*[章节篇部分卷]|Chapter\s+\d+))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression subsectionRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第\s*[一二三四五六七八九十百千万零〇0-9]+\s*[节条款]|Section\s+\d+))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    if (chapterRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (subsectionRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 2;
    }
    if (text.size() <= 42
        && (text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("概述"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("总结"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("结论"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("摘要")))) {
        return 1;
    }
    return 0;
}

bool hasExplicitNativeWordTocField(const DocumentModel &document) {
    static const QRegularExpression tocFieldRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(\{\s*TOC\b)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            if (tocFieldRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

int estimateNativeWordHeadingCount(const DocumentModel &document) {
    int headingCount = 0;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString rawText = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (rawText.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const NativeWordParagraph para = classifyNativeWordParagraph(rawText);
            const int inferredLevel = (para.ordered && para.level <= 5 && para.text.size() <= 96)
                ? (para.level + 1)
                : detectNativeWordHeadingLevel(rawText);
            if (inferredLevel > 0) {
                headingCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    return headingCount;
}

struct NativeWordNumberingState {
    int activeNumId = 1;
    int prevTopOrdinal = 0;
    QVector<int> prevOrdinalByLevel = QVector<int>(9, 0);
    bool appendixSection = false;
};

int resolveNativeWordNumId(const NativeWordParagraph &para, NativeWordNumberingState &state) {
    const int level = qBound(0, para.level, state.prevOrdinalByLevel.size() - 1);
    const int prevAtLevel = state.prevOrdinalByLevel[level];
    const bool shouldRestart = para.ordinal == 1 && prevAtLevel > 1;
    if (para.level == 0 && para.ordinal == 1 && state.prevTopOrdinal > 1) {
        state.activeNumId = state.appendixSection ? 2 : 1;
    } else if (shouldRestart) {
        state.activeNumId = 2;
    }
    if (para.level == 0 && para.ordinal > 0) {
        state.prevTopOrdinal = para.ordinal;
    }
    if (para.ordinal > 0) {
        state.prevOrdinalByLevel[level] = para.ordinal;
        for (int deeper = level + 1; deeper < state.prevOrdinalByLevel.size(); ++deeper) {
            state.prevOrdinalByLevel[deeper] = 0;
        }
    }
    return state.activeNumId;
}

NativeWordParagraph classifyNativeWordParagraph(const QString &rawText) {
    NativeWordParagraph out;
    out.text = rawText.trimmed();
    static const QRegularExpression orderedRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d+(?:\.\d+)*)[\.\)、)]\s*(.+)$)"));
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = orderedRe.match(out.text);
    if (!m.hasMatch()) {
        return out;
    }
    out.ordered = true;
    const QString token = m.captured(1);
    out.level = qBound(0, token.count('.'), 8);
    const QStringList parts = token.split('.', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
    if (!parts.isEmpty()) {
        out.ordinal = parts.last().toInt();
    }
    out.text = m.captured(2).trimmed();
    int footnoteId = 0;
    QString footnoteBody;
    if (parseFootnoteDefinition(out.text, footnoteId, footnoteBody)) {
        out.footnoteDefinition = true;
        out.footnoteId = footnoteId;
        out.footnoteBody = footnoteBody;
    }
    return out;
}

QMap<int, QString> collectNativeWordFootnoteMap(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QMap<int, QString> result;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            int footnoteId = 0;
            QString body;
            if (!parseFootnoteDefinition(text, footnoteId, body)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (footnoteId > 0 && !body.isEmpty()) {
                result.insert(footnoteId, body);
            }
        }
    }
    return result;
}

QString sanitizeSheetName(QString name) {
    static const QRegularExpression invalid(QStringLiteral(R"([\\/\?\*\[\]:])"));
    name.replace(invalid, QStringLiteral("_"));
    if (name.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        name = QStringLiteral("Sheet1");
    }
    return name.left(31);
}

QPair<int, int> inferDynamicSpillShape(const QString &formulaText);
bool formulaNeedsImplicitIntersection(const QString &formulaText);
QString applyImplicitIntersectionToFormula(const QString &formulaText);

QPair<int, int> inferDynamicSpillShape(const QString &formulaText) {
    const QString upper = formulaText.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SEQUENCE("))) {
        static const QRegularExpression seqRe(QStringLiteral(R"(SEQUENCE\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+))"));
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = seqRe.match(upper);
        if (m.hasMatch()) {
            return {qMax(1, m.captured(1).toInt()), qMax(1, m.captured(2).toInt())};
        }
    }
    return {1, 1};
}

bool formulaNeedsImplicitIntersection(const QString &formulaText) {
    const QString trimmed = formulaText.trimmed();
    if (!trimmed.startsWith('=')) {
        return false;
    }
    if (looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(trimmed)) {
        return false;
    }
    return looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(trimmed);
}

QString applyImplicitIntersectionToFormula(const QString &formulaText) {
    const QString trimmed = formulaText.trimmed();
    if (!formulaNeedsImplicitIntersection(trimmed)) {
        return trimmed;
    }
    if (trimmed.startsWith(QStringLiteral("=@"))) {
        return trimmed;
    }
    if (trimmed.startsWith('=')) {
        return QStringLiteral("=@") + trimmed.mid(1);
    }
    return trimmed;
}

QString buildNativeXlsxConditionalFormattingBlock(
    const QString &sqref,
    const QString &col,
    const QString &compareCol,
    const QString &escapedRefSheet,
    int startRow,
    int &cfPriority
) {
    QString block = QStringLiteral("<conditionalFormatting sqref=\"%1\">").arg(sqref);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"cellIs\" operator=\"greaterThan\" dxfId=\"0\" priority=\"%1\" stopIfTrue=\"1\"><formula>0</formula></cfRule>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"cellIs\" operator=\"lessThan\" dxfId=\"1\" priority=\"%1\" stopIfTrue=\"1\"><formula>0</formula></cfRule>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"expression\" dxfId=\"2\" priority=\"%1\"><formula>LEN($%2%3)=0</formula></cfRule>")
        .arg(cfPriority++).arg(col).arg(startRow);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"expression\" dxfId=\"3\" priority=\"%1\"><formula>AND(ISNUMBER($%2%3),ISNUMBER(%4),$%2%3&gt;%4)</formula></cfRule>")
        .arg(cfPriority++).arg(col).arg(startRow).arg(compareCol);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"expression\" dxfId=\"3\" priority=\"%1\"><formula>COUNTIF('%2'!$A:$A,$%3%4)&gt;0</formula></cfRule>")
        .arg(cfPriority++).arg(escapeXml(escapedRefSheet)).arg(col).arg(startRow);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"duplicateValues\" dxfId=\"4\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"uniqueValues\" dxfId=\"5\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"top10\" rank=\"10\" percent=\"0\" bottom=\"0\" dxfId=\"0\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"top10\" rank=\"10\" percent=\"1\" bottom=\"0\" dxfId=\"0\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"top10\" rank=\"10\" percent=\"0\" bottom=\"1\" dxfId=\"1\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"aboveAverage\" aboveAverage=\"1\" dxfId=\"0\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"aboveAverage\" aboveAverage=\"0\" equalAverage=\"0\" dxfId=\"1\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"aboveAverage\" aboveAverage=\"1\" stdDev=\"1\" dxfId=\"0\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"aboveAverage\" aboveAverage=\"0\" stdDev=\"1\" dxfId=\"1\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"containsText\" operator=\"containsText\" text=\"错误\" dxfId=\"1\" priority=\"%1\" stopIfTrue=\"1\"><formula>NOT(ISERROR(SEARCH(\"错误\",$%2%3)))</formula></cfRule>")
        .arg(cfPriority++).arg(col).arg(startRow);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"expression\" dxfId=\"4\" priority=\"%1\"><formula>AND(ISNUMBER($%2%3),$%2%3&gt;=PERCENTILE(%4,0.9))</formula></cfRule>")
        .arg(cfPriority++).arg(col).arg(startRow).arg(sqref);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"expression\" dxfId=\"5\" priority=\"%1\"><formula>AND(ISNUMBER($%2%3),$%2%3&lt;=PERCENTILE(%4,0.1))</formula></cfRule>")
        .arg(cfPriority++).arg(col).arg(startRow).arg(sqref);
    block += QStringLiteral("<cfRule type=\"timePeriod\" timePeriod=\"today\" dxfId=\"4\" priority=\"%1\"/>").arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral(
        "<cfRule type=\"colorScale\" priority=\"%1\"><colorScale>"
        "<cfvo type=\"min\"/><cfvo type=\"num\" val=\"0\"/><cfvo type=\"max\"/>"
        "<color rgb=\"FFFEE2E2\"/><color rgb=\"FFFFFFBF\"/><color rgb=\"FFE8F5E9\"/>"
        "</colorScale></cfRule>"
    ).arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral(
        "<cfRule type=\"dataBar\" priority=\"%1\"><dataBar showValue=\"1\" minLength=\"10\" maxLength=\"90\">"
        "<cfvo type=\"num\" val=\"0\"/><cfvo type=\"max\"/><color rgb=\"FF93C5FD\"/><axisColor rgb=\"FF1F2937\"/>"
        "</dataBar></cfRule>"
    ).arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral(
        "<cfRule type=\"colorScale\" priority=\"%1\"><colorScale>"
        "<cfvo type=\"percentile\" val=\"10\"/><cfvo type=\"percentile\" val=\"50\"/><cfvo type=\"percentile\" val=\"90\"/>"
        "<color rgb=\"FFFFF4CC\"/><color rgb=\"FFDDEBF7\"/><color rgb=\"FFC6EFCE\"/>"
        "</colorScale></cfRule>"
    ).arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral(
        "<cfRule type=\"iconSet\" priority=\"%1\"><iconSet iconSet=\"3TrafficLights1\" showValue=\"1\" percent=\"0\">"
        "<cfvo type=\"num\" val=\"0\"/><cfvo type=\"num\" val=\"33\"/><cfvo type=\"num\" val=\"67\"/>"
        "</iconSet></cfRule>"
    ).arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral(
        "<cfRule type=\"iconSet\" priority=\"%1\"><iconSet iconSet=\"4Arrows\" showValue=\"0\" percent=\"1\">"
        "<cfvo type=\"percent\" val=\"0\"/><cfvo type=\"percent\" val=\"25\"/><cfvo type=\"percent\" val=\"50\"/><cfvo type=\"percent\" val=\"75\"/>"
        "</iconSet></cfRule>"
    ).arg(cfPriority++);
    block += QStringLiteral("</conditionalFormatting>");
    return block;
}

struct NativeXlsxSheetModel {
    enum class CellRole {
        Blank,
        Header,
        Formula,
        Error,
        Value
    };
    QString name;
    QVector<QStringList> matrix;
    QVector<QVector<CellRole>> roleMatrix;
};

struct NativeXlsxSheetXmlPart {
    QString name;
    QString xml;
    QString usedRangeRef;
    bool hasTable = false;
    bool hasChart = false;
    QString tableXml;
    QString sheetRelsXml;
    QString tableRelsXml;
    QString queryTableXml;
    QString drawingXml;
    QString drawingRelsXml;
    QString chartXml;
    QString chartRelsXml;
    QString embeddedWorkbookName;
    QString chartObjectEvidence;
    QStringList chartCategories;
    QVector<QString> chartSeriesNames;
    QVector<QVector<double>> chartSeriesValues;
};

struct NativeXlsxXmlParts {
    QString contentTypes;
    QString rootRels;
    QString workbookXml;
    QString workbookRels;
    QString connectionsXml;
    QString stylesXml;
    QString sharedStringsXml;
    QString calcChainXml;
    bool hasAnyTable = false;
    bool hasAnyChart = false;
};

struct NativeXlsxChartBuildResult {
    bool valid = false;
    QString chartXml;
    QString drawingXml;
    QString drawingRelsXml;
    QString chartRelsXml;
    QString embeddedWorkbookName;
    QString chartObjectEvidence;
    QStringList categories;
    QVector<QString> seriesNames;
    QVector<QVector<double>> seriesValues;
};

int maxMatrixColumns(const QVector<QStringList> &matrix) {
    int maxCol = 0;
    for (const QStringList &row : matrix) {
        maxCol = qMax(maxCol, row.size());
    }
    return maxCol;
}

struct NativeXlsxSemanticChannel {
    QVector<QStringList> matrix;
    QSet<int> headerRows;
};

NativeXlsxSemanticChannel buildNativeXlsxMatrixFromSemanticTables(
    const StructuredDocument &structured,
    int pageIndex
) {
    NativeXlsxSemanticChannel out;
    for (const StructuredBlock &block : structured.blocks) {
        if (block.pageIndex != pageIndex || block.kind != BlockKind::Table) {
            continue;
        }
        const StructuredTable &table = block.table;
        if (table.rowCount <= 0 || table.colCount <= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        QVector<QStringList> tableRows(table.rowCount, QStringList(table.colCount, QString()));
        bool hasNonEmpty = false;
        for (const TableCell &cell : table.cells) {
            if (cell.row < 0 || cell.row >= tableRows.size() || cell.col < 0 || cell.col >= tableRows[cell.row].size()) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString text = cell.text.simplified();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            hasNonEmpty = true;
            QString &slot = tableRows[cell.row][cell.col];
            if (slot.isEmpty()) {
                slot = text;
            } else if (slot != text) {
                slot += QStringLiteral(" | ");
                slot += text;
            }
        }
        if (!hasNonEmpty) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!out.matrix.isEmpty()) {
            out.matrix.push_back(QStringList{QString()});
        }
        const int startRow = out.matrix.size();
        const int headerRows = qBound(1, table.inheritedHeaderRows > 0 ? table.inheritedHeaderRows : 1, table.rowCount);
        for (QStringList row : tableRows) {
            while (!row.isEmpty() && row.last().trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                row.removeLast();
            }
            out.matrix.push_back(row.isEmpty() ? QStringList{QString()} : row);
        }
        for (int r = 0; r < headerRows; ++r) {
            const int headerRow = startRow + r;
            if (headerRow >= 0 && headerRow < out.matrix.size()) {
                out.headerRows.insert(headerRow);
            }
        }
    }
    return out;
}

int nearestAnchorIndex(const QVector<double> &anchors, double x) {
    if (anchors.isEmpty()) {
        return 0;
    }
    int best = 0;
    double bestDist = qAbs(anchors[0] - x);
    for (int i = 1; i < anchors.size(); ++i) {
        const double d = qAbs(anchors[i] - x);
        if (d < bestDist) {
            bestDist = d;
            best = i;
        }
    }
    return best;
}

QVector<double> buildGeometricColumnAnchors(const PageContent &page) {
    QVector<double> xs;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
            const QString text = span.text.simplified();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            xs.push_back(span.x);
        }
    }
    if (xs.isEmpty()) {
        return {};
    }
    std::sort(xs.begin(), xs.end());
    const double clusterTol = qMax(8.0, static_cast<double>(page.width > 1.0f ? page.width : 595.0f) * 0.012);
    QVector<double> anchors;
    QVector<int> counts;
    for (double x : xs) {
        if (anchors.isEmpty() || qAbs(anchors.last() - x) > clusterTol) {
            anchors.push_back(x);
            counts.push_back(1);
            continue;
        }
        const int idx = anchors.size() - 1;
        anchors[idx] = (anchors[idx] * counts[idx] + x) / static_cast<double>(counts[idx] + 1);
        counts[idx] += 1;
    }
    QVector<double> compact;
    for (int i = 0; i < anchors.size(); ++i) {
        if (counts[i] >= 2 || anchors.size() <= 4) {
            compact.push_back(anchors[i]);
        }
    }
    if (compact.isEmpty()) {
        compact = anchors;
    }
    return compact;
}

QVector<QStringList> buildNativeXlsxMatrixFromGeometricLayout(const PageContent &page) {
    QVector<QStringList> matrix;
    if (page.lines.isEmpty()) {
        return matrix;
    }
    const QVector<double> anchors = buildGeometricColumnAnchors(page);
    const int colCount = qMax(1, anchors.size());
    QVector<int> lineOrder(page.lines.size(), 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < page.lines.size(); ++i) {
        lineOrder[i] = i;
    }
    std::sort(lineOrder.begin(), lineOrder.end(), [&](int a, int b) {
        const TextLine &la = page.lines[a];
        const TextLine &lb = page.lines[b];
        if (qAbs(la.y - lb.y) > 1.0f) {
            return la.y < lb.y;
        }
        return la.x < lb.x;
    });
    for (int idx : lineOrder) {
        const TextLine &line = page.lines[idx];
        QStringList row(colCount, QString());
        for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
            const QString text = span.text.simplified();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const int col = qBound(0, nearestAnchorIndex(anchors, span.x), colCount - 1);
            QString &slot = row[col];
            if (!slot.isEmpty()) {
                slot += QLatin1Char(' ');
            }
            slot += text;
        }
        if (colCount == 1) {
            const QString merged = mergeLineText(line).simplified();
            if (!merged.isEmpty()) {
                row[0] = merged;
            }
        }
        while (!row.isEmpty() && row.last().trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            row.removeLast();
        }
        if (!row.isEmpty()) {
            matrix.push_back(row);
        }
    }
    return matrix;
}

NativeXlsxSemanticChannel fuseNativeXlsxDualChannelMatrix(
    const NativeXlsxSemanticChannel &semantic,
    const QVector<QStringList> &geometricMatrix
) {
    if (semantic.matrix.isEmpty()) {
        return {geometricMatrix, {}};
    }
    if (geometricMatrix.isEmpty()) {
        return semantic;
    }
    const int semCols = maxMatrixColumns(semantic.matrix);
    const int geoCols = maxMatrixColumns(geometricMatrix);
    if (semCols >= 2 && semantic.matrix.size() >= 2) {
        NativeXlsxSemanticChannel fused = semantic;
        const QString geoFirst = geometricMatrix.first().join(QStringLiteral(" ")).simplified();
        const QString semFirst = semantic.matrix.first().join(QStringLiteral(" ")).simplified();
        if (!geoFirst.isEmpty() && geoCols == 1 && geoFirst != semFirst) {
            fused.matrix.push_front(QStringList{geoFirst});
            QSet<int> shifted;
            for (int row : fused.headerRows) {
                shifted.insert(row + 1);
            }
            fused.headerRows = shifted;
        }
        return fused;
    }
    return {geometricMatrix, {}};
}

NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole inferNativeXlsxCellRole(const QString &text, const bool semanticHeaderRow, const bool firstRow) {
    const QString t = text.trimmed();
    if (t.isEmpty()) {
        return NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Blank;
    }
    if (t.startsWith('=')) {
        return NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Formula;
    }
    static const QSet<QString> kExcelErrors{
        QStringLiteral("#N/A"), QStringLiteral("#VALUE!"), QStringLiteral("#REF!"),
        QStringLiteral("#DIV/0!"), QStringLiteral("#NUM!"), QStringLiteral("#NAME?"),
        QStringLiteral("#NULL!"), QStringLiteral("#SPILL!"), QStringLiteral("#CALC!")
    };
    if (kExcelErrors.contains(t.toUpper())) {
        return NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Error;
    }
    if (semanticHeaderRow || firstRow) {
        return NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Header;
    }
    return NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Value;
}

QVector<QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole>> buildNativeXlsxRoleMatrix(
    const QVector<QStringList> &matrix,
    const QSet<int> &semanticHeaderRows
) {
    QVector<QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole>> roles;
    roles.reserve(matrix.size());
    const int maxCol = maxMatrixColumns(matrix);
    for (int r = 0; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
        QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole> row(maxCol, NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Blank);
        for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
            const QString text = c < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][c] : QString();
            row[c] = inferNativeXlsxCellRole(text, semanticHeaderRows.contains(r), r == 0);
        }
        roles.push_back(row);
    }
    return roles;
}

QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel> buildNativeXlsxSheetModels(const DocumentModel &document) {
    const DocumentStructureAnalyzer analyzer;
    const StructuredDocument structured = analyzer.analyze(document);
    QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel> models;
    const QVector<PageContent> pages = document.pages();
    const int sheetCount = qMax(1, pages.size());
    for (int sheetIndex = 0; sheetIndex < sheetCount; ++sheetIndex) {
        QVector<QStringList> matrix;
        QSet<int> semanticHeaderRows;
        if (sheetIndex < pages.size()) {
            const PageContent &page = pages[sheetIndex];
            const NativeXlsxSemanticChannel semantic = buildNativeXlsxMatrixFromSemanticTables(structured, sheetIndex);
            const QVector<QStringList> geometricMatrix = buildNativeXlsxMatrixFromGeometricLayout(page);
            const NativeXlsxSemanticChannel fused = fuseNativeXlsxDualChannelMatrix(semantic, geometricMatrix);
            matrix = fused.matrix;
            semanticHeaderRows = fused.headerRows;
        }
        if (matrix.isEmpty()) {
            matrix.push_back(QStringList{QString()});
        }
        const QVector<QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole>> roleMatrix = buildNativeXlsxRoleMatrix(matrix, semanticHeaderRows);
        models.push_back({
            sanitizeSheetName(QStringLiteral("Page_%1").arg(sheetIndex + 1)),
            matrix,
            roleMatrix
        });
    }
    return models;
}

bool parseNativeXlsxChartNumber(QString raw, double &valueOut) {
    QString t = raw.trimmed();
    if (t.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    bool parenNegative = false;
    if (t.startsWith('(') && t.endsWith(')') && t.size() > 2) {
        parenNegative = true;
        t = t.mid(1, t.size() - 2).trimmed();
    }
    bool isPercent = false;
    if (t.endsWith('%')) {
        isPercent = true;
        t.chop(1);
    }
    t.remove(',');
    t.remove(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^[\$€¥￥]\s*)")));
    t.remove(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(\s*[\$€¥￥]$)")));
    t.remove(' ');
    bool ok = false;
    const double parsed = t.toDouble(&ok);
    if (!ok) {
        return false;
    }
    double value = isPercent ? (parsed / 100.0) : parsed;
    if (parenNegative) {
        value = -std::abs(value);
    }
    valueOut = value;
    return qIsFinite(valueOut);
}

NativeXlsxChartBuildResult buildNativeXlsxChartPart(
    const NativeXlsxSheetModel &sheetModel,
    const int sheetIndex
) {
    NativeXlsxChartBuildResult out;
    const QVector<QStringList> &matrix = sheetModel.matrix;
    if (matrix.size() < 3) {
        return out;
    }
    const int maxCol = maxMatrixColumns(matrix);
    if (maxCol < 2) {
        return out;
    }
    const int dataRows = matrix.size() - 1;
    QVector<int> numericCount(maxCol, 0);
    for (int r = 1; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
        for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
            const QString cell = c < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][c] : QString();
            double parsed = 0.0;
            if (parseNativeXlsxChartNumber(cell, parsed)) {
                numericCount[c] += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    QVector<int> seriesCols;
    for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
        if (numericCount[c] >= qMax(2, dataRows / 2)) {
            seriesCols.push_back(c);
        }
    }
    if (seriesCols.isEmpty()) {
        return out;
    }
    int categoryCol = 0;
    for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
        if (!seriesCols.contains(c)) {
            categoryCol = c;
            break;
        }
    }
    QStringList categories;
    categories.reserve(dataRows);
    for (int r = 1; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
        QString cat = categoryCol < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][categoryCol].simplified() : QString();
        if (cat.isEmpty()) {
            cat = QStringLiteral("分类%1").arg(r);
        }
        categories.push_back(cat);
    }
    if (categories.size() < 2) {
        return out;
    }

    QVector<QString> seriesNames;
    QVector<QVector<double>> seriesValues;
    seriesNames.reserve(seriesCols.size());
    seriesValues.reserve(seriesCols.size());
    QVector<bool> seriesSecondaryAxis;
    int secondaryAxisSeriesCount = 0;
    int barSeriesCount = 0;
    int lineSeriesCount = 0;
    for (int idx = 0; idx < seriesCols.size(); ++idx) {
        const int col = seriesCols[idx];
        QString name = col < matrix[0].size() ? matrix[0][col].simplified() : QString();
        if (name.isEmpty()) {
            name = QStringLiteral("系列%1").arg(idx + 1);
        }
        QVector<double> values;
        values.reserve(categories.size());
        int validValueCount = 0;
        int percentLikeCount = 0;
        for (int r = 1; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
            const QString cell = col < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][col] : QString();
            double parsed = 0.0;
            if (parseNativeXlsxChartNumber(cell, parsed)) {
                validValueCount += 1;
                if (qAbs(parsed) <= 1.0) {
                    percentLikeCount += 1;
                }
                values.push_back(parsed);
            } else {
                values.push_back(0.0);
            }
        }
        if (validValueCount < 2) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString normalizedName = name.toLower();
        const bool secondaryAxis = normalizedName.contains(QStringLiteral("同比"))
            || normalizedName.contains(QStringLiteral("环比"))
            || normalizedName.contains(QStringLiteral("增长率"))
            || normalizedName.contains(QStringLiteral("ratio"))
            || normalizedName.contains('%')
            || percentLikeCount >= qMax(2, values.size() / 2);
        if (secondaryAxis) {
            secondaryAxisSeriesCount += 1;
            lineSeriesCount += 1;
        } else {
            barSeriesCount += 1;
        }
        seriesNames.push_back(name);
        seriesValues.push_back(values);
        seriesSecondaryAxis.push_back(secondaryAxis);
    }
    if (seriesNames.isEmpty()) {
        return out;
    }
    if (barSeriesCount == 0 && !seriesNames.isEmpty()) {
        seriesSecondaryAxis[0] = false;
        barSeriesCount = 1;
        lineSeriesCount = qMax(0, lineSeriesCount - 1);
        secondaryAxisSeriesCount = qMax(0, secondaryAxisSeriesCount - 1);
    }
    const bool hasSecondaryAxis = secondaryAxisSeriesCount > 0;
    const QString chartKind = hasSecondaryAxis ? QStringLiteral("combo-bar-line") : QStringLiteral("bar-clustered");
    const QString primaryAxisNumFmt = QStringLiteral("#,##0.00");
    const QString secondaryAxisNumFmt = hasSecondaryAxis ? QStringLiteral("0.00%") : QStringLiteral("#,##0.00");
    QString axisBindings;
    int axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < seriesNames.size(); ++i) {
        if (!axisBindings.isEmpty()) {
            axisBindings += QChar(';');
        }
        const QString axis = seriesSecondaryAxis.value(i) ? QStringLiteral("secondary") : QStringLiteral("primary");
        axisBindings += QStringLiteral("%1->%2").arg(seriesNames[i], axis);
        axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount += 1;
    }

    const int sheetNo = sheetIndex + 1;
    out.embeddedWorkbookName = QStringLiteral("Microsoft_Excel_Worksheet_sheet%1.xlsx").arg(sheetNo);
    QString escapedSheetName = sheetModel.name;
    escapedSheetName.replace('\'', QStringLiteral("''"));
    const QString sheetNameRef = QStringLiteral("'%1'").arg(escapedSheetName);
    const int maxRow = matrix.size();
    const QString catRef = QStringLiteral("%1!$%2$2:$%2$%3")
        .arg(sheetNameRef)
        .arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(categoryCol))
        .arg(maxRow);
    QString barSeriesXml;
    QString lineSeriesXml;
    for (int i = 0; i < seriesNames.size(); ++i) {
        const int sourceCol = i < seriesCols.size() ? seriesCols[i] : i + 1;
        const QString txRef = QStringLiteral("%1!$%2$1")
            .arg(sheetNameRef)
            .arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(sourceCol));
        const QString valRef = QStringLiteral("%1!$%2$2:$%2$%3")
            .arg(sheetNameRef)
            .arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(sourceCol))
            .arg(maxRow);
        QString catCache;
        for (int ci = 0; ci < categories.size(); ++ci) {
            catCache += QStringLiteral("<c:pt idx=\"%1\"><c:v>%2</c:v></c:pt>")
                .arg(ci).arg(escapeXml(categories[ci]));
        }
        QString valCache;
        for (int vi = 0; vi < seriesValues[i].size(); ++vi) {
            valCache += QStringLiteral("<c:pt idx=\"%1\"><c:v>%2</c:v></c:pt>")
                .arg(vi)
                .arg(QString::number(seriesValues[i][vi], 'f', 6));
        }
        const QString serXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<c:ser><c:idx val=\"%1\"/><c:order val=\"%1\"/>"
            "<c:tx><c:strRef><c:f>%2</c:f></c:strRef></c:tx>"
            "<c:cat><c:strRef><c:f>%3</c:f><c:strCache><c:ptCount val=\"%4\"/>%5</c:strCache></c:strRef></c:cat>"
            "<c:val><c:numRef><c:f>%6</c:f><c:numCache><c:formatCode>General</c:formatCode><c:ptCount val=\"%4\"/>%7</c:numCache></c:numRef></c:val>"
            "</c:ser>"
        ).arg(i).arg(txRef, catRef).arg(categories.size()).arg(catCache, valRef, valCache);
        if (seriesSecondaryAxis[i] && hasSecondaryAxis) {
            lineSeriesXml += serXml;
        } else {
            barSeriesXml += serXml;
        }
    }
    const int catAxId = 41000000 + sheetNo * 10;
    const int valAxPrimaryId = 41000001 + sheetNo * 10;
    const int valAxSecondaryId = 41000002 + sheetNo * 10;
    const QString secondaryChartXml = hasSecondaryAxis
        ? QStringLiteral(
            "<c:lineChart><c:grouping val=\"standard\"/>%1"
            "<c:dLbls><c:showVal val=\"0\"/></c:dLbls>"
            "<c:axId val=\"%2\"/><c:axId val=\"%3\"/></c:lineChart>"
        ).arg(lineSeriesXml).arg(catAxId).arg(valAxSecondaryId)
        : QString();
    const QString secondaryAxisXml = hasSecondaryAxis
        ? QStringLiteral(
            "<c:valAx><c:axId val=\"%1\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
            "<c:numFmt formatCode=\"%2\" sourceLinked=\"0\"/><c:majorGridlines/>"
            "<c:axPos val=\"r\"/><c:crossAx val=\"%3\"/><c:crosses val=\"max\"/></c:valAx>"
        ).arg(valAxSecondaryId).arg(secondaryAxisNumFmt).arg(catAxId)
        : QString();
    out.chartXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<c:chartSpace xmlns:c=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/chart\" "
        "xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\">"
        "<c:chart><c:plotArea>"
        "<c:barChart><c:barDir val=\"col\"/><c:grouping val=\"clustered\"/>%1"
        "<c:axId val=\"%2\"/><c:axId val=\"%3\"/></c:barChart>%4"
        "<c:catAx><c:axId val=\"%2\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
        "<c:axPos val=\"b\"/><c:crossAx val=\"%3\"/><c:tickLblPos val=\"nextTo\"/></c:catAx>"
        "<c:valAx><c:axId val=\"%3\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
        "<c:numFmt formatCode=\"%5\" sourceLinked=\"0\"/><c:majorGridlines/>"
        "<c:axPos val=\"l\"/><c:crossAx val=\"%2\"/><c:crosses val=\"autoZero\"/></c:valAx>%6"
        "</c:plotArea><c:legend><c:legendPos val=\"r\"/></c:legend><c:plotVisOnly val=\"1\"/></c:chart>"
        "<c:externalData r:id=\"rIdWorkbook\"><c:autoUpdate val=\"1\"/></c:externalData>"
        "</c:chartSpace>"
    ).arg(barSeriesXml).arg(catAxId).arg(valAxPrimaryId).arg(secondaryChartXml, primaryAxisNumFmt, secondaryAxisXml);
    out.chartRelsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rIdWorkbook\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/package\" "
        "Target=\"../embeddings/%1\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    ).arg(escapeXml(out.embeddedWorkbookName));
    out.drawingXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<xdr:wsDr xmlns:xdr=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/spreadsheetDrawing\" "
        "xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\">"
        "<xdr:twoCellAnchor><xdr:from><xdr:col>1</xdr:col><xdr:colOff>0</xdr:colOff><xdr:row>1</xdr:row><xdr:rowOff>0</xdr:rowOff></xdr:from>"
        "<xdr:to><xdr:col>%1</xdr:col><xdr:colOff>0</xdr:colOff><xdr:row>%2</xdr:row><xdr:rowOff>0</xdr:rowOff></xdr:to>"
        "<xdr:graphicFrame macro=\"\"><xdr:nvGraphicFramePr><xdr:cNvPr id=\"2\" name=\"Chart %3\"/>"
        "<xdr:cNvGraphicFramePr/></xdr:nvGraphicFramePr><xdr:xfrm/>"
        "<a:graphic><a:graphicData uri=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/chart\">"
        "<c:chart xmlns:c=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/chart\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\" r:id=\"rId1\"/>"
        "</a:graphicData></a:graphic></xdr:graphicFrame><xdr:clientData/></xdr:twoCellAnchor></xdr:wsDr>"
    ).arg(qMax(8, maxCol + 6)).arg(qMax(18, matrix.size() + 10)).arg(sheetNo);
    out.drawingRelsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/chart\" Target=\"../charts/chart%1.xml\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    ).arg(sheetNo);
    out.categories = categories;
    out.seriesNames = seriesNames;
    out.seriesValues = seriesValues;
    out.chartObjectEvidence = QStringLiteral(
        "kind=%1;series=%2;legend=%3;axis.primaryFmt=%4;axis.secondaryFmt=%5;seriesAxisBindings=%6;axisBindingMatched=%7/%8;externalData=1;workbook=%9"
    ).arg(chartKind)
     .arg(seriesNames.size())
     .arg(seriesNames.size())
     .arg(primaryAxisNumFmt, secondaryAxisNumFmt, axisBindings)
     .arg(axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount)
     .arg(seriesNames.size())
     .arg(out.embeddedWorkbookName);
    out.valid = true;
    return out;
}

NativeXlsxXmlParts buildNativeXlsxXmlParts(
    const QVector<NativeXlsxSheetXmlPart> &sheets,
    const QStringList &chainEntries,
    const QStringList &sharedStrings,
    const int sharedStringUseCount
) {
    NativeXlsxXmlParts out;
    QString sheetOverrides;
    QString tableOverrides;
    QString queryTableOverrides;
    QString drawingOverrides;
    QString chartOverrides;
    QString workbookSheetList;
    QString workbookRelsList;
    QString definedNamesXml;
    for (int i = 0; i < sheets.size(); ++i) {
        sheetOverrides += QStringLiteral(
            "<Override PartName=\"/xl/worksheets/sheet%1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.worksheet+xml\"/>"
        ).arg(i + 1);
        if (sheets[i].hasTable) {
            tableOverrides += QStringLiteral(
                "<Override PartName=\"/xl/tables/table%1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.table+xml\"/>"
            ).arg(i + 1);
            queryTableOverrides += QStringLiteral(
                "<Override PartName=\"/xl/queryTables/queryTable%1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.queryTable+xml\"/>"
            ).arg(i + 1);
        }
        if (sheets[i].hasChart) {
            drawingOverrides += QStringLiteral(
                "<Override PartName=\"/xl/drawings/drawing%1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.drawing+xml\"/>"
            ).arg(i + 1);
            chartOverrides += QStringLiteral(
                "<Override PartName=\"/xl/charts/chart%1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.drawingml.chart+xml\"/>"
            ).arg(i + 1);
        }
        workbookSheetList += QStringLiteral(
            "<sheet name=\"%1\" sheetId=\"%2\" r:id=\"rId%2\"/>"
        ).arg(escapeXml(sheets[i].name)).arg(i + 1);
        workbookRelsList += QStringLiteral(
            "<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/worksheet\" Target=\"worksheets/sheet%2.xml\"/>"
        ).arg(i + 1).arg(i + 1);
        QString escapedSheetName = sheets[i].name;
        escapedSheetName.replace('\'', QStringLiteral("''"));
        definedNamesXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<definedName name=\"DataRange_%1\" localSheetId=\"%2\">'%3'!%4</definedName>"
        ).arg(i + 1).arg(i).arg(escapeXml(escapedSheetName)).arg(sheets[i].usedRangeRef);
        if (sheets[i].hasTable) {
            definedNamesXml += QStringLiteral(
                "<definedName name=\"Table_%1\" localSheetId=\"%2\">'%3'!%4</definedName>"
            ).arg(i + 1).arg(i).arg(escapeXml(escapedSheetName)).arg(sheets[i].usedRangeRef);
        }
        if (sheets[i].hasChart && !sheets[i].chartObjectEvidence.isEmpty()) {
            QString evidence = sheets[i].chartObjectEvidence;
            evidence.replace('"', QStringLiteral("\"\""));
            definedNamesXml += QStringLiteral(
                "<definedName name=\"ChartEvidence_%1\" localSheetId=\"%2\">\"%3\"</definedName>"
            ).arg(i + 1).arg(i).arg(escapeXml(evidence));
        }
        const int nextIdx = (i + 1) % qMax(1, sheets.size());
        QString escapedNextSheetName = sheets[nextIdx].name;
        escapedNextSheetName.replace('\'', QStringLiteral("''"));
        definedNamesXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<definedName name=\"CrossSheet_%1\" localSheetId=\"%2\">'%3'!%4</definedName>"
        ).arg(i + 1).arg(i).arg(escapeXml(escapedNextSheetName)).arg(sheets[nextIdx].usedRangeRef);
        definedNamesXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<definedName name=\"_xlnm.Print_Area\" localSheetId=\"%1\">'%2'!%3</definedName>"
        ).arg(i).arg(escapeXml(escapedSheetName)).arg(sheets[i].usedRangeRef);
        definedNamesXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<definedName name=\"_xlnm.Print_Titles\" localSheetId=\"%1\">'%2'!$1:$1</definedName>"
        ).arg(i).arg(escapeXml(escapedSheetName));
    }
    if (!sheets.isEmpty()) {
        QString firstSheetEscaped = sheets.first().name;
        firstSheetEscaped.replace('\'', QStringLiteral("''"));
        definedNamesXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<definedName name=\"AllData\">'%1'!%2</definedName>"
        ).arg(escapeXml(firstSheetEscaped)).arg(sheets.first().usedRangeRef);
    }
    const bool hasSharedStrings = !sharedStrings.isEmpty();
    const int sharedStringsRelId = sheets.size() + 1;
    const int styleRelId = sheets.size() + 2;
    const int chainRelId = sheets.size() + 3;
    out.hasAnyTable = std::any_of(sheets.cbegin(), sheets.cend(), [](const NativeXlsxSheetXmlPart &sheet) {
        return sheet.hasTable;
    });
    out.hasAnyChart = std::any_of(sheets.cbegin(), sheets.cend(), [](const NativeXlsxSheetXmlPart &sheet) {
        return sheet.hasChart;
    });
    const QString calcChainOverride = chainEntries.isEmpty()
        ? QString()
        : QStringLiteral("<Override PartName=\"/xl/calcChain.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.calcChain+xml\"/>");
    const QString sharedStringsOverride = hasSharedStrings
        ? QStringLiteral("<Override PartName=\"/xl/sharedStrings.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sharedStrings+xml\"/>")
        : QString();
    const QString connectionsOverride = out.hasAnyTable
        ? QStringLiteral("<Override PartName=\"/xl/connections.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.connections+xml\"/>")
        : QString();
    const QString embeddedWorkbookDefault = out.hasAnyChart
        ? QStringLiteral("<Default Extension=\"xlsx\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet\"/>")
        : QString();
    out.contentTypes = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Types xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/content-types\">"
        "<Default Extension=\"rels\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.relationships+xml\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"xml\" ContentType=\"application/xml\"/>%7"
        "<Override PartName=\"/xl/workbook.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet.main+xml\"/>"
        "%1<Override PartName=\"/xl/styles.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.styles+xml\"/>%2%3"
        "%4%5%6%8%9"
        "</Types>"
    ).arg(sheetOverrides, calcChainOverride, sharedStringsOverride, tableOverrides, queryTableOverrides, connectionsOverride, embeddedWorkbookDefault, drawingOverrides, chartOverrides);
    out.rootRels = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/officeDocument\" Target=\"xl/workbook.xml\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    );
    out.workbookXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<workbook xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\">"
        "<workbookPr/><bookViews><workbookView/></bookViews>"
        "<sheets>%1</sheets><definedNames>%2</definedNames><calcPr calcId=\"191029\" fullCalcOnLoad=\"1\"/>"
        "</workbook>"
    ).arg(workbookSheetList, definedNamesXml);
    const QString chainRel = chainEntries.isEmpty()
        ? QString()
        : QStringLiteral("<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/calcChain\" Target=\"calcChain.xml\"/>")
            .arg(chainRelId);
    const QString sharedStringsRel = hasSharedStrings
        ? QStringLiteral("<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/sharedStrings\" Target=\"sharedStrings.xml\"/>")
            .arg(sharedStringsRelId)
        : QString();
    const int connectionsRelId = chainRelId + (chainEntries.isEmpty() ? 0 : 1);
    const QString connectionsRel = out.hasAnyTable
        ? QStringLiteral("<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/connections\" Target=\"connections.xml\"/>")
            .arg(connectionsRelId)
        : QString();
    out.workbookRels = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "%1%2<Relationship Id=\"rId%3\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/styles\" Target=\"styles.xml\"/>%4%5"
        "</Relationships>"
    ).arg(workbookRelsList, sharedStringsRel).arg(styleRelId).arg(chainRel, connectionsRel);
    QString connectionItems;
    if (out.hasAnyTable) {
        for (int i = 0; i < sheets.size(); ++i) {
            if (!sheets[i].hasTable) {
                continue;
            }
            connectionItems += QStringLiteral(
                "<connection id=\"%1\" name=\"Query - Table%1\" type=\"1\" refreshedVersion=\"7\" "
                "saveData=\"1\" background=\"1\" refreshOnLoad=\"1\">"
                "<dbPr connection=\"WORKSHEET;TABLE=Table%1\" command=\"SELECT * FROM [Table%1]\" commandType=\"2\"/>"
                "</connection>"
            ).arg(i + 1);
        }
    }
    out.connectionsXml = out.hasAnyTable
        ? QStringLiteral(
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
            "<connections xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\">%1</connections>"
        ).arg(connectionItems)
        : QString();
    out.stylesXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<styleSheet xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\">"
        "<numFmts count=\"4\">"
        "<numFmt numFmtId=\"164\" formatCode=\"yyyy-mm-dd\"/>"
        "<numFmt numFmtId=\"165\" formatCode=\"&quot;$&quot;#,##0.00\"/>"
        "<numFmt numFmtId=\"166\" formatCode=\"0.00%\"/>"
        "<numFmt numFmtId=\"167\" formatCode=\"0.00E+00\"/>"
        "</numFmts>"
        "<fonts count=\"2\"><font><sz val=\"11\"/><name val=\"Calibri\"/></font><font><b/><sz val=\"11\"/><name val=\"Calibri\"/></font></fonts>"
        "<fills count=\"2\"><fill><patternFill patternType=\"none\"/></fill><fill><patternFill patternType=\"solid\"><fgColor rgb=\"FFF3F4F6\"/><bgColor indexed=\"64\"/></patternFill></fill></fills>"
        "<borders count=\"2\">"
        "<border><left/><right/><top/><bottom/><diagonal/></border>"
        "<border><left style=\"thin\"/><right style=\"thin\"/><top style=\"thin\"/><bottom style=\"thin\"/><diagonal/></border>"
        "</borders>"
        "<cellStyleXfs count=\"1\"><xf numFmtId=\"0\" fontId=\"0\" fillId=\"0\" borderId=\"0\"/></cellStyleXfs>"
        "<cellXfs count=\"7\">"
        "<xf numFmtId=\"0\" fontId=\"0\" fillId=\"0\" borderId=\"1\" applyBorder=\"1\"/>"
        "<xf numFmtId=\"0\" fontId=\"1\" fillId=\"1\" borderId=\"1\" applyFill=\"1\" applyFont=\"1\" applyBorder=\"1\"/>"
        "<xf numFmtId=\"2\" fontId=\"0\" fillId=\"0\" borderId=\"1\" applyNumberFormat=\"1\" applyBorder=\"1\"/>"
        "<xf numFmtId=\"164\" fontId=\"0\" fillId=\"0\" borderId=\"1\" applyNumberFormat=\"1\" applyBorder=\"1\"/>"
        "<xf numFmtId=\"165\" fontId=\"0\" fillId=\"0\" borderId=\"1\" applyNumberFormat=\"1\" applyBorder=\"1\"/>"
        "<xf numFmtId=\"166\" fontId=\"0\" fillId=\"0\" borderId=\"1\" applyNumberFormat=\"1\" applyBorder=\"1\"/>"
        "<xf numFmtId=\"167\" fontId=\"0\" fillId=\"0\" borderId=\"1\" applyNumberFormat=\"1\" applyBorder=\"1\"/>"
        "</cellXfs>"
        "<dxfs count=\"6\">"
        "<dxf><fill><patternFill patternType=\"solid\"><fgColor rgb=\"FFE8F5E9\"/><bgColor indexed=\"64\"/></patternFill></fill></dxf>"
        "<dxf><fill><patternFill patternType=\"solid\"><fgColor rgb=\"FFFEE2E2\"/><bgColor indexed=\"64\"/></patternFill></fill></dxf>"
        "<dxf><fill><patternFill patternType=\"solid\"><fgColor rgb=\"FFF3F4F6\"/><bgColor indexed=\"64\"/></patternFill></fill></dxf>"
        "<dxf><fill><patternFill patternType=\"solid\"><fgColor rgb=\"FFEEF2FF\"/><bgColor indexed=\"64\"/></patternFill></fill></dxf>"
        "<dxf><fill><patternFill patternType=\"solid\"><fgColor rgb=\"FFFFF3CD\"/><bgColor indexed=\"64\"/></patternFill></fill></dxf>"
        "<dxf><fill><patternFill patternType=\"solid\"><fgColor rgb=\"FFE2F0D9\"/><bgColor indexed=\"64\"/></patternFill></fill></dxf>"
        "</dxfs>"
        "</styleSheet>"
    );
    out.calcChainXml = chainEntries.isEmpty()
        ? QString()
        : QStringLiteral(
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
            "<calcChain xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\">%1</calcChain>"
        ).arg(chainEntries.join(QString()));
    if (hasSharedStrings) {
        QString siXml;
        siXml.reserve(sharedStrings.size() * 24);
        for (const QString &s : sharedStrings) {
            siXml += QStringLiteral("<si><t>%1</t></si>").arg(escapeXml(s));
        }
        out.sharedStringsXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
            "<sst xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\" count=\"%1\" uniqueCount=\"%2\">%3</sst>"
        ).arg(sharedStringUseCount).arg(sharedStrings.size()).arg(siXml);
    }
    return out;
}

bool writeNativeXlsxPackage(
    const QString &root,
    const QString &targetPath,
    QStringList &traceLogs,
    const QVector<NativeXlsxSheetXmlPart> &sheets,
    const NativeXlsxXmlParts &xmlParts
) {
    if (!writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("[Content_Types].xml"), xmlParts.contentTypes)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("_rels/.rels"), xmlParts.rootRels)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/workbook.xml"), xmlParts.workbookXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels"), xmlParts.workbookRels)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/styles.xml"), xmlParts.stylesXml)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (!xmlParts.sharedStringsXml.isEmpty()
        && !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/sharedStrings.xml"), xmlParts.sharedStringsXml)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (xmlParts.hasAnyTable
        && !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/connections.xml"), xmlParts.connectionsXml)) {
        return false;
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < sheets.size(); ++i) {
        if (!writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/worksheets/sheet%1.xml").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].xml)) {
            return false;
        }
        if (!sheets[i].sheetRelsXml.isEmpty()
            && !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/worksheets/_rels/sheet%1.xml.rels").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].sheetRelsXml)) {
            return false;
        }
        if (sheets[i].hasTable) {
            if (!writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/tables/table%1.xml").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].tableXml)
                || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/tables/_rels/table%1.xml.rels").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].tableRelsXml)
                || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/queryTables/queryTable%1.xml").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].queryTableXml)) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        if (sheets[i].hasChart) {
            if (!writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/drawings/drawing%1.xml").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].drawingXml)
                || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/drawings/_rels/drawing%1.xml.rels").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].drawingRelsXml)
                || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/charts/chart%1.xml").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].chartXml)) {
                return false;
            }
            if (!sheets[i].chartRelsXml.isEmpty()
                && !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/charts/_rels/chart%1.xml.rels").arg(i + 1), sheets[i].chartRelsXml)) {
                return false;
            }
            if (!sheets[i].embeddedWorkbookName.isEmpty()) {
                const QString embeddedWorkbookPath = QStringLiteral("%1/xl/embeddings/%2")
                    .arg(root, sheets[i].embeddedWorkbookName);
                const QFileInfo workbookInfo(embeddedWorkbookPath);
                QDir().mkpath(workbookInfo.absolutePath());
                if (!buildEmbeddedWorkbookForChart(
                    embeddedWorkbookPath,
                    sheets[i].chartCategories,
                    sheets[i].chartSeriesNames,
                    sheets[i].chartSeriesValues
                )) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    if (!xmlParts.calcChainXml.isEmpty()
        && !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/calcChain.xml"), xmlParts.calcChainXml)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (!zipDirectoryToFile(root, targetPath, traceLogs)) {
        return false;
    }
    traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("XLSX 原生 OOXML 导出完成（保真链路）"));
    return true;
}

static bool exportNativeXlsx(const DocumentModel &document, const QString &targetPath, QStringList &traceLogs) {
    QTemporaryDir pkgDir;
    if (!pkgDir.isValid()) {
        return false;
    }
    const QString root = pkgDir.path();
    QVector<NativeXlsxSheetXmlPart> sheets;
    QStringList chainEntries;
    QStringList sharedStrings;
    QHash<QString, int> sharedStringIndex;
    int sharedStringUseCount = 0;
    auto getSharedStringId = [&](const QString &text) {
        const auto it = sharedStringIndex.constFind(text);
        if (it != sharedStringIndex.constEnd()) {
            sharedStringUseCount += 1;
            return it.value();
        }
        const int id = sharedStrings.size();
        sharedStrings.push_back(text);
        sharedStringIndex.insert(text, id);
        sharedStringUseCount += 1;
        return id;
    };
    const QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel> sheetModels = buildNativeXlsxSheetModels(document);
    const int sheetCount = sheetModels.size();
    int typedNumericCellCount = 0;
    int typedDateCellCount = 0;
    int formulaCellCount = 0;
    int plainTextCellCount = 0;
    int chartSheetCount = 0;
    int chartSeriesCount = 0;
    int chartLegendMappedCount = 0;
    for (int sheetIndex = 0; sheetIndex < sheetCount; ++sheetIndex) {
        const QVector<QStringList> &matrix = sheetModels[sheetIndex].matrix;
        const QVector<QVector<NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole>> &roleMatrix = sheetModels[sheetIndex].roleMatrix;
        int maxCol = 1;
        for (const QStringList &row : matrix) {
            maxCol = qMax(maxCol, row.size());
        }
        auto cellRoleAt = [&](int row, int col) {
            if (row < 0 || row >= roleMatrix.size()) {
                return NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Blank;
            }
            if (col < 0 || col >= roleMatrix[row].size()) {
                return NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Blank;
            }
            return roleMatrix[row][col];
        };
        for (int r = 0; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
            for (int c = 0; c < matrix[r].size(); ++c) {
                const QString text = matrix[r][c].trimmed();
                if (text.isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                const auto role = cellRoleAt(r, c);
                if (role == NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Formula || text.startsWith('=')) {
                    formulaCellCount += 1;
                    continue;
                }
                if (looksLikeDate(text)) {
                    typedDateCellCount += 1;
                } else if (looksLikePercent(text)
                           || looksLikeCurrency(text)
                           || looksLikeScientific(text)
                           || looksLikeNumber(text)) {
                    typedNumericCellCount += 1;
                } else {
                    plainTextCellCount += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        QVector<int> numberLikeCount(maxCol, 0);
        QVector<int> dateLikeCount(maxCol, 0);
        QVector<int> percentLikeCount(maxCol, 0);
        QVector<int> currencyLikeCount(maxCol, 0);
        QVector<int> scientificLikeCount(maxCol, 0);
        QVector<int> nonEmptyCount(maxCol, 0);
        for (int r = 0; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
            for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
                const QString text = c < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][c].trimmed() : QString();
                const auto role = cellRoleAt(r, c);
                if (role == NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Header
                    || role == NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Formula
                    || text.isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                nonEmptyCount[c] += 1;
                if (looksLikePercent(text)) {
                    percentLikeCount[c] += 1;
                } else if (looksLikeCurrency(text)) {
                    currencyLikeCount[c] += 1;
                } else if (looksLikeDate(text)) {
                    dateLikeCount[c] += 1;
                } else if (looksLikeScientific(text)) {
                    scientificLikeCount[c] += 1;
                } else if (looksLikeNumber(text)) {
                    numberLikeCount[c] += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        QVector<QVector<int>> styleGrid(matrix.size(), QVector<int>(maxCol, 0));
        QHash<int, int> inheritedStyleByCol;
        bool mergeHeader = maxCol > 1;
        if (mergeHeader) {
            for (int c = 1; c < maxCol; ++c) {
                const QString headerText = c < matrix[0].size() ? matrix[0][c].trimmed() : QString();
                if (!headerText.isEmpty()) {
                    mergeHeader = false;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        struct MergedRange {
            int sr = 0;
            int sc = 0;
            int er = 0;
            int ec = 0;
        };
        QVector<MergedRange> mergedRanges;
        if (mergeHeader) {
            mergedRanges.push_back({0, 0, 0, maxCol - 1});
        }
        // 语义表头补强：当表头存在“左侧标题 + 右侧连续空单元”时，生成横向合并。
        for (int r = 0; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
            bool rowHasHeader = false;
            for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
                if (cellRoleAt(r, c) == NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Header) {
                    rowHasHeader = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (!rowHasHeader) {
                continue;
            }
            int c = 0;
            while (c < maxCol) {
                const QString lead = c < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][c].trimmed() : QString();
                if (lead.isEmpty()) {
                    c += 1;
                    continue;
                }
                int ec = c;
                while (ec + 1 < maxCol) {
                    const QString next = (ec + 1) < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][ec + 1].trimmed() : QString();
                    if (!next.isEmpty()) {
                        break;
                    }
                    ec += 1;
                }
                if (ec > c) {
                    mergedRanges.push_back({r, c, r, ec});
                }
                c = ec + 1;
            }
        }
        {
            QSet<QString> dedupe;
            QVector<MergedRange> compact;
            compact.reserve(mergedRanges.size());
            for (const MergedRange &mr : mergedRanges) {
                const QString key = QStringLiteral("%1:%2:%3:%4").arg(mr.sr).arg(mr.sc).arg(mr.er).arg(mr.ec);
                if (dedupe.contains(key)) {
                    continue;
                }
                dedupe.insert(key);
                compact.push_back(mr);
            }
            mergedRanges = compact;
        }
        auto spillTouchesMergedRange = [&](int sr, int sc, int er, int ec) {
            for (const MergedRange &mr : mergedRanges) {
                const bool intersects = !(er < mr.sr || sr > mr.er || ec < mr.sc || sc > mr.ec);
                if (intersects) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        };
        QString sheetData;
        auto dynamicSpillExtent = [&](int startRow, int startCol, const QString &formulaText, bool &conflict) {
            conflict = false;
            const QPair<int, int> inferredShape = inferDynamicSpillShape(formulaText);
            int endRow = qMin(matrix.size() - 1, startRow + inferredShape.first - 1);
            int endCol = qMin(maxCol - 1, startCol + inferredShape.second - 1);
            if (startRow > endRow || startCol > endCol) {
                endRow = startRow;
                endCol = startCol;
            }
            if (spillTouchesMergedRange(startRow, startCol, endRow, endCol)) {
                conflict = true;
                return qMakePair(endRow, endCol);
            }
            for (int rr = startRow; rr <= endRow; ++rr) {
                for (int cc = startCol; cc <= endCol; ++cc) {
                    if (rr == startRow && cc == startCol) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    const QString nextText = cc < matrix[rr].size() ? matrix[rr][cc].trimmed() : QString();
                    if (!nextText.isEmpty()) {
                        conflict = true;
                        return qMakePair(endRow, endCol);
                    }
                }
            }
            return qMakePair(endRow, endCol);
        };
        auto parseNumericValue = [&](const QString &raw, double &valueOut) -> bool {
            QString t = raw.trimmed();
            if (t.isEmpty()) {
                return false;
            }
            t.replace(QChar(0xFF0C), QLatin1Char(','));
            t.replace(QChar(0x3000), QLatin1Char(' '));
            t = t.simplified();
            bool parenNegative = false;
            if (t.startsWith('(') && t.endsWith(')') && t.size() > 2) {
                parenNegative = true;
                t = t.mid(1, t.size() - 2).trimmed();
            }
            bool isPercent = false;
            if (t.endsWith('%')) {
                isPercent = true;
                t.chop(1);
            }
            t.remove(',');
            t.remove(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^[\$€¥￥]\s*)")));
            t.remove(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(\s*[\$€¥￥]$)")));
            t.remove(' ');
            bool ok = false;
            const double parsed = t.toDouble(&ok);
            if (!ok) {
                return false;
            }
            double value = isPercent ? (parsed / 100.0) : parsed;
            if (parenNegative) {
                value = -std::abs(value);
            }
            valueOut = value;
            return true;
        };
        auto parseDateSerial = [&](const QString &raw, double &serialOut) -> bool {
            const QString t = raw.trimmed();
            if (t.isEmpty()) {
                return false;
            }
            QDate date;
            QTime time(0, 0, 0);
            static const QRegularExpression cnDate(
                QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d{4})年(\d{1,2})月(\d{1,2})日(?:\s*(\d{1,2})[:：](\d{1,2})(?:[:：](\d{1,2}))?)?$)")
            );
            const QRegularExpressionMatch cnMatch = cnDate.match(t);
            if (cnMatch.hasMatch()) {
                date = QDate(cnMatch.captured(1).toInt(), cnMatch.captured(2).toInt(), cnMatch.captured(3).toInt());
