                if (!cnMatch.captured(4).isEmpty()) {
                    time = QTime(cnMatch.captured(4).toInt(), cnMatch.captured(5).toInt(), cnMatch.captured(6).isEmpty() ? 0 : cnMatch.captured(6).toInt());
                }
            } else {
                const QStringList dateTimeFormats{
                    QStringLiteral("yyyy-M-d HH:mm:ss"),
                    QStringLiteral("yyyy/M/d HH:mm:ss"),
                    QStringLiteral("yyyy-M-d HH:mm"),
                    QStringLiteral("yyyy/M/d HH:mm"),
                    QStringLiteral("yyyy-M-dTHH:mm:ss"),
                    QStringLiteral("yyyy-M-dTHH:mm")
                };
                QDateTime parsedDateTime;
                for (const QString &fmt : dateTimeFormats) {
                    parsedDateTime = QDateTime::fromString(t, fmt);
                    if (parsedDateTime.isValid()) {
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (parsedDateTime.isValid()) {
                    date = parsedDateTime.date();
                    time = parsedDateTime.time();
                } else {
                    date = QDate::fromString(t, QStringLiteral("yyyy-M-d"));
                    if (!date.isValid()) {
                        date = QDate::fromString(t, QStringLiteral("yyyy/M/d"));
                    }
                }
            }
            if (!date.isValid()) {
                return false;
            }
            const QDate excelBase(1899, 12, 30);
            serialOut = static_cast<double>(excelBase.daysTo(date))
                + static_cast<double>(time.msecsSinceStartOfDay()) / 86400000.0;
            return true;
        };
        for (int r = 0; r < matrix.size(); ++r) {
            sheetData += QStringLiteral("<row r=\"%1\">").arg(r + 1);
            for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
                const QString cellRef = xlsxCellRef(r, c);
                const QString text = c < matrix[r].size() ? matrix[r][c].trimmed() : QString();
                const auto role = cellRoleAt(r, c);
                int styleId = 0;
                if (role == NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Header) {
                    styleId = 1;
                } else if (role == NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Formula || text.startsWith('=')) {
                    styleId = (c > 0 && styleGrid[r][c - 1] > 0)
                        ? styleGrid[r][c - 1]
                        : (r > 0 && styleGrid[r - 1][c] > 0)
                            ? styleGrid[r - 1][c]
                            : inheritedStyleByCol.value(c, 2);
                } else if (looksLikePercent(text)) {
                    styleId = 5;
                } else if (looksLikeCurrency(text)) {
                    styleId = 4;
                } else if (looksLikeDate(text)) {
                    styleId = 3;
                } else if (looksLikeScientific(text)) {
                    styleId = 6;
                } else if (looksLikeNumber(text)) {
                    styleId = 2;
                } else if (role == NativeXlsxSheetModel::CellRole::Blank || text.isEmpty()) {
                    styleId = (c > 0 && styleGrid[r][c - 1] > 0)
                        ? styleGrid[r][c - 1]
                        : (r > 0 && styleGrid[r - 1][c] > 0)
                            ? styleGrid[r - 1][c]
                            : inheritedStyleByCol.value(c, 0);
                } else {
                    styleId = inheritedStyleByCol.value(c, 0);
                }
                styleGrid[r][c] = styleId;
                if (!text.isEmpty()) {
                    inheritedStyleByCol[c] = styleId;
                }
                if (text.startsWith('=')) {
                    const bool isArrayFormula = text.startsWith(QStringLiteral("={")) && text.endsWith('}');
                    const QString formulaText = isArrayFormula
                        ? text.mid(2, qMax(0, text.size() - 3))
                        : text.mid(1);
                    static const QRegularExpression formulaErrRe(
                        QStringLiteral(R"(#(N/A|VALUE!|REF!|DIV/0!|NUM!|NAME\?|NULL!))"),
                        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
                    );
                    const QRegularExpressionMatch errMatch = formulaErrRe.match(formulaText);
                    const QString formulaError = errMatch.hasMatch()
                        ? QStringLiteral("#%1").arg(errMatch.captured(1).toUpper())
                        : QString();
                    QString normalizedFormula = formulaText;
                    if (looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(text)
                        && normalizedFormula.contains('[')
                        && !normalizedFormula.contains(QStringLiteral("[@"))) {
                        normalizedFormula.replace(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(\[(#[^,\]]+|[^\]]+)\])")), QStringLiteral("[@$1]"));
                    }
                    const bool isDynamicArray = !isArrayFormula && looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(text);
                    if (!isArrayFormula && !isDynamicArray) {
                        QString implicitFormula = applyImplicitIntersectionToFormula(QStringLiteral("=%1").arg(normalizedFormula));
                        if (implicitFormula.startsWith('=')) {
                            implicitFormula.remove(0, 1);
                        }
                        normalizedFormula = implicitFormula;
                    }
                    if (!formulaError.isEmpty()) {
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\" t=\"e\"><v>%3</v></c>")
                            .arg(cellRef).arg(styleId).arg(escapeXml(formulaError));
                        continue;
                    }
                    const bool hasStructuredRef = looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(text);
                    if (isArrayFormula || isDynamicArray) {
                        bool spillConflict = false;
                        QPair<int, int> spillExtent = qMakePair(r, c);
                        const bool spillBlockedByTableObject = isDynamicArray && matrix.size() > 1 && r >= 1;
                        if (isDynamicArray) {
                            spillExtent = dynamicSpillExtent(r, c, formulaText, spillConflict);
                        }
                        if (spillBlockedByTableObject
                            && (spillExtent.first > r || spillExtent.second > c)) {
                            spillConflict = true;
                        }
                        if (spillConflict && isDynamicArray) {
                            sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\" t=\"e\"><v>#SPILL!</v></c>")
                                .arg(cellRef).arg(styleId);
                        } else {
                            sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\">").arg(cellRef).arg(styleId);
                            const QString spillRef = isDynamicArray
                                ? QStringLiteral("%1:%2").arg(cellRef, xlsxCellRef(spillExtent.first, spillExtent.second))
                                : cellRef;
                            sheetData += QStringLiteral("<f t=\"array\" ref=\"%1\">%2</f>").arg(spillRef).arg(escapeXml(normalizedFormula));
                            sheetData += QStringLiteral("</c>");
                            chainEntries.push_back(QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" i=\"%2\"/>").arg(cellRef).arg(sheetIndex + 1));
                            if (hasStructuredRef) {
                                chainEntries.push_back(QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" i=\"%2\" l=\"1\"/>").arg(cellRef).arg(sheetIndex + 1));
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\">").arg(cellRef).arg(styleId);
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("<f>%1</f>").arg(escapeXml(normalizedFormula));
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("</c>");
                        chainEntries.push_back(QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" i=\"%2\"/>").arg(cellRef).arg(sheetIndex + 1));
                        if (hasStructuredRef) {
                            chainEntries.push_back(QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" i=\"%2\" l=\"1\"/>").arg(cellRef).arg(sheetIndex + 1));
                        }
                    }
                } else {
                    if (text.isEmpty()) {
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\"/>").arg(cellRef).arg(styleId);
                        continue;
                    }
                    const QString upperText = text.toUpper();
                    if (upperText == QStringLiteral("TRUE") || upperText == QStringLiteral("FALSE")) {
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\" t=\"b\"><v>%3</v></c>")
                            .arg(cellRef)
                            .arg(styleId)
                            .arg(upperText == QStringLiteral("TRUE") ? QStringLiteral("1") : QStringLiteral("0"));
                        continue;
                    }
                    static const QSet<QString> kExcelErrors{
                        QStringLiteral("#N/A"),
                        QStringLiteral("#VALUE!"),
                        QStringLiteral("#REF!"),
                        QStringLiteral("#DIV/0!"),
                        QStringLiteral("#NUM!"),
                        QStringLiteral("#NAME?"),
                        QStringLiteral("#NULL!"),
                        QStringLiteral("#SPILL!"),
                        QStringLiteral("#CALC!")
                    };
                    if (kExcelErrors.contains(upperText)) {
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\" t=\"e\"><v>%3</v></c>")
                            .arg(cellRef)
                            .arg(styleId)
                            .arg(escapeXml(upperText));
                        continue;
                    }
                    double numericValue = 0.0;
                    if (parseDateSerial(text, numericValue) || parseNumericValue(text, numericValue)) {
                        sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\"><v>%3</v></c>")
                            .arg(cellRef)
                            .arg(styleId)
                            .arg(QString::number(numericValue, 'g', 15));
                        continue;
                    }
                    const int sstId = getSharedStringId(text);
                    sheetData += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" s=\"%2\" t=\"s\"><v>%3</v></c>")
                        .arg(cellRef)
                        .arg(styleId)
                        .arg(sstId);
                }
            }
            sheetData += QStringLiteral("</row>");
        }
        const QString filterRange = QStringLiteral("A1:%1%2")
            .arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(maxCol - 1))
            .arg(matrix.size());
        const QString dataRangeRef = QStringLiteral("$A$1:$%1$%2")
            .arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(maxCol - 1))
            .arg(matrix.size());
        QString dataValidationItems;
        int dataValidationCount = 0;
        for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
            if (nonEmptyCount[c] < 3) {
                continue;
            }
            const int threshold = qMax(2, static_cast<int>(qCeil(nonEmptyCount[c] * 0.6)));
            const QString colName = xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(c);
            const QString sqref = QStringLiteral("%1%2:%1%3").arg(colName).arg(2).arg(matrix.size());
            if (dateLikeCount[c] >= threshold) {
                dataValidationItems += QStringLiteral(
                    "<dataValidation type=\"date\" operator=\"between\" allowBlank=\"1\" sqref=\"%1\">"
                    "<formula1>DATE(1900,1,1)</formula1><formula2>DATE(9999,12,31)</formula2></dataValidation>"
                ).arg(sqref);
                dataValidationCount += 1;
            } else if (percentLikeCount[c] >= threshold) {
                dataValidationItems += QStringLiteral(
                    "<dataValidation type=\"decimal\" operator=\"between\" allowBlank=\"1\" sqref=\"%1\">"
                    "<formula1>0</formula1><formula2>1</formula2></dataValidation>"
                ).arg(sqref);
                dataValidationCount += 1;
            } else if (currencyLikeCount[c] >= threshold || numberLikeCount[c] >= threshold || scientificLikeCount[c] >= threshold) {
                dataValidationItems += QStringLiteral(
                    "<dataValidation type=\"decimal\" allowBlank=\"1\" sqref=\"%1\"/>"
                ).arg(sqref);
                dataValidationCount += 1;
            }
        }
        const QString dataValidationsXml = dataValidationCount > 0
            ? QStringLiteral("<dataValidations count=\"%1\">%2</dataValidations>")
                .arg(dataValidationCount).arg(dataValidationItems)
            : QString();
        QString conditionalFormattingXml;
        if (matrix.size() > 1) {
            int cfPriority = 1;
            const QString currentColA = QStringLiteral("$A2");
            const QString compareCol = maxCol > 1
                ? QStringLiteral("$%1%2").arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(1)).arg(2)
                : currentColA;
            const QString refSheetName = sanitizeSheetName(QStringLiteral("Page_%1").arg(sheetCount > 1
                ? ((sheetIndex + 1) % sheetCount) + 1
                : 1));
            QString escapedRefSheet = refSheetName;
            escapedRefSheet.replace('\'', QStringLiteral("''"));
            for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
                if (nonEmptyCount[c] < 2) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QString col = xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(c);
                const QString sqref = QStringLiteral("%1%2:%1%3").arg(col).arg(2).arg(matrix.size());
                conditionalFormattingXml += buildNativeXlsxConditionalFormattingBlock(
                    sqref, col, compareCol, escapedRefSheet, 2, cfPriority
                );
            }
        }
        QString mergeCellItems;
        for (const MergedRange &mr : mergedRanges) {
            mergeCellItems += QStringLiteral(
                "<mergeCell ref=\"%1:%2\"/>"
            ).arg(xlsxCellRef(mr.sr, mr.sc), xlsxCellRef(mr.er, mr.ec));
        }
        const QString mergeCellsXml = mergeCellItems.isEmpty()
            ? QString()
            : QStringLiteral("<mergeCells count=\"%1\">%2</mergeCells>")
                .arg(mergedRanges.size())
                .arg(mergeCellItems);
        const QString tableRef = QStringLiteral("A1:%1%2")
            .arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(maxCol - 1))
            .arg(matrix.size());
        QString tableColumnsXml;
        for (int c = 0; c < maxCol; ++c) {
            QString header = c < matrix[0].size() ? matrix[0][c].trimmed() : QString();
            if (header.isEmpty()) {
                header = QStringLiteral("Column%1").arg(c + 1);
            }
            const int numericStrength = numberLikeCount[c] + currencyLikeCount[c] + percentLikeCount[c];
            const bool mostlyNumeric = numericStrength >= qMax(2, nonEmptyCount[c] / 2);
            if (mostlyNumeric) {
                tableColumnsXml += QStringLiteral(
                    "<tableColumn id=\"%1\" name=\"%2\" totalsRowFunction=\"sum\">"
                    "<calculatedColumnFormula>[@[%2]]</calculatedColumnFormula>"
                    "</tableColumn>"
                ).arg(c + 1).arg(escapeXml(header));
            } else {
                tableColumnsXml += QStringLiteral("<tableColumn id=\"%1\" name=\"%2\" totalsRowLabel=\"合计\"/>")
                    .arg(c + 1).arg(escapeXml(header));
            }
        }
        const NativeXlsxChartBuildResult chartPart = buildNativeXlsxChartPart(sheetModels[sheetIndex], sheetIndex);
        const bool hasTable = matrix.size() > 1 && maxCol >= 1;
        const bool hasChart = chartPart.valid;
        if (hasChart) {
            chartSheetCount += 1;
            chartSeriesCount += chartPart.seriesNames.size();
            chartLegendMappedCount += chartPart.seriesNames.size();
        }
        const QString tablePartXml = hasTable
            ? QStringLiteral("<tableParts count=\"1\"><tablePart r:id=\"rIdTable1\"/></tableParts>")
            : QString();
        const QString drawingPartXml = hasChart
            ? QStringLiteral("<drawing r:id=\"rIdDrawing1\"/>")
            : QString();
        const QString printLayoutXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<printOptions gridLines=\"1\" headings=\"0\"/>"
            "<pageMargins left=\"0.7\" right=\"0.7\" top=\"0.75\" bottom=\"0.75\" header=\"0.3\" footer=\"0.3\"/>"
            "<pageSetup paperSize=\"9\" orientation=\"landscape\" fitToWidth=\"1\" fitToHeight=\"0\"/>"
            "<headerFooter/>"
        );
        const QString sheetXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
            "<worksheet xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\" "
            "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\">"
            "<sheetPr><pageSetUpPr fitToPage=\"1\"/></sheetPr>"
            "<sheetViews><sheetView workbookViewId=\"0\"><pane ySplit=\"1\" topLeftCell=\"A2\" activePane=\"bottomLeft\" state=\"frozen\"/></sheetView></sheetViews>"
            "<sheetData>%1</sheetData>%4<autoFilter ref=\"%2\"/>%3%5%6%7%8</worksheet>"
        ).arg(sheetData, filterRange, conditionalFormattingXml, mergeCellsXml, dataValidationsXml, tablePartXml, drawingPartXml, printLayoutXml);
        const QString tableXml = hasTable
            ? QStringLiteral(
                "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
                "<table xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\" id=\"%1\" name=\"Table%1\" displayName=\"Table%1\" ref=\"%2\" totalsRowShown=\"1\" headerRowCount=\"1\" insertRow=\"1\">"
                "<autoFilter ref=\"%2\"/><tableColumns count=\"%3\">%4</tableColumns>"
                "<tableStyleInfo name=\"TableStyleMedium2\" showFirstColumn=\"0\" showLastColumn=\"1\" showRowStripes=\"1\" showColumnStripes=\"1\"/>"
                "<extLst><ext uri=\"{05C60535-1F16-4fd2-B633-F4F36F0B64E0}\" xmlns:x14=\"http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/spreadsheetml/2009/9/main\">"
                "<x14:table tableStyleInfo=\"TableStyleMedium2\"/>"
                "</ext><ext uri=\"{3A4CF648-6AED-40f4-86FF-DC5316D8AED3}\" xmlns:x15=\"http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/spreadsheetml/2010/11/main\">"
                "<x15:tableSlicerCache tableSlicerCacheId=\"%1\"/>"
                "</ext></extLst>"
                "</table>"
            ).arg(sheetIndex + 1).arg(tableRef).arg(maxCol).arg(tableColumnsXml)
            : QString();
        const QString queryTableXml = hasTable
            ? QStringLiteral(
                "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
                "<queryTable xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\" name=\"ExternalData_%1\" "
                "connectionId=\"%1\" backgroundRefresh=\"1\" refreshOnLoad=\"1\" adjustColumnWidth=\"1\" applyNumberFormats=\"1\" applyAlignmentFormats=\"1\"/>"
            ).arg(sheetIndex + 1)
            : QString();
        const QString tableRelsXml = hasTable
            ? QStringLiteral(
                "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
                "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
                "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/queryTable\" Target=\"../queryTables/queryTable%1.xml\"/>"
                "</Relationships>"
            ).arg(sheetIndex + 1)
            : QString();
        QString sheetRelItems;
        if (hasTable) {
            sheetRelItems += QStringLiteral(
                "<Relationship Id=\"rIdTable1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/table\" Target=\"../tables/table%1.xml\"/>"
            ).arg(sheetIndex + 1);
        }
        if (hasChart) {
            sheetRelItems += QStringLiteral(
                "<Relationship Id=\"rIdDrawing1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/drawing\" Target=\"../drawings/drawing%1.xml\"/>"
            ).arg(sheetIndex + 1);
        }
        const QString sheetRelsXml = sheetRelItems.isEmpty()
            ? QString()
            : QStringLiteral(
                "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
                "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">%1</Relationships>"
            ).arg(sheetRelItems);
        sheets.push_back({
            sheetModels[sheetIndex].name,
            sheetXml,
            dataRangeRef,
            hasTable,
            hasChart,
            tableXml,
            sheetRelsXml,
            tableRelsXml,
            queryTableXml,
            chartPart.drawingXml,
            chartPart.drawingRelsXml,
            chartPart.chartXml,
            chartPart.chartRelsXml,
            chartPart.embeddedWorkbookName,
            chartPart.chartObjectEvidence,
            chartPart.categories,
            chartPart.seriesNames,
            chartPart.seriesValues
        });
    }

    const NativeXlsxXmlParts xmlParts = buildNativeXlsxXmlParts(sheets, chainEntries, sharedStrings, sharedStringUseCount);
    traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("XLSX 保真诊断: sharedStrings(unique=%1, uses=%2), calcChain=%3, dual-channel-sheets=%4, typedCells(num=%5,date=%6,formula=%7,text=%8), chartObjects(sheets=%9,series=%10,legendMapped=%11)")
        .arg(sharedStrings.size())
        .arg(sharedStringUseCount)
        .arg(chainEntries.isEmpty() ? 0 : 1)
        .arg(sheetModels.size())
        .arg(typedNumericCellCount)
        .arg(typedDateCellCount)
        .arg(formulaCellCount)
        .arg(plainTextCellCount)
        .arg(chartSheetCount)
        .arg(chartSeriesCount)
        .arg(chartLegendMappedCount));
    return writeNativeXlsxPackage(root, targetPath, traceLogs, sheets, xmlParts);
}


} // namespace

bool exportExcelXlsxNative(const DocumentModel &document, const QString &targetPath, QStringList &traceLogs) {
    return exportNativeXlsx(document, targetPath, traceLogs);
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/ooxml/NativeOoxmlExportKernel.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/infrastructure/ooxml/NativeOoxmlExportKernel.h"

#include <QDir>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QHash>
#include <QIODevice>
#include <QProcess>
#include <QSaveFile>
#include <QStandardPaths>
#include <QStringConverter>
#include <QTemporaryDir>
#include <QTextStream>
#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter::ooxml {

QString escapeXml(const QString &input) {
    QString escaped = input;
    escaped.replace('&', QStringLiteral("&amp;"));
    escaped.replace('<', QStringLiteral("&lt;"));
    escaped.replace('>', QStringLiteral("&gt;"));
    escaped.replace('"', QStringLiteral("&quot;"));
    escaped.replace('\'', QStringLiteral("&apos;"));
    return escaped;
}

QString xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(const int zeroBased) {
    int index = zeroBased;
    if (index < 0) {
        return QStringLiteral("A");
    }
    QString out;
    while (index >= 0) {
        const int rem = index % 26;
        out.prepend(QChar(static_cast<char>('A' + rem)));
        index = index / 26 - 1;
    }
    return out;
}

QString xlsxCellRef(const int zeroBasedRowIndex, const int zeroBasedColIndex) {
    return QStringLiteral("%1%2").arg(xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(zeroBasedColIndex)).arg(qMax(1, zeroBasedRowIndex + 1));
}

bool writeUtf8File(const QString &path, const QString &content) {
    QSaveFile file(path);
    if (!file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
        return false;
    }
    QTextStream stream(&file);
    stream.setEncoding(QStringConverter::Utf8);
    stream << content;
    return file.commit();
}

bool writeBinaryFile(const QString &path, const QByteArray &content) {
    const QFileInfo info(path);
    QDir dir = info.dir();
    if (!dir.exists() && !dir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."))) {
        return false;
    }
    QSaveFile file(path);
    if (!file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (file.write(content) != content.size()) {
        return false;
    }
    return file.commit();
}

bool writePackagePart(const QString &rootDir, const QString &relativePath, const QString &content) {
    const QString fullPath = QDir(rootDir).filePath(relativePath);
    const QFileInfo info(fullPath);
    QDir dir = info.dir();
    if (!dir.exists() && !dir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."))) {
        return false;
    }
    return writeUtf8File(fullPath, content);
}

bool zipDirectoryToFile(const QString &sourceRoot, const QString &targetPath, QStringList &traceLogs) {
    QString zipProgram = QStandardPaths::findExecutable(QStringLiteral("zip"));
    if (zipProgram.isEmpty()) {
        zipProgram = QStringLiteral("/usr/bin/zip");
    }
    if (!QFileInfo::exists(zipProgram)) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("原生 OOXML 打包失败: 未找到 zip 命令"));
        return false;
    }
    QFile::remove(targetPath);
    QProcess process;
    process.setWorkingDirectory(sourceRoot);
    process.start(zipProgram, QStringList{
        QStringLiteral("-q"),
        QStringLiteral("-r"),
        targetPath,
        QStringLiteral(".")
    });
    if (!process.waitForStarted(3000)) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("原生 OOXML 打包失败: zip 未能启动"));
        return false;
    }
    if (!process.waitForFinished(15000)) {
        process.kill();
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("原生 OOXML 打包失败: zip 超时"));
        return false;
    }
    if (process.exitCode() != 0) {
        const QString output = QString::fromUtf8(process.readAllStandardOutput() + process.readAllStandardError()).trimmed();
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("原生 OOXML 打包失败: %1").arg(output.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("zip 执行失败") : output));
        return false;
    }
    return QFileInfo::exists(targetPath);
}

bool buildEmbeddedWorkbookForChart(
    const QString &targetPath,
    const QStringList &categories,
    const QVector<QString> &seriesNames,
    const QVector<QVector<double>> &seriesValues
) {
    QTemporaryDir pkgDir;
    if (!pkgDir.isValid()) {
        return false;
    }
    const QString root = pkgDir.path();
    QString contentTypes = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Types xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/content-types\">"
        "<Default Extension=\"rels\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.relationships+xml\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"xml\" ContentType=\"application/xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/xl/workbook.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet.main+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.worksheet+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/xl/sharedStrings.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sharedStrings+xml\"/>"
        "</Types>"
    );
    const QString rootRels = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/officeDocument\" Target=\"xl/workbook.xml\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    );
    const QString workbookXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<workbook xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\">"
        "<sheets><sheet name=\"Sheet1\" sheetId=\"1\" r:id=\"rId1\"/></sheets></workbook>"
    );
    const QString workbookRels = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/worksheet\" Target=\"worksheets/sheet1.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId2\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/sharedStrings\" Target=\"sharedStrings.xml\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    );
    QString rows;
    QStringList sstItems;
    QHash<QString, int> sstIds;
    int sstUseCount = 0;
    auto sstId = [&](const QString &v) {
        const auto it = sstIds.constFind(v);
        if (it != sstIds.constEnd()) {
            sstUseCount += 1;
            return it.value();
        }
        const int id = sstItems.size();
        sstItems.push_back(v);
        sstIds.insert(v, id);
        sstUseCount += 1;
        return id;
    };
    rows += QStringLiteral("<row r=\"1\"><c r=\"A1\" t=\"s\"><v>%1</v></c>").arg(sstId(QStringLiteral("Category")));
    for (int si = 0; si < seriesNames.size(); ++si) {
        rows += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\" t=\"s\"><v>%2</v></c>")
            .arg(xlsxCellRef(0, si + 1))
            .arg(sstId(seriesNames[si]));
    }
    rows += QStringLiteral("</row>");
    for (int ci = 0; ci < categories.size(); ++ci) {
        rows += QStringLiteral("<row r=\"%1\"><c r=\"%2\" t=\"s\"><v>%3</v></c>")
            .arg(ci + 2)
            .arg(xlsxCellRef(ci + 1, 0))
            .arg(sstId(categories[ci]));
        for (int si = 0; si < seriesNames.size(); ++si) {
            const double v = (si < seriesValues.size() && ci < seriesValues[si].size()) ? seriesValues[si][ci] : 0.0;
            rows += QStringLiteral("<c r=\"%1\"><v>%2</v></c>")
                .arg(xlsxCellRef(ci + 1, si + 1))
                .arg(QString::number(v, 'f', 2));
        }
        rows += QStringLiteral("</row>");
    }
    const QString sheetXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<worksheet xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\">"
        "<sheetData>%1</sheetData>"
        "</worksheet>"
    ).arg(rows);
    QString sstXmlItems;
    for (const QString &item : sstItems) {
        sstXmlItems += QStringLiteral("<si><t>%1</t></si>").arg(escapeXml(item));
    }
    const QString sharedStringsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<sst xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\" count=\"%1\" uniqueCount=\"%2\">%3</sst>"
    ).arg(sstUseCount).arg(sstItems.size()).arg(sstXmlItems);
    if (!writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("[Content_Types].xml"), contentTypes)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("_rels/.rels"), rootRels)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/workbook.xml"), workbookXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels"), workbookRels)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml"), sheetXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("xl/sharedStrings.xml"), sharedStringsXml)) {
        return false;
    }
    QStringList logs;
    return zipDirectoryToFile(root, targetPath, logs);
}

} // namespace converter::ooxml

📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrAdapter.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrAdapter.h"

#include <QFileInfo>

namespace converter {

namespace {

PageContent buildPageFromPlainText(const QString &text, const int pageIndex) {
    PageContent page;
    page.pageIndex = pageIndex;
    const QStringList lines = text.split('\n');
    for (const QString &line : lines) {
        const QString trimmed = line.trimmed();
        if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        TextLine textLine;
        textLine.spans.push_back(TextSpan{trimmed, 0.8f});
        page.lines.push_back(textLine);
    }
    return page;
}

} // namespace

QString TesseractAdapter::name() const {
    return QStringLiteral("tesseract");
}

bool TesseractAdapter::available(ToolExecutor &executor) const {
    return !executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("tesseract")).isEmpty();
}

bool TesseractAdapter::runOnImages(
    const QStringList &imagePaths,
    const OcrSettings &settings,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    DocumentModel &document,
    QStringList &traceLogs
) const {
    const QString tesseract = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("tesseract"));
    if (tesseract.isEmpty()) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("Tesseract 不可用"));
        return false;
    }

    int pageIndex = 0;
    for (const QString &imagePath : imagePaths) {
        const QStringList args = {
            imagePath,
            QStringLiteral("stdout"),
            QStringLiteral("-l"),
            settings.languages,
            QStringLiteral("--psm"),
            QString::number(settings.psm)
        };
        const CommandResult result = executor.run(tesseract, args, 3000, -1);
        if (!result.started || result.exitCode != 0) {
            traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("Tesseract 识别失败: %1").arg(QFileInfo(imagePath).fileName()));
            return false;
        }
        document.addPage(buildPageFromPlainText(result.combinedOutput, pageIndex));
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("Tesseract 已识别页面: %1").arg(pageIndex + 1));
        pageIndex += 1;
    }
    return true;
}

QString PaddleOcrAdapter::name() const {
    return QStringLiteral("paddleocr");
}

bool PaddleOcrAdapter::available(ToolExecutor &executor) const {
    return !executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("paddleocr")).isEmpty();
}

bool PaddleOcrAdapter::runOnImages(
    const QStringList &imagePaths,
    const OcrSettings &settings,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    DocumentModel &document,
    QStringList &traceLogs
) const {
    const QString paddleocr = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("paddleocr"));
    if (paddleocr.isEmpty()) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PaddleOCR 不可用"));
        return false;
    }

    int pageIndex = 0;
    for (const QString &imagePath : imagePaths) {
        QStringList args = {
            QStringLiteral("--image_dir"),
            imagePath,
            QStringLiteral("--use_angle_cls"),
            QStringLiteral("true"),
            QStringLiteral("--lang"),
            QStringLiteral("ch"),
            QStringLiteral("--use_gpu"),
            settings.useGpu ? QStringLiteral("true") : QStringLiteral("false")
        };

        const CommandResult result = executor.run(paddleocr, args, 3000, -1);
        if (!result.started || result.exitCode != 0) {
            traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PaddleOCR 识别失败: %1").arg(QFileInfo(imagePath).fileName()));
            return false;
        }

        // PaddleOCR CLI 输出带位置信息与置信度，这里先保留全文，后续可做结构化解析。
        document.addPage(buildPageFromPlainText(result.combinedOutput, pageIndex));
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PaddleOCR 已识别页面: %1").arg(pageIndex + 1));
        pageIndex += 1;
    }
    return true;
}

OcrAdapterRegistry::OcrAdapterRegistry() {
    adapters.push_back(std::make_unique<TesseractAdapter>());
    adapters.push_back(std::make_unique<PaddleOcrAdapter>());
}

const IOcrAdapter *OcrAdapterRegistry::pickBestAdapter(ToolExecutor &executor) const {
    // 优先使用 Tesseract（部署轻量），其次 PaddleOCR。
    for (const auto &adapter : adapters) {
        if (adapter->available(executor)) {
            return adapter.get();
        }
    }
    return nullptr;
}

} // namespace converter

📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrAdapter.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>
#include <memory>
#include <vector>

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"
#include "core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.h"

namespace converter {

// OCR 配置项可从 UI/配置中心注入；当前先给出商用所需的核心参数。
struct OcrSettings {
    QString languages = QStringLiteral("chi_sim+eng");
    int psm = 3;
    bool useGpu = false;
};

class IOcrAdapter {
public:
    virtual ~IOcrAdapter() = default;
    virtual QString name() const = 0;
    virtual bool available(ToolExecutor &executor) const = 0;
    virtual bool runOnImages(
        const QStringList &imagePaths,
        const OcrSettings &settings,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        DocumentModel &document,
        QStringList &traceLogs
    ) const = 0;
};

class TesseractAdapter final : public IOcrAdapter {
public:
    QString name() const override;
    bool available(ToolExecutor &executor) const override;
    bool runOnImages(
        const QStringList &imagePaths,
        const OcrSettings &settings,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        DocumentModel &document,
        QStringList &traceLogs
    ) const override;
};

class PaddleOcrAdapter final : public IOcrAdapter {
public:
    QString name() const override;
    bool available(ToolExecutor &executor) const override;
    bool runOnImages(
        const QStringList &imagePaths,
        const OcrSettings &settings,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        DocumentModel &document,
        QStringList &traceLogs
    ) const override;
};

class OcrAdapterRegistry final {
public:
    OcrAdapterRegistry();
    const IOcrAdapter *pickBestAdapter(ToolExecutor &executor) const;

private:
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<IOcrAdapter>> adapters;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrLayoutFusion.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrLayoutFusion.h"

namespace converter {

bool OcrLayoutFusion::merge(const LayoutDocument &layout, DocumentModel &ocrDocument) const {
    if (layout.pages.isEmpty() || ocrDocument.pages().isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    QVector<PageContent> pages = ocrDocument.pages();
    int patchedLines = 0;

    for (PageContent &page : pages) {
        const LayoutPage *layoutPage = nullptr;
        for (const LayoutPage &candidate : layout.pages) {
            if (candidate.pageIndex == page.pageIndex) {
                layoutPage = &candidate;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (layoutPage == nullptr) {
            continue;
        }
        page.width = layoutPage->width > 0.0 ? static_cast<float>(layoutPage->width) : page.width;
        page.height = layoutPage->height > 0.0 ? static_cast<float>(layoutPage->height) : page.height;

        QVector<LayoutLine> layoutLines;
        for (const LayoutBlock &block : layoutPage->blocks) {
            for (const LayoutLine &line : block.lines) {
                layoutLines.push_back(line);
            }
        }
        const int minCount = qMin(layoutLines.size(), page.lines.size());
        for (int i = 0; i < minCount; ++i) {
            TextLine &ocrLine = page.lines[i];
            const LayoutLine &refLine = layoutLines[i];
            if (ocrLine.w > 0.0f && ocrLine.h > 0.0f) {
                continue;
            }
            ocrLine.x = static_cast<float>(refLine.box.x);
            ocrLine.y = static_cast<float>(refLine.box.y);
            ocrLine.w = static_cast<float>(refLine.box.w);
            ocrLine.h = static_cast<float>(refLine.box.h);
            patchedLines += 1;
        }
    }

    if (patchedLines <= 0) {
        return false;
    }
    ocrDocument.clear();
    for (const PageContent &page : pages) {
        ocrDocument.addPage(page);
    }
    return true;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/OcrLayoutFusion.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"
#include "core/domain/model/LayoutModel.h"

namespace converter {

// OCR + 版面联合推理的轻量融合器：
// 1) 复用版面几何框补全 OCR 行坐标
// 2) 提升扫描件在后续导出阶段的布局可用性
class OcrLayoutFusion final {
public:
    bool merge(const LayoutDocument &layout, DocumentModel &ocrDocument) const;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfLayoutExtractor.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfLayoutExtractor.h"

#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>
#include <QColor>
#include <QCryptographicHash>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QHash>
#include <QImageReader>
#include <QPdfDocument>
#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QStandardPaths>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QTemporaryDir>
#include <QXmlStreamReader>
#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

namespace {

struct XmlFontSpec {
    QString family;
    QString color;
    bool bold = false;
    bool italic = false;
};

struct XmlStyledText {
    LayoutBBox box;
    QString text;
    QString family;
    QString color;
    bool bold = false;
    bool italic = false;
    double lineHeight = 0.0;
};

struct SvgGradient {
    QString id;
    QString color1;
    QString color2;
    double angleDeg = 0.0;
    bool valid = false;
};

struct SvgBackgroundProbeStats {
    bool toolMissing = false;
    int pagesTried = 0;
    int pagesWithSvg = 0;
    int renderFailed = 0;
    QString firstRenderError;
    int candidates = 0;
    int accepted = 0;
    int rejectNoFill = 0;
    int rejectLowAlpha = 0;
    int rejectNoBox = 0;
    int rejectSmallOrOffset = 0;
    int rejectNotBgLike = 0;
};

QString xmlAttr(const QString &line, const QString &key) {
    const QRegularExpression re(
        QStringLiteral(R"(%1\s*=\s*["']([^"']*)["'])").arg(QRegularExpression::escape(key)),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = re.match(line);
    if (!m.hasMatch()) {
        return QString();
    }
    return m.captured(1);
}

double firstNumber(const QString &raw, bool *ok = nullptr) {
    const QRegularExpression numberRe(QStringLiteral("[-+]?[0-9]*\\.?[0-9]+"));
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = numberRe.match(raw);
    if (!m.hasMatch()) {
        if (ok != nullptr) {
            *ok = false;
        }
        return 0.0;
    }
    bool localOk = false;
    const double value = m.captured(0).toDouble(&localOk);
    if (ok != nullptr) {
        *ok = localOk;
    }
    return localOk ? value : 0.0;
}

QString parseGradientId(const QString &raw) {
    const QString t = raw.trimmed();
    if (!t.startsWith(QStringLiteral("url("), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
        return QString();
    }
    const int hashPos = t.indexOf('#');
    const int right = t.lastIndexOf(')');
    if (hashPos < 0 || right <= hashPos) {
        return QString();
    }
    return t.mid(hashPos + 1, right - hashPos - 1).trimmed();
}

QString normalizeHexColor(const QString &raw) {
    QString key = raw.trimmed();
    if (key.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    if (key.compare(QStringLiteral("none"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0
        || key.compare(QStringLiteral("transparent"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
        return QString();
    }
    QColor color(key);
    if (!color.isValid() && key.startsWith(QStringLiteral("rgb"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
        const int left = key.indexOf('(');
        const int right = key.lastIndexOf(')');
        if (left >= 0 && right > left) {
            const QStringList parts = key.mid(left + 1, right - left - 1).split(',', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
            if (parts.size() >= 3) {
                auto toByte = [](const QString &v) -> int {
                    const QString t = v.trimmed();
                    if (t.endsWith('%')) {
                        bool ok = false;
                        const double p = t.left(t.size() - 1).toDouble(&ok);
                        return ok ? qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(p * 2.55)), 255) : 0;
                    }
                    bool ok = false;
                    const int n = static_cast<int>(qRound(t.toDouble(&ok)));
                    return ok ? qBound(0, n, 255) : 0;
                };
                color = QColor(toByte(parts[0]), toByte(parts[1]), toByte(parts[2]));
            }
        }
    }
    if (!color.isValid()) {
        return QString();
    }
    return color.name(QColor::HexRgb).toUpper();
}

QHash<QString, QString> parseStyleMap(const QString &style) {
    QHash<QString, QString> out;
    const QStringList chunks = style.split(';', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
    for (const QString &chunk : chunks) {
        const int colon = chunk.indexOf(':');
        if (colon <= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString key = chunk.left(colon).trimmed().toLower();
        const QString value = chunk.mid(colon + 1).trimmed();
        if (!key.isEmpty() && !value.isEmpty()) {
            out.insert(key, value);
        }
    }
    return out;
}

double svgOpacity(const QString &raw, const QHash<QString, QString> &style, const QString &fallbackKey) {
    bool ok = false;
    double value = firstNumber(raw, &ok);
    if (!ok && style.contains(fallbackKey)) {
        value = firstNumber(style.value(fallbackKey), &ok);
    }
    if (!ok) {
        return 1.0;
    }
    return qBound(0.0, value, 1.0);
}

double gradientAngleFromVector(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2) {
    const double dx = x2 - x1;
    const double dy = y2 - y1;
    if (qAbs(dx) < 1e-5 && qAbs(dy) < 1e-5) {
        return 0.0;
    }
    const double rad = std::atan2(dy, dx);
    double deg = rad * 180.0 / 3.14159265358979323846;
    if (deg < 0.0) {
        deg += 360.0;
    }
    return deg;
}

bool parseSvgPathBounds(const QString &d, LayoutBBox &box) {
    const QRegularExpression numberRe(QStringLiteral("[-+]?[0-9]*\\.?[0-9]+"));
    QRegularExpressionMatchIterator it = numberRe.globalMatch(d);
    QVector<double> values;
    values.reserve(128);
    while (it.hasNext()) {
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = it.next();
        bool ok = false;
        const double v = m.captured(0).toDouble(&ok);
        if (ok) {
            values.push_back(v);
        }
    }
    if (values.size() < 4) {
        return false;
    }
    double minX = 1e18;
    double minY = 1e18;
    double maxX = -1e18;
    double maxY = -1e18;
    for (int i = 0; i + 1 < values.size(); i += 2) {
        const double x = values[i];
        const double y = values[i + 1];
        minX = qMin(minX, x);
        minY = qMin(minY, y);
        maxX = qMax(maxX, x);
        maxY = qMax(maxY, y);
    }
    if (maxX <= minX || maxY <= minY) {
        return false;
    }
    box.x = minX;
    box.y = minY;
    box.w = maxX - minX;
    box.h = maxY - minY;
    return true;
}

double bboxIoU(const LayoutBBox &a, const LayoutBBox &b) {
    const double ax2 = a.x + a.w;
    const double ay2 = a.y + a.h;
    const double bx2 = b.x + b.w;
    const double by2 = b.y + b.h;
    const double ix = qMax(0.0, qMin(ax2, bx2) - qMax(a.x, b.x));
    const double iy = qMax(0.0, qMin(ay2, by2) - qMax(a.y, b.y));
    const double inter = ix * iy;
    const double uni = qMax(1.0, (a.w * a.h) + (b.w * b.h) - inter);
    return inter / uni;
}

void detectPageBaseFillByRaster(
    const QString &pdfPath,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    const QString &tempRoot,
    LayoutDocument &out
) {
    if (out.pages.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString pdftoppm = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("pdftoppm"));
    if (pdftoppm.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }

    for (LayoutPage &page : out.pages) {
        const int pageNo = qMax(1, page.pageIndex + 1);
        const QString probeBase = QDir(tempRoot).filePath(QStringLiteral("bg_probe_%1").arg(pageNo));
        const QString probePng = probeBase + QStringLiteral(".png");
        const CommandResult probe = executor.run(
            pdftoppm,
            {
                QStringLiteral("-f"), QString::number(pageNo),
                QStringLiteral("-l"), QString::number(pageNo),
                QStringLiteral("-singlefile"),
                QStringLiteral("-r"), QStringLiteral("20"),
                QStringLiteral("-png"),
                pdfPath,
                probeBase
            },
            3000,
            10000
        );
        if (!probe.started || probe.exitCode != 0 || !QFileInfo::exists(probePng)) {
            continue;
        }
        QImageReader reader(probePng);
        const QImage image = reader.read();
        if (image.isNull() || image.width() <= 0 || image.height() <= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        QHash<quint32, int> histogram;
        QHash<quint32, int> borderHistogram;
        int total = 0;
        int borderTotal = 0;
        double borderSumR = 0.0;
        double borderSumG = 0.0;
        double borderSumB = 0.0;
        double borderSumLuma = 0.0;
        double borderSumLumaSq = 0.0;
        const int step = qMax(1, qMin(image.width(), image.height()) / 180);
        const int borderBandX = qMax(2, image.width() / 9);
        const int borderBandY = qMax(2, image.height() / 9);
        for (int y = 0; y < image.height(); y += step) {
            const QRgb *row = reinterpret_cast<const QRgb *>(image.constScanLine(y));
            for (int x = 0; x < image.width(); x += step) {
                const QColor color = QColor::fromRgb(row[x]);
                const int r = color.red() >> 3;
                const int g = color.green() >> 3;
                const int b = color.blue() >> 3;
                const quint32 key = (static_cast<quint32>(r) << 10)
                    | (static_cast<quint32>(g) << 5)
                    | static_cast<quint32>(b);
                histogram[key] += 1;
                total += 1;
                const bool isBorder = x < borderBandX
                    || x >= image.width() - borderBandX
                    || y < borderBandY
                    || y >= image.height() - borderBandY;
                if (isBorder) {
                    borderHistogram[key] += 1;
                    borderTotal += 1;
                    borderSumR += static_cast<double>(color.red());
                    borderSumG += static_cast<double>(color.green());
                    borderSumB += static_cast<double>(color.blue());
                    const double luma = 0.2126 * static_cast<double>(color.red())
                        + 0.7152 * static_cast<double>(color.green())
                        + 0.0722 * static_cast<double>(color.blue());
                    borderSumLuma += luma;
                    borderSumLumaSq += luma * luma;
                }
            }
        }
        if (total <= 0 || histogram.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        quint32 dominantKey = 0;
        int dominantCount = 0;
        for (auto it = histogram.constBegin(); it != histogram.constEnd(); ++it) {
            if (it.value() > dominantCount) {
                dominantCount = it.value();
                dominantKey = it.key();
            }
        }
        quint32 borderDominantKey = dominantKey;
        int borderDominantCount = 0;
        for (auto it = borderHistogram.constBegin(); it != borderHistogram.constEnd(); ++it) {
            if (it.value() > borderDominantCount) {
                borderDominantCount = it.value();
                borderDominantKey = it.key();
            }
        }
        const double ratio = static_cast<double>(dominantCount) / static_cast<double>(total);
        const double borderRatio = borderTotal > 0
            ? static_cast<double>(borderDominantCount) / static_cast<double>(borderTotal)
            : 0.0;
        if (ratio < 0.78 && borderRatio < 0.65) {
            continue;
        }
        const quint32 chosenKey = borderRatio >= 0.65 ? borderDominantKey : dominantKey;
        const int r = ((chosenKey >> 10) & 0x1F) * 8;
        const int g = ((chosenKey >> 5) & 0x1F) * 8;
        const int b = (chosenKey & 0x1F) * 8;
        if (r >= 248 && g >= 248 && b >= 248) {
            continue;
        }
        LayoutFillShape fill;
        fill.box.x = 0.0;
        fill.box.y = 0.0;
        fill.box.w = qMax(1.0, page.width);
        fill.box.h = qMax(1.0, page.height);
        fill.fillColor = normalizeHexColor(QColor(r, g, b).name(QColor::HexRgb));
        fill.shapeType = QStringLiteral("rect");
        fill.opacity = 1.0;
        fill.isBackground = true;
        if (!fill.fillColor.isEmpty()) {
            page.fills.push_back(fill);
        }
    }
}

void normalizeBackgroundFillCoverage(LayoutPage &page) {
    if (page.fills.isEmpty() || page.width <= 1.0 || page.height <= 1.0) {
        return;
    }
    const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, page.width * page.height);
    int bestIndex = -1;
    double bestArea = 0.0;
    for (int i = 0; i < page.fills.size(); ++i) {
        const LayoutFillShape &f = page.fills.at(i);
        if (!f.isBackground) {
            continue;
        }
        const double area = qMax(1.0, f.box.w * f.box.h);
        if (area > bestArea) {
            bestArea = area;
            bestIndex = i;
        }
    }
    if (bestIndex < 0) {
        return;
    }
    LayoutFillShape &best = page.fills[bestIndex];
    const double areaRatio = bestArea / pageArea;
    const double cx = best.box.x + best.box.w * 0.5;
    const double cy = best.box.y + best.box.h * 0.5;
    const bool centerCovered = qAbs(cx - page.width * 0.5) <= page.width * 0.18
        && qAbs(cy - page.height * 0.5) <= page.height * 0.18;
    const bool almostFull = areaRatio >= 0.86
        && best.box.x <= page.width * 0.08
        && best.box.y <= page.height * 0.08;
    const bool likelyBackgroundFrame = areaRatio >= 0.36 && centerCovered;
    if (almostFull || likelyBackgroundFrame) {
        best.box.x = 0.0;
        best.box.y = 0.0;
        best.box.w = page.width;
        best.box.h = page.height;
    }
}

void detectLargeVectorBackgroundsFromSvg(
    const QString &pdfPath,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    const QString &tempRoot,
    LayoutDocument &out,
    SvgBackgroundProbeStats *stats = nullptr
) {
    if (out.pages.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString pdftocairo = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("pdftocairo"));
    if (pdftocairo.isEmpty()) {
        if (stats != nullptr) {
            stats->toolMissing = true;
        }
        return;
    }

    for (LayoutPage &page : out.pages) {
        if (stats != nullptr) {
            stats->pagesTried += 1;
        }
        const int pageNo = qMax(1, page.pageIndex + 1);
        const QString svgBase = QDir(tempRoot).filePath(QStringLiteral("vector_probe_%1").arg(pageNo));
        const QString svgPath = svgBase + QStringLiteral(".svg");
        const QString svgPathWithPageSuffix = svgBase + QStringLiteral("-%1.svg").arg(pageNo);
        QFile::remove(svgPath);
        QFile::remove(svgPathWithPageSuffix);
        const CommandResult svgResult = executor.run(
            pdftocairo,
            {
                QStringLiteral("-svg"),
                QStringLiteral("-f"), QString::number(pageNo),
                QStringLiteral("-l"), QString::number(pageNo),
                pdfPath,
                svgPath
            },
            3000,
            12000
        );
        QString actualSvgPath = svgPath;
        if (!QFileInfo::exists(actualSvgPath) && QFileInfo::exists(svgPathWithPageSuffix)) {
            actualSvgPath = svgPathWithPageSuffix;
        }
        if (!svgResult.started || svgResult.exitCode != 0 || !QFileInfo::exists(actualSvgPath)) {
            if (stats != nullptr) {
                stats->renderFailed += 1;
                if (stats->firstRenderError.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    stats->firstRenderError = QStringLiteral("started=%1, exit=%2, msg=%3")
                        .arg(svgResult.started ? 1 : 0)
                        .arg(svgResult.exitCode)
                        .arg(svgResult.combinedOutput.left(180));
                }
            }
            continue;
        }
        if (stats != nullptr) {
            stats->pagesWithSvg += 1;
        }
        QFile svgFile(actualSvgPath);
        if (!svgFile.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
            continue;
        }
        const QByteArray xmlBytes = svgFile.readAll();
        QXmlStreamReader xml(xmlBytes);
        double svgW = page.width;
        double svgH = page.height;
        QVector<LayoutFillShape> candidates;
        QHash<QString, SvgGradient> gradients;
        QString currentGradientId;
        QVector<QPair<double, QString>> currentStops;
        auto finalizeGradient = [&]() {
            if (currentGradientId.isEmpty() || currentStops.isEmpty()) {
                currentGradientId.clear();
                currentStops.clear();
                return;
            }
            std::sort(currentStops.begin(), currentStops.end(), [](const QPair<double, QString> &a, const QPair<double, QString> &b) {
                return a.first < b.first;
            });
            SvgGradient g;
            g.id = currentGradientId;
            g.color1 = currentStops.first().second;
            g.color2 = currentStops.last().second;
            if (g.color1.isEmpty() || g.color2.isEmpty()) {
                currentGradientId.clear();
                currentStops.clear();
                return;
            }
            g.valid = true;
            gradients.insert(g.id, g);
            currentGradientId.clear();
            currentStops.clear();
        };
        while (!xml.atEnd()) {
            xml.readNext();
            if (xml.isEndElement() && xml.name().compare(QStringLiteral("linearGradient"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                finalizeGradient();
                continue;
            }
            if (!xml.isStartElement()) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString tag = xml.name().toString();
            const QXmlStreamAttributes attrs = xml.attributes();
            if (tag.compare(QStringLiteral("svg"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                bool okW = false;
                bool okH = false;
                const double width = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("width")).toString(), &okW);
                const double height = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("height")).toString(), &okH);
                if (okW && width > 0.0) {
                    svgW = width;
                }
                if (okH && height > 0.0) {
                    svgH = height;
                }
                if ((svgW <= 0.0 || svgH <= 0.0) && attrs.hasAttribute(QStringLiteral("viewBox"))) {
                    const QStringList vb = attrs.value(QStringLiteral("viewBox")).toString().split(' ', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
                    if (vb.size() == 4) {
                        bool ok2 = false;
                        const double vbW = vb[2].toDouble(&ok2);
                        if (ok2 && vbW > 0.0) {
                            svgW = vbW;
                        }
                        const double vbH = vb[3].toDouble(&ok2);
                        if (ok2 && vbH > 0.0) {
                            svgH = vbH;
                        }
                    }
                }
                continue;
            }

            if (tag.compare(QStringLiteral("linearGradient"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                finalizeGradient();
                currentGradientId = attrs.value(QStringLiteral("id")).toString().trimmed();
                currentStops.clear();
                SvgGradient g;
                g.id = currentGradientId;
                const QHash<QString, QString> styleMap = parseStyleMap(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("style")).toString());
                double x1 = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("x1")).toString(), nullptr);
                double y1 = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("y1")).toString(), nullptr);
                double x2 = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("x2")).toString(), nullptr);
                double y2 = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("y2")).toString(), nullptr);
                if (styleMap.contains(QStringLiteral("x1"))) {
                    x1 = firstNumber(styleMap.value(QStringLiteral("x1")), nullptr);
                }
                if (styleMap.contains(QStringLiteral("y1"))) {
                    y1 = firstNumber(styleMap.value(QStringLiteral("y1")), nullptr);
                }
                if (styleMap.contains(QStringLiteral("x2"))) {
                    x2 = firstNumber(styleMap.value(QStringLiteral("x2")), nullptr);
                }
                if (styleMap.contains(QStringLiteral("y2"))) {
                    y2 = firstNumber(styleMap.value(QStringLiteral("y2")), nullptr);
                }
                g.angleDeg = gradientAngleFromVector(x1, y1, x2, y2);
                gradients.insert(currentGradientId, g);
                continue;
            }

            if (tag.compare(QStringLiteral("stop"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0 && !currentGradientId.isEmpty()) {
                const QHash<QString, QString> styleMap = parseStyleMap(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("style")).toString());
                QString stopColorRaw = attrs.value(QStringLiteral("stop-color")).toString();
                if (stopColorRaw.isEmpty()) {
                    stopColorRaw = styleMap.value(QStringLiteral("stop-color"));
                }
                const QString stopColor = normalizeHexColor(stopColorRaw);
                if (stopColor.isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                bool okOffset = false;
                const double offset = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("offset")).toString(), &okOffset);
                currentStops.push_back({okOffset ? offset : static_cast<double>(currentStops.size()), stopColor});
                continue;
            }

            if (tag.compare(QStringLiteral("rect"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) != 0
                && tag.compare(QStringLiteral("path"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) != 0) {
                continue;
            }

            const QHash<QString, QString> styleMap = parseStyleMap(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("style")).toString());
            QString fillRaw = attrs.value(QStringLiteral("fill")).toString();
            if (fillRaw.isEmpty()) {
                fillRaw = styleMap.value(QStringLiteral("fill"));
            }
            QString fillColor = normalizeHexColor(fillRaw);
            QString fillColor2;
            bool hasGradient = false;
            double gradientAngle = 0.0;
            const QString gradId = parseGradientId(fillRaw);
            if (!gradId.isEmpty() && gradients.contains(gradId)) {
                const SvgGradient g = gradients.value(gradId);
                if (g.valid && !g.color1.isEmpty() && !g.color2.isEmpty()) {
                    fillColor = g.color1;
                    fillColor2 = g.color2;
                    gradientAngle = g.angleDeg;
                    hasGradient = true;
                }
            }
            if (fillColor.isEmpty()) {
                if (stats != nullptr) {
                    stats->rejectNoFill += 1;
                }
                continue;
            }
            const double fillOpacity = svgOpacity(
                attrs.value(QStringLiteral("fill-opacity")).toString(),
                styleMap,
                QStringLiteral("fill-opacity")
            );
            const double opacity = svgOpacity(
                attrs.value(QStringLiteral("opacity")).toString(),
                styleMap,
                QStringLiteral("opacity")
            );
            const double alpha = qBound(0.0, fillOpacity * opacity, 1.0);
            if (alpha < 0.08) {
                if (stats != nullptr) {
                    stats->rejectLowAlpha += 1;
                }
                continue;
            }

            LayoutBBox rawBox;
            bool hasBox = false;
            if (tag.compare(QStringLiteral("rect"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                const bool okX = true;
                const bool okY = true;
                rawBox.x = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("x")).toString(), nullptr);
                rawBox.y = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("y")).toString(), nullptr);
                bool okW = false;
                bool okH = false;
                rawBox.w = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("width")).toString(), &okW);
                rawBox.h = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("height")).toString(), &okH);
                hasBox = okX && okY && okW && okH && rawBox.w > 0.0 && rawBox.h > 0.0;
            } else {
                hasBox = parseSvgPathBounds(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("d")).toString(), rawBox);
            }
            if (!hasBox || svgW <= 0.0 || svgH <= 0.0) {
                if (stats != nullptr) {
                    stats->rejectNoBox += 1;
                }
                continue;
            }
            if (stats != nullptr) {
                stats->candidates += 1;
            }

            const double areaRatio = (rawBox.w * rawBox.h) / qMax(1.0, svgW * svgH);
            const bool nearOrigin = rawBox.x <= svgW * 0.32 && rawBox.y <= svgH * 0.32;
            const bool coversCenter = (rawBox.x + rawBox.w * 0.5) >= svgW * 0.30
                && (rawBox.x + rawBox.w * 0.5) <= svgW * 0.70
                && (rawBox.y + rawBox.h * 0.5) >= svgH * 0.30
                && (rawBox.y + rawBox.h * 0.5) <= svgH * 0.70;
            const bool touchesLeftOrTop = rawBox.x <= svgW * 0.06 || rawBox.y <= svgH * 0.06;
            const bool largeArea = areaRatio >= 0.55;
            const bool mediumArea = areaRatio >= 0.25;
            if (!mediumArea || !nearOrigin) {
                if (stats != nullptr) {
                    stats->rejectSmallOrOffset += 1;
                }
                continue;
            }
            if (!largeArea && !(coversCenter && touchesLeftOrTop)) {
                if (stats != nullptr) {
                    stats->rejectNotBgLike += 1;
                }
                continue;
            }

            LayoutFillShape fill;
            fill.box.x = qBound(0.0, rawBox.x * (page.width / qMax(1.0, svgW)), page.width);
            fill.box.y = qBound(0.0, rawBox.y * (page.height / qMax(1.0, svgH)), page.height);
            fill.box.w = qBound(1.0, rawBox.w * (page.width / qMax(1.0, svgW)), page.width);
            fill.box.h = qBound(1.0, rawBox.h * (page.height / qMax(1.0, svgH)), page.height);
            fill.fillColor = fillColor;
            fill.fillColor2 = fillColor2;
            fill.gradientAngle = gradientAngle;
            fill.hasGradient = hasGradient;
            const double rx = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("rx")).toString(), nullptr);
            const double ry = firstNumber(attrs.value(QStringLiteral("ry")).toString(), nullptr);
            fill.cornerRadius = qMax(0.0, qMax(rx, ry));
            fill.shapeType = tag.compare(QStringLiteral("path"), Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0
                ? QStringLiteral("path")
                : (fill.cornerRadius > 0.0 ? QStringLiteral("roundRect") : QStringLiteral("rect"));
            fill.opacity = alpha;
            fill.isBackground = true;
            candidates.push_back(fill);
            if (stats != nullptr) {
                stats->accepted += 1;
            }
        }

        if (candidates.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        std::sort(candidates.begin(), candidates.end(), [](const LayoutFillShape &a, const LayoutFillShape &b) {
            return (a.box.w * a.box.h) > (b.box.w * b.box.h);
        });
        QVector<LayoutFillShape> deduped;
        for (const LayoutFillShape &candidate : candidates) {
            bool duplicate = false;
            for (const LayoutFillShape &kept : deduped) {
                const bool sameColor = kept.fillColor.compare(candidate.fillColor, Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0;
                const double iou = bboxIoU(kept.box, candidate.box);
                if (sameColor && iou >= 0.9) {
                    duplicate = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (!duplicate) {
                deduped.push_back(candidate);
            }
            if (deduped.size() >= 2) {
                break;
            }
        }
        page.fills += deduped;
    }
}

QString normalizeToken(const QString &text) {
    return text.simplified().toLower();
}

void applyAuthoritativePageGeometry(const QString &pdfPath, LayoutDocument &out) {
    QPdfDocument pdf;
    if (pdf.load(pdfPath) != QPdfDocument::Error::None) {
        return;
    }
    const int pageCount = qMax(0, pdf.pageCount());
    if (pageCount <= 0) {
        return;
    }

    QVector<LayoutPage> normalized;
    normalized.reserve(pageCount);
    const int existingCount = out.pages.size();
    for (int i = 0; i < pageCount; ++i) {
        LayoutPage page;
        if (i < existingCount) {
            page = out.pages.at(i);
        }
        page.pageIndex = i;
        const double oldW = page.width > 1.0 ? page.width : 0.0;
        const double oldH = page.height > 1.0 ? page.height : 0.0;
        const QSizeF pagePt = pdf.pagePointSize(i);
        const double w = pagePt.width();
        const double h = pagePt.height();
        const double newW = w > 1.0 ? w : (page.width > 1.0 ? page.width : 595.0);
        const double newH = h > 1.0 ? h : (page.height > 1.0 ? page.height : 842.0);
        page.width = newW;
        page.height = newH;
        if (oldW > 1.0 && oldH > 1.0 && newW > 1.0 && newH > 1.0) {
            const double sx = newW / oldW;
            const double sy = newH / oldH;
            double contentMaxX = 0.0;
            double contentMaxY = 0.0;
            for (const LayoutBlock &block : page.blocks) {
                contentMaxX = qMax(contentMaxX, block.box.x + block.box.w);
                contentMaxY = qMax(contentMaxY, block.box.y + block.box.h);
                for (const LayoutLine &line : block.lines) {
                    contentMaxX = qMax(contentMaxX, line.box.x + line.box.w);
                    contentMaxY = qMax(contentMaxY, line.box.y + line.box.h);
                    for (const LayoutTextRun &run : line.runs) {
                        contentMaxX = qMax(contentMaxX, run.box.x + run.box.w);
                        contentMaxY = qMax(contentMaxY, run.box.y + run.box.h);
                    }
                }
            }
            for (const LayoutTable &table : page.tables) {
                contentMaxX = qMax(contentMaxX, table.box.x + table.box.w);
                contentMaxY = qMax(contentMaxY, table.box.y + table.box.h);
            }
            for (const LayoutImage &img : page.images) {
                contentMaxX = qMax(contentMaxX, img.box.x + img.box.w);
                contentMaxY = qMax(contentMaxY, img.box.y + img.box.h);
            }
            for (const LayoutFillShape &fill : page.fills) {
                contentMaxX = qMax(contentMaxX, fill.box.x + fill.box.w);
                contentMaxY = qMax(contentMaxY, fill.box.y + fill.box.h);
            }
            const bool likelyMismatchedUnits =
                (contentMaxX > newW * 1.12 || contentMaxY > newH * 1.12)
                && (qAbs(sx - 1.0) > 0.08 || qAbs(sy - 1.0) > 0.08);
            if (likelyMismatchedUnits) {
                auto scaleBox = [&](LayoutBBox &box) {
                    box.x *= sx;
                    box.y *= sy;
                    box.w *= sx;
                    box.h *= sy;
                };
                for (LayoutBlock &block : page.blocks) {
                    scaleBox(block.box);
                    for (LayoutLine &line : block.lines) {
                        scaleBox(line.box);
                        line.indentPt *= sx;
                        for (LayoutTextRun &run : line.runs) {
                            scaleBox(run.box);
                        }
                    }
                }
                for (LayoutTable &table : page.tables) {
                    scaleBox(table.box);
                    for (LayoutTableCell &cell : table.cells) {
                        scaleBox(cell.box);
                    }
                }
                for (LayoutImage &img : page.images) {
                    scaleBox(img.box);
                }
                for (LayoutFillShape &fill : page.fills) {
                    scaleBox(fill.box);
                    fill.cornerRadius *= sx;
                }
            }
        }
        normalized.push_back(page);
    }
    out.pages = normalized;
}

bool buildEmptyPagesFromPdf(const QString &pdfPath, LayoutDocument &out) {
    QPdfDocument pdf;
    if (pdf.load(pdfPath) != QPdfDocument::Error::None) {
        return false;
    }
    const int pageCount = qMax(0, pdf.pageCount());
    if (pageCount <= 0) {
        return false;
    }
    out.pages.clear();
    out.pages.reserve(pageCount);
    for (int i = 0; i < pageCount; ++i) {
        LayoutPage page;
        page.pageIndex = i;
        const QSizeF pagePt = pdf.pagePointSize(i);
        page.width = pagePt.width() > 1.0 ? pagePt.width() : 595.0;
        page.height = pagePt.height() > 1.0 ? pagePt.height() : 842.0;
        out.pages.push_back(page);
    }
    return true;
}

bool parsePlainTextFallback(const QString &plainText, LayoutDocument &out) {
    out.pages.clear();
    const QStringList rawPages = plainText.split(QChar('\f'));
    int pageIndex = 0;
    for (const QString &rawPage : rawPages) {
        const QStringList pageLines = rawPage.split('\n');
        LayoutPage page;
        page.pageIndex = pageIndex;
        page.width = 595.0;
        page.height = 842.0;
        LayoutBlock block;
        block.type = QStringLiteral("paragraph");
        double cursorY = 40.0;
        constexpr double kLineHeight = 14.0;
        constexpr double kLineGap = 4.0;
        constexpr double kCharWidth = 6.2;
        for (const QString &lineTextRaw : pageLines) {
            const QString lineText = lineTextRaw.trimmed();
            if (lineText.isEmpty()) {
                cursorY += kLineGap;
                continue;
            }
            LayoutTextRun run;
            run.text = lineText;
            run.fontFamily = QStringLiteral("sans");
            run.fontSize = 11.0;
            run.lineHeight = kLineHeight;
            run.color = QStringLiteral("#000000");
            run.box.x = 36.0;
            run.box.y = cursorY;
            run.box.w = qMin(page.width - 72.0, qMax(20.0, lineText.size() * kCharWidth));
            run.box.h = kLineHeight;

            LayoutLine line;
            line.runs.push_back(run);
            line.box = run.box;
            block.lines.push_back(line);
            cursorY += (kLineHeight + kLineGap);
            if (cursorY > page.height - 28.0) {
                break;
            }
        }
        if (!block.lines.isEmpty()) {
            block.box.x = 36.0;
            block.box.y = block.lines.first().box.y;
            block.box.w = page.width - 72.0;
            block.box.h = qMax(18.0, cursorY - block.box.y);
            page.blocks.push_back(block);
        }
        out.pages.push_back(page);
        pageIndex += 1;
    }
    return !out.pages.isEmpty();
}

void materializeExtractedImages(const QString &pdfPath, const QString &tempRoot, LayoutDocument &out) {
    if (tempRoot.trimmed().isEmpty() || out.pages.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }

    const QString normalizedTempRoot = QDir(tempRoot).absolutePath() + QDir::separator();
    const QFileInfo pdfInfo(pdfPath);
    const QString keySource = QStringLiteral("%1|%2|%3")
        .arg(pdfInfo.absoluteFilePath())
        .arg(pdfInfo.lastModified().toMSecsSinceEpoch())
        .arg(pdfInfo.size());
    const QString docKey = QString::fromLatin1(
        QCryptographicHash::hash(keySource.toUtf8(), QCryptographicHash::Sha1).toHex()
    );
    const QString cacheDir = QDir(QDir::tempPath()).filePath(QStringLiteral("pdfmaster_native_images/%1").arg(docKey));
    if (!QDir().mkpath(cacheDir)) {
        return;
    }

    for (LayoutPage &page : out.pages) {
        for (int i = 0; i < page.images.size(); ++i) {
            LayoutImage &img = page.images[i];
            const QFileInfo srcInfo(img.path);
            const QString srcPath = srcInfo.absoluteFilePath();
            if (!srcPath.startsWith(normalizedTempRoot) || !srcInfo.exists() || !srcInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            QString ext = srcInfo.suffix().toLower();
            if (ext.isEmpty()) {
                ext = QStringLiteral("png");
            }
            const QString targetPath = QDir(cacheDir).filePath(
                QStringLiteral("p%1_i%2.%3").arg(page.pageIndex + 1).arg(i + 1).arg(ext)
            );
            if (!QFileInfo::exists(targetPath)) {
                QFile::remove(targetPath);
                if (!QFile::copy(srcPath, targetPath)) {
                    continue;
                }
            }
            img.path = targetPath;
        }
    }
}

QString decodeBasicHtmlEntities(QString text) {
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&amp;"), QStringLiteral("&"));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&lt;"), QStringLiteral("<"));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&gt;"), QStringLiteral(">"));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&quot;"), QStringLiteral("\""));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&#39;"), QStringLiteral("'"));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&nbsp;"), QStringLiteral(" "));
    return text;
}

bool inferBoldFromFamily(const QString &family) {
    const QString key = family.toLower();
    return key.contains(QStringLiteral("bold"))
        || key.contains(QStringLiteral("black"))
        || key.contains(QStringLiteral("heavy"))
        || key.contains(QStringLiteral("demi"))
        || key.contains(QStringLiteral("semibold"));
}

bool inferItalicFromFamily(const QString &family) {
    const QString key = family.toLower();
    return key.contains(QStringLiteral("italic"))
        || key.contains(QStringLiteral("oblique"))
        || key.contains(QStringLiteral("slanted"))
        || key.contains(QStringLiteral("kursiv"));
}

double overlapRatio(const LayoutBBox &a, const LayoutBBox &b) {
    const double ax2 = a.x + a.w;
    const double ay2 = a.y + a.h;
    const double bx2 = b.x + b.w;
    const double by2 = b.y + b.h;
    const double ix = qMax(0.0, qMin(ax2, bx2) - qMax(a.x, b.x));
    const double iy = qMax(0.0, qMin(ay2, by2) - qMax(a.y, b.y));
    const double ia = ix * iy;
    const double aa = qMax(1.0, a.w * a.h);
    return ia / aa;
}

double intersectionOverUnion(const LayoutBBox &a, const LayoutBBox &b) {
    const double ax2 = a.x + a.w;
    const double ay2 = a.y + a.h;
    const double bx2 = b.x + b.w;
    const double by2 = b.y + b.h;
    const double ix = qMax(0.0, qMin(ax2, bx2) - qMax(a.x, b.x));
    const double iy = qMax(0.0, qMin(ay2, by2) - qMax(a.y, b.y));
    const double inter = ix * iy;
    const double unionArea = qMax(1.0, (a.w * a.h) + (b.w * b.h) - inter);
    return inter / unionArea;
}

QVector<LayoutImage> deduplicatePageImages(const QVector<LayoutImage> &raw) {
    QVector<LayoutImage> deduped;
    deduped.reserve(raw.size());
    for (const LayoutImage &candidate : raw) {
        if (candidate.path.trimmed().isEmpty() || candidate.box.w <= 1.0 || candidate.box.h <= 1.0) {
            continue;
        }
        bool duplicated = false;
