        for (LayoutImage &kept : deduped) {
            const bool samePath = QFileInfo(kept.path) == QFileInfo(candidate.path);
            const double iou = intersectionOverUnion(kept.box, candidate.box);
            const bool sameBackground = kept.isBackground == candidate.isBackground;
            const bool sameOpacity = qAbs(kept.opacity - candidate.opacity) <= 0.01;
            const bool sameRotation = qAbs(kept.rotationDeg - candidate.rotationDeg) <= 0.1;
            const bool sameFlip = kept.flipH == candidate.flipH && kept.flipV == candidate.flipV;
            const bool sameCrop = qAbs(kept.cropLeft - candidate.cropLeft) <= 0.01
                && qAbs(kept.cropTop - candidate.cropTop) <= 0.01
                && qAbs(kept.cropRight - candidate.cropRight) <= 0.01
                && qAbs(kept.cropBottom - candidate.cropBottom) <= 0.01;
            // Only drop strict duplicates from multi-source extraction; keep overlapped layers.
            if (!samePath || iou < 0.995 || !sameBackground || !sameOpacity || !sameRotation || !sameFlip || !sameCrop) {
                continue;
            }
            duplicated = true;
            break;
        }
        if (!duplicated) {
            deduped.push_back(candidate);
        }
    }

    std::stable_sort(deduped.begin(), deduped.end(), [](const LayoutImage &a, const LayoutImage &b) {
        if (a.isBackground != b.isBackground) {
            return a.isBackground;
        }
        // Keep original extraction order for same layer to preserve stacked image layers.
        return false;
    });
    return deduped;
}

bool enrichStylesFromXml(const QString &xml, const QString &xmlBaseDir, LayoutDocument &document) {
    if (xml.trimmed().isEmpty() || document.pages.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }

    struct XmlPageMeta {
        double width = 0.0;
        double height = 0.0;
    };

    QHash<int, XmlPageMeta> pageMeta;
    QHash<int, const LayoutPage *> docPages;
    for (const LayoutPage &page : document.pages) {
        docPages.insert(page.pageIndex, &page);
    }
    QHash<int, QHash<int, XmlFontSpec>> fontSpecs;
    QHash<int, QVector<XmlStyledText>> styledTexts;
    QHash<int, QVector<LayoutImage>> imagesByPage;

    int currentPageIndex = -1;
    static const QRegularExpression tokenRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(<page\b[^>]*>|</page>|<fontspec\b[^>]*/>|<image\b[^>]*/>|<text\b[^>]*>[\s\S]*?</text>)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression stripTagsRe(QStringLiteral(R"(<[^>]+>)"));
    QRegularExpressionMatchIterator tokenIt = tokenRe.globalMatch(xml);
    while (tokenIt.hasNext()) {
        const QString token = tokenIt.next().captured(0).trimmed();
        if (token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("<page"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            bool okNum = false;
            const int oneBased = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("number")).toInt(&okNum);
            if (!okNum || oneBased <= 0) {
                currentPageIndex = -1;
                continue;
            }
            currentPageIndex = oneBased - 1;
            XmlPageMeta meta;
            meta.width = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("width")).toDouble();
            meta.height = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("height")).toDouble();
            pageMeta.insert(currentPageIndex, meta);
            continue;
        }
        if (token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("</page"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            currentPageIndex = -1;
            continue;
        }
        if (currentPageIndex < 0) {
            continue;
        }

        if (token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("<fontspec"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            bool okId = false;
            const int id = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("id")).toInt(&okId);
            if (!okId) {
                continue;
            }
            XmlFontSpec spec;
            spec.family = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("family"));
            spec.color = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("color"));
            spec.bold = inferBoldFromFamily(spec.family);
            spec.italic = inferItalicFromFamily(spec.family);
            fontSpecs[currentPageIndex].insert(id, spec);
            continue;
        }

        if (token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("<image"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            bool okTop = false;
            bool okLeft = false;
            const double top = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("top")).toDouble(&okTop);
            const double left = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("left")).toDouble(&okLeft);
            if (!okTop || !okLeft || !docPages.contains(currentPageIndex)) {
                continue;
            }
            const double width = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("width")).toDouble();
            const double height = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("height")).toDouble();
            QString src = decodeBasicHtmlEntities(xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("src"))).trimmed();
            if (src.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFileInfo imgInfo(src);
            if (imgInfo.isRelative()) {
                src = QDir(xmlBaseDir).filePath(src);
                imgInfo = QFileInfo(src);
            }
            if (!imgInfo.exists() || !imgInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }

            const XmlPageMeta meta = pageMeta.value(currentPageIndex);
            const LayoutPage &targetPage = *docPages.value(currentPageIndex);
            const double xScale = (meta.width > 0.0 && targetPage.width > 0.0) ? (targetPage.width / meta.width) : 1.0;
            const double yScale = (meta.height > 0.0 && targetPage.height > 0.0) ? (targetPage.height / meta.height) : 1.0;
            const double mappedX = left * xScale;
            const double mappedY = top * yScale;
            const double mappedW = qMax(0.0, width * xScale);
            const double mappedH = qMax(0.0, height * yScale);
            if (mappedW <= 1.0 || mappedH <= 1.0) {
                continue;
            }

            LayoutImage image;
            image.path = imgInfo.absoluteFilePath();
            image.box.x = mappedX;
            image.box.y = mappedY;
            image.box.w = mappedW;
            image.box.h = mappedH;
            const QString styleRaw = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("style"));
            if (!styleRaw.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                const QRegularExpression rotRe(
                    QStringLiteral(R"(rotate\(\s*([+\-]?[0-9]*\.?[0-9]+)deg?\s*\))"),
                    QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
                );
                const QRegularExpressionMatch rm = rotRe.match(styleRaw);
                if (rm.hasMatch()) {
                    bool okRot = false;
                    const double rot = rm.captured(1).toDouble(&okRot);
                    if (okRot) {
                        const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, targetPage.width * targetPage.height);
                        const double imageArea = qMax(0.0, mappedW * mappedH);
                        const double areaRatio = imageArea / pageArea;
                        const bool tinyIconLike = areaRatio <= 0.08;
                        const bool smallAngle = qAbs(rot) <= 15.0;
                        // 经验规则：pdftohtml 常把页面级 transform 附着到图片 style。
                        // 为避免整块内容被错误旋转成菱形，只保留“小图标+小角度”旋转。
                        image.rotationDeg = (tinyIconLike && smallAngle) ? rot : 0.0;
                    }
                }
                if (styleRaw.contains(QStringLiteral("scaleX(-1)"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)
                    || styleRaw.contains(QStringLiteral("matrix(-1"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
                    const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, targetPage.width * targetPage.height);
                    const double imageArea = qMax(0.0, mappedW * mappedH);
                    if ((imageArea / pageArea) <= 0.08) {
                        image.flipH = true;
                    }
                }
                if (styleRaw.contains(QStringLiteral("scaleY(-1)"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
                    const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, targetPage.width * targetPage.height);
                    const double imageArea = qMax(0.0, mappedW * mappedH);
                    if ((imageArea / pageArea) <= 0.08) {
                        image.flipV = true;
                    }
                }
            }
            const bool nearOrigin = mappedX <= targetPage.width * 0.05 && mappedY <= targetPage.height * 0.05;
            const bool coversMostPage = mappedW >= targetPage.width * 0.9 && mappedH >= targetPage.height * 0.9;
            image.isBackground = nearOrigin && coversMostPage;
            imagesByPage[currentPageIndex].push_back(image);
            continue;
        }

        if (!token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("<text"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            continue;
        }
        bool okTop = false;
        bool okLeft = false;
        const double top = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("top")).toDouble(&okTop);
        const double left = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("left")).toDouble(&okLeft);
        if (!okTop || !okLeft || !docPages.contains(currentPageIndex)) {
            continue;
        }
        const double width = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("width")).toDouble();
        const double height = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("height")).toDouble();
        bool okFontId = false;
        const int fontId = xmlAttr(token, QStringLiteral("font")).toInt(&okFontId);
        const XmlFontSpec spec = okFontId
            ? fontSpecs.value(currentPageIndex).value(fontId)
            : XmlFontSpec{};

        const int gt = token.indexOf('>');
        const int lt = token.lastIndexOf('<');
        if (gt < 0 || lt <= gt) {
            continue;
        }
        QString text = token.mid(gt + 1, lt - gt - 1);
        text.remove(stripTagsRe);
        text = decodeBasicHtmlEntities(text).simplified();
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const XmlPageMeta meta = pageMeta.value(currentPageIndex);
        const LayoutPage &targetPage = *docPages.value(currentPageIndex);
        const double xScale = (meta.width > 0.0 && targetPage.width > 0.0) ? (targetPage.width / meta.width) : 1.0;
        const double yScale = (meta.height > 0.0 && targetPage.height > 0.0) ? (targetPage.height / meta.height) : 1.0;

        XmlStyledText styled;
        styled.text = text;
        styled.box.x = left * xScale;
        styled.box.y = top * yScale;
        styled.box.w = qMax(0.0, width * xScale);
        styled.box.h = qMax(0.0, height * yScale);
        styled.family = spec.family;
        styled.color = spec.color;
        styled.bold = spec.bold;
        styled.italic = spec.italic;
        styled.lineHeight = qMax(0.0, height * yScale);
        styledTexts[currentPageIndex].push_back(styled);
    }

    auto hasPageTextRuns = [](const LayoutPage &page) {
        for (const LayoutBlock &b : page.blocks) {
            for (const LayoutLine &l : b.lines) {
                if (!l.runs.isEmpty()) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
        return false;
    };
    auto lineBoxFromRuns = [](const QVector<LayoutTextRun> &runs) {
        LayoutBBox box;
        if (runs.isEmpty()) {
            return box;
        }
        double minX = runs.first().box.x;
        double minY = runs.first().box.y;
        double maxX = runs.first().box.x + runs.first().box.w;
        double maxY = runs.first().box.y + runs.first().box.h;
        for (const LayoutTextRun &run : runs) {
            minX = qMin(minX, run.box.x);
            minY = qMin(minY, run.box.y);
            maxX = qMax(maxX, run.box.x + run.box.w);
            maxY = qMax(maxY, run.box.y + run.box.h);
        }
        box.x = minX;
        box.y = minY;
        box.w = qMax(0.0, maxX - minX);
        box.h = qMax(0.0, maxY - minY);
        return box;
    };
    auto inferAlign = [](const LayoutLine &line, const double pageWidth) {
        const double left = line.box.x;
        const double right = line.box.x + line.box.w;
        const double center = left + line.box.w * 0.5;
        if (left <= pageWidth * 0.12 && right >= pageWidth * 0.88) {
            return QStringLiteral("just");
        }
        if (qAbs(center - pageWidth * 0.5) <= pageWidth * 0.08) {
            return QStringLiteral("ctr");
        }
        if (right >= pageWidth * 0.9 && left > pageWidth * 0.45) {
            return QStringLiteral("r");
        }
        return QStringLiteral("l");
    };

    int matchedRuns = 0;
    bool hasAnyImage = false;
    for (LayoutPage &page : document.pages) {
        const QVector<XmlStyledText> candidates = styledTexts.value(page.pageIndex);
        if (!candidates.isEmpty() && !hasPageTextRuns(page)) {
            QVector<XmlStyledText> sorted = candidates;
            std::sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end(), [](const XmlStyledText &a, const XmlStyledText &b) {
                if (!qFuzzyCompare(a.box.y + 1.0, b.box.y + 1.0)) {
                    return a.box.y < b.box.y;
                }
                return a.box.x < b.box.x;
            });
            QVector<LayoutLine> recoveredLines;
            QVector<XmlStyledText> current;
            double baselineY = sorted.first().box.y;
            for (const XmlStyledText &t : sorted) {
                const double tol = qMax(3.0, qMax(t.box.h, 8.0) * 0.45);
                const bool sameLine = current.isEmpty() || qAbs(t.box.y - baselineY) <= tol;
                if (!sameLine) {
                    std::sort(current.begin(), current.end(), [](const XmlStyledText &a, const XmlStyledText &b) {
                        return a.box.x < b.box.x;
                    });
                    LayoutLine line;
                    for (const XmlStyledText &row : current) {
                        LayoutTextRun run;
                        run.text = row.text;
                        run.box = row.box;
                        run.fontFamily = row.family;
                        run.bold = row.bold;
                        run.italic = row.italic;
                        run.color = row.color;
                        run.fontSize = qMax(8.0, row.box.h);
                        run.lineHeight = qMax(run.fontSize * 1.15, row.lineHeight);
                        line.runs.push_back(run);
                    }
                    line.box = lineBoxFromRuns(line.runs);
                    line.paragraphAlign = inferAlign(line, qMax(1.0, page.width));
                    line.indentPt = qMax(0.0, line.box.x);
                    recoveredLines.push_back(line);
                    current.clear();
                }
                if (current.isEmpty()) {
                    baselineY = t.box.y;
                }
                current.push_back(t);
            }
            if (!current.isEmpty()) {
                std::sort(current.begin(), current.end(), [](const XmlStyledText &a, const XmlStyledText &b) {
                    return a.box.x < b.box.x;
                });
                LayoutLine line;
                for (const XmlStyledText &row : current) {
                    LayoutTextRun run;
                    run.text = row.text;
                    run.box = row.box;
                    run.fontFamily = row.family;
                    run.bold = row.bold;
                    run.italic = row.italic;
                    run.color = row.color;
                    run.fontSize = qMax(8.0, row.box.h);
                    run.lineHeight = qMax(run.fontSize * 1.15, row.lineHeight);
                    line.runs.push_back(run);
                }
                line.box = lineBoxFromRuns(line.runs);
                line.paragraphAlign = inferAlign(line, qMax(1.0, page.width));
                line.indentPt = qMax(0.0, line.box.x);
                recoveredLines.push_back(line);
            }
            if (!recoveredLines.isEmpty()) {
                LayoutBlock block;
                block.type = QStringLiteral("paragraph");
                block.lines = recoveredLines;
                double minX = recoveredLines.first().box.x;
                double minY = recoveredLines.first().box.y;
                double maxX = recoveredLines.first().box.x + recoveredLines.first().box.w;
                double maxY = recoveredLines.first().box.y + recoveredLines.first().box.h;
                for (const LayoutLine &line : recoveredLines) {
                    minX = qMin(minX, line.box.x);
                    minY = qMin(minY, line.box.y);
                    maxX = qMax(maxX, line.box.x + line.box.w);
                    maxY = qMax(maxY, line.box.y + line.box.h);
                }
                block.box.x = minX;
                block.box.y = minY;
                block.box.w = qMax(0.0, maxX - minX);
                block.box.h = qMax(0.0, maxY - minY);
                page.blocks.push_back(block);
            }
        }
        if (!candidates.isEmpty()) {
            for (LayoutBlock &block : page.blocks) {
                for (LayoutLine &line : block.lines) {
                    for (LayoutTextRun &run : line.runs) {
                        const QString runToken = normalizeToken(run.text);
                        const double runCx = run.box.x + run.box.w / 2.0;
                        const double runCy = run.box.y + run.box.h / 2.0;

                        double bestScore = -1.0;
                        const XmlStyledText *best = nullptr;
                        for (const XmlStyledText &candidate : candidates) {
                            const double overlap = overlapRatio(run.box, candidate.box);
                            const double cCx = candidate.box.x + candidate.box.w / 2.0;
                            const double cCy = candidate.box.y + candidate.box.h / 2.0;
                            const double dx = qAbs(runCx - cCx) / qMax(1.0, run.box.w);
                            const double dy = qAbs(runCy - cCy) / qMax(1.0, run.box.h);
                            double score = overlap * 2.0 - (dx + dy) * 0.25;
                            if (!runToken.isEmpty() && runToken == normalizeToken(candidate.text)) {
                                score += 0.8;
                            }
                            if (score > bestScore) {
                                bestScore = score;
                                best = &candidate;
                            }
                        }

                        if (best == nullptr || bestScore < 0.35) {
                            continue;
                        }
                        if (!best->family.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                            run.fontFamily = best->family;
                        }
                        run.bold = run.bold || best->bold;
                        run.italic = run.italic || best->italic;
                        if (!best->color.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                            run.color = best->color;
                        }
                        if (best->lineHeight > 0.0) {
                            run.lineHeight = best->lineHeight;
                        }
                        matchedRuns += 1;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        const QVector<LayoutImage> pageImages = deduplicatePageImages(imagesByPage.value(page.pageIndex));
        if (!pageImages.isEmpty()) {
            page.images += pageImages;
            hasAnyImage = true;
        }
    }
    return matchedRuns > 0 || hasAnyImage;
}

} // namespace

bool PdfLayoutExtractor::extract(
    const QString &pdfPath,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    LayoutDocument &out,
    QString &errorMessage,
    bool allowPlainTextFallback,
    QStringList *diagnostics
) const {
    auto pushDiag = [&](const QString &line) {
        if (diagnostics != nullptr) {
            diagnostics->push_back(line);
        }
    };
    auto summarizeLayout = [](const LayoutDocument &doc, int &textLines, int &tables, int &images, int &fills) {
        textLines = 0;
        tables = 0;
        images = 0;
        fills = 0;
        for (const LayoutPage &p : doc.pages) {
            tables += p.tables.size();
            images += p.images.size();
            fills += p.fills.size();
            for (const LayoutBlock &b : p.blocks) {
                for (const LayoutLine &l : b.lines) {
                    for (const LayoutTextRun &r : l.runs) {
                        if (!r.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                            textLines += 1;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    };
    auto countPageTextLines = [](const LayoutPage &page) {
        int count = 0;
        for (const LayoutBlock &b : page.blocks) {
            for (const LayoutLine &l : b.lines) {
                for (const LayoutTextRun &r : l.runs) {
                    if (!r.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                        count += 1;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return count;
    };
    auto detectImageAnomaly = [](const LayoutImage &img, const double pageW, const double pageH, QString &reason) {
        if (img.box.w <= 1.0 || img.box.h <= 1.0) {
            reason = QStringLiteral("尺寸过小");
            return true;
        }
        const double marginX = qMax(2.0, pageW * 0.03);
        const double marginY = qMax(2.0, pageH * 0.03);
        const double right = img.box.x + img.box.w;
        const double bottom = img.box.y + img.box.h;
        const bool outOfPage = img.box.x < -marginX
            || img.box.y < -marginY
            || right > pageW + marginX
            || bottom > pageH + marginY;
        if (outOfPage) {
            reason = QStringLiteral("越界(x=%1,y=%2,w=%3,h=%4)")
                         .arg(img.box.x, 0, 'f', 1)
                         .arg(img.box.y, 0, 'f', 1)
                         .arg(img.box.w, 0, 'f', 1)
                         .arg(img.box.h, 0, 'f', 1);
            return true;
        }
        const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, pageW * pageH);
        const double areaRatio = (img.box.w * img.box.h) / pageArea;
        if (qAbs(img.rotationDeg) >= 20.0 && areaRatio >= 0.15) {
            reason = QStringLiteral("大图旋转(rot=%1,ratio=%2)")
                         .arg(img.rotationDeg, 0, 'f', 1)
                         .arg(areaRatio, 0, 'f', 3);
            return true;
        }
        if ((img.cropLeft + img.cropRight) >= 0.8 || (img.cropTop + img.cropBottom) >= 0.8) {
            reason = QStringLiteral("裁剪异常(L=%1,T=%2,R=%3,B=%4)")
                         .arg(img.cropLeft, 0, 'f', 2)
                         .arg(img.cropTop, 0, 'f', 2)
                         .arg(img.cropRight, 0, 'f', 2)
                         .arg(img.cropBottom, 0, 'f', 2);
            return true;
        }
        reason.clear();
        return false;
    };
    auto detectChartEvidence = [](const LayoutPage &page, QString &evidence) {
        const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, page.width * page.height);
        int vectorMarks = 0;
        LayoutBBox bounds;
        bool hasBounds = false;
        for (const LayoutFillShape &fill : page.fills) {
            if (fill.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            const double area = qMax(0.0, fill.box.w) * qMax(0.0, fill.box.h);
            const double ratio = area / pageArea;
            if (ratio < 0.002 || ratio > 0.35) {
                continue;
            }
            if (!hasBounds) {
                bounds = fill.box;
                hasBounds = true;
            } else {
                const double x1 = qMin(bounds.x, fill.box.x);
                const double y1 = qMin(bounds.y, fill.box.y);
                const double x2 = qMax(bounds.x + bounds.w, fill.box.x + fill.box.w);
                const double y2 = qMax(bounds.y + bounds.h, fill.box.y + fill.box.h);
                bounds.x = x1;
                bounds.y = y1;
                bounds.w = qMax(0.0, x2 - x1);
                bounds.h = qMax(0.0, y2 - y1);
            }
            vectorMarks += 1;
        }
        if (!hasBounds || vectorMarks < 4) {
            return 0;
        }
        int numericLines = 0;
        static const QRegularExpression numLikeRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[-+]?\d+([.,]\d+)?\s*[%xX]?\s*$)"));
        for (const LayoutBlock &block : page.blocks) {
            for (const LayoutLine &line : block.lines) {
                QString lineText;
                for (const LayoutTextRun &run : line.runs) {
                    if (!run.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                        if (!lineText.isEmpty()) {
                            lineText.push_back(' ');
                        }
                        lineText += run.text.trimmed();
                    }
                }
                if (!lineText.isEmpty() && numLikeRe.match(lineText).hasMatch()) {
                    numericLines += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        const double boundsRatio = (bounds.w * bounds.h) / pageArea;
        if (numericLines >= 2 && boundsRatio >= 0.08 && boundsRatio <= 0.92) {
            evidence = QStringLiteral("chart-like(vector=%1,numericText=%2,boundsRatio=%3)")
                           .arg(vectorMarks)
                           .arg(numericLines)
                           .arg(QString::number(boundsRatio, 'f', 3));
            return 1;
        }
        return 0;
    };

    errorMessage.clear();
    out.pages.clear();

    const QString tool = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("pdftotext"));
    if (tool.isEmpty()) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("缺少 pdftotext，无法执行对象级抽取");
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取A 工具检测: pdftotext=missing"));
        return false;
    }
    pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取A 工具检测: pdftotext=%1").arg(tool));

    QTemporaryDir tempDir;
    if (!tempDir.isValid()) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("创建临时目录失败，无法执行对象级抽取");
        return false;
    }
    const QString bboxPath = tempDir.path() + QStringLiteral("/bbox_layout.html");
    auto runSystemPdftotext = [&](const QStringList &args) -> CommandResult {
        const QString systemTool = QStandardPaths::findExecutable(QStringLiteral("pdftotext"));
        if (systemTool.isEmpty()) {
            pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取A 工具回退: system pdftotext=missing"));
            return {};
        }
        if (systemTool == tool) {
            pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取A 工具回退: system pdftotext=同路径，跳过"));
            return {};
        }
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取A 工具回退: system pdftotext=%1").arg(systemTool));
        return executor.run(systemTool, args, 3000, -1);
    };
    const CommandResult result = executor.run(
        tool,
        {
            QStringLiteral("-bbox-layout"),
            pdfPath,
            bboxPath
        },
        3000,
        -1
    );
    bool parsed = false;
    if (result.started && result.exitCode == 0) {
        QFile bboxFile(bboxPath);
        if (bboxFile.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
            const QString bboxHtml = QString::fromUtf8(bboxFile.readAll());
            parsed = parseBBoxHtml(bboxHtml, out);
            pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox: exit=0, htmlBytes=%1, parsed=%2")
                         .arg(bboxHtml.toUtf8().size())
                         .arg(parsed ? 1 : 0));
        }
    } else {
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox: started=%1, exit=%2, msg=%3")
                     .arg(result.started ? 1 : 0)
                     .arg(result.exitCode)
                     .arg(result.combinedOutput.left(180)));
        const CommandResult systemResult = runSystemPdftotext(
            {QStringLiteral("-bbox-layout"), pdfPath, bboxPath}
        );
        if (systemResult.started && systemResult.exitCode == 0) {
            QFile bboxFile(bboxPath);
            if (bboxFile.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
                const QString bboxHtml = QString::fromUtf8(bboxFile.readAll());
                parsed = parseBBoxHtml(bboxHtml, out);
                pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox(system): exit=0, htmlBytes=%1, parsed=%2")
                             .arg(bboxHtml.toUtf8().size())
                             .arg(parsed ? 1 : 0));
            }
        } else if (systemResult.started || !systemResult.combinedOutput.isEmpty()) {
            pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox(system)失败: exit=%1, msg=%2")
                         .arg(systemResult.exitCode)
                         .arg(systemResult.combinedOutput.left(180)));
        }
    }
    if (!parsed) {
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox未产出有效文本，进入后续链路"));
        if (!allowPlainTextFallback) {
            if (!buildEmptyPagesFromPdf(pdfPath, out)) {
                errorMessage = QStringLiteral("pdftotext -bbox-layout 失败");
                return false;
            }
            pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B 回退: allowPlainTextFallback=0, 使用空页几何"));
        } else {
            CommandResult textResult = executor.run(
                tool,
                {
                    QStringLiteral("-layout"),
                    pdfPath,
                    QStringLiteral("-")
                },
                3000,
                -1
            );
            if (!textResult.started || textResult.exitCode != 0) {
                const CommandResult systemTextResult = runSystemPdftotext(
                    {QStringLiteral("-layout"), pdfPath, QStringLiteral("-")}
                );
                if (systemTextResult.started && systemTextResult.exitCode == 0) {
                    textResult = systemTextResult;
                    pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B plainText(system): exit=0"));
                } else if (systemTextResult.started || !systemTextResult.combinedOutput.isEmpty()) {
                    pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B plainText(system)失败: exit=%1, msg=%2")
                                 .arg(systemTextResult.exitCode)
                                 .arg(systemTextResult.combinedOutput.left(180)));
                }
            }
            if (!textResult.started || textResult.exitCode != 0 || !parsePlainTextFallback(textResult.combinedOutput, out)) {
                if (!buildEmptyPagesFromPdf(pdfPath, out)) {
                    errorMessage = QStringLiteral("pdftotext -bbox-layout 失败");
                    return false;
                }
                pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B 回退: plainText失败，使用空页几何"));
            } else {
                pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取B 回退: plainText成功"));
            }
        }
    }

    const QString xmlTool = executor.detectCommand(QStringLiteral("pdftohtml"));
    if (!xmlTool.isEmpty()) {
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取C 工具检测: pdftohtml=%1").arg(xmlTool));
        const QString xmlPath = tempDir.path() + QStringLiteral("/layout.xml");
        const CommandResult xmlResult = executor.run(
            xmlTool,
            {
                QStringLiteral("-xml"),
                pdfPath,
                xmlPath
            },
            3000,
            -1
        );
        if (xmlResult.started && xmlResult.exitCode == 0 && QFileInfo::exists(xmlPath)) {
            QFile xmlFile(xmlPath);
            if (xmlFile.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
                const QString xml = QString::fromUtf8(xmlFile.readAll());
                const bool xmlApplied = enrichStylesFromXml(xml, tempDir.path(), out);
                pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取C xml-file: exit=0, bytes=%1, applied=%2")
                             .arg(xml.toUtf8().size())
                             .arg(xmlApplied ? 1 : 0));
            }
        } else {
            pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取C xml-file失败: started=%1, exit=%2, msg=%3")
                         .arg(xmlResult.started ? 1 : 0)
                         .arg(xmlResult.exitCode)
                         .arg(xmlResult.combinedOutput.left(180)));
            const CommandResult xmlStdoutResult = executor.run(
                xmlTool,
                {
                    QStringLiteral("-xml"),
                    QStringLiteral("-stdout"),
                    pdfPath
                },
                3000,
                -1
            );
            if (xmlStdoutResult.started && xmlStdoutResult.exitCode == 0) {
                const bool xmlApplied = enrichStylesFromXml(xmlStdoutResult.combinedOutput, QString(), out);
                pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取C xml-stdout: bytes=%1, applied=%2")
                             .arg(xmlStdoutResult.combinedOutput.toUtf8().size())
                             .arg(xmlApplied ? 1 : 0));
            } else {
                pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取C xml-stdout失败: started=%1, exit=%2, msg=%3")
                             .arg(xmlStdoutResult.started ? 1 : 0)
                             .arg(xmlStdoutResult.exitCode)
                             .arg(xmlStdoutResult.combinedOutput.left(180)));
            }
        }
    } else {
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取C 工具检测: pdftohtml=missing"));
    }
    const auto countPageImages = [](const LayoutDocument &doc) {
        int count = 0;
        for (const LayoutPage &page : doc.pages) {
            count += page.images.size();
        }
        return count;
    };
    const auto countPageBackgroundFills = [](const LayoutDocument &doc) {
        int count = 0;
        for (const LayoutPage &page : doc.pages) {
            for (const LayoutFillShape &fill : page.fills) {
                if (fill.isBackground) {
                    count += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        return count;
    };

    const int imagesBeforeMaterialize = countPageImages(out);
    materializeExtractedImages(pdfPath, tempDir.path(), out);
    const int imagesAfterMaterialize = countPageImages(out);
    applyAuthoritativePageGeometry(pdfPath, out);
    const int bgBeforeRaster = countPageBackgroundFills(out);
    detectPageBaseFillByRaster(pdfPath, executor, tempDir.path(), out);
    const int bgAfterRaster = countPageBackgroundFills(out);
    SvgBackgroundProbeStats svgBgStats;
    detectLargeVectorBackgroundsFromSvg(pdfPath, executor, tempDir.path(), out, &svgBgStats);
    const int bgAfterSvg = countPageBackgroundFills(out);
    for (LayoutPage &page : out.pages) {
        normalizeBackgroundFillCoverage(page);
    }
    pushDiag(
        QStringLiteral("抽取多源融合: bbox=%1, xml=%2, image物化增量=%3, raster背景增量=%4, svg背景增量=%5, pageGeometry=1")
            .arg(parsed ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(xmlTool.isEmpty() ? 0 : 1)
            .arg(qMax(0, imagesAfterMaterialize - imagesBeforeMaterialize))
            .arg(qMax(0, bgAfterRaster - bgBeforeRaster))
            .arg(qMax(0, bgAfterSvg - bgAfterRaster))
    );
    pushDiag(
        QStringLiteral("抽取SVG背景探测: 工具缺失=%1, 渲染失败页=%2, 页尝试=%3, 页命中=%4, 候选=%5, 采纳=%6, 拒绝(无填充/低透明/无边界/面积或偏移/背景形态不足)=%7/%8/%9/%10/%11")
            .arg(svgBgStats.toolMissing ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(svgBgStats.renderFailed)
            .arg(svgBgStats.pagesTried)
            .arg(svgBgStats.pagesWithSvg)
            .arg(svgBgStats.candidates)
            .arg(svgBgStats.accepted)
            .arg(svgBgStats.rejectNoFill)
            .arg(svgBgStats.rejectLowAlpha)
            .arg(svgBgStats.rejectNoBox)
            .arg(svgBgStats.rejectSmallOrOffset)
            .arg(svgBgStats.rejectNotBgLike)
    );
    if (!svgBgStats.firstRenderError.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取SVG背景探测首个失败: %1").arg(svgBgStats.firstRenderError));
    }
    int pagesWithBackground = 0;
    int pagesWithFill = 0;
    for (const LayoutPage &page : out.pages) {
        const int textLineCount = countPageTextLines(page);
        const int imageCount = page.images.size();
        const int shapeCount = page.fills.size();
        const int tableCount = page.tables.size();
        int backgroundCount = 0;
        for (const LayoutFillShape &fill : page.fills) {
            if (fill.isBackground) {
                backgroundCount += 1;
            }
        }
        if (shapeCount > 0) {
            pagesWithFill += 1;
        }
        if (backgroundCount > 0) {
            pagesWithBackground += 1;
        }
        int rotatedImageCount = 0;
        int abnormalImageCount = 0;
        QString chartEvidence;
        const int chartEvidenceCount = detectChartEvidence(page, chartEvidence);
        QStringList evidence;
        for (int i = 0; i < page.images.size(); ++i) {
            const LayoutImage &img = page.images.at(i);
            if (qAbs(img.rotationDeg) >= 0.1) {
                rotatedImageCount += 1;
            }
            if (img.isBackground) {
                backgroundCount += 1;
            }
            QString reason;
            if (detectImageAnomaly(img, qMax(1.0, page.width), qMax(1.0, page.height), reason)) {
                abnormalImageCount += 1;
                if (evidence.size() < 4) {
                    evidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("img#%1:%2").arg(i + 1).arg(reason));
                }
            }
        }
        if (evidence.isEmpty()) {
            evidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("无异常"));
        }
        if (!chartEvidence.isEmpty()) {
            evidence.push_back(chartEvidence);
        }
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取页指标: 页=%1, 文本行数=%2, 图片数=%3, 背景数=%4, 形状数=%5, 表格数=%6, 图表证据=%7, 旋转图数=%8, 异常图数=%9")
                     .arg(page.pageIndex + 1)
                     .arg(textLineCount)
                     .arg(imageCount)
                     .arg(backgroundCount)
                     .arg(shapeCount)
                     .arg(tableCount)
                     .arg(chartEvidenceCount)
                     .arg(rotatedImageCount)
                     .arg(abnormalImageCount));
        pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取页证据: 页=%1, %2")
                     .arg(page.pageIndex + 1)
                     .arg(evidence.join(QStringLiteral(" | "))));
    }
    int textLines = 0;
    int tables = 0;
    int images = 0;
    int fills = 0;
    summarizeLayout(out, textLines, tables, images, fills);
    pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取汇总: 页=%1, 文本行=%2, 表格=%3, 图片=%4, 填充=%5")
                 .arg(out.pages.size()).arg(textLines).arg(tables).arg(images).arg(fills));
    pushDiag(QStringLiteral("抽取背景覆盖: 背景页=%1/%2, 含填充页=%3/%4")
                 .arg(pagesWithBackground)
                 .arg(out.pages.size())
                 .arg(pagesWithFill)
                 .arg(out.pages.size()));

    if (!allowPlainTextFallback) {
        bool hasAnyObject = false;
        for (const LayoutPage &page : out.pages) {
            if (!page.blocks.isEmpty() || !page.tables.isEmpty() || !page.images.isEmpty() || !page.fills.isEmpty()) {
                hasAnyObject = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (!hasAnyObject) {
            errorMessage = QStringLiteral("PPT 抽取为空：未识别到文本/图片/背景填充对象（请检查工具链）");
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}

bool PdfLayoutExtractor::parseBBoxHtml(const QString &html, LayoutDocument &out) const {
    struct RawWord {
        QString text;
        LayoutBBox box;
    };

    static const QRegularExpression pageOpen(
        QStringLiteral("<page[^>]*number=\"([0-9]+)\"[^>]*width=\"([0-9.]+)\"[^>]*height=\"([0-9.]+)\"[^>]*>"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression pageClose(
        QStringLiteral("</page>"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression wordRe(
        QStringLiteral("<word[^>]*xMin=\"([0-9.]+)\"[^>]*yMin=\"([0-9.]+)\"[^>]*xMax=\"([0-9.]+)\"[^>]*yMax=\"([0-9.]+)\"[^>]*>([^<]*)</word>"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );

    auto lineBoxFromRuns = [](const QVector<LayoutTextRun> &runs) {
        LayoutBBox box;
        if (runs.isEmpty()) {
            return box;
        }
        double minX = runs.first().box.x;
        double minY = runs.first().box.y;
        double maxX = runs.first().box.x + runs.first().box.w;
        double maxY = runs.first().box.y + runs.first().box.h;
        for (const LayoutTextRun &run : runs) {
            minX = qMin(minX, run.box.x);
            minY = qMin(minY, run.box.y);
            maxX = qMax(maxX, run.box.x + run.box.w);
            maxY = qMax(maxY, run.box.y + run.box.h);
        }
        box.x = minX;
        box.y = minY;
        box.w = qMax(0.0, maxX - minX);
        box.h = qMax(0.0, maxY - minY);
        return box;
    };

    auto mergeBlockBox = [](const QVector<LayoutLine> &lines) {
        LayoutBBox box;
        if (lines.isEmpty()) {
            return box;
        }
        double minX = lines.first().box.x;
        double minY = lines.first().box.y;
        double maxX = lines.first().box.x + lines.first().box.w;
        double maxY = lines.first().box.y + lines.first().box.h;
        for (const LayoutLine &line : lines) {
            minX = qMin(minX, line.box.x);
            minY = qMin(minY, line.box.y);
            maxX = qMax(maxX, line.box.x + line.box.w);
            maxY = qMax(maxY, line.box.y + line.box.h);
        }
        box.x = minX;
        box.y = minY;
        box.w = qMax(0.0, maxX - minX);
        box.h = qMax(0.0, maxY - minY);
        return box;
    };

    auto buildLinesFromWords = [&](QVector<RawWord> words, const double pageWidth) {
        QVector<LayoutLine> linesOut;
        if (words.isEmpty()) {
            return linesOut;
        }
        auto detectListPrefix = [](QString &text, bool &ordered, int &level, QString &marker) {
            ordered = false;
            level = 0;
            marker.clear();
            QString t = text.trimmed();
            static const QRegularExpression unorderedRe(
                QStringLiteral(R"(^(?:[\x{2022}\x{25E6}\x{25AA}\x{25CF}\-\*]|[·•▪◦])\s+(.+)$)"),
                QRegularExpression::UseUnicodePropertiesOption
            );
            static const QRegularExpression orderedRe(
                QStringLiteral(R"(^((?:\d+|[A-Za-z]+|[一二三四五六七八九十]+)[\.\)]|(?:\(|（)\d+(?:\)|）))\s+(.+)$)")
            );
            const QRegularExpressionMatch um = unorderedRe.match(t);
            if (um.hasMatch()) {
                ordered = false;
                level = 1;
                marker = QStringLiteral("•");
                text = um.captured(1).trimmed();
                return;
            }
            const QRegularExpressionMatch om = orderedRe.match(t);
            if (om.hasMatch()) {
                ordered = true;
                level = 1;
                marker = om.captured(1).trimmed();
                text = om.captured(2).trimmed();
            }
        };
        auto inferParagraphAlign = [&](const LayoutLine &line) {
            const double left = line.box.x;
            const double right = line.box.x + line.box.w;
            const double center = left + line.box.w * 0.5;
            const bool nearLeft = left <= pageWidth * 0.12;
            const bool nearRight = right >= pageWidth * 0.88;
            if (nearLeft && nearRight) {
                return QStringLiteral("just");
            }
            if (qAbs(center - pageWidth * 0.5) <= pageWidth * 0.08) {
                return QStringLiteral("ctr");
            }
            if (right >= pageWidth * 0.9 && left > pageWidth * 0.45) {
                return QStringLiteral("r");
            }
            return QStringLiteral("l");
        };
        std::sort(words.begin(), words.end(), [](const RawWord &a, const RawWord &b) {
            if (!qFuzzyCompare(a.box.y + 1.0, b.box.y + 1.0)) {
                return a.box.y < b.box.y;
            }
            return a.box.x < b.box.x;
        });

        QVector<RawWord> current;
        double baselineY = words.first().box.y;
        for (const RawWord &word : words) {
            const bool sameLine = qAbs(word.box.y - baselineY) <= 4.0;
            if (!current.isEmpty() && !sameLine) {
                std::sort(current.begin(), current.end(), [](const RawWord &a, const RawWord &b) {
                    return a.box.x < b.box.x;
                });
                LayoutLine line;
                for (const RawWord &rw : current) {
                    LayoutTextRun run;
                    run.text = rw.text;
                    run.box = rw.box;
                    run.fontSize = rw.box.h;
                    run.color = QStringLiteral("#111827");
                    run.lineHeight = run.fontSize * 1.15;
                    line.runs.push_back(run);
                }
                line.box = lineBoxFromRuns(line.runs);
                line.paragraphAlign = inferParagraphAlign(line);
                line.indentPt = qMax(0.0, line.box.x);
                if (!line.runs.isEmpty()) {
                    QString firstText = line.runs.first().text;
                    bool ordered = false;
                    int level = 0;
                    QString marker;
                    detectListPrefix(firstText, ordered, level, marker);
                    if (!marker.isEmpty()) {
                        line.listOrdered = ordered;
                        line.listLevel = level;
                        line.listMarker = marker;
                        line.runs.first().text = firstText;
                    }
                }
                linesOut.push_back(line);
                current.clear();
            }
            if (current.isEmpty()) {
                baselineY = word.box.y;
            }
            current.push_back(word);
        }
        if (!current.isEmpty()) {
            std::sort(current.begin(), current.end(), [](const RawWord &a, const RawWord &b) {
                return a.box.x < b.box.x;
            });
            LayoutLine line;
            for (const RawWord &rw : current) {
                LayoutTextRun run;
                run.text = rw.text;
                run.box = rw.box;
                run.fontSize = rw.box.h;
                run.color = QStringLiteral("#111827");
                run.lineHeight = run.fontSize * 1.15;
                line.runs.push_back(run);
            }
            line.box = lineBoxFromRuns(line.runs);
            line.paragraphAlign = inferParagraphAlign(line);
            line.indentPt = qMax(0.0, line.box.x);
            if (!line.runs.isEmpty()) {
                QString firstText = line.runs.first().text;
                bool ordered = false;
                int level = 0;
                QString marker;
                detectListPrefix(firstText, ordered, level, marker);
                if (!marker.isEmpty()) {
                    line.listOrdered = ordered;
                    line.listLevel = level;
                    line.listMarker = marker;
                    line.runs.first().text = firstText;
                }
            }
            linesOut.push_back(line);
        }
        return linesOut;
    };

    auto reorderLinesByColumns = [](const QVector<LayoutLine> &lines, const double pageWidth) {
        if (lines.size() < 8) {
            return lines;
        }

        QVector<int> fullWidthIds;
        QVector<int> columnIds;
        for (int i = 0; i < lines.size(); ++i) {
            const LayoutLine &line = lines[i];
            const double left = line.box.x;
            const double right = line.box.x + line.box.w;
            const bool fullWidth = (line.box.w >= pageWidth * 0.68)
                || (left <= pageWidth * 0.12 && right >= pageWidth * 0.86);
            if (fullWidth) {
                fullWidthIds.push_back(i);
            } else {
                columnIds.push_back(i);
            }
        }
        if (columnIds.size() < 6) {
            return lines;
        }

        std::sort(columnIds.begin(), columnIds.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
            const double ax = lines[a].box.x + lines[a].box.w / 2.0;
            const double bx = lines[b].box.x + lines[b].box.w / 2.0;
            return ax < bx;
        });

        QVector<double> clusterCenters;
        QVector<QVector<int>> clusters;
        const double gapThreshold = qMax(48.0, pageWidth * 0.12);
        for (const int id : columnIds) {
            const double centerX = lines[id].box.x + lines[id].box.w / 2.0;
            if (clusterCenters.isEmpty() || (centerX - clusterCenters.back()) > gapThreshold) {
                clusterCenters.push_back(centerX);
                clusters.push_back({id});
                continue;
            }
            QVector<int> &bucket = clusters.back();
            bucket.push_back(id);
            const int n = bucket.size();
            clusterCenters.back() = ((clusterCenters.back() * (n - 1)) + centerX) / n;
        }

        QVector<int> validClusterOrder;
        for (int i = 0; i < clusters.size(); ++i) {
            if (clusters[i].size() >= 3) {
                validClusterOrder.push_back(i);
            }
        }
        if (validClusterOrder.size() < 2) {
            return lines;
        }

        for (QVector<int> &bucket : clusters) {
            std::sort(bucket.begin(), bucket.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
                if (!qFuzzyCompare(lines[a].box.y + 1.0, lines[b].box.y + 1.0)) {
                    return lines[a].box.y < lines[b].box.y;
                }
                return lines[a].box.x < lines[b].box.x;
            });
        }
        std::sort(fullWidthIds.begin(), fullWidthIds.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
            if (!qFuzzyCompare(lines[a].box.y + 1.0, lines[b].box.y + 1.0)) {
                return lines[a].box.y < lines[b].box.y;
            }
            return lines[a].box.x < lines[b].box.x;
        });

        QVector<LayoutLine> ordered;
        ordered.reserve(lines.size());
        QVector<int> clusterCursor(clusters.size(), 0);
        auto appendSegmentByColumns = [&](const double yMin, const double yMax) {
            for (const int clusterId : validClusterOrder) {
                QVector<int> &bucket = clusters[clusterId];
                int &cursor = clusterCursor[clusterId];
                while (cursor < bucket.size()) {
                    const int id = bucket[cursor];
                    const double y = lines[id].box.y;
                    if (y < yMin) {
                        cursor += 1;
                        continue;
                    }
                    if (y >= yMax) {
                        break;
                    }
                    ordered.push_back(lines[id]);
                    cursor += 1;
                }
            }
        };

        double segmentStart = -1e9;
        for (const int fullId : fullWidthIds) {
            const double splitY = lines[fullId].box.y;
            appendSegmentByColumns(segmentStart, splitY);
            ordered.push_back(lines[fullId]);
            segmentStart = lines[fullId].box.y + qMax(4.0, lines[fullId].box.h * 0.4);
        }
        appendSegmentByColumns(segmentStart, 1e9);

        if (ordered.size() >= static_cast<int>(lines.size() * 0.65)) {
            return ordered;
        }
        return lines;
    };

    auto detectTable = [&](const QVector<LayoutLine> &lines) {
        LayoutTable table;
        if (lines.size() < 2) {
            return table;
        }

        QVector<QVector<const LayoutLine *>> tableSegments;
        QVector<const LayoutLine *> activeSegment;
        for (const LayoutLine &line : lines) {
            if (line.runs.size() >= 2) {
                activeSegment.push_back(&line);
            } else {
                if (activeSegment.size() >= 2) {
                    tableSegments.push_back(activeSegment);
                }
                activeSegment.clear();
            }
        }
        if (activeSegment.size() >= 2) {
            tableSegments.push_back(activeSegment);
        }
        if (tableSegments.isEmpty()) {
            return table;
        }

        int bestSegmentIndex = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < tableSegments.size(); ++i) {
            if (tableSegments[i].size() > tableSegments[bestSegmentIndex].size()) {
                bestSegmentIndex = i;
            }
        }
        const QVector<const LayoutLine *> candidates = tableSegments[bestSegmentIndex];

        QVector<double> columnAnchors;
        for (const LayoutLine *line : candidates) {
            if (line == nullptr) {
                continue;
            }
            for (const LayoutTextRun &run : line->runs) {
                bool merged = false;
                for (double &anchor : columnAnchors) {
                    if (qAbs(anchor - run.box.x) <= 10.0) {
                        anchor = (anchor + run.box.x) / 2.0;
                        merged = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (!merged) {
                    columnAnchors.push_back(run.box.x);
                }
            }
        }
        if (candidates.size() < 3 || columnAnchors.size() < 2 || columnAnchors.size() > 8) {
            return table;
        }
        std::sort(columnAnchors.begin(), columnAnchors.end());

        auto nearestColumn = [&](const double x) {
            int bestCol = 0;
            double bestDist = qAbs(x - columnAnchors[0]);
            for (int col = 1; col < columnAnchors.size(); ++col) {
                const double dist = qAbs(x - columnAnchors[col]);
                if (dist < bestDist) {
                    bestDist = dist;
                    bestCol = col;
                }
            }
            return bestCol;
        };

        QVector<int> columnHitCount(columnAnchors.size(), 0);
        int rowsWithAtLeastTwoCols = 0;
        for (const LayoutLine *line : candidates) {
            if (line == nullptr || line->runs.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QVector<LayoutTextRun> sortedRuns = line->runs;
            std::sort(sortedRuns.begin(), sortedRuns.end(), [](const LayoutTextRun &a, const LayoutTextRun &b) {
                return a.box.x < b.box.x;
            });
            QVector<int> rowCols;
            rowCols.reserve(sortedRuns.size());
            for (const LayoutTextRun &run : sortedRuns) {
                const int col = nearestColumn(run.box.x);
                if (rowCols.isEmpty() || rowCols.last() != col) {
                    rowCols.push_back(col);
                }
            }
            if (rowCols.size() >= 2) {
                rowsWithAtLeastTwoCols += 1;
            }
            for (const int col : rowCols) {
                if (col >= 0 && col < columnHitCount.size()) {
                    columnHitCount[col] += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        int repeatedColumns = 0;
        for (const int hits : columnHitCount) {
            if (hits >= 2) {
                repeatedColumns += 1;
            }
        }
        const int minRowsWithTwoCols = qMax(2, static_cast<int>(std::ceil(candidates.size() * 0.6)));
        if (rowsWithAtLeastTwoCols < minRowsWithTwoCols || repeatedColumns < 2) {
            return table;
        }

        table.rowCount = candidates.size();
        table.colCount = columnAnchors.size();
        QVector<QVector<int>> grid(table.rowCount, QVector<int>(table.colCount, -1));

        for (int row = 0; row < candidates.size(); ++row) {
            const LayoutLine &line = *candidates[row];
            QVector<LayoutTextRun> runs = line.runs;
            std::sort(runs.begin(), runs.end(), [](const LayoutTextRun &a, const LayoutTextRun &b) {
                return a.box.x < b.box.x;
            });
            for (const LayoutTextRun &run : runs) {
                const int startCol = nearestColumn(run.box.x);
                int endCol = startCol;
                const double rightX = run.box.x + run.box.w;
                for (int col = startCol + 1; col < columnAnchors.size(); ++col) {
                    const double boundary = columnAnchors[col] - qMax(8.0, (columnAnchors[col] - columnAnchors[col - 1]) * 0.35);
                    if (rightX >= boundary) {
                        endCol = col;
                    }
                }

                LayoutTableCell cell;
                cell.row = row;
                cell.col = startCol;
                cell.colSpan = qMax(1, endCol - startCol + 1);
                cell.text = run.text;
                cell.box = run.box;
                cell.textAlign = run.text.contains(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^[+\-]?\d[\d,]*(\.\d+)?%?$)")))
                    ? QStringLiteral("r")
                    : QStringLiteral("l");
                cell.verticalAlign = QStringLiteral("ctr");
                cell.fillColor = row == 0 ? QStringLiteral("#F3F4F6") : QStringLiteral("#FFFFFF");
                cell.textColor = QStringLiteral("#111111");
                cell.borderColor = QStringLiteral("#D1D5DB");
                cell.borderWidth = 0.6;
                cell.bold = row == 0;
                cell.italic = false;
                cell.fontSize = qMax(10.0, run.fontSize);
                cell.fontFamily = run.fontFamily;

                const int existed = grid[row][startCol];
                if (existed >= 0 && existed < table.cells.size()) {
                    LayoutTableCell &target = table.cells[existed];
                    target.text = QStringLiteral("%1 %2").arg(target.text, cell.text).trimmed();
                    target.colSpan = qMax(target.colSpan, cell.colSpan);
                    const double minX = qMin(target.box.x, cell.box.x);
                    const double minY = qMin(target.box.y, cell.box.y);
                    const double maxX = qMax(target.box.x + target.box.w, cell.box.x + cell.box.w);
                    const double maxY = qMax(target.box.y + target.box.h, cell.box.y + cell.box.h);
                    target.box.x = minX;
                    target.box.y = minY;
                    target.box.w = qMax(0.0, maxX - minX);
                    target.box.h = qMax(0.0, maxY - minY);
                    continue;
                }

                const int cellIndex = table.cells.size();
                table.cells.push_back(cell);
                for (int cc = startCol; cc < qMin(table.colCount, startCol + cell.colSpan); ++cc) {
                    grid[row][cc] = cellIndex;
                }
            }
        }

        for (int index = 0; index < table.cells.size(); ++index) {
            LayoutTableCell &cell = table.cells[index];
            int newColSpan = cell.colSpan;
            while (cell.col + newColSpan < table.colCount) {
                const int probeCol = cell.col + newColSpan;
                if (grid[cell.row][probeCol] != -1) {
                    break;
                }
                const bool supported =
                    (cell.row > 0 && grid[cell.row - 1][probeCol] != -1) ||
                    (cell.row + 1 < table.rowCount && grid[cell.row + 1][probeCol] != -1);
                if (!supported) {
                    break;
                }
                newColSpan += 1;
            }
            cell.colSpan = qMax(1, newColSpan);
            for (int cc = cell.col; cc < qMin(table.colCount, cell.col + cell.colSpan); ++cc) {
                grid[cell.row][cc] = index;
            }
        }

        for (int index = 0; index < table.cells.size(); ++index) {
            LayoutTableCell &cell = table.cells[index];
            int newRowSpan = 1;
            while (cell.row + newRowSpan < table.rowCount) {
                const int probeRow = cell.row + newRowSpan;
                bool rowHasAny = false;
                for (int c = 0; c < table.colCount; ++c) {
                    if (grid[probeRow][c] != -1) {
                        rowHasAny = true;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (!rowHasAny) {
                    break;
                }
                bool canExpand = true;
                for (int cc = cell.col; cc < qMin(table.colCount, cell.col + cell.colSpan); ++cc) {
                    if (grid[probeRow][cc] != -1) {
                        canExpand = false;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (!canExpand) {
                    break;
                }
                newRowSpan += 1;
            }
            cell.rowSpan = qMax(1, newRowSpan);
            for (int rr = cell.row; rr < qMin(table.rowCount, cell.row + cell.rowSpan); ++rr) {
                for (int cc = cell.col; cc < qMin(table.colCount, cell.col + cell.colSpan); ++cc) {
                    grid[rr][cc] = index;
                }
            }
        }

        bool initializedBox = false;
        for (const LayoutTableCell &cell : table.cells) {
            if (!initializedBox) {
                table.box = cell.box;
                initializedBox = true;
                continue;
            }
            const double minX = qMin(table.box.x, cell.box.x);
            const double minY = qMin(table.box.y, cell.box.y);
            const double maxX = qMax(table.box.x + table.box.w, cell.box.x + cell.box.w);
            const double maxY = qMax(table.box.y + table.box.h, cell.box.y + cell.box.h);
            table.box.x = minX;
            table.box.y = minY;
            table.box.w = qMax(0.0, maxX - minX);
            table.box.h = qMax(0.0, maxY - minY);
        }
        return table;
    };

    LayoutPage currentPage;
    bool inPage = false;
    QVector<RawWord> pageWords;
    int sequentialPageIndex = 0;
    int parsedWordCount = 0;
    bool hasStructuredText = false;

    auto flushCurrentPage = [&]() {
        if (!inPage) {
            return;
        }
        const QVector<LayoutLine> extractedLines = buildLinesFromWords(pageWords, currentPage.width);
        const QVector<LayoutLine> orderedLines = reorderLinesByColumns(extractedLines, currentPage.width);
        LayoutBlock block;
        block.type = QStringLiteral("paragraph");
        block.lines = orderedLines;
        block.box = mergeBlockBox(block.lines);
        if (!block.lines.isEmpty()) {
            currentPage.blocks.push_back(block);
            hasStructuredText = true;
        }
        const LayoutTable table = detectTable(extractedLines);
        if (table.rowCount > 0 && table.colCount > 0 && !table.cells.isEmpty()) {
            currentPage.tables.push_back(table);
            hasStructuredText = true;
        }
        out.pages.push_back(currentPage);
        currentPage = LayoutPage();
        pageWords.clear();
        inPage = false;
    };

    auto attrValue = [](const QString &tag, const QString &name) -> QString {
        const QRegularExpression re(
            QStringLiteral("\\b%1\\s*=\\s*\"([^\"]+)\"").arg(QRegularExpression::escape(name)),
            QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
        );
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = re.match(tag);
        return m.hasMatch() ? m.captured(1).trimmed() : QString();
    };
    auto attrDouble = [&](const QString &tag, const QString &name, const double fallback = 0.0) -> double {
        bool ok = false;
        const double v = attrValue(tag, name).toDouble(&ok);
        return ok ? v : fallback;
    };

    static const QRegularExpression tokenRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(<page\b[^>]*>|</page>|<word\b[^>]*>[^<]*</word>)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression wordContentRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^<word\b[^>]*>([\s\S]*)</word>$)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );

    QRegularExpressionMatchIterator tokenIt = tokenRe.globalMatch(html);
    while (tokenIt.hasNext()) {
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = tokenIt.next();
        const QString token = m.captured(0);
        if (token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("<page"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            flushCurrentPage();
            inPage = true;
            currentPage = LayoutPage();
            const QString pageNoText = attrValue(token, QStringLiteral("number"));
            bool ok = false;
            const int oneBased = pageNoText.toInt(&ok);
            currentPage.pageIndex = ok ? qMax(0, oneBased - 1) : sequentialPageIndex;
            currentPage.width = attrDouble(token, QStringLiteral("width"), 0.0);
            currentPage.height = attrDouble(token, QStringLiteral("height"), 0.0);
            sequentialPageIndex = qMax(sequentialPageIndex, currentPage.pageIndex + 1);
            continue;
        }
        if (token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("</page"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            if (inPage) {
                flushCurrentPage();
            }
            continue;
        }
        if (!inPage || !token.startsWith(QStringLiteral("<word"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRegularExpressionMatch wm = wordContentRe.match(token);
        if (!wm.hasMatch()) {
            continue;
        }
        RawWord word;
        word.text = wm.captured(1).trimmed();
        word.text = QString(word.text).replace(QStringLiteral("&amp;"), QStringLiteral("&"))
                        .replace(QStringLiteral("&lt;"), QStringLiteral("<"))
                        .replace(QStringLiteral("&gt;"), QStringLiteral(">"))
                        .replace(QStringLiteral("&quot;"), QStringLiteral("\""))
                        .replace(QStringLiteral("&#39;"), QStringLiteral("'"))
                        .replace(QStringLiteral("&nbsp;"), QStringLiteral(" "))
                        .trimmed();
        word.box.x = attrDouble(token, QStringLiteral("xMin"), 0.0);
        word.box.y = attrDouble(token, QStringLiteral("yMin"), 0.0);
        const double xMax = attrDouble(token, QStringLiteral("xMax"), word.box.x);
        const double yMax = attrDouble(token, QStringLiteral("yMax"), word.box.y);
        word.box.w = qMax(0.0, xMax - word.box.x);
        word.box.h = qMax(0.0, yMax - word.box.y);
        if (!word.text.isEmpty()) {
            pageWords.push_back(word);
            parsedWordCount += 1;
        }
    }
    flushCurrentPage();

    return !out.pages.isEmpty() && (parsedWordCount > 0 || hasStructuredText);
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfLayoutExtractor.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>

#include "core/domain/model/LayoutModel.h"
#include "core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.h"

namespace converter {

// 对象级抽取器（阶段2）：
// 1) 优先使用 pdftotext -bbox-layout 获取文本+坐标
// 2) 解析为 LayoutDocument，供阅读顺序重建和高还原导出使用
class PdfLayoutExtractor final {
public:
    bool extract(
        const QString &pdfPath,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        LayoutDocument &out,
        QString &errorMessage,
        bool allowPlainTextFallback = true,
        QStringList *diagnostics = nullptr
    ) const;

private:
    bool parseBBoxHtml(const QString &html, LayoutDocument &out) const;
};

} // namespace converter

📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfTextIndexer.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfTextIndexer.h"

#include <QHash>
#include <QCryptographicHash>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QJsonArray>
#include <QJsonDocument>
#include <QJsonObject>
#include <QProcess>
#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QStandardPaths>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QTemporaryDir>
#include <QtGlobal>

#include <algorithm>

namespace converter {

namespace {
constexpr int kTextChunkSize = 2400;
constexpr int kTextChunkOverlap = 96;
constexpr int kPreviewContext = 24;
constexpr int kCollectFactor = 4;
constexpr int kOcrMaxPages = 24;
constexpr int kOcrDpi = 160;
constexpr int kOcrPerPageTimeoutMs = 12000;
constexpr int kWordBoxPreheatPages = 8;
constexpr int kWordBoxLazyWindow = 3;

QString buildPreview(const QString &content, const int start, const int length) {
    const int left = qMax(0, start - kPreviewContext);
    const int right = qMin(content.size(), start + length + kPreviewContext);
    QString preview = content.mid(left, right - left).simplified();
    if (left > 0) {
        preview.prepend(QStringLiteral("..."));
    }
    if (right < content.size()) {
        preview.append(QStringLiteral("..."));
    }
    return preview;
}

QString buildCrossPagePreview(const QString &leftPage, const QString &rightPage, const QString &needle) {
    const int leftTake = qMin(28, leftPage.size());
    const int rightTake = qMin(28, rightPage.size());
    QString preview = QStringLiteral("...%1 | %2...")
        .arg(leftPage.right(leftTake).simplified(), rightPage.left(rightTake).simplified());
    if (!needle.isEmpty()) {
        preview += QStringLiteral(" [跨页:%1]").arg(needle);
    }
    return preview;
}

bool isWordBoundaryChar(const QChar &ch) {
    return !ch.isLetterOrNumber() && ch != QChar('_');
}

bool isAsciiWordLike(const QChar &ch) {
    return ch.unicode() < 128 && (ch.isLetterOrNumber() || ch == QChar('_'));
}

bool shouldInsertSpaceBetween(const QString &left, const QString &right) {
    if (left.isEmpty() || right.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    const QChar l = left.back();
    const QChar r = right.front();
    const bool leftAscii = isAsciiWordLike(l);
    const bool rightAscii = isAsciiWordLike(r);
    if (leftAscii && rightAscii) {
        return true;
    }
    static const QString rightNoSpacePunct = QStringLiteral(".,;:!?%)]}，。；：！？、）】》");
    static const QString leftNoSpacePunct = QStringLiteral("([{'\"“‘（【《");
    if (rightNoSpacePunct.contains(r) || leftNoSpacePunct.contains(l)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (leftAscii != rightAscii) {
        return true;
    }
    return false;
}

bool endsWithSentenceTerminator(const QString &text) {
    const QString trimmed = text.trimmed();
    if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    const QChar tail = trimmed.back();
    static const QString hardStops = QStringLiteral("。！？!?；;：:");
    if (hardStops.contains(tail)) {
        return true;
    }
    // 常见英文缩写（如 U.S.）不作为段落断点。
    if (tail == QChar('.') && trimmed.size() >= 2) {
        const QChar prev = trimmed[trimmed.size() - 2];
        if (prev.isLetter()) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return tail == QChar('.');
}

bool startsWithListMarker(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression markerRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*((\d+[\.\)]|[A-Za-z][\.\)]|[（\(]?\d+[）\)]|[•●▪◦\-]))\s+)")
    );
    return markerRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool startsWithSemanticParagraphStarter(const QString &text) {
    if (startsWithListMarker(text)) {
        return true;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression cnOrdinalRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[（\(]?[一二三四五六七八九十百千万0-9]+[）\)\.、:：]\s*)")
    );
    if (cnOrdinalRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return true;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression headingLikeRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*(第[一二三四五六七八九十百千万0-9]+[章节条]|Chapter\s+\d+|Section\s+\d+))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    return headingLikeRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

QVector<int> buildSearchPageOrder(const QList<int> &pages, const int preferredPage) {
    QVector<int> ordered;
    if (pages.isEmpty()) {
        return ordered;
    }
    ordered.reserve(pages.size());
    if (preferredPage < 0) {
        for (const int page : pages) {
            ordered.push_back(page);
        }
        return ordered;
    }

    QSet<int> used;
    auto pushIfAbsent = [&](const int page) {
        if (used.contains(page)) {
            return;
        }
        used.insert(page);
        ordered.push_back(page);
    };
    pushIfAbsent(preferredPage);

    int maxDelta = 0;
    for (const int page : pages) {
        maxDelta = qMax(maxDelta, qAbs(page - preferredPage));
    }
    for (int delta = 1; delta <= maxDelta; ++delta) {
        pushIfAbsent(preferredPage - delta);
        pushIfAbsent(preferredPage + delta);
    }
    for (const int page : pages) {
        pushIfAbsent(page);
    }
    return ordered;
}
} // namespace

bool PdfTextIndexer::buildIndex(const QString &pdfPath, QString &errorMessage) {
    pageText.clear();
    pageTextFolded.clear();
    pageTextChunks.clear();
    pageTextChunksFolded.clear();
    pageChunkOffsets.clear();
    pageWords.clear();
    pageSizes.clear();
    sourcePdfPath = pdfPath;
    wordBoxReadyPages.clear();
    wordBoxesComplete = false;
    errorMessage.clear();
    if (loadFromCache(pdfPath)) {
        return !pageText.isEmpty();
    }

    QProcess process;
    process.setProgram(QStringLiteral("pdftotext"));
    process.setArguments({
        QStringLiteral("-enc"),
        QStringLiteral("UTF-8"),
        pdfPath,
        QStringLiteral("-")
    });
    process.start();
    if (!process.waitForStarted(3000)) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("无法启动 pdftotext（搜索不可用）");
        return false;
    }
    if (!process.waitForFinished(-1)) {
        process.kill();
        process.waitForFinished(1000);
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("pdftotext 超时（搜索不可用）");
        return false;
    }
    if (process.exitCode() != 0) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("pdftotext 执行失败（搜索不可用）");
        return false;
    }

    const QString text = QString::fromUtf8(process.readAllStandardOutput());
    const QStringList pages = text.split(QChar('\f'));
    const int estimatedPageCount = pages.size();
    int page = 0;
    for (const QString &content : pages) {
        const QString trimmed = content.trimmed();
        if (!trimmed.isEmpty()) {
            pageText.insert(page, trimmed);
            pageTextFolded.insert(page, trimmed.toCaseFolded());
            buildPageChunks(page, trimmed);
        }
        page += 1;
    }
    QString ocrWarning;
    if (pageText.isEmpty()) {
        enrichIndexWithOcr(pdfPath, estimatedPageCount, ocrWarning);
    }
    if (pageText.isEmpty() && !ocrWarning.isEmpty()) {
        errorMessage = ocrWarning;
    }
    buildWordBoxes(pdfPath, 0, kWordBoxPreheatPages - 1);
    saveToCache(pdfPath);
    return !pageText.isEmpty();
}

QSet<int> PdfTextIndexer::findPages(const QString &keyword) const {
    QSet<int> result;
    const QString needle = keyword.trimmed().toCaseFolded();
    if (needle.isEmpty()) {
        return result;
    }
    for (auto it = pageTextChunks.constBegin(); it != pageTextChunks.constEnd(); ++it) {
        bool matched = false;
        const QStringList foldedChunks = pageTextChunksFolded.value(it.key());
        for (const QString &foldedChunk : foldedChunks) {
            if (foldedChunk.contains(needle)) {
                matched = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (matched) {
            result.insert(it.key());
        }
    }
    return result;
}

QVector<SearchHit> PdfTextIndexer::findHits(
    const QString &keyword,
    const SearchOptions &options,
    const int maxHits,
    const std::atomic_bool *cancelFlag
) const {
    QVector<SearchHit> hits;
    const QString needle = keyword.trimmed();
    if (needle.isEmpty()) {
        return hits;
    }

    struct ScoredHit {
        SearchHit hit;
        int score = 0;
        int order = 0;
    };
    QVector<ScoredHit> scoredHits;

    const int safeMaxHits = qMax(1, maxHits);
    const int collectLimit = qMax(safeMaxHits, safeMaxHits * kCollectFactor);
    const QVector<int> pageOrder = buildSearchPageOrder(pageText.keys(), options.preferredPage);
    QSet<QString> dedupKeys;
    QHash<QString, int> lastStartBySignature;
    int orderCounter = 0;
    auto appendHit = [&](const int page, const int globalStart, const int length, const QString &content, const QString &matchedOverride, const QString &previewOverride) -> bool {
        if (globalStart < 0 || length <= 0 || globalStart + length > content.size()) {
            return false;
        }
        const QString dedupKey = QStringLiteral("%1:%2:%3").arg(page).arg(globalStart).arg(length);
        if (dedupKeys.contains(dedupKey)) {
            return false;
        }
        const QString matchedText = matchedOverride.isEmpty() ? content.mid(globalStart, length) : matchedOverride;
        const QString signature = QStringLiteral("%1|%2").arg(page).arg(matchedText.toCaseFolded());
        if (lastStartBySignature.contains(signature) && qAbs(globalStart - lastStartBySignature.value(signature)) <= 1) {
            dedupKeys.insert(dedupKey);
            return false;
        }
        lastStartBySignature.insert(signature, globalStart);
        dedupKeys.insert(dedupKey);

        SearchHit hit;
        hit.page = page;
        hit.start = globalStart;
        hit.length = length;
        hit.matchedText = matchedText;
        hit.preview = previewOverride.isEmpty() ? buildPreview(content, globalStart, length) : previewOverride;
        int score = 0;
        score += qMax(0, 1000 - qMin(1000, page * 8));
        score += qMax(0, 600 - qMin(600, globalStart / 6));
        if (options.preferredPage >= 0) {
            const int delta = qAbs(page - options.preferredPage);
            score += qMax(0, 480 - qMin(480, delta * 80));
        }
        if (!options.caseSensitive && matchedText == needle) {
            score += 220;
        }
        if (options.wholeWord) {
            score += 60;
        }
        if (hit.preview.startsWith(QStringLiteral("..."))) {
            score -= 10;
        }
        if (hit.preview.endsWith(QStringLiteral("..."))) {
            score -= 10;
        }
        if (hit.preview.size() >= 8 && hit.preview.size() <= 80) {
            score += 40;
        }
        scoredHits.push_back({hit, score, orderCounter++});
        return scoredHits.size() >= collectLimit;
    };

    if (options.useRegex) {
        QRegularExpression::PatternOptions reOptions = QRegularExpression::NoPatternOption;
        if (!options.caseSensitive) {
            reOptions |= QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption;
        }
        const QString pattern = options.wholeWord
            ? QStringLiteral("\\b(?:%1)\\b").arg(needle)
            : needle;
        const QRegularExpression re(pattern, reOptions);
        if (!re.isValid()) {
            return hits;
        }
        for (const int page : pageOrder) {
            if (cancelFlag != nullptr && cancelFlag->load()) {
                break;
            }
            const QString content = pageText.value(page);
            const QStringList chunks = pageTextChunks.value(page);
            const QVector<int> offsets = pageChunkOffsets.value(page);
            for (int i = 0; i < chunks.size() && i < offsets.size(); ++i) {
                if (cancelFlag != nullptr && cancelFlag->load()) {
                    break;
                }
                QRegularExpressionMatchIterator iter = re.globalMatch(chunks[i]);
                while (iter.hasNext()) {
                    if (cancelFlag != nullptr && cancelFlag->load()) {
                        break;
                    }
                    const QRegularExpressionMatch match = iter.next();
                    if (!match.hasMatch() || match.capturedLength() <= 0) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    const int globalStart = offsets[i] + match.capturedStart();
                    if (appendHit(page, globalStart, match.capturedLength(), content, QString(), QString())) {
                        break;
                    }
                }
                if (scoredHits.size() >= collectLimit) {
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (scoredHits.size() >= collectLimit) {
                break;
            }
        }
    } else {
        const Qt::CaseSensitivity cs = options.caseSensitive ? Qt::CaseSensitive : Qt::CaseInsensitive;
        for (const int page : pageOrder) {
            if (cancelFlag != nullptr && cancelFlag->load()) {
                break;
            }
            const QString content = pageText.value(page);
