            const QStringList chunks = pageTextChunks.value(page);
            const QVector<int> offsets = pageChunkOffsets.value(page);
            for (int i = 0; i < chunks.size() && i < offsets.size(); ++i) {
                if (cancelFlag != nullptr && cancelFlag->load()) {
                    break;
                }
                const QString &chunk = chunks[i];
                const int chunkBase = offsets[i];
                int pos = 0;
                while (pos >= 0 && pos < chunk.size()) {
                    if (cancelFlag != nullptr && cancelFlag->load()) {
                        break;
                    }
                    pos = chunk.indexOf(needle, pos, cs);
                    if (pos < 0) {
                        break;
                    }
                    const int globalStart = chunkBase + pos;
                    const int after = globalStart + needle.size();
                    const QChar leftChar = globalStart > 0 ? content.at(globalStart - 1) : QChar(' ');
                    const QChar rightChar = after < content.size() ? content.at(after) : QChar(' ');
                    const bool wholeWordOk = !options.wholeWord || (isWordBoundaryChar(leftChar) && isWordBoundaryChar(rightChar));
                    if (wholeWordOk && appendHit(page, globalStart, needle.size(), content, QString(), QString())) {
                        break;
                    }
                    pos += needle.size();
                }
                if (scoredHits.size() >= collectLimit) {
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (scoredHits.size() >= collectLimit) {
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    if (!options.useRegex && needle.size() >= 2 && scoredHits.size() < collectLimit) {
        QList<int> sortedPages = pageText.keys();
        std::sort(sortedPages.begin(), sortedPages.end());
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < sortedPages.size(); ++i) {
            if (cancelFlag != nullptr && cancelFlag->load()) {
                break;
            }
            const int leftPage = sortedPages[i];
            const int rightPage = sortedPages[i + 1];
            const QString left = pageText.value(leftPage);
            const QString right = pageText.value(rightPage);
            if (left.isEmpty() || right.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const int maxBridge = qMin(qMin(needle.size() - 1, 24), qMin(left.size(), right.size()));
            for (int leftLen = 1; leftLen <= maxBridge; ++leftLen) {
                const int rightLen = needle.size() - leftLen;
                if (rightLen <= 0 || rightLen > right.size()) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QString leftPart = left.right(leftLen);
                const QString rightPart = right.left(rightLen);
                const QString merged = leftPart + rightPart;
                const bool matched = options.caseSensitive
                    ? merged == needle
                    : merged.toCaseFolded() == needle.toCaseFolded();
                if (!matched) {
                    continue;
                }
                const int globalStart = qMax(0, left.size() - leftLen);
                const QString preview = buildCrossPagePreview(left, right, needle);
                if (appendHit(leftPage, globalStart, leftLen, left, merged, preview)) {
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (scoredHits.size() >= collectLimit) {
                break;
            }
        }
    }

    std::sort(scoredHits.begin(), scoredHits.end(), [](const ScoredHit &a, const ScoredHit &b) {
        if (a.score != b.score) {
            return a.score > b.score;
        }
        if (a.hit.page != b.hit.page) {
            return a.hit.page < b.hit.page;
        }
        if (a.hit.start != b.hit.start) {
            return a.hit.start < b.hit.start;
        }
        return a.order < b.order;
    });
    const int outSize = qMin(safeMaxHits, scoredHits.size());
    hits.reserve(outSize);
    for (int i = 0; i < outSize; ++i) {
        hits.push_back(scoredHits[i].hit);
    }
    return hits;
}

QString PdfTextIndexer::cacheKeyForPdf(const QString &pdfPath) const {
    const QFileInfo info(pdfPath);
    if (!info.exists()) {
        return QString();
    }
    const QString raw = QStringLiteral("%1|%2|%3")
        .arg(info.absoluteFilePath())
        .arg(info.size())
        .arg(info.lastModified().toMSecsSinceEpoch());
    return QString::fromLatin1(QCryptographicHash::hash(raw.toUtf8(), QCryptographicHash::Sha1).toHex());
}

QString PdfTextIndexer::cachePathForKey(const QString &cacheKey) const {
    if (cacheKey.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    QString root = QStandardPaths::writableLocation(QStandardPaths::AppDataLocation);
    if (root.isEmpty()) {
        root = QDir::tempPath();
    }
    QDir dir(root);
    dir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("search-index-cache"));
    return dir.filePath(QStringLiteral("search-index-cache/%1.json").arg(cacheKey));
}

bool PdfTextIndexer::loadFromCache(const QString &pdfPath) {
    const QString key = cacheKeyForPdf(pdfPath);
    const QString cachePath = cachePathForKey(key);
    if (cachePath.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    QFile f(cachePath);
    if (!f.exists() || !f.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly)) {
        return false;
    }
    const QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(f.readAll());
    f.close();
    if (!doc.isObject()) {
        return false;
    }
    const QJsonObject root = doc.object();
    const QJsonArray pages = root.value(QStringLiteral("pages")).toArray();
    if (pages.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    for (const QJsonValue &v : pages) {
        const QJsonObject p = v.toObject();
        const int page = p.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt(-1);
        const QString text = p.value(QStringLiteral("text")).toString();
        if (page < 0 || text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        pageText.insert(page, text);
        pageTextFolded.insert(page, text.toCaseFolded());
        buildPageChunks(page, text);
        const double width = p.value(QStringLiteral("width")).toDouble(0.0);
        const double height = p.value(QStringLiteral("height")).toDouble(0.0);
        bool hasBoxMeta = false;
        if (width > 0.0 && height > 0.0) {
            pageSizes.insert(page, QSizeF(width, height));
            hasBoxMeta = true;
        }
        QVector<IndexedWord> words;
        const QJsonArray wordArr = p.value(QStringLiteral("words")).toArray();
        words.reserve(wordArr.size());
        for (const QJsonValue &wv : wordArr) {
            const QJsonObject w = wv.toObject();
            const QString token = w.value(QStringLiteral("t")).toString();
            if (token.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            IndexedWord iw;
            iw.text = token;
            iw.box = QRectF(
                w.value(QStringLiteral("x")).toDouble(),
                w.value(QStringLiteral("y")).toDouble(),
                w.value(QStringLiteral("w")).toDouble(),
                w.value(QStringLiteral("h")).toDouble()
            );
            if (iw.box.width() <= 0.0 || iw.box.height() <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            words.push_back(iw);
        }
        if (!words.isEmpty()) {
            pageWords.insert(page, words);
            hasBoxMeta = true;
        }
        if (hasBoxMeta) {
            wordBoxReadyPages.insert(page);
        }
    }
    sourcePdfPath = pdfPath;
    wordBoxesComplete = false;
    return !pageText.isEmpty();
}

void PdfTextIndexer::saveToCache(const QString &pdfPath) const {
    if (pageText.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const QString key = cacheKeyForPdf(pdfPath);
    const QString cachePath = cachePathForKey(key);
    if (cachePath.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    QJsonArray pages;
    const QList<int> keys = pageText.keys();
    for (const int page : keys) {
        QJsonObject p;
        p.insert(QStringLiteral("page"), page);
        p.insert(QStringLiteral("text"), pageText.value(page));
        const QSizeF size = pageSizes.value(page);
        p.insert(QStringLiteral("width"), size.width());
        p.insert(QStringLiteral("height"), size.height());
        QJsonArray wordArr;
        const QVector<IndexedWord> words = pageWords.value(page);
        for (const IndexedWord &iw : words) {
            if (iw.text.isEmpty() || iw.box.width() <= 0.0 || iw.box.height() <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            QJsonObject w;
            w.insert(QStringLiteral("t"), iw.text);
            w.insert(QStringLiteral("x"), iw.box.x());
            w.insert(QStringLiteral("y"), iw.box.y());
            w.insert(QStringLiteral("w"), iw.box.width());
            w.insert(QStringLiteral("h"), iw.box.height());
            wordArr.append(w);
        }
        p.insert(QStringLiteral("words"), wordArr);
        pages.append(p);
    }
    QJsonObject root;
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("version"), 1);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("pages"), pages);
    QFile out(cachePath);
    if (!out.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
        return;
    }
    out.write(QJsonDocument(root).toJson(QJsonDocument::Compact));
    out.close();
}

bool PdfTextIndexer::enrichIndexWithOcr(const QString &pdfPath, const int estimatedPageCount, QString &warningMessage) {
    warningMessage.clear();
    const QString pdftoppmProgram = QStandardPaths::findExecutable(QStringLiteral("pdftoppm"));
    const QString tesseractProgram = QStandardPaths::findExecutable(QStringLiteral("tesseract"));
    if (pdftoppmProgram.isEmpty() || tesseractProgram.isEmpty()) {
        warningMessage = QStringLiteral("文档文本层为空，且未检测到 OCR 依赖（pdftoppm/tesseract）");
        return false;
    }

    QTemporaryDir tempDir;
    if (!tempDir.isValid()) {
        warningMessage = QStringLiteral("文档文本层为空，OCR 临时目录创建失败");
        return false;
    }

    const int upperPage = qMax(1, qMin(kOcrMaxPages, estimatedPageCount > 0 ? estimatedPageCount : kOcrMaxPages));
    int recognizedPages = 0;
    for (int oneBasedPage = 1; oneBasedPage <= upperPage; ++oneBasedPage) {
        const QString base = tempDir.filePath(QStringLiteral("page_%1").arg(oneBasedPage));
        const QString imagePath = base + QStringLiteral(".png");
        QProcess rasterProc;
        rasterProc.setProgram(pdftoppmProgram);
        rasterProc.setArguments({
            QStringLiteral("-r"), QString::number(kOcrDpi),
            QStringLiteral("-f"), QString::number(oneBasedPage),
            QStringLiteral("-l"), QString::number(oneBasedPage),
            QStringLiteral("-singlefile"),
            QStringLiteral("-png"),
            pdfPath,
            base
        });
        rasterProc.start();
        if (!rasterProc.waitForStarted(3000)) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!rasterProc.waitForFinished(10000)) {
            rasterProc.kill();
            rasterProc.waitForFinished(1000);
            continue;
        }
        if (rasterProc.exitCode() != 0 || !QFileInfo::exists(imagePath)) {
            continue;
        }

        QProcess ocrProc;
        ocrProc.setProgram(tesseractProgram);
        ocrProc.setArguments({
            imagePath,
            QStringLiteral("stdout"),
            QStringLiteral("--psm"),
            QStringLiteral("6")
        });
        ocrProc.start();
        if (!ocrProc.waitForStarted(3000)) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!ocrProc.waitForFinished(kOcrPerPageTimeoutMs)) {
            ocrProc.kill();
            ocrProc.waitForFinished(1000);
            continue;
        }
        if (ocrProc.exitCode() != 0) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString text = QString::fromUtf8(ocrProc.readAllStandardOutput()).trimmed();
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int pageIndex = oneBasedPage - 1;
        pageText.insert(pageIndex, text);
        pageTextFolded.insert(pageIndex, text.toCaseFolded());
        buildPageChunks(pageIndex, text);
        recognizedPages += 1;
        QFile::remove(imagePath);
        if (recognizedPages >= 12) {
            break;
        }
    }

    if (recognizedPages <= 0) {
        warningMessage = QStringLiteral("文档文本层为空，OCR 未识别到可用文本");
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

bool PdfTextIndexer::hasIndex() const {
    return !pageText.isEmpty();
}

QString PdfTextIndexer::pageTextAt(const int pageIndex) const {
    return pageText.value(pageIndex);
}

QString PdfTextIndexer::extractTextInRect(const int pageIndex, const QRectF &rect) const {
    ensureWordBoxesForPage(pageIndex);
    const QVector<IndexedWord> words = pageWords.value(pageIndex);
    const QRectF normalizedRect = rect.normalized();
    if (normalizedRect.isNull() || normalizedRect.width() <= 0.0 || normalizedRect.height() <= 0.0 || words.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    const QRectF expandedRect = normalizedRect.adjusted(-1.2, -1.2, 1.2, 1.2);
    struct PickedWord {
        QRectF box;
        QString text;
        QPointF center;
    };
    QVector<PickedWord> picked;
    for (const IndexedWord &word : words) {
        if (word.text.trimmed().isEmpty() || word.box.width() <= 0.0 || word.box.height() <= 0.0) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRectF inter = expandedRect.intersected(word.box);
        const double area = word.box.width() * word.box.height();
        const double overlap = inter.width() * inter.height();
        const bool centerInside = expandedRect.contains(word.box.center());
        if (!centerInside && (area <= 0.0 || overlap / area < 0.45)) {
            continue;
        }
        picked.push_back({word.box, word.text, word.box.center()});
    }
    if (picked.isEmpty()) {
        const QRectF looseRect = normalizedRect.adjusted(-6.0, -6.0, 6.0, 6.0);
        for (const IndexedWord &word : words) {
            if (word.text.trimmed().isEmpty() || word.box.width() <= 0.0 || word.box.height() <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF inter = looseRect.intersected(word.box);
            const double area = word.box.width() * word.box.height();
            const double overlap = inter.width() * inter.height();
            if (!looseRect.contains(word.box.center()) && (area <= 0.0 || overlap / area < 0.18)) {
                continue;
            }
            picked.push_back({word.box, word.text, word.box.center()});
        }
    }
    if (picked.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    std::sort(picked.begin(), picked.end(), [](const PickedWord &a, const PickedWord &b) {
        if (!qFuzzyCompare(a.center.y() + 1.0, b.center.y() + 1.0)) {
            return a.center.y() < b.center.y();
        }
        return a.box.x() < b.box.x();
    });

    struct TextLine {
        QVector<PickedWord> words;
        QRectF bounds;
        double baselineY = 0.0;
        double avgHeight = 0.0;
    };
    QVector<TextLine> lines;

    auto appendWordToLine = [](TextLine &line, const PickedWord &word) {
        line.words.push_back(word);
        if (line.words.size() == 1) {
            line.bounds = word.box;
            line.baselineY = word.center.y();
            line.avgHeight = qMax(1.0, word.box.height());
            return;
        }
        line.bounds = line.bounds.united(word.box);
        line.baselineY = (line.baselineY * 0.72) + (word.center.y() * 0.28);
        line.avgHeight = qMax(1.0, (line.avgHeight * 0.78) + (word.box.height() * 0.22));
    };

    for (const PickedWord &word : picked) {
        int bestLine = -1;
        double bestDelta = 1e9;
        for (int i = 0; i < lines.size(); ++i) {
            const double tolerance = qMax(1.6, lines[i].avgHeight * selectionConfig.lineAssignToleranceScale);
            const double delta = qAbs(word.center.y() - lines[i].baselineY);
            if (delta <= tolerance && delta < bestDelta) {
                bestDelta = delta;
                bestLine = i;
            }
        }
        if (bestLine >= 0) {
            appendWordToLine(lines[bestLine], word);
        } else {
            TextLine line;
            appendWordToLine(line, word);
            lines.push_back(line);
        }
    }

    if (lines.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }

    for (TextLine &line : lines) {
        std::sort(line.words.begin(), line.words.end(), [](const PickedWord &a, const PickedWord &b) {
            return a.box.x() < b.box.x();
        });
    }

    std::sort(lines.begin(), lines.end(), [](const TextLine &a, const TextLine &b) {
        if (!qFuzzyCompare(a.baselineY + 1.0, b.baselineY + 1.0)) {
            return a.baselineY < b.baselineY;
        }
        return a.bounds.x() < b.bounds.x();
    });

    QVector<int> renderOrder;
    renderOrder.reserve(lines.size());
    for (int i = 0; i < lines.size(); ++i) {
        renderOrder.push_back(i);
    }

    if (lines.size() >= selectionConfig.twoColumnMinLineCount && normalizedRect.width() > 80.0) {
        QVector<double> centers;
        centers.reserve(lines.size());
        for (const TextLine &line : lines) {
            centers.push_back(line.bounds.center().x());
        }
        std::sort(centers.begin(), centers.end());

        double maxGap = 0.0;
        int gapIndex = -1;
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < centers.size(); ++i) {
            const double gap = centers[i + 1] - centers[i];
            if (gap > maxGap) {
                maxGap = gap;
                gapIndex = i;
            }
        }

        if (gapIndex >= 1
            && gapIndex + 1 < centers.size() - 1
            && maxGap >= normalizedRect.width() * selectionConfig.twoColumnGapRatio) {
            const double splitX = (centers[gapIndex] + centers[gapIndex + 1]) * 0.5;
            QVector<int> leftLines;
            QVector<int> rightLines;
            double leftMaxX = -1e9;
            double rightMinX = 1e9;
            for (int i = 0; i < lines.size(); ++i) {
                if (lines[i].bounds.center().x() <= splitX) {
                    leftLines.push_back(i);
                    leftMaxX = qMax(leftMaxX, lines[i].bounds.right());
                } else {
                    rightLines.push_back(i);
                    rightMinX = qMin(rightMinX, lines[i].bounds.left());
                }
            }
            const bool hasTwoSides = leftLines.size() >= 2 && rightLines.size() >= 2;
            const bool hasClearGutter = hasTwoSides && (rightMinX - leftMaxX) >= qMax(6.0, normalizedRect.width() * selectionConfig.twoColumnGutterRatio);
            if (hasTwoSides && hasClearGutter) {
                std::sort(leftLines.begin(), leftLines.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
                    return lines[a].baselineY < lines[b].baselineY;
                });
                std::sort(rightLines.begin(), rightLines.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
                    return lines[a].baselineY < lines[b].baselineY;
                });
                renderOrder.clear();
                renderOrder += leftLines;
                renderOrder += rightLines;
            }
        }
    }

    struct RenderedLine {
        QString text;
        QRectF bounds;
        double baselineY = 0.0;
        double avgHeight = 0.0;
        int columnId = 0;
    };
    QVector<RenderedLine> renderedLines;
    renderedLines.reserve(renderOrder.size());
    for (const int lineIdx : renderOrder) {
        const TextLine &line = lines[lineIdx];
        QString joined;
        QString prevToken;
        for (const PickedWord &word : line.words) {
            const QString token = word.text.trimmed();
            if (token.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            if (!joined.isEmpty() && shouldInsertSpaceBetween(prevToken, token)) {
                joined += QChar(' ');
            }
            joined += token;
            prevToken = token;
        }
        joined = joined.trimmed();
        if (!joined.isEmpty()) {
            RenderedLine rendered;
            rendered.text = joined;
            rendered.bounds = line.bounds;
            rendered.baselineY = line.baselineY;
            rendered.avgHeight = line.avgHeight;
            rendered.columnId = 0;
            renderedLines.push_back(rendered);
        }
    }
    if (renderedLines.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }

    QVector<double> baselineGaps;
    baselineGaps.reserve(qMax(0, renderedLines.size() - 1));
    double totalLineHeight = 0.0;
    for (const RenderedLine &line : renderedLines) {
        totalLineHeight += qMax(1.0, line.avgHeight);
    }
    for (int i = 1; i < renderedLines.size(); ++i) {
        const double gap = renderedLines[i].baselineY - renderedLines[i - 1].baselineY;
        if (gap > 0.2) {
            baselineGaps.push_back(gap);
        }
    }
    double medianGap = 0.0;
    if (!baselineGaps.isEmpty()) {
        std::sort(baselineGaps.begin(), baselineGaps.end());
        medianGap = baselineGaps[baselineGaps.size() / 2];
    }
    const double avgLineHeight = totalLineHeight / static_cast<double>(qMax(1, renderedLines.size()));
    const double paragraphGapThreshold = qMax(
        avgLineHeight * selectionConfig.paragraphGapLineHeightScale,
        medianGap > 0.0
            ? medianGap * selectionConfig.paragraphGapMedianScale
            : avgLineHeight * selectionConfig.paragraphGapFallbackScale
    );

    if (renderedLines.size() >= selectionConfig.twoColumnMinLineCount && normalizedRect.width() > 80.0) {
        QVector<double> centers;
        centers.reserve(renderedLines.size());
        for (const RenderedLine &line : renderedLines) {
            centers.push_back(line.bounds.center().x());
        }
        std::sort(centers.begin(), centers.end());
        double maxGap = 0.0;
        int gapIndex = -1;
        for (int i = 0; i + 1 < centers.size(); ++i) {
            const double gap = centers[i + 1] - centers[i];
            if (gap > maxGap) {
                maxGap = gap;
                gapIndex = i;
            }
        }
        if (gapIndex >= 1
            && gapIndex + 1 < centers.size() - 1
            && maxGap >= normalizedRect.width() * selectionConfig.twoColumnGapRatio) {
            const double splitX = (centers[gapIndex] + centers[gapIndex + 1]) * 0.5;
            double leftMaxX = -1e9;
            double rightMinX = 1e9;
            int leftCount = 0;
            int rightCount = 0;
            for (const RenderedLine &line : renderedLines) {
                if (line.bounds.center().x() <= splitX) {
                    leftCount += 1;
                    leftMaxX = qMax(leftMaxX, line.bounds.right());
                } else {
                    rightCount += 1;
                    rightMinX = qMin(rightMinX, line.bounds.left());
                }
            }
            const bool hasTwoSides = leftCount >= 2 && rightCount >= 2;
            const bool hasClearGutter = hasTwoSides
                && (rightMinX - leftMaxX) >= qMax(6.0, normalizedRect.width() * selectionConfig.twoColumnGutterRatio);
            if (hasClearGutter) {
                for (RenderedLine &line : renderedLines) {
                    line.columnId = line.bounds.center().x() <= splitX ? -1 : 1;
                }
            }
        }
    }

    QStringList paragraphs;
    paragraphs.reserve(renderedLines.size());
    QString currentParagraph = renderedLines.first().text;
    for (int i = 1; i < renderedLines.size(); ++i) {
        const RenderedLine &prev = renderedLines[i - 1];
        const RenderedLine &cur = renderedLines[i];
        const double baselineGap = cur.baselineY - prev.baselineY;
        const double leftShift = cur.bounds.x() - prev.bounds.x();
        const bool largeGapBreak = baselineGap > paragraphGapThreshold;
        const bool indentBreak = leftShift > qMax(selectionConfig.indentBreakMinPx, avgLineHeight * selectionConfig.indentBreakLineHeightScale);
        const bool listBreak = startsWithListMarker(cur.text);
        const bool sentenceBreak = selectionConfig.semanticSentenceBreakEnabled
            && endsWithSentenceTerminator(prev.text)
            && (startsWithSemanticParagraphStarter(cur.text) || indentBreak || largeGapBreak);
        const bool columnJump = qAbs(leftShift) > qMax(selectionConfig.columnJumpMinPx, normalizedRect.width() * selectionConfig.columnJumpWidthRatio)
            && baselineGap <= qMax(avgLineHeight * selectionConfig.columnJumpMaxGapLineHeightScale, selectionConfig.columnJumpMaxGapAbs);
        const bool columnSwitchBreak = selectionConfig.forceBreakOnColumnSwitch
            && prev.columnId != 0
            && cur.columnId != 0
            && prev.columnId != cur.columnId;
        const bool paragraphBreak = largeGapBreak || indentBreak || listBreak || sentenceBreak || columnJump || columnSwitchBreak;
        if (paragraphBreak) {
            paragraphs.push_back(currentParagraph.trimmed());
            currentParagraph = cur.text;
            continue;
        }
        if (!currentParagraph.isEmpty() && shouldInsertSpaceBetween(currentParagraph.right(16), cur.text.left(16))) {
            currentParagraph += QChar(' ');
        }
        currentParagraph += cur.text;
    }
    if (!currentParagraph.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        paragraphs.push_back(currentParagraph.trimmed());
    }
    return paragraphs.join(QChar('\n')).trimmed();
}

void PdfTextIndexer::injectOcrWords(
    const int pageIndex,
    const QVector<IndexedWord> &words,
    const QSizeF &pageSize,
    const QString &recognizedText
) {
    if (pageIndex < 0) {
        return;
    }
    if (pageSize.width() > 1.0 && pageSize.height() > 1.0) {
        pageSizes.insert(pageIndex, pageSize);
    }
    QVector<IndexedWord> merged = pageWords.value(pageIndex);
    auto isDuplicate = [&](const IndexedWord &candidate) {
        for (const IndexedWord &existing : merged) {
            if (existing.text.compare(candidate.text, Qt::CaseInsensitive) != 0) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF inter = existing.box.intersected(candidate.box);
            const double minArea = qMin(
                existing.box.width() * existing.box.height(),
                candidate.box.width() * candidate.box.height()
            );
            if (minArea <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const double overlap = inter.width() * inter.height();
            if (overlap / minArea >= 0.72) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    };
    for (const IndexedWord &raw : words) {
        IndexedWord word = raw;
        word.text = word.text.trimmed();
        if (word.text.isEmpty() || word.box.width() <= 0.0 || word.box.height() <= 0.0) {
            continue;
        }
        if (pageSize.width() > 1.0 && pageSize.height() > 1.0) {
            word.box = word.box.intersected(QRectF(0.0, 0.0, pageSize.width(), pageSize.height()));
            if (word.box.width() <= 0.0 || word.box.height() <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
        }
        if (!isDuplicate(word)) {
            merged.push_back(word);
        }
    }
    if (!merged.isEmpty()) {
        std::sort(merged.begin(), merged.end(), [](const IndexedWord &a, const IndexedWord &b) {
            if (!qFuzzyCompare(a.box.y() + 1.0, b.box.y() + 1.0)) {
                return a.box.y() < b.box.y();
            }
            return a.box.x() < b.box.x();
        });
        pageWords.insert(pageIndex, merged);
        wordBoxReadyPages.insert(pageIndex);
    }

    const QString ocrText = recognizedText.trimmed();
    if (!ocrText.isEmpty()) {
        QString mergedText = pageText.value(pageIndex).trimmed();
        if (mergedText.isEmpty()) {
            mergedText = ocrText;
        } else if (!mergedText.contains(ocrText)) {
            mergedText += QStringLiteral("\n");
            mergedText += ocrText;
        }
        pageText.insert(pageIndex, mergedText);
        pageTextFolded.insert(pageIndex, mergedText.toCaseFolded());
        buildPageChunks(pageIndex, mergedText);
    }
}

void PdfTextIndexer::setSelectionRebuildConfig(const SelectionRebuildConfig &config) {
    selectionConfig = config;
}

SelectionRebuildConfig PdfTextIndexer::selectionRebuildConfig() const {
    return selectionConfig;
}

QSizeF PdfTextIndexer::pageSizeAt(const int pageIndex) const {
    if (!pageSizes.contains(pageIndex)) {
        ensureWordBoxesForPage(pageIndex);
    }
    return pageSizes.value(pageIndex);
}

QList<int> PdfTextIndexer::pageIndexes() const {
    return pageText.keys();
}

void PdfTextIndexer::buildPageChunks(const int page, const QString &text) {
    QStringList chunks;
    QStringList foldedChunks;
    QVector<int> offsets;
    if (!text.isEmpty()) {
        const int stride = qMax(256, kTextChunkSize - kTextChunkOverlap);
        int start = 0;
        while (start < text.size()) {
            const int length = qMin(kTextChunkSize, text.size() - start);
            const QString chunk = text.mid(start, length);
            chunks.push_back(chunk);
            foldedChunks.push_back(chunk.toCaseFolded());
            offsets.push_back(start);
            if (start + length >= text.size()) {
                break;
            }
            start += stride;
        }
    }
    pageTextChunks.insert(page, chunks);
    pageTextChunksFolded.insert(page, foldedChunks);
    pageChunkOffsets.insert(page, offsets);
}

QString PdfTextIndexer::decodeBasicHtmlEntities(const QString &text) const {
    QString out = text;
    out.replace(QStringLiteral("&amp;"), QStringLiteral("&"));
    out.replace(QStringLiteral("&lt;"), QStringLiteral("<"));
    out.replace(QStringLiteral("&gt;"), QStringLiteral(">"));
    out.replace(QStringLiteral("&quot;"), QStringLiteral("\""));
    out.replace(QStringLiteral("&apos;"), QStringLiteral("'"));
    out.replace(QStringLiteral("&#39;"), QStringLiteral("'"));
    out.replace(QStringLiteral("&nbsp;"), QStringLiteral(" "));
    return out;
}

bool PdfTextIndexer::buildWordBoxes(const QString &pdfPath, const int firstPage, const int lastPage) {
    if (pdfPath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    if (firstPage >= 0 && lastPage >= 0 && lastPage < firstPage) {
        return false;
    }
    QProcess process;
    process.setProgram(QStringLiteral("pdftotext"));
    QStringList args = {
        QStringLiteral("-bbox-layout"),
        QStringLiteral("-enc"),
        QStringLiteral("UTF-8"),
    };
    if (firstPage >= 0) {
        args << QStringLiteral("-f") << QString::number(firstPage + 1);
    }
    if (lastPage >= 0) {
        args << QStringLiteral("-l") << QString::number(lastPage + 1);
    }
    args << pdfPath << QStringLiteral("-");
    process.setArguments(args);
    process.start();
    if (!process.waitForStarted(3000)) {
        return false;
    }
    if (!process.waitForFinished(-1)) {
        process.kill();
        process.waitForFinished(1000);
        return false;
    }
    if (process.exitCode() != 0) {
        return false;
    }

    const QString html = QString::fromUtf8(process.readAllStandardOutput());
    static const QRegularExpression pageStartRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"re(<page[^>]*number="(\d+)"[^>]*width="([0-9.]+)"[^>]*height="([0-9.]+)")re"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression wordRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"re(<word[^>]*xMin="([0-9.]+)"[^>]*yMin="([0-9.]+)"[^>]*xMax="([0-9.]+)"[^>]*yMax="([0-9.]+)"[^>]*>([^<]*)</word>)re"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );

    int currentPage = -1;
    QSet<int> seenPages;
    QSet<int> initializedPages;
    const QStringList lines = html.split(QChar('\n'));
    for (const QString &raw : lines) {
        const QString line = raw.trimmed();
        if (line.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRegularExpressionMatch pageMatch = pageStartRe.match(line);
        if (pageMatch.hasMatch()) {
            bool okNum = false;
            const int oneBased = pageMatch.captured(1).toInt(&okNum);
            currentPage = okNum ? qMax(0, oneBased - 1) : -1;
            if (currentPage >= 0) {
                if (!initializedPages.contains(currentPage)) {
                    pageWords.remove(currentPage);
                    initializedPages.insert(currentPage);
                }
                pageSizes.insert(currentPage, QSizeF(pageMatch.captured(2).toDouble(), pageMatch.captured(3).toDouble()));
                seenPages.insert(currentPage);
            }
            continue;
        }
        if (currentPage < 0) {
            continue;
        }
        QRegularExpressionMatchIterator iter = wordRe.globalMatch(line);
        while (iter.hasNext()) {
            const QRegularExpressionMatch m = iter.next();
            if (!m.hasMatch()) {
                continue;
            }
            const double xMin = m.captured(1).toDouble();
            const double yMin = m.captured(2).toDouble();
            const double xMax = m.captured(3).toDouble();
            const double yMax = m.captured(4).toDouble();
            const QString text = decodeBasicHtmlEntities(m.captured(5)).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            IndexedWord word;
            word.box = QRectF(xMin, yMin, qMax(0.0, xMax - xMin), qMax(0.0, yMax - yMin));
            word.text = text;
            pageWords[currentPage].push_back(word);
        }
    }
    for (int page : seenPages) {
        wordBoxReadyPages.insert(page);
    }
    if (firstPage < 0 && lastPage < 0) {
        wordBoxesComplete = true;
    }
    return !pageWords.isEmpty();
}

void PdfTextIndexer::ensureWordBoxesForPage(const int pageIndex) const {
    if (pageIndex < 0 || sourcePdfPath.isEmpty() || wordBoxesComplete || wordBoxReadyPages.contains(pageIndex)) {
        return;
    }
    if (pageText.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    const int minPage = pageText.firstKey();
    const int maxPage = pageText.lastKey();
    const int startPage = qMax(minPage, pageIndex - kWordBoxLazyWindow);
    const int endPage = qMin(maxPage, pageIndex + kWordBoxLazyWindow);
    auto *self = const_cast<PdfTextIndexer *>(this);
    self->buildWordBoxes(sourcePdfPath, startPage, endPage);
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfTextIndexer.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QMap>
#include <QList>
#include <QRectF>
#include <QSet>
#include <QSizeF>
#include <QString>
#include <QVector>
#include <atomic>

namespace converter {

struct SearchOptions {
    bool caseSensitive = false;
    bool wholeWord = false;
    bool useRegex = false;
    int preferredPage = -1; // 搜索结果排序时优先当前页邻近命中
};

struct SearchHit {
    int page = -1;
    int start = -1;
    int length = 0;
    QString matchedText;
    QString preview;
};

struct IndexedWord {
    QRectF box;
    QString text;
};

struct SelectionRebuildConfig {
    double lineAssignToleranceScale = 0.62;
    int twoColumnMinLineCount = 6;
    double twoColumnGapRatio = 0.16;
    double twoColumnGutterRatio = 0.04;
    double paragraphGapLineHeightScale = 1.08;
    double paragraphGapMedianScale = 1.55;
    double paragraphGapFallbackScale = 1.25;
    double indentBreakMinPx = 8.0;
    double indentBreakLineHeightScale = 0.75;
    double columnJumpMinPx = 46.0;
    double columnJumpWidthRatio = 0.42;
    double columnJumpMaxGapLineHeightScale = 1.2;
    double columnJumpMaxGapAbs = 18.0;
    bool forceBreakOnColumnSwitch = true;
    bool semanticSentenceBreakEnabled = true;
};

// 轻量全文索引：
// - 通过 pdftotext 获取逐页文本（以 \f 分页）
// - 提供关键字匹配页集合，驱动阅读器“搜索高亮”
class PdfTextIndexer final {
public:
    bool buildIndex(const QString &pdfPath, QString &errorMessage);
    QSet<int> findPages(const QString &keyword) const;
    QVector<SearchHit> findHits(
        const QString &keyword,
        const SearchOptions &options,
        int maxHits = 2000,
        const std::atomic_bool *cancelFlag = nullptr
    ) const;
    bool hasIndex() const;
    QString pageTextAt(int pageIndex) const;
    QString extractTextInRect(int pageIndex, const QRectF &rect) const;
    void injectOcrWords(
        int pageIndex,
        const QVector<IndexedWord> &words,
        const QSizeF &pageSize,
        const QString &recognizedText
    );
    void setSelectionRebuildConfig(const SelectionRebuildConfig &config);
    SelectionRebuildConfig selectionRebuildConfig() const;
    QSizeF pageSizeAt(int pageIndex) const;
    QList<int> pageIndexes() const;

private:
    QString cacheKeyForPdf(const QString &pdfPath) const;
    QString cachePathForKey(const QString &cacheKey) const;
    bool loadFromCache(const QString &pdfPath);
    void saveToCache(const QString &pdfPath) const;
    bool enrichIndexWithOcr(const QString &pdfPath, int estimatedPageCount, QString &warningMessage);
    QString decodeBasicHtmlEntities(const QString &text) const;
    bool buildWordBoxes(const QString &pdfPath, int firstPage = -1, int lastPage = -1);
    void ensureWordBoxesForPage(int pageIndex) const;
    void buildPageChunks(int page, const QString &text);
    QMap<int, QString> pageText;
    QMap<int, QString> pageTextFolded;
    QMap<int, QStringList> pageTextChunks;
    QMap<int, QStringList> pageTextChunksFolded;
    QMap<int, QVector<int>> pageChunkOffsets;
    mutable QMap<int, QVector<IndexedWord>> pageWords;
    mutable QMap<int, QSizeF> pageSizes;
    mutable QString sourcePdfPath;
    mutable QSet<int> wordBoxReadyPages;
    mutable bool wordBoxesComplete = false;
    SelectionRebuildConfig selectionConfig;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/ReaderStateStore.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/ReaderStateStore.h"

#include <QDateTime>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QJsonArray>
#include <QJsonDocument>
#include <QJsonObject>
#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QSaveFile>
#include <QStandardPaths>
#include <QStringConverter>
#include <QTextStream>
#include <QUrl>
#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

namespace {

constexpr qint64 kMaxStateFileBytes = 8 * 1024 * 1024;

QString backupPathFor(const QString &path) {
    return path + QStringLiteral(".bak");
}

QJsonObject parseRootPayload(const QByteArray &payload) {
    const QJsonDocument doc = QJsonDocument::fromJson(payload);
    return doc.isObject() ? doc.object() : QJsonObject();
}

QJsonObject loadRoot(const QString &path) {
    QFile file(path);
    if (!file.exists()) {
        return QJsonObject();
    }
    if (!file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly)) {
        return QJsonObject();
    }
    if (file.size() > kMaxStateFileBytes) {
        return QJsonObject();
    }
    return parseRootPayload(file.readAll());
}

QJsonObject loadRootWithBackup(const QString &path) {
    const QJsonObject primary = loadRoot(path);
    if (!primary.isEmpty()) {
        return primary;
    }
    const QString backupPath = backupPathFor(path);
    const QJsonObject backup = loadRoot(backupPath);
    if (backup.isEmpty()) {
        return QJsonObject();
    }
    QSaveFile restore(path);
    if (restore.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
        restore.write(QJsonDocument(backup).toJson(QJsonDocument::Indented));
        restore.commit();
    }
    return backup;
}

bool saveRoot(const QString &path, const QJsonObject &root) {
    const QFileInfo info(path);
    QDir dir = info.dir();
    if (!dir.exists() && !dir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."))) {
        return false;
    }
    const QString backupPath = backupPathFor(path);
    if (QFile::exists(path)) {
        QFile::remove(backupPath);
        QFile::copy(path, backupPath);
    }
    QSaveFile file(path);
    if (!file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
        return false;
    }
    file.write(QJsonDocument(root).toJson(QJsonDocument::Indented));
    return file.commit();
}

QString nowIso() {
    return QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString(Qt::ISODateWithMs);
}

QString escapeXml(QString text) {
    text.replace('&', QStringLiteral("&amp;"));
    text.replace('<', QStringLiteral("&lt;"));
    text.replace('>', QStringLiteral("&gt;"));
    text.replace('"', QStringLiteral("&quot;"));
    text.replace('\'', QStringLiteral("&apos;"));
    return text;
}

QString unescapeXml(QString text) {
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&lt;"), QStringLiteral("<"));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&gt;"), QStringLiteral(">"));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&quot;"), QStringLiteral("\""));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&apos;"), QStringLiteral("'"));
    text.replace(QStringLiteral("&amp;"), QStringLiteral("&"));
    return text;
}

QString readAttr(const QString &attrs, const QString &name) {
    const QRegularExpression re(
        QStringLiteral("\\b%1\\s*=\\s*\"([^\"]*)\"").arg(QRegularExpression::escape(name)),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = re.match(attrs);
    return m.hasMatch() ? unescapeXml(m.captured(1)).trimmed() : QString();
}

} // namespace

ReaderStateStore::ReaderStateStore() {
    ensureParentDir();
}

QVector<RecentItem> ReaderStateStore::loadRecentFiles() const {
    const QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QVector<RecentItem> out;
    const QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("recent_files")).toArray();
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        RecentItem item;
        item.filePath = obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString();
        item.openedAt = obj.value(QStringLiteral("opened_at")).toString();
        if (!item.filePath.isEmpty()) {
            out.push_back(item);
        }
    }
    return out;
}

QVector<ReadingHistoryItem> ReaderStateStore::loadReadingHistory() const {
    const QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QVector<ReadingHistoryItem> out;
    const QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("reading_history")).toArray();
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        ReadingHistoryItem item;
        item.filePath = obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString();
        item.lastPage = obj.value(QStringLiteral("last_page")).toInt();
        item.zoomFactor = obj.value(QStringLiteral("zoom_factor")).toDouble(1.0);
        item.rotation = obj.value(QStringLiteral("rotation")).toInt();
        item.updatedAt = obj.value(QStringLiteral("updated_at")).toString();
        if (!item.filePath.isEmpty()) {
            out.push_back(item);
        }
    }
    return out;
}

QVector<ReaderAnnotationItem> ReaderStateStore::loadAnnotations(const QString &filePath) const {
    const QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QVector<ReaderAnnotationItem> out;
    const QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("annotations")).toArray();
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        ReaderAnnotationItem item;
        item.filePath = obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString();
        item.page = obj.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt();
        item.yRatio = obj.value(QStringLiteral("y_ratio")).toDouble(-1.0);
        item.note = obj.value(QStringLiteral("note")).toString();
        item.createdAt = obj.value(QStringLiteral("created_at")).toString();
        if (item.filePath == filePath && !item.note.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            out.push_back(item);
        }
    }
    return out;
}

QVector<ReaderBookmarkItem> ReaderStateStore::loadBookmarks(const QString &filePath) const {
    const QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QVector<ReaderBookmarkItem> out;
    const QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("bookmarks")).toArray();
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        ReaderBookmarkItem item;
        item.filePath = obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString();
        item.page = obj.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt();
        item.title = obj.value(QStringLiteral("title")).toString();
        item.createdAt = obj.value(QStringLiteral("created_at")).toString();
        if (item.filePath == filePath && !item.title.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            out.push_back(item);
        }
    }
    return out;
}

void ReaderStateStore::pushRecentFile(const QString &filePath) {
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("recent_files")).toArray();

    QJsonArray filtered;
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() == filePath) {
            continue;
        }
        filtered.append(obj);
    }

    QJsonObject newItem;
    newItem.insert(QStringLiteral("file_path"), filePath);
    newItem.insert(QStringLiteral("opened_at"), nowIso());
    filtered.prepend(newItem);

    // 限制最近文件数量，避免状态文件无限增长。
    while (filtered.size() > 50) {
        filtered.removeLast();
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("recent_files"), filtered);
    saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

void ReaderStateStore::updateReadingHistory(
    const QString &filePath,
    const int lastPage,
    const double zoomFactor,
    const int rotation
) {
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("reading_history")).toArray();

    QJsonArray filtered;
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() == filePath) {
            continue;
        }
        filtered.append(obj);
    }

    QJsonObject item;
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("file_path"), filePath);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("last_page"), lastPage);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("zoom_factor"), zoomFactor);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("rotation"), rotation);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("updated_at"), nowIso());
    filtered.prepend(item);
    while (filtered.size() > 200) {
        filtered.removeLast();
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("reading_history"), filtered);
    saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

void ReaderStateStore::addAnnotation(const QString &filePath, const int page, const QString &note, const double yRatio) {
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || note.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }

    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("annotations")).toArray();

    const QString normalizedNote = note.trimmed();
    const int normalizedPage = qMax(0, page);
    const double normalizedY = yRatio >= 0.0 ? yRatio : -1.0;
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() != filePath) {
            continue;
        }
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt() != normalizedPage) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString existingNote = obj.value(QStringLiteral("note")).toString().trimmed();
        if (existingNote != normalizedNote) {
            continue;
        }
        const double existingY = obj.value(QStringLiteral("y_ratio")).toDouble(-1.0);
        if ((existingY < 0.0 && normalizedY < 0.0) || qAbs(existingY - normalizedY) <= 0.015) {
            return;
        }
    }

    QJsonObject item;
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("file_path"), filePath);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("page"), normalizedPage);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("y_ratio"), normalizedY);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("note"), normalizedNote);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("created_at"), nowIso());
    arr.prepend(item);

    while (arr.size() > 500) {
        arr.removeLast();
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("annotations"), arr);
    saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

bool ReaderStateStore::updateAnnotation(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt, const QString &newNote) {
    const QString normalizedNote = newNote.trimmed();
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || createdAt.trimmed().isEmpty() || normalizedNote.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("annotations")).toArray();
    bool updated = false;
    for (int i = 0; i < arr.size(); ++i) {
        QJsonObject obj = arr[i].toObject();
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() != filePath) {
            continue;
        }
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("created_at")).toString() != createdAt) {
            continue;
        }
        obj.insert(QStringLiteral("note"), normalizedNote);
        arr[i] = obj;
        updated = true;
        break;
    }
    if (!updated) {
        return false;
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("annotations"), arr);
    return saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

bool ReaderStateStore::removeAnnotation(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt) {
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || createdAt.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    const QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("annotations")).toArray();
    QJsonArray filtered;
    bool removed = false;
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        if (!removed
            && obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() == filePath
            && obj.value(QStringLiteral("created_at")).toString() == createdAt) {
            removed = true;
            continue;
        }
        filtered.append(obj);
    }
    if (!removed) {
        return false;
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("annotations"), filtered);
    return saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

void ReaderStateStore::addBookmark(const QString &filePath, const int page, const QString &title) {
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || title.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }

    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("bookmarks")).toArray();

    QJsonArray filtered;
    const QString normalizedTitle = title.trimmed();
    const int normalizedPage = qMax(0, page);
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() == filePath
            && obj.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt() == normalizedPage
            && obj.value(QStringLiteral("title")).toString().trimmed() == normalizedTitle) {
            continue;
        }
        filtered.append(obj);
    }

    QJsonObject item;
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("file_path"), filePath);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("page"), normalizedPage);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("title"), normalizedTitle);
    item.insert(QStringLiteral("created_at"), nowIso());
    filtered.prepend(item);
    while (filtered.size() > 500) {
        filtered.removeLast();
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("bookmarks"), filtered);
    saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

bool ReaderStateStore::updateBookmarkTitle(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt, const QString &newTitle) {
    const QString normalizedTitle = newTitle.trimmed();
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || createdAt.trimmed().isEmpty() || normalizedTitle.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("bookmarks")).toArray();
    bool updated = false;
    for (int i = 0; i < arr.size(); ++i) {
        QJsonObject obj = arr[i].toObject();
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() != filePath) {
            continue;
        }
        if (obj.value(QStringLiteral("created_at")).toString() != createdAt) {
            continue;
        }
        obj.insert(QStringLiteral("title"), normalizedTitle);
        arr[i] = obj;
        updated = true;
        break;
    }
    if (!updated) {
        return false;
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("bookmarks"), arr);
    return saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

bool ReaderStateStore::removeBookmark(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt) {
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || createdAt.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    const QJsonArray arr = root.value(QStringLiteral("bookmarks")).toArray();
    QJsonArray filtered;
    bool removed = false;
    for (const QJsonValue &v : arr) {
        const QJsonObject obj = v.toObject();
        if (!removed
            && obj.value(QStringLiteral("file_path")).toString() == filePath
            && obj.value(QStringLiteral("created_at")).toString() == createdAt) {
            removed = true;
            continue;
        }
        filtered.append(obj);
    }
    if (!removed) {
        return false;
    }
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("bookmarks"), filtered);
    return saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

bool ReaderStateStore::findHistoryFor(const QString &filePath, ReadingHistoryItem &out) const {
    const QVector<ReadingHistoryItem> items = loadReadingHistory();
    for (const ReadingHistoryItem &item : items) {
        if (item.filePath == filePath) {
            out = item;
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

bool ReaderStateStore::exportAnnotationsToXfdf(
    const QString &filePath,
    const QString &xfdfPath,
    QString &errorMessage
) const {
    errorMessage.clear();
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || xfdfPath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("参数为空，无法导出 XFDF");
        return false;
    }
    const QVector<ReaderAnnotationItem> annotations = loadAnnotations(filePath);
    QSaveFile file(xfdfPath);
    if (!file.open(QIODevice::WriteOnly | QIODevice::Text | QIODevice::Truncate)) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("无法写入 XFDF 文件");
        return false;
    }
    QTextStream stream(&file);
    stream.setEncoding(QStringConverter::Utf8);
    stream << "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n";
    stream << "<xfdf xmlns=\"http://ns.adobe.com/xfdf/\" xml:space=\"preserve\">\n";
    stream << "  <f href=\"" << escapeXml(QUrl::fromLocalFile(filePath).toString()) << "\"/>\n";
    stream << "  <annots>\n";
    int fallbackRow = 0;
    for (const ReaderAnnotationItem &item : annotations) {
        const int page = qMax(0, item.page);
        const double yRatio = item.yRatio >= 0.0 ? qBound(0.0, item.yRatio, 1.0) : -1.0;
        const double yTop = yRatio >= 0.0 ? (760.0 - yRatio * 720.0) : qMax(40.0, 760.0 - fallbackRow * 18.0);
        const double yBottom = qBound(20.0, yTop - 24.0, 780.0);
        fallbackRow += 1;
        stream << "    <text page=\"" << page << "\" rect=\"36," << QString::number(yBottom, 'f', 2)
               << ",220," << QString::number(yTop, 'f', 2) << "\""
               << " creationDate=\"" << escapeXml(item.createdAt) << "\""
               << " subject=\"note\""
               << " title=\"" << escapeXml(QString::fromUtf8(APP_DISPLAY_NAME)) << "\">\n";
        stream << "      <contents>" << escapeXml(item.note.trimmed()) << "</contents>\n";
        stream << "    </text>\n";
    }
    stream << "  </annots>\n";
    stream << "</xfdf>\n";
    if (stream.status() != QTextStream::Ok || !file.commit()) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("XFDF 写入失败");
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

int ReaderStateStore::importAnnotationsFromXfdf(
    const QString &filePath,
    const QString &xfdfPath,
    QString &errorMessage
) {
    errorMessage.clear();
    if (filePath.trimmed().isEmpty() || xfdfPath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("参数为空，无法导入 XFDF");
        return 0;
    }
    QFile file(xfdfPath);
    if (!file.exists() || !file.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly | QIODevice::Text)) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("无法读取 XFDF 文件");
        return 0;
    }
    const QString xml = QString::fromUtf8(file.readAll());
    if (!xml.contains(QStringLiteral("<xfdf"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
        errorMessage = QStringLiteral("XFDF 内容非法");
        return 0;
    }
    const QRegularExpression annotRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(<(text|freetext)\b([^>]*)>([\s\S]*?)</\1>)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    const QRegularExpression contentsRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(<contents[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)</contents>)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    QRegularExpressionMatchIterator it = annotRe.globalMatch(xml);
    int imported = 0;
    while (it.hasNext()) {
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = it.next();
        if (!m.hasMatch()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString attrs = m.captured(2);
        const QString body = m.captured(3);
        bool pageOk = false;
        int page = readAttr(attrs, QStringLiteral("page")).toInt(&pageOk);
        if (!pageOk || page < 0) {
            page = 0;
        }
        double yRatio = -1.0;
        const QString rect = readAttr(attrs, QStringLiteral("rect"));
        if (!rect.isEmpty()) {
            const QStringList parts = rect.split(',', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
            if (parts.size() >= 4) {
                bool yOk = false;
                const double yTop = parts[3].trimmed().toDouble(&yOk);
                if (yOk) {
                    yRatio = qBound(0.0, (760.0 - yTop) / 720.0, 1.0);
                }
            }
        }
        QString note;
        const QRegularExpressionMatch cm = contentsRe.match(body);
        if (cm.hasMatch()) {
            note = unescapeXml(cm.captured(1)).trimmed();
        } else {
            note = unescapeXml(body).trimmed();
        }
        if (note.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        addAnnotation(filePath, page, note, yRatio);
        imported += 1;
    }
    return imported;
}

void ReaderStateStore::saveSessionSnapshot(const ReaderSessionSnapshot &snapshot) {
    if (snapshot.currentFilePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    QJsonObject session;
    session.insert(QStringLiteral("current_file_path"), snapshot.currentFilePath);
    QJsonArray openFiles;
    for (const QString &file : snapshot.openFiles) {
        if (!file.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            openFiles.append(file);
        }
    }
    session.insert(QStringLiteral("open_files"), openFiles);
    session.insert(QStringLiteral("page"), qMax(0, snapshot.page));
    session.insert(QStringLiteral("zoom_factor"), snapshot.zoomFactor > 0 ? snapshot.zoomFactor : 1.0);
    session.insert(QStringLiteral("rotation"), snapshot.rotation);
    session.insert(QStringLiteral("updated_at"), snapshot.updatedAt.isEmpty() ? nowIso() : snapshot.updatedAt);
    session.insert(QStringLiteral("dirty_exit"), snapshot.dirtyExit);
    root.insert(QStringLiteral("session_snapshot"), session);
    saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

bool ReaderStateStore::loadSessionSnapshot(ReaderSessionSnapshot &snapshot) const {
    snapshot = ReaderSessionSnapshot();
    const QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    const QJsonObject session = root.value(QStringLiteral("session_snapshot")).toObject();
    const QString filePath = session.value(QStringLiteral("current_file_path")).toString().trimmed();
    if (filePath.isEmpty()) {
        return false;
    }
    snapshot.currentFilePath = filePath;
    const QJsonArray openFiles = session.value(QStringLiteral("open_files")).toArray();
    for (const QJsonValue &v : openFiles) {
        const QString value = v.toString().trimmed();
        if (!value.isEmpty()) {
            snapshot.openFiles.push_back(value);
        }
    }
    snapshot.page = qMax(0, session.value(QStringLiteral("page")).toInt(0));
    snapshot.zoomFactor = session.value(QStringLiteral("zoom_factor")).toDouble(1.0);
    if (snapshot.zoomFactor <= 0) {
        snapshot.zoomFactor = 1.0;
    }
    snapshot.rotation = session.value(QStringLiteral("rotation")).toInt(0);
    snapshot.updatedAt = session.value(QStringLiteral("updated_at")).toString();
    snapshot.dirtyExit = session.value(QStringLiteral("dirty_exit")).toBool(false);
    return true;
}

void ReaderStateStore::clearSessionSnapshot() {
    QJsonObject root = loadRootWithBackup(stateFilePath());
    root.remove(QStringLiteral("session_snapshot"));
    saveRoot(stateFilePath(), root);
}

QString ReaderStateStore::stateFilePath() const {
    const QString base = QStandardPaths::writableLocation(QStandardPaths::AppDataLocation);
    return QDir(base).filePath(QStringLiteral("reader_state.json"));
}

void ReaderStateStore::ensureParentDir() const {
    const QFileInfo info(stateFilePath());
    QDir dir = info.dir();
    if (!dir.exists()) {
        dir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."));
    }
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/ReaderStateStore.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QVector>

namespace converter {

struct RecentItem {
    QString filePath;
    QString openedAt;
};

struct ReadingHistoryItem {
    QString filePath;
    int lastPage = 0;
    double zoomFactor = 1.0;
    int rotation = 0;
    QString updatedAt;
};

struct ReaderAnnotationItem {
    QString filePath;
    int page = 0;
    double yRatio = -1.0;
    QString note;
    QString createdAt;
};

struct ReaderBookmarkItem {
    QString filePath;
    int page = 0;
    QString title;
    QString createdAt;
};

struct ReaderSessionSnapshot {
    QString currentFilePath;
    QStringList openFiles;
    int page = 0;
    double zoomFactor = 1.0;
    int rotation = 0;
    QString updatedAt;
    bool dirtyExit = false;
};

// 读取器状态持久化：
// - 最近文件列表
// - 阅读历史（页码/缩放/旋转）
// - 用户批注
class ReaderStateStore final {
public:
    ReaderStateStore();

    QVector<RecentItem> loadRecentFiles() const;
    QVector<ReadingHistoryItem> loadReadingHistory() const;
    QVector<ReaderAnnotationItem> loadAnnotations(const QString &filePath) const;
    QVector<ReaderBookmarkItem> loadBookmarks(const QString &filePath) const;

    void pushRecentFile(const QString &filePath);
    void updateReadingHistory(
        const QString &filePath,
        int lastPage,
        double zoomFactor,
        int rotation
    );
    void addAnnotation(const QString &filePath, int page, const QString &note, double yRatio = -1.0);
    bool updateAnnotation(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt, const QString &newNote);
    bool removeAnnotation(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt);
    void addBookmark(const QString &filePath, int page, const QString &title);
    bool updateBookmarkTitle(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt, const QString &newTitle);
    bool removeBookmark(const QString &filePath, const QString &createdAt);
    bool findHistoryFor(const QString &filePath, ReadingHistoryItem &out) const;
    bool exportAnnotationsToXfdf(const QString &filePath, const QString &xfdfPath, QString &errorMessage) const;
    int importAnnotationsFromXfdf(const QString &filePath, const QString &xfdfPath, QString &errorMessage);
    void saveSessionSnapshot(const ReaderSessionSnapshot &snapshot);
    bool loadSessionSnapshot(ReaderSessionSnapshot &snapshot) const;
    void clearSessionSnapshot();

private:
    QString stateFilePath() const;
    void ensureParentDir() const;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.h"

#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QStringList>

#include <algorithm>

namespace converter {

namespace {

double safeYRatio(const LayoutBBox &box, const double pageHeight) {
    if (pageHeight <= 1.0) {
        return 0.5;
    }
    return qBound(0.0, box.y / pageHeight, 1.0);
}

QString mergeRuns(const LayoutLine &line) {
    QString text;
    for (const LayoutTextRun &run : line.runs) {
        const QString token = run.text.simplified();
        if (token.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            text += QChar(' ');
        }
        text += token;
    }
    return text;
}

RegionKind inferRegionKindFromBlockType(const QString &type) {
    const QString t = type.trimmed().toLower();
    if (t == QStringLiteral("table")) {
        return RegionKind::TableBlock;
    }
    if (t == QStringLiteral("figure") || t == QStringLiteral("image")) {
        return RegionKind::FigureBlock;
    }
    if (t == QStringLiteral("header")) {
        return RegionKind::HeaderBlock;
    }
    if (t == QStringLiteral("footer")) {
        return RegionKind::FooterBlock;
    }
    if (t == QStringLiteral("heading") || t == QStringLiteral("paragraph") || t == QStringLiteral("text")) {
        return RegionKind::TextBlock;
    }
    return RegionKind::Unknown;
}

void bumpRoleStats(SemanticRoleStats &stats, const SemanticRole role) {
    switch (role) {
    case SemanticRole::Title:
        stats.title += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::Subtitle:
        stats.subtitle += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::Heading1:
    case SemanticRole::Heading2:
    case SemanticRole::Heading3:
        stats.heading += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::Paragraph:
        stats.paragraph += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::ListItem:
        stats.listItem += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::TableHeader:
        stats.tableHeader += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::TableBody:
        stats.tableBody += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::Header:
        stats.header += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::Footer:
        stats.footer += 1;
        break;
    case SemanticRole::Unknown:
    case SemanticRole::FigureCaption:
        break;
    }
}

double boxLeft(const LayoutBBox &b) {
    return qMin(b.x, b.x + b.w);
}

double boxRight(const LayoutBBox &b) {
    return qMax(b.x, b.x + b.w);
}

double boxTop(const LayoutBBox &b) {
    return qMin(b.y, b.y + b.h);
}

double boxBottom(const LayoutBBox &b) {
    return qMax(b.y, b.y + b.h);
}

double boxWidth(const LayoutBBox &b) {
    return qMax(0.0, boxRight(b) - boxLeft(b));
}

struct NodeBlockSlice {
    int blockIndex = -1;
    QVector<int> indexes;
    double minX = 1e9;
    double maxX = -1e9;
    double minY = 1e9;
    double maxY = -1e9;
    int columnId = 0; // -1: left, +1: right, 0: floating/cross
    bool floating = false;
    bool crossColumn = false;
};

bool byNodeYThenX(const ReadingNode &a, const ReadingNode &b) {
    if (!qFuzzyCompare(a.box.y + 1.0, b.box.y + 1.0)) {
        return a.box.y < b.box.y;
    }
    return a.box.x < b.box.x;
}

void sortNodeIndexes(const QVector<ReadingNode> &nodes, QVector<int> &indexes) {
    std::sort(indexes.begin(), indexes.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
        return byNodeYThenX(nodes[a], nodes[b]);
    });
}

QVector<int> reorderPageNodeIndexes(const QVector<ReadingNode> &nodes, const QVector<int> &indexes) {
    if (indexes.size() <= 2) {
        return indexes;
    }
    QMap<int, QVector<int>> grouped;
    for (const int idx : indexes) {
        grouped[nodes[idx].blockIndex].push_back(idx);
    }
    QVector<NodeBlockSlice> blocks;
    blocks.reserve(grouped.size());
    for (auto it = grouped.constBegin(); it != grouped.constEnd(); ++it) {
        NodeBlockSlice slice;
        slice.blockIndex = it.key();
        slice.indexes = it.value();
        sortNodeIndexes(nodes, slice.indexes);
        for (const int idx : slice.indexes) {
            const LayoutBBox &b = nodes[idx].box;
            slice.minX = qMin(slice.minX, boxLeft(b));
            slice.maxX = qMax(slice.maxX, boxRight(b));
            slice.minY = qMin(slice.minY, boxTop(b));
            slice.maxY = qMax(slice.maxY, boxBottom(b));
        }
        blocks.push_back(slice);
    }
    std::sort(blocks.begin(), blocks.end(), [](const NodeBlockSlice &a, const NodeBlockSlice &b) {
        if (!qFuzzyCompare(a.minY + 1.0, b.minY + 1.0)) {
            return a.minY < b.minY;
        }
        return a.minX < b.minX;
    });

    double minX = 1e9;
    double maxX = -1e9;
    for (const NodeBlockSlice &b : blocks) {
        minX = qMin(minX, b.minX);
        maxX = qMax(maxX, b.maxX);
    }
    const double pageWidth = qMax(1.0, maxX - minX);
    QVector<double> columnCenters;
    for (const NodeBlockSlice &b : blocks) {
        if (boxWidth({b.minX, 0.0, b.maxX - b.minX, 1.0}) < pageWidth * 0.72) {
            columnCenters.push_back((b.minX + b.maxX) * 0.5);
        }
    }
    if (columnCenters.size() < 4 || pageWidth < 120.0) {
        QVector<int> flattened;
        for (const NodeBlockSlice &b : blocks) {
            flattened += b.indexes;
        }
        return flattened;
    }

    std::sort(columnCenters.begin(), columnCenters.end());
    double maxGap = 0.0;
    int gapIndex = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i + 1 < columnCenters.size(); ++i) {
        const double gap = columnCenters[i + 1] - columnCenters[i];
        if (gap > maxGap) {
            maxGap = gap;
            gapIndex = i;
        }
    }
    if (gapIndex <= 0 || gapIndex >= columnCenters.size() - 2 || maxGap < pageWidth * 0.14) {
        QVector<int> flattened;
        for (const NodeBlockSlice &b : blocks) {
            flattened += b.indexes;
        }
        return flattened;
    }
    const double splitX = (columnCenters[gapIndex] + columnCenters[gapIndex + 1]) * 0.5;

    QVector<int> leftBlocks;
    QVector<int> rightBlocks;
    QVector<int> bridgeBlocks;
    double leftMax = -1e9;
    double rightMin = 1e9;
    for (int i = 0; i < blocks.size(); ++i) {
        NodeBlockSlice &b = blocks[i];
        const double width = qMax(1.0, b.maxX - b.minX);
        const bool isCross = width >= pageWidth * 0.72
            || (b.minX < splitX - pageWidth * 0.05 && b.maxX > splitX + pageWidth * 0.05);
        const bool isFloating = !isCross && b.indexes.size() <= 2 && width <= pageWidth * 0.34;
        b.crossColumn = isCross;
        b.floating = isFloating;
        if (isCross || isFloating) {
            b.columnId = 0;
            bridgeBlocks.push_back(i);
            continue;
        }
        const double centerX = (b.minX + b.maxX) * 0.5;
        if (centerX <= splitX) {
            b.columnId = -1;
            leftBlocks.push_back(i);
            leftMax = qMax(leftMax, b.maxX);
        } else {
            b.columnId = +1;
            rightBlocks.push_back(i);
            rightMin = qMin(rightMin, b.minX);
        }
    }
    const bool clearGutter = leftBlocks.size() >= 2
        && rightBlocks.size() >= 2
        && (rightMin - leftMax) >= qMax(8.0, pageWidth * 0.04);
    if (!clearGutter) {
        QVector<int> flattened;
        for (const NodeBlockSlice &b : blocks) {
            flattened += b.indexes;
        }
        return flattened;
    }

    auto sortByTopLeft = [&](QVector<int> &ids) {
        std::sort(ids.begin(), ids.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
            if (!qFuzzyCompare(blocks[a].minY + 1.0, blocks[b].minY + 1.0)) {
                return blocks[a].minY < blocks[b].minY;
            }
            return blocks[a].minX < blocks[b].minX;
        });
    };
    sortByTopLeft(leftBlocks);
    sortByTopLeft(rightBlocks);
    sortByTopLeft(bridgeBlocks);

    QVector<int> baseOrder;
    baseOrder.reserve(leftBlocks.size() + rightBlocks.size());
    baseOrder += leftBlocks;
    baseOrder += rightBlocks;
    QVector<int> finalBlockOrder;
    finalBlockOrder.reserve(blocks.size());
    int bridgeCursor = 0;
    for (const int id : baseOrder) {
        const double gateY = blocks[id].minY + qMax(6.0, (blocks[id].maxY - blocks[id].minY) * 0.35);
        while (bridgeCursor < bridgeBlocks.size() && blocks[bridgeBlocks[bridgeCursor]].minY <= gateY) {
            finalBlockOrder.push_back(bridgeBlocks[bridgeCursor]);
            bridgeCursor += 1;
        }
        finalBlockOrder.push_back(id);
    }
    while (bridgeCursor < bridgeBlocks.size()) {
        finalBlockOrder.push_back(bridgeBlocks[bridgeCursor]);
        bridgeCursor += 1;
    }

    QVector<int> reordered;
    reordered.reserve(indexes.size());
    for (const int blockId : finalBlockOrder) {
        reordered += blocks[blockId].indexes;
    }
    return reordered;
}

QVector<int> reorderPageRegionIndexes(const QVector<LayoutRegion> &regions, const QVector<int> &indexes) {
    if (indexes.size() <= 2) {
        return indexes;
    }
    QVector<int> sorted = indexes;
    std::sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
        const LayoutRegion &ra = regions[a];
        const LayoutRegion &rb = regions[b];
        const double ay = boxTop(ra.box);
        const double by = boxTop(rb.box);
        if (!qFuzzyCompare(ay + 1.0, by + 1.0)) {
            return ay < by;
        }
        return boxLeft(ra.box) < boxLeft(rb.box);
    });
    double minX = 1e9;
    double maxX = -1e9;
    QVector<double> centers;
    for (const int idx : sorted) {
        const LayoutRegion &r = regions[idx];
        minX = qMin(minX, boxLeft(r.box));
        maxX = qMax(maxX, boxRight(r.box));
        if (r.kind == RegionKind::TextBlock) {
            centers.push_back((boxLeft(r.box) + boxRight(r.box)) * 0.5);
        }
    }
    const double pageWidth = qMax(1.0, maxX - minX);
    if (centers.size() < 4 || pageWidth < 120.0) {
        return sorted;
    }
    std::sort(centers.begin(), centers.end());
    double maxGap = 0.0;
    int gapIndex = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i + 1 < centers.size(); ++i) {
        const double gap = centers[i + 1] - centers[i];
        if (gap > maxGap) {
            maxGap = gap;
            gapIndex = i;
        }
    }
    if (gapIndex <= 0 || gapIndex >= centers.size() - 2 || maxGap < pageWidth * 0.14) {
        return sorted;
    }
    const double splitX = (centers[gapIndex] + centers[gapIndex + 1]) * 0.5;
    QVector<int> left;
    QVector<int> right;
    QVector<int> floating;
    for (const int idx : sorted) {
        const LayoutRegion &r = regions[idx];
        const double leftX = boxLeft(r.box);
        const double rightX = boxRight(r.box);
        const double width = qMax(1.0, rightX - leftX);
        const bool isCross = width >= pageWidth * 0.72
            || (leftX < splitX - pageWidth * 0.05 && rightX > splitX + pageWidth * 0.05);
        const bool isFloatLike = isCross
            || r.kind == RegionKind::FigureBlock
            || r.kind == RegionKind::TableBlock;
        if (isFloatLike) {
            floating.push_back(idx);
            continue;
        }
        const double centerX = (leftX + rightX) * 0.5;
        if (centerX <= splitX) {
            left.push_back(idx);
        } else {
            right.push_back(idx);
        }
    }
    QVector<int> base = left;
    base += right;
    QVector<int> merged;
    merged.reserve(sorted.size());
    int floatCursor = 0;
    for (const int idx : base) {
        const double gateY = boxTop(regions[idx].box) + qMax(6.0, boxWidth(regions[idx].box) * 0.05);
        while (floatCursor < floating.size() && boxTop(regions[floating[floatCursor]].box) <= gateY) {
            merged.push_back(floating[floatCursor]);
            floatCursor += 1;
        }
        merged.push_back(idx);
    }
    while (floatCursor < floating.size()) {
        merged.push_back(floating[floatCursor]);
        floatCursor += 1;
    }
    return merged;
}

} // namespace

int StructureUnderstanding::inferHeadingLevel(const QString &text, const SemanticRole role) const {
    if (role == SemanticRole::Title || role == SemanticRole::Heading1) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (role == SemanticRole::Heading2) {
        return 2;
    }
    if (role == SemanticRole::Heading3) {
        return 3;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression decimalRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d+(?:\.\d+){0,4})\s+.+)"));
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = decimalRe.match(text.trimmed());
    if (m.hasMatch()) {
        return qBound(1, m.captured(1).count('.') + 1, 4);
    }
    return 0;
}

SemanticRole StructureUnderstanding::inferRole(
    const QString &text,
    const double fontSize,
    const bool bold,
    const double yRatio
) const {
    const QString trimmed = text.simplified();
    if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
        return SemanticRole::Unknown;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression listRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d+[\.\)]|[A-Za-z][\.\)]|[•●\-])\s+.+)"));
    if (listRe.match(trimmed).hasMatch()) {
        return SemanticRole::ListItem;
    }
    if ((bold && fontSize >= 16.0) || (fontSize >= 19.0 && trimmed.size() <= 80)) {
        return yRatio <= 0.20 ? SemanticRole::Title : SemanticRole::Heading1;
    }
    if ((bold && fontSize >= 13.0) || fontSize >= 15.0) {
        return SemanticRole::Heading2;
    }
    if (yRatio >= 0.93 && trimmed.size() <= 160) {
        return SemanticRole::Footer;
    }
    if (yRatio <= 0.06 && trimmed.size() <= 160) {
        return SemanticRole::Header;
    }
    return SemanticRole::Paragraph;
}

UnifiedStructureDocument StructureUnderstanding::build(const LayoutDocument &layout, const DocumentModel &) const {
    UnifiedStructureDocument out;
    QVector<HeadingEntry> headingStack;
    int headingIdSeed = 0;
    for (const LayoutPage &page : layout.pages) {
        int blockIndex = 0;
        for (const LayoutBlock &block : page.blocks) {
            LayoutRegion region;
            region.page = page.pageIndex;
            region.box = block.box;
            region.kind = inferRegionKindFromBlockType(block.type);
            region.sourceType = block.type.trimmed();
            region.readingAnchor = out.readingNodes.size();
            out.regions.push_back(region);
            for (const LayoutLine &line : block.lines) {
                const QString text = mergeRuns(line);
                if (text.isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                double avgFont = 11.0;
                bool bold = false;
                if (!line.runs.isEmpty()) {
                    double sum = 0.0;
                    for (const LayoutTextRun &run : line.runs) {
                        sum += run.fontSize > 0.0 ? run.fontSize : 11.0;
                        bold = bold || run.bold;
                    }
                    avgFont = sum / static_cast<double>(line.runs.size());
                }
                ReadingNode node;
                node.page = page.pageIndex;
                node.blockIndex = blockIndex;
                node.box = line.box;
                node.text = text;
                node.role = inferRole(text, avgFont, bold, safeYRatio(line.box, page.height));
                bumpRoleStats(out.stats, node.role);
                out.readingNodes.push_back(node);

                const int headingLevel = inferHeadingLevel(text, node.role);
                if (headingLevel > 0) {
                    while (!headingStack.isEmpty() && headingStack.last().level >= headingLevel) {
                        headingStack.pop_back();
                    }
                    HeadingEntry entry;
                    entry.id = headingIdSeed++;
                    entry.parentId = headingStack.isEmpty() ? -1 : headingStack.last().id;
                    entry.level = headingLevel;
