                    entry.page = page.pageIndex;
                    entry.readingOrder = out.readingNodes.size() - 1;
                    entry.text = text;
                    for (const HeadingEntry &ancestor : headingStack) {
                        entry.path.push_back(ancestor.text);
                    }
                    entry.path.push_back(entry.text);
                    out.headings.push_back(entry);
                    headingStack.push_back(entry);
                }
            }
            blockIndex += 1;
        }
        for (const LayoutTable &table : page.tables) {
            UnifiedTable t;
            t.page = page.pageIndex;
            t.box = table.box;
            for (const LayoutTableCell &cell : table.cells) {
                UnifiedTableCell c;
                c.row = cell.row;
                c.col = cell.col;
                c.rowSpan = cell.rowSpan;
                c.colSpan = cell.colSpan;
                c.text = cell.text.simplified();
                t.cells.push_back(c);
            }
            out.tables.push_back(t);
            LayoutRegion tableRegion;
            tableRegion.page = page.pageIndex;
            tableRegion.box = table.box;
            tableRegion.kind = RegionKind::TableBlock;
            tableRegion.sourceType = QStringLiteral("table");
            tableRegion.readingAnchor = out.readingNodes.size();
            out.regions.push_back(tableRegion);
        }
    }
    if (!out.readingNodes.isEmpty()) {
        QHash<int, int> oldToNew;
        QMap<int, QVector<int>> pageIndexes;
        for (int i = 0; i < out.readingNodes.size(); ++i) {
            pageIndexes[out.readingNodes[i].page].push_back(i);
        }
        QVector<ReadingNode> reordered;
        reordered.reserve(out.readingNodes.size());
        for (auto it = pageIndexes.constBegin(); it != pageIndexes.constEnd(); ++it) {
            const QVector<int> orderedIndexes = reorderPageNodeIndexes(out.readingNodes, it.value());
            for (const int idx : orderedIndexes) {
                oldToNew.insert(idx, reordered.size());
                reordered.push_back(out.readingNodes[idx]);
            }
        }
        out.readingNodes = reordered;
        for (HeadingEntry &entry : out.headings) {
            if (oldToNew.contains(entry.readingOrder)) {
                entry.readingOrder = oldToNew.value(entry.readingOrder);
            }
        }
        for (LayoutRegion &region : out.regions) {
            if (oldToNew.contains(region.readingAnchor)) {
                region.readingAnchor = oldToNew.value(region.readingAnchor);
            }
        }
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < out.readingNodes.size(); ++i) {
        out.readingNodes[i].readingOrder = i;
    }
    if (!out.regions.isEmpty()) {
        QMap<int, QVector<int>> regionPages;
        for (int i = 0; i < out.regions.size(); ++i) {
            regionPages[out.regions[i].page].push_back(i);
        }
        QVector<LayoutRegion> reorderedRegions;
        reorderedRegions.reserve(out.regions.size());
        for (auto it = regionPages.constBegin(); it != regionPages.constEnd(); ++it) {
            const QVector<int> orderedIndexes = reorderPageRegionIndexes(out.regions, it.value());
            for (const int idx : orderedIndexes) {
                reorderedRegions.push_back(out.regions[idx]);
            }
        }
        out.regions = reorderedRegions;
    }
    return out;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QVector>

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"
#include "core/domain/model/LayoutModel.h"

namespace converter {

enum class SemanticRole {
    Unknown,
    Title,
    Subtitle,
    Heading1,
    Heading2,
    Heading3,
    Paragraph,
    ListItem,
    TableHeader,
    TableBody,
    FigureCaption,
    Header,
    Footer
};

struct ReadingNode {
    int page = -1;
    int blockIndex = -1;
    LayoutBBox box;
    SemanticRole role = SemanticRole::Unknown;
    QString text;
    int readingOrder = -1;
};

struct UnifiedTableCell {
    int row = 0;
    int col = 0;
    int rowSpan = 1;
    int colSpan = 1;
    QString text;
    bool fromCrossPageHeader = false;
};

struct UnifiedTable {
    int page = -1;
    LayoutBBox box;
    QVector<UnifiedTableCell> cells;
};

enum class RegionKind {
    Unknown,
    TextBlock,
    TableBlock,
    FigureBlock,
    HeaderBlock,
    FooterBlock
};

struct LayoutRegion {
    int page = -1;
    LayoutBBox box;
    RegionKind kind = RegionKind::Unknown;
    QString sourceType;
    int readingAnchor = -1;
};

struct HeadingEntry {
    int id = -1;
    int parentId = -1;
    int level = 1;
    int page = -1;
    int readingOrder = -1;
    QString text;
    QStringList path;
};

struct SemanticRoleStats {
    int title = 0;
    int subtitle = 0;
    int heading = 0;
    int paragraph = 0;
    int listItem = 0;
    int tableHeader = 0;
    int tableBody = 0;
    int header = 0;
    int footer = 0;
};

struct UnifiedStructureDocument {
    QVector<ReadingNode> readingNodes;
    QVector<UnifiedTable> tables;
    QVector<LayoutRegion> regions;
    QVector<HeadingEntry> headings;
    SemanticRoleStats stats;
};

class StructureUnderstanding final {
public:
    UnifiedStructureDocument build(const LayoutDocument &layout, const DocumentModel &document) const;

private:
    int inferHeadingLevel(const QString &text, SemanticRole role) const;
    SemanticRole inferRole(const QString &text, double fontSize, bool bold, double yRatio) const;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#ifndef PDF_MASTER_CORE_COMMON_RUNTIME_CONVERSION_TYPES_H
#define PDF_MASTER_CORE_COMMON_RUNTIME_CONVERSION_TYPES_H

#include <QMetaType>
#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/StructureUnderstanding.h"

namespace converter {

enum class OutputFormat {
    Docx,
    Xlsx,
    Pptx
};

enum class StageStatus {
    Success,
    RetryableFailure,
    FatalFailure,
    Skipped
};

struct ConversionTask {
    QString taskId;
    QString inputPdf;
    QString outputDir;
    QString preferredOutputPath;
    OutputFormat format = OutputFormat::Docx;
    int maxRetries = 2;
    bool enableOcrFallback = true;
};

struct StageContext {
    ConversionTask task;
    int attempt = 0;
    QString officeBinary;
    QString ocrEngineName;
    QString workDir;
    QStringList rasterizedImages;
    QString generatedOutputPath;
    DocumentModel document;
    UnifiedStructureDocument unifiedStructure;
    QStringList traces;
};

struct StageResult {
    StageStatus status = StageStatus::FatalFailure;
    QString stageName;
    QString message;
};

struct ConversionResult {
    bool ok = false;
    QString taskId;
    QString message;
    QString outputPath;
    QStringList traces;
};

inline QString outputFormatToSuffix(OutputFormat format) {
    switch (format) {
    case OutputFormat::Docx:
        return QStringLiteral("docx");
    case OutputFormat::Xlsx:
        return QStringLiteral("xlsx");
    case OutputFormat::Pptx:
        return QStringLiteral("pptx");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("docx");
}

inline QString outputFormatToDisplayName(OutputFormat format) {
    switch (format) {
    case OutputFormat::Docx:
        return QStringLiteral("Word (.docx)");
    case OutputFormat::Xlsx:
        return QStringLiteral("Excel (.xlsx)");
    case OutputFormat::Pptx:
        return QStringLiteral("PowerPoint (.pptx)");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("Word (.docx)");
}

inline QString outputFormatToLibreOfficeFilter(OutputFormat format) {
    switch (format) {
    case OutputFormat::Docx:
        return QStringLiteral("docx:MS Word 2007 XML");
    case OutputFormat::Xlsx:
        return QStringLiteral("xlsx:Calc MS Excel 2007 XML");
    case OutputFormat::Pptx:
        return QStringLiteral("pptx:Impress MS PowerPoint 2007 XML");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("docx:MS Word 2007 XML");
}

} // namespace converter

Q_DECLARE_METATYPE(converter::OutputFormat)
Q_DECLARE_METATYPE(converter::ConversionTask)
Q_DECLARE_METATYPE(converter::ConversionResult)

#endif // PDF_MASTER_CORE_COMMON_RUNTIME_CONVERSION_TYPES_H

#include "core/platform/runtime/StructuredLogger.h"

#include <QDateTime>

namespace converter {

QString StructuredLogger::makeTaskLog(const QString &taskId, const QString &level, const QString &message) const {
    const QString ts = QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString(QStringLiteral("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
    return QStringLiteral("[%1] [task:%2] [%3] %4").arg(ts, taskId, level, message);
}

QString StructuredLogger::makeStageLog(const QString &taskId, const QString &stage, const QString &message) const {
    const QString ts = QDateTime::currentDateTime().toString(QStringLiteral("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"));
    return QStringLiteral("[%1] [task:%2] [stage:%3] %4").arg(ts, taskId, stage, message);
}

} // namespace converter

#include <QString>

namespace converter {

class StructuredLogger final {
public:
    StructuredLogger() = default;

    QString makeTaskLog(const QString &taskId, const QString &level, const QString &message) const;
    QString makeStageLog(const QString &taskId, const QString &stage, const QString &message) const;
};

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.h"

#include <QCoreApplication>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QList>
#include <QProcess>
#include <QProcessEnvironment>

namespace converter {

QStringList ToolExecutor::bundledToolRoots() const {
    QStringList roots;
    const QString appDir = QCoreApplication::applicationDirPath();
    if (appDir.isEmpty()) {
        return roots;
    }
    const QDir appBinDir(appDir);
    roots.push_back(appBinDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("../Resources/tools/bin")));
    roots.push_back(appBinDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("../Resources/tools")));
    roots.push_back(appBinDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("tools/bin")));
    roots.push_back(appBinDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("tools")));
    return roots;
}

QString ToolExecutor::tryDetectExecutable(const QString &candidateProgram) const {
    if (candidateProgram.contains('/')) {
        const QFileInfo fileInfo(candidateProgram);
        return fileInfo.exists() && fileInfo.isExecutable() ? fileInfo.absoluteFilePath() : QString();
    }

    const QList<QStringList> probeArgs = {
        {QStringLiteral("--version")},
        {QStringLiteral("-h")},
        {}
    };
    for (const QStringList &args : probeArgs) {
        QProcess probe;
        probe.start(candidateProgram, args);
        if (probe.waitForStarted(2000)) {
            probe.kill();
            probe.waitForFinished(1000);
            return candidateProgram;
        }
    }
    return QString();
}

QString ToolExecutor::bundledTessdataDir() const {
    for (const QString &root : bundledToolRoots()) {
        const QDir baseDir(root);
        const QStringList candidates = {
            baseDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("tessdata")),
            baseDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("../tessdata")),
            baseDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("share/tessdata")),
            baseDir.absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("../share/tessdata"))
        };
        for (const QString &candidate : candidates) {
            const QDir tessdataDir(candidate);
            if (tessdataDir.exists(QStringLiteral("eng.traineddata"))) {
                return tessdataDir.absolutePath();
            }
        }
    }
    return QString();
}

QString ToolExecutor::detectOfficeBinary() const {
    QStringList candidates = {
#ifdef Q_OS_MAC
        QStringLiteral("/Applications/LibreOffice.app/Contents/MacOS/soffice"),
        QStringLiteral("/Applications/LibreOffice.app/Contents/MacOS/soffice.bin"),
#endif
        QStringLiteral("soffice"),
        QStringLiteral("libreoffice")
    };
#ifdef Q_OS_MAC
    const QStringList appRoots = {
        QStringLiteral("/Applications"),
        QDir::home().absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("Applications"))
    };
    for (const QString &root : appRoots) {
        const QDir appDir(root);
        if (!appDir.exists()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QStringList entries = appDir.entryList(QStringList{QStringLiteral("*.app")}, QDir::Dirs | QDir::NoDotAndDotDot);
        for (const QString &entry : entries) {
            if (!entry.contains(QStringLiteral("LibreOffice"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString base = appDir.absoluteFilePath(entry + QStringLiteral("/Contents/MacOS"));
            candidates.push_back(QDir(base).absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("soffice")));
            candidates.push_back(QDir(base).absoluteFilePath(QStringLiteral("soffice.bin")));
        }
    }
#endif

    for (const QString &candidate : candidates) {
        const QString resolved = tryDetectExecutable(candidate);
        if (!resolved.isEmpty()) {
            return resolved;
        }
    }
    return QString();
}

QString ToolExecutor::detectCommand(const QString &commandName) const {
    if (commandName.contains('/')) {
        return tryDetectExecutable(commandName);
    }
    for (const QString &root : bundledToolRoots()) {
        const QString bundledCandidate = QDir(root).absoluteFilePath(commandName);
        const QString resolvedBundled = tryDetectExecutable(bundledCandidate);
        if (!resolvedBundled.isEmpty()) {
            return resolvedBundled;
        }
    }
    return tryDetectExecutable(commandName);
}

CommandResult ToolExecutor::run(
    const QString &program,
    const QStringList &arguments,
    const int startTimeoutMs,
    const int finishTimeoutMs
) const {
    CommandResult result;
    QProcess process;
    process.setProgram(program);
    process.setArguments(arguments);

    const QFileInfo programInfo(program);
    if (programInfo.fileName() == QStringLiteral("tesseract")) {
        QProcessEnvironment env = QProcessEnvironment::systemEnvironment();
        if (!env.contains(QStringLiteral("TESSDATA_PREFIX"))) {
            const QString tessdataDir = bundledTessdataDir();
            if (!tessdataDir.isEmpty()) {
                env.insert(QStringLiteral("TESSDATA_PREFIX"), tessdataDir);
                process.setProcessEnvironment(env);
            }
        }
    }

    process.start();
    if (!process.waitForStarted(startTimeoutMs)) {
        result.started = false;
        result.combinedOutput = QStringLiteral("进程启动失败");
        return result;
    }

    result.started = true;
    if (!process.waitForFinished(finishTimeoutMs)) {
        process.kill();
        process.waitForFinished(1000);
        result.exitCode = -1;
        result.combinedOutput = QStringLiteral("进程执行超时");
        return result;
    }

    const QByteArray out = process.readAllStandardOutput();
    const QByteArray err = process.readAllStandardError();
    result.exitCode = process.exitCode();
    result.combinedOutput = QString::fromUtf8(out + err).trimmed();
    return result;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#ifndef PDF_MASTER_CORE_COMMON_TOOLS_TOOL_EXECUTOR_H
#define PDF_MASTER_CORE_COMMON_TOOLS_TOOL_EXECUTOR_H

#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>

namespace converter {

struct CommandResult {
    bool started = false;
    int exitCode = -1;
    QString combinedOutput;
};

class ToolExecutor final {
public:
    ToolExecutor() = default;

    QString detectOfficeBinary() const;
    QString detectCommand(const QString &commandName) const;
    CommandResult run(const QString &program, const QStringList &arguments, int startTimeoutMs, int finishTimeoutMs) const;

private:
    QStringList bundledToolRoots() const;
    QString tryDetectExecutable(const QString &candidateProgram) const;
    QString bundledTessdataDir() const;
};

} // namespace converter

#endif // PDF_MASTER_CORE_COMMON_TOOLS_TOOL_EXECUTOR_H

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptConversionEngine.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptConversionEngine.h"

#include <QDir>
#include <QElapsedTimer>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QHash>
#include <QSet>
#include <QtGlobal>
#include <algorithm>

#include "PptDocumentMapper.h"
#include "PptPageDiffEvaluator.h"
#include "PptRecognitionGate.h"
#include "PptTypeNormalizer.h"

namespace converter {

namespace {

QString resolveOutputPath(const ConversionTask &task) {
    if (!task.preferredOutputPath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
        return QFileInfo(task.preferredOutputPath).absoluteFilePath();
    }
    return QDir(task.outputDir).filePath(
        QFileInfo(task.inputPdf).completeBaseName() + QStringLiteral(".") + outputFormatToSuffix(task.format)
    );
}

int countLayoutTextLines(const LayoutPage &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const LayoutBlock &b : page.blocks) {
        for (const LayoutLine &l : b.lines) {
            for (const LayoutTextRun &r : l.runs) {
                if (!r.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    count += 1;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return count;
}

int countModelTextLines(const PageContent &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
            if (!span.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                count += 1;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    return count;
}

int countLayoutBackground(const LayoutPage &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const LayoutFillShape &f : page.fills) {
        if (f.isBackground) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    for (const LayoutImage &img : page.images) {
        if (img.isBackground) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

int countModelBackground(const PageContent &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

int countLayoutImages(const LayoutPage &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const LayoutImage &img : page.images) {
        if (!img.isBackground) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

int countModelImages(const PageContent &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage && !g.isBackground) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

void appendStep2RecognitionModelReport(const LayoutDocument &layout, const DocumentModel &model, QStringList &traces) {
    const QVector<PageContent> pages = model.pages();
    const int count = qMin(layout.pages.size(), pages.size());
    traces.push_back(QStringLiteral("Step2 识别建模: 页=%1").arg(count));
    int totalSrcText = 0;
    int totalDstText = 0;
    int totalSrcImg = 0;
    int totalDstImg = 0;
    int totalSrcBg = 0;
    int totalDstBg = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        const LayoutPage &src = layout.pages.at(i);
        const PageContent &dst = pages.at(i);
        const int srcText = countLayoutTextLines(src);
        const int dstText = countModelTextLines(dst);
        const int srcImg = countLayoutImages(src);
        const int dstImg = countModelImages(dst);
        const int srcBg = countLayoutBackground(src);
        const int dstBg = countModelBackground(dst);
        totalSrcText += srcText;
        totalDstText += dstText;
        totalSrcImg += srcImg;
        totalDstImg += dstImg;
        totalSrcBg += srcBg;
        totalDstBg += dstBg;
        int titleCount = 0;
        int paragraphCount = 0;
        int listCount = 0;
        int annotationCount = 0;
        QSet<int> paragraphIds;
        QSet<QString> listStyles;
        int footnoteRefs = 0;
        int footnoteDefs = 0;
        int paragraphSpacingCount = 0;
        int firstLineIndentCount = 0;
        int columnBreakCount = 0;
        int tableSemanticCount = 0;
        int chartObjectCount = 0;
        int decorationObjectCount = 0;
        int backgroundObjectCount = 0;
        int imageObjectCount = 0;
        int suspiciousTableCount = 0;
        QStringList pageEvidence;
        for (const TextLine &line : dst.lines) {
            const QString role = line.semanticRole.trimmed().toLower();
            if (role == QStringLiteral("title") || role == QStringLiteral("subtitle")) {
                titleCount += 1;
            } else if (role == QStringLiteral("list")) {
                listCount += 1;
            } else if (role == QStringLiteral("annotation") || role == QStringLiteral("caption")) {
                annotationCount += 1;
            } else {
                paragraphCount += 1;
            }
            if (line.paragraphId > 0) {
                paragraphIds.insert(line.paragraphId);
            }
            if (!line.listStyle.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                listStyles.insert(line.listStyle.trimmed().toLower());
            }
            if (line.footnoteRefId > 0) {
                footnoteRefs += 1;
            }
            if (line.footnoteDefId > 0) {
                footnoteDefs += 1;
            }
            if (line.paragraphSpaceBeforePt > 0.0f || line.paragraphSpaceAfterPt > 0.0f) {
                paragraphSpacingCount += 1;
            }
            if (line.paragraphFirstLineIndentPt > 0.0f) {
                firstLineIndentCount += 1;
            }
            if (line.paragraphColumnBreakBefore) {
                columnBreakCount += 1;
            }
        }
        for (int t = 0; t < dst.tables.size(); ++t) {
            const TableObject &tbl = dst.tables.at(t);
            if (tbl.semanticRole.trimmed().toLower() == QStringLiteral("table")) {
                tableSemanticCount += 1;
            }
            const int cells = tbl.cells.size();
            const bool tooSparse = cells < qMax(4, (tbl.rowCount * tbl.colCount) / 2);
            const bool tooNarrow = tbl.rowCount < 2 || tbl.colCount < 2;
            if (tooSparse || tooNarrow) {
                suspiciousTableCount += 1;
                if (pageEvidence.size() < 3) {
                    pageEvidence.push_back(
                        QStringLiteral("table#%1(稀疏=%2,row=%3,col=%4,cells=%5)")
                            .arg(t + 1)
                            .arg(tooSparse ? 1 : 0)
                            .arg(tbl.rowCount)
                            .arg(tbl.colCount)
                            .arg(cells)
                    );
                }
            }
        }
        for (const GraphicObject &g : dst.graphics) {
            const QString role = g.semanticRole.trimmed().toLower();
            if (role == QStringLiteral("chart")) {
                chartObjectCount += 1;
            } else if (role == QStringLiteral("decoration")) {
                decorationObjectCount += 1;
            } else if (role == QStringLiteral("background") || g.isBackground) {
                backgroundObjectCount += 1;
            } else if (role == QStringLiteral("image") || g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                imageObjectCount += 1;
            }
        }
        const int nonBgVectorCount = [&]() {
            int n = 0;
            for (const GraphicObject &g : dst.graphics) {
                if (!g.isBackground && g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                    n += 1;
                }
            }
            return n;
        }();
        if (chartObjectCount == 0 && nonBgVectorCount >= 6 && pageEvidence.size() < 3) {
            pageEvidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("疑似图表漏建模(dst向量对象较多, chart=0)"));
        }
        if (dstBg == 0 && srcImg > 0) {
            const bool hasLikelyBgImage = [&]() {
                for (const LayoutImage &img : src.images) {
                    const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, src.width * src.height);
                    const double ratio = (img.box.w * img.box.h) / pageArea;
                    if (ratio >= 0.55) {
                        return true;
                    }
                }
                return false;
            }();
            if (hasLikelyBgImage && pageEvidence.size() < 3) {
                pageEvidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("疑似背景漏建模(src大图存在,dst背景=0)"));
            }
        }
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step2 页指标: 页=%1, 文本=%2/%3, 图片=%4/%5, 背景=%6/%7, 表格=%8/%9, 语义(标题/段落/列表/注释/表格/图表/装饰/背景)=%10/%11/%12/%13/%14/%15/%16/%17, 段落块=%18, 列表样式=%19, 脚注(引/注)=%20/%21, 段间距行=%22, 首行缩进行=%23, 分栏断段=%24")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(dstText).arg(srcText)
                .arg(dstImg).arg(srcImg)
                .arg(dstBg).arg(srcBg)
                .arg(dst.tables.size()).arg(src.tables.size())
                .arg(titleCount).arg(paragraphCount).arg(listCount).arg(annotationCount)
                .arg(tableSemanticCount)
                .arg(chartObjectCount)
                .arg(decorationObjectCount)
                .arg(backgroundObjectCount)
                .arg(paragraphIds.size())
                .arg(listStyles.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("none") : QStringList(listStyles.begin(), listStyles.end()).join('/'))
                .arg(footnoteRefs)
                .arg(footnoteDefs)
                .arg(paragraphSpacingCount)
                .arg(firstLineIndentCount)
                .arg(columnBreakCount)
        );
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step2 对象树: 页=%1, root(page)->text(title=%2,paragraph=%3,list=%4,annotation=%5)->object(table=%6,chart=%7,decoration=%8,background=%9,image=%10)")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(titleCount)
                .arg(paragraphCount)
                .arg(listCount)
                .arg(annotationCount)
                .arg(tableSemanticCount)
                .arg(chartObjectCount)
                .arg(decorationObjectCount)
                .arg(backgroundObjectCount)
                .arg(imageObjectCount)
        );
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step2 页证据: 页=%1, 可疑表格=%2, 证据=%3")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(suspiciousTableCount)
                .arg(pageEvidence.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("无") : pageEvidence.join(QStringLiteral(" | ")))
        );
    }
    const double textRecall = totalSrcText > 0 ? static_cast<double>(totalDstText) / totalSrcText : 1.0;
    const double imageRecall = totalSrcImg > 0 ? static_cast<double>(totalDstImg) / totalSrcImg : 1.0;
    traces.push_back(
        QStringLiteral("Step2 汇总: 文本召回=%1, 图片召回=%2, 背景保留=%3/%4")
            .arg(QString::number(textRecall, 'f', 2))
            .arg(QString::number(imageRecall, 'f', 2))
            .arg(totalDstBg)
            .arg(totalSrcBg)
    );
}

void appendStep3StructureMapReport(const LayoutDocument &layout, const DocumentModel &model, QStringList &traces) {
    const QVector<PageContent> pages = model.pages();
    const int count = qMin(layout.pages.size(), pages.size());
    traces.push_back(QStringLiteral("Step3 结构映射: 页=%1").arg(count));
    for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        const LayoutPage &src = layout.pages.at(i);
        const PageContent &dst = pages.at(i);
        int raster = 0;
        int vectorOrFill = 0;
        QHash<int, int> paragraphLineCounter;
        int groupedMultiLineParagraph = 0;
        int titlePlaceholder = 0;
        int subtitlePlaceholder = 0;
        int bodyPlaceholder = 0;
        int maxHierarchyLevel = 0;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : dst.graphics) {
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                raster += 1;
            } else {
                vectorOrFill += 1;
            }
        }
        for (const TextLine &line : dst.lines) {
            if (line.paragraphId > 0) {
                paragraphLineCounter[line.paragraphId] += 1;
            }
            const QString role = line.semanticRole.trimmed().toLower();
            if (role == QStringLiteral("title")) {
                titlePlaceholder += 1;
            } else if (role == QStringLiteral("subtitle")) {
                subtitlePlaceholder += 1;
            } else {
                bodyPlaceholder += 1;
            }
            maxHierarchyLevel = qMax(maxHierarchyLevel, qMax(line.semanticLevel, line.listLevel + 1));
        }
        for (auto it = paragraphLineCounter.constBegin(); it != paragraphLineCounter.constEnd(); ++it) {
            if (it.value() > 1) {
                groupedMultiLineParagraph += 1;
            }
        }
        int backgroundLayerViolations = 0;
        bool seenForeground = false;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : dst.graphics) {
            if (!g.isBackground) {
                seenForeground = true;
            } else if (seenForeground) {
                backgroundLayerViolations += 1;
            }
        }
        const double textMapRatio = countLayoutTextLines(src) > 0
            ? static_cast<double>(dst.lines.size()) / countLayoutTextLines(src)
            : 1.0;
        const double tableMapRatio = src.tables.size() > 0
            ? static_cast<double>(dst.tables.size()) / src.tables.size()
            : 1.0;
        const double structureScore = qBound(
            0.0,
            100.0 * (0.45 * qBound(0.0, textMapRatio, 1.2) / 1.0
                   + 0.25 * qBound(0.0, tableMapRatio, 1.2) / 1.0
                   + 0.20 * (paragraphLineCounter.isEmpty() ? 0.6 : 1.0)
                   + 0.10 * (backgroundLayerViolations == 0 ? 1.0 : 0.6)),
            100.0
        );
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step3 页指标: 页=%1, 目标对象(文本/图形/表格)=%2/%3/%4, 源对象(文本/图片/填充/表格)=%5/%6/%7/%8")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(dst.lines.size())
                .arg(dst.graphics.size())
                .arg(dst.tables.size())
                .arg(countLayoutTextLines(src))
                .arg(src.images.size())
                .arg(src.fills.size())
                .arg(src.tables.size())
        );
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step3 结构一致性: 页=%1, 分组(段落块/多行段)=%2/%3, 层级最大=%4, 占位符(title/subtitle/body)=%5/%6/%7, 图层违例=%8, 分值=%9")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(paragraphLineCounter.size())
                .arg(groupedMultiLineParagraph)
                .arg(maxHierarchyLevel)
                .arg(titlePlaceholder)
                .arg(subtitlePlaceholder)
                .arg(bodyPlaceholder)
                .arg(backgroundLayerViolations)
                .arg(QString::number(structureScore, 'f', 1))
        );
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step3 页证据: 页=%1, 图形拆分=光栅%2, 向量或填充%3")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(raster)
                .arg(vectorOrFill)
        );
    }
}

void appendStep4GeometryReport(const DocumentModel &model, QStringList &traces) {
    const QVector<PageContent> pages = model.pages();
    traces.push_back(QStringLiteral("Step4 几何归一: 页=%1").arg(pages.size()));
    for (int i = 0; i < pages.size(); ++i) {
        const PageContent &page = pages.at(i);
        const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
        const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
        int outOfPage = 0;
        int rotated = 0;
        int abnormal = 0;
        int cropAbnormal = 0;
        int gridMisalign = 0;
        int layerDisorder = 0;
        QStringList evidence;
        auto checkRect = [&](double x, double y, double w, double h, const QString &tag) {
            if (w <= 1.0 || h <= 1.0) {
                abnormal += 1;
                if (evidence.size() < 4) {
                    evidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("%1:尺寸过小").arg(tag));
                }
                return;
            }
            const bool out = x < -pageW * 0.03 || y < -pageH * 0.03
                || (x + w) > pageW * 1.03 || (y + h) > pageH * 1.03;
            if (out) {
                outOfPage += 1;
                if (evidence.size() < 4) {
                    evidence.push_back(
                        QStringLiteral("%1:越界(x=%2,y=%3,w=%4,h=%5)")
                            .arg(tag)
                            .arg(x, 0, 'f', 1).arg(y, 0, 'f', 1)
                            .arg(w, 0, 'f', 1).arg(h, 0, 'f', 1)
                    );
                }
            }
        };
        for (int j = 0; j < page.graphics.size(); ++j) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(j);
            checkRect(g.x, g.y, g.w, g.h, QStringLiteral("g#%1").arg(j + 1));
            if (qAbs(g.rotationDeg) >= 0.1f) {
                rotated += 1;
                const double areaRatio = (qMax(0.0f, g.w) * qMax(0.0f, g.h)) / (pageW * pageH);
                if (qAbs(g.rotationDeg) >= 20.0f && areaRatio >= 0.15 && evidence.size() < 4) {
                    evidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("g#%1:大图旋转(rot=%2,ratio=%3)")
                                           .arg(j + 1)
                                           .arg(g.rotationDeg, 0, 'f', 1)
                                           .arg(areaRatio, 0, 'f', 3));
                }
            }
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                const bool cropBad = g.cropLeft < 0.0f || g.cropTop < 0.0f
                    || g.cropRight < 0.0f || g.cropBottom < 0.0f
                    || g.cropLeft > 1.0f || g.cropTop > 1.0f
                    || g.cropRight > 1.0f || g.cropBottom > 1.0f
                    || (g.cropLeft + g.cropRight) >= 1.0f
                    || (g.cropTop + g.cropBottom) >= 1.0f;
                if (cropBad) {
                    cropAbnormal += 1;
                    if (evidence.size() < 4) {
                        evidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("g#%1:裁剪异常").arg(j + 1));
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        QVector<double> gridAnchors;
        const double gridTol = qMax(10.0, pageW * 0.025);
        for (int j = 0; j < page.lines.size(); ++j) {
            const TextLine &l = page.lines.at(j);
            checkRect(l.x, l.y, l.w, l.h, QStringLiteral("t#%1").arg(j + 1));
            const double x = static_cast<double>(l.x);
            bool matched = false;
            for (double &anchor : gridAnchors) {
                if (qAbs(anchor - x) <= gridTol) {
                    anchor = (anchor + x) * 0.5;
                    matched = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (!matched) {
                gridAnchors.push_back(x);
            }
        }
        for (const TextLine &l : page.lines) {
            if (gridAnchors.isEmpty()) {
                break;
            }
            double minDist = 1e18;
            for (const double anchor : gridAnchors) {
                minDist = qMin(minDist, qAbs(anchor - static_cast<double>(l.x)));
            }
            if (minDist > gridTol) {
                gridMisalign += 1;
            }
        }
        bool seenForeground = false;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (!g.isBackground) {
                seenForeground = true;
            } else if (seenForeground) {
                layerDisorder += 1;
            }
        }
        const int totalChecked = qMax(1, page.graphics.size() + page.lines.size());
        const double geometryScore = qBound(
            0.0,
            100.0 * (1.0 - static_cast<double>(outOfPage + abnormal + cropAbnormal + gridMisalign + layerDisorder) / totalChecked),
            100.0
        );
        if (evidence.isEmpty()) {
            evidence.push_back(QStringLiteral("无异常"));
        }
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step4 页指标: 页=%1, 越界对象=%2, 旋转图形=%3, 异常对象=%4, 裁剪异常=%5, 网格偏移=%6, 图层乱序=%7, 几何分值=%8")
                .arg(i + 1).arg(outOfPage).arg(rotated).arg(abnormal).arg(cropAbnormal).arg(gridMisalign).arg(layerDisorder)
                .arg(QString::number(geometryScore, 'f', 1))
        );
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step4 页证据: 页=%1, %2")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(evidence.join(QStringLiteral(" | ")))
        );
    }
}

void applyStep4GeometryNormalization(DocumentModel &model, QStringList &traces) {
    QVector<PageContent> pages = model.pages();
    int normalizedPageCount = 0;
    for (PageContent &page : pages) {
        const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
        const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
        int clampedRects = 0;
        int normalizedCrops = 0;
        int snappedLines = 0;

        auto clampRect = [&](float &x, float &y, float &w, float &h) {
            double dx = static_cast<double>(x);
            double dy = static_cast<double>(y);
            double dw = static_cast<double>(w);
            double dh = static_cast<double>(h);
            const double right = dx + dw;
            const double bottom = dy + dh;
            const double nx = qBound(0.0, dx, pageW);
            const double ny = qBound(0.0, dy, pageH);
            const double nr = qBound(nx, right, pageW);
            const double nb = qBound(ny, bottom, pageH);
            const double nw = qMax(1.0, nr - nx);
            const double nh = qMax(1.0, nb - ny);
            if (qAbs(nx - dx) > 1e-4 || qAbs(ny - dy) > 1e-4 || qAbs(nw - dw) > 1e-4 || qAbs(nh - dh) > 1e-4) {
                clampedRects += 1;
            }
            x = static_cast<float>(nx);
            y = static_cast<float>(ny);
            w = static_cast<float>(nw);
            h = static_cast<float>(nh);
        };

        for (GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            clampRect(g.x, g.y, g.w, g.h);
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                const double l = qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropLeft), 1.0);
                const double t = qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropTop), 1.0);
                const double r = qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropRight), 1.0);
                const double b = qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropBottom), 1.0);
                double nl = l;
                double nt = t;
                double nr = r;
                double nb = b;
                const double hSum = nl + nr;
                if (hSum >= 0.98) {
                    const double k = 0.98 / qMax(0.0001, hSum);
                    nl *= k;
                    nr *= k;
                }
                const double vSum = nt + nb;
                if (vSum >= 0.98) {
                    const double k = 0.98 / qMax(0.0001, vSum);
                    nt *= k;
                    nb *= k;
                }
                if (qAbs(nl - l) > 1e-6 || qAbs(nt - t) > 1e-6 || qAbs(nr - r) > 1e-6 || qAbs(nb - b) > 1e-6) {
                    normalizedCrops += 1;
                }
                g.cropLeft = static_cast<float>(nl);
                g.cropTop = static_cast<float>(nt);
                g.cropRight = static_cast<float>(nr);
                g.cropBottom = static_cast<float>(nb);
            }
        }
        for (TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            clampRect(line.x, line.y, line.w, line.h);
        }

        QVector<double> anchors;
        const double gridTol = qMax(8.0, pageW * 0.02);
        auto allowGridSnap = [](const TextLine &line) {
            const QString role = line.semanticRole.trimmed().toLower();
            if (line.listOrdered || !line.listMarker.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                return true;
            }
            if (role == QStringLiteral("list")
                || role == QStringLiteral("table")
                || role == QStringLiteral("table-cell-text")) {
                return true;
            }
            return false;
        };
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            if (!allowGridSnap(line)) {
                continue;
            }
            const double x = static_cast<double>(line.x);
            bool matched = false;
            for (double &anchor : anchors) {
                if (qAbs(anchor - x) <= gridTol) {
                    anchor = (anchor + x) * 0.5;
                    matched = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (!matched) {
                anchors.push_back(x);
            }
        }
        for (TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            if (!allowGridSnap(line)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (anchors.isEmpty()) {
                break;
            }
            double best = anchors.first();
            double minDist = qAbs(static_cast<double>(line.x) - best);
            for (const double anchor : anchors) {
                const double d = qAbs(static_cast<double>(line.x) - anchor);
                if (d < minDist) {
                    minDist = d;
                    best = anchor;
                }
            }
            if (minDist > 0.5 && minDist <= gridTol) {
                line.x = static_cast<float>(best);
                snappedLines += 1;
            }
        }

        std::stable_sort(page.graphics.begin(), page.graphics.end(), [](const GraphicObject &a, const GraphicObject &b) {
            if (a.isBackground != b.isBackground) {
                return a.isBackground;
            }
            return false;
        });

        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step4 归一执行: 页=%1, 坐标修正=%2, 裁剪修正=%3, 网格吸附=%4")
                .arg(page.pageIndex + 1)
                .arg(clampedRects)
                .arg(normalizedCrops)
                .arg(snappedLines)
        );
        normalizedPageCount += 1;
    }

    model.clear();
    for (PageContent &page : pages) {
        model.addPage(page);
    }
    traces.push_back(QStringLiteral("Step4 归一执行汇总: 页面=%1").arg(normalizedPageCount));
}

void appendStep5ExportWriteReport(
    const DocumentModel &model,
    const QString &outputPath,
    bool exportOk,
    qint64 elapsedMs,
    QStringList &traces
) {
    const QFileInfo outInfo(outputPath);
    const bool exists = outInfo.exists() && outInfo.isFile();
    const qint64 bytes = exists ? outInfo.size() : 0;
    int editableParagraphs = 0;
    int editableTables = 0;
    int chartObjects = 0;
    int rasterOnlyPages = 0;
    for (const PageContent &page : model.pages()) {
        QSet<int> paragraphIds;
        int textLineCount = 0;
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            bool hasText = false;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (!span.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    hasText = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (!hasText) {
                continue;
            }
            textLineCount += 1;
            if (line.paragraphId > 0) {
                paragraphIds.insert(line.paragraphId);
            }
        }
        editableParagraphs += paragraphIds.isEmpty() ? textLineCount : paragraphIds.size();
        editableTables += page.tables.size();
        int nonBgRaster = 0;
        int nonRaster = 0;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.semanticRole.trimmed().toLower() == QStringLiteral("chart")) {
                chartObjects += 1;
            }
            if (g.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                nonBgRaster += 1;
            } else {
                nonRaster += 1;
            }
        }
        if (textLineCount == 0 && page.tables.isEmpty() && nonRaster == 0 && nonBgRaster > 0) {
            rasterOnlyPages += 1;
        }
    }
    const int totalPages = model.pages().size();
    const double editablePriorityScore = qBound(
        0.0,
        100.0 * (0.45 * (editableParagraphs > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.0)
               + 0.25 * (editableTables > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.0)
               + 0.20 * (chartObjects > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.0)
               + 0.10 * (totalPages > 0 ? (1.0 - static_cast<double>(rasterOnlyPages) / totalPages) : 1.0)),
        100.0
    );
    traces.push_back(
        QStringLiteral("Step5 导出写入: ok=%1, 输出=%2, 文件存在=%3, 大小=%4 bytes, 耗时=%5 ms, 页=%6")
            .arg(exportOk ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(outputPath)
            .arg(exists ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(bytes)
            .arg(elapsedMs)
            .arg(model.pages().size())
    );
    traces.push_back(
        QStringLiteral("Step5 可编辑优先: 文本段=%1, 表格=%2, 图表对象=%3, 栅格化风险页=%4/%5, 分值=%6")
            .arg(editableParagraphs)
            .arg(editableTables)
            .arg(chartObjects)
            .arg(rasterOnlyPages)
            .arg(totalPages)
            .arg(QString::number(editablePriorityScore, 'f', 1))
    );
    if (rasterOnlyPages > 0) {
        traces.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("Step5 写入告警: 发现疑似栅格化页面=%1，建议回溯 Step1~Step3 补对象语义与结构映射")
                .arg(rasterOnlyPages)
        );
    }
}

void appendStep6PackageRegressionStub(const StageContext &context, QStringList &traces) {
    Q_UNUSED(context);
    traces.push_back(QStringLiteral("Step6 包内回归: 状态=未执行, 原因=当前仅执行导出流程，未触发安装包构建与运行时回归"));
}

} // namespace

StageResult PptConversionEngine::run(StageContext &context, ToolExecutor &executor) const {
    LayoutDocument layout;
    QString extractError;
    QStringList extractDiags;
    if (!extractor.extract(context.task.inputPdf, executor, layout, extractError, false, &extractDiags)) {
        for (const QString &line : extractDiags) {
            context.traces.push_back(line);
        }
        const QString reason = extractError.isEmpty()
            ? QStringLiteral("PPT 抽取失败：未获取到版面对象")
            : extractError;
        return {StageStatus::FatalFailure, QStringLiteral("native_layout_export"), reason};
    }
    for (const QString &line : extractDiags) {
        context.traces.push_back(line);
    }
    const PptRecognitionGateResult gate = PptRecognitionGate::evaluate(layout, extractDiags);
    for (const QString &line : gate.logs) {
        context.traces.push_back(line);
    }
    if (!gate.pass) {
        return {
            StageStatus::FatalFailure,
            QStringLiteral("native_layout_export"),
            gate.reason
        };
    }

    context.document = PptDocumentMapper::build(layout);
    PptTypeNormalizer::normalize(context.document, context.traces);
    appendStep2RecognitionModelReport(layout, context.document, context.traces);
    appendStep3StructureMapReport(layout, context.document, context.traces);
    applyStep4GeometryNormalization(context.document, context.traces);
    appendStep4GeometryReport(context.document, context.traces);
    if (context.document.pages().isEmpty()) {
        return {
            StageStatus::FatalFailure,
            QStringLiteral("native_layout_export"),
            QStringLiteral("PPT 映射失败：未生成任何页面")
        };
    }
    const PptPageDiffResult diff = PptPageDiffEvaluator::evaluate(layout, context.document);
    for (const QString &line : diff.logs) {
        context.traces.push_back(line);
    }
    if (!diff.pass) {
        context.traces.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT DoD 质检告警：失败页=%1（继续导出）").arg(diff.failedPages));
    }

    const IDocumentExporter *exporter = exporterRegistry.find(OutputFormat::Pptx);
    if (exporter == nullptr) {
        return {
            StageStatus::FatalFailure,
            QStringLiteral("native_layout_export"),
            QStringLiteral("PPT 导出失败：找不到 PptxExporter")
        };
    }

    const QString outputPath = resolveOutputPath(context.task);
    QStringList exportLogs;
    QElapsedTimer exportTimer;
    exportTimer.start();
    const bool exportOk = exporter->exportDocument(context.document, outputPath, executor, exportLogs);
    const qint64 exportElapsedMs = exportTimer.elapsed();
    for (const QString &line : exportLogs) {
        context.traces.append(line);
    }
    appendStep5ExportWriteReport(context.document, outputPath, exportOk, exportElapsedMs, context.traces);
    appendStep6PackageRegressionStub(context, context.traces);
    if (!exportOk) {
        QString failureDetail = QStringLiteral("未生成有效文件");
        auto isGenericFailure = [](const QString &line) {
            return line.contains(QStringLiteral("原生导出引擎未生成有效文件"));
        };
        for (int i = exportLogs.size() - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
            const QString line = exportLogs.at(i).trimmed();
            if (line.isEmpty() || isGenericFailure(line)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (line.contains(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2")) && (line.contains(QStringLiteral("失败")) || line.contains(QStringLiteral("门禁")))) {
                failureDetail = line;
                break;
            }
        }
        for (int i = exportLogs.size() - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
            const QString line = exportLogs.at(i).trimmed();
            if (line.isEmpty() || isGenericFailure(line)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (line.contains(QStringLiteral("失败")) || line.contains(QStringLiteral("门禁"))) {
                failureDetail = line;
                break;
            }
        }
        return {
            StageStatus::FatalFailure,
            QStringLiteral("native_layout_export"),
            QStringLiteral("PPT 导出失败：%1").arg(failureDetail)
        };
    }

    context.generatedOutputPath = outputPath;
    return {StageStatus::Success, QStringLiteral("native_layout_export"), QStringLiteral("PPT 导出成功")};
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptConversionEngine.h

#pragma once

#include "core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h"
#include "core/application/DocumentExporter.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/recognition/PdfLayoutExtractor.h"
#include "core/platform/tools/ToolExecutor.h"

namespace converter {

class PptConversionEngine final {
public:
    StageResult run(StageContext &context, ToolExecutor &executor) const;

private:
    PdfLayoutExtractor extractor;
    ExporterRegistry exporterRegistry;
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptDocumentMapper.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptDocumentMapper.h"

#include <QtGlobal>
#include <algorithm>

#include "PptGraphicMapper.h"
#include "PptTableMapper.h"
#include "PptTextMapper.h"

namespace converter {

namespace {

void promoteLikelyBackgroundRaster(PageContent &page) {
    const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
    const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
    const double pageArea = pageW * pageH;
    int bestIdx = -1;
    double bestScore = 0.0;
    for (int i = 0; i < page.graphics.size(); ++i) {
        const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(i);
        if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            continue;
        }
        const double areaRatio = (qMax(0.0f, g.w) * qMax(0.0f, g.h)) / pageArea;
        const double centerDx = qAbs((g.x + g.w * 0.5) - pageW * 0.5) / pageW;
        const double centerDy = qAbs((g.y + g.h * 0.5) - pageH * 0.5) / pageH;
        const bool nearCenter = centerDx <= 0.15 && centerDy <= 0.15;
        if (areaRatio < 0.55 || !nearCenter) {
            continue;
        }
        const double score = areaRatio - (centerDx + centerDy) * 0.2;
        if (score > bestScore) {
            bestScore = score;
            bestIdx = i;
        }
    }
    if (bestIdx >= 0) {
        page.graphics[bestIdx].isBackground = true;
    }
}

void sortGraphicsByLayer(PageContent &page) {
    std::stable_sort(page.graphics.begin(), page.graphics.end(), [](const GraphicObject &a, const GraphicObject &b) {
        if (a.isBackground != b.isBackground) {
            return a.isBackground;
        }
        // Keep source-order for same layer to preserve multi-layer overlaps.
        return false;
    });
}

void finalizePageLayering(PageContent &page) {
    promoteLikelyBackgroundRaster(page);
    sortGraphicsByLayer(page);
}

} // namespace

DocumentModel PptDocumentMapper::build(const LayoutDocument &layout) {
    DocumentModel document;
    for (const LayoutPage &srcPage : layout.pages) {
        PageContent page;
        page.pageIndex = srcPage.pageIndex;
        page.width = static_cast<float>(srcPage.width);
        page.height = static_cast<float>(srcPage.height);

        PptTextMapper::appendFromLayoutPage(srcPage, page);
        PptGraphicMapper::appendImages(srcPage, page);
        PptGraphicMapper::appendFills(srcPage, page);
        PptTableMapper::appendFromLayoutPage(srcPage, page);
        finalizePageLayering(page);

        document.addPage(page);
    }
    return document;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptDocumentMapper.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"
#include "core/domain/model/LayoutModel.h"

namespace converter {

class PptDocumentMapper final {
public:
    static DocumentModel build(const LayoutDocument &layout);
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptGraphicMapper.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptGraphicMapper.h"

#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

void PptGraphicMapper::appendImages(const LayoutPage &srcPage, PageContent &dstPage) {
    for (const LayoutImage &srcImage : srcPage.images) {
        if (srcImage.path.trimmed().isEmpty() || srcImage.box.w <= 0.0 || srcImage.box.h <= 0.0) {
            continue;
        }
        const QFileInfo imageFile(srcImage.path);
        if (!imageFile.exists() || !imageFile.isFile()) {
            continue;
        }
        GraphicObject image;
        image.kind = GraphicKind::RasterImage;
        image.x = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.x);
        image.y = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.y);
        image.w = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.w);
        image.h = static_cast<float>(srcImage.box.h);
        image.opacity = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcImage.opacity, 1.0));
        image.isBackground = srcImage.isBackground;
        image.rotationDeg = static_cast<float>(srcImage.rotationDeg);
        image.flipH = srcImage.flipH;
        image.flipV = srcImage.flipV;
        image.cropLeft = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcImage.cropLeft, 1.0));
        image.cropTop = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcImage.cropTop, 1.0));
        image.cropRight = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcImage.cropRight, 1.0));
        image.cropBottom = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcImage.cropBottom, 1.0));
        image.imagePath = imageFile.absoluteFilePath();
        image.semanticRole = srcImage.isBackground ? QStringLiteral("background") : QStringLiteral("image");
        image.semanticEvidence = srcImage.isBackground
            ? QStringLiteral("layout-image-background")
            : QStringLiteral("layout-image");
        dstPage.graphics.push_back(image);
    }
}

void PptGraphicMapper::appendFills(const LayoutPage &srcPage, PageContent &dstPage) {
    for (const LayoutFillShape &srcFill : srcPage.fills) {
        if (srcFill.box.w <= 0.0 || srcFill.box.h <= 0.0) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString color = srcFill.fillColor.trimmed();
        if (color.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        GraphicObject rect;
        const QString shapeType = srcFill.shapeType.trimmed().toLower();
        rect.kind = shapeType == QStringLiteral("roundrect")
            ? GraphicKind::RoundedRectangle
            : (shapeType == QStringLiteral("path") ? GraphicKind::Path : GraphicKind::Rectangle);
        rect.x = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.x);
        rect.y = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.y);
        rect.w = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.w);
        rect.h = static_cast<float>(srcFill.box.h);
        rect.opacity = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, srcFill.opacity, 1.0));
        rect.isBackground = srcFill.isBackground;
        rect.fillColor = color;
        rect.strokeColor = color;
        rect.hasGradientFill = srcFill.hasGradient && !srcFill.fillColor2.trimmed().isEmpty();
        rect.fillColor2 = srcFill.fillColor2.trimmed();
        rect.fillGradientAngle = static_cast<float>(srcFill.gradientAngle);
        rect.cornerRadius = static_cast<float>(qMax(0.0, srcFill.cornerRadius));
        rect.semanticRole = srcFill.isBackground ? QStringLiteral("background") : QStringLiteral("decoration");
        rect.semanticEvidence = srcFill.isBackground
            ? QStringLiteral("layout-fill-background")
            : QStringLiteral("layout-fill-shape");
        dstPage.graphics.push_back(rect);
    }
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptGraphicMapper.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    static void appendFills(const LayoutPage &srcPage, PageContent &dstPage);

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptPageDiffEvaluator.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptPageDiffEvaluator.h"

#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

namespace {

int countSourceTextLines(const LayoutPage &page) {
    int n = 0;
    for (const LayoutBlock &b : page.blocks) {
        for (const LayoutLine &l : b.lines) {
            bool nonEmpty = false;
            for (const LayoutTextRun &r : l.runs) {
                if (!r.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    nonEmpty = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (nonEmpty) {
                n += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    return n;
}

int countTargetTextLines(const PageContent &page) {
    int n = 0;
    for (const TextLine &l : page.lines) {
        for (const TextSpan &s : l.spans) {
            if (!s.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                n += 1;
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    return n;
}

int countSourceBg(const LayoutPage &page) {
    int n = page.fills.size();
    for (const LayoutImage &img : page.images) {
        if (img.isBackground) {
            n += 1;
        }
    }
    return n;
}

int countTargetBg(const PageContent &page) {
    int n = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground) {
            n += 1;
        }
    }
    return n;
}

int countSourceImages(const LayoutPage &page) {
    int n = 0;
    for (const LayoutImage &img : page.images) {
        if (!img.isBackground) {
            n += 1;
        }
    }
    return n;
}

int countTargetImages(const PageContent &page) {
    int n = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage && !g.isBackground) {
            n += 1;
        }
    }
    return n;
}

} // namespace

PptPageDiffResult PptPageDiffEvaluator::evaluate(const LayoutDocument &sourceLayout, const DocumentModel &exportModel) {
    PptPageDiffResult out;
    const QVector<PageContent> targetPages = exportModel.pages();
    const int pageCount = qMin(sourceLayout.pages.size(), targetPages.size());
    if (pageCount <= 0) {
        out.pass = false;
        out.failedPages = 1;
        out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT DoD 质检失败: 无可比对页面"));
        return out;
    }

    int totalSrcText = 0;
    int totalDstText = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < pageCount; ++i) {
        const LayoutPage &src = sourceLayout.pages.at(i);
        const PageContent &dst = targetPages.at(i);
        const int srcText = countSourceTextLines(src);
        const int dstText = countTargetTextLines(dst);
        totalSrcText += srcText;
        totalDstText += dstText;
        const int srcBg = countSourceBg(src);
        const int dstBg = countTargetBg(dst);
        const int srcImg = countSourceImages(src);
        const int dstImg = countTargetImages(dst);
        const int srcTbl = src.tables.size();
        const int dstTbl = dst.tables.size();

        const double textRatio = srcText > 0 ? static_cast<double>(dstText) / srcText : 1.0;
        const double imgRatio = srcImg > 0 ? static_cast<double>(dstImg) / srcImg : 1.0;
        const bool bgOk = srcBg == 0 ? true : (dstBg > 0);
        const bool tableOk = srcTbl == dstTbl;
        const bool textOk = srcText == 0 ? true : (textRatio >= 0.75);
        const bool imageOk = srcImg == 0 ? true : (imgRatio >= 0.65);

        const bool pagePass = bgOk && tableOk && textOk && imageOk;
        if (!pagePass) {
            out.failedPages += 1;
        }
        out.logs.push_back(
            QStringLiteral("PPT DoD Diff 页%1: text=%2/%3(%4), bg=%5/%6, img=%7/%8(%9), table=%10/%11, pass=%12")
                .arg(i + 1)
                .arg(dstText).arg(srcText)
                .arg(QString::number(textRatio, 'f', 2))
                .arg(dstBg).arg(srcBg)
                .arg(dstImg).arg(srcImg)
                .arg(QString::number(imgRatio, 'f', 2))
                .arg(dstTbl).arg(srcTbl)
                .arg(pagePass ? 1 : 0)
        );
    }
    bool forceFail = false;
    if (totalSrcText == 0) {
        forceFail = true;
        out.failedPages = qMax(1, out.failedPages);
        out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT DoD 质检失败: 抽取文本总量为0，判定为源头抽取异常"));
    }
    out.pass = (!forceFail && out.failedPages == 0);
    out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("PPT DoD 质检汇总: 页=%1, 失败页=%2, 通过=%3")
                           .arg(pageCount)
                           .arg(out.failedPages)
                           .arg(out.pass ? 1 : 0));
    return out;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptPageDiffEvaluator.h
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pragma once

#include <QStringList>

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"
#include "core/domain/model/LayoutModel.h"

namespace converter {

struct PptPageDiffResult {
    bool pass = true;
    int failedPages = 0;
    QStringList logs;
};

class PptPageDiffEvaluator final {
public:
    static PptPageDiffResult evaluate(const LayoutDocument &sourceLayout, const DocumentModel &exportModel);
};

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptRecognitionGate.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptRecognitionGate.h"

#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

namespace {

struct LayoutCounters {
    int pages = 0;
    int textLines = 0;
    int tables = 0;
    int images = 0;
    int fills = 0;
};

LayoutCounters countLayout(const LayoutDocument &layout) {
    LayoutCounters c;
    c.pages = layout.pages.size();
    for (const LayoutPage &p : layout.pages) {
        c.tables += p.tables.size();
        c.images += p.images.size();
        c.fills += p.fills.size();
        for (const LayoutBlock &b : p.blocks) {
            for (const LayoutLine &l : b.lines) {
                for (const LayoutTextRun &r : l.runs) {
                    if (!r.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                        c.textLines += 1;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return c;
}

bool hasDiagPrefix(const QStringList &diags, const QString &prefix) {
    for (const QString &line : diags) {
        if (line.startsWith(prefix)) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

QString firstDiag(const QStringList &diags, const QString &prefix) {
    for (const QString &line : diags) {
        if (line.startsWith(prefix)) {
            return line;
        }
    }
    return QString();
}

bool hasDiagContains(const QStringList &diags, const QString &needle) {
    for (const QString &line : diags) {
        if (line.contains(needle)) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

QString firstDiagContains(const QStringList &diags, const QString &needle) {
    for (const QString &line : diags) {
        if (line.contains(needle)) {
            return line;
        }
    }
    return QString();
}

} // namespace

PptRecognitionGateResult PptRecognitionGate::evaluate(const LayoutDocument &layout, const QStringList &extractDiagnostics) {
    PptRecognitionGateResult out;
    const LayoutCounters c = countLayout(layout);

    out.logs = extractDiagnostics;
    out.logs.push_back(
        QStringLiteral("识别门禁统计: 页=%1, 文本行=%2, 表格=%3, 图片=%4, 填充=%5")
            .arg(c.pages).arg(c.textLines).arg(c.tables).arg(c.images).arg(c.fills)
    );

    if (c.pages <= 0) {
        out.pass = false;
        out.reason = QStringLiteral("识别失败: 未识别到任何页面");
        return out;
    }

    const QString bboxLine = firstDiag(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox"));
    const QString xmlLine = firstDiag(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取C xml"));
    const bool hasBBoxEvidence = hasDiagPrefix(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox: exit=0"));
    const bool hasXmlEvidence = hasDiagPrefix(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取C xml-file: exit=0"))
        || hasDiagPrefix(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取C xml-stdout:"));
    const bool bboxFallbackToEmptyGeometry = hasDiagPrefix(
        extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取B 回退: allowPlainTextFallback=0, 使用空页几何")
    );
    const bool bboxToolCrash = hasDiagContains(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("std::out_of_range"))
        || hasDiagContains(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取B bbox: started=1, exit=6"));

    // 识别第一步硬门禁：bbox 失败并进入空页几何回退时，必须中断，禁止继续导出“伪成功”。
    if (bboxFallbackToEmptyGeometry || bboxToolCrash) {
        out.pass = false;
        out.reason = QStringLiteral("识别失败: bbox链路异常（工具崩溃或回退空页几何），已阻断导出，请先修复pdftotext -bbox-layout");
        const QString crashLine = firstDiagContains(extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("std::out_of_range"));
        const QString fallbackLine = firstDiag(
            extractDiagnostics, QStringLiteral("抽取B 回退: allowPlainTextFallback=0, 使用空页几何")
        );
        if (!bboxLine.isEmpty()) {
            out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("识别门禁证据: %1").arg(bboxLine));
        }
        if (!crashLine.isEmpty()) {
            out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("识别门禁证据: %1").arg(crashLine));
        }
        if (!fallbackLine.isEmpty()) {
            out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("识别门禁证据: %1").arg(fallbackLine));
        }
        return out;
    }

    if (c.textLines == 0) {
        out.pass = false;
        out.reason = QStringLiteral("识别失败: 文本行总量为0（bbox/xml未产出可用文本）");
        if (!bboxLine.isEmpty()) {
            out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("识别门禁证据: %1").arg(bboxLine));
        }
        if (!xmlLine.isEmpty()) {
            out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("识别门禁证据: %1").arg(xmlLine));
        }
        if (!hasBBoxEvidence) {
            out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("识别门禁结论: bbox链路未形成有效证据"));
        }
        if (!hasXmlEvidence) {
            out.logs.push_back(QStringLiteral("识别门禁结论: xml链路未形成有效证据"));
        }
        return out;
    }

    // 至少要有一种非文本对象，避免“仅文本骨架”伪成功。
    if (c.images == 0 && c.fills == 0 && c.tables == 0) {
        out.pass = false;
        out.reason = QStringLiteral("识别失败: 非文本对象全空（图片/填充/表格均为0）");
        return out;
    }

    out.pass = true;
    out.reason = QStringLiteral("识别门禁通过");
    return out;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptTableMapper.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptTableMapper.h"

#include <cmath>
#include <QtGlobal>
#include <QVector>
#include <algorithm>

namespace converter {

namespace {

bool looksLikeRealTable(const LayoutTable &srcTable) {
    if (srcTable.rowCount < 2 || srcTable.colCount < 2) {
        return false;
    }
    if (srcTable.cells.size() < qMax(4, (srcTable.rowCount * srcTable.colCount) / 2)) {
        return false;
    }
    QVector<int> rowCoverage(srcTable.rowCount, 0);
    for (const LayoutTableCell &cell : srcTable.cells) {
        if (cell.row >= 0 && cell.row < rowCoverage.size()) {
            rowCoverage[cell.row] += 1;
        }
    }
    int rowsWithMultiCells = 0;
    for (const int n : rowCoverage) {
        if (n >= 2) {
            rowsWithMultiCells += 1;
        }
    }
    if (rowsWithMultiCells < qMax(2, static_cast<int>(std::ceil(srcTable.rowCount * 0.5)))) {
        return false;
    }
    return true;
}

} // namespace

void PptTableMapper::appendFromLayoutPage(const LayoutPage &srcPage, PageContent &dstPage) {
    for (const LayoutTable &srcTable : srcPage.tables) {
        if (srcTable.rowCount <= 0 || srcTable.colCount <= 0 || srcTable.cells.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!looksLikeRealTable(srcTable)) {
            continue;
        }
        TableObject table;
        table.rowCount = srcTable.rowCount;
        table.colCount = srcTable.colCount;
        table.x = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.x);
        table.y = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.y);
        table.w = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.w);
        table.h = static_cast<float>(srcTable.box.h);
        table.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("table");
        table.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("layout-table");
        table.cells.reserve(srcTable.cells.size());
        for (const LayoutTableCell &srcCell : srcTable.cells) {
            TableCellObject cell;
            cell.row = srcCell.row;
            cell.col = srcCell.col;
            cell.rowSpan = qMax(1, srcCell.rowSpan);
            cell.colSpan = qMax(1, srcCell.colSpan);
            cell.text = srcCell.text;
            cell.x = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.x);
            cell.y = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.y);
            cell.w = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.w);
            cell.h = static_cast<float>(srcCell.box.h);
            cell.textAlign = srcCell.textAlign.trimmed();
            cell.verticalAlign = srcCell.verticalAlign.trimmed();
            cell.fillColor = srcCell.fillColor.trimmed();
            cell.textColor = srcCell.textColor.trimmed();
            cell.borderColor = srcCell.borderColor.trimmed();
            cell.borderWidth = static_cast<float>(qMax(0.2, srcCell.borderWidth));
            cell.bold = srcCell.bold;
            cell.italic = srcCell.italic;
            cell.fontSize = static_cast<float>(qMax(8.0, srcCell.fontSize));
            cell.fontFamily = srcCell.fontFamily.trimmed();
            table.cells.push_back(cell);
        }
        dstPage.tables.push_back(table);
    }
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptTextMapper.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptTextMapper.h"

#include <QtGlobal>

namespace converter {

void PptTextMapper::appendFromLayoutPage(const LayoutPage &srcPage, PageContent &dstPage) {
    for (const LayoutBlock &block : srcPage.blocks) {
        for (const LayoutLine &srcLine : block.lines) {
            TextLine line;
            line.x = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.x);
            line.y = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.y);
            line.w = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.w);
            line.h = static_cast<float>(srcLine.box.h);
            line.paragraphAlign = srcLine.paragraphAlign.trimmed();
            line.indentPt = static_cast<float>(srcLine.indentPt);
            line.listLevel = qMax(0, srcLine.listLevel);
            line.listOrdered = srcLine.listOrdered;
            line.listMarker = srcLine.listMarker.trimmed();
            line.semanticRole = block.type.trimmed().toLower();
            if (line.semanticRole.isEmpty()) {
                line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("paragraph");
            }
            if (line.listOrdered || !line.listMarker.isEmpty()) {
                line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("list");
                line.semanticLevel = line.listLevel + 1;
            }
            line.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("layout-block:%1").arg(block.type.trimmed().isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("unknown") : block.type.trimmed());
            line.paragraphId = 0;
            line.paragraphLineIndex = 0;
            line.paragraphLineCount = 1;
            line.listStyle = line.listOrdered ? QStringLiteral("arabic-period") : QStringLiteral("bullet");
            line.listOrdinal = 0;
            line.footnoteRefId = 0;
            line.footnoteDefId = 0;
            line.paragraphSpaceBeforePt = 0.0f;
            line.paragraphSpaceAfterPt = 0.0f;
            line.paragraphFirstLineIndentPt = 0.0f;
            line.paragraphColumn = 0;
            line.paragraphColumnBreakBefore = false;

            for (const LayoutTextRun &srcRun : srcLine.runs) {
                if (srcRun.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                TextSpan span;
                span.text = srcRun.text;
                span.confidence = 1.0f;
                span.x = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.x);
                span.y = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.y);
                span.w = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.w);
                span.h = static_cast<float>(srcRun.box.h);
                span.fontSize = static_cast<float>(srcRun.fontSize);
                span.fontFamily = srcRun.fontFamily;
                span.bold = srcRun.bold;
                span.italic = srcRun.italic;
                span.color = srcRun.color;
                span.lineHeight = static_cast<float>(srcRun.lineHeight);
                line.spans.push_back(span);
            }
            if (!line.spans.isEmpty()) {
                dstPage.lines.push_back(line);
            }
        }
    }
}

} // namespace converter
