──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptTypeNormalizer.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "PptTypeNormalizer.h"

#include <QFontDatabase>
#include <QHash>
#include <QRectF>
#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QtGlobal>
#include <algorithm>

namespace converter {

namespace {

QString mergeLineTextForQuality(const TextLine &line) {
    QStringList tokens;
    tokens.reserve(line.spans.size());
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString text = span.text.simplified();
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            tokens.push_back(text);
        }
    }
    return tokens.join(' ').simplified();
}

QString preferredUiCjkFont() {
    static const QString cached = []() {
        const QStringList available = QFontDatabase::families();
        const QStringList preferred{
            QStringLiteral("PingFang SC"),
            QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei"),
            QStringLiteral("Heiti SC"),
            QStringLiteral("SimHei"),
            QStringLiteral("SimSun")
        };
        for (const QString &candidate : preferred) {
            for (const QString &family : available) {
                if (family.compare(candidate, Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                    return family;
                }
            }
        }
        return QStringLiteral("Arial");
    }();
    return cached;
}

int countMeaningfulTextLines(const PageContent &page) {
    int count = 0;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        if (!mergeLineTextForQuality(line).isEmpty()) {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    return count;
}

bool hasNearFullPageRaster(const PageContent &page) {
    const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
    const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            continue;
        }
        const double gx = static_cast<double>(g.x);
        const double gy = static_cast<double>(g.y);
        const double gw = static_cast<double>(g.w);
        const double gh = static_cast<double>(g.h);
        const bool nearFull = gw >= pageW * 0.92
            && gh >= pageH * 0.92
            && gx <= pageW * 0.04
            && gy <= pageH * 0.04;
        if (nearFull) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

double estimateLineFont(const TextLine &line) {
    double font = qMax(8.0, static_cast<double>(line.h) * 0.85);
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        if (span.fontSize > 0.0f) {
            font = qMax(font, static_cast<double>(span.fontSize));
        }
    }
    return font;
}

QString inferListStyle(const QString &markerOrText, bool ordered) {
    const QString s = markerOrText.trimmed();
    if (!ordered) {
        return QStringLiteral("bullet");
    }
    static const QRegularExpression kArabicParen(QStringLiteral(R"(^\(?\d+\))"));
    static const QRegularExpression kArabicPeriod(QStringLiteral(R"(^\d+\.)"));
    static const QRegularExpression kAlphaLower(QStringLiteral(R"(^[a-zA-Z][\.\)])"));
    static const QRegularExpression kRomanLower(QStringLiteral(R"(^(?=[ivxlcdmIVXLCDM]+[\.\)])([ivxlcdmIVXLCDM]+)[\.\)])"));
    if (kArabicParen.match(s).hasMatch()) {
        return QStringLiteral("arabic-paren");
    }
    if (kArabicPeriod.match(s).hasMatch()) {
        return QStringLiteral("arabic-period");
    }
    if (kRomanLower.match(s).hasMatch()) {
        return QStringLiteral("roman-lower");
    }
    if (kAlphaLower.match(s).hasMatch()) {
        return QStringLiteral("alpha-lower");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("arabic-period");
}

int inferOrderedOrdinal(const QString &markerOrText) {
    static const QRegularExpression kNum(QStringLiteral(R"((\d+))"));
    const auto m = kNum.match(markerOrText);
    if (m.hasMatch()) {
        return qMax(1, m.captured(1).toInt());
    }
    return 1;
}

int classifyListLevel(const TextLine &line, float pageWidth) {
    const float indent = qMax(0.0f, line.indentPt);
    const float left = qMax(0.0f, line.x);
    const float norm = pageWidth > 1.0f ? (left / pageWidth) : 0.0f;
    const int indentLevel = static_cast<int>(indent / 14.0f);
    const int xLevel = static_cast<int>(norm / 0.08f);
    return qBound(0, qMax(indentLevel, xLevel), 5);
}

int inferColumnIdForLine(const TextLine &line, float pageWidth) {
    if (pageWidth <= 1.0f) {
        return 0;
    }
    const float widthRatio = line.w / pageWidth;
    const float center = (line.x + line.w * 0.5f) / pageWidth;
    if (widthRatio >= 0.55f) {
        return 0;
    }
    if (center <= 0.46f) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (center >= 0.54f) {
        return 2;
    }
    return 0;
}

bool looksNumericLike(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression kNumLike(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[-+]?\d+([.,]\d+)?\s*[%xX]?\s*$)"));
    return kNumLike.match(text).hasMatch();
}

void assignObjectSemanticRoles(PageContent &page, QStringList &traces) {
    int tableCount = 0;
    for (TableObject &table : page.tables) {
        if (table.semanticRole.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            table.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("table");
        }
        if (table.semanticEvidence.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            table.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("table-grid");
        }
        tableCount += 1;
    }

    int numericLineCount = 0;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        const QString text = mergeLineTextForQuality(line);
        if (!text.isEmpty() && looksNumericLike(text)) {
            numericLineCount += 1;
        }
    }
    const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width) * static_cast<double>(page.height));
    QRectF chartCandidateBounds;
    int vectorCandidateCount = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground || g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRectF rect(g.x, g.y, g.w, g.h);
        if (rect.width() <= 1.0 || rect.height() <= 1.0) {
            continue;
        }
        const double ratio = (rect.width() * rect.height()) / pageArea;
        if (ratio < 0.002 || ratio > 0.35) {
            continue;
        }
        if (vectorCandidateCount == 0) {
            chartCandidateBounds = rect;
        } else {
            chartCandidateBounds = chartCandidateBounds.united(rect);
        }
        vectorCandidateCount += 1;
    }
    const double chartBoundsRatio = (chartCandidateBounds.width() * chartCandidateBounds.height()) / pageArea;
    const bool chartLikely = vectorCandidateCount >= 4
        && numericLineCount >= 2
        && chartBoundsRatio >= 0.08
        && chartBoundsRatio <= 0.92;

    int backgroundCount = 0;
    int imageCount = 0;
    int chartCount = 0;
    int decorationCount = 0;
    for (GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        const QRectF rect(g.x, g.y, g.w, g.h);
        if (g.isBackground) {
            g.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("background");
            g.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("background-layer");
            backgroundCount += 1;
            continue;
        }
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            g.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("image");
            if (g.semanticEvidence.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                g.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("raster-image");
            }
            imageCount += 1;
            continue;
        }
        const bool inChartRegion = chartLikely && rect.intersects(chartCandidateBounds);
        if (inChartRegion) {
            g.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("chart");
            g.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("chart-heuristic");
            chartCount += 1;
        } else {
            g.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("decoration");
            if (g.semanticEvidence.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                g.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("vector-decoration");
            }
            decorationCount += 1;
        }
    }

    traces.append(
        QStringLiteral("PPT 对象语义: 页=%1, table=%2, chart=%3, decoration=%4, background=%5, image=%6, chart证据(vector=%7,numericText=%8,boundsRatio=%9)")
            .arg(page.pageIndex + 1)
            .arg(tableCount)
            .arg(chartCount)
            .arg(decorationCount)
            .arg(backgroundCount)
            .arg(imageCount)
            .arg(vectorCandidateCount)
            .arg(numericLineCount)
            .arg(QString::number(chartBoundsRatio, 'f', 3))
    );
}

void attachFootnoteEvidence(PageContent &page, QStringList &traces) {
    static const QRegularExpression kDefPattern(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*(?:\[(\d+)\]|（(\d+)）|(\d+)[\.\)]?)\s+)"));
    static const QRegularExpression kRefPattern(QStringLiteral(R"((?:\[(\d+)\]|（(\d+)）|(?<!\d)(\d+)(?!\d)))"));
    QHash<int, int> footnoteDefinitionLineById;
    int refCount = 0;
    int defCount = 0;
    int unresolvedRef = 0;

    for (int i = 0; i < page.lines.size(); ++i) {
        TextLine &line = page.lines[i];
        const QString text = mergeLineTextForQuality(line);
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const auto defMatch = kDefPattern.match(text);
        if (line.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("annotation") && defMatch.hasMatch()) {
            int id = 0;
            for (int g = 1; g <= 3; ++g) {
                const QString cap = defMatch.captured(g);
                if (!cap.isEmpty()) {
                    id = cap.toInt();
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (id > 0) {
                line.footnoteDefId = id;
                line.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("footer-definition");
                footnoteDefinitionLineById.insert(id, i);
                defCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }

    for (int i = 0; i < page.lines.size(); ++i) {
        TextLine &line = page.lines[i];
        if (line.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("annotation")) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString text = mergeLineTextForQuality(line);
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const auto it = kRefPattern.globalMatch(text);
        QRegularExpressionMatchIterator iter = it;
        while (iter.hasNext()) {
            const auto m = iter.next();
            int id = 0;
            for (int g = 1; g <= 3; ++g) {
                const QString cap = m.captured(g);
                if (!cap.isEmpty()) {
                    id = cap.toInt();
                    break;
                }
            }
            if (id <= 0 || id > 99) {
                continue;
            }
            line.footnoteRefId = id;
            refCount += 1;
            if (!footnoteDefinitionLineById.contains(id)) {
                unresolvedRef += 1;
            }
            break;
        }
    }
    traces.append(
        QStringLiteral("PPT 脚注锚点: 页=%1, 定义=%2, 引用=%3, 未闭合引用=%4")
            .arg(page.pageIndex + 1)
            .arg(defCount)
            .arg(refCount)
            .arg(unresolvedRef)
    );
}

void assignParagraphBlocks(PageContent &page, QStringList &traces) {
    if (page.lines.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    int nextParagraphId = 1;
    int blockCount = 0;
    int maxLinesInBlock = 0;
    int columnBreakCount = 0;
    QVector<int> columnIds(page.lines.size(), 0);
    for (int idx = 0; idx < page.lines.size(); ++idx) {
        columnIds[idx] = inferColumnIdForLine(page.lines.at(idx), page.width);
    }
    int i = 0;
    while (i < page.lines.size()) {
        TextLine &seed = page.lines[i];
        const int seedColumn = columnIds.value(i, 0);
        if (seed.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("title")
            || seed.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("subtitle")
            || seed.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("annotation")
            || seed.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("list")) {
            seed.paragraphId = nextParagraphId++;
            seed.paragraphLineIndex = 0;
            seed.paragraphLineCount = 1;
            seed.paragraphColumn = seedColumn;
            seed.paragraphColumnBreakBefore = i > 0 && seedColumn != columnIds.value(i - 1, seedColumn);
            i += 1;
            continue;
        }
        QVector<int> block;
        block.push_back(i);
        const double seedLeft = seed.x;
        const double seedRight = seed.x + seed.w;
        const double seedFont = estimateLineFont(seed);
        int j = i + 1;
        while (j < page.lines.size()) {
            const TextLine &prev = page.lines[j - 1];
            const TextLine &cur = page.lines[j];
            if (cur.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("title")
                || cur.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("subtitle")
                || cur.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("annotation")
                || cur.semanticRole == QStringLiteral("list")) {
                break;
            }
            const int curColumn = columnIds.value(j, 0);
            if (curColumn != seedColumn) {
                break;
            }
            const double gap = static_cast<double>(cur.y) - static_cast<double>(prev.y + prev.h);
            const double leftDiff = qAbs(static_cast<double>(cur.x) - seedLeft);
            const double rightDiff = qAbs(static_cast<double>(cur.x + cur.w) - seedRight);
            const double fontRatio = estimateLineFont(cur) / qMax(1.0, seedFont);
            const bool nearGap = gap <= qMax(10.0, static_cast<double>(prev.h) * 0.9);
            const bool nearAlign = leftDiff <= qMax(18.0, static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.03)
                || rightDiff <= qMax(22.0, static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.04);
            const bool nearFont = fontRatio >= 0.82 && fontRatio <= 1.22;
            if (!(nearGap && nearAlign && nearFont)) {
                break;
            }
            block.push_back(j);
            j += 1;
        }
        const int paragraphId = nextParagraphId++;
        const int total = block.size();
        const int startIdx = block.front();
        const int endIdx = block.back();
        const int prevIdx = startIdx > 0 ? startIdx - 1 : -1;
        const int nextIdx = endIdx + 1 < page.lines.size() ? endIdx + 1 : -1;
        const bool columnBreakBefore = prevIdx >= 0 && seedColumn != columnIds.value(prevIdx, seedColumn);
        if (columnBreakBefore) {
            columnBreakCount += 1;
        }
        double beforeGap = 0.0;
        if (prevIdx >= 0 && !columnBreakBefore) {
            const TextLine &prev = page.lines.at(prevIdx);
            beforeGap = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(seed.y) - static_cast<double>(prev.y + prev.h));
        }
        double afterGap = 0.0;
        if (nextIdx >= 0 && seedColumn == columnIds.value(nextIdx, seedColumn)) {
            const TextLine &next = page.lines.at(nextIdx);
            const TextLine &last = page.lines.at(endIdx);
            afterGap = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(next.y) - static_cast<double>(last.y + last.h));
        }
        const double blockLeft = seed.x;
        double minLeft = blockLeft;
        for (const int idx : block) {
            minLeft = qMin(minLeft, static_cast<double>(page.lines.at(idx).x));
        }
        const double firstLineIndentPt = qBound(0.0, blockLeft - minLeft, static_cast<double>(page.width) * 0.2);
        const float spaceBeforePt = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, beforeGap * 100.0, 2200.0));
        const float spaceAfterPt = static_cast<float>(qBound(0.0, afterGap * 100.0, 2200.0));
        for (int k = 0; k < total; ++k) {
            TextLine &line = page.lines[block[k]];
            line.paragraphId = paragraphId;
            line.paragraphLineIndex = k;
            line.paragraphLineCount = total;
            line.paragraphColumn = seedColumn;
            line.paragraphColumnBreakBefore = (k == 0) ? columnBreakBefore : false;
            line.paragraphSpaceBeforePt = (k == 0) ? spaceBeforePt : 0.0f;
            line.paragraphSpaceAfterPt = (k == total - 1) ? spaceAfterPt : 0.0f;
            line.paragraphFirstLineIndentPt = (k == 0) ? static_cast<float>(firstLineIndentPt) : 0.0f;
            if (line.semanticRole.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("paragraph");
            }
        }
        blockCount += 1;
        maxLinesInBlock = qMax(maxLinesInBlock, total);
        i = j;
    }
    traces.append(
        QStringLiteral("PPT 段落块: 页=%1, 段落数=%2, 最大段内行数=%3, 分栏断段=%4")
            .arg(page.pageIndex + 1)
            .arg(blockCount)
            .arg(maxLinesInBlock)
            .arg(columnBreakCount)
    );
}

void classifySemanticRoles(PageContent &page, QStringList &traces) {
    if (page.lines.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    QVector<double> lineFonts;
    lineFonts.reserve(page.lines.size());
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        lineFonts.push_back(estimateLineFont(line));
    }
    QVector<double> sorted = lineFonts;
    std::sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end());
    const double medianFont = sorted.at(sorted.size() / 2);
    const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));

    int titleIdx = -1;
    double bestTitleScore = -1e18;
    for (int i = 0; i < page.lines.size(); ++i) {
        const TextLine &line = page.lines.at(i);
        const QString text = mergeLineTextForQuality(line);
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const double y = static_cast<double>(line.y);
        if (y > pageH * 0.42) {
            continue;
        }
        const double font = lineFonts.at(i);
        const double score = font * 2.0 + static_cast<double>(line.w) * 0.01 - y * 0.08;
        if (score > bestTitleScore && font >= medianFont * 1.18) {
            bestTitleScore = score;
            titleIdx = i;
        }
    }

    int subtitleIdx = -1;
    if (titleIdx >= 0) {
        const double titleY = static_cast<double>(page.lines.at(titleIdx).y);
        double bestScore = -1e18;
        for (int i = 0; i < page.lines.size(); ++i) {
            if (i == titleIdx) {
                continue;
            }
            const TextLine &line = page.lines.at(i);
            const QString text = mergeLineTextForQuality(line);
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const double y = static_cast<double>(line.y);
            if (y < titleY || y > pageH * 0.62) {
                continue;
            }
            const double font = lineFonts.at(i);
            const double score = font * 1.7 + static_cast<double>(line.w) * 0.006 - (y - titleY) * 0.09;
            if (score > bestScore && font >= medianFont * 1.05) {
                bestScore = score;
                subtitleIdx = i;
            }
        }
    }

    int titleCount = 0;
    int subtitleCount = 0;
    int listCount = 0;
    int annotationCount = 0;
    int paragraphCount = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < page.lines.size(); ++i) {
        TextLine &line = page.lines[i];
        const QString text = mergeLineTextForQuality(line);
        if (line.listOrdered || !line.listMarker.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            const QString marker = !line.listMarker.trimmed().isEmpty() ? line.listMarker.trimmed() : text.left(8);
            line.listLevel = classifyListLevel(line, page.width);
            line.listStyle = inferListStyle(marker, line.listOrdered);
            line.listOrdinal = line.listOrdered ? inferOrderedOrdinal(marker) : 0;
            line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("list");
            line.semanticLevel = qMax(1, line.listLevel + 1);
            line.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("list-marker:%1").arg(line.listStyle);
            listCount += 1;
            continue;
        }
        if (i == titleIdx) {
            line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("title");
            line.semanticLevel = 1;
            line.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("font+position");
            titleCount += 1;
            continue;
        }
        if (i == subtitleIdx) {
            line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("subtitle");
            line.semanticLevel = 2;
            line.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("font+position");
            subtitleCount += 1;
            continue;
        }
        const bool lowBand = static_cast<double>(line.y) >= pageH * 0.84;
        const bool smallFont = lineFonts.at(i) <= medianFont * 0.95;
        const bool noteLike = lowBand && smallFont && text.size() <= 100;
        if (noteLike) {
            line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("annotation");
            line.semanticLevel = 0;
            line.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("footer-band");
            annotationCount += 1;
            continue;
        }
        if (line.semanticRole.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            line.semanticRole = QStringLiteral("paragraph");
        }
        if (line.semanticEvidence.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            line.semanticEvidence = QStringLiteral("default-paragraph");
        }
        line.semanticLevel = qMax(0, line.semanticLevel);
        paragraphCount += 1;
    }
    traces.append(
        QStringLiteral("PPT 文本语义: 页=%1, title=%2, subtitle=%3, paragraph=%4, list=%5, annotation=%6")
            .arg(page.pageIndex + 1)
            .arg(titleCount)
            .arg(subtitleCount)
            .arg(paragraphCount)
            .arg(listCount)
            .arg(annotationCount)
    );
    assignObjectSemanticRoles(page, traces);
    assignParagraphBlocks(page, traces);
    attachFootnoteEvidence(page, traces);
}

} // namespace

void PptTypeNormalizer::normalize(DocumentModel &document, QStringList &traces) {
    QVector<PageContent> pages = document.pages();
    if (pages.isEmpty()) {
        return;
    }
    int normalizedPageCount = 0;
    for (PageContent &page : pages) {
        QString dominantFont = preferredUiCjkFont();
        double dominantFontSize = 11.0;
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (!span.fontFamily.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    dominantFont = span.fontFamily.trimmed();
                }
                if (span.fontSize > 1.0f) {
                    dominantFontSize = span.fontSize;
                }
            }
        }

        for (TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const float lineH = line.h > 1.0f ? line.h : static_cast<float>(dominantFontSize * 1.2);
            if (line.paragraphAlign.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                const float left = line.x;
                const float right = line.x + line.w;
                if (left <= page.width * 0.12f && right >= page.width * 0.88f) {
                    line.paragraphAlign = QStringLiteral("just");
                } else if (qAbs((left + right) * 0.5f - page.width * 0.5f) <= page.width * 0.08f) {
                    line.paragraphAlign = QStringLiteral("ctr");
                } else {
                    line.paragraphAlign = QStringLiteral("l");
                }
            }
            if (line.listLevel < 0) {
                line.listLevel = 0;
            }
            for (TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (span.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                if (span.fontSize <= 1.0f) {
                    span.fontSize = qBound(8.0f, lineH * 0.9f, 56.0f);
                }
                if (span.fontFamily.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    span.fontFamily = dominantFont;
                }
                if (span.color.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    span.color = QStringLiteral("111111");
                }
                if (span.lineHeight <= 1.0f) {
                    span.lineHeight = qBound(10.0f, span.fontSize * 1.25f, 84.0f);
                }
            }
        }
        classifySemanticRoles(page, traces);

        const int textLineCount = countMeaningfulTextLines(page);
        const bool hasTable = !page.tables.isEmpty();
        const bool hasFullPageRaster = hasNearFullPageRaster(page);
        if (hasFullPageRaster && (textLineCount > 0 || hasTable)) {
            for (GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
                if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                    continue;
                }
                g.cropLeft = qBound(0.0f, g.cropLeft, 1.0f);
                g.cropTop = qBound(0.0f, g.cropTop, 1.0f);
                g.cropRight = qBound(0.0f, g.cropRight, 1.0f);
                g.cropBottom = qBound(0.0f, g.cropBottom, 1.0f);
                const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
                const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
                const bool nearFull = static_cast<double>(g.w) >= pageW * 0.92
                    && static_cast<double>(g.h) >= pageH * 0.92
                    && static_cast<double>(g.x) <= pageW * 0.04
                    && static_cast<double>(g.y) <= pageH * 0.04;
                if (nearFull) {
                    g.isBackground = true;
                }
            }
        }

        std::stable_sort(page.graphics.begin(), page.graphics.end(), [](const GraphicObject &a, const GraphicObject &b) {
            if (a.isBackground != b.isBackground) {
                return a.isBackground && !b.isBackground;
            }
            if (a.isBackground && b.isBackground && a.kind != b.kind) {
                if (a.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle && b.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                    return true;
                }
                if (a.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle && b.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
            if (a.kind != b.kind) {
                if (a.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage && b.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                    return true;
                }
                if (a.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage && b.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
            return false;
        });
        normalizedPageCount += 1;
    }

    document.clear();
    for (PageContent &page : pages) {
        document.addPage(page);
    }
    traces.append(QStringLiteral("PPT 归一化: 页面=%1（文本样式/背景分层/对象顺序）").arg(normalizedPageCount));
}

} // namespace converter

#pragma once

#include <QStringList>

#include "core/domain/model/DocumentModel.h"

namespace converter {

class PptTypeNormalizer final {
public:
    static void normalize(DocumentModel &document, QStringList &traces);
};

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/ppt/PptxExporter.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/ppt/PptxExporter.h"

#include <QtGlobal>

#include "core/ppt/PptxNativeKernel.h"

namespace converter {

OutputFormat PptxExporter::format() const {
    return OutputFormat::Pptx;
}

bool PptxExporter::exportDocument(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const QString &targetPath,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    QStringList &traceLogs
) const {
    Q_UNUSED(executor);
    if (exportPptPptxNative(document, targetPath, traceLogs)) {
        return true;
    }
    bool hasSpecificFailure = false;
    for (int i = traceLogs.size() - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
        const QString line = traceLogs.at(i).trimmed();
        if (line.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (line.contains(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2")) && line.contains(QStringLiteral("失败"))) {
            hasSpecificFailure = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    if (!hasSpecificFailure) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX 导出失败：原生导出引擎未生成有效文件"));
    }
    return false;
}

} // namespace converter

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

#pragma once

public:
    OutputFormat format() const override;
    bool exportDocument(
        const DocumentModel &document,
        const QString &targetPath,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        QStringList &traceLogs
    ) const override;
};

} // namespace converter

#include "core/ppt/PptxNativeKernel.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/ooxml/NativeOoxmlExportKernel.h"

#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>
#include <QByteArray>
#include <QDate>
#include <QDateTime>
#include <QDir>
#include <QColor>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFontDatabase>
#include <QHash>
#include <QIODevice>
#include <QLineF>
#include <QMimeDatabase>
#include <QProcess>
#include <QRegularExpression>
#include <QRectF>
#include <QSaveFile>
#include <QSet>
#include <QStandardPaths>
#include <QStringConverter>
#include <QTemporaryDir>
#include <QTextStream>
#include <QtGlobal>


namespace converter {

namespace {


using converter::ooxml::escapeXml;
using converter::ooxml::writeBinaryFile;
using converter::ooxml::writePackagePart;
using converter::ooxml::zipDirectoryToFile;
using converter::ooxml::xlsxColumnNameFromIndex;

bool looksLikePercent(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeCurrency(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeDate(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeNumber(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeScientific(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(const QString &text);
QString colorOrDefault(const QString &value, const QString &fallback);

bool looksLikePercent(const QString &text) {
    return text.contains('%');
}

bool looksLikeCurrency(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression currencyRe(QStringLiteral(R"(([¥￥$€£]|USD|CNY|RMB|EUR|GBP))"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption);
    return currencyRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeDate(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression dateRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*(\d{4}[-/\.]\d{1,2}[-/\.]\d{1,2}|\d{1,2}[-/\.]\d{1,2}([-/\.]\d{2,4})?)\s*$)")
    );
    return dateRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeScientific(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression sciRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[+-]?\d+(\.\d+)?[eE][+-]?\d+\s*$)"));
    return sciRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeNumber(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression numberRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[+-]?(\d+(\.\d+)?|\.\d+)\s*$)"));
    return numberRe.match(text).hasMatch() || looksLikeScientific(text);
}

bool looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(const QString &text) {
    const QString upper = text.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (!upper.startsWith('=')) {
        return false;
    }
    return upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SEQUENCE("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("FILTER("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("UNIQUE("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SORT("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SORTBY("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("RANDARRAY("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("MAKEARRAY("));
}

bool looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(const QString &text) {
    const QString upper = text.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (!upper.startsWith('=')) {
        return false;
    }
    return upper.contains(QLatin1Char('[')) && upper.contains(QLatin1Char(']'));
}

QString colorOrDefault(const QString &value, const QString &fallback) {
    QString color = value.trimmed();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.size() == 8) {
        color = color.mid(2);
    }
    static const QRegularExpression hex6(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$)"));
    if (hex6.match(color).hasMatch()) {
        return QStringLiteral("#") + color.toUpper();
    }
    QString fb = fallback.trimmed();
    if (fb.isEmpty()) {
        fb = QStringLiteral("#111111");
    }
    if (!fb.startsWith('#')) {
        fb.prepend('#');
    }
    return fb.left(7).toUpper();
}

QString escapeCsvCell(const QString &cell) {
    return QStringLiteral("\"%1\"").arg(cell).replace('"', QStringLiteral("\"\""));
}

QString escapeHtml(const QString &input) {
    QString escaped = input;
    escaped.replace('&', QStringLiteral("&amp;"));
    escaped.replace('<', QStringLiteral("&lt;"));
    escaped.replace('>', QStringLiteral("&gt;"));
    escaped.replace('"', QStringLiteral("&quot;"));
    return escaped;
}

QString makeSectionPathLabel(const QStringList &path) {
    if (path.isEmpty()) {
        return QStringLiteral("未分类");
    }
    return path.join(QStringLiteral(" / "));
}

bool hasPositionedContent(const DocumentModel &document) {
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        if (!page.graphics.isEmpty()) {
            return true;
        }
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (span.w > 0.0f || span.h > 0.0f || span.fontSize > 0.0f) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

QString mergeLineText(const TextLine &line) {
    QString text;
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString token = span.text.simplified();
        if (token.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            text.append(' ');
        }
        text.append(token);
    }
    return text;
}

QString normalizeToken(const QString &text) {
    return text.simplified().toLower();
}

QString inferPptMajorThemeFont(const PageContent &page);

struct WordAnchorImageRef {
    QString relId;
    QString fileName;
    QString sourcePath;
    int pageIndex = -1;
    int graphicIndex = -1;
};

QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> collectWordAnchorImageRefs(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> refs;
    int imageCounter = 1;
    for (int pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < document.pages().size(); ++pageIndex) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(pageIndex);
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || g.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFileInfo srcInfo(g.imagePath);
            if (!srcInfo.exists() || !srcInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            QString ext = srcInfo.suffix().toLower();
            if (ext != QStringLiteral("png")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpeg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("gif")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("webp")) {
                continue;
            }
            refs.push_back({
                QStringLiteral("rIdImg%1").arg(imageCounter),
                QStringLiteral("image%1.%2").arg(imageCounter).arg(ext),
                g.imagePath,
                pageIndex,
                gi
            });
            imageCounter += 1;
        }
    }
    return refs;
}

quint64 makeWordGraphicKey(int pageIndex, int graphicIndex) {
    return (static_cast<quint64>(static_cast<quint32>(pageIndex)) << 32)
        | static_cast<quint32>(graphicIndex);
}

QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> buildWordImageRefLookup(const QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> &refs) {
    QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> byGraphic;
    for (const WordAnchorImageRef &ref : refs) {
        byGraphic.insert(makeWordGraphicKey(ref.pageIndex, ref.graphicIndex), ref);
    }
    return byGraphic;
}

struct PptSlideImageRef {
    QString relId;
    QString fileName;
    QString sourcePath;
    int pageIndex = -1;
    int graphicIndex = -1;
};

QVector<PptSlideImageRef> collectPptSlideImageRefs(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QVector<PptSlideImageRef> refs;
    int imageCounter = 1;
    for (int pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < document.pages().size(); ++pageIndex) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(pageIndex);
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || g.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFileInfo srcInfo(g.imagePath);
            if (!srcInfo.exists() || !srcInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            QString ext = srcInfo.suffix().toLower();
            if (ext != QStringLiteral("png")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpeg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("gif")) {
                continue;
            }
            refs.push_back({
                QStringLiteral("rIdImg%1").arg(imageCounter),
                QStringLiteral("image%1.%2").arg(imageCounter).arg(ext),
                g.imagePath,
                pageIndex,
                gi
            });
            imageCounter += 1;
        }
    }
    return refs;
}

QHash<quint64, PptSlideImageRef> buildPptSlideImageLookup(const QVector<PptSlideImageRef> &refs) {
    QHash<quint64, PptSlideImageRef> byGraphic;
    for (const PptSlideImageRef &ref : refs) {
        byGraphic.insert(makeWordGraphicKey(ref.pageIndex, ref.graphicIndex), ref);
    }
    return byGraphic;
}

QString normalizePptHexColor(QString color, const QString &fallback = QStringLiteral("111111")) {
    color = color.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.size() == 8) {
        color = color.mid(2);
    }
    static const QRegularExpression hex6Re(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-F]{6}$)"));
    return hex6Re.match(color).hasMatch() ? color : fallback;
}

QString preferredPptFallbackFont() {
    static const QString cached = []() {
        const QStringList available = QFontDatabase::families();
        const QStringList preferred{
            QStringLiteral("PingFang SC"),
            QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei"),
            QStringLiteral("Heiti SC"),
            QStringLiteral("SimHei"),
            QStringLiteral("SimSun"),
            QStringLiteral("Arial")
        };
        for (const QString &candidate : preferred) {
            for (const QString &family : available) {
                if (family.compare(candidate, Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                    return family;
                }
            }
        }
        return QStringLiteral("Arial");
    }();
    return cached;
}

QString mapPptFontFamily(QString family, const QString &fallbackThemeFont) {
    family = family.trimmed();
    if (family.isEmpty()) {
        family = fallbackThemeFont.trimmed();
    }
    if (family.isEmpty()) {
        return preferredPptFallbackFont();
    }
    QString key = family.toLower();
    key.remove('"');
    key.remove('\'');
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("simsun")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("song")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("宋体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("SimSun");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("simhei")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("heiti")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("黑体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("SimHei");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("kaiti")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("楷体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("KaiTi");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("fangsong")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("仿宋"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("FangSong");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("yahei")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("微软雅黑"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("pingfang"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("PingFang SC");
    }
    return family.left(64);
}

QString paragraphAlignToPpt(const QString &raw) {
    const QString key = raw.trimmed().toLower();
    if (key == QStringLiteral("center") || key == QStringLiteral("ctr")) {
        return QStringLiteral("ctr");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("right") || key == QStringLiteral("r")) {
        return QStringLiteral("r");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("justify") || key == QStringLiteral("just")) {
        return QStringLiteral("just");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("l");
}

QString listAutoNumType(const QString &style) {
    const QString key = style.trimmed().toLower();
    if (key == QStringLiteral("arabic-paren")) {
        return QStringLiteral("arabicParenR");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("alpha-lower")) {
        return QStringLiteral("alphaLcPeriod");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("roman-lower")) {
        return QStringLiteral("romanLcPeriod");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("arabicPeriod");
}

QString buildPptLineRunsXml(
    const TextLine &line,
    const QString &themeFont,
    const QString &roleTag,
    const QString &defaultTextColorHex,
    int &outFontSize
) {
    QString runsXml;
    outFontSize = 1200;
    bool hasStyledRun = false;
    bool explicitBold = false;
    const bool isTitleRole = roleTag == QStringLiteral("title");
    const bool isSubtitleRole = roleTag == QStringLiteral("subTitle");
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString spanText = span.text;
        if (spanText.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        double roleAdjustedPt = qMax(8.0f, span.fontSize > 0.0f ? span.fontSize : line.h);
        if (isTitleRole) {
            roleAdjustedPt = qMax(roleAdjustedPt, 18.0);
        } else if (isSubtitleRole) {
            roleAdjustedPt = qMax(roleAdjustedPt, 14.0);
        }
        const int spanSz = qBound(900, static_cast<int>(qRound(roleAdjustedPt * 100.0)), 7200);
        outFontSize = qMax(outFontSize, spanSz);
        const QString spanFont = mapPptFontFamily(span.fontFamily, themeFont);
        const QString spanColor = normalizePptHexColor(span.color, defaultTextColorHex);
        const QString preserveAttr = (spanText.startsWith(' ') || spanText.endsWith(' '))
            ? QStringLiteral(" xml:space=\"preserve\"")
            : QString();
        const bool spanBold = span.bold || isTitleRole;
        runsXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<a:r><a:rPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%1\" b=\"%2\" i=\"%3\">"
            "<a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%4\"/></a:solidFill>"
            "<a:latin typeface=\"%5\"/><a:ea typeface=\"%5\"/></a:rPr><a:t%7>%6</a:t></a:r>"
        )
            .arg(spanSz)
            .arg(spanBold ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(span.italic ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(spanColor)
            .arg(escapeXml(spanFont))
            .arg(escapeXml(spanText))
            .arg(preserveAttr);
        hasStyledRun = true;
        explicitBold = explicitBold || span.bold;
    }
    if (!hasStyledRun) {
        const QString merged = mergeLineText(line);
        if (merged.isEmpty()) {
            return QStringLiteral("<a:endParaRPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"1200\"/>");
        }
        const QString fallbackFont = mapPptFontFamily(themeFont, preferredPptFallbackFont());
        const int fallbackSz = isTitleRole ? 2200 : (isSubtitleRole ? 1600 : 1200);
        runsXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<a:r><a:rPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%3\" b=\"%4\">"
            "<a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%5\"/></a:solidFill>"
            "<a:latin typeface=\"%1\"/><a:ea typeface=\"%1\"/></a:rPr><a:t>%2</a:t></a:r>"
        ).arg(escapeXml(fallbackFont), escapeXml(merged), QString::number(fallbackSz), QString::number(isTitleRole ? 1 : 0), defaultTextColorHex);
        outFontSize = fallbackSz;
    } else if (isTitleRole && !explicitBold) {
        // 对疑似标题但未显式加粗的内容做轻度强化，避免标题层级丢失。
        runsXml.replace(QStringLiteral(" b=\"0\""), QStringLiteral(" b=\"1\""));
    }
    runsXml += QStringLiteral("<a:endParaRPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%1\"/>").arg(outFontSize);
    return runsXml;
}

bool parseFootnoteDefinition(const QString &text, int &footnoteId, QString &body) {
    static const QVector<QRegularExpression> patterns{
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^\[(\d{1,4})\]\s*(.+)$)")),
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^(?:（|\()(\d{1,4})(?:）|\))\s*(.+)$)")),
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d{1,4})[\.、]\s*(.+)$)"))
    };
    for (const QRegularExpression &re : patterns) {
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = re.match(text);
        if (!m.hasMatch()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int id = m.captured(1).toInt();
        const QString parsedBody = m.captured(2).trimmed();
        if (id > 0 && !parsedBody.isEmpty()) {
            footnoteId = id;
            body = parsedBody;
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

int parseSuperscriptDigits(const QString &token) {
    if (token.isEmpty()) {
        return 0;
    }
    QString digits;
    digits.reserve(token.size());
    for (const QChar &ch : token) {
        if (ch == QChar(0x00B9)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('1');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x00B2)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('2');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x00B3)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('3');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x2070)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('0');
        } else if (ch.unicode() >= 0x2074 && ch.unicode() <= 0x2079) {
            digits += QLatin1Char(static_cast<char>('0' + (ch.unicode() - 0x2070)));
        } else {
            return 0;
        }
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const int value = digits.toInt(&ok);
    return ok ? value : 0;
}

struct NativeWordParagraph {
    QString text;
    bool ordered = false;
    int level = 0;
    int ordinal = 0;
    bool footnoteDefinition = false;
    int footnoteId = 0;
    QString footnoteBody;
};

NativeWordParagraph classifyNativeWordParagraph(const QString &rawText);

int detectNativeWordHeadingLevel(const QString &rawText) {
    const QString text = rawText.trimmed();
    if (text.isEmpty()) {
        return 0;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression chapterRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第\s*[一二三四五六七八九十百千万零〇0-9]+\s*[章节篇部分卷]|Chapter\s+\d+))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression subsectionRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第\s*[一二三四五六七八九十百千万零〇0-9]+\s*[节条款]|Section\s+\d+))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    if (chapterRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (subsectionRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 2;
    }
    if (text.size() <= 42
        && (text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("概述"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("总结"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("结论"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("摘要")))) {
        return 1;
    }
    return 0;
}

bool hasExplicitNativeWordTocField(const DocumentModel &document) {
    static const QRegularExpression tocFieldRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(\{\s*TOC\b)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            if (tocFieldRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

int estimateNativeWordHeadingCount(const DocumentModel &document) {
    int headingCount = 0;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString rawText = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (rawText.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const NativeWordParagraph para = classifyNativeWordParagraph(rawText);
            const int inferredLevel = (para.ordered && para.level <= 5 && para.text.size() <= 96)
                ? (para.level + 1)
                : detectNativeWordHeadingLevel(rawText);
            if (inferredLevel > 0) {
                headingCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    return headingCount;
}

struct NativeWordNumberingState {
    int activeNumId = 1;
    int prevTopOrdinal = 0;
    QVector<int> prevOrdinalByLevel = QVector<int>(9, 0);
    bool appendixSection = false;
};

int resolveNativeWordNumId(const NativeWordParagraph &para, NativeWordNumberingState &state) {
    const int level = qBound(0, para.level, state.prevOrdinalByLevel.size() - 1);
    const int prevAtLevel = state.prevOrdinalByLevel[level];
    const bool shouldRestart = para.ordinal == 1 && prevAtLevel > 1;
    if (para.level == 0 && para.ordinal == 1 && state.prevTopOrdinal > 1) {
        state.activeNumId = state.appendixSection ? 2 : 1;
    } else if (shouldRestart) {
        state.activeNumId = 2;
    }
    if (para.level == 0 && para.ordinal > 0) {
        state.prevTopOrdinal = para.ordinal;
    }
    if (para.ordinal > 0) {
        state.prevOrdinalByLevel[level] = para.ordinal;
        for (int deeper = level + 1; deeper < state.prevOrdinalByLevel.size(); ++deeper) {
            state.prevOrdinalByLevel[deeper] = 0;
        }
    }
    return state.activeNumId;
}

NativeWordParagraph classifyNativeWordParagraph(const QString &rawText) {
    NativeWordParagraph out;
    out.text = rawText.trimmed();
    static const QRegularExpression orderedRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d+(?:\.\d+)*)[\.\)、)]\s*(.+)$)"));
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = orderedRe.match(out.text);
    if (!m.hasMatch()) {
        return out;
    }
    out.ordered = true;
    const QString token = m.captured(1);
    out.level = qBound(0, token.count('.'), 8);
    const QStringList parts = token.split('.', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
    if (!parts.isEmpty()) {
        out.ordinal = parts.last().toInt();
    }
    out.text = m.captured(2).trimmed();
    int footnoteId = 0;
    QString footnoteBody;
    if (parseFootnoteDefinition(out.text, footnoteId, footnoteBody)) {
        out.footnoteDefinition = true;
        out.footnoteId = footnoteId;
        out.footnoteBody = footnoteBody;
    }
    return out;
}

QMap<int, QString> collectNativeWordFootnoteMap(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QMap<int, QString> result;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            int footnoteId = 0;
            QString body;
            if (!parseFootnoteDefinition(text, footnoteId, body)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (footnoteId > 0 && !body.isEmpty()) {
                result.insert(footnoteId, body);
            }
        }
    }
    return result;
}

struct NativePptChartPart {
    bool valid = false;
    QRectF frameRect;
    QString chartXml;
    QString chartRelsXml;
    QString embeddedWorkbookTarget;
    QStringList categories;
    QVector<QString> seriesNames;
    QVector<QVector<double>> seriesValues;
    QString chartKind;
    int barSeriesCount = 0;
    int lineSeriesCount = 0;
    int secondaryAxisSeriesCount = 0;
    bool hasSecondaryAxis = false;
    QString primaryAxisNumFmt;
    QString secondaryAxisNumFmt;
    QString seriesAxisBindings;
    int axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount = 0;
    int axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount = 0;
    int axisBindingQuality = 0;
    int legendEntryCount = 0;
    int legendMappedSeriesCount = 0;
    bool legendSeriesConsistent = false;
    int namedSeriesCount = 0;
    int labeledCategoryCount = 0;
    bool heuristicMode = false;
};

struct NativePptSmartArtPart {
    bool valid = false;
    QRectF frameRect;
    QString dataXml;
    QString layoutXml;
    QString styleXml;
    QString colorsXml;
    int nodeCount = 0;
    int labeledNodeCount = 0;
    int edgeCount = 0;
    bool heuristicMode = false;
};

struct NativePptTablePart {
    bool valid = false;
    QRectF frameRect;
    QString tableXml;
    int rowCount = 0;
    int colCount = 0;
    int filledCellCount = 0;
    bool heuristicMode = false;
};

struct NativePptSeriesSpec {
    int order = 0;
    int sourceSeriesId = 0;
    int categoryCount = 0;
    QString txRef;
    QString catRef;
    QString valRef;
    QString catPtsXml;
    QString valPtsXml;
    QString accent;
    QString displayName;
    QVector<double> values;
};

QString buildNativePptSeriesXml(const NativePptSeriesSpec &spec) {
    const bool percentLike = std::all_of(spec.values.cbegin(), spec.values.cend(), [](double v) {
        return v >= 0.0 && v <= 120.0;
    });
    const QString labelFmtCode = percentLike ? QStringLiteral("0.00%") : QStringLiteral("#,##0.00");
    const QString richLabelXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<c:dLbls><c:showLegendKey val=\"0\"/><c:showVal val=\"1\"/><c:showSerName val=\"0\"/>"
        "<c:showPercent val=\"%1\"/><c:showCatName val=\"0\"/><c:numFmt formatCode=\"%2\" sourceLinked=\"0\"/>"
        "<c:txPr><a:bodyPr/><a:lstStyle/><a:p><a:pPr><a:defRPr sz=\"900\"/></a:pPr></a:p></c:txPr></c:dLbls>"
    ).arg(percentLike ? 1 : 0).arg(labelFmtCode);
    const QString trendlineXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<c:trendline><c:name><c:v>%1 趋势线</c:v></c:name><c:trendlineType val=\"linear\"/></c:trendline>"
    ).arg(escapeXml(spec.displayName));
    const QString errBarsXml = percentLike
        ? QStringLiteral("<c:errBars><c:errDir val=\"y\"/><c:errBarType val=\"both\"/><c:errValType val=\"stdErr\"/></c:errBars>")
        : QStringLiteral(
            "<c:errBars><c:errDir val=\"y\"/><c:errBarType val=\"both\"/><c:errValType val=\"cust\"/>"
            "<c:plus><c:numLit><c:ptCount val=\"1\"/><c:pt idx=\"0\"><c:v>5</c:v></c:pt></c:numLit></c:plus>"
            "<c:minus><c:numLit><c:ptCount val=\"1\"/><c:pt idx=\"0\"><c:v>5</c:v></c:pt></c:numLit></c:minus>"
            "</c:errBars>"
        );
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<c:ser><c:idx val=\"%1\"/><c:order val=\"%1\"/>"
        "<c:tx><c:strRef><c:f>%6</c:f></c:strRef></c:tx>"
        "<c:cat><c:strRef><c:f>%7</c:f><c:strCache><c:ptCount val=\"%3\"/>%4</c:strCache></c:strRef></c:cat>"
        "<c:val><c:numRef><c:f>%8</c:f><c:numCache><c:formatCode>General</c:formatCode><c:ptCount val=\"%3\"/>%5</c:numCache></c:numRef></c:val>"
        "<c:spPr><a:solidFill><a:schemeClr val=\"%9\"/></a:solidFill></c:spPr>%10%11%12</c:ser>"
    ).arg(spec.order)
     .arg(spec.sourceSeriesId)
     .arg(spec.categoryCount)
     .arg(spec.catPtsXml)
     .arg(spec.valPtsXml)
     .arg(spec.txRef, spec.catRef, spec.valRef, spec.accent, trendlineXml, errBarsXml, richLabelXml);
}

struct NativePptPageProjection {
    double scale = 1.0;
    double offsetX = 0.0;
    double offsetY = 0.0;

    double pxX(double x) const { return offsetX + x * scale; }
    double pxY(double y) const { return offsetY + y * scale; }
    double pxW(double w) const { return w * scale; }
    double pxH(double h) const { return h * scale; }
};

struct NativePptTextCandidate {
    double cx = 0.0;
    double cy = 0.0;
    QString text;
};

struct NativePptBarExtraction {
    bool valid = false;
    QRectF plotRect;
    QVector<double> categoryCenter;
    QMap<int, QMap<int, double>> valueBySeriesCategory;
    QMap<int, QString> seriesColorById;
    QVector<QPair<double, QString>> legendMarkers;
    QVector<NativePptTextCandidate> textCandidates;
};

struct NativePptCategoryLegendInference {
    QStringList categories;
    QStringList legendTexts;
    QVector<QString> legendColorKeys;
};

struct NativePptChartEmission {
    bool valid = false;
    QString chartXml;
    QVector<QString> seriesNames;
    QVector<QVector<double>> seriesValues;
    QString chartKind;
    int barSeriesCount = 0;
    int lineSeriesCount = 0;
    int secondaryAxisSeriesCount = 0;
    bool hasSecondaryAxis = false;
    QString primaryAxisNumFmt;
    QString secondaryAxisNumFmt;
    QString seriesAxisBindings;
    int axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount = 0;
    int axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount = 0;
    int axisBindingQuality = 0;
    int legendEntryCount = 0;
    int legendMappedSeriesCount = 0;
    bool legendSeriesConsistent = false;
    bool heuristicMode = false;
};

bool detectNativePptSmartArtObject(const PageContent &page, const double slideW, const double slideH);

NativePptPageProjection buildNativePptProjection(const PageContent &page, const double slideW, const double slideH) {
    const double pageW = page.width > 1.0f ? page.width : 595.0;
    const double pageH = page.height > 1.0f ? page.height : 842.0;
    NativePptPageProjection projection;
    projection.scale = qMin(slideW / pageW, slideH / pageH);
    projection.offsetX = (slideW - pageW * projection.scale) * 0.5;
    projection.offsetY = (slideH - pageH * projection.scale) * 0.5;
    return projection;
}

NativePptBarExtraction extractBars(const PageContent &page, const NativePptPageProjection &projection) {
    constexpr double kSlideW = 12192000.0;
    constexpr double kSlideH = 6858000.0;
    auto colorKey = [](QString c) {
        c = c.trimmed().toLower();
        if (c.startsWith('#')) {
            c.remove(0, 1);
        }
        return c.left(8);
    };

    struct SampleBar {
        int seriesId = 0;
        double centerX = 0.0;
        double value = 0.0;
    };
    QVector<QRectF> bars;
    QVector<QString> barColors;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground || g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRectF r(
            projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x))),
            projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y))),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * projection.scale),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * projection.scale)
        );
        if (r.width() < 3500.0 || r.height() < 3500.0) {
            continue;
        }
        bars.push_back(r);
        barColors.push_back(colorKey(colorOrDefault(g.fillColor, QStringLiteral("#4f81bd"))));
    }
    NativePptBarExtraction out;
    if (bars.size() < 2) {
        return out;
    }
    QRectF plotRect = bars.first();
    for (int i = 1; i < bars.size(); ++i) {
        plotRect = plotRect.united(bars[i]);
    }
    if (plotRect.width() < kSlideW * 0.12 || plotRect.height() < kSlideH * 0.1) {
        return out;
    }
    QHash<QString, int> seriesByColor;
    QMap<int, QString> seriesColorById;
    int nextSeries = 1;
    QVector<SampleBar> samples;
    for (int i = 0; i < bars.size(); ++i) {
        const QString key = barColors[i].isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("auto") : barColors[i];
        if (!seriesByColor.contains(key)) {
            seriesByColor.insert(key, nextSeries++);
        }
        const int sid = seriesByColor.value(key);
        if (!seriesColorById.contains(sid)) {
            seriesColorById.insert(sid, key);
        }
        const double v = qBound(0.01, (plotRect.bottom() - bars[i].top()) / qMax(1.0, plotRect.height()), 1.0);
        samples.push_back({sid, bars[i].center().x(), v});
    }
    std::sort(samples.begin(), samples.end(), [](const SampleBar &a, const SampleBar &b) {
        return a.centerX < b.centerX;
    });

    QVector<double> categoryCenter;
    const double catTol = qMax(12000.0, plotRect.width() * 0.025);
    QMap<int, QMap<int, double>> valueBySeriesCategory;
    for (const SampleBar &sample : samples) {
        int categoryId = -1;
        for (int ci = 0; ci < categoryCenter.size(); ++ci) {
            if (qAbs(categoryCenter[ci] - sample.centerX) <= catTol) {
                categoryId = ci + 1;
                categoryCenter[ci] = (categoryCenter[ci] + sample.centerX) * 0.5;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (categoryId < 0) {
            categoryCenter.push_back(sample.centerX);
            categoryId = categoryCenter.size();
        }
        valueBySeriesCategory[sample.seriesId].insert(categoryId, sample.value);
    }
    if (categoryCenter.isEmpty() || valueBySeriesCategory.isEmpty()) {
        return out;
    }
    QVector<NativePptTextCandidate> textCandidates;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRectF tr(
            projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x))),
            projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y))),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.w) * projection.scale),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.h) * projection.scale)
        );
        textCandidates.push_back({tr.center().x(), tr.center().y(), text});
    }
    out.valid = true;
    out.plotRect = plotRect;
    out.categoryCenter = categoryCenter;
    out.valueBySeriesCategory = valueBySeriesCategory;
    out.seriesColorById = seriesColorById;
    QVector<QPair<double, QString>> legendMarkers;
    const QRectF legendBand(
        plotRect.right() + qMax(8000.0, plotRect.width() * 0.02),
        plotRect.top() - qMax(10000.0, plotRect.height() * 0.1),
        qMax(120000.0, plotRect.width() * 0.45),
        plotRect.height() + qMax(20000.0, plotRect.height() * 0.2)
    );
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground || g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRectF r(
            projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x))),
            projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y))),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * projection.scale),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * projection.scale)
        );
        if (!legendBand.intersects(r)) {
            continue;
        }
        if (r.width() > legendBand.width() * 0.35 || r.height() > legendBand.height() * 0.18) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString markerColor = colorKey(colorOrDefault(g.fillColor, g.strokeColor));
        if (markerColor.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        legendMarkers.push_back({r.center().y(), markerColor});
    }
    std::sort(legendMarkers.begin(), legendMarkers.end(), [](const QPair<double, QString> &a, const QPair<double, QString> &b) {
        return a.first < b.first;
    });
    out.legendMarkers = legendMarkers;
    out.textCandidates = textCandidates;
    return out;
}

NativePptCategoryLegendInference inferCategoriesAndLegends(const NativePptBarExtraction &extraction) {
    NativePptCategoryLegendInference out;
    if (!extraction.valid) {
        return out;
    }
    auto looksLikeNumericLabel = [](const QString &text) {
        static const QRegularExpression numLikeRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[-+]?\d+([.,]\d+)?(%|[xX])?\s*$)"));
        return numLikeRe.match(text).hasMatch();
    };
    QSet<int> usedCategoryTextIdx;
    for (int cat = 0; cat < extraction.categoryCenter.size(); ++cat) {
        QString picked = QStringLiteral("Cat %1").arg(cat + 1);
        double bestScore = std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
        int bestIdx = -1;
        for (int ti = 0; ti < extraction.textCandidates.size(); ++ti) {
            if (usedCategoryTextIdx.contains(ti)) {
                continue;
            }
            const NativePptTextCandidate &tc = extraction.textCandidates[ti];
            const bool inCatBand = tc.cy >= (extraction.plotRect.bottom() - qMax(12000.0, extraction.plotRect.height() * 0.08))
                && tc.cy <= (extraction.plotRect.bottom() + qMax(260000.0, extraction.plotRect.height() * 0.35));
            if (!inCatBand || tc.cx < extraction.plotRect.left() - 40000.0 || tc.cx > extraction.plotRect.right() + 40000.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const double distX = qAbs(tc.cx - extraction.categoryCenter[cat]);
            const double distY = qAbs(tc.cy - extraction.plotRect.bottom());
            const double score = distX + distY * 0.35;
            if (score < bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestIdx = ti;
            }
        }
        if (bestIdx >= 0) {
            picked = extraction.textCandidates[bestIdx].text;
            usedCategoryTextIdx.insert(bestIdx);
        }
        out.categories.push_back(picked);
    }
    QVector<NativePptTextCandidate> legendCandidates;
    for (int ti = 0; ti < extraction.textCandidates.size(); ++ti) {
        if (usedCategoryTextIdx.contains(ti)) {
            continue;
        }
        const NativePptTextCandidate &tc = extraction.textCandidates[ti];
        if (looksLikeNumericLabel(tc.text)) {
            continue;
        }
        const bool isLegendArea = tc.cx >= (extraction.plotRect.right() + qMax(8000.0, extraction.plotRect.width() * 0.02))
            && tc.cx <= (extraction.plotRect.right() + qMax(1600000.0, extraction.plotRect.width() * 0.45))
            && tc.cy >= (extraction.plotRect.top() - qMax(10000.0, extraction.plotRect.height() * 0.1))
            && tc.cy <= (extraction.plotRect.bottom() + qMax(10000.0, extraction.plotRect.height() * 0.1));
        if (isLegendArea) {
            legendCandidates.push_back(tc);
        }
    }
    QVector<int> legendOrder(legendCandidates.size(), 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < legendOrder.size(); ++i) {
        legendOrder[i] = i;
    }
    std::sort(legendOrder.begin(), legendOrder.end(), [&](int a, int b) {
        return legendCandidates[a].cy < legendCandidates[b].cy;
    });
    QVector<QPair<double, QString>> markerPool = extraction.legendMarkers;
    QSet<int> usedMarkerIndex;
    QSet<QString> usedLegendText;
    for (const int oi : legendOrder) {
        const NativePptTextCandidate &legendCandidate = legendCandidates[oi];
        const QString legendText = legendCandidate.text.trimmed();
        if (!legendText.isEmpty() && !usedLegendText.contains(legendText)) {
            QString mappedColor;
            int bestMarkerIndex = -1;
            double bestDist = 1e12;
            for (int mi = 0; mi < markerPool.size(); ++mi) {
                if (usedMarkerIndex.contains(mi)) {
                    continue;
                }
                const double dist = qAbs(markerPool[mi].first - legendCandidate.cy);
                if (dist < bestDist) {
                    bestDist = dist;
                    bestMarkerIndex = mi;
                }
            }
            if (bestMarkerIndex >= 0) {
                usedMarkerIndex.insert(bestMarkerIndex);
                mappedColor = markerPool[bestMarkerIndex].second;
            }
            usedLegendText.insert(legendText);
            out.legendTexts.push_back(legendText);
            out.legendColorKeys.push_back(mappedColor);
        }
    }
    return out;
}

NativePptChartEmission emitChartXml(
    const NativePptBarExtraction &extraction,
    const NativePptCategoryLegendInference &inference
) {
    NativePptChartEmission out;
    if (!extraction.valid || extraction.categoryCenter.isEmpty() || extraction.valueBySeriesCategory.isEmpty()) {
        return out;
    }
    QString barSeriesXml;
    QString lineSeriesXml;
    QString scatterSeriesXml;
    QStringList seriesAxisBindingTokens;
    QHash<QString, int> legendIndexByColor;
    for (int li = 0; li < inference.legendColorKeys.size(); ++li) {
        const QString key = inference.legendColorKeys[li].trimmed().toLower();
        if (!key.isEmpty() && !legendIndexByColor.contains(key)) {
            legendIndexByColor.insert(key, li);
        }
    }
    int barSeriesCount = 0;
    int lineSeriesCount = 0;
    int secondaryAxisSeriesCount = 0;
    int axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount = 0;
    int axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount = 0;
    int order = 0;
    QVector<int> sortedSeries = extraction.valueBySeriesCategory.keys().toVector();
    std::sort(sortedSeries.begin(), sortedSeries.end(), [&](int a, int b) {
        const QString colorA = extraction.seriesColorById.value(a).trimmed().toLower();
        const QString colorB = extraction.seriesColorById.value(b).trimmed().toLower();
        const int orderA = legendIndexByColor.contains(colorA) ? legendIndexByColor.value(colorA) : (1000 + a);
        const int orderB = legendIndexByColor.contains(colorB) ? legendIndexByColor.value(colorB) : (1000 + b);
        if (orderA != orderB) {
            return orderA < orderB;
        }
        return a < b;
    });
    QSet<int> secondaryAxisSeriesById;
    static const QRegularExpression y2HintRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"((同比|环比|增长率|增速|rate|ratio|pct|percent|%))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    for (const int sid : sortedSeries) {
        const QString seriesColor = extraction.seriesColorById.value(sid).trimmed().toLower();
        if (!seriesColor.isEmpty()) {
            axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount += 1;
            if (legendIndexByColor.contains(seriesColor)) {
                axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount += 1;
            }
        }
        const int legendIndex = legendIndexByColor.contains(seriesColor) ? legendIndexByColor.value(seriesColor) : -1;
        const QString legendText = legendIndex >= 0 ? inference.legendTexts.value(legendIndex) : QString();
        if (y2HintRe.match(legendText).hasMatch()) {
            secondaryAxisSeriesById.insert(sid);
        }
    }
    if (secondaryAxisSeriesById.isEmpty() && sortedSeries.size() >= 2) {
        double bestScore = -1.0;
        int bestSid = -1;
        for (const int sid : sortedSeries) {
            const QMap<int, double> values = extraction.valueBySeriesCategory.value(sid);
            if (values.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            double sum = 0.0;
            for (auto it = values.constBegin(); it != values.constEnd(); ++it) {
                sum += it.value();
            }
            const double avg = sum / qMax(1, values.size());
            const double score = 1.0 - qAbs(0.5 - avg);
            if (score > bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestSid = sid;
            }
        }
        if (bestSid > 0) {
            secondaryAxisSeriesById.insert(bestSid);
        }
    }
    QVector<double> numericCategories;
    bool allCategoriesNumeric = !inference.categories.isEmpty();
    QSet<QString> uniqueCategoryLabels;
    QString scatterXPtsXml;
    for (int cat = 1; cat <= extraction.categoryCenter.size(); ++cat) {
        const QString label = inference.categories.value(cat - 1, QStringLiteral("Cat %1").arg(cat)).trimmed();
        uniqueCategoryLabels.insert(label);
        bool ok = false;
        QString normalizedLabel = label;
        normalizedLabel.remove(',');
        const double numeric = normalizedLabel.toDouble(&ok);
        if (!ok) {
            allCategoriesNumeric = false;
            break;
        }
        numericCategories.push_back(numeric);
        scatterXPtsXml += QStringLiteral("<c:pt idx=\"%1\"><c:v>%2</c:v></c:pt>")
            .arg(cat - 1)
            .arg(QString::number(numeric, 'g', 15));
    }
    const bool useScatter = allCategoriesNumeric
        && numericCategories.size() >= 3
        && uniqueCategoryLabels.size() == numericCategories.size();
    const QString categorySummary = inference.categories.join(QStringLiteral(" "));
    const bool stackedHint = categorySummary.contains('%')
        || categorySummary.contains(QStringLiteral("占比"))
        || categorySummary.contains(QStringLiteral("构成"))
        || categorySummary.contains(QStringLiteral("份额"));
    static const QStringList accentScheme{
        QStringLiteral("accent1"),
        QStringLiteral("accent2"),
        QStringLiteral("accent3"),
        QStringLiteral("accent4"),
        QStringLiteral("accent5"),
        QStringLiteral("accent6")
    };
    for (const int sid : sortedSeries) {
        QString catPts;
        QString valPts;
        QVector<double> values;
        for (int cat = 1; cat <= extraction.categoryCenter.size(); ++cat) {
            const QString categoryLabel = inference.categories.value(cat - 1, QStringLiteral("Cat %1").arg(cat));
            catPts += QStringLiteral("<c:pt idx=\"%1\"><c:v>%2</c:v></c:pt>").arg(cat - 1).arg(escapeXml(categoryLabel));
            const double value = extraction.valueBySeriesCategory.value(sid).value(cat, 0.0) * 100.0;
            values.push_back(value);
            valPts += QStringLiteral("<c:pt idx=\"%1\"><c:v>%2</c:v></c:pt>").arg(cat - 1).arg(QString::number(value, 'f', 2));
        }
        const QString seriesColor = extraction.seriesColorById.value(sid).trimmed().toLower();
        const int legendIndex = legendIndexByColor.contains(seriesColor) ? legendIndexByColor.value(seriesColor) : -1;
        const QString seriesName = legendIndex >= 0
            ? inference.legendTexts.value(legendIndex)
            : (order < inference.legendTexts.size()
                ? inference.legendTexts.at(order)
                : QStringLiteral("Series %1").arg(sid));
        out.seriesNames.push_back(seriesName);
        out.seriesValues.push_back(values);
        const QString colName = xlsxColumnNameFromIndex(order + 1);
        const QString catRef = QStringLiteral("Sheet1!$A$2:$A$%1").arg(extraction.categoryCenter.size() + 1);
        const QString valRef = QStringLiteral("Sheet1!$%1$2:$%1$%2").arg(colName).arg(extraction.categoryCenter.size() + 1);
        const QString txRef = QStringLiteral("Sheet1!$%1$1").arg(colName);
        const NativePptSeriesSpec spec{
            order,
            sid,
            static_cast<int>(extraction.categoryCenter.size()),
            txRef,
            catRef,
            valRef,
            catPts,
            valPts,
            accentScheme.at(order % accentScheme.size()),
            seriesName,
            values
        };
        const QString commonSerXml = buildNativePptSeriesXml(spec);
        const QString scatterSerXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<c:ser><c:idx val=\"%1\"/><c:order val=\"%1\"/>"
            "<c:tx><c:strRef><c:f>%2</c:f></c:strRef></c:tx>"
            "<c:spPr><a:solidFill><a:schemeClr val=\"%3\"/></a:solidFill></c:spPr>"
            "<c:marker><c:symbol val=\"circle\"/><c:size val=\"6\"/></c:marker>"
            "<c:xVal><c:numRef><c:f>%4</c:f><c:numCache><c:formatCode>General</c:formatCode><c:ptCount val=\"%5\"/>%6</c:numCache></c:numRef></c:xVal>"
            "<c:yVal><c:numRef><c:f>%7</c:f><c:numCache><c:formatCode>General</c:formatCode><c:ptCount val=\"%5\"/>%8</c:numCache></c:numRef></c:yVal>"
            "</c:ser>"
        ).arg(spec.order)
         .arg(spec.txRef)
         .arg(spec.accent)
         .arg(spec.catRef)
         .arg(spec.categoryCount)
         .arg(scatterXPtsXml)
         .arg(spec.valRef)
         .arg(spec.valPtsXml);
        const bool placeOnSecondaryLineAxis = secondaryAxisSeriesById.contains(sid);
        if (useScatter) {
            scatterSeriesXml += scatterSerXml;
            seriesAxisBindingTokens.push_back(QStringLiteral("S%1:y1").arg(order + 1));
        } else if (placeOnSecondaryLineAxis) {
            lineSeriesXml += commonSerXml;
            lineSeriesCount += 1;
            secondaryAxisSeriesCount += 1;
            seriesAxisBindingTokens.push_back(QStringLiteral("S%1:y2").arg(order + 1));
        } else {
            barSeriesXml += commonSerXml;
            barSeriesCount += 1;
            seriesAxisBindingTokens.push_back(QStringLiteral("S%1:y1").arg(order + 1));
        }
        order += 1;
    }
    const bool useSecondaryAxis = !lineSeriesXml.isEmpty() && !useScatter;
    const QString lineChartXml = useSecondaryAxis
        ? QStringLiteral(
            "<c:lineChart><c:grouping val=\"standard\"/><c:varyColors val=\"0\"/>%1"
            "<c:axId val=\"48650112\"/><c:axId val=\"49777777\"/></c:lineChart>"
        ).arg(lineSeriesXml)
        : QString();
    if (useScatter) {
        out.chartXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
            "<c:chartSpace xmlns:c=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/chart\" "
            "xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
            "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\">"
            "<c:chart><c:title/><c:autoTitleDeleted val=\"1\"/><c:plotArea><c:layout/>"
            "<c:scatterChart><c:scatterStyle val=\"lineMarker\"/><c:varyColors val=\"0\"/>%1"
            "<c:axId val=\"48650112\"/><c:axId val=\"48672768\"/></c:scatterChart>"
            "<c:valAx><c:axId val=\"48650112\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
            "<c:axPos val=\"b\"/><c:majorGridlines/><c:numFmt formatCode=\"General\" sourceLinked=\"1\"/>"
            "<c:tickLblPos val=\"nextTo\"/><c:crossAx val=\"48672768\"/><c:crosses val=\"autoZero\"/></c:valAx>"
            "<c:valAx><c:axId val=\"48672768\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
            "<c:axPos val=\"l\"/><c:majorGridlines/><c:numFmt formatCode=\"General\" sourceLinked=\"1\"/>"
            "<c:tickLblPos val=\"nextTo\"/><c:crossAx val=\"48650112\"/><c:crosses val=\"autoZero\"/></c:valAx>"
            "</c:plotArea><c:legend><c:legendPos val=\"r\"/></c:legend><c:plotVisOnly val=\"1\"/><c:style val=\"2\"/>"
            "<c:externalData r:id=\"rId1\"><c:autoUpdate val=\"0\"/></c:externalData></c:chart>"
            "</c:chartSpace>"
        ).arg(scatterSeriesXml);
        out.chartKind = QStringLiteral("scatter");
        out.heuristicMode = true;
        out.barSeriesCount = 0;
        out.lineSeriesCount = 0;
        out.secondaryAxisSeriesCount = 0;
        out.hasSecondaryAxis = false;
        out.primaryAxisNumFmt = QStringLiteral("General");
        out.secondaryAxisNumFmt = QString();
    } else {
        const QString grouping = stackedHint ? QStringLiteral("stacked") : QStringLiteral("clustered");
        out.chartXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
            "<c:chartSpace xmlns:c=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/chart\" "
            "xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
            "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\">"
            "<c:chart><c:title/><c:autoTitleDeleted val=\"1\"/><c:plotArea><c:layout/>"
            "<c:barChart><c:barDir val=\"col\"/><c:grouping val=\"%4\"/><c:varyColors val=\"0\"/>%1%5"
            "<c:axId val=\"48650112\"/><c:axId val=\"48672768\"/></c:barChart>"
            "%2"
            "<c:catAx><c:axId val=\"48650112\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
            "<c:axPos val=\"b\"/><c:tickLblPos val=\"nextTo\"/><c:crossAx val=\"48672768\"/><c:crosses val=\"autoZero\"/></c:catAx>"
            "<c:valAx><c:axId val=\"48672768\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
            "<c:axPos val=\"l\"/><c:majorGridlines/><c:numFmt formatCode=\"General\" sourceLinked=\"1\"/>"
            "<c:tickLblPos val=\"nextTo\"/><c:crossAx val=\"48650112\"/><c:crosses val=\"autoZero\"/></c:valAx>"
            "%3"
            "</c:plotArea><c:legend><c:legendPos val=\"r\"/></c:legend><c:plotVisOnly val=\"1\"/><c:style val=\"2\"/>"
            "<c:externalData r:id=\"rId1\"><c:autoUpdate val=\"0\"/></c:externalData></c:chart>"
            "</c:chartSpace>"
        ).arg(
            barSeriesXml,
            lineChartXml,
            useSecondaryAxis
                ? QStringLiteral("<c:valAx><c:axId val=\"49777777\"/><c:scaling><c:orientation val=\"minMax\"/></c:scaling>"
                                 "<c:axPos val=\"r\"/><c:numFmt formatCode=\"#,##0.00\" sourceLinked=\"0\"/>"
                                 "<c:crossAx val=\"48650112\"/><c:crosses val=\"max\"/><c:tickLblPos val=\"nextTo\"/></c:valAx>")
                : QString(),
            grouping,
            stackedHint ? QStringLiteral("<c:overlap val=\"100\"/>") : QString()
        );
        out.chartKind = useSecondaryAxis ? QStringLiteral("combo_bar_line") : (stackedHint ? QStringLiteral("bar_stacked") : QStringLiteral("bar_clustered"));
        out.heuristicMode = stackedHint;
        out.barSeriesCount = barSeriesCount;
        out.lineSeriesCount = lineSeriesCount;
        out.secondaryAxisSeriesCount = useSecondaryAxis ? secondaryAxisSeriesCount : 0;
        out.hasSecondaryAxis = useSecondaryAxis;
        out.primaryAxisNumFmt = stackedHint ? QStringLiteral("0.00%") : QStringLiteral("General");
        out.secondaryAxisNumFmt = useSecondaryAxis ? QStringLiteral("#,##0.00") : QString();
    }
