    out.seriesAxisBindings = seriesAxisBindingTokens.join(QStringLiteral("|"));
    out.axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount = axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount;
    out.axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount = axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount;
    out.axisBindingQuality = axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount > 0
        ? (axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount * 100) / axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount
        : 0;
    out.legendEntryCount = inference.legendTexts.size();
    out.legendMappedSeriesCount = axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount;
    out.legendSeriesConsistent = out.legendMappedSeriesCount >= qMin(out.legendEntryCount, out.seriesNames.size());
    out.valid = true;
    return out;
}

NativePptChartPart buildNativePptChartPart(const PageContent &page, const double slideW, const double slideH) {
    const NativePptPageProjection projection = buildNativePptProjection(page, slideW, slideH);
    const NativePptBarExtraction extraction = extractBars(page, projection);
    if (!extraction.valid) {
        return {};
    }
    const NativePptCategoryLegendInference inference = inferCategoriesAndLegends(extraction);
    const NativePptChartEmission emission = emitChartXml(extraction, inference);
    if (!emission.valid) {
        return {};
    }
    NativePptChartPart out;
    out.valid = true;
    out.frameRect = extraction.plotRect.adjusted(
        0.0,
        -qMin(extraction.plotRect.height() * 0.2, 480000.0),
        qMin(extraction.plotRect.width() * 0.25, 1200000.0),
        0.0
    );
    out.categories = inference.categories;
    out.seriesNames = emission.seriesNames;
    out.seriesValues = emission.seriesValues;
    out.chartXml = emission.chartXml;
    out.chartKind = emission.chartKind;
    out.barSeriesCount = emission.barSeriesCount;
    out.lineSeriesCount = emission.lineSeriesCount;
    out.secondaryAxisSeriesCount = emission.secondaryAxisSeriesCount;
    out.hasSecondaryAxis = emission.hasSecondaryAxis;
    out.primaryAxisNumFmt = emission.primaryAxisNumFmt;
    out.secondaryAxisNumFmt = emission.secondaryAxisNumFmt;
    out.seriesAxisBindings = emission.seriesAxisBindings;
    out.axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount = emission.axisBindingCandidateSeriesCount;
    out.axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount = emission.axisBindingMatchedSeriesCount;
    out.axisBindingQuality = emission.axisBindingQuality;
    out.legendEntryCount = emission.legendEntryCount;
    out.legendMappedSeriesCount = emission.legendMappedSeriesCount;
    out.legendSeriesConsistent = emission.legendSeriesConsistent;
    int namedSeriesCount = 0;
    for (const QString &name : out.seriesNames) {
        const QString t = name.trimmed();
        if (t.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^Series\s+\d+$)"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption).match(t).hasMatch()) {
            namedSeriesCount += 1;
        }
    }
    int labeledCategoryCount = 0;
    for (const QString &label : out.categories) {
        const QString t = label.trimmed();
        if (t.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^Cat\s+\d+$)"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption).match(t).hasMatch()) {
            labeledCategoryCount += 1;
        }
    }
    out.namedSeriesCount = namedSeriesCount;
    out.labeledCategoryCount = labeledCategoryCount;
    out.heuristicMode = emission.heuristicMode;
    out.embeddedWorkbookTarget = QStringLiteral("Microsoft_Excel_Worksheet.xlsx");
    out.chartRelsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/package\" "
        "Target=\"../embeddings/%1\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    ).arg(escapeXml(out.embeddedWorkbookTarget));
    return out;
}

NativePptTablePart buildNativePptTablePart(const PageContent &page, const double slideW, const double slideH) {
    const NativePptPageProjection projection = buildNativePptProjection(page, slideW, slideH);
    auto rectArea = [](const QRectF &rect) {
        return qMax(0.0, rect.width()) * qMax(0.0, rect.height());
    };
    auto chooseBorderColorForFrame = [&](const QRectF &frameRect) {
        const QRectF evalRect = frameRect.adjusted(-36000.0, -36000.0, 36000.0, 36000.0);
        QHash<QString, double> colorScores;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.isBackground || g.kind != GraphicKind::Line) {
                continue;
            }
            const double x1 = projection.pxX(static_cast<double>(g.x));
            const double y1 = projection.pxY(static_cast<double>(g.y));
            const double x2 = projection.pxX(static_cast<double>(g.x2));
            const double y2 = projection.pxY(static_cast<double>(g.y2));
            const QRectF lineRect(
                qMin(x1, x2),
                qMin(y1, y2),
                qMax(1.0, qAbs(x2 - x1)),
                qMax(1.0, qAbs(y2 - y1))
            );
            if (!evalRect.intersects(lineRect)) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString hex = normalizePptHexColor(
                !g.strokeColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? g.strokeColor : colorOrDefault(g.fillColor, QStringLiteral("#D1D5DB")),
                QStringLiteral("D1D5DB")
            );
            colorScores[hex] += qMax(1.0, QLineF(x1, y1, x2, y2).length());
        }
        QString best = QStringLiteral("D1D5DB");
        double bestScore = 0.0;
        for (auto it = colorScores.constBegin(); it != colorScores.constEnd(); ++it) {
            if (it.value() > bestScore) {
                bestScore = it.value();
                best = it.key();
            }
        }
        return best;
    };
    auto chooseFillColorForCell = [&](const QRectF &cellRect, const bool headerCell, const QRectF &tableFrameRect) {
        const QString fallback = headerCell ? QStringLiteral("F3F4F6") : QStringLiteral("FFFFFF");
        if (rectArea(cellRect) <= 1.0) {
            return fallback;
        }
        QHash<QString, double> colorScores;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.isBackground || g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle || g.opacity < 0.08f) {
                continue;
            }
            const double srcLeft = qMin(static_cast<double>(g.x), static_cast<double>(g.x + g.w));
            const double srcTop = qMin(static_cast<double>(g.y), static_cast<double>(g.y + g.h));
            const QRectF graphicRect(
                projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, srcLeft)),
                projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, srcTop)),
                qMax(1.0, qAbs(static_cast<double>(g.w)) * projection.scale),
                qMax(1.0, qAbs(static_cast<double>(g.h)) * projection.scale)
            );
            if (!tableFrameRect.intersects(graphicRect)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (rectArea(graphicRect) >= rectArea(tableFrameRect) * 0.92) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF inter = graphicRect.intersected(cellRect);
            const double overlapRatio = rectArea(inter) / rectArea(cellRect);
            if (overlapRatio < 0.35) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString hex = normalizePptHexColor(
                !g.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? g.fillColor : g.strokeColor,
                fallback
            );
            colorScores[hex] += rectArea(inter);
        }
        QString best = fallback;
        double bestScore = 0.0;
        for (auto it = colorScores.constBegin(); it != colorScores.constEnd(); ++it) {
            if (it.value() > bestScore) {
                bestScore = it.value();
                best = it.key();
            }
        }
        return best;
    };
    if (!page.tables.isEmpty()) {
        const TableObject *best = &page.tables.first();
        double bestArea = static_cast<double>(best->w) * static_cast<double>(best->h);
        for (const TableObject &candidate : page.tables) {
            const double area = static_cast<double>(candidate.w) * static_cast<double>(candidate.h);
            if (area > bestArea) {
                best = &candidate;
                bestArea = area;
            }
        }
        const int rowCount = qMax(0, best->rowCount);
        const int colCount = qMax(0, best->colCount);
        if (rowCount > 0 && colCount > 0 && !best->cells.isEmpty()) {
            struct CellAnchor {
                TableCellObject cell;
            };
            QVector<QVector<int>> anchorIndex(rowCount, QVector<int>(colCount, -1));
            QVector<QVector<bool>> covered(rowCount, QVector<bool>(colCount, false));
            QVector<CellAnchor> anchors;
            anchors.reserve(best->cells.size());
            for (const TableCellObject &rawCell : best->cells) {
                const int row = qBound(0, rawCell.row, rowCount - 1);
                const int col = qBound(0, rawCell.col, colCount - 1);
                const int rowSpan = qMax(1, qMin(rawCell.rowSpan, rowCount - row));
                const int colSpan = qMax(1, qMin(rawCell.colSpan, colCount - col));
                bool conflict = false;
                for (int rr = row; rr < row + rowSpan && !conflict; ++rr) {
                    for (int cc = col; cc < col + colSpan; ++cc) {
                        if (covered[rr][cc]) {
                            conflict = true;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
                if (conflict) {
                    continue;
                }
                CellAnchor anchor;
                anchor.cell = rawCell;
                anchor.cell.row = row;
                anchor.cell.col = col;
                anchor.cell.rowSpan = rowSpan;
                anchor.cell.colSpan = colSpan;
                const int idx = anchors.size();
                anchors.push_back(anchor);
                for (int rr = row; rr < row + rowSpan; ++rr) {
                    for (int cc = col; cc < col + colSpan; ++cc) {
                        covered[rr][cc] = true;
                        anchorIndex[rr][cc] = idx;
                    }
                }
            }
            if (!anchors.isEmpty()) {
                const QRectF nativeTableFrameRect(
                    projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(best->x))),
                    projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(best->y))),
                    qMax(180000.0, qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(best->w)) * projection.scale),
                    qMax(120000.0, qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(best->h)) * projection.scale)
                );
                const QString tableBorderColor = chooseBorderColorForFrame(nativeTableFrameRect);
                QVector<double> colWidths(colCount, qMax(90000.0, projection.pxW(static_cast<double>(best->w)) / qMax(1, colCount)));
                QVector<double> rowHeights(rowCount, qMax(48000.0, projection.pxH(static_cast<double>(best->h)) / qMax(1, rowCount)));
                for (const CellAnchor &anchor : anchors) {
                    const double w = qMax(1.0, projection.pxW(static_cast<double>(anchor.cell.w)));
                    const double h = qMax(1.0, projection.pxH(static_cast<double>(anchor.cell.h)));
                    colWidths[anchor.cell.col] = qMax(colWidths[anchor.cell.col], w / qMax(1, anchor.cell.colSpan));
                    rowHeights[anchor.cell.row] = qMax(rowHeights[anchor.cell.row], h / qMax(1, anchor.cell.rowSpan));
                }
                QVector<double> colOffsets(colCount + 1, nativeTableFrameRect.left());
                for (int c = 0; c < colCount; ++c) {
                    colOffsets[c + 1] = colOffsets[c] + qMax(90000.0, colWidths[c]);
                }
                QVector<double> rowOffsets(rowCount + 1, nativeTableFrameRect.top());
                for (int r = 0; r < rowCount; ++r) {
                    rowOffsets[r + 1] = rowOffsets[r] + qMax(48000.0, rowHeights[r]);
                }
                QString gridXml;
                for (int c = 0; c < colCount; ++c) {
                    const qlonglong w = static_cast<qlonglong>(qRound(qMax(90000.0, colWidths[c])));
                    gridXml += QStringLiteral("<a:gridCol w=\"%1\"/>").arg(QString::number(w));
                }
                QString rowsXml;
                int filledCellCount = 0;
                for (int r = 0; r < rowCount; ++r) {
                    QString cellsXml;
                    for (int c = 0; c < colCount; ++c) {
                        const int idx = anchorIndex[r][c];
                        if (idx < 0 || idx >= anchors.size()) {
                            const QRectF cellRect(
                                colOffsets[c],
                                rowOffsets[r],
                                qMax(1.0, colOffsets[c + 1] - colOffsets[c]),
                                qMax(1.0, rowOffsets[r + 1] - rowOffsets[r])
                            );
                            const QString cellFill = chooseFillColorForCell(cellRect, r == 0, nativeTableFrameRect);
                            cellsXml += QStringLiteral(
                                "<a:tc><a:txBody><a:bodyPr/><a:lstStyle/><a:p/></a:txBody>"
                                "<a:tcPr><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%1\"/></a:solidFill>"
                                "<a:lnL w=\"12700\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%2\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnL>"
                                "<a:lnR w=\"12700\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%2\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnR>"
                                "<a:lnT w=\"12700\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%2\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnT>"
                                "<a:lnB w=\"12700\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%2\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnB>"
                                "</a:tcPr></a:tc>"
                            ).arg(cellFill, tableBorderColor);
                            continue;
                        }
                        const CellAnchor &anchor = anchors.at(idx);
                        const bool isAnchor = anchor.cell.row == r && anchor.cell.col == c;
                        const bool hMerge = !isAnchor && r == anchor.cell.row;
                        const bool vMerge = !isAnchor && c == anchor.cell.col;
                        const bool hvMerge = !isAnchor && r > anchor.cell.row && c > anchor.cell.col;
                        if (isAnchor && !anchor.cell.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                            filledCellCount += 1;
                        }
                        const QString cellText = isAnchor ? anchor.cell.text.trimmed() : QString();
                        const bool headerCell = isAnchor && anchor.cell.row == 0;
                        const bool numericCell = cellText.contains(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^[+\-]?\d[\d,]*(\.\d+)?%?$)")));
                        QString algn = numericCell ? QStringLiteral("r") : (headerCell ? QStringLiteral("ctr") : QStringLiteral("l"));
                        if (isAnchor && !anchor.cell.textAlign.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                            algn = paragraphAlignToPpt(anchor.cell.textAlign);
                        }
                        const QString pPr = QStringLiteral("<a:pPr algn=\"%1\" marL=\"6000\" marR=\"6000\"/>").arg(algn);
                        const QString textColor = normalizePptHexColor(
                            isAnchor && !anchor.cell.textColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? anchor.cell.textColor : QStringLiteral("#111111"),
                            QStringLiteral("111111")
                        );
                        const QString borderColor = normalizePptHexColor(
                            isAnchor && !anchor.cell.borderColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? anchor.cell.borderColor : tableBorderColor,
                            tableBorderColor
                        );
                        const int textSz = qBound(900, static_cast<int>(qRound((isAnchor ? qMax(8.0f, anchor.cell.fontSize) : (headerCell ? 12.0f : 11.0f)) * 100.0f)), 4800);
                        const int textBold = isAnchor ? (anchor.cell.bold ? 1 : 0) : (headerCell ? 1 : 0);
                        const int textItalic = isAnchor && anchor.cell.italic ? 1 : 0;
                        const QString fontFamily = mapPptFontFamily(
                            isAnchor ? anchor.cell.fontFamily : QString(),
                            preferredPptFallbackFont()
                        );
                        const QString textRun = cellText.isEmpty()
                            ? QStringLiteral("<a:p>%1</a:p>").arg(pPr)
                            : QStringLiteral(
                                "<a:p>%1<a:r><a:rPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%2\" b=\"%3\" i=\"%4\">"
                                "<a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%5\"/></a:solidFill>"
                                "<a:latin typeface=\"%6\"/><a:ea typeface=\"%6\"/></a:rPr><a:t>%7</a:t></a:r>"
                                "<a:endParaRPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%2\"/></a:p>"
                            ).arg(pPr).arg(textSz).arg(textBold).arg(textItalic).arg(textColor).arg(escapeXml(fontFamily)).arg(escapeXml(cellText));
                        QString mergeAttrs;
                        if (isAnchor && anchor.cell.colSpan > 1) {
                            mergeAttrs += QStringLiteral(" gridSpan=\"%1\"").arg(anchor.cell.colSpan);
                        }
                        if (isAnchor && anchor.cell.rowSpan > 1) {
                            mergeAttrs += QStringLiteral(" rowSpan=\"%1\"").arg(anchor.cell.rowSpan);
                        }
                        if (hMerge || hvMerge) {
                            mergeAttrs += QStringLiteral(" hMerge=\"1\"");
                        }
                        if (vMerge || hvMerge) {
                            mergeAttrs += QStringLiteral(" vMerge=\"1\"");
                        }
                        const int rowSpan = qMax(1, isAnchor ? anchor.cell.rowSpan : 1);
                        const int colSpan = qMax(1, isAnchor ? anchor.cell.colSpan : 1);
                        const QRectF cellRect(
                            colOffsets[c],
                            rowOffsets[r],
                            qMax(1.0, colOffsets[qMin(colCount, c + colSpan)] - colOffsets[c]),
                            qMax(1.0, rowOffsets[qMin(rowCount, r + rowSpan)] - rowOffsets[r])
                        );
                        const QString cellFillStyled = normalizePptHexColor(
                            isAnchor && !anchor.cell.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty() ? anchor.cell.fillColor : QStringLiteral("#FFFFFF"),
                            QStringLiteral("FFFFFF")
                        );
                        const QString resolvedCellFill = isAnchor && !anchor.cell.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty()
                            ? cellFillStyled
                            : chooseFillColorForCell(cellRect, headerCell, nativeTableFrameRect);
                        const QString cellFill = resolvedCellFill;
                        const int borderWidth = static_cast<int>(qRound(qMax(0.3f, isAnchor ? anchor.cell.borderWidth : 0.6f) * 12700.0f));
                        cellsXml += QStringLiteral(
                            "<a:tc%3><a:txBody><a:bodyPr/><a:lstStyle/>%1</a:txBody>"
                            "<a:tcPr><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%2\"/></a:solidFill>"
                            "<a:lnL w=\"%5\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%4\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnL>"
                            "<a:lnR w=\"%5\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%4\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnR>"
                            "<a:lnT w=\"%5\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%4\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnT>"
                            "<a:lnB w=\"%5\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%4\"/></a:solidFill></a:lnB>"
                            "</a:tcPr></a:tc>"
                        ).arg(textRun, cellFill, mergeAttrs, borderColor).arg(borderWidth);
                    }
                    rowsXml += QStringLiteral(
                        "<a:tr h=\"%1\">%2</a:tr>"
                    ).arg(QString::number(static_cast<qlonglong>(qRound(qMax(48000.0, rowHeights[r])))), cellsXml);
                }
                NativePptTablePart out;
                out.valid = true;
                out.frameRect = nativeTableFrameRect;
                out.rowCount = rowCount;
                out.colCount = colCount;
                out.filledCellCount = filledCellCount;
                out.heuristicMode = false;
                out.tableXml = QStringLiteral(
                    "<a:tbl><a:tblPr firstRow=\"1\" bandRow=\"1\"><a:tableStyleId>"
                    "{5C22544A-7EE6-4342-B048-85BDC9FD1C3A}</a:tableStyleId></a:tblPr>"
                    "<a:tblGrid>%1</a:tblGrid>%2</a:tbl>"
                ).arg(gridXml, rowsXml);
                return out;
            }
        }
    }
    // 禁用“纯文本启发式表格重建”：仅当识别层明确产出 table 对象时才导出表格。
    return {};
}

NativePptSmartArtPart buildNativePptSmartArtPart(const PageContent &page, const double slideW, const double slideH, int diagramIndex = 1) {
    const NativePptPageProjection projection = buildNativePptProjection(page, slideW, slideH);
    struct NodeCandidate {
        QRectF rect;
        QString color;
        QStringList texts;
    };
    struct ConnectorLine {
        QPointF p1;
        QPointF p2;
    };
    QVector<NodeCandidate> nodes;
    QVector<ConnectorLine> connectorLines;
    auto normalizeHex6 = [](QString color) {
        color = color.trimmed().toUpper();
        if (color.startsWith('#')) {
            color.remove(0, 1);
        }
        if (color.size() == 8) {
            color = color.mid(2);
        }
        static const QRegularExpression hex6Re(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-F]{6}$)"));
        return hex6Re.match(color).hasMatch() ? color : QString();
    };
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground) {
            continue;
        }
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            const QRectF r(
                projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x))),
                projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y))),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * projection.scale),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * projection.scale)
            );
            if (r.width() >= 12000.0 && r.height() >= 12000.0) {
                const QString nodeColor = normalizeHex6(colorOrDefault(g.fillColor, g.strokeColor));
                nodes.push_back({r, nodeColor.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("4F81BD") : nodeColor, {}});
            }
        } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
            connectorLines.push_back({
                QPointF(projection.pxX(g.x), projection.pxY(g.y)),
                QPointF(projection.pxX(g.x2), projection.pxY(g.y2))
            });
        }
    }
    if (nodes.size() < 3 || !detectNativePptSmartArtObject(page, slideW, slideH)) {
        return {};
    }
    std::sort(nodes.begin(), nodes.end(), [](const NodeCandidate &a, const NodeCandidate &b) {
        if (qAbs(a.rect.top() - b.rect.top()) > 36000.0) {
            return a.rect.top() < b.rect.top();
        }
        return a.rect.left() < b.rect.left();
    });
    QRectF unionRect = nodes.first().rect;
    for (int i = 1; i < nodes.size(); ++i) {
        unionRect = unionRect.united(nodes[i].rect);
    }

    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QRectF textRect(
            projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x))),
            projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y))),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.w) * projection.scale),
            qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.h) * projection.scale + 32000.0)
        );
        int bestNode = -1;
        double bestOverlap = 0.0;
        for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); ++i) {
            const QRectF inter = nodes[i].rect.intersected(textRect);
            const double interArea = inter.width() * inter.height();
            if (interArea <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const double overlap = interArea / qMax(1.0, textRect.width() * textRect.height());
            if (overlap > bestOverlap) {
                bestOverlap = overlap;
                bestNode = i;
            }
        }
        if (bestNode < 0 || bestOverlap < 0.10) {
            continue;
        }
        QStringList &bucket = nodes[bestNode].texts;
        if (!bucket.contains(text) && bucket.size() < 3) {
            bucket.push_back(text);
        }
    }

    QVector<QPointF> centers;
    centers.reserve(nodes.size());
    for (const NodeCandidate &node : nodes) {
        centers.push_back(node.rect.center());
    }
    QVector<int> parentByNode(nodes.size(), -1);
    auto nearestNodeIndex = [&](const QPointF &p) {
        const double tol = 42000.0;
        int bestIndex = -1;
        double bestDist = std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
        for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); ++i) {
            const QRectF inflated = nodes[i].rect.adjusted(-tol, -tol, tol, tol);
            if (!inflated.contains(p)) {
                continue;
            }
            const double dist = QLineF(nodes[i].rect.center(), p).length();
            if (dist < bestDist) {
                bestDist = dist;
                bestIndex = i;
            }
        }
        return bestIndex;
    };
    QVector<QPair<int, int>> edgesParentChild;
    QSet<QString> seenEdges;
    for (const ConnectorLine &line : connectorLines) {
        const int a = nearestNodeIndex(line.p1);
        const int b = nearestNodeIndex(line.p2);
        if (a < 0 || b < 0 || a == b) {
            continue;
        }
        int parent = a;
        int child = b;
        if (centers[a].y() > centers[b].y() + 2000.0
            || (qAbs(centers[a].y() - centers[b].y()) <= 2000.0 && centers[a].x() > centers[b].x())) {
            parent = b;
            child = a;
        }
        const QString edgeKey = QStringLiteral("%1>%2").arg(parent).arg(child);
        if (seenEdges.contains(edgeKey)) {
            continue;
        }
        seenEdges.insert(edgeKey);
        edgesParentChild.push_back({parent, child});
    }
    if (edgesParentChild.isEmpty()) {
        // Strict source-object replication: without connector-derived relations, abort SmartArt emission.
        return {};
    }
    for (const QPair<int, int> &edge : edgesParentChild) {
        const int parent = edge.first;
        const int child = edge.second;
        if (child < 0 || child >= parentByNode.size()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (parentByNode[child] < 0) {
            parentByNode[child] = parent;
            continue;
        }
        const int prevParent = parentByNode[child];
        const double prevDy = qAbs(centers[prevParent].y() - centers[child].y());
        const double newDy = qAbs(centers[parent].y() - centers[child].y());
        if (newDy < prevDy) {
            parentByNode[child] = parent;
        }
    }
    QVector<int> childCount(nodes.size(), 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < parentByNode.size(); ++i) {
        const int parent = parentByNode[i];
        if (parent >= 0 && parent < childCount.size()) {
            childCount[parent] += 1;
        }
    }
    if (parentByNode.value(0, -1) >= 0) {
        parentByNode[0] = -1;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i < nodes.size(); ++i) {
        if (parentByNode[i] >= 0) {
            continue;
        }
        int bestParent = -1;
        double bestScore = std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
        for (int p = 0; p < nodes.size(); ++p) {
            if (p == i || centers[p].y() > centers[i].y() + 24000.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const double dx = qAbs(centers[p].x() - centers[i].x());
            const double dy = qAbs(centers[p].y() - centers[i].y());
            const double score = dy * 2.0 + dx;
            if (score < bestScore) {
                bestScore = score;
                bestParent = p;
            }
        }
        if (bestParent < 0) {
            bestParent = i - 1;
        }
        parentByNode[i] = bestParent;
        childCount[bestParent] += 1;
    }
    int branchingNodeCount = 0;
    for (const int count : childCount) {
        if (count > 1) {
            branchingNodeCount += 1;
        }
    }
    QHash<QString, int> colorFreq;
    for (const NodeCandidate &node : nodes) {
        colorFreq[node.color] = colorFreq.value(node.color, 0) + 1;
    }
    QString dominantNodeColor = QStringLiteral("4F81BD");
    QString secondaryNodeColor = QStringLiteral("C0504D");
    int dominantNodeColorCount = 0;
    int secondaryNodeColorCount = 0;
    for (auto it = colorFreq.constBegin(); it != colorFreq.constEnd(); ++it) {
        if (it.value() > dominantNodeColorCount) {
            secondaryNodeColor = dominantNodeColor;
            secondaryNodeColorCount = dominantNodeColorCount;
            dominantNodeColorCount = it.value();
            dominantNodeColor = it.key();
        } else if (it.value() > secondaryNodeColorCount && it.key() != dominantNodeColor) {
            secondaryNodeColorCount = it.value();
            secondaryNodeColor = it.key();
        }
    }
    if (secondaryNodeColor.isEmpty()) {
        secondaryNodeColor = dominantNodeColor;
    }

    QString ptList;
    QString cxnList;
    int labeledNodeCount = 0;
    const int docModelId = 1;
    ptList += QStringLiteral(
        "<dgm:pt modelId=\"%1\" type=\"doc\"><dgm:prSet phldrT=\"title\"/></dgm:pt>"
    ).arg(docModelId);
    QVector<int> modelIdByNode(nodes.size(), 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); ++i) {
        const int modelId = 100 + i;
        modelIdByNode[i] = modelId;
        const QString nodeText = nodes[i].texts.join(QStringLiteral(" | "));
        if (!nodeText.isEmpty()) {
            labeledNodeCount += 1;
        }
        const QString phldrType = parentByNode[i] < 0 ? QStringLiteral("title") : QStringLiteral("body");
        ptList += QStringLiteral(
            "<dgm:pt modelId=\"%1\" type=\"node\"><dgm:prSet phldrT=\"%3\"/><dgm:t>"
            "<a:txBody xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\"><a:bodyPr/><a:lstStyle/><a:p><a:r><a:t>%2</a:t></a:r></a:p></a:txBody>"
            "</dgm:t></dgm:pt>"
        ).arg(modelId)
         .arg(escapeXml(nodeText.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("Node %1").arg(i + 1) : nodeText))
         .arg(phldrType);
    }
    int edgeModelId = 1000;
    QHash<int, QVector<int>> childrenByParent;
    for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); ++i) {
        const int parent = parentByNode[i];
        if (parent < 0 || parent >= nodes.size()) {
            continue;
        }
        childrenByParent[parent].push_back(i);
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < nodes.size(); ++i) {
        if (parentByNode[i] < 0) {
            cxnList += QStringLiteral(
                "<dgm:cxn modelId=\"%1\" type=\"presOf\" srcId=\"%2\" destId=\"%3\"/>"
            ).arg(edgeModelId++).arg(modelIdByNode[i]).arg(docModelId);
        } else {
            cxnList += QStringLiteral(
                "<dgm:cxn modelId=\"%1\" type=\"parOf\" srcId=\"%2\" destId=\"%3\"/>"
            ).arg(edgeModelId++).arg(modelIdByNode[i]).arg(modelIdByNode[parentByNode[i]]);
        }
    }
    for (auto it = childrenByParent.constBegin(); it != childrenByParent.constEnd(); ++it) {
        QVector<int> siblings = it.value();
        std::sort(siblings.begin(), siblings.end(), [&](const int a, const int b) {
            return centers[a].x() < centers[b].x();
        });
        for (int i = 1; i < siblings.size(); ++i) {
            cxnList += QStringLiteral(
                "<dgm:cxn modelId=\"%1\" type=\"sibTrans\" srcId=\"%2\" destId=\"%3\"/>"
            ).arg(edgeModelId++).arg(modelIdByNode[siblings[i - 1]]).arg(modelIdByNode[siblings[i]]);
        }
    }
    int rootCount = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < parentByNode.size(); ++i) {
        if (parentByNode[i] < 0) {
            rootCount += 1;
        }
    }

    NativePptSmartArtPart out;
    out.valid = true;
    out.frameRect = unionRect.adjusted(-48000.0, -48000.0, 48000.0, 48000.0);
    out.nodeCount = nodes.size();
    out.labeledNodeCount = labeledNodeCount;
    out.edgeCount = qMax(0, edgeModelId - 1000);
    out.heuristicMode = false;
    const int signatureSeed = diagramIndex * 97 + out.nodeCount * 13 + out.edgeCount * 7 + branchingNodeCount * 19;
    const QString layoutId = QStringLiteral("{00000000-0000-0000-0000-%1}")
        .arg(QString::number(100000 + signatureSeed, 16).rightJustified(12, QLatin1Char('0')).toUpper());
    const QString styleId = QStringLiteral("{00000000-0000-0000-0000-%1}")
        .arg(QString::number(200000 + signatureSeed, 16).rightJustified(12, QLatin1Char('0')).toUpper());
    const QString colorsId = QStringLiteral("{00000000-0000-0000-0000-%1}")
        .arg(QString::number(300000 + signatureSeed, 16).rightJustified(12, QLatin1Char('0')).toUpper());
    const QString chainEvidence = QStringLiteral(
        "srcBased=1;diagram=%1;node=%2;edge=%3;root=%4;branch=%5;color=%6/%7;labeled=%8/%9"
    ).arg(diagramIndex)
     .arg(out.nodeCount)
     .arg(out.edgeCount)
     .arg(rootCount)
     .arg(branchingNodeCount)
     .arg(dominantNodeColor)
     .arg(secondaryNodeColor)
     .arg(labeledNodeCount)
     .arg(out.nodeCount);
    out.dataXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<dgm:dataModel xmlns:dgm=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/diagram\" "
        "xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\">"
        "<dgm:ptLst>%1</dgm:ptLst><dgm:cxnLst>%2</dgm:cxnLst>"
        "<dgm:bg/><dgm:whole><dgm:prSet phldrT=\"body\"/></dgm:whole></dgm:dataModel>"
    ).arg(ptList, cxnList);
    const QString layoutKind = branchingNodeCount > 0 ? QStringLiteral("hierarchy") : QStringLiteral("flow");
    out.layoutXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<dgm:layoutDef xmlns:dgm=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/diagram\" "
        "uniqueId=\"%1\" minVer=\"12.0\">"
        "<dgm:title val=\"Source Replicated %2 Layout\"/><dgm:desc val=\"%3\"/>"
        "<dgm:catLst><dgm:cat type=\"list\" pri=\"40000\"/><dgm:cat type=\"hierarchy\" pri=\"40000\"/></dgm:catLst>"
        "<dgm:sampData/><dgm:styleData/><dgm:clrData/></dgm:layoutDef>"
    ).arg(layoutId, layoutKind, chainEvidence);
    out.styleXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<dgm:styleDef xmlns:dgm=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/diagram\" "
        "uniqueId=\"%1\" minVer=\"12.0\">"
        "<dgm:title val=\"Source Replicated Style\"/><dgm:desc val=\"%2\"/></dgm:styleDef>"
    ).arg(styleId, chainEvidence);
    out.colorsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<dgm:colorsDef xmlns:dgm=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/diagram\" "
        "uniqueId=\"%1\" minVer=\"12.0\">"
        "<dgm:title val=\"Source Replicated Colors\"/><dgm:desc val=\"%2;palette=%3,%4\"/></dgm:colorsDef>"
    ).arg(colorsId, chainEvidence, dominantNodeColor, secondaryNodeColor);
    return out;
}

bool detectNativePptSmartArtObject(const PageContent &page, const double slideW, const double slideH) {
    const NativePptPageProjection projection = buildNativePptProjection(page, slideW, slideH);
    QVector<QRectF> nodeRects;
    struct ConnectorLine {
        QPointF p1;
        QPointF p2;
    };
    QVector<ConnectorLine> connectorLines;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground) {
            continue;
        }
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            const QRectF r(
                projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x))),
                projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y))),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * projection.scale),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * projection.scale)
            );
            if (r.width() >= 12000.0 && r.height() >= 12000.0) {
                nodeRects.push_back(r);
            }
        } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
            connectorLines.push_back({
                QPointF(projection.pxX(g.x), projection.pxY(g.y)),
                QPointF(projection.pxX(g.x2), projection.pxY(g.y2))
            });
        }
    }
    if (nodeRects.size() < 3 || connectorLines.size() < 2) {
        return false;
    }
    const double nearTol = 42000.0;
    auto endpointNearRect = [&](const QPointF &p, int *hitIndex) {
        for (int i = 0; i < nodeRects.size(); ++i) {
            const QRectF inflated = nodeRects[i].adjusted(-nearTol, -nearTol, nearTol, nearTol);
            if (inflated.contains(p)) {
                if (hitIndex) {
                    *hitIndex = i;
                }
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    };
    int linkedConnectors = 0;
    for (const ConnectorLine &line : connectorLines) {
        int a = -1;
        int b = -1;
        if (!endpointNearRect(line.p1, &a) || !endpointNearRect(line.p2, &b)) {
            continue;
        }
        if (a == b) {
            continue;
        }
        linkedConnectors += 1;
    }
    return linkedConnectors >= 2;
}

QString buildSlideXml(
    const PageContent &page,
    const QString &themeFont,
    const QString &chartRelId = QString(),
    const QRectF &chartFrameRect = QRectF(),
    const QString &chartKind = QString(),
    const int chartSeriesCount = 0,
    const int chartCategoryCount = 0,
    const int chartNamedSeriesCount = 0,
    const int chartLabeledCategoryCount = 0,
    const int chartBarSeriesCount = 0,
    const int chartLineSeriesCount = 0,
    const int chartSecondaryAxisSeriesCount = 0,
    const bool chartHasSecondaryAxis = false,
    const QString &chartPrimaryAxisNumFmt = QString(),
    const QString &chartSecondaryAxisNumFmt = QString(),
    const QString &chartSeriesAxisBindings = QString(),
    const int chartAxisBindingMatchedSeriesCount = 0,
    const int chartAxisBindingCandidateSeriesCount = 0,
    const int chartAxisBindingQuality = 0,
    const int chartLegendEntryCount = 0,
    const int chartLegendMappedSeriesCount = 0,
    const bool chartLegendSeriesConsistent = false,
    const bool chartHeuristicMode = false,
    const QString &smartArtDataRelId = QString(),
    const QString &smartArtLayoutRelId = QString(),
    const QString &smartArtStyleRelId = QString(),
    const QString &smartArtColorsRelId = QString(),
    const QRectF &smartArtFrameRect = QRectF(),
    const int smartArtNodeCount = 0,
    const int smartArtLabeledNodeCount = 0,
    const int smartArtEdgeCount = 0,
    const bool smartArtHeuristicMode = false,
    const QString &tableObjectXml = QString(),
    const QRectF &tableFrameRect = QRectF(),
    const int tableRowCount = 0,
    const int tableColCount = 0,
    const int tableFilledCellCount = 0,
    const bool tableHeuristicMode = false,
    const QHash<int, QString> &imageRelByGraphic = QHash<int, QString>(),
    const double slideW = 12192000.0,
    const double slideH = 6858000.0
) {
    const double pageW = page.width > 1.0f ? page.width : 595.0;
    const double pageH = page.height > 1.0f ? page.height : 842.0;
    const double scale = qMin(slideW / pageW, slideH / pageH);
    const double offsetX = (slideW - pageW * scale) * 0.5;
    const double offsetY = (slideH - pageH * scale) * 0.5;

    struct Drawable {
        int z = 0;
        QString xml;
    };
    QVector<Drawable> drawables;
    int shapeId = 2;

    auto toEmu = [](double v) {
        return QString::number(qMax(1, static_cast<int>(qRound(v))));
    };
    auto alphaVal = [](double opacity) {
        const int alpha = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(opacity * 100000.0)), 100000);
        return QString::number(alpha);
    };
    auto emuRotationFromVector = [](double dx, double dy) {
        if (qAbs(dx) < 1e-6 && qAbs(dy) < 1e-6) {
            return QString();
        }
        double deg = std::atan2(dy, dx) * 180.0 / M_PI;
        if (deg < 0.0) {
            deg += 360.0;
        }
        const qlonglong rot = static_cast<qlonglong>(qRound(deg * 60000.0));
        return QStringLiteral(" rot=\"%1\"").arg(rot);
    };
    auto pxX = [&](double x) { return offsetX + x * scale; };
    auto pxY = [&](double y) { return offsetY + y * scale; };
    int rectCount = 0;
    int lineCount = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            rectCount += 1;
        } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
            lineCount += 1;
        }
    }
    const bool isChartLikePage = !chartRelId.isEmpty() || (rectCount >= 3 && lineCount >= 2);
    const bool isSmartArtLikePage = !isChartLikePage && rectCount >= 3 && lineCount >= 2;
    const QRectF chartEvidenceRect = chartFrameRect.adjusted(-36000.0, -36000.0, 36000.0, 36000.0);
    const QRectF smartArtEvidenceRect = smartArtFrameRect.adjusted(-36000.0, -36000.0, 36000.0, 36000.0);
    const QRectF tableEvidenceRect = tableFrameRect.adjusted(-24000.0, -24000.0, 24000.0, 24000.0);
    const bool hasEditableContent = !page.lines.isEmpty() || !tableObjectXml.isEmpty();
    auto rectArea = [](const QRectF &rect) {
        return qMax(0.0, rect.width()) * qMax(0.0, rect.height());
    };
    auto normalizedColorKey = [](QString color) {
        color = color.trimmed().toLower();
        if (color.startsWith('#')) {
            color.remove(0, 1);
        }
        if (color.isEmpty()) {
            return QStringLiteral("auto");
        }
        return color.left(8);
    };
    struct ChartSemanticContext {
        bool enabled = false;
        bool hasSecondaryAxis = false;
        QRectF plotRect;
        QRectF legendRect;
        bool hasPlotRect = false;
        bool hasLegendRect = false;
        QHash<int, QString> graphicDescr;
        QHash<int, int> seriesIdByGraphic;
        QHash<int, int> seriesIdByTextLine;
        QHash<QString, int> seriesIdByColor;
        int nextSeriesId = 1;
    } chartCtx;
    chartCtx.enabled = isChartLikePage;
    chartCtx.hasSecondaryAxis = chartHasSecondaryAxis
        || chartKind.contains(QStringLiteral("combo"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)
        || chartKind.contains(QStringLiteral("dual"), Qt::CaseInsensitive);
    if (chartCtx.enabled) {
        QVector<QRectF> rects;
        QVector<int> rectIndices;
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle || g.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF r(
                pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x))),
                pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y))),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * scale),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * scale)
            );
            if (r.width() < 2000.0 || r.height() < 2000.0) {
                continue;
            }
            rects.push_back(r);
            rectIndices.push_back(gi);
        }
        if (!rects.isEmpty()) {
            QRectF bbox = rects.first();
            for (int i = 1; i < rects.size(); ++i) {
                bbox = bbox.united(rects[i]);
            }
            if (bbox.width() > slideW * 0.18 && bbox.height() > slideH * 0.18) {
                chartCtx.plotRect = bbox;
                chartCtx.hasPlotRect = true;
            }
        }
        auto ensureSeriesId = [&](const QString &rawColor) {
            const QString colorKey = normalizedColorKey(rawColor);
            if (chartCtx.seriesIdByColor.contains(colorKey)) {
                return chartCtx.seriesIdByColor.value(colorKey);
            }
            const int id = chartCtx.nextSeriesId;
            chartCtx.nextSeriesId = chartCtx.nextSeriesId >= 8 ? 1 : chartCtx.nextSeriesId + 1;
            chartCtx.seriesIdByColor.insert(colorKey, id);
            return id;
        };
        for (int i = 0; i < rects.size(); ++i) {
            const QRectF &r = rects[i];
            if (chartCtx.hasPlotRect && chartCtx.plotRect.intersected(r).width() * chartCtx.plotRect.intersected(r).height() > 0.0) {
                const GraphicObject &rectGraphic = page.graphics.at(rectIndices[i]);
                const QString colorKey = !rectGraphic.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty()
                    ? rectGraphic.fillColor
                    : colorOrDefault(rectGraphic.strokeColor, QStringLiteral("#64748b"));
                if (r.width() <= chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.08 && r.height() <= chartCtx.plotRect.height() * 0.08
                    && r.center().x() > chartCtx.plotRect.left() + chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.70) {
                    chartCtx.graphicDescr.insert(rectIndices[i], QStringLiteral("chart-legend-marker"));
                } else {
                    const int seriesId = ensureSeriesId(colorKey);
                    chartCtx.seriesIdByGraphic.insert(rectIndices[i], seriesId);
                    chartCtx.graphicDescr.insert(rectIndices[i], QStringLiteral("chart-series-%1").arg(seriesId));
                }
            } else {
                chartCtx.graphicDescr.insert(rectIndices[i], QStringLiteral("chart-shape"));
            }
        }
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::Line) {
                continue;
            }
            const double x1 = pxX(static_cast<double>(g.x));
            const double y1 = pxY(static_cast<double>(g.y));
            const double x2 = pxX(static_cast<double>(g.x2));
            const double y2 = pxY(static_cast<double>(g.y2));
            const bool horizontal = qAbs(y2 - y1) <= qAbs(x2 - x1) * 0.15;
            const bool vertical = qAbs(x2 - x1) <= qAbs(y2 - y1) * 0.15;
            QString lineDescr = QStringLiteral("chart-line");
            if (chartCtx.hasPlotRect) {
                const double midX = (x1 + x2) * 0.5;
                const double midY = (y1 + y2) * 0.5;
                if (horizontal && qAbs(midY - chartCtx.plotRect.bottom()) <= chartCtx.plotRect.height() * 0.08) {
                    lineDescr = QStringLiteral("chart-axis-x");
                } else if (vertical && qAbs(midX - chartCtx.plotRect.left()) <= chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.08) {
                    lineDescr = QStringLiteral("chart-axis-y");
                } else if (chartCtx.hasSecondaryAxis
                           && vertical
                           && qAbs(midX - chartCtx.plotRect.right()) <= chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.08) {
                    lineDescr = QStringLiteral("chart-axis-y2");
                } else if (chartCtx.plotRect.adjusted(-chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.04, -chartCtx.plotRect.height() * 0.04,
                                                      chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.04, chartCtx.plotRect.height() * 0.04)
                               .contains(QPointF(midX, midY))) {
                    lineDescr = QStringLiteral("chart-gridline");
                }
            }
            chartCtx.graphicDescr.insert(gi, lineDescr);
        }
        QRectF legendUnion;
        bool hasLegendText = false;
        static const QRegularExpression legendTextRe(
            QStringLiteral(R"((系列|Series|同比|环比|目标|实际|预算|预测|Q[1-4]|[A-Za-z]+\s*\d*))"),
            QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
        );
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF tRect(
                pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x))),
                pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y))),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.w) * scale),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.h) * scale + 42000.0)
            );
            const bool rightOfPlot = chartCtx.hasPlotRect && tRect.left() >= chartCtx.plotRect.left() + chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.72;
            if (rightOfPlot || legendTextRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
                legendUnion = hasLegendText ? legendUnion.united(tRect) : tRect;
                hasLegendText = true;
            }
        }
        if (hasLegendText) {
            chartCtx.legendRect = legendUnion.adjusted(-18000.0, -18000.0, 18000.0, 18000.0);
            chartCtx.hasLegendRect = true;
        }
        if (chartCtx.hasLegendRect) {
            struct LegendMarkerCandidate {
                int graphicIndex = -1;
                QRectF rect;
                QString colorKey;
                double centerY = 0.0;
            };
            struct LegendTextCandidate {
                int lineIndex = -1;
                QRectF rect;
                double centerY = 0.0;
            };
            QVector<LegendMarkerCandidate> markerCandidates;
            QVector<LegendTextCandidate> textCandidates;
            for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
                const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
                if (g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QRectF r(
                    pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x))),
                    pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y))),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * scale),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * scale)
                );
                if (!chartCtx.legendRect.intersects(r)) {
                    continue;
                }
                if (r.width() > chartCtx.legendRect.width() * 0.45 || r.height() > chartCtx.legendRect.height() * 0.35) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QString colorKey = !g.fillColor.trimmed().isEmpty()
                    ? g.fillColor
                    : colorOrDefault(g.strokeColor, QStringLiteral("#64748b"));
                markerCandidates.push_back({gi, r, normalizedColorKey(colorKey), r.center().y()});
            }
            for (int li = 0; li < page.lines.size(); ++li) {
                const TextLine &line = page.lines.at(li);
                const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
                if (text.isEmpty()) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QRectF tRect(
                    pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x))),
                    pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y))),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.w) * scale),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.h) * scale + 42000.0)
                );
                if (!chartCtx.legendRect.intersects(tRect)) {
                    continue;
                }
                textCandidates.push_back({li, tRect, tRect.center().y()});
            }
            std::sort(markerCandidates.begin(), markerCandidates.end(), [](const LegendMarkerCandidate &a, const LegendMarkerCandidate &b) {
                return a.centerY < b.centerY;
            });
            std::sort(textCandidates.begin(), textCandidates.end(), [](const LegendTextCandidate &a, const LegendTextCandidate &b) {
                return a.centerY < b.centerY;
            });
            QSet<int> assignedMarkers;
            for (const LegendTextCandidate &textItem : textCandidates) {
                int bestMarkerIndex = -1;
                double bestDist = 1e12;
                for (int mi = 0; mi < markerCandidates.size(); ++mi) {
                    if (assignedMarkers.contains(mi)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    const double dist = qAbs(markerCandidates[mi].centerY - textItem.centerY);
                    if (dist < bestDist) {
                        bestDist = dist;
                        bestMarkerIndex = mi;
                    }
                }
                if (bestMarkerIndex < 0) {
                    continue;
                }
                assignedMarkers.insert(bestMarkerIndex);
                const LegendMarkerCandidate &marker = markerCandidates[bestMarkerIndex];
                int seriesId = chartCtx.seriesIdByColor.value(marker.colorKey, 0);
                if (seriesId <= 0) {
                    seriesId = chartCtx.nextSeriesId;
                    chartCtx.nextSeriesId = chartCtx.nextSeriesId >= 8 ? 1 : chartCtx.nextSeriesId + 1;
                    chartCtx.seriesIdByColor.insert(marker.colorKey, seriesId);
                }
                chartCtx.seriesIdByGraphic.insert(marker.graphicIndex, seriesId);
                chartCtx.graphicDescr.insert(marker.graphicIndex, QStringLiteral("chart-legend-marker-series-%1").arg(seriesId));
                chartCtx.seriesIdByTextLine.insert(textItem.lineIndex, seriesId);
            }
        }
        if (chartCtx.hasPlotRect && !chartCtx.seriesIdByGraphic.isEmpty()) {
            struct ChartDataPoint {
                int graphicIndex = -1;
                int seriesId = 0;
                double centerX = 0.0;
                double valueRatio = 0.0;
            };
            QVector<ChartDataPoint> points;
            for (auto it = chartCtx.seriesIdByGraphic.constBegin(); it != chartCtx.seriesIdByGraphic.constEnd(); ++it) {
                const int gi = it.key();
                const int seriesId = it.value();
                if (gi < 0 || gi >= page.graphics.size() || seriesId <= 0) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QString existingDescr = chartCtx.graphicDescr.value(gi);
                if (!existingDescr.startsWith(QStringLiteral("chart-series-"))) {
                    continue;
                }
                const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
                if (g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
                    continue;
                }
                const QRectF r(
                    pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x))),
                    pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y))),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * scale),
                    qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * scale)
                );
                if (!chartCtx.plotRect.intersects(r)) {
                    continue;
                }
                const double valueRatio = qBound(
                    0.0,
                    (chartCtx.plotRect.bottom() - r.top()) / qMax(1.0, chartCtx.plotRect.height()),
                    1.0
                );
                points.push_back({gi, seriesId, r.center().x(), valueRatio});
            }
            if (!points.isEmpty()) {
                std::sort(points.begin(), points.end(), [](const ChartDataPoint &a, const ChartDataPoint &b) {
                    return a.centerX < b.centerX;
                });
                QVector<double> categoryCenters;
                const double catTolerance = qMax(10000.0, chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.02);
                for (const ChartDataPoint &point : points) {
                    int categoryId = -1;
                    for (int ci = 0; ci < categoryCenters.size(); ++ci) {
                        if (qAbs(categoryCenters[ci] - point.centerX) <= catTolerance) {
                            categoryId = ci + 1;
                            categoryCenters[ci] = (categoryCenters[ci] + point.centerX) * 0.5;
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                    if (categoryId < 0) {
                        categoryCenters.push_back(point.centerX);
                        categoryId = categoryCenters.size();
                    }
                    chartCtx.graphicDescr.insert(
                        point.graphicIndex,
                        QStringLiteral("chart-series-%1-cat-%2-val-%3")
                            .arg(point.seriesId)
                            .arg(categoryId)
                            .arg(QString::number(point.valueRatio, 'f', 4))
                    );
                }
            }
        }
    }

    int backgroundOrder = 0;
    int foregroundOrder = 0;
    QSet<int> suppressedRasterDuplicates;
    auto rasterRect = [](const GraphicObject &g) {
        return QRectF(static_cast<double>(g.x), static_cast<double>(g.y), qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w)), qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h)));
    };
    auto rectIou = [](const QRectF &a, const QRectF &b) {
        const QRectF inter = a.intersected(b);
        const double interArea = qMax(0.0, inter.width()) * qMax(0.0, inter.height());
        if (interArea <= 0.0) {
            return 0.0;
        }
        const double areaA = qMax(1.0, a.width() * a.height());
        const double areaB = qMax(1.0, b.width() * b.height());
        return interArea / qMax(1.0, areaA + areaB - interArea);
    };
    for (int i = 0; i < page.graphics.size(); ++i) {
        const GraphicObject &a = page.graphics.at(i);
        if (a.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || a.isBackground || a.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        for (int j = i + 1; j < page.graphics.size(); ++j) {
            const GraphicObject &b = page.graphics.at(j);
            if (b.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || b.isBackground || b.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            if (QFileInfo(a.imagePath) != QFileInfo(b.imagePath)) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF ra = rasterRect(a);
            const QRectF rb = rasterRect(b);
            const double iou = rectIou(ra, rb);
            if (iou < 0.70) {
                continue;
            }
            const double areaA = qMax(1.0, ra.width() * ra.height());
            const double areaB = qMax(1.0, rb.width() * rb.height());
            if (areaA >= areaB * 4.0) {
                suppressedRasterDuplicates.insert(i);
            } else if (areaB >= areaA * 4.0) {
                suppressedRasterDuplicates.insert(j);
            }
        }
    }
    for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
        const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
        if (suppressedRasterDuplicates.contains(gi)) {
            continue;
        }
        const double x = pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x)));
        const double y = pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y)));
        const double w = qMax(3000.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * scale);
        const double h = qMax(3000.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * scale);
        const int z = g.isBackground ? (5 + backgroundOrder++) : (160 + foregroundOrder++);
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            const QRectF imageRect(x, y, w, h);
            const double imageAreaRatio = (qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.w)) * qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.h))) / qMax(1.0, pageW * pageH);
            const bool nearFullPage = static_cast<double>(g.w) >= pageW * 0.94
                && static_cast<double>(g.h) >= pageH * 0.94
                && static_cast<double>(g.x) <= pageW * 0.03
                && static_cast<double>(g.y) <= pageH * 0.03;
            const bool treatAsBackdrop = nearFullPage && hasEditableContent;
            if (!treatAsBackdrop && !chartRelId.isEmpty() && chartEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0 && chartEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0) {
                const QRectF inter = imageRect.intersected(chartEvidenceRect);
                if (imageAreaRatio >= 0.25 && rectArea(imageRect) > 1.0 && rectArea(inter) / rectArea(imageRect) >= 0.85) {
                    continue;
                }
            }
            if (!treatAsBackdrop && !smartArtDataRelId.isEmpty() && smartArtEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0 && smartArtEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0) {
                const QRectF inter = imageRect.intersected(smartArtEvidenceRect);
                if (imageAreaRatio >= 0.25 && rectArea(imageRect) > 1.0 && rectArea(inter) / rectArea(imageRect) >= 0.85) {
                    continue;
                }
            }
            if (!treatAsBackdrop && !tableObjectXml.isEmpty() && tableEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0 && tableEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0) {
                const QRectF inter = imageRect.intersected(tableEvidenceRect);
                if (imageAreaRatio >= 0.25 && rectArea(imageRect) > 1.0 && rectArea(inter) / rectArea(imageRect) >= 0.90) {
                    continue;
                }
            }
            const QString relId = imageRelByGraphic.value(gi);
            if (!relId.isEmpty()) {
                const int alphaAmt = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qBound(0.0f, g.opacity, 1.0f) * 100000.0f)), 100000);
                const QString alphaXml = alphaAmt < 100000
                    ? QStringLiteral("<a:alphaModFix amt=\"%1\"/>").arg(alphaAmt)
                    : QString();
                const double imageArea = qMax(0.0, w) * qMax(0.0, h);
                const double pageArea = qMax(1.0, pageW * pageH);
                // pdftohtml 抽出的中大图有时携带页面级 transform，直接写入会把整页内容旋成菱形。
                const bool suppressTransformForLargeImage =
                    treatAsBackdrop || (imageArea / pageArea) >= 0.30;
                const int rot = suppressTransformForLargeImage
                    ? 0
                    : static_cast<int>(qRound(static_cast<double>(g.rotationDeg) * 60000.0));
                const QString rotAttr = qAbs(rot) > 0 ? QStringLiteral(" rot=\"%1\"").arg(rot) : QString();
                const QString flipHAttr = (!suppressTransformForLargeImage && g.flipH) ? QStringLiteral(" flipH=\"1\"") : QString();
                const QString flipVAttr = (!suppressTransformForLargeImage && g.flipV) ? QStringLiteral(" flipV=\"1\"") : QString();
                const int cropL = suppressTransformForLargeImage
                    ? 0
                    : qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropLeft), 1.0) * 100000.0)), 100000);
                const int cropT = suppressTransformForLargeImage
                    ? 0
                    : qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropTop), 1.0) * 100000.0)), 100000);
                const int cropR = suppressTransformForLargeImage
                    ? 0
                    : qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropRight), 1.0) * 100000.0)), 100000);
                const int cropB = suppressTransformForLargeImage
                    ? 0
                    : qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cropBottom), 1.0) * 100000.0)), 100000);
                const QString cropXml = (cropL > 0 || cropT > 0 || cropR > 0 || cropB > 0)
                    ? QStringLiteral("<a:srcRect l=\"%1\" t=\"%2\" r=\"%3\" b=\"%4\"/>")
                          .arg(cropL).arg(cropT).arg(cropR).arg(cropB)
                    : QString();
                const QString imageXfrmAttrs = rotAttr + flipHAttr + flipVAttr;
                drawables.push_back({
                    treatAsBackdrop ? (2 + gi) : z,
                    QStringLiteral(
                        "<p:pic><p:nvPicPr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"Image %1\" descr=\"image-resource\"/>"
                        "<p:cNvPicPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvPicPr>"
                        "<p:blipFill><a:blip r:embed=\"%2\">%7</a:blip>%8<a:stretch><a:fillRect/></a:stretch></p:blipFill>"
                        "<p:spPr><a:xfrm%9><a:off x=\"%3\" y=\"%4\"/><a:ext cx=\"%5\" cy=\"%6\"/></a:xfrm>"
                        "<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom><a:noFill/><a:ln><a:noFill/></a:ln></p:spPr></p:pic>")
                        .arg(shapeId++)
                        .arg(relId)
                        .arg(toEmu(x))
                        .arg(toEmu(y))
                        .arg(toEmu(w))
                        .arg(toEmu(h))
                        .arg(alphaXml)
                        .arg(cropXml)
                        .arg(imageXfrmAttrs)
                });
                continue;
            }
        }
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
            const double x2 = pxX(static_cast<double>(g.x2));
            const double y2 = pxY(static_cast<double>(g.y2));
            const double dx = x2 - x;
            const double dy = y2 - y;
            const double lw = qMax(12700.0, static_cast<double>(g.strokeWidth) * scale * 2400.0);
            const double minX = qMin(x, x2);
            const double minY = qMin(y, y2);
            const double bw = qMax(3000.0, qAbs(x2 - x));
            const double bh = qMax(3000.0, qAbs(y2 - y));
            const QString stroke = colorOrDefault(g.strokeColor, QStringLiteral("#64748b")).remove('#').left(6);
            const QString alpha = alphaVal(qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.opacity), 1.0));
            const bool axisAligned = qAbs(dx) <= qAbs(dy) * 0.12 || qAbs(dy) <= qAbs(dx) * 0.12;
            QString semanticCore = axisAligned
                ? QStringLiteral("connector-straight")
                : QStringLiteral("connector-freeform");
            QString evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("geometry");
            const QRectF lineRect(minX, minY, bw, bh);
            if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.graphicDescr.contains(gi)) {
                semanticCore = chartCtx.graphicDescr.value(gi);
                evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-object");
            } else if (!chartRelId.isEmpty() && chartEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0 && chartEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0 && chartEvidenceRect.intersects(lineRect)) {
                semanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-connector");
                evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-frame");
            } else if (!smartArtDataRelId.isEmpty()
                       && smartArtEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                       && smartArtEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                       && smartArtEvidenceRect.intersects(lineRect)) {
                semanticCore = axisAligned ? QStringLiteral("smartart-connector-elbow") : QStringLiteral("smartart-connector");
                evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("smartart-frame");
            } else if (!tableObjectXml.isEmpty()
                       && tableEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                       && tableEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                       && tableEvidenceRect.intersects(lineRect)) {
                semanticCore = QStringLiteral("table-gridline");
                evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("table-frame");
            } else if (isChartLikePage) {
                semanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-axis");
                evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-geometry");
            } else if (isSmartArtLikePage) {
                semanticCore = axisAligned ? QStringLiteral("smartart-connector-elbow") : QStringLiteral("smartart-connector");
                evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("smartart-geometry");
            }
            const QString semanticDescr = QStringLiteral("%1;src=%2").arg(semanticCore, evidenceSource);
            const QString rotAttr = emuRotationFromVector(dx, dy);
            const QString flipHAttr = dx < 0.0 ? QStringLiteral(" flipH=\"1\"") : QString();
            const QString flipVAttr = dy < 0.0 ? QStringLiteral(" flipV=\"1\"") : QString();
            const QString lineXfrmAttrs = rotAttr + flipHAttr + flipVAttr;
            const QString lineStrokeXml = QStringLiteral(
                "<a:ln w=\"%1\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%2\"><a:alpha val=\"%3\"/></a:srgbClr></a:solidFill></a:ln>")
                    .arg(toEmu(lw))
                    .arg(escapeXml(stroke))
                    .arg(alpha);
            drawables.push_back({
                z,
                QStringLiteral(
                    "<p:sp><p:nvSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"Line %1\" descr=\"%2\"/><p:cNvSpPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvSpPr>"
                    "<p:spPr><a:xfrm%3><a:off x=\"%4\" y=\"%5\"/><a:ext cx=\"%6\" cy=\"%7\"/></a:xfrm>"
                    "<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom>"
                    "%8<a:noFill/></p:spPr></p:sp>")
                    .arg(shapeId++)
                    .arg(escapeXml(semanticDescr))
                    .arg(lineXfrmAttrs)
                    .arg(toEmu(minX))
                    .arg(toEmu(minY))
                    .arg(toEmu(bw))
                    .arg(toEmu(bh))
                    .arg(lineStrokeXml)
            });
            continue;
        }
        const QString fill = colorOrDefault(g.fillColor, QStringLiteral("#e2e8f0")).remove('#').left(6);
        const QString fill2 = colorOrDefault(g.fillColor2, g.fillColor).remove('#').left(6);
        const QString stroke = colorOrDefault(g.strokeColor, QStringLiteral("#64748b")).remove('#').left(6);
        const QString alpha = alphaVal(qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.opacity), 1.0));
        const int gradientAngle = static_cast<int>(qRound(g.fillGradientAngle * 60000.0f));
        const QString fillXml = ((g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle
                                  || g.kind == GraphicKind::RoundedRectangle
                                  || g.kind == GraphicKind::Path)
                                 && g.hasGradientFill
                                 && !fill2.isEmpty()
                                 && fill.compare(fill2, Qt::CaseInsensitive) != 0)
            ? QStringLiteral(
                  "<a:gradFill rotWithShape=\"1\"><a:gsLst>"
                  "<a:gs pos=\"0\"><a:srgbClr val=\"%1\"><a:alpha val=\"%3\"/></a:srgbClr></a:gs>"
                  "<a:gs pos=\"100000\"><a:srgbClr val=\"%2\"><a:alpha val=\"%3\"/></a:srgbClr></a:gs>"
                  "</a:gsLst><a:lin ang=\"%4\" scaled=\"1\"/></a:gradFill>")
                  .arg(escapeXml(fill))
                  .arg(escapeXml(fill2))
                  .arg(alpha)
                  .arg(gradientAngle)
            : QStringLiteral("<a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%1\"><a:alpha val=\"%2\"/></a:srgbClr></a:solidFill>")
                  .arg(escapeXml(fill))
                  .arg(alpha);
        const double shapeX = x;
        const double shapeY = y;
        const double shapeW = w;
        const double shapeH = h;
        const QRectF shapeRect(shapeX, shapeY, shapeW, shapeH);
        QString semanticCore = g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage ? QStringLiteral("image") : QStringLiteral("shape");
        QString evidenceSource = g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage ? QStringLiteral("image-resource") : QStringLiteral("geometry");
        if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.graphicDescr.contains(gi)) {
            semanticCore = chartCtx.graphicDescr.value(gi);
            evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-object");
        } else if (!chartRelId.isEmpty()
                   && chartEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                   && chartEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                   && shapeRect.intersects(chartEvidenceRect)
                   && g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            semanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-shape");
            evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-frame");
        } else if (!tableObjectXml.isEmpty()
                   && tableEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                   && tableEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                   && shapeRect.intersects(tableEvidenceRect)
                   && g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            semanticCore = QStringLiteral("table-cell-shape");
            evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("table-frame");
        } else if (!smartArtDataRelId.isEmpty()
                   && smartArtEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                   && smartArtEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                   && shapeRect.intersects(smartArtEvidenceRect)
                   && g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle) {
            semanticCore = QStringLiteral("smartart-node");
            evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("smartart-frame");
        } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle && isChartLikePage) {
            semanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-bar");
            evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-geometry");
        } else if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle && isSmartArtLikePage) {
            semanticCore = QStringLiteral("smartart-node");
            evidenceSource = QStringLiteral("smartart-geometry");
        }
        const QString descr = QStringLiteral("%1;src=%2").arg(semanticCore, evidenceSource);
        const bool flipH = g.w < 0.0f || g.flipH;
        const bool flipV = g.h < 0.0f || g.flipV;
        const QString flipHAttr = flipH ? QStringLiteral(" flipH=\"1\"") : QString();
        const QString flipVAttr = flipV ? QStringLiteral(" flipV=\"1\"") : QString();
        const QString shapeXfrmAttrs = flipHAttr + flipVAttr;
        const QString geomXml = [&, w, h]() {
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RoundedRectangle || g.cornerRadius > 0.1f) {
                const double minSide = qMax(1.0, qMin(w, h));
                const double ratio = qBound(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.cornerRadius) / minSide, 0.5);
                const int adj = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(ratio * 100000.0)), 50000);
                return QStringLiteral("<a:prstGeom prst=\"roundRect\"><a:avLst><a:gd name=\"adj\" fmla=\"val %1\"/></a:avLst></a:prstGeom>")
                    .arg(adj);
            }
            return QStringLiteral("<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom>");
        }();
        const QString shapeStrokeXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<a:ln w=\"12700\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%1\"><a:alpha val=\"%2\"/></a:srgbClr></a:solidFill></a:ln>")
                .arg(escapeXml(stroke))
                .arg(alpha);
        const QString shapePrExtras = geomXml + fillXml + shapeStrokeXml;
        drawables.push_back({
            z,
            QStringLiteral(
                "<p:sp><p:nvSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"%2 %1\" descr=\"%2\"/><p:cNvSpPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvSpPr>"
                "<p:spPr><a:xfrm%3><a:off x=\"%4\" y=\"%5\"/><a:ext cx=\"%6\" cy=\"%7\"/></a:xfrm>%8</p:spPr></p:sp>")
                .arg(shapeId++)
                .arg(descr)
                .arg(shapeXfrmAttrs)
                .arg(toEmu(shapeX))
                .arg(toEmu(shapeY))
                .arg(toEmu(shapeW))
                .arg(toEmu(shapeH))
                .arg(shapePrExtras)
        });
    }
    if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.hasPlotRect) {
        drawables.push_back({
            70,
            QStringLiteral(
                "<p:sp><p:nvSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"ChartPlotArea %1\" descr=\"chart-plot-area\"/><p:cNvSpPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvSpPr>"
                "<p:spPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"%2\" y=\"%3\"/><a:ext cx=\"%4\" cy=\"%5\"/></a:xfrm>"
                "<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom><a:noFill/>"
                "<a:ln w=\"12700\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"CBD5E1\"/></a:solidFill></a:ln></p:spPr></p:sp>")
                .arg(shapeId++)
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.plotRect.left()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.plotRect.top()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.plotRect.width()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.plotRect.height()))
        });
    }
    if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.hasLegendRect) {
        drawables.push_back({
            90,
            QStringLiteral(
                "<p:sp><p:nvSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"ChartLegend %1\" descr=\"chart-legend\"/><p:cNvSpPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvSpPr>"
                "<p:spPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"%2\" y=\"%3\"/><a:ext cx=\"%4\" cy=\"%5\"/></a:xfrm>"
                "<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom>"
                "<a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"FFFFFF\"><a:alpha val=\"45000\"/></a:srgbClr></a:solidFill>"
                "<a:ln w=\"6350\"><a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"94A3B8\"/></a:solidFill></a:ln></p:spPr></p:sp>")
                .arg(shapeId++)
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.legendRect.left()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.legendRect.top()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.legendRect.width()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartCtx.legendRect.height()))
        });
    }
    QHash<int, QString> placeholderByLine;
    struct TextRoleCandidate {
        int index = -1;
        double y = 0.0;
        double estimatedFont = 0.0;
        double width = 0.0;
    };
    QVector<TextRoleCandidate> roleCandidates;
    for (int lineIndex = 0; lineIndex < page.lines.size(); ++lineIndex) {
        const TextLine &line = page.lines.at(lineIndex);
        const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        double estimatedFont = qMax(8.0, static_cast<double>(line.h) * 0.85);
        for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
            estimatedFont = qMax(estimatedFont, static_cast<double>(span.fontSize));
        }
        roleCandidates.push_back({
            lineIndex,
            static_cast<double>(line.y),
            estimatedFont,
            static_cast<double>(line.w)
        });
    }
    if (!roleCandidates.isEmpty()) {
        int titleLineIndex = -1;
        double bestTitleScore = -1e18;
        for (const TextRoleCandidate &candidate : roleCandidates) {
            if (candidate.y > pageH * 0.35) {
                continue;
            }
            const double score = candidate.estimatedFont * 2.5 + candidate.width * 0.015 - candidate.y * 0.2;
            if (score > bestTitleScore) {
                bestTitleScore = score;
                titleLineIndex = candidate.index;
            }
        }
        if (titleLineIndex >= 0) {
            placeholderByLine.insert(titleLineIndex, QStringLiteral("title"));
            int subtitleLineIndex = -1;
            double bestSubtitleScore = -1e18;
            double titleY = 0.0;
            for (const TextRoleCandidate &candidate : roleCandidates) {
                if (candidate.index == titleLineIndex) {
                    titleY = candidate.y;
                    break;
                }
            }
            for (const TextRoleCandidate &candidate : roleCandidates) {
                if (candidate.index == titleLineIndex) {
                    continue;
                }
                if (candidate.y < titleY - qMax(6.0, pageH * 0.01) || candidate.y > pageH * 0.55) {
                    continue;
                }
                const double score = candidate.estimatedFont * 2.0 + candidate.width * 0.01 - (candidate.y - titleY) * 0.1;
                if (score > bestSubtitleScore) {
                    bestSubtitleScore = score;
                    subtitleLineIndex = candidate.index;
                }
            }
            if (subtitleLineIndex >= 0) {
                placeholderByLine.insert(subtitleLineIndex, QStringLiteral("subTitle"));
            }
        }
    }
    QVector<QVector<int>> textGroups;
    for (int lineIndex = 0; lineIndex < page.lines.size(); ++lineIndex) {
        const TextLine &line = page.lines.at(lineIndex);
        if (mergeLineText(line).trimmed().isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int pid = line.paragraphId;
        if (pid <= 0) {
            textGroups.push_back({lineIndex});
            continue;
        }
        bool appendToPreviousGroup = false;
        if (!textGroups.isEmpty()) {
            const QVector<int> &lastGroup = textGroups.back();
            if (!lastGroup.isEmpty()) {
                const int prevIndex = lastGroup.back();
                const TextLine &prevLine = page.lines.at(prevIndex);
                const bool sameParagraph = prevLine.paragraphId == pid;
                const bool contiguous = lineIndex == prevIndex + 1;
