                const bool noColumnBreak = !line.paragraphColumnBreakBefore;
                const bool columnCompatible = line.paragraphColumn <= 0
                    || prevLine.paragraphColumn <= 0
                    || line.paragraphColumn == prevLine.paragraphColumn;
                const bool lineOrderCompatible = line.paragraphLineIndex <= 0
                    || line.paragraphLineIndex == prevLine.paragraphLineIndex + 1;
                appendToPreviousGroup = sameParagraph && contiguous && noColumnBreak && columnCompatible && lineOrderCompatible;
            }
        }
        if (!appendToPreviousGroup) {
            textGroups.push_back({});
        }
        textGroups.back().push_back(lineIndex);
    }
    std::sort(textGroups.begin(), textGroups.end(), [](const QVector<int> &a, const QVector<int> &b) {
        if (a.isEmpty() || b.isEmpty()) {
            return a.size() > b.size();
        }
        return a.front() < b.front();
    });
    for (const QVector<int> &group : textGroups) {
        if (group.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int seedIndex = group.front();
        const TextLine &seedLine = page.lines.at(seedIndex);
        double left = 1e18;
        double top = 1e18;
        double right = -1e18;
        double bottom = -1e18;
        double spanLeft = 1e18;
        double spanTop = 1e18;
        double spanRight = -1e18;
        double spanBottom = -1e18;
        bool hasSpanBox = false;
        for (const int idx : group) {
            const TextLine &line = page.lines.at(idx);
            left = qMin(left, pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x))));
            top = qMin(top, pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y))));
            right = qMax(right, pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x + line.w))));
            bottom = qMax(bottom, pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y + line.h))));
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (span.text.trimmed().isEmpty() || span.w <= 0.1f || span.h <= 0.1f) {
                    continue;
                }
                const double sx = pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(span.x)));
                const double sy = pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(span.y)));
                const double sr = pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(span.x + span.w)));
                const double sb = pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(span.y + span.h)));
                spanLeft = qMin(spanLeft, sx);
                spanTop = qMin(spanTop, sy);
                spanRight = qMax(spanRight, sr);
                spanBottom = qMax(spanBottom, sb);
                hasSpanBox = true;
            }
        }
        if (hasSpanBox) {
            const double lineArea = qMax(1.0, (right - left) * (bottom - top));
            const double spanArea = qMax(1.0, (spanRight - spanLeft) * (spanBottom - spanTop));
            // Prefer glyph-span bounds when line boxes are overly inflated.
            if (spanArea <= lineArea * 0.78) {
                left = spanLeft;
                top = spanTop;
                right = spanRight;
                bottom = spanBottom;
            }
        }
        const double x = qBound(0.0, left, slideW - 1000.0);
        const double y = qBound(0.0, top, slideH - 1000.0);
        const double w = qBound(90000.0, qMax(1000.0, right - left), qMax(90000.0, slideW - x));
        const double h = qBound(50000.0, qMax(1000.0, (bottom - top) + 42000.0), qMax(50000.0, slideH - y));
        int z = 320 + seedIndex;
        const QRectF textRect(x, y, w, h);
        auto parseHexColor = [](QString color, QColor &out) {
            color = color.trimmed();
            if (color.startsWith('#')) {
                color.remove(0, 1);
            }
            if (color.size() == 8) {
                color = color.mid(2);
            }
            if (color.size() != 6) {
                return false;
            }
            QColor c(QStringLiteral("#") + color);
            if (!c.isValid()) {
                return false;
            }
            out = c;
            return true;
        };
        QString defaultTextColorHex = QStringLiteral("111111");
        double bestBgArea = 0.0;
        for (const GraphicObject &bg : page.graphics) {
            if (!bg.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF bgRect(
                pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(bg.x))),
                pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(bg.y))),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(bg.w) * scale),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(bg.h) * scale)
            );
            const QRectF inter = bgRect.intersected(textRect);
            const double area = qMax(0.0, inter.width()) * qMax(0.0, inter.height());
            if (area <= bestBgArea) {
                continue;
            }
            QColor c;
            if (parseHexColor(colorOrDefault(bg.fillColor, bg.strokeColor), c)) {
                const int luma = static_cast<int>(0.2126 * c.red() + 0.7152 * c.green() + 0.0722 * c.blue());
                defaultTextColorHex = luma < 128 ? QStringLiteral("FFFFFF") : QStringLiteral("111111");
                bestBgArea = area;
            }
        }
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.isBackground) {
                continue;
            }
            const QRectF shapeRect(
                pxX(static_cast<double>(g.x)),
                pxY(static_cast<double>(g.y)),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * scale),
                qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * scale)
            );
            const QRectF inter = shapeRect.intersected(textRect);
            if (inter.width() * inter.height() > textRect.width() * textRect.height() * 0.35) {
                z = 340 + seedIndex;
                break;
            }
        }
        QString semanticTag = seedLine.semanticRole.trimmed().toLower();
        if (semanticTag == QStringLiteral("subtitle")) {
            semanticTag = QStringLiteral("subTitle");
        } else if (semanticTag != QStringLiteral("title")
                   && semanticTag != QStringLiteral("subTitle")
                   && semanticTag != QStringLiteral("annotation")
                   && semanticTag != QStringLiteral("caption")
                   && semanticTag != QStringLiteral("list")
                   && semanticTag != QStringLiteral("paragraph")) {
            semanticTag.clear();
        }
        QString placeholderTag = !semanticTag.isEmpty()
            ? semanticTag
            : placeholderByLine.value(seedIndex, QStringLiteral("body"));
        if (placeholderTag != QStringLiteral("title") && placeholderTag != QStringLiteral("subTitle")) {
            placeholderTag = QStringLiteral("body");
        }
        QString textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("text");
        QString textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("text-geometry");
        if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.hasLegendRect && chartCtx.legendRect.intersects(textRect)) {
            if (chartCtx.seriesIdByTextLine.contains(seedIndex)) {
                textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-legend-label-series-%1").arg(chartCtx.seriesIdByTextLine.value(seedIndex));
            } else {
                textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-legend-label");
            }
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-object");
        } else if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.hasPlotRect
                   && textRect.top() > chartCtx.plotRect.bottom() - chartCtx.plotRect.height() * 0.06
                   && textRect.top() < chartCtx.plotRect.bottom() + chartCtx.plotRect.height() * 0.18) {
            textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-axis-label-x");
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-object");
        } else if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.hasPlotRect
                   && chartCtx.hasSecondaryAxis
                   && textRect.left() > chartCtx.plotRect.right() - chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.06
                   && textRect.left() < chartCtx.plotRect.right() + chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.20
                   && textRect.bottom() > chartCtx.plotRect.top()
                   && textRect.top() < chartCtx.plotRect.bottom()) {
            textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-axis-label-y2");
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-object");
        } else if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.hasPlotRect
                   && textRect.right() < chartCtx.plotRect.left() + chartCtx.plotRect.width() * 0.12
                   && textRect.bottom() > chartCtx.plotRect.top()
                   && textRect.top() < chartCtx.plotRect.bottom()) {
            textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-axis-label-y");
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-object");
        } else if (chartCtx.enabled && chartCtx.hasPlotRect
                   && textRect.bottom() < chartCtx.plotRect.top() + chartCtx.plotRect.height() * 0.15) {
            textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-title");
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-object");
        } else if (!chartRelId.isEmpty()
                   && chartEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                   && chartEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                   && chartEvidenceRect.intersects(textRect)) {
            textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("chart-text");
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("chart-frame");
        } else if (!smartArtDataRelId.isEmpty()
                   && smartArtEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                   && smartArtEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                   && smartArtEvidenceRect.intersects(textRect)) {
            textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("smartart-node-text");
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("smartart-frame");
        } else if (!tableObjectXml.isEmpty()
                   && tableEvidenceRect.width() > 1.0
                   && tableEvidenceRect.height() > 1.0
                   && tableEvidenceRect.intersects(textRect)) {
            textSemanticCore = QStringLiteral("table-cell-text");
            textEvidenceSource = QStringLiteral("table-frame");
        }
        const QString textDescr = QStringLiteral("%1;src=%2;lines=%3;pid=%4;col=%5;colBreak=%6")
                                      .arg(textSemanticCore, textEvidenceSource)
                                      .arg(group.size())
                                      .arg(seedLine.paragraphId)
                                      .arg(seedLine.paragraphColumn)
                                      .arg(seedLine.paragraphColumnBreakBefore ? 1 : 0);
        QString fallbackFont = mapPptFontFamily(themeFont, preferredPptFallbackFont());
        QString paragraphsXml;
        for (int local = 0; local < group.size(); ++local) {
            const int lineIndex = group.at(local);
            const TextLine &line = page.lines.at(lineIndex);
            double estimatedFont = qMax(10.0, static_cast<double>(line.h) * 0.9);
            double explicitLineHeight = 0.0;
            bool hasExplicitRunColor = false;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                estimatedFont = qMax(estimatedFont, static_cast<double>(span.fontSize));
                if (!span.fontFamily.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    fallbackFont = mapPptFontFamily(span.fontFamily, fallbackFont);
                }
                explicitLineHeight = qMax(explicitLineHeight, static_cast<double>(span.lineHeight));
                if (!span.color.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    hasExplicitRunColor = true;
                }
            }
            const double lineHeightRatio = qBound(
                1.0,
                explicitLineHeight > 1.0 ? explicitLineHeight / qMax(1.0, estimatedFont) : 1.25,
                2.4
            );
            const int spacingPctVal = qBound(100000, static_cast<int>(qRound(lineHeightRatio * 100000.0)), 240000);
            const int prevIndex = local > 0 ? group.at(local - 1) : lineIndex;
            const int nextIndex = local + 1 < group.size() ? group.at(local + 1) : lineIndex;
            const double prevBottom = static_cast<double>(page.lines.at(prevIndex).y + page.lines.at(prevIndex).h);
            const double nextTop = static_cast<double>(page.lines.at(nextIndex).y);
            const int defaultSpaceBeforePts = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y) - prevBottom) * 100.0)), 2200);
            const int defaultSpaceAfterPts = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qMax(0.0, nextTop - static_cast<double>(line.y + line.h)) * 100.0)), 2200);
            const int spaceBeforePts = line.paragraphSpaceBeforePt > 0.0f
                ? qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(line.paragraphSpaceBeforePt)), 2200)
                : defaultSpaceBeforePts;
            const int spaceAfterPts = line.paragraphSpaceAfterPt > 0.0f
                ? qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(line.paragraphSpaceAfterPt)), 2200)
                : defaultSpaceAfterPts;
            int paraFontSize = 1200;
            const QString lineFallbackColor = hasExplicitRunColor ? QStringLiteral("111111") : defaultTextColorHex;
            const QString runsXml = buildPptLineRunsXml(line, fallbackFont, placeholderTag, lineFallbackColor, paraFontSize);
            QString align = paragraphAlignToPpt(line.paragraphAlign);
            if (placeholderTag == QStringLiteral("title")) {
                align = QStringLiteral("ctr");
            }
            const int listLevel = qMax(0, line.listLevel);
            const bool isList = line.listOrdered || !line.listMarker.trimmed().isEmpty();
            const int marL = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qMax(0.0f, line.indentPt) * scale)), 3000000) + listLevel * 180000;
            const int indent = isList
                ? -120000
                : qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound(qMax(0.0f, line.paragraphFirstLineIndentPt) * scale)), 720000);
            const QString bulletXml = isList
                ? (line.listOrdered
                       ? QStringLiteral("<a:buAutoNum type=\"%1\" startAt=\"%2\"/>")
                             .arg(listAutoNumType(line.listStyle))
                             .arg(qMax(1, line.listOrdinal))
                       : QStringLiteral("<a:buChar char=\"%1\"/>")
                             .arg(escapeXml(line.listMarker.trimmed().isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("•") : line.listMarker.trimmed().left(1))))
                : QStringLiteral("<a:buNone/>");
            paragraphsXml += QStringLiteral(
                "<a:p><a:pPr algn=\"%1\" marL=\"%2\" indent=\"%3\" lvl=\"%4\">%5<a:lnSpc><a:spcPct val=\"%6\"/></a:lnSpc>"
                "<a:spcBef><a:spcPts val=\"%7\"/></a:spcBef><a:spcAft><a:spcPts val=\"%8\"/></a:spcAft></a:pPr>%9</a:p>")
                .arg(align)
                .arg(marL)
                .arg(indent)
                .arg(listLevel)
                .arg(bulletXml)
                .arg(spacingPctVal)
                .arg(spaceBeforePts)
                .arg(spaceAfterPts)
                .arg(runsXml);
        }
        const QString bodyPrXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<a:bodyPr anchor=\"t\" wrap=\"none\" lIns=\"0\" tIns=\"0\" rIns=\"0\" bIns=\"0\"><a:noAutofit/></a:bodyPr>"
        );
        drawables.push_back({
            z,
            QStringLiteral(
                "<p:sp><p:nvSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"TextBox %1\" descr=\"%6\"/>"
                "<p:cNvSpPr txBox=\"1\"/><p:nvPr/></p:nvSpPr>"
                "<p:spPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"%2\" y=\"%3\"/><a:ext cx=\"%4\" cy=\"%5\"/></a:xfrm>"
                "<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom><a:noFill/></p:spPr>"
                "<p:txBody>%7<a:lstStyle/>%8</p:txBody></p:sp>")
                .arg(shapeId++)
                .arg(toEmu(x))
                .arg(toEmu(y))
                .arg(toEmu(w))
                .arg(toEmu(h))
                .arg(escapeXml(textDescr))
                .arg(bodyPrXml)
                .arg(paragraphsXml)
        });
    }
    if (!chartRelId.isEmpty() && chartFrameRect.width() > 1.0 && chartFrameRect.height() > 1.0) {
        const QString chartObjectDescr = QStringLiteral(
            "chart-object;kind=%1;series=%2;categories=%3;namedSeries=%4;labeledCategories=%5;barSeries=%6;lineSeries=%7;secondaryAxisSeries=%8;dualAxis=%9;axisFmtY1=%10;axisFmtY2=%11;axisBinding=%12;axisBindingQuality=%13(%14/%15);legend=%16/%17;legendConsistent=%18;heuristic=%19"
        )
            .arg(chartKind.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("unknown") : chartKind)
            .arg(chartSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartCategoryCount)
            .arg(chartNamedSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartLabeledCategoryCount)
            .arg(chartBarSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartLineSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartSecondaryAxisSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartHasSecondaryAxis ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(chartPrimaryAxisNumFmt.trimmed().isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("na") : chartPrimaryAxisNumFmt)
            .arg(chartSecondaryAxisNumFmt.trimmed().isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("na") : chartSecondaryAxisNumFmt)
            .arg(chartSeriesAxisBindings.trimmed().isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("na") : chartSeriesAxisBindings)
            .arg(chartAxisBindingQuality)
            .arg(chartAxisBindingMatchedSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartAxisBindingCandidateSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartLegendMappedSeriesCount)
            .arg(chartLegendEntryCount)
            .arg(chartLegendSeriesConsistent ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(chartHeuristicMode ? 1 : 0);
        drawables.push_back({
            95,
            QStringLiteral(
                "<p:graphicFrame><p:nvGraphicFramePr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"Chart %1\" descr=\"%6\"/>"
                "<p:cNvGraphicFramePr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvGraphicFramePr>"
                "<p:xfrm><a:off x=\"%2\" y=\"%3\"/><a:ext cx=\"%4\" cy=\"%5\"/></p:xfrm>"
                "<a:graphic><a:graphicData uri=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/chart\">"
                "<c:chart r:id=\"%7\"/></a:graphicData></a:graphic></p:graphicFrame>"
            )
                .arg(shapeId++)
                .arg(toEmu(chartFrameRect.left()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartFrameRect.top()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartFrameRect.width()))
                .arg(toEmu(chartFrameRect.height()))
                .arg(escapeXml(chartObjectDescr))
                .arg(chartRelId)
        });
    }
    if (!smartArtDataRelId.isEmpty()
        && !smartArtLayoutRelId.isEmpty()
        && !smartArtStyleRelId.isEmpty()
        && !smartArtColorsRelId.isEmpty()
        && smartArtFrameRect.width() > 1.0
        && smartArtFrameRect.height() > 1.0) {
        const QString smartArtObjectDescr = QStringLiteral("smartart-object;nodes=%1;labeled=%2;edges=%3;heuristic=%4")
            .arg(smartArtNodeCount)
            .arg(smartArtLabeledNodeCount)
            .arg(smartArtEdgeCount)
            .arg(smartArtHeuristicMode ? 1 : 0);
        drawables.push_back({
            96,
            QStringLiteral(
                "<p:graphicFrame><p:nvGraphicFramePr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"SmartArt %1\" descr=\"%10\"/>"
                "<p:cNvGraphicFramePr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvGraphicFramePr>"
                "<p:xfrm><a:off x=\"%2\" y=\"%3\"/><a:ext cx=\"%4\" cy=\"%5\"/></p:xfrm>"
                "<a:graphic><a:graphicData uri=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/diagram\">"
                "<dgm:relIds r:dm=\"%6\" r:lo=\"%7\" r:qs=\"%8\" r:cs=\"%9\"/></a:graphicData></a:graphic></p:graphicFrame>"
            )
                .arg(shapeId++)
                .arg(toEmu(smartArtFrameRect.left()))
                .arg(toEmu(smartArtFrameRect.top()))
                .arg(toEmu(smartArtFrameRect.width()))
                .arg(toEmu(smartArtFrameRect.height()))
                .arg(smartArtDataRelId, smartArtLayoutRelId, smartArtStyleRelId, smartArtColorsRelId)
                .arg(escapeXml(smartArtObjectDescr))
        });
    }
    if (!tableObjectXml.isEmpty() && tableFrameRect.width() > 1.0 && tableFrameRect.height() > 1.0) {
        const QString tableObjectDescr = QStringLiteral("table-object;rows=%1;cols=%2;filled=%3;heuristic=%4")
            .arg(tableRowCount)
            .arg(tableColCount)
            .arg(tableFilledCellCount)
            .arg(tableHeuristicMode ? 1 : 0);
        drawables.push_back({
            97,
            QStringLiteral(
                "<p:graphicFrame><p:nvGraphicFramePr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"Table %1\" descr=\"%6\"/>"
                "<p:cNvGraphicFramePr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvGraphicFramePr>"
                "<p:xfrm><a:off x=\"%2\" y=\"%3\"/><a:ext cx=\"%4\" cy=\"%5\"/></p:xfrm>"
                "<a:graphic><a:graphicData uri=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/table\">%7</a:graphicData></a:graphic>"
                "</p:graphicFrame>"
            )
                .arg(shapeId++)
                .arg(toEmu(tableFrameRect.left()))
                .arg(toEmu(tableFrameRect.top()))
                .arg(toEmu(tableFrameRect.width()))
                .arg(toEmu(tableFrameRect.height()))
                .arg(escapeXml(tableObjectDescr))
                .arg(tableObjectXml)
        });
    }
    if (drawables.isEmpty()) {
        int fallbackGi = -1;
        double fallbackArea = -1.0;
        for (auto it = imageRelByGraphic.constBegin(); it != imageRelByGraphic.constEnd(); ++it) {
            const int gi = it.key();
            if (gi < 0 || gi >= page.graphics.size()) {
                continue;
            }
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                continue;
            }
            const double area = static_cast<double>(g.w) * static_cast<double>(g.h);
            if (area > fallbackArea) {
                fallbackArea = area;
                fallbackGi = gi;
            }
        }
        if (fallbackGi >= 0) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(fallbackGi);
            const QString relId = imageRelByGraphic.value(fallbackGi);
            const double x = pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x)));
            const double y = pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y)));
            const double w = qMax(3000.0, static_cast<double>(g.w) * scale);
            const double h = qMax(3000.0, static_cast<double>(g.h) * scale);
            if (!relId.isEmpty()) {
                drawables.push_back({
                    1,
                    QStringLiteral(
                        "<p:pic><p:nvPicPr><p:cNvPr id=\"%1\" name=\"FallbackImage %1\" descr=\"fallback-nonblank\"/>"
                        "<p:cNvPicPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvPicPr>"
                        "<p:blipFill><a:blip r:embed=\"%2\"/><a:stretch><a:fillRect/></a:stretch></p:blipFill>"
                        "<p:spPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"%3\" y=\"%4\"/><a:ext cx=\"%5\" cy=\"%6\"/></a:xfrm>"
                        "<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom><a:noFill/><a:ln><a:noFill/></a:ln></p:spPr></p:pic>")
                        .arg(shapeId++)
                        .arg(relId)
                        .arg(toEmu(x))
                        .arg(toEmu(y))
                        .arg(toEmu(w))
                        .arg(toEmu(h))
                });
            }
        }
    }
    std::sort(drawables.begin(), drawables.end(), [](const Drawable &a, const Drawable &b) {
        return a.z < b.z;
    });
    QString shapes;
    for (const Drawable &d : drawables) {
        shapes += d.xml;
    }
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<p:sld xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:c=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/chart\" "
        "xmlns:dgm=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/diagram\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\" "
        "xmlns:p=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/presentationml/2006/main\">"
        "<p:cSld><p:spTree><p:nvGrpSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"1\" name=\"\"/><p:cNvGrpSpPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvGrpSpPr>"
        "<p:grpSpPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><a:ext cx=\"0\" cy=\"0\"/><a:chOff x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><a:chExt cx=\"0\" cy=\"0\"/></a:xfrm></p:grpSpPr>"
        "%1</p:spTree></p:cSld><p:clrMapOvr><a:masterClrMapping/></p:clrMapOvr></p:sld>"
    ).arg(shapes);
}

QString pptMasterKeyForLayout(const QString &layoutKey) {
    if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("blank")) {
        return QStringLiteral("blank");
    }
    if (layoutKey.contains(QStringLiteral("chart")) || layoutKey.contains(QStringLiteral("table"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("data");
    }
    if (layoutKey.contains(QStringLiteral("picture")) || layoutKey.contains(QStringLiteral("diagram"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("visual");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("text");
}

QString buildPptLayoutXmlByKey(const QString &layoutKey) {
    QString type = QStringLiteral("blank");
    QString name = QStringLiteral("Blank");
    if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("title_content")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("titleAndObj");
        name = QStringLiteral("Title and Content");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("title_subtitle")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("title");
        name = QStringLiteral("Title Slide");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("title_chart")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("chart");
        name = QStringLiteral("Title and Chart");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("title_table")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("tbl");
        name = QStringLiteral("Title and Table");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("title_picture")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("picTx");
        name = QStringLiteral("Picture and Caption");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("title_diagram")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("dgm");
        name = QStringLiteral("Title and Diagram");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("title_two_content")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("twoObj");
        name = QStringLiteral("Two Content");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("chart_only")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("chart");
        name = QStringLiteral("Chart");
    } else if (layoutKey == QStringLiteral("table_only")) {
        type = QStringLiteral("tbl");
        name = QStringLiteral("Table");
    }
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<p:sldLayout xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\" "
        "xmlns:p=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/presentationml/2006/main\" type=\"%1\" preserve=\"1\">"
        "<p:cSld name=\"%2\"><p:spTree><p:nvGrpSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"1\" name=\"\"/><p:cNvGrpSpPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvGrpSpPr>"
        "<p:grpSpPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><a:ext cx=\"0\" cy=\"0\"/><a:chOff x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><a:chExt cx=\"0\" cy=\"0\"/></a:xfrm></p:grpSpPr>"
        "</p:spTree></p:cSld><p:clrMapOvr><a:masterClrMapping/></p:clrMapOvr></p:sldLayout>"
    ).arg(type, escapeXml(name));
}

bool detectPptTwoColumnBodyLike(const PageContent &page) {
    if (page.lines.size() < 3) {
        return false;
    }
    const double pageWidth = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
    const double pageHeight = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
    const double splitX = pageWidth * 0.5;
    const double deadZone = pageWidth * 0.12;
    const double bodyTop = pageHeight * 0.18;
    int leftCount = 0;
    int rightCount = 0;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        const double lineTop = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y));
        const double lineH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.h));
        if (lineTop + lineH * 0.5 < bodyTop) {
            continue;
        }
        const double lineX = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x));
        const double lineW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(line.w));
        const double cx = lineX + lineW * 0.5;
        if (cx < splitX - deadZone) {
            leftCount += 1;
        } else if (cx > splitX + deadZone) {
            rightCount += 1;
        }
    }
    return leftCount >= 2 && rightCount >= 2;
}

QString buildPptMasterXml(const QString &masterName, const QString &layoutIdListXml) {
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<p:sldMaster xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\" "
        "xmlns:p=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/presentationml/2006/main\">"
        "<p:cSld name=\"%1\"><p:spTree><p:nvGrpSpPr><p:cNvPr id=\"1\" name=\"\"/><p:cNvGrpSpPr/><p:nvPr/></p:nvGrpSpPr>"
        "<p:grpSpPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><a:ext cx=\"0\" cy=\"0\"/><a:chOff x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><a:chExt cx=\"0\" cy=\"0\"/></a:xfrm></p:grpSpPr>"
        "</p:spTree></p:cSld>"
        "<p:clrMap bg1=\"lt1\" tx1=\"dk1\" bg2=\"lt2\" tx2=\"dk2\" accent1=\"accent1\" accent2=\"accent2\" "
        "accent3=\"accent3\" accent4=\"accent4\" accent5=\"accent5\" accent6=\"accent6\" hlink=\"hlink\" folHlink=\"folHlink\"/>"
        "<p:sldLayoutIdLst>%2</p:sldLayoutIdLst>"
        "<p:txStyles><p:titleStyle/><p:bodyStyle/><p:otherStyle/></p:txStyles></p:sldMaster>"
    ).arg(escapeXml(masterName), layoutIdListXml);
}

QString buildPptMasterRelsXml(const QVector<int> &layoutIndices) {
    QString rels;
    int rid = 1;
    for (const int layoutIndex : layoutIndices) {
        rels += QStringLiteral(
            "<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slideLayout\" "
            "Target=\"../slideLayouts/slideLayout%2.xml\"/>"
        ).arg(rid++).arg(layoutIndex);
    }
    rels += QStringLiteral(
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/theme\" Target=\"../theme/theme1.xml\"/>"
    ).arg(rid);
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">%1</Relationships>"
    ).arg(rels);
}

QString buildBasicPptThemeXml() {
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<a:theme xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" name=\"Office Theme\">"
        "<a:themeElements>"
        "<a:clrScheme name=\"Office\">"
        "<a:dk1><a:sysClr val=\"windowText\" lastClr=\"000000\"/></a:dk1>"
        "<a:lt1><a:sysClr val=\"window\" lastClr=\"FFFFFF\"/></a:lt1>"
        "<a:dk2><a:srgbClr val=\"1F497D\"/></a:dk2><a:lt2><a:srgbClr val=\"EEECE1\"/></a:lt2>"
        "<a:accent1><a:srgbClr val=\"4F81BD\"/></a:accent1><a:accent2><a:srgbClr val=\"C0504D\"/></a:accent2>"
        "<a:accent3><a:srgbClr val=\"9BBB59\"/></a:accent3><a:accent4><a:srgbClr val=\"8064A2\"/></a:accent4>"
        "<a:accent5><a:srgbClr val=\"4BACC6\"/></a:accent5><a:accent6><a:srgbClr val=\"F79646\"/></a:accent6>"
        "<a:hlink><a:srgbClr val=\"0000FF\"/></a:hlink><a:folHlink><a:srgbClr val=\"800080\"/></a:folHlink>"
        "</a:clrScheme>"
        "<a:fontScheme name=\"Office\">"
        "<a:majorFont><a:latin typeface=\"Calibri\"/><a:ea typeface=\"\"/><a:cs typeface=\"\"/></a:majorFont>"
        "<a:minorFont><a:latin typeface=\"Calibri\"/><a:ea typeface=\"\"/><a:cs typeface=\"\"/></a:minorFont>"
        "</a:fontScheme>"
        "<a:fmtScheme name=\"Office\">"
        "<a:fillStyleLst><a:solidFill><a:schemeClr val=\"phClr\"/></a:solidFill></a:fillStyleLst>"
        "<a:lnStyleLst><a:ln w=\"9525\" cap=\"flat\" cmpd=\"sng\" algn=\"ctr\"><a:solidFill><a:schemeClr val=\"phClr\"/></a:solidFill></a:ln></a:lnStyleLst>"
        "<a:effectStyleLst><a:effectStyle><a:effectLst/></a:effectStyle></a:effectStyleLst>"
        "<a:bgFillStyleLst><a:solidFill><a:schemeClr val=\"phClr\"/></a:solidFill></a:bgFillStyleLst>"
        "</a:fmtScheme>"
        "</a:themeElements>"
        "</a:theme>"
    );
}

QString buildBasicPptPresentationXml(const int slideCount, const qint64 slideW, const qint64 slideH) {
    QString slideIds;
    for (int i = 0; i < slideCount; ++i) {
        slideIds += QStringLiteral("<p:sldId id=\"%1\" r:id=\"rId%2\"/>")
            .arg(256 + i)
            .arg(2 + i);
    }
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<p:presentation xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\" "
        "xmlns:p=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/presentationml/2006/main\">"
        "<p:sldMasterIdLst><p:sldMasterId id=\"2147483648\" r:id=\"rId1\"/></p:sldMasterIdLst>"
        "<p:sldIdLst>%1</p:sldIdLst>"
        "<p:sldSz cx=\"%2\" cy=\"%3\" type=\"custom\"/>"
        "<p:notesSz cx=\"6858000\" cy=\"9144000\"/>"
        "<p:defaultTextStyle/>"
        "</p:presentation>"
    ).arg(slideIds).arg(slideW).arg(slideH);
}

QString buildBasicPptPresentationRelsXml(const int slideCount) {
    QString rels = QStringLiteral(
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slideMaster\" "
        "Target=\"slideMasters/slideMaster1.xml\"/>"
    );
    for (int i = 0; i < slideCount; ++i) {
        rels += QStringLiteral(
            "<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slide\" "
            "Target=\"slides/slide%2.xml\"/>"
        ).arg(2 + i).arg(i + 1);
    }
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">%1</Relationships>"
    ).arg(rels);
}

QString buildBasicPptContentTypesXml(const int slideCount, const QSet<QString> &imageExts) {
    QString defaults = QStringLiteral(
        "<Default Extension=\"rels\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.relationships+xml\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"xml\" ContentType=\"application/xml\"/>"
    );
    for (const QString &extRaw : imageExts) {
        const QString ext = extRaw.toLower();
        QString contentType;
        if (ext == QStringLiteral("png")) {
            contentType = QStringLiteral("image/png");
        } else if (ext == QStringLiteral("jpg") || ext == QStringLiteral("jpeg")) {
            contentType = QStringLiteral("image/jpeg");
        } else if (ext == QStringLiteral("gif")) {
            contentType = QStringLiteral("image/gif");
        } else if (ext == QStringLiteral("bmp")) {
            contentType = QStringLiteral("image/bmp");
        } else if (ext == QStringLiteral("tif") || ext == QStringLiteral("tiff")) {
            contentType = QStringLiteral("image/tiff");
        }
        if (!contentType.isEmpty()) {
            defaults += QStringLiteral("<Default Extension=\"%1\" ContentType=\"%2\"/>").arg(ext, contentType);
        }
    }
    QString overrides = QStringLiteral(
        "<Override PartName=\"/ppt/presentation.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation.main+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/ppt/slideMasters/slideMaster1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.slideMaster+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/ppt/slideLayouts/slideLayout1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.slideLayout+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/ppt/theme/theme1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.theme+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/docProps/core.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.core-properties+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/docProps/app.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.extended-properties+xml\"/>"
    );
    for (int i = 0; i < slideCount; ++i) {
        overrides += QStringLiteral(
            "<Override PartName=\"/ppt/slides/slide%1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.slide+xml\"/>"
        ).arg(i + 1);
    }
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Types xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/content-types\">%1%2</Types>"
    ).arg(defaults, overrides);
}

QString buildBasicSlideRelsXml(const QStringList &imageTargets) {
    QString rels = QStringLiteral(
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slideLayout\" "
        "Target=\"../slideLayouts/slideLayout1.xml\"/>"
    );
    for (int i = 0; i < imageTargets.size(); ++i) {
        rels += QStringLiteral(
            "<Relationship Id=\"rId%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/image\" "
            "Target=\"../media/%2\"/>"
        ).arg(i + 2).arg(imageTargets[i]);
    }
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">%1</Relationships>"
    ).arg(rels);
}

QVector<TextLine> buildZeroOverlapTextLines(const PageContent &page) {
    QVector<TextLine> lines;
    lines.reserve(page.lines.size());
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
        if (text.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        lines.push_back(line);
    }
    std::stable_sort(lines.begin(), lines.end(), [](const TextLine &a, const TextLine &b) {
        if (qAbs(a.y - b.y) > 1.2f) {
            return a.y < b.y;
        }
        return a.x < b.x;
    });
    // Keep source geometry; only remove near-duplicate lines with same text and heavy overlap.
    QVector<TextLine> deduped;
    deduped.reserve(lines.size());
    auto area = [](const TextLine &l) {
        return qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, l.w)) * static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, l.h)));
    };
    auto overlapRatio = [&](const TextLine &a, const TextLine &b) {
        const double ax1 = static_cast<double>(a.x);
        const double ay1 = static_cast<double>(a.y);
        const double ax2 = static_cast<double>(a.x + qMax(1.0f, a.w));
        const double ay2 = static_cast<double>(a.y + qMax(1.0f, a.h));
        const double bx1 = static_cast<double>(b.x);
        const double by1 = static_cast<double>(b.y);
        const double bx2 = static_cast<double>(b.x + qMax(1.0f, b.w));
        const double by2 = static_cast<double>(b.y + qMax(1.0f, b.h));
        const double iw = qMax(0.0, qMin(ax2, bx2) - qMax(ax1, bx1));
        const double ih = qMax(0.0, qMin(ay2, by2) - qMax(ay1, by1));
        const double inter = iw * ih;
        return inter / qMax(1.0, qMin(area(a), area(b)));
    };
    auto xOverlapRatio = [](const TextLine &a, const TextLine &b) {
        const double ax1 = static_cast<double>(a.x);
        const double ax2 = static_cast<double>(a.x + qMax(1.0f, a.w));
        const double bx1 = static_cast<double>(b.x);
        const double bx2 = static_cast<double>(b.x + qMax(1.0f, b.w));
        const double iw = qMax(0.0, qMin(ax2, bx2) - qMax(ax1, bx1));
        return iw / qMax(1.0, qMin(static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, a.w)), static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, b.w))));
    };
    auto styleScore = [](const TextLine &l) {
        int score = 0;
        for (const TextSpan &s : l.spans) {
            if (!s.color.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                score += 2;
            }
            if (!s.fontFamily.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                score += 1;
            }
        }
        return score;
    };
    auto tokenSimilar = [](const QString &a, const QString &b) {
        if (a == b) {
            return true;
        }
        const int minLen = qMin(a.size(), b.size());
        if (minLen < 6) {
            return false;
        }
        return a.contains(b) || b.contains(a);
    };
    auto centerY = [](const TextLine &l) {
        return static_cast<double>(l.y) + static_cast<double>(l.h) * 0.5;
    };
    auto centerX = [](const TextLine &l) {
        return static_cast<double>(l.x) + static_cast<double>(l.w) * 0.5;
    };
    for (const TextLine &line : lines) {
        const QString token = normalizeToken(mergeLineText(line));
        bool merged = false;
        for (TextLine &kept : deduped) {
            const QString keptToken = normalizeToken(mergeLineText(kept));
            if (token.isEmpty() || keptToken.isEmpty() || !tokenSimilar(token, keptToken)) {
                continue;
            }
            const double yGap = qAbs(centerY(line) - centerY(kept));
            const double xGap = qAbs(centerX(line) - centerX(kept));
            const double yTol = qMax(2.0, qMin(static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, line.h)), static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, kept.h))) * 0.55);
            const double xTol = qMax(6.0, qMin(static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, line.w)), static_cast<double>(qMax(1.0f, kept.w))) * 0.45);
            if (yGap > yTol || xGap > xTol) {
                continue;
            }
            const double iouLike = overlapRatio(line, kept);
            const double xov = xOverlapRatio(line, kept);
            // Merge duplicated text traces from bbox+xml even when boxes are slightly shifted.
            if (iouLike < 0.65 && !(iouLike >= 0.35 && xov >= 0.72)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (styleScore(line) > styleScore(kept)) {
                kept = line;
            }
            merged = true;
            break;
        }
        if (!merged) {
            deduped.push_back(line);
        }
    }
    lines = deduped;
    return lines;
}

double percentile95(QVector<double> values) {
    if (values.isEmpty()) {
        return 0.0;
    }
    std::sort(values.begin(), values.end());
    const int index = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qFloor((values.size() - 1) * 0.95)), values.size() - 1);
    return values.at(index);
}

double calculateTextPositionDeviationP95(
    const QVector<TextLine> &sourceLines,
    const QVector<TextLine> &exportLines
) {
    if (sourceLines.isEmpty() || exportLines.isEmpty()) {
        return 0.0;
    }
    QVector<bool> usedSource(sourceLines.size(), false);
    QVector<double> deviations;
    deviations.reserve(exportLines.size());
    for (const TextLine &line : exportLines) {
        const QString token = normalizeToken(mergeLineText(line));
        if (token.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const double cx = static_cast<double>(line.x) + static_cast<double>(line.w) * 0.5;
        const double cy = static_cast<double>(line.y) + static_cast<double>(line.h) * 0.5;
        int bestIdx = -1;
        double bestScore = 1e18;
        for (int i = 0; i < sourceLines.size(); ++i) {
            if (usedSource.at(i)) {
                continue;
            }
            const TextLine &src = sourceLines.at(i);
            const QString srcToken = normalizeToken(mergeLineText(src));
            if (srcToken.isEmpty() || srcToken != token) {
                continue;
            }
            const double sx = static_cast<double>(src.x) + static_cast<double>(src.w) * 0.5;
            const double sy = static_cast<double>(src.y) + static_cast<double>(src.h) * 0.5;
            const double dx = cx - sx;
            const double dy = cy - sy;
            const double dist = std::sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
            if (dist < bestScore) {
                bestScore = dist;
                bestIdx = i;
            }
        }
        if (bestIdx >= 0) {
            usedSource[bestIdx] = true;
            deviations.push_back(bestScore);
        }
    }
    return percentile95(deviations);
}

double calculateTextOverlapRate(
    const QVector<TextLine> &lines,
    const NativePptPageProjection &projection
) {
    if (lines.size() < 2) {
        return 0.0;
    }
    struct Rect {
        double x = 0.0;
        double y = 0.0;
        double w = 1.0;
        double h = 1.0;
    };
    QVector<Rect> rects;
    QVector<QString> tokens;
    rects.reserve(lines.size());
    tokens.reserve(lines.size());
    for (const TextLine &line : lines) {
        Rect r;
        r.x = projection.pxX(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.x)));
        r.y = projection.pxY(qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(line.y)));
        r.w = qMax(1.0, projection.pxW(qMax(1.0f, line.w)));
        r.h = qMax(1.0, projection.pxH(qMax(1.0f, line.h)));
        rects.push_back(r);
        tokens.push_back(normalizeToken(mergeLineText(line)));
    }
    auto tokenNearSame = [](const QString &a, const QString &b) {
        if (a.isEmpty() || b.isEmpty()) {
            return false;
        }
        if (a == b) {
            return true;
        }
        const int minLen = qMin(a.size(), b.size());
        if (minLen < 4) {
            return false;
        }
        return a.contains(b) || b.contains(a);
    };
    int overlapped = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < rects.size(); ++i) {
        bool hit = false;
        for (int j = 0; j < rects.size(); ++j) {
            if (i == j) {
                continue;
            }
            const double ix = qMax(0.0, qMin(rects[i].x + rects[i].w, rects[j].x + rects[j].w) - qMax(rects[i].x, rects[j].x));
            const double iy = qMax(0.0, qMin(rects[i].y + rects[i].h, rects[j].y + rects[j].h) - qMax(rects[i].y, rects[j].y));
            if (ix <= 0.0 || iy <= 0.0) {
                continue;
            }
            const double areaI = rects[i].w * rects[i].h;
            const double areaJ = rects[j].w * rects[j].h;
            const double minArea = qMax(1.0, qMin(areaI, areaJ));
            const double overlapRatio = (ix * iy) / minArea;
            const bool sameToken = tokenNearSame(tokens.at(i), tokens.at(j));
            const double cxGap = qAbs((rects[i].x + rects[i].w * 0.5) - (rects[j].x + rects[j].w * 0.5));
            const double cyGap = qAbs((rects[i].y + rects[i].h * 0.5) - (rects[j].y + rects[j].h * 0.5));
            const bool almostSameCenter = cxGap <= qMin(rects[i].w, rects[j].w) * 0.25
                && cyGap <= qMin(rects[i].h, rects[j].h) * 0.35;
            // Only treat as severe overlap when duplicated textual traces collide.
            const bool geometryVeryHigh = overlapRatio >= 0.82 && almostSameCenter;
            if (overlapRatio >= 0.35 && (sameToken || geometryVeryHigh)) {
                hit = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (hit) {
            overlapped += 1;
        }
    }
    return static_cast<double>(overlapped) / static_cast<double>(rects.size());
}

void enforceBackgroundLayerForPage(PageContent &page) {
    const double pageW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width));
    const double pageH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height));
    int existingBackgroundRaster = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage && g.isBackground) {
            existingBackgroundRaster += 1;
        }
    }
    int existingBackgroundFill = 0;
    for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
        if (g.isBackground && (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle || g.kind == GraphicKind::RoundedRectangle || g.kind == GraphicKind::Path)) {
            existingBackgroundFill += 1;
        }
    }
    if (existingBackgroundRaster > 0 || existingBackgroundFill > 0) {
        return;
    }
    int candidateIndex = -1;
    double candidateArea = -1.0;
    for (int i = 0; i < page.graphics.size(); ++i) {
        const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(i);
        if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            continue;
        }
        const double gx = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x));
        const double gy = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y));
        const double gw = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w));
        const double gh = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h));
        const bool nearOrigin = gx <= pageW * 0.06 && gy <= pageH * 0.06;
        const bool largeEnough = gw >= pageW * 0.75 && gh >= pageH * 0.75;
        if (!nearOrigin || !largeEnough) {
            continue;
        }
        const double area = gw * gh;
        if (area > candidateArea) {
            candidateArea = area;
            candidateIndex = i;
        }
    }
    if (candidateIndex >= 0) {
        page.graphics[candidateIndex].isBackground = true;
        return;
    }
    int fillCandidate = -1;
    double fillArea = -1.0;
    for (int i = 0; i < page.graphics.size(); ++i) {
        const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(i);
        if (g.kind != GraphicKind::Rectangle && g.kind != GraphicKind::RoundedRectangle && g.kind != GraphicKind::Path) {
            continue;
        }
        const double gx = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.x));
        const double gy = qMax(0.0, static_cast<double>(g.y));
        const double gw = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.w));
        const double gh = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(g.h));
        const bool nearOrigin = gx <= pageW * 0.08 && gy <= pageH * 0.08;
        const bool largeEnough = gw >= pageW * 0.82 && gh >= pageH * 0.82;
        if (!nearOrigin || !largeEnough) {
            continue;
        }
        const double area = gw * gh;
        if (area > fillArea) {
            fillArea = area;
            fillCandidate = i;
        }
    }
    if (fillCandidate >= 0) {
        page.graphics[fillCandidate].isBackground = true;
    }
}

static bool exportNativePptxV2(const DocumentModel &document, const QString &targetPath, QStringList &traceLogs) {
    const QVector<PageContent> pages = document.pages();
    if (pages.isEmpty()) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 导出失败: 未提取到页面"));
        return false;
    }
    QVector<double> widthPts;
    QVector<double> heightPts;
    widthPts.reserve(pages.size());
    heightPts.reserve(pages.size());
    for (const PageContent &page : pages) {
        widthPts.push_back(qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width)));
        heightPts.push_back(qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height)));
    }
    std::sort(widthPts.begin(), widthPts.end());
    std::sort(heightPts.begin(), heightPts.end());
    const double pageWPt = widthPts.at(widthPts.size() / 2);
    const double pageHPt = heightPts.at(heightPts.size() / 2);
    const qint64 slideW = qMax<qint64>(914400, static_cast<qint64>(qRound(pageWPt * 12700.0)));
    const qint64 slideH = qMax<qint64>(685800, static_cast<qint64>(qRound(pageHPt * 12700.0)));

    QTemporaryDir packageDir;
    if (!packageDir.isValid()) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 导出失败: 临时目录创建失败"));
        return false;
    }
    const QString root = packageDir.path();

    int mediaCounter = 1;
    QSet<QString> imageExts;
    int blankPages = 0;
    int overlappedPages = 0;
    int severeOverlappedPages = 0;
    double maxSizeError = 0.0;
    const double targetW = static_cast<double>(slideW);
    const double targetH = static_cast<double>(slideH);
    for (int i = 0; i < pages.size(); ++i) {
        const PageContent &page = pages[i];
        const double currentW = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.width) * 12700.0);
        const double currentH = qMax(1.0, static_cast<double>(page.height) * 12700.0);
        const double errW = qAbs(currentW - targetW) / qMax(1.0, targetW);
        const double errH = qAbs(currentH - targetH) / qMax(1.0, targetH);
        maxSizeError = qMax(maxSizeError, qMax(errW, errH));

        QHash<int, QString> imageRelByGraphic;
        QStringList imageTargets;
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics[gi];
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
                continue;
            }
            const QFileInfo imageInfo(g.imagePath);
            if (!imageInfo.exists() || !imageInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString ext = imageInfo.suffix().trimmed().toLower();
            if (ext.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFile imageFile(imageInfo.absoluteFilePath());
            if (!imageFile.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly)) {
                continue;
            }
            const QByteArray bytes = imageFile.readAll();
            if (bytes.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const QString mediaName = QStringLiteral("image%1.%2").arg(mediaCounter++).arg(ext);
            if (!writeBinaryFile(QDir(root).filePath(QStringLiteral("ppt/media/") + mediaName), bytes)) {
                continue;
            }
            imageExts.insert(ext);
            imageTargets.push_back(mediaName);
            imageRelByGraphic.insert(gi, QStringLiteral("rId%1").arg(imageTargets.size() + 1));
        }

        const NativePptTablePart tablePart = buildNativePptTablePart(page, static_cast<double>(slideW), static_cast<double>(slideH));
        PageContent pageForSlide = page;
        enforceBackgroundLayerForPage(pageForSlide);
        pageForSlide.lines = buildZeroOverlapTextLines(page);
        const double textPositionDeviationP95 = calculateTextPositionDeviationP95(page.lines, pageForSlide.lines);
        const NativePptPageProjection projection = buildNativePptProjection(pageForSlide, static_cast<double>(slideW), static_cast<double>(slideH));
        const double overlapRate = calculateTextOverlapRate(pageForSlide.lines, projection);
        if (overlapRate > 0.0) {
            overlappedPages += 1;
        }
        if (overlapRate >= 0.35) {
            severeOverlappedPages += 1;
            traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 重叠详情: 页=%1, 重叠率=%2, 文本行=%3")
                                 .arg(i + 1)
                                 .arg(QString::number(overlapRate, 'f', 3))
                                 .arg(pageForSlide.lines.size()));
        }
        bool hasVectorGraphics = false;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : page.graphics) {
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle || g.kind == GraphicKind::Line) {
                hasVectorGraphics = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (pageForSlide.lines.isEmpty() && imageRelByGraphic.isEmpty() && !tablePart.valid && !hasVectorGraphics) {
            blankPages += 1;
        }
        int backgroundRasterCount = 0;
        int backgroundFillCount = 0;
        int colorFallbackCandidateLines = 0;
        for (const GraphicObject &g : pageForSlide.graphics) {
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::RasterImage && g.isBackground) {
                backgroundRasterCount += 1;
            }
            if (g.kind == GraphicKind::Rectangle && g.isBackground) {
                backgroundFillCount += 1;
            }
        }
        for (const TextLine &line : pageForSlide.lines) {
            bool hasText = false;
            bool hasColor = false;
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (!span.text.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    hasText = true;
                }
                if (!span.color.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                    hasColor = true;
                }
            }
            if (hasText && !hasColor) {
                colorFallbackCandidateLines += 1;
            }
        }
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 页 %1: 背景栅格=%2, 背景填充=%3, 图片=%4, 文本=%5, 表格=%6, 颜色回退候选行=%7, 文本位置偏差P95=%8")
                             .arg(i + 1)
                             .arg(backgroundRasterCount)
                             .arg(backgroundFillCount)
                             .arg(imageRelByGraphic.size())
                             .arg(pageForSlide.lines.size())
                             .arg(tablePart.valid ? 1 : 0)
                             .arg(colorFallbackCandidateLines)
                             .arg(QString::number(textPositionDeviationP95, 'f', 2)));

        const QString slideXml = buildSlideXml(
            pageForSlide,
            preferredPptFallbackFont(),
            QString(),
            QRectF(),
            QString(),
            0,
            0,
            0,
            0,
            0,
            0,
            0,
            false,
            QString(),
            QString(),
            QString(),
            0,
            0,
            0,
            0,
            0,
            false,
            false,
            QString(),
            QString(),
            QString(),
            QString(),
            QRectF(),
            0,
            0,
            0,
            false,
            tablePart.tableXml,
            tablePart.frameRect,
            tablePart.rowCount,
            tablePart.colCount,
            tablePart.filledCellCount,
            tablePart.heuristicMode,
            imageRelByGraphic,
            static_cast<double>(slideW),
            static_cast<double>(slideH)
        );
        const QString slidePath = QStringLiteral("ppt/slides/slide%1.xml").arg(i + 1);
        const QString slideRelsPath = QStringLiteral("ppt/slides/_rels/slide%1.xml.rels").arg(i + 1);
        if (!writePackagePart(root, slidePath, slideXml)
            || !writePackagePart(root, slideRelsPath, buildBasicSlideRelsXml(imageTargets))) {
            traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 导出失败: 写入幻灯片失败（页 %1）").arg(i + 1));
            return false;
        }
    }
    if (blankPages > 0) {
        if (blankPages >= pages.size()) {
            traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 质量门禁失败: 存在空白页=%1（要求<总页数）").arg(blankPages));
            return false;
        }
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 质量告警: 存在空白页=%1（继续导出，待源头抽取补齐）").arg(blankPages));
    }
    if (severeOverlappedPages > 0) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 质量门禁失败: 文本重叠严重页=%1（要求=0）")
                             .arg(severeOverlappedPages));
        return false;
    }
    if (severeOverlappedPages > 0 || overlappedPages > 0) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 质量告警: 文本重叠页(轻微/严重)=%1/%2（继续导出，待规则收敛）")
                             .arg(overlappedPages)
                             .arg(severeOverlappedPages));
    }
    if (maxSizeError >= 0.01) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 质量门禁失败: 页尺寸误差=%1（要求<1%%）")
                             .arg(QString::number(maxSizeError * 100.0, 'f', 2)));
        return false;
    }

    const QString layoutXml = buildPptLayoutXmlByKey(QStringLiteral("blank"));
    const QString layoutRelsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/slideMaster\" "
        "Target=\"../slideMasters/slideMaster1.xml\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    );
    const QString masterLayoutIdList = QStringLiteral("<p:sldLayoutId id=\"2147483649\" r:id=\"rId1\"/>");
    const QString masterXml = buildPptMasterXml(QStringLiteral("Master"), masterLayoutIdList);
    const QString masterRelsXml = buildPptMasterRelsXml({1});
    const QString presentationXml = buildBasicPptPresentationXml(pages.size(), slideW, slideH);
    const QString presentationRelsXml = buildBasicPptPresentationRelsXml(pages.size());
    const QString contentTypesXml = buildBasicPptContentTypesXml(pages.size(), imageExts);
    const QString rootRelsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/officeDocument\" Target=\"ppt/presentation.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId2\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships/metadata/core-properties\" Target=\"docProps/core.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId3\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/extended-properties\" Target=\"docProps/app.xml\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    );
    const QString coreXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<cp:coreProperties xmlns:cp=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/metadata/core-properties\" "
        "xmlns:dc=\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\" xmlns:dcterms=\"http://purl.org/dc/terms/\" "
        "xmlns:dcmitype=\"http://purl.org/dc/dcmitype/\" xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\">"
        "<dc:title>PDF Master Export</dc:title><dc:creator>PDF Master</dc:creator>"
        "<cp:lastModifiedBy>PDF Master</cp:lastModifiedBy>"
        "<dcterms:created xsi:type=\"dcterms:W3CDTF\">%1</dcterms:created>"
        "<dcterms:modified xsi:type=\"dcterms:W3CDTF\">%1</dcterms:modified>"
        "</cp:coreProperties>"
    ).arg(QDateTime::currentDateTimeUtc().toString(Qt::ISODate));
    const QString appXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Properties xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/extended-properties\" "
        "xmlns:vt=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/docPropsVTypes\">"
        "<Application>PDF Master</Application><Slides>%1</Slides><PresentationFormat>Custom</PresentationFormat>"
        "</Properties>"
    ).arg(pages.size());

    const bool wroteBase =
        writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("[Content_Types].xml"), contentTypesXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("_rels/.rels"), rootRelsXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("docProps/core.xml"), coreXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("docProps/app.xml"), appXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("ppt/presentation.xml"), presentationXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("ppt/_rels/presentation.xml.rels"), presentationRelsXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("ppt/slideLayouts/slideLayout1.xml"), layoutXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("ppt/slideLayouts/_rels/slideLayout1.xml.rels"), layoutRelsXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("ppt/slideMasters/slideMaster1.xml"), masterXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("ppt/slideMasters/_rels/slideMaster1.xml.rels"), masterRelsXml)
        && writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("ppt/theme/theme1.xml"), buildBasicPptThemeXml());
    if (!wroteBase) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 导出失败: 写入基础结构失败"));
        return false;
    }
    if (!zipDirectoryToFile(root, targetPath, traceLogs)) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 导出失败: OOXML 打包失败"));
        return false;
    }
    traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("PPTX V2 导出完成: 页=%1, 尺寸=%2x%3(EMU), 重叠页=%4, 空白页=%5, 尺寸误差=%6%%")
                         .arg(pages.size()).arg(slideW).arg(slideH)
                         .arg(overlappedPages)
                         .arg(blankPages)
                         .arg(QString::number(maxSizeError * 100.0, 'f', 2)));
    return QFileInfo::exists(targetPath) && QFileInfo(targetPath).size() > 0;
}

} // namespace

bool exportPptPptxNative(const DocumentModel &document, const QString &targetPath, QStringList &traceLogs) {
    return exportNativePptxV2(document, targetPath, traceLogs);
}

} // namespace converter

📄  pdf-master/src/core/words/DocxExporter.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/words/DocxExporter.h"

#include <QtGlobal>

#include "core/words/DocxNativeKernel.h"

namespace converter {

OutputFormat DocxExporter::format() const {
    return OutputFormat::Docx;
}

bool DocxExporter::exportDocument(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const QString &targetPath,
    ToolExecutor &executor,
    QStringList &traceLogs
) const {
    Q_UNUSED(executor);
    if (exportWordsDocxNative(document, targetPath, traceLogs)) {
        traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("DOCX 已走原生 OOXML 导出引擎"));
        return true;
    }
    traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("DOCX 导出失败：原生 OOXML 导出失败且不允许回退"));
    return false;
}

} // namespace converter

namespace converter {

class DocxExporter final : public IDocumentExporter {
public:
    OutputFormat format() const override;
    bool exportDocument(
        const DocumentModel &document,
        const QString &targetPath,
        ToolExecutor &executor,
        QStringList &traceLogs
    ) const override;
};

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/core/words/DocxNativeKernel.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include "core/words/DocxNativeKernel.h"
#include "core/infrastructure/ooxml/NativeOoxmlExportKernel.h"

#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>
#include <QByteArray>
#include <QDate>
#include <QDateTime>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QFile>
#include <QFontDatabase>
#include <QHash>
#include <QIODevice>
