using converter::ooxml::escapeXml;
using converter::ooxml::writeUtf8File;
using converter::ooxml::writeBinaryFile;
using converter::ooxml::writePackagePart;
using converter::ooxml::zipDirectoryToFile;

bool looksLikePercent(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeCurrency(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeDate(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeNumber(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeScientific(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(const QString &text);
bool looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(const QString &text);
QString workbookCellRef(int rowIndex, int colIndex);
QString excelColumnNameFromIndex(int zeroBased);
QString colorOrDefault(const QString &value, const QString &fallback);

bool looksLikePercent(const QString &text) {
    return text.contains('%');
}

bool looksLikeCurrency(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression currencyRe(QStringLiteral(R"(([¥￥$€£]|USD|CNY|RMB|EUR|GBP))"), QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption);
    return currencyRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeDate(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression dateRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*(\d{4}[-/\.]\d{1,2}[-/\.]\d{1,2}|\d{1,2}[-/\.]\d{1,2}([-/\.]\d{2,4})?)\s*$)")
    );
    return dateRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeScientific(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression sciRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[+-]?\d+(\.\d+)?[eE][+-]?\d+\s*$)"));
    return sciRe.match(text).hasMatch();
}

bool looksLikeNumber(const QString &text) {
    static const QRegularExpression numberRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^\s*[+-]?(\d+(\.\d+)?|\.\d+)\s*$)"));
    return numberRe.match(text).hasMatch() || looksLikeScientific(text);
}

bool looksLikeDynamicArrayFormula(const QString &text) {
    const QString upper = text.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (!upper.startsWith('=')) {
        return false;
    }
    return upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SEQUENCE("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("FILTER("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("UNIQUE("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SORT("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("SORTBY("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("RANDARRAY("))
        || upper.contains(QStringLiteral("MAKEARRAY("));
}

bool looksLikeStructuredReferenceFormula(const QString &text) {
    const QString upper = text.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (!upper.startsWith('=')) {
        return false;
    }
    return upper.contains(QLatin1Char('[')) && upper.contains(QLatin1Char(']'));
}

QString excelColumnNameFromIndex(const int zeroBased) {
    int index = zeroBased;
    if (index < 0) {
        return QStringLiteral("A");
    }
    QString out;
    while (index >= 0) {
        const int rem = index % 26;
        out.prepend(QChar(static_cast<char>('A' + rem)));
        index = index / 26 - 1;
    }
    return out;
}

QString workbookCellRef(const int rowIndex, const int colIndex) {
    return QStringLiteral("%1%2").arg(excelColumnNameFromIndex(colIndex)).arg(qMax(1, rowIndex + 1));
}

QString colorOrDefault(const QString &value, const QString &fallback) {
    QString color = value.trimmed();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.size() == 8) {
        color = color.mid(2);
    }
    static const QRegularExpression hex6(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$)"));
    if (hex6.match(color).hasMatch()) {
        return QStringLiteral("#") + color.toUpper();
    }
    QString fb = fallback.trimmed();
    if (fb.isEmpty()) {
        fb = QStringLiteral("#111111");
    }
    if (!fb.startsWith('#')) {
        fb.prepend('#');
    }
    return fb.left(7).toUpper();
}

QString escapeCsvCell(const QString &cell) {
    return QStringLiteral("\"%1\"").arg(cell).replace('"', QStringLiteral("\"\""));
}

QString escapeHtml(const QString &input) {
    QString escaped = input;
    escaped.replace('&', QStringLiteral("&amp;"));
    escaped.replace('<', QStringLiteral("&lt;"));
    escaped.replace('>', QStringLiteral("&gt;"));
    escaped.replace('"', QStringLiteral("&quot;"));
    return escaped;
}

QString makeSectionPathLabel(const QStringList &path) {
    if (path.isEmpty()) {
        return QStringLiteral("未分类");
    }
    return path.join(QStringLiteral(" / "));
}

bool hasPositionedContent(const DocumentModel &document) {
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        if (!page.graphics.isEmpty()) {
            return true;
        }
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
                if (span.w > 0.0f || span.h > 0.0f || span.fontSize > 0.0f) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

QString mergeLineText(const TextLine &line) {
    QString text;
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString token = span.text.simplified();
        if (token.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        if (!text.isEmpty()) {
            text.append(' ');
        }
        text.append(token);
    }
    return text;
}

QString inferPptMajorThemeFont(const PageContent &page);

struct WordAnchorImageRef {
    QString relId;
    QString fileName;
    QString sourcePath;
    int pageIndex = -1;
    int graphicIndex = -1;
};

QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> collectWordAnchorImageRefs(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> refs;
    int imageCounter = 1;
    for (int pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < document.pages().size(); ++pageIndex) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(pageIndex);
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || g.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFileInfo srcInfo(g.imagePath);
            if (!srcInfo.exists() || !srcInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            QString ext = srcInfo.suffix().toLower();
            if (ext != QStringLiteral("png")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpeg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("gif")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("webp")) {
                continue;
            }
            refs.push_back({
                QStringLiteral("rIdImg%1").arg(imageCounter),
                QStringLiteral("image%1.%2").arg(imageCounter).arg(ext),
                g.imagePath,
                pageIndex,
                gi
            });
            imageCounter += 1;
        }
    }
    return refs;
}

quint64 makeWordGraphicKey(int pageIndex, int graphicIndex) {
    return (static_cast<quint64>(static_cast<quint32>(pageIndex)) << 32)
        | static_cast<quint32>(graphicIndex);
}

QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> buildWordImageRefLookup(const QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> &refs) {
    QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> byGraphic;
    for (const WordAnchorImageRef &ref : refs) {
        byGraphic.insert(makeWordGraphicKey(ref.pageIndex, ref.graphicIndex), ref);
    }
    return byGraphic;
}

struct PptSlideImageRef {
    QString relId;
    QString fileName;
    QString sourcePath;
    int pageIndex = -1;
    int graphicIndex = -1;
};

QVector<PptSlideImageRef> collectPptSlideImageRefs(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QVector<PptSlideImageRef> refs;
    int imageCounter = 1;
    for (int pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < document.pages().size(); ++pageIndex) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(pageIndex);
        for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
            const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
            if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage || g.imagePath.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            QFileInfo srcInfo(g.imagePath);
            if (!srcInfo.exists() || !srcInfo.isFile()) {
                continue;
            }
            QString ext = srcInfo.suffix().toLower();
            if (ext != QStringLiteral("png")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("jpeg")
                && ext != QStringLiteral("gif")) {
                continue;
            }
            refs.push_back({
                QStringLiteral("rIdImg%1").arg(imageCounter),
                QStringLiteral("image%1.%2").arg(imageCounter).arg(ext),
                g.imagePath,
                pageIndex,
                gi
            });
            imageCounter += 1;
        }
    }
    return refs;
}

QHash<quint64, PptSlideImageRef> buildPptSlideImageLookup(const QVector<PptSlideImageRef> &refs) {
    QHash<quint64, PptSlideImageRef> byGraphic;
    for (const PptSlideImageRef &ref : refs) {
        byGraphic.insert(makeWordGraphicKey(ref.pageIndex, ref.graphicIndex), ref);
    }
    return byGraphic;
}

QString normalizePptHexColor(QString color, const QString &fallback = QStringLiteral("111111")) {
    color = color.trimmed().toUpper();
    if (color.startsWith('#')) {
        color.remove(0, 1);
    }
    if (color.size() == 8) {
        color = color.mid(2);
    }
    static const QRegularExpression hex6Re(QStringLiteral(R"(^[0-9A-F]{6}$)"));
    return hex6Re.match(color).hasMatch() ? color : fallback;
}

QString preferredPptFallbackFont() {
    static const QString cached = []() {
        const QStringList available = QFontDatabase::families();
        const QStringList preferred{
            QStringLiteral("PingFang SC"),
            QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei"),
            QStringLiteral("Heiti SC"),
            QStringLiteral("SimHei"),
            QStringLiteral("SimSun"),
            QStringLiteral("Arial")
        };
        for (const QString &candidate : preferred) {
            for (const QString &family : available) {
                if (family.compare(candidate, Qt::CaseInsensitive) == 0) {
                    return family;
                }
            }
        }
        return QStringLiteral("Arial");
    }();
    return cached;
}

QString mapPptFontFamily(QString family, const QString &fallbackThemeFont) {
    family = family.trimmed();
    if (family.isEmpty()) {
        family = fallbackThemeFont.trimmed();
    }
    if (family.isEmpty()) {
        return preferredPptFallbackFont();
    }
    QString key = family.toLower();
    key.remove('"');
    key.remove('\'');
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("simsun")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("song")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("宋体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("SimSun");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("simhei")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("heiti")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("黑体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("SimHei");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("kaiti")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("楷体"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("KaiTi");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("fangsong")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("仿宋"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("FangSong");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("yahei")) || key.contains(QStringLiteral("微软雅黑"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("Microsoft YaHei");
    }
    if (key.contains(QStringLiteral("pingfang"))) {
        return QStringLiteral("PingFang SC");
    }
    return family.left(64);
}

QString paragraphAlignToPpt(const QString &raw) {
    const QString key = raw.trimmed().toLower();
    if (key == QStringLiteral("center") || key == QStringLiteral("ctr")) {
        return QStringLiteral("ctr");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("right") || key == QStringLiteral("r")) {
        return QStringLiteral("r");
    }
    if (key == QStringLiteral("justify") || key == QStringLiteral("just")) {
        return QStringLiteral("just");
    }
    return QStringLiteral("l");
}

QString buildPptLineRunsXml(const TextLine &line, const QString &themeFont, const QString &roleTag, int &outFontSize) {
    QString runsXml;
    outFontSize = 1200;
    bool hasStyledRun = false;
    bool explicitBold = false;
    const bool isTitleRole = roleTag == QStringLiteral("title");
    const bool isSubtitleRole = roleTag == QStringLiteral("subTitle");
    for (const TextSpan &span : line.spans) {
        const QString spanText = span.text;
        if (spanText.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        double roleAdjustedPt = qMax(8.0f, span.fontSize > 0.0f ? span.fontSize : line.h);
        if (isTitleRole) {
            roleAdjustedPt = qMax(roleAdjustedPt, 18.0);
        } else if (isSubtitleRole) {
            roleAdjustedPt = qMax(roleAdjustedPt, 14.0);
        }
        const int spanSz = qBound(900, static_cast<int>(qRound(roleAdjustedPt * 100.0)), 7200);
        outFontSize = qMax(outFontSize, spanSz);
        const QString spanFont = mapPptFontFamily(span.fontFamily, themeFont);
        const QString spanColor = normalizePptHexColor(span.color, QStringLiteral("111111"));
        const QString preserveAttr = (spanText.startsWith(' ') || spanText.endsWith(' '))
            ? QStringLiteral(" xml:space=\"preserve\"")
            : QString();
        const bool spanBold = span.bold || isTitleRole;
        runsXml += QStringLiteral(
            "<a:r><a:rPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%1\" b=\"%2\" i=\"%3\">"
            "<a:solidFill><a:srgbClr val=\"%4\"/></a:solidFill>"
            "<a:latin typeface=\"%5\"/><a:ea typeface=\"%5\"/></a:rPr><a:t%7>%6</a:t></a:r>"
        )
            .arg(spanSz)
            .arg(spanBold ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(span.italic ? 1 : 0)
            .arg(spanColor)
            .arg(escapeXml(spanFont))
            .arg(escapeXml(spanText))
            .arg(preserveAttr);
        hasStyledRun = true;
        explicitBold = explicitBold || span.bold;
    }
    if (!hasStyledRun) {
        const QString merged = mergeLineText(line);
        if (merged.isEmpty()) {
            return QStringLiteral("<a:endParaRPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"1200\"/>");
        }
        const QString fallbackFont = mapPptFontFamily(themeFont, preferredPptFallbackFont());
        const int fallbackSz = isTitleRole ? 2200 : (isSubtitleRole ? 1600 : 1200);
        runsXml = QStringLiteral(
            "<a:r><a:rPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%3\" b=\"%4\"><a:latin typeface=\"%1\"/><a:ea typeface=\"%1\"/></a:rPr><a:t>%2</a:t></a:r>"
        ).arg(escapeXml(fallbackFont), escapeXml(merged), QString::number(fallbackSz), QString::number(isTitleRole ? 1 : 0));
        outFontSize = fallbackSz;
    } else if (isTitleRole && !explicitBold) {
        // 对疑似标题但未显式加粗的内容做轻度强化，避免标题层级丢失。
        runsXml.replace(QStringLiteral(" b=\"0\""), QStringLiteral(" b=\"1\""));
    }
    runsXml += QStringLiteral("<a:endParaRPr lang=\"zh-CN\" sz=\"%1\"/>").arg(outFontSize);
    return runsXml;
}

bool parseFootnoteDefinition(const QString &text, int &footnoteId, QString &body) {
    static const QVector<QRegularExpression> patterns{
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^\[(\d{1,4})\]\s*(.+)$)")),
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^(?:（|\()(\d{1,4})(?:）|\))\s*(.+)$)")),
        QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d{1,4})[\.、]\s*(.+)$)"))
    };
    for (const QRegularExpression &re : patterns) {
        const QRegularExpressionMatch m = re.match(text);
        if (!m.hasMatch()) {
            continue;
        }
        const int id = m.captured(1).toInt();
        const QString parsedBody = m.captured(2).trimmed();
        if (id > 0 && !parsedBody.isEmpty()) {
            footnoteId = id;
            body = parsedBody;
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

int parseSuperscriptDigits(const QString &token) {
    if (token.isEmpty()) {
        return 0;
    }
    QString digits;
    digits.reserve(token.size());
    for (const QChar &ch : token) {
        if (ch == QChar(0x00B9)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('1');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x00B2)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('2');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x00B3)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('3');
        } else if (ch == QChar(0x2070)) {
            digits += QLatin1Char('0');
        } else if (ch.unicode() >= 0x2074 && ch.unicode() <= 0x2079) {
            digits += QLatin1Char(static_cast<char>('0' + (ch.unicode() - 0x2070)));
        } else {
            return 0;
        }
    }
    bool ok = false;
    const int value = digits.toInt(&ok);
    return ok ? value : 0;
}

struct NativeWordParagraph {
    QString text;
    bool ordered = false;
    int level = 0;
    int ordinal = 0;
    bool footnoteDefinition = false;
    int footnoteId = 0;
    QString footnoteBody;
};

NativeWordParagraph classifyNativeWordParagraph(const QString &rawText);

int detectNativeWordHeadingLevel(const QString &rawText) {
    const QString text = rawText.trimmed();
    if (text.isEmpty()) {
        return 0;
    }
    static const QRegularExpression chapterRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第\s*[一二三四五六七八九十百千万零〇0-9]+\s*[章节篇部分卷]|Chapter\s+\d+))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    static const QRegularExpression subsectionRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^(第\s*[一二三四五六七八九十百千万零〇0-9]+\s*[节条款]|Section\s+\d+))"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    if (chapterRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 1;
    }
    if (subsectionRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
        return 2;
    }
    if (text.size() <= 42
        && (text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("概述"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("总结"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("结论"))
            || text.endsWith(QStringLiteral("摘要")))) {
        return 1;
    }
    return 0;
}

bool hasExplicitNativeWordTocField(const DocumentModel &document) {
    static const QRegularExpression tocFieldRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(\{\s*TOC\b)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            if (tocFieldRe.match(text).hasMatch()) {
                return true;
            }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

int estimateNativeWordHeadingCount(const DocumentModel &document) {
    int headingCount = 0;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString rawText = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (rawText.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const NativeWordParagraph para = classifyNativeWordParagraph(rawText);
            const int inferredLevel = (para.ordered && para.level <= 5 && para.text.size() <= 96)
                ? (para.level + 1)
                : detectNativeWordHeadingLevel(rawText);
            if (inferredLevel > 0) {
                headingCount += 1;
            }
        }
    }
    return headingCount;
}

struct NativeWordNumberingState {
    int activeNumId = 1;
    int prevTopOrdinal = 0;
    QVector<int> prevOrdinalByLevel = QVector<int>(9, 0);
    bool appendixSection = false;
};

int resolveNativeWordNumId(const NativeWordParagraph &para, NativeWordNumberingState &state) {
    const int level = qBound(0, para.level, state.prevOrdinalByLevel.size() - 1);
    const int prevAtLevel = state.prevOrdinalByLevel[level];
    const bool shouldRestart = para.ordinal == 1 && prevAtLevel > 1;
    if (para.level == 0 && para.ordinal == 1 && state.prevTopOrdinal > 1) {
        state.activeNumId = state.appendixSection ? 2 : 1;
    } else if (shouldRestart) {
        state.activeNumId = 2;
    }
    if (para.level == 0 && para.ordinal > 0) {
        state.prevTopOrdinal = para.ordinal;
    }
    if (para.ordinal > 0) {
        state.prevOrdinalByLevel[level] = para.ordinal;
        for (int deeper = level + 1; deeper < state.prevOrdinalByLevel.size(); ++deeper) {
            state.prevOrdinalByLevel[deeper] = 0;
        }
    }
    return state.activeNumId;
}

NativeWordParagraph classifyNativeWordParagraph(const QString &rawText) {
    NativeWordParagraph out;
    out.text = rawText.trimmed();
    static const QRegularExpression orderedRe(QStringLiteral(R"(^(\d+(?:\.\d+)*)[\.\)、)]\s*(.+)$)"));
    const QRegularExpressionMatch m = orderedRe.match(out.text);
    if (!m.hasMatch()) {
        return out;
    }
    out.ordered = true;
    const QString token = m.captured(1);
    out.level = qBound(0, token.count('.'), 8);
    const QStringList parts = token.split('.', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
    if (!parts.isEmpty()) {
        out.ordinal = parts.last().toInt();
    }
    out.text = m.captured(2).trimmed();
    int footnoteId = 0;
    QString footnoteBody;
    if (parseFootnoteDefinition(out.text, footnoteId, footnoteBody)) {
        out.footnoteDefinition = true;
        out.footnoteId = footnoteId;
        out.footnoteBody = footnoteBody;
    }
    return out;
}

QMap<int, QString> collectNativeWordFootnoteMap(const DocumentModel &document) {
    QMap<int, QString> result;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            int footnoteId = 0;
            QString body;
            if (!parseFootnoteDefinition(text, footnoteId, body)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (footnoteId > 0 && !body.isEmpty()) {
                result.insert(footnoteId, body);
            }
        }
    }
    return result;
}

enum class NativeWordFieldKind {
    If,
    Set,
    Ref,
    Seq,
    PageRef,
    Toc
};

struct NativeWordFieldAst {
    NativeWordFieldKind kind = NativeWordFieldKind::Ref;
    QString keyword;
    QStringList operands;
    QStringList switches;
    QString instruction;
    QString displayText;
    QVector<NativeWordFieldAst> children;
    int depth = 1;
};

enum class NativeWordInlineNodeKind {
    Text,
    FootnoteRef,
    Field
};

struct NativeWordInlineAstNode {
    NativeWordInlineNodeKind kind = NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Text;
    QString text;
    int footnoteId = 0;
    NativeWordFieldAst field;
};

QString renderNativeWordFieldNode(const NativeWordFieldAst &field) {
    QString instruction = field.instruction.trimmed();
    if (instruction.isEmpty()) {
        QStringList parts;
        parts.push_back(field.keyword.isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral("REF") : field.keyword);
        parts += field.operands;
        parts += field.switches;
        instruction = parts.join(QStringLiteral(" "));
    }
    QString resultPayload;
    if (!field.children.isEmpty()) {
        for (const NativeWordFieldAst &child : field.children) {
            resultPayload += renderNativeWordFieldNode(child);
        }
    } else {
        resultPayload = QStringLiteral("<w:r><w:t xml:space=\"preserve\">%1</w:t></w:r>")
            .arg(escapeXml(field.displayText));
    }
    return QStringLiteral("<w:r><w:fldChar w:fldCharType=\"begin\" w:fldLock=\"0\" w:dirty=\"1\"/></w:r>")
        + QStringLiteral("<w:r><w:instrText xml:space=\"preserve\"> %1 </w:instrText></w:r>").arg(escapeXml(instruction))
        + QStringLiteral("<w:r><w:fldChar w:fldCharType=\"separate\"/></w:r>")
        + resultPayload
        + QStringLiteral("<w:r><w:fldChar w:fldCharType=\"end\"/></w:r>");
}

QVector<QString> tokenizeNativeWordFieldArgs(const QString &raw) {
    QVector<QString> tokens;
    QString token;
    bool inQuote = false;
    int braceDepth = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < raw.size(); ++i) {
        const QChar ch = raw.at(i);
        if (ch == QChar('"')) {
            token += ch;
            inQuote = !inQuote;
            continue;
        }
        if (!inQuote) {
            if (ch == QChar('{')) {
                braceDepth += 1;
            } else if (ch == QChar('}')) {
                braceDepth = qMax(0, braceDepth - 1);
            }
            if (ch.isSpace() && braceDepth == 0) {
                if (!token.isEmpty()) {
                    tokens.push_back(token);
                    token.clear();
                }
                continue;
            }
        }
        token += ch;
    }
    if (!token.isEmpty()) {
        tokens.push_back(token);
    }
    return tokens;
}

QVector<QPair<int, int>> collectNativeWordTopLevelFieldRanges(const QString &text) {
    QVector<QPair<int, int>> ranges;
    int depth = 0;
    int start = -1;
    for (int i = 0; i < text.size(); ++i) {
        const QChar ch = text.at(i);
        if (ch == QChar('{')) {
            if (depth == 0) {
                start = i;
            }
            depth += 1;
        } else if (ch == QChar('}')) {
            if (depth <= 0) {
                continue;
            }
            depth -= 1;
            if (depth == 0 && start >= 0) {
                ranges.push_back(qMakePair(start, i));
                start = -1;
            }
        }
    }
    return ranges;
}

QString stripNativeWordFieldQuotes(const QString &value) {
    if (value.size() >= 2 && value.startsWith(QChar('"')) && value.endsWith(QChar('"'))) {
        return value.mid(1, value.size() - 2);
    }
    return value;
}

NativeWordFieldAst parseNativeWordFieldAstFromToken(const QString &token) {
    NativeWordFieldAst ast;
    QString inner = token.trimmed();
    if (inner.startsWith(QChar('{')) && inner.endsWith(QChar('}')) && inner.size() >= 2) {
        inner = inner.mid(1, inner.size() - 2).trimmed();
    }
    const QVector<QPair<int, int>> nestedRanges = collectNativeWordTopLevelFieldRanges(inner);
    int maxDepth = 1;
    for (const QPair<int, int> &range : nestedRanges) {
        if (range.first < 0 || range.second < range.first || range.second >= inner.size()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString childToken = inner.mid(range.first, range.second - range.first + 1);
        NativeWordFieldAst child = parseNativeWordFieldAstFromToken(childToken);
        if (child.keyword.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        ast.children.push_back(child);
        maxDepth = qMax(maxDepth, child.depth + 1);
    }
    ast.depth = maxDepth;
    const QVector<QString> items = tokenizeNativeWordFieldArgs(inner);
    if (items.isEmpty()) {
        ast.keyword = QStringLiteral("REF");
        ast.instruction = QStringLiteral("REF");
        return ast;
    }
    ast.keyword = items.first().toUpper();
    for (int i = 1; i < items.size(); ++i) {
        const QString item = items.at(i);
        if (item.startsWith(QStringLiteral("\\"))) {
            ast.switches.push_back(item);
        } else {
            ast.operands.push_back(item);
        }
    }
    if (ast.keyword == QStringLiteral("IF")) {
        ast.kind = NativeWordFieldKind::If;
    } else if (ast.keyword == QStringLiteral("SET")) {
        ast.kind = NativeWordFieldKind::Set;
    } else if (ast.keyword == QStringLiteral("SEQ")) {
        ast.kind = NativeWordFieldKind::Seq;
    } else if (ast.keyword == QStringLiteral("PAGEREF")) {
        ast.kind = NativeWordFieldKind::PageRef;
    } else if (ast.keyword == QStringLiteral("TOC")) {
        ast.kind = NativeWordFieldKind::Toc;
    } else {
        ast.kind = NativeWordFieldKind::Ref;
    }
    QStringList instructionParts;
    instructionParts.push_back(ast.keyword);
    instructionParts += ast.operands;
    instructionParts += ast.switches;
    ast.instruction = instructionParts.join(QStringLiteral(" "));
    if (ast.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::If && ast.operands.size() >= 3) {
        ast.displayText = stripNativeWordFieldQuotes(ast.operands.at(1));
    } else if (ast.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::Set && !ast.operands.isEmpty()) {
        ast.displayText = stripNativeWordFieldQuotes(ast.operands.last());
    } else if ((ast.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::Ref || ast.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::PageRef) && !ast.operands.isEmpty()) {
        ast.displayText = stripNativeWordFieldQuotes(ast.operands.first());
    } else if (ast.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::Seq && !ast.operands.isEmpty()) {
        ast.displayText = QStringLiteral("%1 1").arg(stripNativeWordFieldQuotes(ast.operands.first()));
    } else {
        ast.displayText = inner;
    }
    return ast;
}

QString renderNativeWordInlineAst(const QVector<NativeWordInlineAstNode> &nodes) {
    QString out;
    for (const NativeWordInlineAstNode &node : nodes) {
        if (node.kind == NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Text) {
            out += QStringLiteral("<w:r><w:t xml:space=\"preserve\">%1</w:t></w:r>").arg(escapeXml(node.text));
        } else if (node.kind == NativeWordInlineNodeKind::FootnoteRef) {
            out += QStringLiteral(
                "<w:r><w:rPr><w:vertAlign w:val=\"superscript\"/></w:rPr><w:footnoteReference w:id=\"%1\"/></w:r>"
            ).arg(node.footnoteId);
        } else {
            out += renderNativeWordFieldNode(node.field);
        }
    }
    return out;
}

QVector<NativeWordInlineAstNode> parseNativeWordInlineAst(
    const QString &text,
    const QMap<int, QString> &footnoteMap,
    QSet<int> &usedFootnoteIds
) {
    auto appendTextChunkAst = [&](const QString &chunk, QVector<NativeWordInlineAstNode> &nodes) {
        if (chunk.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        static const QRegularExpression refRe(
            QStringLiteral(R"(\[(\d{1,4})\]|(?:（|\()(\d{1,4})(?:）|\))|([¹²³⁰⁴⁵⁶⁷⁸⁹]+)|(第\s*(\d{1,4})\s*页)|(?:图|Figure)\s*(\d{1,4})|(?:表|Table)\s*(\d{1,4}))")
        );
        int cursor = 0;
        QRegularExpressionMatchIterator refIter = refRe.globalMatch(chunk);
        while (refIter.hasNext()) {
            const QRegularExpressionMatch m = refIter.next();
            if (!m.hasMatch()) {
                continue;
            }
            const int start = m.capturedStart(0);
            const int end = m.capturedEnd(0);
            if (start > cursor) {
                nodes.push_back({NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Text, chunk.mid(cursor, start - cursor), 0, {}});
            }
            int id = 0;
            if (!m.captured(1).isEmpty()) {
                id = m.captured(1).toInt();
            } else if (!m.captured(2).isEmpty()) {
                id = m.captured(2).toInt();
            } else if (!m.captured(3).isEmpty()) {
                id = parseSuperscriptDigits(m.captured(3));
            }
            const int pageRef = m.captured(4).toInt();
            const int figRef = m.captured(5).toInt();
            const int tblRef = m.captured(6).toInt();
            if (pageRef > 0) {
                nodes.push_back({
                    NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Field,
                    QString(),
                    0,
                    {NativeWordFieldKind::PageRef, QStringLiteral("PAGEREF"), {QStringLiteral("Pg_%1").arg(pageRef)}, {QStringLiteral("\\h")},
                        QStringLiteral("PAGEREF Pg_%1 \\\\h").arg(pageRef), QStringLiteral("第 %1 页").arg(pageRef)}
                });
            } else if (figRef > 0) {
                nodes.push_back({
                    NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Field,
                    QString(),
                    0,
                    {NativeWordFieldKind::Ref, QStringLiteral("REF"), {QStringLiteral("Fig_%1").arg(figRef)}, {QStringLiteral("\\h")},
                        QStringLiteral("REF Fig_%1 \\\\h").arg(figRef), QStringLiteral("图 %1").arg(figRef)}
                });
            } else if (tblRef > 0) {
                nodes.push_back({
                    NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Field,
                    QString(),
                    0,
                    {NativeWordFieldKind::Ref, QStringLiteral("REF"), {QStringLiteral("Tbl_%1").arg(tblRef)}, {QStringLiteral("\\h")},
                        QStringLiteral("REF Tbl_%1 \\\\h").arg(tblRef), QStringLiteral("表 %1").arg(tblRef)}
                });
            } else if (id > 0 && footnoteMap.contains(id)) {
                usedFootnoteIds.insert(id);
                nodes.push_back({NativeWordInlineNodeKind::FootnoteRef, QString(), id, {}});
            } else {
                nodes.push_back({NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Text, m.captured(0), 0, {}});
            }
            cursor = end;
        }
        if (cursor < chunk.size()) {
            nodes.push_back({NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Text, chunk.mid(cursor), 0, {}});
        }
    };
    static const QRegularExpression fieldHeadRe(
        QStringLiteral(R"(^\{\s*(IF|SET|REF|SEQ|PAGEREF|TOC)\b([\s\S]*)\}$)"),
        QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
    );
    QVector<NativeWordInlineAstNode> nodes;
    int chunkStart = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < text.size(); ++i) {
        if (text.at(i) != QChar('{')) {
            continue;
        }
        int depth = 0;
        int end = -1;
        for (int j = i; j < text.size(); ++j) {
            if (text.at(j) == QChar('{')) {
                depth += 1;
            } else if (text.at(j) == QChar('}')) {
                depth -= 1;
                if (depth == 0) {
                    end = j;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        if (end < 0) {
            continue;
        }
        if (i > chunkStart) {
            appendTextChunkAst(text.mid(chunkStart, i - chunkStart), nodes);
        }
        const QString token = text.mid(i, end - i + 1);
        const QRegularExpressionMatch fieldMatch = fieldHeadRe.match(token);
        if (fieldMatch.hasMatch()) {
            NativeWordFieldAst parsedField = parseNativeWordFieldAstFromToken(token);
            if (parsedField.displayText.trimmed().isEmpty()) {
                parsedField.displayText = token.mid(1, token.size() - 2).trimmed();
            }
            nodes.push_back({
                NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Field,
                QString(),
                0,
                parsedField
            });
        } else {
            appendTextChunkAst(token, nodes);
        }
        i = end;
        chunkStart = end + 1;
    }
    if (chunkStart < text.size()) {
        appendTextChunkAst(text.mid(chunkStart), nodes);
    }
    if (nodes.isEmpty()) {
        appendTextChunkAst(text, nodes);
    }
    if (nodes.isEmpty()) {
        nodes.push_back({NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Text, QString(), 0, {}});
    }
    return nodes;
}

QString buildNativeWordRunsWithFootnoteRefs(
    const QString &text,
    const QMap<int, QString> &footnoteMap,
    QSet<int> &usedFootnoteIds
) {
    const QVector<NativeWordInlineAstNode> ast = parseNativeWordInlineAst(text, footnoteMap, usedFootnoteIds);
    return renderNativeWordInlineAst(ast);
}

struct NativeWordFieldAstStats {
    int nodeCount = 0;
    int nestedNodeCount = 0;
    int ifCount = 0;
    int setCount = 0;
    int refCount = 0;
    int seqCount = 0;
    int tocCount = 0;
    int maxDepth = 0;
};

void accumulateNativeWordFieldAstStats(const NativeWordFieldAst &field, NativeWordFieldAstStats &stats) {
    stats.nodeCount += 1;
    stats.maxDepth = qMax(stats.maxDepth, field.depth);
    if (!field.children.isEmpty()) {
        stats.nestedNodeCount += 1;
    }
    if (field.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::If) {
        stats.ifCount += 1;
    } else if (field.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::Set) {
        stats.setCount += 1;
    } else if (field.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::Seq) {
        stats.seqCount += 1;
    } else if (field.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::Ref || field.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::PageRef) {
        stats.refCount += 1;
    } else if (field.kind == NativeWordFieldKind::Toc) {
        stats.tocCount += 1;
    }
    for (const NativeWordFieldAst &child : field.children) {
        accumulateNativeWordFieldAstStats(child, stats);
    }
}

NativeWordFieldAstStats collectNativeWordFieldAstStats(const DocumentModel &document) {
    NativeWordFieldAstStats stats;
    const QMap<int, QString> footnoteMap = collectNativeWordFootnoteMap(document);
    QSet<int> usedFootnoteIds;
    for (const PageContent &page : document.pages()) {
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            if (text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            const QVector<NativeWordInlineAstNode> nodes = parseNativeWordInlineAst(text, footnoteMap, usedFootnoteIds);
            for (const NativeWordInlineAstNode &node : nodes) {
                if (node.kind != NativeWordInlineNodeKind::Field) {
                    continue;
                }
                accumulateNativeWordFieldAstStats(node.field, stats);
            }
        }
    }
    return stats;
}

QString buildNativeWordFloatingFramesParagraphs(
    const PageContent &page,
    const int pageIndex,
    const QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> &imageRefLookup
) {
    if (page.graphics.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    const double pageW = page.width > 1.0f ? page.width : 595.0;
    const double pageH = page.height > 1.0f ? page.height : 842.0;
    QString out;
    for (int gi = 0; gi < page.graphics.size(); ++gi) {
        const GraphicObject &g = page.graphics.at(gi);
        if (g.kind != GraphicKind::RasterImage) {
            continue;
        }
        const auto it = imageRefLookup.constFind(makeWordGraphicKey(pageIndex, gi));
        if (it == imageRefLookup.constEnd()) {
            continue;
        }
        const float anchorX = g.isBackground ? 0.0f : qMax(0.0f, g.x);
        const float anchorY = g.isBackground ? 0.0f : qMax(0.0f, g.y);
        const float anchorW = g.isBackground ? static_cast<float>(pageW) : qMax(1.0f, g.w);
        const float anchorH = g.isBackground ? static_cast<float>(pageH) : qMax(1.0f, g.h);
        const int x = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound((anchorX / pageW) * 9360.0)), 9360);
        const int y = qBound(0, static_cast<int>(qRound((anchorY / pageH) * 14400.0)), 14400);
        const int w = qBound(800, static_cast<int>(qRound((anchorW / pageW) * 9360.0)), 9360);
        const int h = qBound(400, static_cast<int>(qRound((anchorH / pageH) * 14400.0)), 14400);
        const int docPrId = (pageIndex + 1) * 1000 + gi + 1;
        const double areaRatio = (anchorW * anchorH) / (pageW * pageH);
        const bool nearPageOrigin = anchorX <= pageW * 0.08f && anchorY <= pageH * 0.08f;
        const bool behindDoc = g.isBackground || g.opacity < 0.62f || (areaRatio > 0.55 && nearPageOrigin);
        const bool wrapTopBottom = !behindDoc && (areaRatio > 0.33 || w >= 7600);
        const bool wrapTight = !behindDoc && !wrapTopBottom && areaRatio < 0.06;
        const QString wrapXml = behindDoc
            ? QStringLiteral("<wp:wrapNone/>")
            : (wrapTopBottom
                ? QStringLiteral("<wp:wrapTopAndBottom/>")
                : (wrapTight
                    ? QStringLiteral("<wp:wrapTight wrapText=\"bothSides\"><wp:wrapPolygon edited=\"0\"><wp:start x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><wp:lineTo x=\"21600\" y=\"0\"/><wp:lineTo x=\"21600\" y=\"21600\"/><wp:lineTo x=\"0\" y=\"21600\"/></wp:wrapPolygon></wp:wrapTight>")
                    : QStringLiteral("<wp:wrapSquare wrapText=\"bothSides\"/>")));
        const qlonglong relativeHeight = qBound<qlonglong>(
            0,
            251658240LL + static_cast<qlonglong>(qRound((qMax(0.0f, g.y) / pageH) * 1000000.0))
                + static_cast<qlonglong>(qRound((qMax(0.0f, g.x) / pageW) * 10000.0))
                + static_cast<qlonglong>(gi),
            2147483000LL
        );
        const QString hRelativeFrom = QStringLiteral("page");
        const QString vRelativeFrom = QStringLiteral("page");
        const int allowOverlap = (behindDoc || areaRatio > 0.25) ? 0 : 1;
        const int layoutInCell = 1;
        const int distWrap = wrapTight ? 57150 : 114300;
        out += QStringLiteral(
            "<w:p><w:r><w:drawing><wp:anchor distT=\"0\" distB=\"0\" distL=\"%19\" distR=\"%19\" "
            "simplePos=\"0\" relativeHeight=\"%10\" behindDoc=\"%14\" locked=\"0\" layoutInCell=\"%15\" allowOverlap=\"%16\" wp14:anchorId=\"%17\" wp14:editId=\"%18\">"
            "<wp:simplePos x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/>"
            "<wp:positionH relativeFrom=\"%11\"><wp:posOffset>%1</wp:posOffset></wp:positionH>"
            "<wp:positionV relativeFrom=\"%12\"><wp:posOffset>%2</wp:posOffset></wp:positionV>"
            "<wp:extent cx=\"%3\" cy=\"%4\"/>"
            "<wp:effectExtent l=\"0\" t=\"0\" r=\"0\" b=\"0\"/>"
            "%13"
            "<wp:docPr id=\"%5\" name=\"Floating P%6G%7\" descr=\"floating-anchor\"/>"
            "<wp:cNvGraphicFramePr/>"
            "<a:graphic><a:graphicData uri=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/picture\">"
            "<pic:pic><pic:nvPicPr><pic:cNvPr id=\"0\" name=\"Image\"/>"
            "<pic:cNvPicPr/></pic:nvPicPr><pic:blipFill><a:blip r:embed=\"%8\"/>"
            "<a:stretch><a:fillRect/></a:stretch></pic:blipFill>"
            "<pic:spPr><a:xfrm><a:off x=\"0\" y=\"0\"/><a:ext cx=\"%3\" cy=\"%4\"/></a:xfrm>"
            "<a:prstGeom prst=\"rect\"><a:avLst/></a:prstGeom>"
            "<a:noFill/><a:ln><a:noFill/></a:ln>"
            "</pic:spPr></pic:pic>"
            "</a:graphicData></a:graphic></wp:anchor></w:drawing></w:r></w:p>"
        ).arg(static_cast<qlonglong>(x) * 635LL)
         .arg(static_cast<qlonglong>(y) * 635LL)
         .arg(static_cast<qlonglong>(w) * 635LL)
         .arg(static_cast<qlonglong>(h) * 635LL)
         .arg(docPrId)
         .arg(pageIndex + 1)
         .arg(gi + 1)
         .arg(it->relId)
         .arg(50000 + docPrId)
         .arg(relativeHeight)
         .arg(hRelativeFrom)
         .arg(vRelativeFrom)
         .arg(wrapXml)
         .arg(behindDoc)
         .arg(layoutInCell)
         .arg(allowOverlap)
         .arg(QString::number((docPrId * 131) % 0x0FFFFFFF, 16).rightJustified(8, QLatin1Char('0')).toUpper())
         .arg(QString::number((docPrId * 977 + pageIndex * 17) % 0x0FFFFFFF, 16).rightJustified(8, QLatin1Char('0')).toUpper())
         .arg(distWrap);
    }
    return out;
}

struct NativeWordSectionSpec {
    int beginPage = 0;
    int endPage = 0;
    int pageWidthTwips = 11906;
    int pageHeightTwips = 16838;
    bool landscape = false;
    bool firstPageDifferent = false;
    bool useEvenOdd = false;
    QString headerDefault;
    QString headerFirst;
    QString headerEven;
    QString footerDefault;
    QString footerFirst;
    QString footerEven;
};

struct NativeWordHeaderFooterPlan {
    QString headerDefault;
    QString headerFirst;
    QString headerEven;
    QString footerDefault;
    QString footerFirst;
    QString footerEven;
    bool useEvenOdd = false;
    bool useDifferentFirst = false;
};

QString normalizeWordHeaderFooterToken(const QString &text) {
    QString s = text.simplified();
    s.remove(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(\s+)")));
    return s.toLower();
}

QString collectWordBandText(const PageContent &page, const bool topBand) {
    if (page.lines.isEmpty()) {
        return QString();
    }
    const double pageH = page.height > 1.0f ? page.height : 842.0;
    const double topGate = pageH * 0.14;
    const double bottomGate = pageH * 0.86;
    QStringList lines;
    for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
        const QString text = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
        if (text.isEmpty() || text.size() > 150) {
            continue;
        }
        if (topBand) {
            if (line.y <= topGate) {
                lines.push_back(text);
            }
        } else if (line.y >= bottomGate) {
            lines.push_back(text);
        }
    }
    lines.removeDuplicates();
    return lines.join(QStringLiteral(" "));
}

QString pickWordMostFrequent(const QStringList &texts) {
    QHash<QString, int> freq;
    QHash<QString, QString> original;
    for (const QString &text : texts) {
        const QString t = text.trimmed();
        if (t.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        const QString key = normalizeWordHeaderFooterToken(t);
        if (key.isEmpty()) {
            continue;
        }
        freq[key] += 1;
        if (!original.contains(key)) {
            original.insert(key, t);
        }
    }
    int bestCount = 0;
    QString bestKey;
    for (auto it = freq.constBegin(); it != freq.constEnd(); ++it) {
        if (it.value() > bestCount) {
            bestCount = it.value();
            bestKey = it.key();
        }
    }
    return original.value(bestKey);
}

NativeWordHeaderFooterPlan buildNativeWordHeaderFooterPlan(const DocumentModel &document) {
    NativeWordHeaderFooterPlan plan;
    Q_UNUSED(document);
    // 保真优先：禁止根据正文推断页眉页脚，避免注入脏内容。
    return plan;
}

QVector<NativeWordSectionSpec> buildNativeWordSectionSpecs(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const NativeWordHeaderFooterPlan &headerFooterPlan
) {
    QVector<NativeWordSectionSpec> specs;
    if (document.pages().isEmpty()) {
        return specs;
    }
    auto toTwips = [](float value, const int fallback) {
        return qBound(2880, static_cast<int>(qRound((value > 1.0f ? value : static_cast<float>(fallback)) * 20.0f)), 31680);
    };
    auto bandSignature = [](const QString &text) {
        QString s = normalizeWordHeaderFooterToken(text);
        s.remove(QRegularExpression(QStringLiteral(R"(\d+)")));
        return s;
    };
    auto closeSection = [&](NativeWordSectionSpec &section, const QStringList &headers, const QStringList &footers) {
        QStringList oddHeaders;
        QStringList evenHeaders;
        QStringList oddFooters;
        QStringList evenFooters;
        for (int idx = 0; idx < headers.size(); ++idx) {
            const int absolutePage = section.beginPage + idx;
            if ((absolutePage % 2) == 0) {
                oddHeaders.push_back(headers[idx]);
                oddFooters.push_back(idx < footers.size() ? footers[idx] : QString());
            } else {
                evenHeaders.push_back(headers[idx]);
                evenFooters.push_back(idx < footers.size() ? footers[idx] : QString());
            }
        }
        const QString firstHeader = headers.isEmpty() ? QString() : headers.first();
        const QString firstFooter = footers.isEmpty() ? QString() : footers.first();
        section.headerDefault = pickWordMostFrequent(oddHeaders.isEmpty() ? headers : oddHeaders);
        section.headerEven = pickWordMostFrequent(evenHeaders);
        if (section.headerEven.isEmpty()) {
            section.headerEven = section.headerDefault;
        }
        section.headerFirst = firstHeader.isEmpty() ? section.headerDefault : firstHeader;
        section.footerDefault = pickWordMostFrequent(oddFooters.isEmpty() ? footers : oddFooters);
        section.footerEven = pickWordMostFrequent(evenFooters);
        if (section.footerEven.isEmpty()) {
            section.footerEven = section.footerDefault;
        }
        section.footerFirst = firstFooter.isEmpty() ? section.footerDefault : firstFooter;
        section.firstPageDifferent = bandSignature(section.headerFirst) != bandSignature(section.headerDefault)
            || bandSignature(section.footerFirst) != bandSignature(section.footerDefault);
        section.useEvenOdd = bandSignature(section.headerEven) != bandSignature(section.headerDefault)
            || bandSignature(section.footerEven) != bandSignature(section.footerDefault);
    };

    NativeWordSectionSpec current;
    current.beginPage = 0;
    current.pageWidthTwips = toTwips(document.pages().first().width, 595);
    current.pageHeightTwips = toTwips(document.pages().first().height, 842);
    current.landscape = current.pageWidthTwips > current.pageHeightTwips;
    QStringList sectionHeaders;
    QStringList sectionFooters;
    sectionHeaders.push_back(collectWordBandText(document.pages().first(), true));
    sectionFooters.push_back(collectWordBandText(document.pages().first(), false));
    QString prevHeaderSig = bandSignature(sectionHeaders.first());
    QString prevFooterSig = bandSignature(sectionFooters.first());
    for (int i = 1; i < document.pages().size(); ++i) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(i);
        const int w = toTwips(page.width, 595);
        const int h = toTwips(page.height, 842);
        const bool landscape = w > h;
        const bool orientationChanged = landscape != current.landscape;
        const bool sizeChanged = std::abs(w - current.pageWidthTwips) > 240 || std::abs(h - current.pageHeightTwips) > 240;
        const QString pageHeader = collectWordBandText(page, true);
        const QString pageFooter = collectWordBandText(page, false);
        const QString headerSig = bandSignature(pageHeader);
        const QString footerSig = bandSignature(pageFooter);
        const bool headerFooterChanged = (headerSig != prevHeaderSig || footerSig != prevFooterSig)
            && (i - current.beginPage) >= 1;
        if (orientationChanged || sizeChanged || headerFooterChanged) {
            current.endPage = i - 1;
            closeSection(current, sectionHeaders, sectionFooters);
            specs.push_back(current);
            current = {};
            current.beginPage = i;
            current.pageWidthTwips = w;
            current.pageHeightTwips = h;
            current.landscape = landscape;
            sectionHeaders.clear();
            sectionFooters.clear();
        }
        sectionHeaders.push_back(pageHeader);
        sectionFooters.push_back(pageFooter);
        prevHeaderSig = headerSig;
        prevFooterSig = footerSig;
    }
    current.endPage = document.pages().size() - 1;
    closeSection(current, sectionHeaders, sectionFooters);
    specs.push_back(current);
    if (!specs.isEmpty() && headerFooterPlan.useDifferentFirst) {
        specs[0].firstPageDifferent = true;
    }
    return specs;
}

QString buildNativeWordSectionProperties(
    const NativeWordSectionSpec &section,
    bool nextPageSection,
    const QString &headerFooterRefsXml
) {
    int pageWidthTwips = section.pageWidthTwips;
    int pageHeightTwips = section.pageHeightTwips;
    QString orientAttr;
    if (section.landscape && pageWidthTwips < pageHeightTwips) {
        std::swap(pageWidthTwips, pageHeightTwips);
    }
    if (section.landscape) {
        orientAttr = QStringLiteral(" w:orient=\"landscape\"");
    }
    QString sectPr = QStringLiteral(
        "<w:sectPr>"
        "<w:pgSz w:w=\"%1\" w:h=\"%2\"%3/>"
        "<w:pgMar w:top=\"1440\" w:right=\"1440\" w:bottom=\"1440\" w:left=\"1440\" w:header=\"708\" w:footer=\"708\" w:gutter=\"0\"/>"
        "<w:cols w:space=\"425\"/>"
        "<w:docGrid w:linePitch=\"360\"/>"
        "<w:pgNumType w:fmt=\"decimal\"/>"
    ).arg(pageWidthTwips).arg(pageHeightTwips).arg(orientAttr);
    if (nextPageSection) {
        sectPr += QStringLiteral("<w:type w:val=\"nextPage\"/>");
    }
    if (section.firstPageDifferent) {
        sectPr += QStringLiteral("<w:titlePg/>");
    }
    if (!headerFooterRefsXml.isEmpty()) {
        sectPr += headerFooterRefsXml;
    }
    sectPr += QStringLiteral("</w:sectPr>");
    return sectPr;
}

QString buildNativeWordSectionHeaderFooterRefsXml(
    const NativeWordSectionSpec &section,
    const int headerDefaultPartIndex,
    const int headerFirstPartIndex,
    const int headerEvenPartIndex,
    const int footerDefaultPartIndex,
    const int footerFirstPartIndex,
    const int footerEvenPartIndex
) {
    Q_UNUSED(section);
    Q_UNUSED(headerDefaultPartIndex);
    Q_UNUSED(headerFirstPartIndex);
    Q_UNUSED(headerEvenPartIndex);
    Q_UNUSED(footerDefaultPartIndex);
    Q_UNUSED(footerFirstPartIndex);
    Q_UNUSED(footerEvenPartIndex);
    return QString();
}

QString buildNativeWordBodyXml(
    const DocumentModel &document,
    const QMap<int, QString> &footnoteMap,
    const QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> &imageRefLookup,
    QSet<int> &usedFootnoteIds,
    const QVector<NativeWordSectionSpec> &sections,
    const QHash<int, QString> &headerFooterRefsXmlBySectionEndPage
) {
    QHash<int, NativeWordSectionSpec> sectionByLastPage;
    for (const NativeWordSectionSpec &section : sections) {
        sectionByLastPage.insert(section.endPage, section);
    }
    QString body;
    NativeWordNumberingState numberingState;
    int bookmarkId = 1;
    for (int pageIndex = 0; pageIndex < document.pages().size(); ++pageIndex) {
        const PageContent &page = document.pages().at(pageIndex);
        body += buildNativeWordFloatingFramesParagraphs(page, pageIndex, imageRefLookup);
        bool pageBookmarkPlaced = false;
        for (const TextLine &line : page.lines) {
            const QString rawText = mergeLineText(line).trimmed();
            NativeWordParagraph para = classifyNativeWordParagraph(rawText);
            if (para.text.isEmpty()) {
                continue;
            }
            int footnoteId = 0;
            QString footnoteBody;
            if (parseFootnoteDefinition(para.text, footnoteId, footnoteBody)) {
                continue;
            }
            if (para.text.startsWith(QStringLiteral("附录"))
                || para.text.startsWith(QStringLiteral("Appendix"), Qt::CaseInsensitive)) {
                numberingState.appendixSection = true;
                numberingState.activeNumId = 2;
            }
            QStringList pPrSegments;
            if (para.ordered) {
                const int activeNumId = resolveNativeWordNumId(para, numberingState);
                pPrSegments.push_back(QStringLiteral(
                    "<w:numPr><w:ilvl w:val=\"%1\"/><w:numId w:val=\"%2\"/></w:numPr>"
                ).arg(para.level).arg(activeNumId));
            }
            int headingLevel = 0;
            if (para.ordered && para.level <= 5 && para.text.size() <= 96) {
                headingLevel = para.level + 1;
            } else {
                headingLevel = detectNativeWordHeadingLevel(rawText);
            }
            if (headingLevel > 0) {
                pPrSegments.push_back(QStringLiteral("<w:pStyle w:val=\"Heading%1\"/>").arg(qBound(1, headingLevel, 6)));
            }
            QString pPr;
            if (!pPrSegments.isEmpty()) {
                pPr = QStringLiteral("<w:pPr>%1</w:pPr>").arg(pPrSegments.join(QString()));
            }
            QString runs = buildNativeWordRunsWithFootnoteRefs(para.text, footnoteMap, usedFootnoteIds);
            QString bookmarkPrefix;
            QString bookmarkSuffix;
            auto appendBookmark = [&](const QString &name) {
                bookmarkPrefix += QStringLiteral("<w:bookmarkStart w:id=\"%1\" w:name=\"%2\"/>")
                    .arg(bookmarkId++)
                    .arg(escapeXml(name));
                bookmarkSuffix.prepend(QStringLiteral("<w:bookmarkEnd w:id=\"%1\"/>").arg(bookmarkId - 1));
            };
            if (!pageBookmarkPlaced) {
                appendBookmark(QStringLiteral("Pg_%1").arg(pageIndex + 1));
                pageBookmarkPlaced = true;
            }
            static const QRegularExpression figureCaptionRe(
                QStringLiteral(R"(^(?:图|Figure)\s*(\d{1,4})\b)"),
                QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
            );
            static const QRegularExpression tableCaptionRe(
                QStringLiteral(R"(^(?:表|Table)\s*(\d{1,4})\b)"),
                QRegularExpression::CaseInsensitiveOption
            );
            const QRegularExpressionMatch figureMatch = figureCaptionRe.match(para.text);
            const QRegularExpressionMatch tableMatch = tableCaptionRe.match(para.text);
            if (figureMatch.hasMatch()) {
                appendBookmark(QStringLiteral("Fig_%1").arg(figureMatch.captured(1)));
            } else if (tableMatch.hasMatch()) {
                appendBookmark(QStringLiteral("Tbl_%1").arg(tableMatch.captured(1)));
            }
            runs = bookmarkPrefix + runs + bookmarkSuffix;
            body += QStringLiteral("<w:p>%1%2</w:p>").arg(pPr, runs);
        }
        if (!pageBookmarkPlaced) {
            body += QStringLiteral(
                "<w:p><w:bookmarkStart w:id=\"%1\" w:name=\"Pg_%2\"/><w:r><w:t xml:space=\"preserve\"> </w:t></w:r><w:bookmarkEnd w:id=\"%1\"/></w:p>"
            ).arg(bookmarkId++).arg(pageIndex + 1);
        }
        if (sectionByLastPage.contains(pageIndex) && pageIndex + 1 < document.pages().size()) {
            const NativeWordSectionSpec section = sectionByLastPage.value(pageIndex);
            body += QStringLiteral("<w:p><w:pPr>%1</w:pPr></w:p>").arg(
                buildNativeWordSectionProperties(
                    section,
                    true,
                    headerFooterRefsXmlBySectionEndPage.value(section.endPage)
                )
            );
        } else if (pageIndex + 1 < document.pages().size()) {
            // Preserve source pagination even when section does not change.
            body += QStringLiteral("<w:p><w:r><w:br w:type=\"page\"/></w:r></w:p>");
        }
    }
    if (body.isEmpty()) {
        body = QStringLiteral("<w:p><w:r><w:t></w:t></w:r></w:p>");
    }
    if (!document.pages().isEmpty()) {
        const NativeWordSectionSpec finalSection = sections.isEmpty() ? NativeWordSectionSpec{} : sections.last();
        body += buildNativeWordSectionProperties(
            finalSection,
            false,
            headerFooterRefsXmlBySectionEndPage.value(finalSection.endPage)
        );
    } else {
        body += QStringLiteral(
            "<w:sectPr><w:pgSz w:w=\"11906\" w:h=\"16838\"/>"
            "<w:pgMar w:top=\"1440\" w:right=\"1440\" w:bottom=\"1440\" w:left=\"1440\" w:header=\"708\" w:footer=\"708\" w:gutter=\"0\"/>"
            "<w:cols w:space=\"425\"/><w:docGrid w:linePitch=\"360\"/>"
            "<w:pgNumType w:fmt=\"decimal\"/></w:sectPr>"
        );
    }
    return body;
}

QString buildNativeWordHeaderPartXml(const QString &text) {
    const QString safeText = text.trimmed().isEmpty() ? QStringLiteral(" ") : text.trimmed();
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:hdr xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\">"
        "<w:p><w:r><w:t xml:space=\"preserve\">%1</w:t></w:r></w:p>"
        "</w:hdr>"
    ).arg(escapeXml(safeText));
}

QString buildNativeWordFooterPartXml(const QString &text) {
    const QString normalized = text.trimmed().simplified();
    return QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:ftr xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\">"
        "<w:p><w:r><w:t xml:space=\"preserve\">%1</w:t></w:r></w:p>"
        "</w:ftr>"
    ).arg(escapeXml(normalized));
}

static bool exportNativeDocx(const DocumentModel &document, const QString &targetPath, QStringList &traceLogs) {
    QTemporaryDir pkgDir;
    if (!pkgDir.isValid()) {
        return false;
    }
    const QString root = pkgDir.path();
    QString contentTypes = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Types xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/content-types\">"
        "<Default Extension=\"rels\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.relationships+xml\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"xml\" ContentType=\"application/xml\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"png\" ContentType=\"image/png\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"jpg\" ContentType=\"image/jpeg\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"jpeg\" ContentType=\"image/jpeg\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"gif\" ContentType=\"image/gif\"/>"
        "<Default Extension=\"webp\" ContentType=\"image/webp\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/document.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document.main+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/styles.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.styles+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/numbering.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.numbering+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/settings.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.settings+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/header1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.header+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/header2.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.header+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/header3.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.header+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/footer1.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.footer+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/footer2.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.footer+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/footer3.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.footer+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/footnotes.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.footnotes+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/word/endnotes.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.endnotes+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/docProps/core.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-package.core-properties+xml\"/>"
        "<Override PartName=\"/docProps/app.xml\" ContentType=\"application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.extended-properties+xml\"/>"
        "</Types>"
    );
    const QString rootRels = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/officeDocument\" Target=\"word/document.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId2\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships/metadata/core-properties\" Target=\"docProps/core.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rId3\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/extended-properties\" Target=\"docProps/app.xml\"/>"
        "</Relationships>"
    );
    const QMap<int, QString> footnoteMap = collectNativeWordFootnoteMap(document);
    const NativeWordFieldAstStats fieldAstStats = collectNativeWordFieldAstStats(document);
    const QVector<WordAnchorImageRef> imageRefs = collectWordAnchorImageRefs(document);
    const QHash<quint64, WordAnchorImageRef> imageRefLookup = buildWordImageRefLookup(imageRefs);
    const NativeWordHeaderFooterPlan headerFooterPlan = buildNativeWordHeaderFooterPlan(document);
    const QVector<NativeWordSectionSpec> sections = buildNativeWordSectionSpecs(document, headerFooterPlan);
    QVector<QString> headerPartXmlList;
    QVector<QString> footerPartXmlList;
    QHash<QString, int> headerPartIndexByKey;
    QHash<QString, int> footerPartIndexByKey;
    auto appendHeaderPart = [&](const QString &text) {
        const QString key = normalizeWordHeaderFooterToken(text);
        if (headerPartIndexByKey.contains(key)) {
            return headerPartIndexByKey.value(key);
        }
        headerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordHeaderPartXml(text));
        const int index = headerPartXmlList.size();
        headerPartIndexByKey.insert(key, index);
        return index;
    };
    auto appendFooterPart = [&](const QString &text) {
        const QString key = normalizeWordHeaderFooterToken(text);
        if (footerPartIndexByKey.contains(key)) {
            return footerPartIndexByKey.value(key);
        }
        footerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordFooterPartXml(text));
        const int index = footerPartXmlList.size();
        footerPartIndexByKey.insert(key, index);
        return index;
    };
    QHash<int, QString> headerFooterRefsXmlBySectionEndPage;
    bool anySectionEvenOdd = false;
    int sectionFirstPageDiffCount = 0;
    for (const NativeWordSectionSpec &section : sections) {
        const int headerDefaultIndex = appendHeaderPart(section.headerDefault);
        const int headerFirstIndex = section.firstPageDifferent ? appendHeaderPart(section.headerFirst) : headerDefaultIndex;
        const int headerEvenIndex = section.useEvenOdd ? appendHeaderPart(section.headerEven) : headerDefaultIndex;
        const int footerDefaultIndex = appendFooterPart(section.footerDefault);
        const int footerFirstIndex = section.firstPageDifferent ? appendFooterPart(section.footerFirst) : footerDefaultIndex;
        const int footerEvenIndex = section.useEvenOdd ? appendFooterPart(section.footerEven) : footerDefaultIndex;
        const QString refsXml = buildNativeWordSectionHeaderFooterRefsXml(
            section,
            headerDefaultIndex,
            headerFirstIndex,
            headerEvenIndex,
            footerDefaultIndex,
            footerFirstIndex,
            footerEvenIndex
        );
        headerFooterRefsXmlBySectionEndPage.insert(section.endPage, refsXml);
        anySectionEvenOdd = anySectionEvenOdd || section.useEvenOdd;
        if (section.firstPageDifferent) {
            sectionFirstPageDiffCount += 1;
        }
    }
    while (headerPartXmlList.size() < 3) {
        const int idx = headerPartXmlList.size();
        if (idx == 0) {
            headerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordHeaderPartXml(headerFooterPlan.headerDefault));
        } else if (idx == 1) {
            headerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordHeaderPartXml(headerFooterPlan.headerFirst));
        } else {
            headerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordHeaderPartXml(headerFooterPlan.headerEven));
        }
    }
    while (footerPartXmlList.size() < 3) {
        const int idx = footerPartXmlList.size();
        if (idx == 0) {
            footerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordFooterPartXml(headerFooterPlan.footerDefault));
        } else if (idx == 1) {
            footerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordFooterPartXml(headerFooterPlan.footerFirst));
        } else {
            footerPartXmlList.push_back(buildNativeWordFooterPartXml(headerFooterPlan.footerEven));
        }
    }
    QSet<int> usedFootnoteIds;
    const QString bodyXml = buildNativeWordBodyXml(
        document,
        footnoteMap,
        imageRefLookup,
        usedFootnoteIds,
        sections,
        headerFooterRefsXmlBySectionEndPage
    );
    const QString documentXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:document xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:r=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\" "
        "xmlns:wp=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/wordprocessingDrawing\" "
        "xmlns:wp14=\"http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/word/2010/wordprocessingDrawing\" "
        "xmlns:a=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main\" "
        "xmlns:pic=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/picture\">"
        "<w:body>%1</w:body>"
        "</w:document>"
    ).arg(bodyXml);
    QString documentRels = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Relationships xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\">"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rIdStyles\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/styles\" Target=\"styles.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rIdNumbering\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/numbering\" Target=\"numbering.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rIdSettings\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/settings\" Target=\"settings.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rIdFootnotes\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/footnotes\" Target=\"footnotes.xml\"/>"
        "<Relationship Id=\"rIdEndnotes\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/endnotes\" Target=\"endnotes.xml\"/>"
    );
    for (int i = 0; i < headerPartXmlList.size(); ++i) {
        documentRels += QStringLiteral(
            "<Relationship Id=\"rIdHeader%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/header\" Target=\"header%2.xml\"/>"
        ).arg(i + 1).arg(i + 1);
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < footerPartXmlList.size(); ++i) {
        documentRels += QStringLiteral(
            "<Relationship Id=\"rIdFooter%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/footer\" Target=\"footer%2.xml\"/>"
        ).arg(i + 1).arg(i + 1);
    }
    for (const WordAnchorImageRef &ref : imageRefs) {
        documentRels += QStringLiteral(
            "<Relationship Id=\"%1\" Type=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships/image\" Target=\"media/%2\"/>"
        ).arg(escapeXml(ref.relId), escapeXml(ref.fileName));
    }
    documentRels += QStringLiteral("</Relationships>");
    const QString stylesXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:styles xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\">"
        "<w:style w:type=\"paragraph\" w:default=\"1\" w:styleId=\"Normal\"><w:name w:val=\"Normal\"/></w:style>"
        "<w:style w:type=\"paragraph\" w:styleId=\"Heading1\"><w:name w:val=\"heading 1\"/><w:qFormat/>"
        "<w:pPr><w:outlineLvl w:val=\"0\"/></w:pPr><w:rPr><w:b/><w:sz w:val=\"32\"/></w:rPr></w:style>"
        "<w:style w:type=\"paragraph\" w:styleId=\"Heading2\"><w:name w:val=\"heading 2\"/><w:qFormat/>"
        "<w:pPr><w:outlineLvl w:val=\"1\"/></w:pPr><w:rPr><w:b/><w:sz w:val=\"28\"/></w:rPr></w:style>"
        "<w:style w:type=\"paragraph\" w:styleId=\"Heading3\"><w:name w:val=\"heading 3\"/><w:qFormat/>"
        "<w:pPr><w:outlineLvl w:val=\"2\"/></w:pPr><w:rPr><w:b/><w:sz w:val=\"26\"/></w:rPr></w:style>"
        "<w:style w:type=\"paragraph\" w:styleId=\"Heading4\"><w:name w:val=\"heading 4\"/><w:qFormat/>"
        "<w:pPr><w:outlineLvl w:val=\"3\"/></w:pPr><w:rPr><w:b/><w:sz w:val=\"24\"/></w:rPr></w:style>"
        "<w:style w:type=\"paragraph\" w:styleId=\"Heading5\"><w:name w:val=\"heading 5\"/><w:qFormat/>"
        "<w:pPr><w:outlineLvl w:val=\"4\"/></w:pPr><w:rPr><w:b/><w:sz w:val=\"22\"/></w:rPr></w:style>"
        "<w:style w:type=\"paragraph\" w:styleId=\"Heading6\"><w:name w:val=\"heading 6\"/><w:qFormat/>"
        "<w:pPr><w:outlineLvl w:val=\"5\"/></w:pPr><w:rPr><w:b/><w:sz w:val=\"21\"/></w:rPr></w:style>"
        "</w:styles>"
    );
    const QString numberingXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:numbering xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\">"
        "<w:abstractNum w:abstractNumId=\"0\">"
        "<w:lvl w:ilvl=\"0\"><w:start w:val=\"1\"/><w:numFmt w:val=\"decimal\"/><w:lvlText w:val=\"%1.\"/></w:lvl>"
        "<w:lvl w:ilvl=\"1\"><w:start w:val=\"1\"/><w:numFmt w:val=\"decimal\"/><w:lvlText w:val=\"%1.%2.\"/></w:lvl>"
        "<w:lvl w:ilvl=\"2\"><w:start w:val=\"1\"/><w:numFmt w:val=\"decimal\"/><w:lvlText w:val=\"%1.%2.%3.\"/></w:lvl>"
        "</w:abstractNum>"
        "<w:num w:numId=\"1\"><w:abstractNumId w:val=\"0\"/></w:num>"
        "<w:num w:numId=\"2\"><w:abstractNumId w:val=\"0\"/><w:lvlOverride w:ilvl=\"0\"><w:startOverride w:val=\"1\"/></w:lvlOverride></w:num>"
        "</w:numbering>"
    );
    const QString settingsXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:settings xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\">"
        "%1<w:defaultTabStop w:val=\"720\"/>"
        "<w:updateFields w:val=\"true\"/><w:doNotShadeFormData/>"
        "<w:footnotePr><w:numFmt w:val=\"decimal\"/><w:numRestart w:val=\"eachSect\"/></w:footnotePr>"
        "<w:endnotePr><w:numFmt w:val=\"decimal\"/><w:numRestart w:val=\"eachSect\"/></w:endnotePr>"
        "</w:settings>"
    ).arg(anySectionEvenOdd ? QStringLiteral("<w:evenAndOddHeaders/>") : QString());
    QString footnoteItems = QStringLiteral(
        "<w:footnote w:id=\"-1\"><w:p><w:r><w:separator/></w:r></w:p></w:footnote>"
        "<w:footnote w:id=\"0\"><w:p><w:r><w:continuationSeparator/></w:r></w:p></w:footnote>"
    );
    const QList<int> sortedFootnoteIds = footnoteMap.keys();
    for (const int footnoteId : sortedFootnoteIds) {
        if (!usedFootnoteIds.contains(footnoteId)) {
            continue;
        }
        footnoteItems += QStringLiteral(
            "<w:footnote w:id=\"%1\"><w:p><w:r><w:t xml:space=\"preserve\">%2</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:footnote>"
        ).arg(footnoteId).arg(escapeXml(footnoteMap.value(footnoteId)));
    }
    const QString footnotesXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:footnotes xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\">%1</w:footnotes>"
    ).arg(footnoteItems);
    QString endnoteItems = QStringLiteral(
        "<w:endnote w:id=\"-1\"><w:p><w:r><w:separator/></w:r></w:p></w:endnote>"
        "<w:endnote w:id=\"0\"><w:p><w:r><w:continuationSeparator/></w:r></w:p></w:endnote>"
    );
    int endnoteId = 1;
    for (const int footnoteId : sortedFootnoteIds) {
        if (!usedFootnoteIds.contains(footnoteId)) {
            continue;
        }
        endnoteItems += QStringLiteral(
            "<w:endnote w:id=\"%1\"><w:p><w:r><w:t xml:space=\"preserve\">%2</w:t></w:r></w:p></w:endnote>"
        ).arg(endnoteId++).arg(escapeXml(footnoteMap.value(footnoteId)));
    }
    const QString endnotesXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<w:endnotes xmlns:w=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main\">%1</w:endnotes>"
    ).arg(endnoteItems);
    const QString appDisplayName = escapeXml(QString::fromUtf8(APP_DISPLAY_NAME));
    const QString coreXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<cp:coreProperties xmlns:cp=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/metadata/core-properties\" "
        "xmlns:dc=\"http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/\" xmlns:dcterms=\"http://purl.org/dc/terms/\" "
        "xmlns:dcmitype=\"http://purl.org/dc/dcmitype/\" xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\">"
        "<dc:title>Native OOXML DOCX</dc:title>"
        "<dc:creator>%1</dc:creator>"
        "</cp:coreProperties>"
    ).arg(appDisplayName);
    const QString appXml = QStringLiteral(
        "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\" standalone=\"yes\"?>"
        "<Properties xmlns=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/extended-properties\" "
        "xmlns:vt=\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/docPropsVTypes\">"
        "<Application>%1</Application>"
        "</Properties>"
    ).arg(appDisplayName);
    auto appendContentTypeOverride = [&](const QString &partName, const QString &contentType) {
        const QString marker = QStringLiteral("</Types>");
        const int pos = contentTypes.lastIndexOf(marker);
        if (pos >= 0) {
            const QString overrideXml = QStringLiteral(
                "<Override PartName=\"/%1\" ContentType=\"%2\"/>"
            ).arg(partName).arg(contentType);
            contentTypes = contentTypes.left(pos) + overrideXml + contentTypes.mid(pos);
        }
    };
    for (int i = 4; i <= headerPartXmlList.size(); ++i) {
        appendContentTypeOverride(
            QStringLiteral("word/header%1.xml").arg(i),
            QStringLiteral("application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.header+xml")
        );
    }
    for (int i = 4; i <= footerPartXmlList.size(); ++i) {
        appendContentTypeOverride(
            QStringLiteral("word/footer%1.xml").arg(i),
            QStringLiteral("application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.footer+xml")
        );
    }
    if (!writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("[Content_Types].xml"), contentTypes)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("_rels/.rels"), rootRels)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("word/document.xml"), documentXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("word/_rels/document.xml.rels"), documentRels)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("word/styles.xml"), stylesXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("word/numbering.xml"), numberingXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("word/settings.xml"), settingsXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("word/footnotes.xml"), footnotesXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("word/endnotes.xml"), endnotesXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("docProps/core.xml"), coreXml)
        || !writePackagePart(root, QStringLiteral("docProps/app.xml"), appXml)) {
        return false;
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < headerPartXmlList.size(); ++i) {
        if (!writePackagePart(
                root,
                QStringLiteral("word/header%1.xml").arg(i + 1),
                headerPartXmlList[i])) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < footerPartXmlList.size(); ++i) {
        if (!writePackagePart(
                root,
                QStringLiteral("word/footer%1.xml").arg(i + 1),
                footerPartXmlList[i])) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    // 1x1 PNG placeholder for anchor embedded image resources.
    const QByteArray tinyPng = QByteArray::fromBase64(
        "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAQAAAC1HAwCAAAAC0lEQVR4nGNgYAAAAAMAASsJTYQAAAAASUVORK5CYII=");
    int sourceBackedImageCount = 0;
    for (const WordAnchorImageRef &ref : imageRefs) {
        const QString mediaPath = QDir(root).filePath(QStringLiteral("word/media/%1").arg(ref.fileName));
        const QFileInfo mediaInfo(mediaPath);
        QDir mediaDir = mediaInfo.dir();
        if (!mediaDir.exists() && !mediaDir.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."))) {
            return false;
        }
        QByteArray payload = tinyPng;
        if (!ref.sourcePath.isEmpty()) {
            QFile src(ref.sourcePath);
            if (src.open(QIODevice::ReadOnly)) {
                const QByteArray data = src.readAll();
                if (!data.isEmpty()) {
                    payload = data;
                    sourceBackedImageCount += 1;
                }
            }
        }
        if (!writeBinaryFile(mediaPath, payload)) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    if (!zipDirectoryToFile(root, targetPath, traceLogs)) {
        return false;
    }
    traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("DOCX 保真诊断: sections=%1, firstPageDiff=%2, evenOdd=%3, usedFootnotes=%4, anchorImages=%5(source=%6), fieldAst(nodes=%7,nested=%8,maxDepth=%9,if=%10,set=%11,ref=%12,seq=%13,toc=%14)")
        .arg(sections.size())
        .arg(sectionFirstPageDiffCount)
        .arg(anySectionEvenOdd ? 1 : 0)
        .arg(usedFootnoteIds.size())
        .arg(imageRefs.size())
        .arg(sourceBackedImageCount)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.nodeCount)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.nestedNodeCount)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.maxDepth)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.ifCount)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.setCount)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.refCount)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.seqCount)
        .arg(fieldAstStats.tocCount));
    traceLogs.append(QStringLiteral("DOCX 原生 OOXML 导出完成（保真链路）"));
    return true;
}


} // namespace

bool exportWordsDocxNative(const DocumentModel &document, const QString &targetPath, QStringList &traceLogs) {
    return exportNativeDocx(document, targetPath, traceLogs);
}

} // namespace converter
