# Words Module

`src/core/words` 用于承载 DOCX 专属识别、映射、导出实现。

当前状态：
- 已新增 `DocxExporter` 类型声明：`DocxExporter.h`。
- 导出注册中心接口已迁移到 `core/common/export`。
- 后续将继续把 DOCX OOXML 细分实现从共享实现体中继续拆出到 `words` 目录。

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
📄  pdf-master/src/main.cpp
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#include <QApplication>
#include <QCommandLineOption>
#include <QCommandLineParser>
#include <QDateTime>
#include <QDir>
#include <QFileInfo>
#include <QMetaType>
#include <QString>
#include <QStringList>
#include <QTextStream>

#include "app/MainWindow.h"
#include "core/application/ConversionPipeline.h"
#include "core/platform/runtime/ConversionTypes.h"

namespace {

bool parseOutputFormat(const QString &token, converter::OutputFormat &format) {
    const QString normalized = token.trimmed().toLower();
    if (normalized == QStringLiteral("docx")) {
        format = converter::OutputFormat::Docx;
        return true;
    }
    if (normalized == QStringLiteral("xlsx")) {
        format = converter::OutputFormat::Xlsx;
        return true;
    }
    if (normalized == QStringLiteral("pptx")) {
        format = converter::OutputFormat::Pptx;
        return true;
    }
    return false;
}

int runCliBatchConversion(const QCommandLineParser &parser) {
    QTextStream out(stdout);
    QTextStream err(stderr);
    const QString outputDir = parser.value(QStringLiteral("output-dir")).trimmed();
    if (outputDir.isEmpty()) {
        err << "缺少 --output-dir\n";
        return 2;
    }
    QDir output(outputDir);
    if (!output.exists() && !output.mkpath(QStringLiteral("."))) {
        err << "无法创建输出目录: " << outputDir << "\n";
        return 2;
    }

    QStringList inputs;
    const QString inputFile = parser.value(QStringLiteral("input")).trimmed();
    const QString inputDir = parser.value(QStringLiteral("input-dir")).trimmed();
    if (!inputFile.isEmpty()) {
        inputs.push_back(QFileInfo(inputFile).absoluteFilePath());
    }
    if (!inputDir.isEmpty()) {
        const QDir dir(inputDir);
        const QFileInfoList pdfs = dir.entryInfoList({QStringLiteral("*.pdf"), QStringLiteral("*.PDF")}, QDir::Files, QDir::Name);
        for (const QFileInfo &pdf : pdfs) {
            inputs.push_back(pdf.absoluteFilePath());
        }
    }
    inputs.removeDuplicates();
    if (inputs.isEmpty()) {
        err << "没有可转换输入，请提供 --input 或 --input-dir\n";
        return 2;
    }

    QStringList formatTokens = parser.value(QStringLiteral("formats")).split(',', Qt::SkipEmptyParts);
    if (formatTokens.isEmpty()) {
        formatTokens = {QStringLiteral("docx"), QStringLiteral("xlsx"), QStringLiteral("pptx")};
    }
    QVector<converter::OutputFormat> formats;
    for (const QString &token : formatTokens) {
        converter::OutputFormat fmt = converter::OutputFormat::Docx;
        if (!parseOutputFormat(token, fmt)) {
            err << "不支持的格式: " << token << "（仅支持 docx/xlsx/pptx）\n";
            return 2;
        }
        if (!formats.contains(fmt)) {
            formats.push_back(fmt);
        }
    }

    converter::ConversionPipeline pipeline;
    int total = 0;
    int passed = 0;
    int failed = 0;
    const int maxRetries = qMax(0, parser.value(QStringLiteral("max-retries")).toInt());
    const bool ocrFallback = !parser.isSet(QStringLiteral("disable-ocr-fallback"));
    for (const QString &pdf : inputs) {
        if (!QFileInfo::exists(pdf)) {
            err << "[SKIP] 输入不存在: " << pdf << "\n";
            continue;
        }
        for (const converter::OutputFormat fmt : formats) {
            total += 1;
            converter::ConversionTask task;
            task.taskId = QStringLiteral("cli_%1_%2_%3")
                              .arg(QFileInfo(pdf).completeBaseName())
                              .arg(converter::outputFormatToSuffix(fmt))
                              .arg(QDateTime::currentMSecsSinceEpoch());
            task.inputPdf = pdf;
            task.outputDir = output.absolutePath();
            task.format = fmt;
            task.maxRetries = maxRetries;
            task.enableOcrFallback = ocrFallback;
            const converter::ConversionResult result = pipeline.execute(task);
            if (result.ok) {
                passed += 1;
                out << "[OK] " << task.inputPdf << " -> " << result.outputPath << "\n";
            } else {
                failed += 1;
                err << "[FAIL] " << task.inputPdf << " (" << converter::outputFormatToSuffix(fmt)
                    << "): " << result.message << "\n";
                for (const QString &trace : result.traces) {
                    err << "  " << trace << "\n";
                }
            }
        }
    }
    out << "CLI转换完成: total=" << total << ", ok=" << passed << ", failed=" << failed << "\n";
    return failed > 0 ? 1 : 0;
}

} // namespace

int main(int argc, char *argv[]) {
    QApplication app(argc, argv);
    qRegisterMetaType<converter::OutputFormat>("converter::OutputFormat");
    qRegisterMetaType<converter::ConversionTask>("converter::ConversionTask");
    qRegisterMetaType<converter::ConversionResult>("converter::ConversionResult");
    const QString appName = QString::fromUtf8(APP_DISPLAY_NAME);
    app.setApplicationDisplayName(appName);
    app.setApplicationName(appName);

    QCommandLineParser parser;
    parser.setApplicationDescription(appName);
    parser.addHelpOption();
    parser.addOption(QCommandLineOption(QStringList() << QStringLiteral("cli"), QStringLiteral("启用命令行批量转换模式")));
    parser.addOption(QCommandLineOption(QStringList() << QStringLiteral("input"), QStringLiteral("单个输入 PDF"), QStringLiteral("file")));
    parser.addOption(QCommandLineOption(QStringList() << QStringLiteral("input-dir"), QStringLiteral("批量输入目录（扫描 *.pdf）"), QStringLiteral("dir")));
    parser.addOption(QCommandLineOption(QStringList() << QStringLiteral("output-dir"), QStringLiteral("输出目录"), QStringLiteral("dir")));
    parser.addOption(QCommandLineOption(QStringList() << QStringLiteral("formats"), QStringLiteral("输出格式列表，逗号分隔"), QStringLiteral("formats"), QStringLiteral("docx,xlsx,pptx")));
    parser.addOption(QCommandLineOption(QStringList() << QStringLiteral("max-retries"), QStringLiteral("转换重试次数"), QStringLiteral("num"), QStringLiteral("2")));
    parser.addOption(QCommandLineOption(QStringList() << QStringLiteral("disable-ocr-fallback"), QStringLiteral("禁用 OCR 回退")));
    parser.process(app);

    if (parser.isSet(QStringLiteral("cli"))) {
        return runCliBatchConversion(parser);
    }

    MainWindow window;
    window.show();
    return app.exec();
}
